Joshua5:7 
Joshua5:8 Nde o timmini juulnugo ɓe
Joshua5:9 Nden Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Hannde ittumi mbustu Misra dow mooɗon. Ngam maajum ɓe ɗon ewna nokkuure man Gilgal haa wargo hannde.”
Joshua5:10 Nde Isra'iila'en caŋngini haa Gilgal nder yayre kommbi Yeriko
Joshua5:11 Jaŋngo man ɓe puɗɗi nyaamugo nyaamdu lesdi Kanaana
Joshua5:12 Nyannde man mannu acci toɓugo. Diga hitaande man ɓe puɗɗi nyaamugo nyaamdu lesdi Kanaana.
Joshua5:13 Saa'i Yosuwa ɗon baŋnge Yeriko
Joshua5:14 Gorko oo jaabi: “Aa'a
Joshua5:15 Hooreejo honooɓe Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Faɗɗita paɗe ma
Joshua6:1 Yimɓe Yeriko maɓɓi dammuɗe berniwol
Joshua6:2 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Ndaa
Joshua6:3 Nyalaade fuu honooɓe ma taaro berniwol nde woore. Tokka waɗugo bana nii nyalɗe joweego.
Joshua6:4 Liman'en njoweeɗiɗo njogo luwe konu joweeɗiɗi yeeso sundukru. Nyannde joweeɗiɗawre on taaro berniwol nde joweeɗiɗi
Joshua6:5 To ɓe puufi luwe
Joshua6:6 Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna ewni liman'en
Joshua6:7 Nden o umri ummaatoore: “Njehe
Joshua6:8 Fodde umroore Yosuwa
Joshua6:9 
Joshua6:10 Ammaa Yosuwa umruno ummaatoore: “Taa ngooke
Joshua6:11 Bana nii ɓe njahri sundukru Jawmiraawo
Joshua6:12 Jaŋngo man
Joshua6:13 Honooɓe woɗɓe ardi
Joshua6:14 Nyannde ɗiɗawre nde'e ɓe taari berniwol nde woore
Joshua6:15 Nyannde joweeɗiɗawre
Joshua6:16 Nder taarannde joweeɗiɗawre
Joshua6:17 Berniwol ngol e ko woni nder maagol fuu
Joshua6:18 Ammaa kakkile! Ndeente ko'e mon
Joshua6:19 Cardi e kaŋŋeeri e kuuje njamndi ɓaleeri e mboɗeeri fuu ɗum cenaaɗum ngam Jawmiraawo
Joshua6:20 Kadiboo liman'en puufi luwe. Nde ummaatoore Isra'iila nani ɗum
Joshua6:21 Bee kaafaaje maɓɓe ɓe nattini ko woni nder maagol fuu: worɓe e rewɓe
Joshua6:22 Yosuwa wi'i horooɓe lesdi ɗiɗo go: “Naste suudu debbo daakaareejo go
Joshua6:23 Sukaaɓe ɗiɗo go njehi
Joshua6:24 Nden ɓe nguli berniwol e ko woni nder maagol fuu. Ammaa ɓe ndesi cardi e kaŋŋeeri e kuuje njamndi ɓaleeri e mboɗeeri nder ndesaari suudu Jawmiraawo.
Joshua6:25 Bana nii Yosuwa acciri Rahab
Joshua6:26 Saa'i man Yosuwa waɗi hunayeere nde'e
Joshua6:27 Jawmiraawo wondi bee Yosuwa
Joshua7:1 Ammaa Isra'iila'en ngewi umroore Allah dow kuuje kaɗaaɗe. Akan ɓii Karmi ɓii Zabdi ɓii Zeraha
Joshua7:2 Saa'i ɓe ɗon haa Yeriko
Joshua7:3 Nden ɓe ngarti haa Yosuwa
Joshua7:4 Worɓe ujine tato njehi haɓugo bee Ayu
Joshua7:5 Yimɓe Ayu mbari worɓe cappanɗe tato e njoweego nder Isra'iila'en. Ɓe taasni ɓe diga dammugal Ayu haa ɓe njotti Sebariima
Joshua7:6 Yosuwa e ndotti'en Isra'iila ceeki limce muuɗum'en
Joshua7:7 Yosuwa wi'i: “Kayto! Allah Jawmiraawo
Joshua7:8 Jawmiraawo
Joshua7:9 To Kanaani'en e yimɓe woɗɓe nder lesdi nani ɗum
Joshua7:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Umma! Koni kippotoɗa haa lesdi bana nii?
Joshua7:11 Isra'iila waɗi hakke. Ɓe piisti alkawal ngal kaɓɓumi bee maɓɓe dow umroore am. Ɓe koo'i nder kuuje kaɗaaɗe
Joshua7:12 Ngam maajum Isra'iila'en ndartantaako konne'en muuɗum'en. Ɓe ndoggan yeeso konne'en maɓɓe
Joshua7:13 Umma
Joshua7:14 Jaŋngo fajiri on ɓadito fodde le'i mon. Lenyol ngol Jawmiraawo naŋngata ɗum
Joshua7:15 Naŋngeteeɗo ngam hakke haram
Joshua7:16 Yosuwa dawi cub. O ɓadini Isra'iila'en fodde le'i muuɗum'en
Joshua7:17 O ɓadini geɓe nder lenyol Yahuuda
Joshua7:18 O ɓadini worɓe saare Zabdi
Joshua7:19 Yosuwa wi'i Akan: “Ɓiŋngel am
Joshua7:20 Akan jaabi: “Gooŋga
Joshua7:21 Nder keɓal konu ngi'mi alkibbaare woonde iwnde haa Sine'ar e ceede cardi teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi e tayre kaŋŋeeri nde teddeeŋga mum woni baakin reeta kilo. Suuno waɗi yam
Joshua7:22 Yosuwa neli woɗɓe
Joshua7:23 Ɓe koo'i ɗum
Joshua7:24 Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en fuu koo'i Akan Jerahaajo e cardi e alkibbaare e tayre kaŋŋeeri e ɓiɓɓe maako e worɓe e rewɓe e na'i maako e bamɗe maako e dammooji maako e laymaaru maako e ko o mari fuu
Joshua7:25 Yosuwa wi'i: “Koni ngadduɗa sarru dow amin? Hannde kam Jawmiraawo ukkan sarru ngu dow maaɗa.” Nden Isra'iila'en fuu piɗi Akan bee kaa'e haa o maayi. Ɓe piɗi boo yimɓe saare maako
Joshua7:26 Ɓe mbaagi waagaare kaa'e mawnde dow maɓɓe
Joshua8:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Yahdu bee honooɓe maaɗa fuu haa Ayu
Joshua8:2 Waɗ Ayu e laamiiɗo maagol ko mbaɗɗa Yeriko e laamiiɗo maagol. Ammaa koo'e keɓal konu
Joshua8:3 Yosuwa e honooɓe fuu ummi
Joshua8:4 O wi'i ɓe: “Kakkile! Mbaɗe baaltol haa ɓaawo berniwol. Taa ndaaye ngol masin
Joshua8:5 Min e yimɓe wonduɓe bee am
Joshua8:6 Ɓe taasnan min haa to min ndaayni ɓe bee berniwol. Kamɓe ɓe numan min ɗon ndogga yeeso maɓɓe bana naane.
Joshua8:7 Onon on ummoto haa ɓaawo berniwol
Joshua8:8 To on kooci ngol
Joshua8:9 Bana nii Yosuwa neliri ɓe
Joshua8:10 Jaŋngo maajum Yosuwa dawi cub
Joshua8:11 Honooɓe wonduɓe bee maako fuu njehi
Joshua8:12 Yosuwa hoo'i worɓe baakin ujine njowo
Joshua8:13 Jama'aare konu saŋngini haa woyla berniwol
Joshua8:14 Jaŋngo maajum fajiri cub
Joshua8:15 Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en fuu mbaɗi dabare doggugo yeeso maɓɓe bee laawol ladde
Joshua8:16 Nde yimɓe nder Ayu fuu nani ewnaandu
Joshua8:17 Walaa gorko mo lutti nder Ayu e Baytila. Ɓe fuu ɓe ngurti
Joshua8:18 Nden Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Fortu labbo ma dow Ayu
Joshua8:19 nde o forti juŋngo maako
Joshua8:20 Nde yimɓe Ayu ngeesiti
Joshua8:21 Nde Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en ngi'i yimɓe baaltol kooci berniwol
Joshua8:22 Isra'iila'en luttuɓe ngurti berniwol
Joshua8:23 Ammaa laamiiɗo Ayu
Joshua8:24 Isra'iila'en mbari yimɓe Ayu fuu wonɓe nder ladde haa ɓe taasni ɓe bee kaafaaje. Nden ɓe fuu ɓe lori haa Ayu
Joshua8:25 Yosuwa ɗon forti labbo mum dow Ayu haa Isra'iila'en nattini yimɓe Ayu fuu. Nyannde maajum
Joshua8:26 
Joshua8:27 Ammaa keɓal konu
Joshua8:28 Yosuwa wuli Ayu
Joshua8:29 O ɓili laamiiɗo Ayu dow lekki
Joshua8:30 Saa'i man Yosuwa mahani Jawmiraawo
Joshua8:31 bana Muusa
Joshua8:32 Gite Isra'iila'en
Joshua8:33 Isra'iila'en bee ndotti'en e kaliifa'en e hiitooɓe
Joshua8:34 Ɓaawoɗon Yosuwa jaŋngi bolle tawreeta fuu
Joshua8:35 Umrooje Muusa koo ɗeye
Joshua9:1 Habaru jaalorgal Isra'iila'en warani laamiiɓe wonɓe gaa'e Urdun fuu
Joshua9:2 ɓe mooɓi
Joshua9:3 Ammaa nde jooɗiiɓe haa Gibiyon nani ko Yosuwa waɗi Yeriko e Ayu
Joshua9:4 ɓe mbaɗi ƴoyre. Ɓe koo'i njooɓaaje e kaywaaji kiiɗɗi ngam bamɗe maɓɓe e kanyakanyaaji kiiɗɗi ceekɗi
Joshua9:5 e paɗe kiiɗɗe takkaaɗe haa kosɗe maɓɓe
Joshua9:6 Ɓe njehi haa saŋngeere haa Gilgal
Joshua9:7 Ammaa Isra'iila'en mbi'i Hewi'en ɓe'e: “Ngam ɗume min kaɓɓata alkawal bee mooɗon? Teema on ɗon njooɗi ɓadiiɗum bee amin.”
Joshua9:8 Ɓe mbi'i Yosuwa: “Min maccuɓe ma.” Yosuwa ƴami ɓe: “On ɓeye? Toy iwɗon?”
Joshua9:9 Ɓe njaabi mo: “Maccuɓe ma ngari diga lesdi ndaayiindi masin
Joshua9:10 e ko o waɗi laamiiɓe Amoori'en ɗiɗo jooɗinooɓe gaɗa Urdun fuu
Joshua9:11 Ndotti'en amin e yimɓe lesdi amin fuu mbi'i: Koo'e njooɓaari laawol haa juuɗe mon. Njehe fottugo bee maɓɓe
Joshua9:12 Tamseere amin nde'e
Joshua9:13 Kanyakanyaaji ɗi'i
Joshua9:14 Nden Isra'iila'en nyaami njooɓaaje maɓɓe bilaa ƴamgo muuyo Jawmiraawo.
Joshua9:15 Yosuwa narri bee maɓɓe
Joshua9:16 Ɓe kaɓɓi alkawal bee maɓɓe. Ammaa ɓaawo nyalɗe tati
Joshua9:17 Isra'iila'en ummi
Joshua9:18 Ammaa Isra'iila'en mbaraay Gibiyoni'en ɓe'e
Joshua9:19 Ammaa mawɓe fuu mbi'i ɓe: “Min kunorani ɓe bee innde Jawmiraawo
Joshua9:20 Ndaa ko mbaɗeten: En accan ɓe ɓe ngeeɗa ngam daliila hunayeere nde min kunani ɓe. To naa non
Joshua9:21 Sey ɓe ngeeɗa
Joshua9:22 Yosuwa umri ewni Gibiyoni'en
Joshua9:23 Ngam maajum jonta on naalaaɓe. Haa foroy onon e danygol mon on laatoto maccuɓe
Joshua9:24 Ɓe njaabi Yosuwa: “Naywa
Joshua9:25 Min ɗon haa juŋngo ma
Joshua9:26 Ndaa ko Yosuwa waɗani ɓe: O hisni ɓe ngam taa Isra'iila'en mbara ɓe.
Joshua9:27 Ammaa nyalaade man Yosuwa laatini ɓe teenooɓe leɗɗe e nyeɗooɓe ndiyam ngam jama'aare e ngam hirsirde Jawmiraawo. Haa wargo hannde ɓe ɗon tokko waɗugo ɗum haa nokkuure nde Jawmiraawo suɓata.
Joshua10:1 Adoni-Sadik
Joshua10:2 Habaru maajum hulni yimɓe Urusaliima masin
Joshua10:3 Ngam man Adoni-Sadik
Joshua10:4 “Ngare haa am
Joshua10:5 Laamiiɓe Amoori'en njowo ɓe'e mooɓi
Joshua10:6 Yimɓe Gibiyon neldi habaru haa Yosuwa nder saŋngeere haa Gilgal wi'ugo mo: “Taa wudin maccuɓe ma! War law
Joshua10:7 Yosuwa e jama'aare konu mum e honooɓe semmbiɗɓe fuu ummi Gilgal.
Joshua10:8 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Taa hul ɓe
Joshua10:9 Jemmaare fuu Yosuwa e yimɓe mum njehi diga Gilgal haa Gibiyon
Joshua10:10 Jawmiraawo jiiɓi hakkiilooji Amoori'en nde ɓe ngi'i Isra'iila'en. Isra'iila'en mbari Amoori'en ɗuuɗɓe masin haa Gibiyon
Joshua10:11 Saa'i Amoori'en ɗon ndogga yeeso Isra'iila'en
Joshua10:12 Yosuwa wolwani Jawmiraawo nyalaade nde Jawmiraawo hokki Isra'iila'en fuu jaalorgal dow Amoori'en
Joshua10:13 Fakat
Joshua10:14 Nyalaade bana maare meeɗaay laataago e meetataa boo
Joshua10:15 Nden Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en fuu lori nder saŋngeere haa Gilgal.
Joshua10:16 Laamiiɓe Amoori'en njowo go ndoggi
Joshua10:17 Goɗɗo tawi ɓe ton
Joshua10:18 O wi'i: “Talle kaa'e mawɗe haa hunnduko lowol
Joshua10:19 Ammaa taa ndare
Joshua10:20 Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en mbari ɗuuɗɓe maɓɓe
Joshua10:21 Nden Isra'iila'en fuu ngarti jam haa Yosuwa nder saŋngeere haa Makkeda. Ɓaawoɗon walaa koo gooto nder yimɓe lesdi maɓɓiti hunnduko mum dow Isra'iila'en.
Joshua10:22 Nden Yosuwa wi'i: “Maɓɓite lowol
Joshua10:23 Ɓe mbaɗi bana nii
Joshua10:24 Nde ɓe ɗon ngurtina ɓe
Joshua10:25 Yosuwa wi'i ɓe: “Taa kule
Joshua10:26 Nden Yosuwa mbari ɓe
Joshua10:27 Wakkati naaŋge muti
Joshua10:28 Nyalaade man nden Yosuwa nyaami berniwol Makkeda. O nattini wonɓe nder berniwol e laamiiɗo maagol fuu bee kaafahi
Joshua10:29 Ɓaawo maajum Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en fuu ummi Makkeda
Joshua10:30 Kaŋgol boo Jawmiraawo hokki ngol Isra'iila'en
Joshua10:31 Nden Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en wonduɓe bee muuɗum fuu ummi Libna
Joshua10:32 Nyannde ɗiɗawre Jawmiraawo hokki Lakis haa Isra'iila'en. Ɓe nyaami ngol
Joshua10:33 Horam
Joshua10:34 Nden Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en wonduɓe bee muuɗum fuu ummi Lakis
Joshua10:35 Nyalaade maajum ɓe nyaami ngol
Joshua10:36 Ɓaawo man Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en wonduɓe bee muuɗum fuu ummi Egilon
Joshua10:37 ɓe nyaami ngol. Ɓe mbari laamiiɗo e wonɓe nder maagol e wonɓe nder gure taariiɗe ngol fuu bee kaafaaje
Joshua10:38 Nden Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en wonduɓe bee muuɗum fuu ngayliti gal Debir
Joshua10:39 Ɓe nyaami ngol bee gure maagol
Joshua10:40 Yosuwa nyaami lesdi fuu. O jaali laamiiɓe haa kooseeje e Lesdi Fombina
Joshua10:41 Yosuwa jaali ɓe diga Kaades-Barne'a haa Gaaza
Joshua10:42 Laamiiɓe ɓe'e e lesɗe muuɗum'en fuu
Joshua10:43 Nden Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en fuu lorti nder saŋngeere haa Gilgal.
Joshua11:1 Yabin
Joshua11:2 e laamiiɓe wonɓe haa woyla dow kooseeje e nder waadiwol Urdun haa fombina Kinneret e nder lesdi towndiije e haa Nafot Door gal hiirnaaŋge
Joshua11:3 haa Kanaani'en gal fuunaaŋge e hiirnaaŋge
Joshua11:4 Laamiiɓe man ngari
Joshua11:5 Laamiiɓe ɓe'e fuu kawti
Joshua11:6 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yosuwa: “Taa hul ɓe! Jaŋngo bana wakkati jonta ɓe fuu ɓe mbaraaɓe. Min mi mbaran ɓe ngam daliila Isra'iila. On coppan korle pucci maɓɓe
Joshua11:7 Yosuwa e honooɓe muuɗum fuu ukkani ɓe bee juhuki haa maayel Meerom.
Joshua11:8 Jawmiraawo hokki Isra'iila'en konne'en muuɗum'en. Ɓe njaali ɓe
Joshua11:9 Yosuwa waɗi ɓe bana Jawmiraawo wi'no mo: Ɓe coppi korle pucci maɓɓe
Joshua11:10 Nde Yosuwa ɗon lorto
Joshua11:11 Ɓe nattini ko woni nder berniwol fuu
Joshua11:12 Yosuwa nyaami berniiji ɗi'i fuu
Joshua11:13 Ammaa Isra'iila'en ngulaay gure nyiɓaaɗe dow towndiije
Joshua11:14 Isra'iila'en koo'i kuuje marɗe saman e dabbaaji fuu ngam ko'e muuɗum'en
Joshua11:15 Jawmiraawo umruno Muusa
Joshua11:16 Yosuwa nyaami lesdi maajum fuu: Lesdi kooseeje e Lesdi Fombina fuu
Joshua11:17 O hooci ndi diga hooseere Halak wakeere Se'ir haa yotti Ba'al-Gada nder waadiwol Libanon haa les hooseere Hermoon. Yosuwa haɓi bee laamiiɓe lesdi man nyalɗe ɗuuɗɗe
Joshua11:18 
Joshua11:19 Walaa berniwol ɗaɓɓi sulhu bee Isra'iila'en
Joshua11:20 Jawmiraawo waɗi ɓe caatina ɓerɗe maɓɓe
Joshua11:21 Saa'i maajum Yosuwa yehi
Joshua11:22 Enaki'en luttaay nder lesdi Isra'iila'en
Joshua11:23 Yosuwa hooci lesdi fuu
Joshua12:1 Isra'iila'en nyaamino lesdi haa fuunaaŋge maayo Urdun diga naane
Joshua12:2 Sihon
Joshua12:3 non boo ladde haa weendu Kinneret wakeere fuunaaŋge Urdun
Joshua12:4 Laamiiɗo ɗiɗaɓo ɗum Ook mo Baasan
Joshua12:5 O laamanino lesdi haa hooseere Hermoon e Salka e Baasan fuu haa yotti keerol Gesuri'en e Makati'en
Joshua12:6 Muusa
Joshua12:7 Yosuwa e Isra'iila'en njaali laamiiɓe fuu gaa'e maayo Urdun
Joshua12:8 waato lesdi kooseeje e lesdi towndiije haa hiirnaaŋge
Joshua12:9 Isra'iila'en njaali laamiiɓe berniiji ɗi'i: Yeriko
Joshua12:10 Urusaliima
Joshua12:11 Yarmut
Joshua12:12 Egilon
Joshua12:13 Debir
Joshua12:14 Horma
Joshua12:15 Libna
Joshua12:16 Makkeda
Joshua12:17 Tappuha
Joshua12:18 Afek nder Saron
Joshua12:19 Hacoor
Joshua12:20 Simiyon
Joshua12:21 Ta'anak
Joshua12:22 Keedes
Joshua12:23 Door haa Nafot Door
Joshua12:24 Tirsa. Limgal laamiiɓe man fuu: cappanɗe tato e ngo'o.
Joshua13:1 Nde Yosuwa naywi masin
Joshua13:2 Lesdi Filisti'en e lesdi Gesuri'en fuu
Joshua13:3 non boo lesdi Awwi'en gal fombina
Joshua13:4 Lutti lesdi Kanaani'en fuu diga Ara nder maral Sidoni'en haa yotti Afek haa keerol Amoori'en.
Joshua13:5 Non boo lesdi Gibili'en
Joshua13:6 Kanjum woni lesdi Sidoni'en jooɗiiɓe nder kooseeje hakkunde Libanon e Misrefot-Mayim. Min bee hoore am mi riiwan ummaatooje ɗe'e fuu yeeso Isra'iila'en. Ammaa an
Joshua13:7 Senndu ndi jonta
Joshua13:8 Reeta lenyol Manassa feere e le'i Ruben e Gada keɓno maral muuɗum'en ngal Muusa
Joshua13:9 diga Aro'er haa fomoonde maayo Arnon e berniwol haa caka waadiwol man e ƴoolde Medeba haa yotti Dibon
Joshua13:10 e gure fuu ɗe Sihon
Joshua13:11 Non boo Gile'at e lesdi Gesuri'en e Makati'en e hooseere Hermoon e Baasan fuu haa yotti Salka.
Joshua13:12 Non boo maral Ook
Joshua13:13 Ammaa Isra'iila'en ndiiwaay Gesuri'en e Makati'en
Joshua13:14 Lenyol Lewi
Joshua13:15 Muusa hokki lenyol Ruben geɗal lesdi fodde geɓe maagol.
Joshua13:16 Ndaa ko woni geɗal maɓɓe haa lesdi: Diga Aro'er haa fomoonde maayo Arnon e berniwol haa caka waadiwol man e ƴoolde Medeba fuu
Joshua13:17 Hesbon e gure maagol gonɗe dow ƴoolde
Joshua13:18 e Yahas e Kedemot e Meefa'at
Joshua13:19 e Kiriyatayim e Sibama e Jeret-Sakar dow hooseere nder waadiwol
Joshua13:20 e Bayti-Pe'or e diirtorɗe hooseere Pisiga e Bayti-Yesimot
Joshua13:21 e gure ƴoolde fuu e maral Sihon
Joshua13:22 Ammaa Balaama ɓii Be'or
Joshua13:23 Urdun laatake keerol yimɓe Ruben hiirnaaŋgewol. Kanjum woni geɗal yimɓe Ruben fodde ci'e maɓɓe
Joshua13:24 Muusa hokki lenyol Gada geɗal lesdi fodde geɓe maagol.
Joshua13:25 Ndaa ko woni geɗal maɓɓe haa lesdi: Ya'ajer e berniiji Gile'at fuu e reeta lesdi Ammooni'en haa yotti Aro'er tiitotirŋgol bee Rabba.
Joshua13:26 Ɓe keɓi lesdi diga Hesbon haa Ramat-Mispe e Betonim
Joshua13:27 Nder waadiwol boo Bayti-Haaram e Bayti-Nimra e Sukkot e Safuun
Joshua13:28 Kanjum woni geɗal yimɓe Gada fodde ci'e maɓɓe
Joshua13:29 Muusa hokki boo reeta lenyol Manassa geɗal lesdi fodde geɓe maagol.
Joshua13:30 O marni ɓe lesdi yahugo Mahanayim e lesdi Baasan fuu
Joshua13:31 Ɓe keɓi reeta Gile'at
Joshua13:32 Bana nii Muusa ronniri ɓe lesdi gaɗa Urdun haa fuunaaŋge Yeriko
Joshua13:33 Ammaa lenyol Lewi
Joshua14:1 Ndaa habaru cennduki lesdi Kanaana haa Isra'iila'en. Eli'azaaru limanjo e Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna e baaba-ci'e'en nder le'i Isra'iila ronni ɓe ɗum.
Joshua14:2 Bana Jawmiraawo umruno Muusa
Joshua14:3 Muusa hokkuno le'i ɗiɗi e reeta lenyol geɗal lesdi haa gaɗa Urdun. Danygol Yusufu waɗi le'i ɗiɗi: Manassa e Efrayim. Ammaa o hokkaay Lewi'en geɗal lesdi
Joshua14:4 
Joshua14:5 Bana Jawmiraawo umruno Muusa
Joshua14:6 Nyannde feere yimɓe Yahuuda ngari haa Yosuwa haa Gilgal. Gooto nder maɓɓe
Joshua14:7 Mi woodino duuɓi cappanɗe nayi
Joshua14:8 Banndiraaɓe am yahduɓe bee am kulni ɓerɗe yimɓe. Ammaa min mi tokki Allah Jawmiraawo am bee ɓernde woore.
Joshua14:9 Nyalaade maajum Muusa huni
Joshua14:10 Ndaa
Joshua14:11 Ammaa koo hannde boo mi cemmbiɗɗo bana nder nyalaade nde Muusa nela yam. Semmbe am he'i haa mi waɗa haɓre
Joshua14:12 Kadi
Joshua14:13 Yosuwa barkiɗini Kaaleb ɓii Yefunna
Joshua14:14 Ngam maajum Heburuun laati geɗal Kaaleb ɓii Yefunna Kenizziijo haa wargo hannde
Joshua14:15 Ɓooyma innde Heburuun wonno Kiriyat-Arba. Arba wonno ɓurɗo mawnugo nder Enaki'en. Nden konu timmi
Joshua15:1 Ɓe mbaɗi kur'u ngam lenyol Yahuuda fodde geɓe maagol. Ɓe keɓi maral haa wakeere keerol Edoom e ladde Siin gal fombina
Joshua15:2 Keerol maɓɓe haa Lesdi Fombina laati diga sera Weendu Mannda
Joshua15:3 Nden ngol tokki gal fombina haa wa'orde Akrabbiima
Joshua15:4 Diga ton ngol yehi haa Asmuuna
Joshua15:5 Keerol maɓɓe fuunaaŋgewol tokki Weendu Mannda haa yotti nastirde maayo Urdun. Keerol maɓɓe woylawol fuɗɗi haa ɗemŋgal weendu diga nastirde maayo Urdun.
Joshua15:6 Nden ngol yehi Bayti-Hogila
Joshua15:7 Nden ngol wa'i diga waadiwol Akor haa Debir
Joshua15:8 Keerol wa'i waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom haa fombina towndiire nde Urusaliima
Joshua15:9 Haa hooseere man keerol wayliti yahugo seeɓoore Menefto'a
Joshua15:10 Diga ton ngol yehi hiirnaaŋge gal kooseeje Se'ir
Joshua15:11 Nden keerol yehi woyla
Joshua15:12 Kaŋgo woni keerol hiirnaaŋgewol. Nder keeri ɗi'i lenyol Yahuuda jooɗi fodde geɓe maagol.
Joshua15:13 Bana Jawmiraawo umruno Yosuwa
Joshua15:14 Kaaleb riiwi ton ɓiɓɓe Enak tato: Sesay e Ahiman e Talmay.
Joshua15:15 Nden o yehi haɓugo bee yimɓe Debir. Ɓooyma ɓe mbi'i berniwol man Kiriyat-Sefer.
Joshua15:16 Kaaleb wi'i: “Mo jaali Kiriyat-Sefer
Joshua15:17 Otniyel ɓii Kenas deerɗu Kaaleb jaali ngol. Ngam maajum Kaaleb te'ni mo Aksa.
Joshua15:18 Nyannde ɓaŋgal maɓɓe Aksa ɓilli mo o toro baaba muuɗum ngesa. Otniyel jippi wamnde mum. Kaaleb ƴami mo: “Ko waɗ ma?”
Joshua15:19 O jaabi: “Yerdanam ko mi toroto ma. A hokki yam lesdi fombina njoorndi
Joshua15:20 Kanjum woni geɗal lesdi ngam lenyol Yahuuda bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua15:21 Berniiji maɓɓe ɓurɗi daayaago haa Lesdi Fombina
Joshua15:22 e Kina e Dimona e Ad'ada
Joshua15:23 e Keedes e Hacoor-Yitnan
Joshua15:24 e Zif e Telem e Be'alot
Joshua15:25 e Hacoor-Hadatta e Keriyot-Hesruunu–kanjum woni Hacoor–
Joshua15:26 e Amam e Sema e Molada
Joshua15:27 e Hacar-Gadda e Hesmuunu e Bayti-Palet
Joshua15:28 e Hacar-Su'al e Biirsaba bee gure mum
Joshua15:29 e Ba'ala e Iyyim e Ecem
Joshua15:30 e Eltolat e Kesil e Horma
Joshua15:31 e Cikilak e Madamanna e Sansanna
Joshua15:32 e Lebayot e Silhim e En-Rimmon
Joshua15:33 Berniiji maɓɓe nder lesdi towndiije ngoni: Estawol e Cor'a e Asna
Joshua15:34 e Zanoyak e En-Gannim e Tappuha e Enam
Joshua15:35 e Yarmut e Adullam e Soko e Azeka
Joshua15:36 e Saarayim e Aditayim e Gedera e Gederotayim
Joshua15:37 Woodi boo Cenan e Hadasa e Migdal-Gada
Joshua15:38 e Dil'aan e Mispe e Yokteyel
Joshua15:39 e Lakis e Boskat e Egilon
Joshua15:40 e Kabbon e Lahmas e Kitilis
Joshua15:41 e Gederot e Bayti-Daagon e Na'ama e Makkeda
Joshua15:42 Woodi boo Libna e Eter e Asan
Joshua15:43 e Yiftah e Asna e Necib
Joshua15:44 e Ke'ila e Akizib e Maresa
Joshua15:45 Woodi boo Ekuruun bee gure maagol e kawyeeji maagol.
Joshua15:46 Gal hiirnaaŋge Ekuruun boo berniiji haa wakeere Asdod fuu bee gure maaji.
Joshua15:47 Woodi Asdod e Gaaza bee gure maaji e kawyeeji maaji
Joshua15:48 Nder lesdi kooseeje woodi Samir e Yattir e Soko
Joshua15:49 e Danna e Kiriyat-Sanna–kanjum woni Debir–
Joshua15:50 e Anaba e Estemo e Anim
Joshua15:51 e Goosan e Holon e Gilo
Joshua15:52 Woodi boo Araba e Ruma e Esiyan
Joshua15:53 e Yanum e Bayti-Tappuha e Afeka
Joshua15:54 e Humta e Kiriyat-Arba– kanjum woni Heburuun–e Ci'or
Joshua15:55 Woodi boo Ma'on e Karmel e Zif e Yuta
Joshua15:56 e Yisre'el e Yokde'am e Zanoha
Joshua15:57 e Kayina e Gibiya e Timna
Joshua15:58 Woodi boo Halkul e Bayti-Cura e Gedor
Joshua15:59 e Ma'arat e Bayti-Anot e Eltekon
Joshua15:60 Woodi boo Kiriyat-Ba'al– kanjum woni Kiriyat-Ye'arim–e Rabba
Joshua15:61 Nder ladde woodi Bayti-Araba e Middin e Sekaka
Joshua15:62 e Nibsan e Ir-Mela e En-Gedi
Joshua15:63 Ammaa Yebusi'en jooɗiiɓe haa Urusaliima
Joshua16:1 Geɗal lesdi ngal laatani danygol Yusufu fuɗɗi haa maayo Urdun baŋnge Yeriko
Joshua16:2 Ngol ummi Baytila
Joshua16:3 Nden ngol diirti gal hiirnaaŋge haa lesdi Yafleti'en
Joshua16:4 Bana nii le'i Manassa e Efrayim
Joshua16:5 Ndaa ko laati geɗal lenyol Efrayim bee geɓe maagol: Keerol maɓɓe fuunaaŋgewol fuɗɗi haa Aterot-Addar
Joshua16:6 Nden ngol yehi hiirnaaŋge
Joshua16:7 Haa Yanoha ngol diirti gal Atarot e Na'arat
Joshua16:8 Keerol maɓɓe saali haa hiirnaaŋge Tappuha yahugo maayel Kana
Joshua16:9 Ɗum hawti bee berniiji goɗɗi e gure maaji nder keeri lenyol Manassa.
Joshua16:10 Ammaa ɓe ndiiwaay Kanaani'en jooɗiiɓe haa Gezer. Ngam maajum Kanaani'en ɗon njooɗi caka yimɓe Efrayim haa wargo hannde. Ɓe laati maccuɓe maɓɓe ɓe ɗon kuuwana ɓe.
Joshua17:1 Lenyol Manassa
Joshua17:2 Yimɓe Manassa luttuɓe keɓi geɗal muuɗum'en haa hiirnaaŋge Urdun
Joshua17:3 Ammaa Celofhad ɓii Hefer ɓii Gile'at ɓii Makir ɓii Manassa
Joshua17:4 Kamɓe ɓe ngari haa Eli'azaaru limanjo e Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna e ardiiɓe fuu
Joshua17:5 Bana nii lenyol Manassa ɓesdanaama geɗe sappo dow Gile'at e Baasan gaɗa Urdun.
Joshua17:6 Ngam rewɓe nder danygol maako boo ndoni lesdi bana deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en worɓe. Ammaa lesdi Gile'at laatani yimɓe Manassa luttuɓe.
Joshua17:7 Keerol yimɓe Manassa yehi diga Aser haa Mikmetat
Joshua17:8 Lesdi Tappuha laatani Manassa
Joshua17:9 Nden keerol diirti haa maayel Kana. Gure haa fombina maagel laatani Efrayim haa nder maral Manassa. Keerol tokki wakeere maayel woylaare
Joshua17:10 Haa fombina maayel man
Joshua17:11 Haa nder maral Issakar e Aser
Joshua17:12 Ammaa yimɓe Manassa mbaawaay riiwugo jooɗiiɓe nder berniiji ɗi'i
Joshua17:13 Nde Isra'iila'en ɓesdi semmbe
Joshua17:14 Yimɓe danygol Yusufu mbi'i Yosuwa: “Ngam ɗume a hokki min geɗal gootal tan haa lesdi? Min ɗuuɗɓe masin
Joshua17:15 Yosuwa wi'i ɓe: “To on ɗuuɗi bana nii
Joshua17:16 Ɓe njaabi: “Lesdi kooseeje he'ataa min. Ammaa Kanaani'en jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi leesndi mari mootaaji pucci njamndiiji
Joshua17:17 Yosuwa wi'i yimɓe Yusufu
Joshua17:18 Lesdi towndiije laatanto on boo. Koo ɗum laynde
Joshua18:1 Nde yimɓe ummaatoore Isra'iila timmini nyaamugo lesdi
Joshua18:2 Le'i joweeɗiɗi nder Isra'iila'en keɓaay geɗal muuɗum'en haa lesdi tawon.
Joshua18:3 Ngam maajum Yosuwa ƴami Isra'iila'en: “Haa ndey on ɗon ndeena haa on njaha
Joshua18:4 Cuɓe worɓe tato tato nder le'i fuu. Mi nelan ɓe
Joshua18:5 En cenndan ndi geɓe joweeɗiɗi. Yahuuda jooɗoto nder lesdi mum haa fombina. Yimɓe Yusufu boo njooɗoto nder lesdi muuɗum'en haa woyla.
Joshua18:6 Sey on mbinnda no geɓe lesdi man joweeɗiɗi mba'i
Joshua18:7 Lewi'en keɓataa geɗal lesdi caka mooɗon
Joshua18:8 Worɓe maajum ummi ngam ɓe ndilla. Yosuwa faamtini ɓe: “Ngaance nder lesdi fuu
Joshua18:9 Ɓe njehi
Joshua18:10 Ton Yosuwa waɗani ɓe kur'u yeeso Jawmiraawo. Bana nii o yeɗiri le'i Isra'iila luttuɗi go lesdi muuɗum'en.
Joshua18:11 Aran kur'u waŋgini geɗal lenyol Benyamin bee geɓe maagol. Ɓe keɓi geɗal lesdi hakkunde yimɓe Yahuuda e yimɓe Yusufu.
Joshua18:12 Haa woyla
Joshua18:13 Nden ngol yehi haa wakeere hooseere Luus fombinaare–Luus e Baytila ɗum gootel. Keerol diirti haa Aterot-Addar dow hooseere haa fombina Baytihurun-les.
Joshua18:14 Nden ngol wayliti diga wakeere hooseere tiitotirnde bee Baytihurun hiirnaaŋgeere yahugo fombina haa yotti Kiriyat-Ba'al–kanjum woni Kiriyat-Ye'arim– berniwol nder maral yimɓe Yahuuda. Kanjum woni keerol hiirnaaŋgewol.
Joshua18:15 Haa fombina
Joshua18:16 Nden keerol diirti haa les hooseere tiitotirnde bee waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom
Joshua18:17 Ngol wayliti gal woyla
Joshua18:18 Nden ngol tokki woyla hooseere tiitotirnde bee waadiwol Urdun
Joshua18:19 Nden keerol tokki haa woyla hooseere Bayti-Hogila. Ngol haaɗi haa nastirde maayo Urdun nder Weendu Mannda
Joshua18:20 Maayo Urdun woni keerol fuunaaŋgewol. Kanjum woni geɗal lenyol Benyamin bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua18:21 Berniiji lenyol Benyamin bee geɓe maagol
Joshua18:22 e Bayti-Araba e Cemarayim e Baytila
Joshua18:23 e Awwim e Para e Ofra
Joshua18:24 e Kefar-Ammoonay e Ofni e Geba
Joshua18:25 Woodi boo Gibiyon e Rama e Biirot
Joshua18:26 e Mispe e Kefiira e Mosa
Joshua18:27 e Rekem e Yirpeyel e Tarala
Joshua18:28 e Ceela e Elef e Yebusi – kanjum woni Urusaliima – e Gibiya e Kiriyat
Joshua19:1 Kur'u ɗiɗaɓu waŋgini geɗal lenyol Simeyon bee geɓe maagol. Ɓe keɓi geɗal maɓɓe haa nder geɗal yimɓe Yahuuda.
Joshua19:2 Ndaa ko laatani ɓe: Biirsaba e Sema e Molada
Joshua19:3 e Hacar-Su'al e Baala e Ecem
Joshua19:4 e Eltolat e Betula e Horma
Joshua19:5 e Cikilak e Bayti-Markabot e Hacar-Susa
Joshua19:6 e Bayti-Lebayot e Sarukeena
Joshua19:7 Woodi boo Ayin e Rimmon e Eter e Asan
Joshua19:8 Ɓe mari gure taariiɗe berniiji ɗi'i fuu haa yotti Ba'alat-Biir – kanjum woni Rama-fombina. Kanjum woni geɗal lenyol Simeyon bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua19:9 Ɓe ndoni geɗal yimɓe Simeyon nder geɗal yimɓe Yahuuda. Geɗal yimɓe Yahuuda ɗuuɗino
Joshua19:10 Kur'u tataɓu waŋgini geɗal lenyol Zabulon bee geɓe maagol. Keerol geɗal maɓɓe yotti Sariida.
Joshua19:11 Nden ngol yehi hiirnaaŋge haa yotti Marhala
Joshua19:12 Haa wakeere feere ngol fuɗɗi haa Sariida
Joshua19:13 Ngol tokki yahugo fuunaaŋge haa yotti Gat-Hefer e Et-Kasiina
Joshua19:14 Ton ngol wayliti
Joshua19:15 Woodi boo Kattat e Nahalal e Simron e Yidala e Baytilaama
Joshua19:16 Kanjum woni geɗal lenyol Zabulon bee geɓe maagol
Joshua19:17 Kur'u nayaɓu waŋgini geɗal lenyol Issakar bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua19:18 Ndaa berniiji gonɗi nder maagal: Yisre'el e Kesulot e Sunem
Joshua19:19 e Hafarayim e Siiyon e Anakarat
Joshua19:20 e nokkuure wi'eteende Rabbit e Kisiyon e Ebes
Joshua19:21 e Remet e En-Gannim e En-Hadda e Bayti-Pacces.
Joshua19:22 Keerol maɓɓe meemi boo Taboora e Sakasuuma e Bayti-Semes
Joshua19:23 Kanjum woni geɗal lenyol Issakar bee geɓe maagol
Joshua19:24 Kur'u njowaɓu waŋgini geɗal lenyol Aser bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua19:25 Keerol maɓɓe hawti Helkat e Hali e Beten e Akisaf
Joshua19:26 e Allammelek e Am'ada e Miseyal. Haa hiirnaaŋge ngol yotti hooseere Karmel e Sihor-Libnat.
Joshua19:27 Haa wakeere feere ngol yehi fuunaaŋge haa Bayti-Daagon
Joshua19:28 e Abdon e Rehob e Hammon e Kana
Joshua19:29 Nden keerol wayliti
Joshua19:30 e Umma e Afek e Rehob
Joshua19:31 Kanjum woni geɗal lenyol Aser bee geɓe maagol
Joshua19:32 Kur'u njoweego'oowu waŋgini geɗal lenyol Neftali bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua19:33 Keerol maɓɓe fuɗɗi haa Helef
Joshua19:34 Haa wakeere feere ngol yehi hiirnaaŋge haa Asnot-Taboora. Nden ngol yehi haa Hukoka. Haa fombina ngol yotti Zabulon
Joshua19:35 Berniiji maɓɓe cemmbiɗɗi ngoni: Ciddim e Ceer e Hammat e Rakkat e Kinneret
Joshua19:36 e Adama e Rama e Hacoor
Joshua19:37 e Keedes e Edirey e En-Hacoor
Joshua19:38 e Yiron e Migdaliila e Horem e Bayti-Anat e Bayti-Semes
Joshua19:39 Kanjum woni geɗal lenyol Neftali bee geɓe maagol
Joshua19:40 Kur'u njoweeɗiɗaɓu waŋgini geɗal lenyol Dan bee geɓe maagol.
Joshua19:41 Ndaa ko laati geɗal maɓɓe haa lesdi: Cor'a e Estawol e Ir-Semes
Joshua19:42 e Sa'alabbin e Ayyalon e Yitila
Joshua19:43 e Elon e Timna e Ekuruun
Joshua19:44 e Elteke e Gibbeton e Ba'alat
Joshua19:45 e Yehud e Bene-Barak e Gat-Rimmon
Joshua19:46 e ndiyamji Yarkon e Rakkon bee lesdi haa wakeere Yafo.
Joshua19:47 Nde lesdi he'aay yimɓe Dan
Joshua19:48 Kanjum laati geɗal lenyol Dan bee geɓe maagol
Joshua19:49 Nde Isra'iila'en timmini senndugo lesdi bee keeri mum
Joshua19:50 Fodde umroore Jawmiraawo ɓe ndokki mo berniwol ngol o ɗaɓɓi: Timnat-Seraha nder kooseeje Efrayim. O nyiɓti berniwol man
Joshua19:51 Kanje ngoni mare ɗe Eli'azaaru limanjo e Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna e baaba-ci'e'en nder le'i Isra'iila'en ndonni Isra'iila'en lesdi. Ɓe mbaɗi kur'u yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Silo
Joshua20:1 Jawmiraawo umri Yosuwa:
Joshua20:2 “Wolwan Isra'iila'en
Joshua20:3 To goɗɗo mbari goɗɗo feere bilaa anniya malla o anndaa ɗum
Joshua20:4 Mbarɗo goɗɗo bana nii
Joshua20:5 To baatoowo taasni mo
Joshua20:6 Sey o jooɗo nder berniwol man haa to o darake yeeso kiita jama'aare
Joshua20:7 Ɓe cuɓi Keedes nder lesdi Galiili
Joshua20:8 Gaɗa Urdun boo
Joshua20:9 Kanji ngoni berniiji cuɓaaɗi ngam haa ɗi laatano Isra'iila'en e hoɗɓe jooɗiiɓe caka maɓɓe berniiji kisruɗi. Koo moy mbari goɗɗo bilaa anniya
Joshua21:1 Baaba-ci'e'en nder lenyol Lewi ngari haa Eli'azaaru limanjo e Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna e baaba-ci'e'en nder le'i Isra'iila.
Joshua21:2 Ton haa Silo nder lesdi Kanaana ɓe mbi'i ɓe: “Jawmiraawo umri bee hunnduko Muusa haa min keɓa berniiji haa min njooɗoto e durduɗe ngam dabbaaji amin.”
Joshua21:3 Ngam daliila umroore Jawmiraawo nde'e
Joshua21:4 Aran ɓe mbaɗi kur'u ngam waŋgingo geɗal ci'e Kahati'en nder lenyol Lewi. Danygol Haruna limanjo heɓi berniiji sappo e tati haa le'i Yahuuda e Simon e Benyamin.
Joshua21:5 Kahati'en luttuɓe keɓi berniiji sappo haa ci'e nder le'i Efrayim e Dan e reeta lenyol Manassa.
Joshua21:6 Danygol Gerson heɓi berniiji sappo e tati haa ci'e nder Issakar e Aser e Neftali e reeta lenyol Manassa nder lesdi Baasan.
Joshua21:7 Danygol Meraari fodde ci'e maagol heɓi berniiji sappo e ɗiɗi haa le'i Ruben e Gada e Zabulon.
Joshua21:8 Bana nii Isra'iila'en ndokki Lewi'en berniiji bee durduɗe maaji. Ɓe ta'ani ɓe ɗi bee waɗugo kur'u
Joshua21:9 Ndaa inɗe berniiji ɗi yimɓe le'i Yahuuda e Simeyon ndokki
Joshua21:10 danygol Haruna nder ci'e Kahati'en
Joshua21:11 Ɓe keɓi Kiriyat-Arba–Arba o baaba Enak–bi'eteeŋgol Heburuun
Joshua21:12 Ammaa gese berniwol man e gure maagol
Joshua21:13 Danygol Haruna heɓi berniwol Heburuun–kaŋgol woni gootol nder berniiji kisruɗi–e Libna e Yatir e Estemo'a e Holon e Debir e Asan e Yuta e Bayti-Semes
Joshua21:14 
Joshua21:15 
Joshua21:16 
Joshua21:17 Haa lenyol Benyamin ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi: Gibiyon e Geba e Anatot e Almon
Joshua21:18 
Joshua21:19 Liman'en danygol Haruna keɓi berniiji sappo e tati bee durduɗe maaji.
Joshua21:20 Ci'e Lewi'en luttuɗe nder danygol Kahat
Joshua21:21 Ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi bee durduɗe maaji: Sikem nder kooseeje Efrayim–kaŋgol woni berniwol kisrugol–e Gezer e Kibsayim e Baytihurun.
Joshua21:22 
Joshua21:23 Haa lesdi Dan ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi: Elteke e Gibbeton e Ayyalon e Gat-Rimmon
Joshua21:24 
Joshua21:25 Haa lesdi reeta lenyol Manassa ɓe keɓi berniiji ɗiɗi: Ta'anak e Yible'am
Joshua21:26 Ci'e luttuɗe nder danygol Kahat keɓi berniiji sappo bee durduɗe maaji.
Joshua21:27 Danygol Gerson ɓii Lewi heɓi berniiji ɗiɗi haa reeta lenyol Manassa: Golan nder lesdi Baasan–kaŋgol woni berniwol kisrugol–e Be'estera
Joshua21:28 Haa lesdi Issakar ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi: Kisiyon e Daberat e Yarmut e En-Gannim
Joshua21:29 
Joshua21:30 Haa lesdi Aser ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi: Miseyal e Abdon e Helkat e Rehob
Joshua21:31 
Joshua21:32 Haa lesdi Neftali ɓe keɓi berniiji tati: Keedes nder Galiili–kaŋgol woni berniwol kisrugol–e Hammot-Door e Kartan
Joshua21:33 Ci'e Gersoni'en keɓi berniiji sappo e tati bee durduɗe maaji.
Joshua21:34 Ci'e Lewi'en luttuɗe nder danygol Meraari keɓi berniiji nayi haa lesdi Zabulon: Yokne'am e Karta e Rimmona e Nahalal
Joshua21:35 
Joshua21:36 Haa lesdi Ruben gaɗa maayo Urdun ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi: Beser haa ƴoolde laddeere tiitotirnde bee Yeriko–kaŋgol woni berniwol kisrugol–e Yahas e Kedemot e Mefa'at
Joshua21:37 
Joshua21:38 Haa lesdi Gada ɓe keɓi berniiji nayi: Ramot nder Gile'at e Mahanayim e Hesbon e Ya'ajer
Joshua21:39 
Joshua21:40 Ci'e Lewi'en luttuɗe nder danygol Meraari
Joshua21:41 Haa nder maral Isra'iila'en fuu
Joshua21:42 
Joshua21:43 Bana nii Jawmiraawo hokkiri Isra'iila'en lesdi fuu ndi o hunani baabiraaɓe maɓɓe o hokkan ɓe. Ɓe mari ndi
Joshua21:44 Jawmiraawo hokki ɓe salaaman haa keeri lesdi maɓɓe fuu bana o hunani baabiraaɓe maɓɓe. O hokki ɓe jaalorgal dow konne'en maɓɓe fuu
Joshua21:45 O gooŋɗini bolle maako booɗɗe fuu ɗe o wolwani Isra'iila.
Joshua22:1 Nden Yosuwa ewni yimɓe le'i Ruben e Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa.
Joshua22:2 O wi'i ɓe: “On mbaɗi ko Muusa
Joshua22:3 Nyalɗe ɗuuɗɗe ɗe'e fuu on meeɗaay accugo banndiraaɓe mon Isra'iila'en haa wargo hannde. On tokki umrooje Allah Jawmiraawo mon.
Joshua22:4 Jonta o hokki banndiraaɓe mon salaaman
Joshua22:5 Ammaa kakkile booɗɗum ngam haa on tokko tawreeta fuu ka Muusa
Joshua22:6 Nden Yosuwa jaɓɓiti ɓe
Joshua22:7 
Joshua22:8 
Joshua22:9 Bana nii yimɓe le'i Ruben e Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa kooti. Ɓe acci Isra'iila'en luttuɓe haa Silo nder lesdi Kanaana
Joshua22:10 Nde yimɓe le'i Ruben e Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa njotti haa Gelilot gaa'e Urdun nder lesdi Kanaana
Joshua22:11 Isra'iila'en luttuɓe nani: “Ndaa
Joshua22:12 Nde ɓe nani ɗum
Joshua22:13 Isra'iila'en neli Pinehas ɓii Eli'azaaru
Joshua22:14 Mawɓe sappo njahdi bee maako
Joshua22:15 Ɓe ngari haa yimɓe le'i Ruben e Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa nder lesdi Gile'at
Joshua22:16 “Ndaa nii jama'aare Jawmiraawo fuu wi'i: Koni ngewɗon umroore Allah Isra'iila? On mahani ko'e mon hirsirde
Joshua22:17 Ciftore hakke meeɗen haa Pe'or. Ngam hakke man Jawmiraawo hiiti en
Joshua22:18 Kadiboo on acci tokkaago mo jonta! Nde on tuurtani Jawmiraawo hannde
Joshua22:19 Ammaa to on ndaari maral lesdi mooɗon soɓi
Joshua22:20 Ciftore no Akan ɓii Zeraha yewri umroore Allah dow kuuje kaɗaaɗe. Ngam aybe maajum tikkere Jawmiraawo wari dow jama'aare Isra'iila fuu. Naa Akan feere mum tan halki ngam daliila hakke mum.”
Joshua22:21 Yimɓe le'i Ruben e Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa mbi'i ɓe:
Joshua22:22 “Allah Jawmiraawo woni Allah mawɗo! Allah Jawmiraawo woni Allah mawɗo! Kaŋko o anndi ngam ɗume min mbaɗi ɗum. Annde ɗum onon boo! To min tuurti fakat
Joshua22:23 To min mahani ko'e amin hirsirde nde'e ngam haa min lii'o guleteeɗi e dokke nyaamdu e kirseteeɗi ngam kawtal yimɓe bee Allah haa ɗo
Joshua22:24 Ammaa naa non
Joshua22:25 Jawmiraawo waɗi maayo Urdun ngo'o keerol hakkunde amin bee mooɗon. Onon yimɓe Ruben e Gada
Joshua22:26 Ngam maajum min mbi'mbi'tiri: Sey en maha hirsirde
Joshua22:27 ammaa nde laato seedamku hakkunde amin bee mooɗon e hakkunde danygol amin garanŋgol bee ngol mooɗon. Nde seedo minin boo min ɗon mbaɗana Jawmiraawo dewal bee guleteeɗi amin e dokke amin e kirseteeɗi amin ngam kawtal yimɓe. Ngam taa ɓikkoy mon mbi'a ɓikkoy amin jaŋngo: Walaa ko hawti on bee Jawmiraawo.
Joshua22:28 Min mbi'i: To ɓe mbi'i bana nii
Joshua22:29 Aa'a! min tuurtantaa Jawmiraawo
Joshua22:30 Pinehas limanjo e mawɓe jama'aare wonduɓe bee muuɗum
Joshua22:31 Pinehas ɓii Eli'azaaru
Joshua22:32 Nden Pinehas e mawɓe acci yimɓe Ruben e Gada haa lesdi Gile'at
Joshua22:33 Habaru man fottani Isra'iila'en
Joshua22:34 Yimɓe Ruben e Gada mbi'i: “Hirsirde nde seedoto hakkunde meeɗen
Joshua23:1 Nyalɗe ɗuuɗɗe ɓaawo Jawmiraawo hokki Isra'iila'en siwtaare yeeso konne'en maɓɓe fuu
Joshua23:2 saa'i maajum Yosuwa ewni Isra'iila'en fuu
Joshua23:3 Onon on ngi'i ko Allah Jawmiraawo mooɗon waɗi ummaatooje ɗe'e fuu daliila mon
Joshua23:4 Ndaa mi marni on lesdi bee waɗugo kur'u fodde le'i mon
Joshua23:5 Allah Jawmiraawo mooɗon riiwan ummaatooje man yeeso mooɗon e o jaɓtan lesdi maaje
Joshua23:6 Cemmbiɗɗe masin
Joshua23:7 Taa njillindire bee ummaatooje luttuɗe ɗe'e caka mooɗon. Taa ewne inɗe labbi maɓɓe
Joshua23:8 Ammaa ɗakkotire bee Allah Jawmiraawo mooɗon bana no mbaɗɗon haa wargo hannde.
Joshua23:9 Jawmiraawo riiwi ummaatooje mawɗe cemmbiɗɗe yeeso mooɗon. Onon boo walaa mo dartani on haa wargo hannde.
Joshua23:10 Koo moy mooɗon riiwan konne'en ujineere
Joshua23:11 Ngam maajum kakkilane ko'e mooɗon booɗɗum
Joshua23:12 To on acci ɗowtanaago mo
Joshua23:13 nden kam annde fakat
Joshua23:14 Min kam wakkati maayde am ɓaditake. Koo moy mooɗon anndi haa ɓernde mum e yoŋki mum bee laaɓɗum no Allah Jawmiraawo hiɓɓiniri barkaaji ɗi o iinani on fuu
Joshua23:15 Fakat
Joshua23:16 To on piisti alkawal ngal Allah Jawmiraawo mooɗon umri on
Joshua24:1 Yosuwa mooɓti le'i Isra'iila fuu haa Sikem. O ewni ndotti'en e ardiiɓe e hiitooɓe e kaliifa'en. Ɓe fuu ɓe ngari
Joshua24:2 Yosuwa wi'i yimɓe ummaatoore fuu: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Joshua24:3 Nden mi hoo'i kaaka mon Ibrahiima ton haa gaɗa maayo
Joshua24:4 Isiyaaku boo
Joshua24:5 Nden mi neli Muusa e Haruna
Joshua24:6 Bana nii mi wurtiniri baabiraaɓe mon diga Misra
Joshua24:7 ɓe ngookani yam haa mi walla ɓe. Mi waɗi nyiɓre hakkunde maɓɓe bee Misra'en. Mi yoofi ndiyam maayo dow Misra'en
Joshua24:8 Nden mi yahri on haa lesdi Amoori'en
Joshua24:9 Nden Balak ɓii Cippor
Joshua24:10 Ammaa mi sali nanango Balaama
Joshua24:11 Nden on eeri maayo Urdun
Joshua24:12 Mi ardini jabatti haa yeeso mooɗon
Joshua24:13 Mi hokki on lesdi
Joshua24:14 Jonta
Joshua24:15 To ɗum fottanaay on on njaggano Jawmiraawo
Joshua24:16 Yimɓe ummaatoore njaabi: “Aa'a! Min ngudintaa Jawmiraawo haa min ndewa ɗowanteeɓe woɗɓe.
Joshua24:17 Ngam ɗum Allah Jawmiraawo meeɗen wurtini en diga njeyaaŋgu haa lesdi Misra
Joshua24:18 Jawmiraawo riiwi yeeso meeɗen ummaatooje man e Amoori'en jooɗiiɓe haa lesdi ndi. Ngam maajum minin boo min njagganto Jawmiraawo
Joshua24:19 Yosuwa wi'i yimɓe ummaatoore: “On mbaawataa jagganaago Jawmiraawo
Joshua24:20 Ngam nyannde nde on ngudinta Jawmiraawo
Joshua24:21 Yimɓe ummaatoore njaabi: “Naa non! Jawmiraawo min njagganto!”
Joshua24:22 Yosuwa wi'i ɓe: “Onon bee ko'e mon on seedooɓe on cuɓi Jawmiraawo haa on njaggano mo.” Ɓe njaabi: “Nonnon nii.”
Joshua24:23 Yosuwa wi'i ɓe: “To non kam
Joshua24:24 Yimɓe ummaatoore mbi'i Yosuwa: “Jawmiraawo Allah meeɗen min njagganto
Joshua24:25 Nyalaade maajum Yosuwa haɓɓi alkawal bee Jawmiraawo ngam ummaatoore haa Sikem. Ton o hokki ɓe farillaaji e kiitaaji.
Joshua24:26 O winndi bolle man nder deftere tawreeta Allah. Nden o hoo'i hayre mawnde
Joshua24:27 O wi'i ummaatoore fuu: “Hayre nde'e seedoto dow meeɗen
Joshua24:28 Nden Yosuwa jaɓɓiti ummaatoore
Joshua24:29 Ɓaawo kuuje ɗe'e Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna
Joshua24:30 Ɓe uwi mo haa maral lesdi maako haa Timnat-Seraha nder kooseeje Efrayim
Joshua24:31 Nder nyalɗe ngeendam Yosuwa fuu
Joshua24:32 Isra'iila'en uwi i'e Yusufu ɗe ɓe ngadduno diga Misra haa Sikem
Joshua24:33 Eli'azaaru ɓii Haruna boo maayi. Ɓe uwi mo haa towndiire Pinehas ɓiyiiko. Kaŋko ɓe ndokkino ngol nder lesdi kooseeje Efrayim.
Judges1:1 Ɓaawo maayde Yosuwa
Judges1:2 Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Lenyol Yahuuda aarta yahugo. Mi hokki ngol lesdi man.”
Judges1:3 Yimɓe Yahuuda mbi'i yimɓe Simeyon banndiraaɓe muuɗum'en: “En njahda haa geɗal lesdi ngal laatani min
Judges1:4 Nden ɓe ndilli haɓoygo bee maɓɓe. Jawmiraawo hokki ɓe Kanaani'en e Perezzi'en. Ɓe mbari worɓe ujine sappo (10.000) haa Bezek.
Judges1:5 Nder berniwol ngo'ol
Judges1:6 Adoni-Bezek doggi
Judges1:7 Nden o wi'i: “Laamiiɓe cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗo ta'aaɓe kooli gorɗi
Judges1:8 Yimɓe Yahuuda kippi berniwol Urusaliima
Judges1:9 Ɓaawo man ɓe ndiirti haa lesdi kooseeje
Judges1:10 Ɓe ummini konu dow jooɗiiɓe haa Heburuun
Judges1:11 Ɓe ummi ton ɓe ndilli ɓe kippi jooɗiiɓe haa Debir
Judges1:12 Kaaleb wi'i: “Mi te'nan Aksa ɓiyam debbo haa mo jaali
Judges1:13 Otniyel ɓii Kenas
Judges1:14 Nde o yotti haa kommbi Otniyel
Judges1:15 O jaabi: “Yerdanam ko mi toroto ma. A hokki yam Lesdi Fombina njoorndi
Judges1:16 Keni'en
Judges1:17 Yimɓe Yahuuda njahdi bee yimɓe lenyol Simeyon deerɗiraawo Yahuuda
Judges1:18 Ɓaawo man yimɓe Yahuuda nyaami berniiji ɗi'i: Gaaza
Judges1:19 Jawmiraawo ɗonno wondi bee maɓɓe
Judges1:20 Ɓe ndokki Heburuun haa Kaaleb bana Muusa umruno
Judges1:21 Ammaa yimɓe Benyamin ndiiwaay Yebusi'en jooɗinooɓe haa Urusaliima e haa hannde yimɓe ɓe ɗon njooɗodi bee yimɓe Benyamin.
Judges1:22 Yimɓe danygol Yusufu
Judges1:23 Ɓe aarti nelugo yimɓe ngam horoygo berniwol bi'eteeŋgol Luus ɓooyma.
Judges1:24 Horooɓe ngi'i goɗɗo gurtiiɗo ngol. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Hollu min no min nastirta berniwol ngol
Judges1:25 Goɗɗo oo holli ɓe pellel nastugo. Bana nii yimɓe danygol Yusufu mbardi yimɓe berniwol man bee kaafahi. Ammaa ɓe acci goɗɗo go dilli jam bee saare muuɗum fuu.
Judges1:26 Goɗɗo oo dilli jooɗi haa lesdi Heti'en
Judges1:27 Yimɓe Manassa ndiiwaay yimɓe Bayti-Se'an e Ta'anak Door e Yible'am e Megiddo e jooɗiiɓe haa gure taariiɗe berniiji ɗi'i. Kanaani'en kasdi jooɗaago nder lesdi man.
Judges1:28 Nde Isra'iila'en ɓesdi semmbe
Judges1:29 Yimɓe Efrayim boo ndiiwaay Kanaani'en jooɗiiɓe haa Gezer. Yimɓe ɓe tokki jooɗaago caka yimɓe Efrayim haa ton.
Judges1:30 Yimɓe Zabulon ndiiwaay Kanaani'en jooɗiiɓe haa Kitiron e Nahalol. Yimɓe ɓe'e tokki jooɗaago caka maɓɓe. Yimɓe lenyol Zabulon laatini ɓe maccuɓe muuɗum'en.
Judges1:31 Yimɓe Aser ndiiwaay jooɗiiɓe haa Akko e Sidon e Ahalab e Akizib e Helba e Afik e Rehob.
Judges1:32 Ngam maajum ɓe njooɗi caka Kanaani'en jooɗiiɓe haa lesdi man.
Judges1:33 Yimɓe Neftali ndiiwaay Kanaani'en jooɗiiɓe haa Bayti-Semes e Bayti-Anat. Ɓe njooɗodi haa lesdi man
Judges1:34 Amoori'en ngerɓi yimɓe Dan haa gal hooseere
Judges1:35 Amoori'en tokki jooɗaago haa Eloon e Saalbiima
Judges1:36 Keerol Amoori'en yehi diga wa'orde Akrabbiima
Judges2:1 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wari diga Gilgal
Judges2:2 Mi umrunooɗo on
Judges2:3 Ngam maajum mbi'mi: Mi riiwataa ɓe yeeso mooɗon. Ɓe ngonan kommbi mooɗon
Judges2:4 Nde malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wolwi bolle ɗe'e
Judges2:5 Ɓe inndi nokkuure man Bokim. Ton ɓe lii'ani Jawmiraawo kirsaaɗi.
Judges2:6 Ɓaawo man Yosuwa jaɓɓiti ummaatoore
Judges2:7 Yaake Yosuwa geetono
Judges2:8 Yosuwa ɓii Nuuna
Judges2:9 Ɓe uwi mo haa maral maako haa Timnat-Heres nder kooseeje Efrayim
Judges2:10 Nden yimɓe yidere maako boo maayidi. Yidere tokkunde anndaa Jawmiraawo e kuuɗe ɗe o huuwanino Isra'iila'en.
Judges2:11 Isra'iila'en mbaɗi ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo
Judges2:12 Ɓe ngudini Jawmiraawo
Judges2:13 Ɓe ngudini Jawmiraawo
Judges2:14 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo tikkani Isra'iila'en. O hokki ɓe haa jaɓtooɓe
Judges2:15 Nde ɓe njehi konu fuu
Judges2:16 Nden Jawmiraawo suɓani ɓe alkaali'en
Judges2:17 Ammaa Isra'iila'en ɗowtanaaki alkaali'en muuɗum'en
Judges2:18 Nde Jawmiraawo suɓani ɓe alkaali fuu
Judges2:19 Ammaa yaake alkaaliijo man maayi
Judges2:20 Nden Jawmiraawo tikkani Isra'iila'en
Judges2:21 Ngam maajum min boo mi tokkataako riiwugo ummaatooje luttuɗe nder lesdi saa'i Yosuwa maayi.
Judges2:22 Mi huuwtiniran ummaatooje man ngam haa mi foonda Isra'iila'en
Judges2:23 Jawmiraawo acci ummaatooje ɗe njooɗi nder lesdi. O hokkaay ɗe Yosuwa
Judges3:1 Ndaa ummaatooje ɗe Jawmiraawo acci ɗon njooɗi nder lesdi ngam foondugo Isra'iila'en ɓen anndaa konu ngam nyaamugo lesdi Kanaana.
Judges3:2 O yiɗi gide kese ɗe'e
Judges3:3 Laamiiɓe Filisti'en njowo e Kanaani'en fuu e Sidoni'en e Hewi'en njooɗi haa kooseeje Libanon
Judges3:4 Jawmiraawo yiɗi huuwtinirgo ɓe ngam foondugo Isra'iila'en
Judges3:5 Bana nii Isra'iila'en njooɗi caka Kanaani'en e Heti'en e Amoori'en e Perezzi'en e Hewi'en e Yebusi'en.
Judges3:6 Ɓe te'i ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe rewɓe
Judges3:7 Isra'iila'en mbaɗi ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo Allah muuɗum'en
Judges3:8 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo tikkani ɓe
Judges3:9 Nden Isra'iila'en tori Jawmiraawo ballal. Jawmiraawo suɓani ɓe goɗɗo kisnoowo ɓe: Otniyel ɓii Kenas
Judges3:10 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo ɗon dow Otniyel
Judges3:11 Ɓaawoɗon konu waɗaay nder lesdi duuɓi cappanɗe nayi. Nden Otniyel ɓii Kenas maayi.
Judges3:12 Fahin Isra'iila'en mbaɗi ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o semmbiɗini Egilon
Judges3:13 Egilon mooɓti Ammooni'en e Amaleki'en
Judges3:14 Isra'iila'en njaggani Egilon laamiiɗo Mo'ab duuɓi sappo e joweetati.
Judges3:15 Nden ɓe tori Jawmiraawo ballal. Jawmiraawo suɓani ɓe goɗɗo kisnoowo ɓe: Ehuudi
Judges3:16 Ehuudi waɗani hoore mum kaafahi ki mbeldiiji ɗiɗi
Judges3:17 Nden o yahrani Egilon dokkal man. Egilon o payɗo masin.
Judges3:18 Nde o timmini hokkugo Egilon dokkal go
Judges3:19 Ɓe njotti haa labbi kaa'e cehaaɗe kommbi Gilgal
Judges3:20 Yaake man o ɗonno jooɗi nder suudu dowru
Judges3:21 Ehuudi forti juŋngo mum nano
Judges3:22 Ki muti bee jogorde maaki fuu
Judges3:23 Ehuudi wurti gal zawleeru
Judges3:24 Nden o dilli
Judges3:25 Ɓe ndeeni haa ɓe comi
Judges3:26 Wakkati ɓe ɗon ndeeni
Judges3:27 Nde o nasti ton
Judges3:28 O wi'i ɓe: “Njokkeeɗam
Judges3:29 Nyannde maajum ɓe mbari Mo'abi'en baakin ujine sappo
Judges3:30 Bana nii Mo'abi'en leesniri ko'e muuɗum'en les Isra'iila'en. Ɓaawoɗon konu waɗaay nder lesdi
Judges3:31 Ɓaawo Ehuudi
Judges4:1 Ɓaawo maayde Ehuudi
Judges4:2 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo hokki ɓe haa juŋngo Yabin
Judges4:3 Yabin woodi mootaaji pucci teemeɗɗe joweenayi (900). O ɓilli Isra'iila'en bee caatal haa waɗi duuɓi noogas. Nden kamɓe boo ɓe tori Jawmiraawo ballal.
Judges4:4 Saa'i man
Judges4:5 O ɗonno jooɗo les dibinoohi
Judges4:6 Nyannde feere Deboora neli
Judges4:7 Min mi waddan Sisera
Judges4:8 Barak wi'i Deboora: “To a yahdan bee am
Judges4:9 Deboora jaabi mo: “Fakat
Judges4:10 Barak ewni yimɓe Zabulon e yimɓe Neftali haa Keedes. Worɓe ujine sappo (10.000) ngari
Judges4:11 Heber
Judges4:12 Sisera nani Barak
Judges4:13 O mooɓti mootaaji njamndi pucci ɗi o mari fuu teemeɗɗe joweenayi (900)
Judges4:14 Deboora wi'i Barak: “Umma
Judges4:15 Jawmiraawo jiiɓi hakkiilooji Sisera e jama'aare konu mum fuu e mootaaji pucci mum fuu
Judges4:16 Barak taasni mootaaji pucci e jama'aare konu haa yotti Haroseet-Goyim. Ɓe mbari jama'aare Sisera fuu bee kaafaaje
Judges4:17 Sisera doggi haa suudu laymaaru Ya'el
Judges4:18 Ya'el wurti
Judges4:19 Sisera wi'i mo: “Hokkam ndiyam seɗɗa
Judges4:20 Sisera wi'i mo: “Dara haa dammugal suudu. To goɗɗo wari ƴami ma: Goɗɗo ɗon haa ɗo na? Jaaba mo: Walaa.”
Judges4:21 Sisera somi masin
Judges4:22 Ndaa Barak ɗonno taasna Sisera. Nde o yotti ton
Judges4:23 Bana nii Jawmiraawo leesniri Yabin
Judges4:24 Ɓaawoɗon ɓe ɗon ɓesda teddango mo haa ɓe nattini mo.
Judges5:1 Nyalaade maajum Deboora e Barak ɓii Abino'am ngimi yimre nde'e:
Judges5:2 Maŋgte Jawmiraawo
Judges5:3 Keɗite
Judges5:4 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Judges5:5 Kooseeje ɓolwi yeeso ma
Judges5:6 Nder zamanu Samgar ɓii Anat
Judges5:7 Ardiiɓe nder lesdi Isra'iila majjiti
Judges5:8 Ummaatoore suɓi ɗowanteeɓe feere
Judges5:9 Ɓernde am ɗon numa dow ardiiɓe
Judges5:10 Onon wa'iiɓe mbamkon ndaneehon
Judges5:11 Haa kommbi keeleeje
Judges5:12 Deboora
Judges5:13 Luttuɓe bee yoŋki ndiirti kawtoy bee tedduɓe
Judges5:14 Diga kooseeje Efrayim jaalotooɓe Amalek njippi
Judges5:15 Mawɓe Issakar ngardi bee Deboora
Judges5:16 Koni on njooɗi caka kowaaje? Haa on nana luu'aaŋgo waynaaɓe baali na? Nonnon
Judges5:17 Haa Gile'at
Judges5:18 Yimɓe Zabulon kulaay maayugo nder konu. Yimɓe Neftali njooɗi dow towndiije lesdi.
Judges5:19 Laamiiɓe ngari mbaɗi haɓre
Judges5:20 Koode asama boo nasti haɓre man
Judges5:21 Maayo ɗon ila diga ɓooyma
Judges5:22 Pucci ɗon caamna bee semmbe
Judges5:23 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Naale Meeros! Naale yimɓe jooɗiiɓe ton! Ngam ɓe ngaraay wallugo Jawmiraawo
Judges5:24 Ammaa barka laatanto Ya'el
Judges5:25 Sisera tori mo ndiyam
Judges5:26 Nden o forti juuɗe maako
Judges5:27 O turi yeeso maako
Judges5:28 Daada Sisera ɗon laara gal wurdere suudu
Judges5:29 O ɗon tokko lornango hoore maako jaawaabu ngu rewɓe marɓe hikma njaaboto.
Judges5:30 “Haa sooje'en ɗon mooɓta keɓal na? Fakat
Judges5:31 Jawmiraawo
Judges6:1 Fahin Isra'iila'en mbaɗi ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o hokki ɓe haa juuɗe yimɓe Madiyan duuɓi joweeɗiɗi.
Judges6:2 Madiyan'en torri Isra'iila'en masin. Ngam maajum
Judges6:3 Koo ndey Isra'iila'en aawi fuu
Judges6:4 Ɓe ɗonno caŋngina ɗakki lesdi maɓɓe e ɓe ɗonno mbonna ƴaamle lesdi haa yotti lesdi Gaaza. Ɓe accanaay Isra'iila'en ko ɓe nyaamata sam
Judges6:5 Ɓe mba'i bee tokke maɓɓe e ɓe ngari bee laymaaji maɓɓe
Judges6:6 Ngam daliila yimɓe Madiyan
Judges6:7 Nde Isra'iila'en tori Jawmiraawo daliila Madiyan'en
Judges6:8 o neldi ɓe annabiijo mo wi'i ɓe: Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i: “Mi wurtini on lesdi Misra
Judges6:9 Mi hisni on juuɗe Misra'en e juuɗe toonyooɓe on. Mi riiwi konne'en yeeso mooɗon nde on ɗon njaha e mi hokki on lesdi maɓɓe.
Judges6:10 Mi wi'i on: Min woni Allah Jawmiraawo mon
Judges6:11 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wari
Judges6:12 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo waŋgani mo
Judges6:13 Gedeyon jaabi: “Barkaama
Judges6:14 Nden Jawmiraawo wayliti gal Gedeyon
Judges6:15 Gedeyon jaabi: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Judges6:16 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Mi wondan bee ma. A jaaloto yimɓe Madiyan bana to ɗum goɗɗo gooto tan.”
Judges6:17 Gedeyon wi'i: “To ɗum fottani ma
Judges6:18 Taa dillu ɗo
Judges6:19 Nden Gedeyon hirsi jawgel
Judges6:20 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i mo: “Jo'in kusel e tamseeje dow tapaare ton
Judges6:21 Nden malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo forti juŋngo mum bee sawru
Judges6:22 Gedeyon faami o yi'i malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo. O huli
Judges6:23 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Jam salaaman! Taa hul! A maayataa.”
Judges6:24 Gedeyon mahani Jawmiraawo hirsirde ton
Judges6:25 Jemmaare man Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: “Hoo'u ngaari baaba ma
Judges6:26 Nden mahan Allah Jawmiraawo ma hirsirde kaa'e mo'inaande woonde dow towndiire nde'e. Ɓaawo man hoo'u ngaari kalhaldi
Judges6:27 Gedeyon hoo'i worɓe sappo nder huuwooɓe muuɗum
Judges6:28 Jaŋngo man
Judges6:29 Ɓe ƴamƴamtiri: “Moy waɗi ɗum?” Ɓe ƴami yimɓe
Judges6:30 Nden ɓe mbi'i Yo'as: “Wurtin ɓiya haa ɗo min mbara mo
Judges6:31 Yo'as jaabi dariiɓe yeeso muuɗum fuu: “Ɗum onon faddanta Ba'al haa kisnon mo na? Koo moy haɓani mo
Judges6:32 Diga saa'i maajum
Judges6:33 Yimɓe Madiyan e Amalek fuu e yimɓe iwɓe haa laɗɗe fuunaaŋge fuu mooɓti. Ɓe eeri maayo Urdun
Judges6:34 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo jippi dow Gedeyon
Judges6:35 O neli nelaaɓe haa lenyol Manassa fuu
Judges6:36 Gedeyon wi'i Allah: “A wi'i a hisnan Isra'iila bee juŋngo am. To ɗum gooŋga
Judges6:37 ndaa
Judges6:38 Ɗum waɗi non. Jaŋngo maajum o dawi cub
Judges6:39 Nden o wi'i Allah: “Useni! Taa tikkanam! Accu mi ɓesda wolwango ma nde woore tan. Haa mi foonda fahin bee laral mbaalu. Accu saawawre waɗa dow lesdi fuu
Judges6:40 Jemmaare man Allah waɗi non. Laral mbaalu tan yoori
Judges7:1 Nden Gedeyon bi'eteeɗo Yerub-Ba'al boo dawi cub
Judges7:2 Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: “Worɓe wonduɓe bee maaɗa ɗuuɗi. Mi hokkataa ɓe yimɓe Madiyan
Judges7:3 Kadi
Judges7:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: “Koo jonta boo yimɓe ɗuuɗi. Yahru ɓe haa ndiyam
Judges7:5 Gedeyon yahri ɓe haa ndiyam. Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Koo moy tahi ndiyam bee ɗemŋgal bana rawaandu tahrata
Judges7:6 Worɓe teemeɗɗe tato nyeɗi ndiyam bee juŋngo
Judges7:7 Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: “Bee worɓe teemeɗɗe tato tahuɓe ndiyam mi hisnirta on
Judges7:8 Gedeyon lorni Isra'iila'en woɗɓe ɓe koota. O jogiti worɓe teemeɗɗe tato go tan. Kamɓe ɓe koo'i njooɓaari e luwe konu haa hootanɓe. Saŋngeere yimɓe Madiyan ɗon haa les Gedeyon nder waadiwol.
Judges7:9 Jemmaare man Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: “Umma
Judges7:10 Ammaa to a ɗon hula jippaago ton
Judges7:11 A nanan ko ɓe mbolwata ton
Judges7:12 Yimɓe Madiyan e Amalek e yimɓe iwɓe haa laɗɗe fuunaaŋge kebbini waadiwol
Judges7:13 Nde Gedeyon yotti ton
Judges7:14 Soobaajo maako wi'i mo: “Ko saawi nder koyɗol man
Judges7:15 Nde Gedeyon nani haala koyɗol man e ko saawi nder maagol
Judges7:16 O senndi honooɓe maako teemeɗɗe tato geɓe tati. O hokki koo moy luwal konu e mbulku sookru bee jamre yiite nder maagu.
Judges7:17 O wi'i ɓe: “To mi yottake sera saŋngeere
Judges7:18 To mi fuufi luwal konu
Judges7:19 Gedeyon e worɓe teemerre wonduɓe bee muuɗum njotti sera saŋngeere diga jeŋngaay. Ɓe cannjino aynooɓe wakkati man. Ɓe puufi luwe konu
Judges7:20 Nden geɓe tati go fuu puufi luwe
Judges7:21 Ɓe ɗon taari saŋngeere
Judges7:22 Saa'i worɓe teemeɗɗe tato ɗon puufa luwe
Judges7:23 Ɓe ewni Isra'iila'en nder le'i Neftali e Aser e lenyol Manassa fuu. Ɓe ngari
Judges7:24 Gedeyon neli nelaaɓe koo toy dow kooseeje Efrayim
Judges7:25 Ɓe naŋngi laamiiɓe Madiyan ɗiɗo
Judges8:1 Yimɓe Efrayim mbi'i Gedeyon: “Koni a ewnaaki min
Judges8:2 Ammaa Gedeyon jaabi ɓe: “Ɗume mi waɗi haa ɓuri ko on ngaɗi? Walliinde mooɗon onon yimɓe Efrayim
Judges8:3 Ndaa
Judges8:4 Gedeyon e honooɓe muuɗum teemeɗɗe tato njotti maayo Urdun
Judges8:5 Ɓe ngari haa Sukkot
Judges8:6 Ammaa mawɓe Sukkot mbi'i: “Kadi a naŋngaay Zebaha e Calmunna tawon non min ndokka jama'aare ma tamseeje na?”
Judges8:7 Nden Gedeyon jaabi ɓe: “Booɗɗum! To Jawmiraawo hokki yam Zebaha e Calmunna
Judges8:8 Nden o dilli
Judges8:9 Gedeyon wi'i ɓe: “To mi jaalake
Judges8:10 Zebaha e Calmunna ɗonno haa Karkor
Judges8:11 Gedeyon tokki laawol ngol jooɗiiɓe haa ladde nder cuuɗi laymaaji tokkoto
Judges8:12 Zebaha e Calmunna
Judges8:13 Nde Gedeyon ɗon warta konu gal wa'orde Heeres
Judges8:14 o naŋngi derkeejo mo Sukkot
Judges8:15 Nden Gedeyon yehi haa yimɓe Sukkot
Judges8:16 Nden o hoo'i gi'e ladde hamaadaare e giŋngille
Judges8:17 O yibbini suudu towndu haa Peniyel boo
Judges8:18 Nden Gedeyon ƴami Zebaha e Calmunna: “Worɓe ɓe mbarɗon haa Taboora
Judges8:19 O wi'i ɓe: “Ɗum deerɗiraaɓe am
Judges8:20 O umri Yeter
Judges8:21 Zebaha e Calmunna mbi'i Gedeyon: “Sey an a mbara min! Sey semmbe gorko fotata huuwugo kuugal gorko.” Ɗon nii Gedeyon ummi
Judges8:22 Ɓaawo man Isra'iila'en mbi'i Gedeyon: “Laamana min
Judges8:23 Gedeyon jaabi ɓe: “Min mi laamantaako on
Judges8:24 E o wi'i ɓe fahin: “Ammaa woodi huunde woɗnde mi yiɗi toraago on: Koo moy mooɗon hokkammi halagaare wonnde nder keɓal konu mum.” Yimɓe Madiyan ngoodino kalagaaje kaŋŋeeri
Judges8:25 Isra'iila'en njaabi mo: “Fakat min ndokkete ɗe.” Ɓe mbe'iti limce
Judges8:26 Teddeeŋga kalagaaje kaŋŋeeri ɗe ɓe ndokki Gedeyon
Judges8:27 Gedeyon waɗi ɗanciki limanjo bee kaŋŋeeri man
Judges8:28 Diga saa'i maajum Madiyan'en leestani Isra'iila'en
Judges8:29 Gedeyon ɓii Yo'as
Judges8:30 O danyi ɓiɓɓe worɓe cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗo
Judges8:31 O woodi boo culaaɗo haa Sikem
Judges8:32 Gedeyon maayi bee seyo nder ndottaaku. Ɓe uwi mo nder yenaande baaba maako Yo'as haa Ofra
Judges8:33 Ɓaawo maayde Gedeyon
Judges8:34 Ɓe ngejjiti Allah Jawmiraawo maɓɓe
Judges8:35 Ɓe mbarjaaki saare Gedeyon bi'eteeɗo boo Yerub-Ba'al fodde kuuɗe booɗɗe ɗe o huuwani Isra'iila.
Judges9:1 Abimelek ɓii Yerub-Ba'al yehi haa Sikem ngam o yeewtida bee kaawu'en maako e yimɓe saare maama maako fuu. O wi'i ɓe:
Judges9:2 “Mbolwane ardiiɓe Sikem fuu
Judges9:3 Kaawu'en maako mbolwani ardiiɓe Sikem bolle ɗe'e fuu. Ɓerɗe maɓɓe ngayliti haa Abimelek
Judges9:4 Ɓe ndokki mo ceede cardi cappanɗe joweeɗiɗi iwɗe haa suudu Ba'al-Berit. Bee ceede man Abimelek yoɓi worɓe meere'en
Judges9:5 O yehi haa saare baaba maako haa Ofra. Haa ton o mbari deerɗiraaɓe maako
Judges9:6 Ardiiɓe Sikem e Bayti-Millo fuu mooɓi haa lekki makki kommbi hayre darnaande nder Sikem
Judges9:7 Yotam nani haala ka'a. O wa'i dow yeereere hooseere Gerisiima
Judges9:8 Nyannde feere leɗɗe ndilli ngam ɗe cuɓa laamiiɗo maaje. Ɗe mbi'i jaytunhi: Laata laamiiɗo amin.
Judges9:9 Ammaa jaytunhi jaabi: On ngiɗi mi acca waɗugo nebbam ɗam Allah e yimɓe ngerdi ngam haa mi somna hoore am bee laamanaago leɗɗe goɗɗe na?
Judges9:10 Nden leɗɗe mbi'i ibbi: An war
Judges9:11 Ammaa ibbi jaabi: On ngiɗi mi acca rimugo ɓiɓɓe booɗɗe dakamje ngam haa mi somna hoore am bee laamanaago leɗɗe goɗɗe na?
Judges9:12 Nden leɗɗe mbi'i inabohi: An war
Judges9:13 Ammaa inabohi jaabi: On ngiɗi mi acca waɗugo inaboojam kesam ceynanɗam Allah e yimɓe ngam haa mi somna hoore am bee laamanaago leɗɗe goɗɗe na?
Judges9:14 Ɓaawo man leɗɗe fuu mbi'i wumre gi'e: An war
Judges9:15 Wumre gi'e jaabi ɗe: Fakat to on moytatam haa mi laato laamiiɗo mooɗon
Judges9:16 “Jonta
Judges9:17 Baaba am haɓani on
Judges9:18 Ammaa onon on tuurtani saare maako hannde
Judges9:19 To on kuuwani Yerub-Ba'al e saare mum hannde bee gooŋgaaku e laaɓeeŋga ɓerɗe
Judges9:20 Ammaa to naa non
Judges9:21 Nden Yotam doggi haa Biir
Judges9:22 Abimelek ɗowi Isra'iila duuɓi tati.
Judges9:23 Allah neli ruuhu kalluŋgu
Judges9:24 Ɗum waɗi non ngam haa Abimelek ɓii Yerub-Ba'al
Judges9:25 Ardiiɓe Sikem kooci yimɓe
Judges9:26 Ga'al ɓii Obet wari haa Sikem
Judges9:27 Ɓe njehi haa gese inabooje maɓɓe
Judges9:28 Ga'al wi'i ɓe: “Abimelek o moyjo? En ɓeye haa Sikem ngam haa en kuuwana mo? Naa o ɓii Yerub-Ba'al e naa o jo'ini Zebul hooreejo dow berniwol? Ammaa onon
Judges9:29 Moy waɗata mi laato ardiiɗo yimɓe ɓe'e haa mi riiwa Abimelek? Nden o wi'i: Abimelek! Ɗuɗɗin jama'aare konu ma
Judges9:30 Zebul
Judges9:31 O neli nelaaɓe haa Abimelek bee sirri haa ɓe mbi'a mo: “Ndaa! Ga'al ɓii Obet e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum ngari jonta haa Sikem
Judges9:32 Umma bee jemma kadi
Judges9:33 Fajiri to naaŋge fuɗi
Judges9:34 Jemma maajum
Judges9:35 Nde Ga'al wurti berniwol
Judges9:36 Ga'al yi'i ɓe
Judges9:37 Ga'al wi'i fahin: “Laar
Judges9:38 Zebul jaabi: “Toy harakaaji ma go kadi? A wi'no: Abimelek o moyjo haa en kuuwana mo? Jonta ndaa jama'aare nde a yawino. Yah haɓu bee maare kadi!”
Judges9:39 Ga'al ardi ardiiɓe Sikem
Judges9:40 Abimelek taasni mo e o doggi yeeso maako. Ɗuuɗɓe mbaraama haa yotti dammugal berniwol yimɓe ɗon mbaali.
Judges9:41 Abimelek dilli jooɗi haa Aruma
Judges9:42 Jaŋngo man ummaatoore Sikem wurti
Judges9:43 O sennditi yimɓe maako geɓe tati e ɓe mbaaltani ɓe haa ladde. Nde ɓe ngi'i yimɓe ngurtake berniwol
Judges9:44 Yaake nde geɓe goɗɗe ɗiɗi ukkani yimɓe haa kayweeji e ɓe ɗon mbara ɓe
Judges9:45 Ɓe nyalli haɓugo bee yimɓe berniwol haa Abimelek nyaami ngol
Judges9:46 Nde ardiiɓe suudu towndu haa Sikem nani habaru ndu'u
Judges9:47 Abimelek anndinaama ɓe fuu ɓe mooɓtake ton.
Judges9:48 Ngam maajum o wa'i hooseere Calmon
Judges9:49 Koo moy maɓɓe fe'i lisal lekki boo. Nden ɓe tokki Abimelek
Judges9:50 Ɓaawo man Abimelek yehi Tebes. O saŋngini yeeso berniwol man
Judges9:51 Woodi suudu towndu semmbiɗndu haa caka berniwol. Worɓe
Judges9:52 Abimelek wari gal suudu man
Judges9:53 Ammaa debbo feere sakkini hayre namrude dow hoore Abimelek
Judges9:54 Law o ewni suka doondoowo balmi maako
Judges9:55 Nde Isra'iila'en ngi'i Abimelek maayi
Judges9:56 Bana nii Allah lortiniri halleende Abimelek dow hoore maako. Ɗum halleende nde Abimelek waɗi baaba mum
Judges9:57 Allah lortini boo halleende nde ardiiɓe Sikem mbaɗi dow ko'e muuɗum'en. Bana nii naaloore Yotam ɓii Yerub-Ba'al gooŋɗiri.
Judges10:1 Ɓaawo maayde Abimelek
Judges10:2 Toola laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila duuɓi noogas e tati. Nden o maayi
Judges10:3 Ɓaawo maayde Toola
Judges10:4 O woodi ɓiɓɓe worɓe cappanɗe tato wa'otooɓe bamɗe cappanɗe tati e ɓe ngoodi berniiji cappanɗe tati nder lesdi Gile'at. Haa hannde berniiji ɗi mbi'ete gure Ya'ir.
Judges10:5 Nde Ya'ir maayi
Judges10:6 Fahin Isra'iila'en mbaɗi ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ɓe ndewi Ba'alji e Asteraaji
Judges10:7 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo tikkani Isra'iila'en
Judges10:8 Duuɓi sappo e joweetati ɓe ɓilli Isra'iila'en fuu wonɓe haa fuunaaŋge maayo Urdun nder lesdi Amoori'en
Judges10:9 Ammooni'en ɗonno eera maayo Urdun boo ngam haɓugo bee le'i Yahuuda e Benyamin e Efrayim. Isra'iila'en nastino ɓillaare naawnde.
Judges10:10 Ɓe tori Jawmiraawo ballal
Judges10:11 Jawmiraawo jaabi ɓe: “Yaake Misra'en e Amoori'en e Ammooni'en e Filisti'en e Sidoni'en e Amaleki'en e Ma'oni'en ɓilli on
Judges10:12 
Judges10:13 Ammaa on ngudini yam
Judges10:14 Ndille! Tore ballal haa ɗowanteeɓe ɓe cuɓɗon
Judges10:15 Nden Isra'iila'en mbi'i Jawmiraawo: “Min mbaɗi hakke. Waɗ ko fottani ma
Judges10:16 Ɓe itti ɗowanteeɓe jananɓe caka maɓɓe
Judges10:17 Jama'aare Ammooni'en taaskani konu. Ɓe caŋngini nder lesdi Gile'at. Isra'iila'en boo mooɓi
Judges10:18 Jama'aare
Judges11:1 Woodino konoowo cemmbiɗɗo nder Gile'at
Judges11:2 Debbo Gile'at boo danyani mo ɓiɓɓe worɓe. Nde ɓe mawni
Judges11:3 Nden Yefta doggi daayiiɗum diga deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum
Judges11:4 Wakkati seɗɗa ɓaawoɗon
Judges11:5 Saa'i maajum
Judges11:6 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “War
Judges11:7 Yefta jaabi ndotti'en Gile'at: “Naane on nganyi yam haa on ndiiwi yam e saare baaba am. Ngam ɗume ngarɗon jonta nde on nasti ɓillaare?”
Judges11:8 Ndotti'en mbi'i mo: “Gooŋga min ngaylitake haa maaɗa jonta. Min ngiɗi a yahda bee amin
Judges11:9 Yefta jaabi ɓe: “To on koori yam ngam haɓugo bee Ammooni'en
Judges11:10 Ndotti'en Gile'at mbi'i Yefta: “Jawmiraawo woni ceedoowo hakkunde meeɗen
Judges11:11 Nden Yefta yahdi bee maɓɓe. Yimɓe Gile'at mbaɗi mo hooreejo e ardiiɗo konu muuɗum'en. Yefta wolwi haala muuɗum fuu yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Mispa.
Judges11:12 Ɓaawo man Yefta neli nelaaɓe haa laamiiɗo Ammooni'en
Judges11:13 Laamiiɗo Ammooni'en jaabi nelaaɓe Yefta: “Wakkati Isra'iila'en ngurti lesdi Misra
Judges11:14 Fahin Yefta neli nelaaɓe haa laamiiɗo Ammooni'en
Judges11:15 ngam wi'ugo mo: “Isra'iila'en nyaamaay lesdi Mo'ab e ndi Ammooni'en.
Judges11:16 Ngam nde ɓe ummi lesdi Misra
Judges11:17 Diga ton
Judges11:18 Ɓaawo man ɓe tokkitini jahaaŋgal maɓɓe gal ladde hamaadaare
Judges11:19 Diga ton
Judges11:20 Ammaa Sihon hoolaaki Isra'iila'en
Judges11:21 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila'en hokki Sihon e jama'aare konu mum fuu haa Isra'iila'en
Judges11:22 diga waadiwol Arnon haa yotti maayo Yabbok e diga ladde hamaadaare gal fuunaaŋge haa yotti Urdun.
Judges11:23 Ɗum Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila'en nyaami lesdi Amoori'en yeeso Isra'iila ummaatoore muuɗum
Judges11:24 Naa an mari lesdi koo ndiye ndi Kemos ɗowanteeɗo ma marni ma na? Bana non
Judges11:25 A ɗon tammo a ɓuri Balak
Judges11:26 Duuɓi teemeɗɗe tati (300) Isra'iila'en ɗonno njooɗi haa Hesbon e gure maagol
Judges11:27 Aa'a
Judges11:28 Ammaa laamiiɗo Ammooni'en jaɓaay bolle Yefta ɗe o neldi mo.
Judges11:29 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo wari dow Yefta
Judges11:30 Yefta togani Jawmiraawo togayeere
Judges11:31 to mi jaalake ɓe
Judges11:32 Nden o saali keerol Ammooni'en ngam o haɓa bee maɓɓe. Jawmiraawo hokki mo ɓe.
Judges11:33 O jaali ɓe diga Aro'er haa yotti Minnit
Judges11:34 Nde Yefta warti saare mum haa Mispa
Judges11:35 Nde Yefta yi'i mo
Judges11:36 Ɓiɗɗo maako jaabi mo: “Baaba am
Judges11:37 Nden o wi'i baaba maako: “Mi ɗon toro ma huunde woore tan: Accam lebbi ɗiɗi
Judges11:38 Yefta wi'i: Yah kadi! Nden o duŋani mo dillugo jooɗo lebbi ɗiɗi. O yehi
Judges11:39 Nde lebbi ɗiɗi timmi
Judges11:40 Hitaande fuu nyalɗe nayi ɓiɓɓe rewɓe Isra'iila'en njahata woyugo ɓii Yefta mo Gile'at.
Judges12:1 Yimɓe Efrayim mooɓti
Judges12:2 Yefta jaabi ɓe: “Min e yimɓe am min mbaɗi haɓre saatunde bee Ammooni'en. Min ewni on
Judges12:3 Nde ngi'mi on ngiɗaa wallugo yam
Judges12:4 Yefta mooɓti worɓe Gile'at fuu
Judges12:5 Yimɓe Gile'at njooɗi haa eerorɗe maayo Urdun yahugo lesdi Efrayim. To goɗɗo Efrayim dogguɗo wari wi'i: Acceeɗam mi eero
Judges12:6 ɓe mbi'a mo: “Wi': Cibbolet!” To o wi'i: “Sibbolet”
Judges12:7 Bana nii Yefta laatori alkaaliijo Isra'iila duuɓi joweego. Nden o maayi
Judges12:8 Ɓaawo maayde Yefta
Judges12:9 O woodi ɓiɓɓe worɓe cappanɗe tato e ɓiɓɓe rewɓe cappanɗe tato. O te'ni ɓiɓɓe maako rewɓe haa worɓe ɓe ngonaay danygol maako. O te'ani ɓiɓɓe maako worɓe boo rewɓe ɓe ngonaay danygol maako. O alkaaliijo Isra'iila duuɓi joweeɗiɗi.
Judges12:10 Nden o maayi
Judges12:11 Ɓaawo maayde Ibsaan
Judges12:12 Nden o maayi
Judges12:13 Ɓaawo maayde Elon
Judges12:14 O woodi ɓiɓɓe worɓe cappanɗe nayo e taaniraaɓe worɓe cappanɗe tato
Judges12:15 Nden o maayi
Judges13:1 Fahin Isra'iila'en mbaɗi ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o hokki ɓe haa juuɗe Filisti'en duuɓi cappanɗe nayi.
Judges13:2 Saa'i man woodi goɗɗo lenyol Dan
Judges13:3 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo waŋgani debbo oo
Judges13:4 Reenta diga jonta
Judges13:5 ngam reedu ndu e ɓesnuki ɓiɗɗo ma oo. Taa laɓu gaasa hoore maako sam
Judges13:6 Debbo nasti saare
Judges13:7 O wi'i yam a reedan
Judges13:8 Manooha tori Jawmiraawo: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Judges13:9 Allah jaɓi tornde Manooha nde'e
Judges13:10 ngam maajum o yaawɗi
Judges13:11 Manooha ummi
Judges13:12 Manooha wi'i: Booɗɗum. To bolle ma ngooŋɗi
Judges13:13 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo jaabi Manooha: “Sey debbo ma daayo ko mi limtani mo fuu:
Judges13:14 Taa o metta ko iwi haa inabohi fuu
Judges13:15 Nden Manooha wi'i malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo: “Reenu seɗɗa min nyaancane jawgel mbeewa.”
Judges13:16 Malaa'ikaajo jaabi: “Koo to mi reeni
Judges13:17 Manooha wi'i mo: “Anndin min innde ma ngam haa min teddina ma to bolle ma ngooŋɗi.”
Judges13:18 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Ngam ɗume ƴamata innde am? Nde kaayeefiire.”
Judges13:19 Manooha hoo'i jawgel mbeewa e dokkal nyaamdu
Judges13:20 Yaake ɗemŋgal yiite ummi haa hirsirde man dilli dow
Judges13:21 Ɓe meetaay yi'ugo malaa'ikaajo man. Manooha faami ɗum malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo.
Judges13:22 Manooha wi'i debbo mum: “Fakat en maayan
Judges13:23 Ammaa debbo maako wi'i mo: “To Jawmiraawo ɗaɓɓino mbarugo en
Judges13:24 Debbo Manooha danyi ɓiɗɗo gorko
Judges13:25 Yaake o ɗonno haa saŋngeere Dan hakkunde Cor'a bee Estawol
Judges14:1 Nyalaade woɗnde Samson yehi Timna
Judges14:2 O hooti
Judges14:3 Saaro'en maako ƴami mo: “Walaa paanyo debbo nder banndiraaɓe ma malla nder ummaatoore meeɗen na? Koni ɗaɓɓata debbo haa Filisti'en saadooni'en ɓe'e?” Samson jaabi baaba muuɗum: “Kaŋko fottani yam
Judges14:4 Saaro'en Samson anndaa nii ɗum Jawmiraawo waɗi yelo ngo nder ɓiɗɗo maɓɓe haa o heɓa dabare haɓugo bee Filisti'en. Ngam saa'i maajum Filisti'en ɗon laamano Isra'iila'en.
Judges14:5 Nde Samson e saaro'en muuɗum ɗon njaha Timna
Judges14:6 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo naŋngi Samson
Judges14:7 Nden Samson yehi
Judges14:8 Nyalɗe seɗɗa ɓaawoɗon o yehi fahin ngam haa o ɓaŋga mo. O seli laawol haa o laara caaɗŋgu mbarooga go. O yi'i udumre nyaaki e njumri ɗon nder caaɗŋgu man.
Judges14:9 O hoo'i njumri bee juŋngo maako
Judges14:10 Baaba Samson yehi haa saare paanyo debbo go
Judges14:11 Nde Filisti'en ngi'i Samson
Judges14:12 Samson wi'i ɓe: “Mi waɗanan on annditanamwol. To on keɓti ngol
Judges14:13 Ammaa to on mbaawaay waŋginango yam ngol
Judges14:14 Samson wi'i ɓe: “Nyaamdu wurtake haa nyaamoojum. Dakam wurtake haa cemmbiɗɗum.” Ɗume ɗum yiɗi wi'go? Haa ragare nyalɗe tati sukaaɓe keɓtaay ko saawi nder annditanamwol man tawon.
Judges14:15 Nyannde joweeɗiɗawre ɓe mbi'i debbo Samson: “Ƴoyru gorko ma
Judges14:16 Debbo Samson yehi bee bojji haa goriiko
Judges14:17 Ammaa debbo maako tokki woyugo nyalɗe juulde man joweeɗiɗi fuu. Nyannde joweeɗiɗawre Samson faamtini mo
Judges14:18 Nyannde joweeɗiɗawre man
Judges14:19 Nden Ruuhu Jawmiraawo nasti nder Samson
Judges14:20 Nden ɓe te'ni debbo maako haa waloojo maako.
Judges15:1 Ɓaawo seɗɗa
Judges15:2 wi'i: “Fakat
Judges15:3 Samson wi'i: “Jonta kam mi walaa aybe to mi huuwi Filisti'en kalluɗum.”
Judges15:4 O yehi
Judges15:5 Nden o huɓɓi jame man
Judges15:6 Filisti'en ƴami: “Moy waɗi ɗum?” Woɗɓe mbi'i: “Samson waɗi ɗum ngam daliila esum Timnaajo mo hooci debbo Samson
Judges15:7 Samson wi'i ɓe: “Asee
Judges15:8 O ukkani ɓe bee semmbe
Judges15:9 Filisti'en mba'i
Judges15:10 Yimɓe lenyol Yahuuda ƴami ɓe: “Koni njippuɗon honugo min?” Ɓe njaabi: “Min njippi ngam haɓɓugo Samson
Judges15:11 Worɓe Yahuuda ujine tato (3.000) njehi haa lowol tapaare haa Etaam
Judges15:12 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Min ngari ngam haa min kaɓɓe
Judges15:13 Ɓe njaabi mo: “Nonnon
Judges15:14 Nde o wari haa Lehi
Judges15:15 O tawi galaŋgal wamnde keccal. O forti juŋngo maako

Judges15:19 Allah seeki tapaare wonnde haa Lehi
Judges15:20 Samson waɗi alkaaliiku Isra'iila duuɓi noogas
Judges16:1 Nyannde feere
Judges16:2 Yimɓe Gaaza nani Samson ɗon ton. Ɓe taari mo
Judges16:3 Samson waali
Judges16:4 Ɓaawo man Samson fuɗɗi yiɗugo debbo bi'eteeɗo Deliila
Judges16:5 Laamiiɓe Filisti'en njowo ngari mbi'i Deliila: “Ƴoyru Samson o anndine haa o heɓi semmbe fantunde nde'e. E no goɗɗo heɓrata naŋngugo mo. Bana nii min mbaawan haɓɓugo mo
Judges16:6 Nden Deliila ƴami Samson: “Useni anndinam haa keɓata semmbe fantunde nde'e. Bee ɗume goɗɗo haɓɓete ngam tampingo semmbe ma?”
Judges16:7 Samson jaabi mo: “To ɓe kaɓɓi yam bee jiriiji kecci joweeɗiɗi ɗi ciwaa yoorugo
Judges16:8 Laamiiɓe Filisti'en ngaddani Deliila jiriiji kecci joweeɗiɗi ɗi njooraay tawon. O haɓɓi Samson bee maaji.
Judges16:9 Deliila nyukkinino yimɓe nder suudu cakaaru. Nden o wooki
Judges16:10 Deliila wi'i Samson: “A janci yam bee fewugo yam. Jonta kam yeccam no goɗɗo waawrata haɓɓugo ma.”
Judges16:11 O jaabi mo: “To ɓe kaɓɓiri yam ɓoggi kesi ɗi kuuwtiniraaka tawon
Judges16:12 Deliila hoo'i ɓoggi kesi
Judges16:13 Deliila wi'i Samson: “A janci yam kadiboo bee fewugo yam. Jonta kam
Judges16:14 Deliila esti Samson ɗaani
Judges16:15 Deliila wi'i Samson: “Ɗume tabitinta a yiɗi yam
Judges16:16 Bana nii o tokkori Samson bee haala man nyalɗe fuu
Judges16:17 Nden o wi'i Deliila: “Gaasa hoore am meeɗaay laɓeego
Judges16:18 Nde Deliila anndi Samson wi'i mo gooŋga
Judges16:19 Deliila wallini hoore Samson dow koppi mum haa o ɗaano. Nden o ewni goɗɗo ngam ta'ugo bami gaasa Samson joweeɗiɗi. Deliila fuɗɗi doolugo Samson
Judges16:20 Deliila wooki: “Samson
Judges16:21 Filisti'en naŋngi mo
Judges16:22 Ammaa gaasa hoore maako fuɗi fahin.
Judges16:23 Nyannde feere laamiiɓe Filisti'en mooɓi ngam waɗugo juulde jaalorgal muuɗum'en e lii'anaago ɗowanteeɗo muuɗum'en bi'eteeɗo Daagon kirseteeŋga maŋnga. Ɓe ɗonno ngima: “Ɗowanteeɗo meeɗen hokki en konneejo men Samson.”
Judges16:24 Ummaatoore laari Samson
Judges16:25 Nde ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗon ceyi
Judges16:26 o wi'i derkeejo mo ɗon ɗowa mo: “Ɗowam haa mi meema daŋraŋge doondiiɗe suudu ndu
Judges16:27 Suudu man heewi worɓe e rewɓe
Judges16:28 Nden Samson tori Jawmiraawo: “Yaa Allah Jawmiraawo
Judges16:29 Ɓaawo man o naŋngi daŋraŋge cakaaje ɗiɗi
Judges16:30 O hooli: “Sey Filisti'en maayda bee am!” Nden o yerɓi bee semmbe maako fuu. Suudu yibbi dow laamiiɓe e yimɓe wonɓe nder maaru fuu. Mbaraaɓe Samson nder maayde muuɗum ɓuri ɗuuɗugo dow mbaraaɓe muuɗum nder wakkati ngeendam muuɗum.
Judges16:31 Deerɗiraaɓe maako e banndiraaɓe maako woɗɓe ngari
Judges17:1 Woodino goɗɗo innde maako Mika o ɗonno jooɗi haa kooseeje.

Judges17:3 Mika hokkiti daada maako ceede cardi ujineere e teemerre (1.100) go
Judges17:4 Nde o hokkiti daada maako cardi ndi'i
Judges17:5 Gorko bi'eteeɗo Mika oo
Judges17:6 Zamanu maajum walaa laamiiɗo haa Isra'iila
Judges17:7 Nden woodino derkeejo Lewiijo koɗo haa Baytilaama
Judges17:8 O wurti Baytilaama

Judges17:10 Mika wi'i mo: “Jooɗa haa am
Judges17:11 Lewiijo oo jaɓi jooɗaago haa saare Mika. O jogi mo bana ɓiyiiko.
Judges17:12 Mika waɗi mo limanjo mum
Judges17:13 Mika wi'i: “Jonta mi woodi limanjo Lewiijo haa am
Judges18:1 Zamanu man
Judges18:2 Yimɓe lenyol Dan cuɓi worɓe semmbiɗɓe nder muuɗum'en haa Cor'a e Estawol njowo
Judges18:3 Saa'i ɓe ɗon haa saare Mika
Judges18:4 O jaabi ɓe: “Mika hooci yam haa mi huuwana mo kuugal limanku
Judges18:5 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Booɗɗum. Ƴaman min Allah. Min ngiɗi anndugo to jahaaŋgal amin nga'al waɗan nafuuda.”
Judges18:6 Limanjo jaabi ɓe: “Taa kultore! Jawmiraawo wondan bee mon nder jahaaŋgal mooɗon.”
Judges18:7 Worɓe njowo go ndilli
Judges18:8 Nelaaɓe njowo go ngarti haa Cor'a e Estawol
Judges18:9 Ɓe njaabi: “Ngare
Judges18:10 To on njottake ton

Judges18:12 Ɓe njehi

Judges18:17 Horooɓe njowo go nasti
Judges18:18 Nde limanjo laari woɗɓe nasti saare Mika
Judges18:19 Ɓe njaabi mo: “Jeeɗa siriw! Yahdu bee amin
Judges18:20 Ɗum seyni ɓernde maako masin. O hoo'i ɗanciki limanjo e lawru sehaandu e labbi goɗɗi go
Judges18:21 Nden ɓe ngayliti
Judges18:22 Nde ɓe ndaayi saare Mika
Judges18:23 Ɓe ngookani yimɓe Dan. Yimɓe Dan ngayliti

Judges18:25 Yimɓe Dan mbi'i mo: “Maɓɓu hunnduko ma. Ngam taa yimɓe tikkuɓe ɓe'e ukkano ma. A fooɗanan hoore ma e yimɓe saare ma fuu halkere.”
Judges18:26 Nden yimɓe Dan tokkitini yahdu muuɗum'en. Mika laari
Judges18:27 Yimɓe Dan kooci limanjo e kuuje cenaaɗe ɗe Mika waɗino. Ɓe njehi ɓe ukkani Layis
Judges18:28 Layis ɗon nder waadiwol Bayti-Rehob
Judges18:29 Ɓe cannji innde Layis nde ɓe ɗonno mbi'a ngol ɓooyma
Judges18:30 Yimɓe Dan ndarni lawru sehaandu go. Yonatan ɓii Gersom ɓii Muusa
Judges18:31 Ɓe cigi lawru sehaandu ndu Mika waɗi wakkati suudu Allah ɗon haa Silo fuu.

Judges19:11 Nde ɓe ɓaditi berniwol
Judges19:12 Ammaa jaagorɗo maako wi'i mo: “En nastataa berniwol ngol yimɓe mum laataaki Isra'iila'en. En njaha haa en njotta Gibiya.”
Judges19:13 O ɓesdi wi'ugo: En kaɓda en mbaaloya haa Gibiya malla Rama.

Judges19:15 Ɓe celi laawol ngam haa ɓe nasta Gibiya
Judges19:16 Kiikiiɗe maajum
Judges19:17 Ndottiijo oo laari koɗo ɗon jooɗi haa daldal nder berniwol. O ƴami mo: “Toy iwɗaa? Toy njahataa?”

Judges19:19 alhaali boo
