Judges20:1 Isra'iila'en wonɓe haa Dan diga woyla haa yotti fombina Beersaba
Judges20:2 Ardiiɓe e yimɓe le'i Isra'iila fuu ngari haa mooɓtorde yimɓe Allah nde'e
Judges20:3 Yimɓe lenyol Benyamin nani haala mooɓtorde Isra'iila'en haa Mispa. Isra'iila'en ƴami: “Noy halleende nde'e waari?”
Judges20:4 Lewiijo mo culaaɗo mum mbaraama go jaabi: “Mi wari haa Gibiya nder lesdi Benyamin
Judges20:5 Ardiiɓe Gibiya ummani yam
Judges20:6 Mi hoo'i mo
Judges20:7 Onon wonɓe haa ɗo fuu on Isra'iila'en. Linye haala maajum
Judges20:8 Yimɓe fuu ummi bana goɗɗo gooto
Judges20:9 Ndaa ko mbaɗeten: En mbaɗan kur'u ngam suɓugo woɗɓe meeɗen
Judges20:10 Gooto nder sappo haa worɓe Isra'iila fuu yaha
Judges20:11 Bana non Isra'iila'en fuu kawti ngam ɓe ukkano Gibiya.
Judges20:12 Le'i Isra'iila fuu neli nelaaɓe koo toy nder lesdi Benyamin
Judges20:13 Ndokke min halluɓe Gibiya ɓe'e
Judges20:14 Ɓe ngari diga gure Benyamin fuu
Judges20:15 Nyannde maajum ɓe ndaari warɓe diga gure Benyamin fuu
Judges20:16 Nder honooɓe ɓe'e
Judges20:17 Le'i Isra'iila'en boo kawti honooɓe waawɓe konu ujine teemeɗɗe nayo (400.000).
Judges20:18 Isra'iila'en njehi haa Baytila. Haa ton ɓe ƴami Allah: “Lenyol ngole aartata haɓugo bee yimɓe Benyamin?” Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Lenyol Yahuuda aartata.”
Judges20:19 Jaŋngo maajum fajiri
Judges20:20 Nden ɓe njehi haa ɓe kaɓa bee yimɓe Benyamin. Ɓe ndarni caffuuji konu haa nokkuure tiitotirnde bee berniwol.
Judges20:21 Jama'aare Benyamin wurti Gibiya. Nyannde maajum ɓe mbari honooɓe Isra'iila'en ujine noogas e ɗiɗo (22.000).
Judges20:22 Isra'iila'en njehi fahin mboyi yeeso Jawmiraawo haa kiikiiɗe waɗi. Ɓe ƴami mo: “Min njahan fahin haa min kaɓa bee banndiraaɓe amin yimɓe Benyamin na?” Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Njehe!” Isra'iila'en caatini ɓerɗe muuɗum'en
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 Kadiboo ɓe njehi haɓugo bee yimɓe Benyamin.
Judges20:25 Nder konu nyalaade ɗiɗawre nde'e yimɓe Benyamin ngurti Gibiya
Judges20:26 Nden Isra'iila'en fuu njehi haa Baytila. Ɓe njooɗi ton yeeso Jawmiraawo
Judges20:27 Wakkati maajum sundukru alkawal Allah ɗonno haa Baytila.
Judges20:28 Pinehas ɓii Eli'azaaru
Judges20:29 Isra'iila'en nyukkini honooɓe haa taari Gibiya.
Judges20:30 Luttuɓe fuu njehi fahin haa ɓe kaɓa bee yimɓe Benyamin
Judges20:31 Worɓe Benyamin ngurti berniwol ngam potta bee maɓɓe. Isra'iila'en keɓi daaynugo ɓe bee berniwol. Worɓe Benyamin puɗɗi mbarugo woɗɓe nder maɓɓe bana naane
Judges20:32 Yimɓe Benyamin numi: “En njaali ɓe bana naane.” Ammaa Isra'iila'en mbi'i: “Sey en ndogga yeeso maɓɓe
Judges20:33 Jama'aare Isra'iila fuu ummi
Judges20:34 Honooɓe Isra'iila'en suɓaaɓe ujine sappo (10.000) ukkani Gibiya
Judges20:35 Jawmiraawo hokki Isra'iila'en jaalorgal dow lenyol Benyamin. Nyannde maajum ɓe mbari honooɓe Benyamin ujine noogas e njowo e teemerre (25.100)
Judges20:36 Yimɓe Benyamin ngi'i ɓe njaalaama. Isra'iila'en acci haɓugo bee yimɓe Benyamin
Judges20:37 Worɓe ɓe'e njaawɗi
Judges20:38 Jama'aare Isra'iila e waaltiiɓe narrino dow alaama: To waaltiiɓe nasti berniwol
Judges20:39 To jama'aare Isra'iila yi'i cuurɗe man
Judges20:40 Nden alaama waŋgi
Judges20:41 Nden Isra'iila'en ngayliti
Judges20:42 Yimɓe Benyamin ndoggi gal ladde
Judges20:43 Isra'iila'en taari ɓe
Judges20:44 Honooɓe Benyamin semmbiɗɓe ujine sappo e njoweetato (18.000) maayi.
Judges20:45 Luttuɓe ngayliti
Judges20:46 Nyannde maajum honooɓe Benyamin semmbiɗɓe ujine noogas e njowo (25.000) maayi.
Judges20:47 Ammaa worɓe teemeɗɗe njoweego (600) keɓi daɗugo haa tapaare Rimmon nder ladde hamaadaare. Ɓe paɓɓi ton lebbi nayi.
Judges20:48 Isra'iila'en lorti dow luttuɓe Benyamin
Judges21:1 Wakkati Isra'iila'en ɗonno mooɓti haa Mispa
Judges21:2 Ɓe njehi haa Baytila
Judges21:3 Ɓe mbi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Judges21:4 Jaŋngo maajum ɓe ndawi cub
Judges21:5 Ɓe ƴami: “Moy nder le'i Isra'iila mo waraay haa mooɓtorde Jawmiraawo?” Ngam ɓe kunino hunayeere
Judges21:6 Isra'iila'en njurmini banndiraaɓe muuɗum'en yimɓe Benyamin
Judges21:7 Ko mbaɗeten haa luttuɓe Benyamin keɓa rewɓe? Ngam en kunori bee innde Jawmiraawo en ndokkataa ɓe ɓiɓɓe men rewɓe.”
Judges21:8 Ngam maajum ɓe ƴami: “Woodi goɗɗo nder le'i Isra'iila mo waraay yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Mispa na?” Ɓe tawi walaa garɗo diga Yaabes nder lesdi Gile'at.
Judges21:9 Nde ɓe ewni yimɓe fuu ngam limugo ɓe
Judges21:10 Jama'aare Isra'iila neli honooɓe semmbiɗɓe ujine sappo e ɗiɗo (12.000) haa Yaabes. Ɓe umri ɓe: “Njehe
Judges21:11 Nattine worɓe fuu
Judges21:12 Ɓe tawi nder yimɓe Yaabes faanyɓe rewɓe teemeɗɗe nayo (400) ɓe meeɗaay worɓe tawon. Ɓe njahri ɓe haa saŋngeere haa Silo nder lesdi Kanaana.
Judges21:13 Nden jama'aare neldi habaru sulhu haa worɓe Benyamin luttuɓe haa tapaare Rimmon.
Judges21:14 Kamɓe ɓe ngarti
Judges21:15 Isra'iila'en njurmini yimɓe Benyamin ngam Jawmiraawo usti le'i Isra'iila.
Judges21:16 Ndotti'en jama'aare mbi'i: “Walaa rewɓe lutti nder lenyol Benyamin. Ko mbaɗeten ngam haa worɓe luttuɓe keɓa rewɓe?
Judges21:17 Noy mballirten luttuɓe haa lenyol Benyamin keɓa danygol
Judges21:18 Ammaa en mbaawataa hokkugo ɓe ɓiɓɓe men rewɓe
Judges21:19 Nden ɓe numi: “Nde hitaande yaalti fuu
Judges21:20 Ɓe mbi'i worɓe Benyamin: “Njehe
Judges21:21 Kakkile
Judges21:22 To baabiraaɓe maɓɓe malla deerɗiraaɓe maɓɓe ngari haa amin ngam haa ɓe njokkira bee amin
Judges21:23 Worɓe Benyamin mbaɗi bana non
Judges21:24 Isra'iila'en boo ndilli
Judges21:25 Zamanu man walaa laamiiɗo haa Isra'iila
Ruth1:1 Zamanu alkaali'en ɗonno ɗowa Isra'iila
Ruth1:2 Innde gorko oo
Ruth1:3 Nden Elimelek
Ruth1:4 Kamɓe ɓe te'i ɓiɓɓe rewɓe mo'abi'en. Innde oo
Ruth1:5 Nden Mahalon e Kiliyon maayi
Ruth1:6 Na'omi ummi lesdi Mo'ab bee esiraaɓe muuɗum
Ruth1:7 Ngam maajum ɓe acci nokkuure haa ɓe ngonno
Ruth1:8 Nden Na'omi wi'i esiraaɓe mum: “Ndille
Ruth1:9 Jawmiraawo hokka koo moy mooɗon siwtaare haa saare gorko mum.” Nden o jaɓɓiti ɓe. Ɓe mboyi masin
Ruth1:10 ɓe mbi'i mo: “Naa non
Ruth1:11 Ammaa Na'omi wi'i: “Koote
Ruth1:12 Koote
Ruth1:13 onon on ndeenan haa ɓe mawna na? On caloto te'eego na? Naa non
Ruth1:14 Ɓe mboyi fahin. Nden Orpa jaɓɓiti esiraawo mum
Ruth1:15 Na'omi wi'i mo: “Ndaa
Ruth1:16 Ammaa Ruut jaabi: “Taa doolam
Ruth1:17 Haa maayata maayanmi
Ruth1:18 Nde Na'omi faami anniya Ruut yahdugo bee maako tabiti
Ruth1:19 Bana nii ɓe njahdi ɓe ɗiɗo fuu haa ɓe njotti Baytilaama. Nde ɓe nasti Baytilaama
Ruth1:20 Na'omi wi'i ɓe: “Taa mbi'eeɗam Na'omi
Ruth1:21 Mi wurtino ɗo bee mardi ɗuuɗndi
Ruth1:22 Bana nii Na'omi wardi bee Ruut
Ruth2:1 Woodi banndiraawo Elimelek gorko Na'omi
Ruth2:2 Nyannde feere Ruut Mo'abiijo wi'i Na'omi: “Accu mi yaha ngesa
Ruth2:3 Ruut yehi wapi ngesa Bo'es
Ruth2:4 Nden Bo'es wurti Baytilaama
Ruth2:5 Bo'es ƴami ardiiɗo wa'ooɓe: “Moy jeyi paanyo debbo oo?”
Ruth2:6 Ardiiɗo go jaabi: “O Mo'abiijo garduɗo bee Na'omi diga lesdi Mo'ab.
Ruth2:7 O tori yam duŋayeere tokkaago wa'ooɓe haa o suɓta caamndi caka baagaaje. O ɗon diga fajiri e haa jonta o ɗon huuwa. O siwti seɗɗa tan nder suudu.”
Ruth2:8 Nden Bo'es wi'i Ruut: “Nanam
Ruth2:9 laar haa pellel ngel ɓe kuuwata
Ruth2:10 Ruut tuggi koppi
Ruth2:11 Bo'es jaabi mo: “Mi nani booɗɗum ko mbaɗanɗa esiraawo ma ɓaawo maayde gorko ma fuu. A acci baaba ma e daada ma e lesdi danyeeki ma
Ruth2:12 Jawmiraawo warjo ma mbooɗeeŋga man. Mbarjaari ma heewa haa Jawmiraawo
Ruth2:13 Ruut jaabi: “Accu mi heɓa mo'ere haa maaɗa
Ruth2:14 Nde wakkati nyaamugo waɗi
Ruth2:15 Nden o ummi ngam suɓtugo caamndi fahin. Bo'es umri sukaaɓe mum: “Acce mo o suɓta caka baagaaje boo
Ruth2:16 Coltinane mo boo cammeeje haa o suɓta ɗe
Ruth2:17 Ruut suɓti haa ngesa man haa kiikiiɗe waɗi. Nden o fiyi ko o suɓti
Ruth2:18 O roondi ɗum
Ruth2:19 Na'omi ƴami mo: “Toy cuɓtuɗaa hannde? Haa ngesa moy kuuwɗaa? Allah barkiɗin cuklaniiɗo ma.” Ruut anndini esum
Ruth2:20 Na'omi wi'i esum: “Allah barkiɗin mo. Jawmiraawo accaay waɗango yeeɗɓe e maayɓe mbooɗeeŋga.” Nden o tokki wi'ugo: “Gorko oo
Ruth2:21 Ruut wi'i esum: “O yecci yam boo mi wonda bee yimɓe maako haa to ɓe timmini codol maako fuu.”
Ruth2:22 Na'omi wi'i Ruut: “Nonnon
Ruth2:23 Bana nii Ruut huuwdi bee maɓɓe
Ruth3:1 Nyannde feere Na'omi wi'i Ruut: “Ɓiŋngel am
Ruth3:2 Siftor Bo'es mo ngondunooɗa bee horɓe mum
Ruth3:3 Yiiwa
Ruth3:4 Heɓtu nokkuure haa o waaloto. To o ɗaanake
Ruth3:5 Ruut jaabi: “Iyyo! Mi waɗan ko mbi'ɗa fuu.”
Ruth3:6 Ruut yehi haa laarre
Ruth3:7 Nde Bo'es timmini nyaamugo e yarugo
Ruth3:8 Caka jemma Bo'es diwtori
Ruth3:9 Bo'es ƴami mo: “Ɗum moy?” O jaabi: “Min
Ruth3:10 Bo'es jaabi: “Jawmiraawo barkiɗine
Ruth3:11 Taa sakla jonta
Ruth3:12 A wi'i gooŋga
Ruth3:13 Waala ɗo
Ruth3:14 Ruut waali haa kosɗe Bo'es haa subaha. Hiddeko koo moy anndita goɗɗo
Ruth3:15 Nde Ruut yiɗi dillugo
Ruth3:16 warti haa esum. Na'omi ƴami mo: “Ɗum an boo
Ruth3:17 O wi'i: “O hokki yam sa'iiruuri muudooje joweego ɗe'e
Ruth3:18 Na'omi wi'i mo: “Munyu
Ruth4:1 Bo'es yehi haa dammugal berniwol
Ruth4:2 Nden Bo'es ewni worɓe sappo nder ndotti'en berniwol
Ruth4:3 o wi'i coottoowo go: “A anndi Na'omi warti diga lesdi Mo'ab. O yiɗi soorrugo ngesa ka Elimelek
Ruth4:4 Min
Ruth4:5 Bo'es wi'i mo: “Saa'i a soodata ngesa ka diga Na'omi
Ruth4:6 O jaabi: “To non kam
Ruth4:7 Nden coottoowo go wi'i Bo'es: “Soottu ka ngam maaɗa.” Nden o faɗɗiti faɗo maako
Ruth4:8 
Ruth4:9 Nden Bo'es wi'i ndotti'en e yimɓe wonɓe ton fuu: “Onon on seedooɓe hannde. Mi sootti maral Elimelek e Kiliyon e Mahalon fuu diga Na'omi.
Ruth4:10 Non boo Ruut Mo'abiijo
Ruth4:11 Ndotti'en e yimɓe wonɓe ton fuu mbi'i: “Nonnon
Ruth4:12 Ngam daliila danygol ngol Jawmiraawo hokkete bee Ruut
Ruth4:13 Bana nii Bo'es te'ri bee Ruut. Bo'es hawti bee debbo mum. Jawmiraawo mo'ani mo o reedi
Ruth4:14 Rewɓe mbi'i Na'omi: “Yettoore laatano Jawmiraawo! O hokki ma hannde coottoowo. Innde taaniraawo oo laato teddunde nder Isra'iila.
Ruth4:15 O de'itinte. To a naywi
Ruth4:16 Na'omi hoo'i ngel
Ruth4:17 Heeddiɗɗiraaɓe maako mbi'i: Na'omi heɓi ɓiŋngel
Ruth4:18 Ndaa danygol Peres: Peres danyi Hesruunu
Ruth4:19 Hesruunu danyi Ram
Ruth4:20 Amminadabu danyi Nahasunu
Ruth4:21 Salmuuna danyi Bo'es
Ruth4:22 Obet danyi Yessa
1Samuel1:1 Ɓooyma woodi goɗɗo haa Ramatayim-Cofim nder kooseeje Efrayim. Innde maako Elkaana ɓii Yeroham ɓii Elihu ɓii Toku ɓii Cuuf
1Samuel1:2 Elkaana woodi rewɓe ɗiɗo. Innde oo Hanna
1Samuel1:3 Hitaande fuu Elkaana ɗon yaha bee saare mum haa Silo ngam sujidango Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama e lii'ango mo kirseteeŋga. Zamanu man Hofni e Pinehas
1Samuel1:4 Nde ɓe kawti ngam nyaamugo kusel ndabbaawa kirsaaŋga fuu
1Samuel1:5 Ammaa Hanna
1Samuel1:6 Nawliiko ɓilli mo tum ngam mettingo mo ngam o dimaro.
1Samuel1:7 Bana nii ɗum laatori hitaande fuu to Hanna yehi haa suudu Jawmiraawo. Peninna mettini mo haa o woyi
1Samuel1:8 Goriiko ƴami mo: “Ko waɗi a ɗon woya
1Samuel1:9 Ɓaawo ɓe nyaami e ɓe njari haa Silo
1Samuel1:10 Ɓernde Hanna metti masin
1Samuel1:11 O togi togayeere
1Samuel1:12 Hanna neeɓi toraago Jawmiraawo
1Samuel1:13 O yi'i hunnduko Hanna ɗon dimmbo
1Samuel1:14 O feli mo
1Samuel1:15 Hanna jaabi mo: “Aa'a
1Samuel1:16 Taa nanndinam bee rewɓe meere'en. Ɓernde am naawi masin
1Samuel1:17 Eeli wi'i mo: “Yah jam. Allah Isra'iila jaɓa tornde nde toriiɗa mo.”
1Samuel1:18 Hanna jaabi: “Useni mo'an korɗo ma foroy.” Nden o dilli
1Samuel1:19 Jaŋngo maajum Elkaana e yimɓe saare mum ndawi cub haa ɓe cujidana Jawmiraawo. Nde ɓe ngarti
1Samuel1:20 Hanna reedi
1Samuel1:21 Mawri maajum Elkaana yehi fahin haa Silo
1Samuel1:22 Hanna yahdaay bee maɓɓe
1Samuel1:23 Elkaana jaabi mo: “Waɗ ko fottani ma
1Samuel1:24 Ɓaawo Hanna enti mo
1Samuel1:25 Nde saaro'en maako kirsi ngaari
1Samuel1:26 Hanna wi'i: “Barkaama
1Samuel1:27 Ndaa ɓiŋngel ngel toriimi haa maako
1Samuel1:28 Min boo mi hebbinan togayeere am: Mi hokkitan Jawmiraawo ɓiɗɗo am
1Samuel2:1 Hanna waɗi do'a
1Samuel2:2 Jawmiraawo feere mum woni ceniiɗo
1Samuel2:3 Taa mawnite
1Samuel2:4 O yewan lagaaje honooɓe semmbiɗɓe
1Samuel2:5 Haarnooɓe coorran ko'e muuɗum'en ngam heɓugo nyaamdu
1Samuel2:6 Jawmiraawo maaynan
1Samuel2:7 O talkiɗinan
1Samuel2:8 O ɓaŋgtan yawaaɓe nder mbulwuldi haa o teddina ɓe
1Samuel2:9 Jawmiraawo ɗon ayna kosɗe hoolaaɓe mum
1Samuel2:10 Konne'en Jawmiraawo kalkan
1Samuel2:11 Elkaana hooti haa Rama. Ammaa Samuyila
1Samuel2:12 Ammaa ɓiɓɓe Eeli ɓe meere'en
1Samuel2:13 Ndaa ko ɓe mbaɗi ummaatoore: Koo ndeye goɗɗo lii'ani Jawmiraawo kirseteeŋga
1Samuel2:14 O tufa nder defruɗe malla payanɗe fuu
1Samuel2:15 Hiddeko ɓe ngula ɓellere dow hirsirde Jawmiraawo
1Samuel2:16 To goɗɗo wi'i: “Accu ɓe ngula ɓellere tawon
1Samuel2:17 Aybewol ɓiɓɓe Eeli ngo'ol mawni masin yeeso Jawmiraawo
1Samuel2:18 Wakkati maajum Samuyila ɗon huuwana Jawmiraawo. Koo nde o derkeejo tawon boo
1Samuel2:19 Hitaande fuu daada maako waɗana mo ngapaleewol deydey darnde maako
1Samuel2:20 Eeli barkiɗini Elkaana e Hanna
1Samuel2:21 Jawmiraawo barkiɗini Hanna
1Samuel2:22 Eeli ndottidi masin. O nani ko ɓiɓɓe maako mbaɗani Isra'iila'en fuu
1Samuel2:23 O wi'i ɓe: “Koni mbaɗoton kuuje ɗe'e? Mi ɗon nana haala kuuɗe mon kalluɗe haa yimɓe fuu.
1Samuel2:24 Acce ɗum
1Samuel2:25 To goɗɗo waɗi aybe dow neɗɗo
1Samuel2:26 Samuyila kam ɓesdi mawnugo
1Samuel2:27 Nyannde feere goɗɗo Allah wari haa Eeli
1Samuel2:28 Nder le'i Isra'iila fuu mi suɓi mo
1Samuel2:29 Kadi ngam ɗume ndaaroton bee suuno heedi kirseteeɗi e dokke nyaamdu ɗe umrumi Isra'iila'en? An boo
1Samuel2:30 Gooŋga
1Samuel2:31 Anndu
1Samuel2:32 A laaran konneejo ma haa saare ma e barkaaji ɗi ngaɗanmi Isra'iila. Ammaa saare ma meetataa nayeejo haa foroy.
1Samuel2:33 Gorko gooto tan accanmi haa o huuwanammi kuugal limanku
1Samuel2:34 To ɓiɓɓe ma Hofni e Pinehas maayi ɓe ɗiɗo fuu nder nyalaade woore
1Samuel2:35 Mi suɓanan hoore am goɗɗo koolaaɗo haa o laato limanjo am. Kaŋko o waɗan ko fottantammi fuu. Mi hokkan mo danygol
1Samuel2:36 To goɗɗo saare ma lutti saa'i man
1Samuel3:1 Samuyila
1Samuel3:2 Eeli ɗon waali haa nokkuure muuɗum. Gite maako puɗɗi tampugo
1Samuel3:3 Samuyila boo ɗon waali nder suudu seniindu
1Samuel3:4 Allah ewni Samuyila. Kaŋko o jaabi: “Na'am.”
1Samuel3:5 O doggi haa Eeli
1Samuel3:6 Fahin Jawmiraawo ewni Samuyila. Samuyila ummi
1Samuel3:7 Samuyila anndaano Jawmiraawo tawon
1Samuel3:8 Jawmiraawo ewni Samuyila tataɓre. O ummi
1Samuel3:9 Ngam maajum o wi'i Samuyila: “Yah
1Samuel3:10 Nden Jawmiraawo ɓaditi Samuyila
1Samuel3:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Nan
1Samuel3:12 Nyalaade maajum mi ukkan dow Eeli e saare mum ko mbi'moomi fuu.
1Samuel3:13 Mi anndinan mo no mi hiitorto saare maako haa foroy
1Samuel3:14 Ngam maajum kuniimi dow saare maako: Walaa kirseteeɗi malla dokke nyaamdu ittata aybe saare Eeli haa foroy.”
1Samuel3:15 Samuyila waali fahin. Fajiri o maɓɓiti dammugal suudu Jawmiraawo. O huli anndingo Eeli wahayu mo o heɓi.
1Samuel3:16 Ammaa Eeli ewni mo
1Samuel3:17 Eeli wi'i: “Ɗume Jawmiraawo wi'i ma? Taa suuɗam koo ɗume! Jawmiraawo hiito ma bee caatal fuu to a suuɗi yam wolde woore haa ko o wi'i fuu.”
1Samuel3:18 Samuyila yecci mo haala man fuu
1Samuel3:19 Samuyila tokki mawnugo. Jawmiraawo ɗon wondi bee maako
1Samuel3:20 Koo moy nder lesdi Isra'iila
1Samuel3:21 Jawmiraawo tokki waŋgango Samuyila haa Silo
1Samuel4:1 Samuyila wolwani Isra'iila'en fuu wolde nde'e. Wakkati maajum Filisti'en mooɓi ngam haɓugo bee Isra'iila'en. Isra'iila'en njehi
1Samuel4:2 Filisti'en mbaɗi caffuuji muuɗum'en
1Samuel4:3 Nde Isra'iila'en luttuɓe ngarti nder saŋngeere
1Samuel4:4 Ɓe neli worɓe woɗɓe haa Silo ngam haa ɓe ɗaɓɓitoya sundukru alkawal Jawmiraawo honooɓe Isra'iila
1Samuel4:5 Nde sundukru alkawal yotti saŋngeere
1Samuel4:6 Filisti'en nani hoolo man
1Samuel4:7 ɓe kuli
1Samuel4:8 En majji! Moy hisnata en juuɗe ɗowanteeɗo baawɗo bana oo? Naa kaŋko ukkani Misra'en torraaji ɗuuɗɗi nder ladde na?
1Samuel4:9 Tiɗɗine ɓerɗe mon
1Samuel4:10 Filisti'en kaɓi bee semmbe
1Samuel4:11 Filisti'en kooci sundukru alkawal Allah. Hofni e Pinehas
1Samuel4:12 Goɗɗo lenyol Benyamin doggi nokkuure haɓre
1Samuel4:13 O yotti
1Samuel4:14 
1Samuel4:15 
1Samuel4:16 wi'i mo: “Mi doggi haɓre
1Samuel4:17 O jaabi: “Filisti'en njaali en
1Samuel4:18 Nde o wolwi haala sundukru
1Samuel4:19 Esiraawo maako
1Samuel4:20 Nde o ɗon maaya
1Samuel4:21 O numi haala sundukru
1Samuel4:22 
1Samuel5:1 Filisti'en kooci sundukru Allah. Nden ɓe njahri ndu diga Eben-Ezer haa Asdod
1Samuel5:2 ɓe nastini ndu nder suudu lawru maɓɓe Daagon
1Samuel5:3 Fajiri cub yimɓe Asdod ngari
1Samuel5:4 Jaŋngo maajum fajiri cub boo
1Samuel5:5 Ngam maajum liman'en Daagon e nastooɓe suudu Daagon fuu njaaɓataa les dammugal suudu man haa wargo hannde.
1Samuel5:6 Jawmiraawo tikkani yimɓe Asdod. Asdod e gure maagol fuu
1Samuel5:7 Nde ɓe ngi'i ko laati
1Samuel5:8 Ɓe neldi ewnaandu
1Samuel5:9 Ammaa nde ndu yotti haa Gaat
1Samuel5:10 Ngam maajum ɓe neldi sundukru Allah haa Ekuruun. Nde ndu yotti Ekuruun
1Samuel5:11 Kamɓe boo ɓe neldi ewnaandu
1Samuel5:12 Koo nde yimɓe ɓe maayaay boo
1Samuel6:1 Sundukru alkawal Jawmiraawo faɓɓi nder lesdi Filisti'en lebbi joweeɗiɗi.
1Samuel6:2 Filisti'en mooɓti liman'en e hiila'en fuu
1Samuel6:3 Ɓe njaabi: “Fakat
1Samuel6:4 Yimɓe ƴami: “Ɗume haani en njoɓa?” Ɓe njaabi: “Suuraaji ɓuule kaŋŋeeri jowi e doombi kaŋŋeeri jowi
1Samuel6:5 Mbaɗe suuraaji ɓuule mon e suuraaji doombi bonnanɗi lesdi mon
1Samuel6:6 Taa caatine ko'e mon bana Misra'en e Firawna ɓooyma. Allah saatani ɓe haa ɓe njoofi Isra'iila'en.
1Samuel6:7 Kadi
1Samuel6:8 Nden koo'e sundukru Jawmiraawo
1Samuel6:9 Ndaare ndu booɗɗum. To ndu yehi gal Bayti-Semes
1Samuel6:10 Filisti'en mbaɗi bana nii. Ɓe koo'i na'i musininooji ɗiɗi
1Samuel6:11 Nden ɓe njo'ini sundukru Jawmiraawo dow moota man
1Samuel6:12 Na'i tokki laawol yahugo Bayti-Semes
1Samuel6:13 Yimɓe berniwol maajum ɗonno coda alkamaari nder waadiwol. Nde ɓe ɓaŋgti gite maɓɓe
1Samuel6:14 Moota na'i yotti ngesa Yosuwa
1Samuel6:15 Lewi'en njippini sundukru Jawmiraawo e akootiyel bee kuuje kaŋŋeeri go. Ɓe njo'ini ɗum dow hayre mawnde man. Nyannde man yimɓe Bayti-Semes lii'ani Jawmiraawo guleteeɗi e kirseteeɗi.
1Samuel6:16 Laamiiɓe Filisti'en njowo ndaari ɗum fuu
1Samuel6:17 Filisti'en nelduno Jawmiraawo suuraaji ɓuule kaŋŋeeri jowi ngam ittuki hakkeeji muuɗum'en
1Samuel6:18 Doombi kaŋŋeeri ɓuri ɗuuɗugo
1Samuel6:19 Jawmiraawo mbari worɓe cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗo nder yimɓe Bayti-Semes ujine cappanɗe njowo (50.000)
1Samuel6:20 Ɓe mbi'i: “Moy foti daraago yeeso Jawmiraawo
1Samuel6:21 Ɓe neli nelaaɓe haa Kiriyat-Ye'arim
1Samuel7:1 Yimɓe Kiriyat-Ye'arim ngari
1Samuel7:2 Diga garki sundukru alkawal haa Kiriyat-Ye'arim
1Samuel7:3 Samuyila wi'i Isra'iila'en: “To on muuyi loraago haa Jawmiraawo bee ɓernde woore
1Samuel7:4 Isra'iila'en ɗowtani mo
1Samuel7:5 Nden Samuyila wi'i: “Sey Isra'iila'en fuu mooɓto haa Mispa. Ton mi toroto Jawmiraawo ngam mooɗon.”
1Samuel7:6 Ɓe mooɓti haa Mispa. Ɓe nyeɗi ndiyam
1Samuel7:7 Nde Filisti'en nani haala mooɓtorde Isra'iila'en haa Mispa
1Samuel7:8 Ɓe mbi'i Samuyila: “Taa accu toraago Allah Jawmiraawo men haa o hisna en juuɗe Filisti'en.”
1Samuel7:9 Samuyila hirsi jawgel musinanŋgel
1Samuel7:10 Saa'i Samuyila ɗonno lii'o guleteeŋgel
1Samuel7:11 Isra'iila'en ngurti Mispa
1Samuel7:12 Samuyila hoo'i hayre mawnde
1Samuel7:13 Bana nii Filisti'en njaalaama. Ɓe meetaay nastugo lesdi Isra'iila. Jawmiraawo tikkani ɓe balɗe ngeendam Samuyila fuu.
1Samuel7:14 Berniiji Isra'iila hakkunde Ekuruun e Gaat ɗi Filisti'en njaɓtuno
1Samuel7:15 Samuyila laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila balɗe mum fuu.
1Samuel7:16 Hitaande fuu o yaalti Baytila
1Samuel7:17 Nden o lorti haa Rama haa saare maako woni. Ton boo o mahani Jawmiraawo hirsirde
1Samuel8:1 Nde Samuyila ndottidi
1Samuel8:2 Innde afo maako Yo'el
1Samuel8:3 Ammaa ɓe tokkaaki misaalu baaba maɓɓe. Ɓe ɗaɓɓi riba
1Samuel8:4 Ngam maajum ndotti'en Isra'iila fuu mooɓti
1Samuel8:5 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Ndaa
1Samuel8:6 Haala ka seynaay Samuyila. O ƴami Jawmiraawo
1Samuel8:7 ammaa kaŋko o jaabi Samuyila: “Waɗ ko ɓe mbi'i ma fuu. Naa an ɓe ngudini
1Samuel8:8 Diga ngurtinmi ɓe lesdi Misra haa wargo hannde ɓe acci yam haa ɓe ndewa ɗowanteeɓe woɗɓe. Ko ɓe mbaɗi yam foroy
1Samuel8:9 Kadi nanan ɓe
1Samuel8:10 Bolle Jawmiraawo ɗe'e fuu
1Samuel8:11 O wi'i ɓe: “Annde ko laamiiɗo ɗaɓɓata haa mooɗon: O hoo'an ɓiɓɓe mon worɓe
1Samuel8:12 O waɗan woɗɓe hoore'en dow honooɓe ujineere malla dow cappanɗe njowo
1Samuel8:13 O hoo'an ɓiɓɓe mon rewɓe boo
1Samuel8:14 O hoo'an gese mon ɓurɗe wooɗugo
1Samuel8:15 O hoo'an zakka haa ɓenndalooje gese mon fuu ngam haa o yoɓa saraaki'en maako e huuwooɓe maako.
1Samuel8:16 O hoo'an huuwooɓe mon worɓe e rewɓe e suka'en mon suɓaaɓe e bamɗe mon
1Samuel8:17 O hoo'an zakka haa dammooji mon
1Samuel8:18 To ɗum laatake bana nii
1Samuel8:19 Ammaa yimɓe cali nanango Samuyila. Ɓe mbi'i: “Naa non! Sey min keɓa laamiiɗo
1Samuel8:20 haa nannden bee ummaatooje goɗɗe fuu. Kaŋko o waɗana min kiita
1Samuel8:21 Samuyila nani ko ɓe mbi'i fuu
1Samuel8:22 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Waɗ ko ɓe ngiɗi
1Samuel9:1 Woodino goɗɗo mo lenyol Benyamin. Innde maako Kis ɓii Abiyel ɓii Ceror ɓii Bekorat ɓii Afiyaha
1Samuel9:2 O woodi ɓiɗɗo gorko mo innde mum Sawulu. Kaŋko o suka booɗɗo
1Samuel9:3 Nyannde feere bamɗe Kis debbe majji. O wi'i Sawulu
1Samuel9:4 Ɓe njehi
1Samuel9:5 Nde ɓe njotti lesdi Cuuf
1Samuel9:6 Ammaa suka jaabi mo: “Woodi goɗɗo Allah nder berniwol ngo'ol. O anndaaɗo
1Samuel9:7 Sawulu wi'i: “To en njehi kam
1Samuel9:8 Suka jaabi: “Ndaa
1Samuel9:9 Sawulu wi'i: “Booɗɗum
1Samuel9:10 
1Samuel9:11 
1Samuel9:12 Faanyɓe njaabi ɓe: “Ooho
1Samuel9:13 haa on tawa mo hiddeko o wa'o ton ngam haa o nyaamda bee yimɓe. Yimɓe ewnaaɓe puɗɗataa nyaamugo
1Samuel9:14 Sawulu e suka go tokki laawol muuɗum'en yahugo berniwol. Nde ɓe ɗon nasta ngol
1Samuel9:15 Keenya man Jawmiraawo wi'no Samuyila:
1Samuel9:16 “Jaŋngo bana saa'iire nde'e nelanmi goɗɗo lenyol Benyamin haa maaɗa. Sey a moyta mo haa o laato ardiiɗo yimɓe am Isra'iila'en
1Samuel9:17 Nde Samuyila yi'i Sawulu
1Samuel9:18 Haa dammugal berniwol
1Samuel9:19 Samuyila jaabi mo: “Min woni gi'oowo. Ardeeɗam wa'aago haa towndiire
1Samuel9:20 Taa saklana bamɗe majjirɗe ma diga nyalɗe tati
1Samuel9:21 Sawulu wi'i: “Asee! Mi goɗɗo lenyol Benyamin. Lenyol man ɓuri le'i Isra'iila fuu famɗugo. Kadiboo saare am ɓuri ci'e Benyamin fuu famɗugo. Ngam ɗume a wolwani yam irin bolle ɗe'e?”
1Samuel9:22 Samuyila yahri Sawulu e suka mum haa nokkuure seniinde
1Samuel9:23 Samuyila umri defoowo: “Waddu geɗal ngal mi hokkuno ma ngam haa a siga go.”
1Samuel9:24 Defoowo waddi daŋngo
1Samuel9:25 Samuyila diirtodi bee Sawulu haa berniwol
1Samuel9:26 Fajiri cub jaŋngo maajum nde weeti
1Samuel9:27 Nde ɓe njotti keerol berniwol
1Samuel10:1 Nden Samuyila hoo'i faandu nebbam rufi ɗam dow hoore Sawulu
1Samuel10:2 To a dilli jonta
1Samuel10:3 Nden a tokkoto yeeso haa a yotto lekki makki bi'eteeki Taboora. Haa ton worɓe tato pottan bee maaɗa
1Samuel10:4 Ɓe ƴaman njamu maaɗa
1Samuel10:5 Ɓaawo maajum a yottoto nokkuure wi'eteende Towndiire-Allah haa caŋngeeje aynooɓe Filisti'en ngoni. Haa nastirde berniwol a fottan bee mooɓre annabi'en waranɓe diga towndiire. Ɓe ɗon ngima bee moolooji e bawɗi e ciide e hooduuji
1Samuel10:6 Nden Ruuhu Jawmiraawo jippoto dow maaɗa haa a waɗa annabaaku bana maɓɓe
1Samuel10:7 To alaamaaji ɗi mbaŋgi yeeso maaɗa kam
1Samuel10:8 Aartam yahugo haa Gilgal
1Samuel10:9 Nde Sawulu wayliti
1Samuel10:10 Nde Sawulu e suka mum njotti Towndiire-Allah go
1Samuel10:11 Annduɓe mo diga ɓooyma fuu
1Samuel10:12 Goɗɗo jooɗiiɗo wuro man ƴami: “E moy woni baaba ɓeya?” Bana nii geccawol fuɗɗiri: “Sawulu boo laati caka annabi'en na?”
1Samuel10:13 Nde Sawulu timmini waɗugo annabaaku
1Samuel10:14 Bappa maako yi'i mo
1Samuel10:15 Bappa maako ƴami: “Ɗume o wi'i on?”
1Samuel10:16 Sawulu jaabi: “O yecci min bee laaɓɗum bamɗe keɓtaama.” Ammaa haala laamu ka Samuyila wolwanno mo
1Samuel10:17 Samuyila ewni Isra'iila'en haa ɓe ngara yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Mispa.
1Samuel10:18 O wi'i ɓe: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
1Samuel10:19 Min woni Allah mon kisnuɗo on sarruuji e ɓillaaje fuu. Ammaa onon on ngudini yam hannde
1Samuel10:20 Samuyila ɓaditini le'i Isra'iila fuu
1Samuel10:21 O ɓaditini lenyol Benyamin fodde ci'e maagol
1Samuel10:22 Ɓe ƴami Jawmiraawo: “Lutti goɗɗo feere na?” Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Sawulu ɗon nyukki ɓaawo kuuje nder saŋngeere.”
1Samuel10:23 Ɓe ndoggi
1Samuel10:24 Samuyila wi'i ɓe: “Kaŋko woni cuɓaaɗo Jawmiraawo. Walaa nannduɗo bee maako nder ummaatoore fuu.” Yimɓe ngooki bee seyo
1Samuel10:25 Samuyila faamtini yimɓe umrooje laamu. O winndi ɗum nder deftere
1Samuel10:26 Sawulu boo hooti saare mum haa Gibiya. Ɗuuɗɓe nder honooɓe tokki mo ngam Jawmiraawo meemi ɓerɗe maɓɓe.
1Samuel10:27 Ammaa woɗɓe meere'en ƴami: “Noy kaŋko o hisnirta en?” Ɓe njawi mo
1Samuel11:1 Nahas
1Samuel11:2 Laamiiɗo Ammooni'en jaabi ɓe: “To on ngerdake mi itta koo moy mooɗon yiitere mum nyaamre
1Samuel11:3 Ndotti'en Yaabes mbi'i mo: “Accu min nyalɗe joweeɗiɗi
1Samuel11:4 Nelaaɓe ngari haa Gibiya
1Samuel11:5 Saa'i maajum Sawulu warti diga ladde
1Samuel11:6 Nde Sawulu nani ɗum
1Samuel11:7 O hoo'i ga'i ɗiɗi
1Samuel11:8 Sawulu laari ɓe haa Bezek
1Samuel11:9 Ɓe umri nelaaɓe Yaabes: “Mbi'e yimɓe berniwol mon: Jaŋngo
1Samuel11:10 Ɓe mbi'i Nahas: “Jaŋngo min ngurtoto haa on mbaɗa min ko fottani on.”
1Samuel11:11 Jaŋngo maajum Sawulu senndi yimɓe mum mooɓe tati. Subaha ɓe ukkani saŋngeere Ammooni'en. Ɓe mbari Ammooni'en haa yotti caka nyalawma. Luttuɓe ndoggi
1Samuel11:12 Nde haɓre timmi
1Samuel11:13 Ammaa Sawulu wi'i: “Walaa mbareteeɗo hannde! Ngam hannde Jawmiraawo hisni Isra'iila.”
1Samuel11:14 Samuyila wi'i yimɓe: “Ngare
1Samuel11:15 Yimɓe fuu njehi haa Gilgal. Yeeso Jawmiraawo ɓe mbaɗi Sawulu laamiiɗo. Kaŋko e Isra'iila'en fuu ɓe ceyi masin. Ɓe lii'ani Jawmiraawo kirseteeɗi ngam kawtal maɓɓe bee maako.
1Samuel12:1 Nden Samuyila wi'i Isra'iila'en fuu: “Ndaa
1Samuel12:2 Ndaa mo jonta yeeso mooɗon ngam o ardo on. Min kam mi ndottiijo
1Samuel12:3 Ndaa yam ɗo. Ceedaneeɗam yeeso Jawmiraawo e laamiiɗo mo o suɓi to mi waɗi aybewol koo ngole. Nagge moy koocumi? Malla wamnde moy koocumi? Moy mbaɗmi rikici? Moy toonyiimi? Haa juŋngo moy njaɓmi ceede ngam sottingo gooŋga? Mbi'e ɗum jonta
1Samuel12:4 Isra'iila'en mbi'i: “A waɗaay min rikici
1Samuel12:5 Samuyila wi'i ɓe: “Jawmiraawo e laamiiɗo mo o suɓi laati seedooɓe
1Samuel12:6 Samuyila wi'i ɓe: “To non kam
1Samuel12:7 
1Samuel12:8 
1Samuel12:9 Ammaa kamɓe ɓe ngejjiti ko Allah Jawmiraawo waɗani ɓe
1Samuel12:10 Ɓe tori Jawmiraawo ballal
1Samuel12:11 Jawmiraawo nelani on Yerub-Ba'al
1Samuel12:12 Ammaa nde ngi'ɗon Nahas
1Samuel12:13 Ndaa laamiiɗo mo ɗaɓɓuɗon
1Samuel12:14 Kadi
1Samuel12:15 Ammaa to on nananaay Jawmiraawo
1Samuel12:16 Jonta kam ndare booɗɗum
1Samuel12:17 Naa jonta ɗum wakkati codol alkamaari na? Bee non fuu mi toroto Jawmiraawo
1Samuel12:18 Nden Samuyila tori Jawmiraawo. Nyalaade maajum Jawmiraawo neldi diggaali e iyeende. Yimɓe fuu kuli Jawmiraawo e Samuyila masin.

1Samuel13:1 Sawulu woodi duuɓi … saa'i o laamo. O laamani Isra'iila'en duuɓi ɗiɗi.
1Samuel13:2 Sawulu suɓi worɓe ujine tato (3.000) nder Isra'iila'en
1Samuel13:3 Yonatan mbari aynooɓe Filisti'en haa Geba
1Samuel13:4 Isra'iila'en fuu nani haala man
1Samuel13:5 Filisti'en boo mooɓti ngam haɓre bee Isra'iila'en. Ɓe ngoodi mootaaji pucci ujine cappanɗe tati (30.000)
1Samuel13:6 Nde Isra'iila'en ngi'i ɓe ɗon yeeso joote ngam konne'en ɓaditi ɓe masin
1Samuel13:7 Woɗɓe maɓɓe ndoggi haa gaɗa maayo Urdun
1Samuel13:8 Samuyila wi'no mo o reena nyalɗe joweeɗiɗi. Ammaa nde Samuyila waraay tawon
1Samuel13:9 Ngam maajum Sawulu umri waddugo dabbaaji ngam nguleteeŋga e kirseteeɗi ngam kawtal yimɓe
1Samuel13:10 Nde o timmini lii'aago nguleteeŋga
1Samuel13:11 Samuyila ƴami mo: “Ko mbaɗɗa ɗo?” Sawulu jaabi: “Yimɓe puɗɗi saŋkitaago ngam a waraay nder saa'iire ta'aande. Filisti'en boo ɗon mooɓi haa Mikmas.
1Samuel13:12 Ngam maajum mi numi: Jonta Filisti'en ukkanto yam haa Gilgal
1Samuel13:13 Samuyila wi'i mo: “Kay
1Samuel13:14 ammaa jonta ngu tabitittaa. Jawmiraawo suɓani hoore mum goɗɗo ɓurɗo fottango mo dow maaɗa
1Samuel13:15 Nden Samuyila ummi haa Gilgal
1Samuel13:16 Sawulu e Yonatan ɓiyum e wonduɓe bee muuɗum'en caŋngini haa Geba nder lesdi Benyamin. Ammaa Filisti'en ɗon caŋngini haa Mikmas.
1Samuel13:17 Filisti'en neli mooɓe honooɓe tati ngam wilugo e jaɓtugo: Mooɓre arannde yehi haa Ofra nder lesdi Su'al
1Samuel13:18 mooɓre ɗiɗawre haa Baytihurun e mooɓre tataɓre boo haa kooseeje dow Waadiwol-Pobbi haa sera ladde.
1Samuel13:19 Wakkati maajum walaa kilaajo nder lesdi Isra'iila fuu
1Samuel13:20 Ɗum dooli Isra'iila'en yahugo haa Filisti'en ngam welnugo baaneeje e gasirɗe e pe'irɗe e bafɗi.
1Samuel13:21 Ngam welnugo fe'irde malla ngam wo'itingo seɓatto sawru gaynaako
1Samuel13:22 Ngam maajum nyalaade haɓre walaa kaafahi malla labbo haa juuɗe Isra'iila'en
1Samuel13:23 Filisti'en neli mooɓre honooɓe ngam haa ɓe ayna laawol Mikmas.
1Samuel14:1 Nyannde feere Yonatan ɓii Sawulu wi'i suka doondoowo balmi mum: “War
1Samuel14:2 Saa'i maajum Sawulu ɗon jooɗi les rummaanoohi haa laarre wi'eteende Migiron haa keerol gese Gibiya. Worɓe baakin teemeɗɗe njoweego ɗon ngondi bee maako.
1Samuel14:3 Ahiyya ɓii Ahitooba deerɗiraawo Ikabood ɓii Pinehas ɓii Eeli
1Samuel14:4 Haa laawol ngol Yonatan tammi yahugo
1Samuel14:5 Nde'e ɗon haa woyla maagol
1Samuel14:6 Kadi
1Samuel14:7 Doondoowo balmi maako jaabi mo: “Waɗ ko ɓernde ma yiɗi fuu
1Samuel14:8 Yonatan wi'i: “Sey en ɓadito ɓe haa to ɓe ngi'i en.
1Samuel14:9 To ɓe mbi'i: Ndare
1Samuel14:10 Ammaa to ɓe mbi'i: Ngare haa amin – nden kam en mba'oto
1Samuel14:11 Ɓe njehi haa aynooɓe Filisti'en ngi'i ɓe. Filisti'en mbi'i: “Asee
1Samuel14:12 Nden ɓe ewni Yonatan e doondoowo balmi
1Samuel14:13 Yonatan wa'i bee juuɗe e kosɗe fuu
1Samuel14:14 Haɓre aranndeere bee Filisti'en nde'e
1Samuel14:15 Filisti'en wonɓe nder lesdi
1Samuel14:16 Yimɓe Sawulu aynooɓe haa Gibiya-Benyamin ngi'i jiiɓotiral nder saŋngeere Filisti'en.
1Samuel14:17 Sawulu umri yimɓe wonduɓe bee muuɗum
1Samuel14:18 Sawulu wi'i Ahiyya
1Samuel14:19 Saa'i Sawulu ɗon wolida bee Ahiyya tawon
1Samuel14:20 Nden o ewni yimɓe wonduɓe bee maako
1Samuel14:21 Ibraniŋke'en wonduɓe bee Filisti'en diga naane
1Samuel14:22 Isra'iila'en nyukkiiɓe nder kooseeje Efrayim go
1Samuel14:23 Bana nii Jawmiraawo hisniri Isra'iila'en nyalaade maajum. Haɓre maajum yotti haa gaɗa Baytawiina.
1Samuel14:24 Sawulu umruno yimɓe mum bee hunayeere: “Naaloore dow koo moy nyaami nyaamdu haa yahugo kiikiiɗe
1Samuel14:25 Ɓe fuu ɓe ngari nder laynde
1Samuel14:26 Ɓe ngi'i njumri ɗon simta
1Samuel14:27 Ammaa Yonatan anndaa haala maajum. O nastini seɓatto sawru maako nder njumri
1Samuel14:28 Gooto nder yimɓe maako wi'i mo: “Baaba ma huni hunayeere
1Samuel14:29 Yonatan wi'i: “Baaba am jaanyani lesdi fuu sarru. Ndaare
1Samuel14:30 To yimɓe fuu nyaamino ko keɓɗen haa Filisti'en hannde
1Samuel14:31 Nyalaade maajum Isra'iila'en mbari Filisti'en diga Mikmas haa yotti Ayyalon. Weelo tampini ɓe masin
1Samuel14:32 haa ɓe ukkani keɓal konu
1Samuel14:33 Sawulu anndinaama: “Ndaa
1Samuel14:34 Nden o umri: “Naste caka yimɓe
1Samuel14:35 Sawulu mahani Jawmiraawo hirsirde. Kayre woni hirsirde arannde nde o mahani Jawmiraawo.
1Samuel14:36 Nden Sawulu wi'i: “Sey en taasna Filisti'en jemmaare nde'e
1Samuel14:37 Sawulu ƴami Allah: “Mi diirto
1Samuel14:38 Sawulu ewni ardiiɓe yimɓe
1Samuel14:39 Fakat mi ɗon hunoro Jawmiraawo geeto
1Samuel14:40 Nden Sawulu wi'i Isra'iila'en fuu: “On fuu ndare haa wakeere nde'e
1Samuel14:41 Sawulu tori Jawmiraawo
1Samuel14:42 Sawulu wi'i: “Mbaɗe kur'u hakkunde am bee ɓiyam.” Ngu aybini Yonatan.
1Samuel14:43 Sawulu wi'i mo: “Yeccam ko mbaɗɗa.” Yonatan jaabi: “Mi hoo'i njumri seɗɗa bee seɓatto sawru am
1Samuel14:44 Sawulu wi'i: “Nonnon
1Samuel14:45 Ammaa yimɓe mbi'i Sawulu: “Kadi Yonatan mo heɓani Isra'iila jaalorgal maŋngal nga'al hannde
1Samuel14:46 Sawulu acci taasnugo Filisti'en. Kamɓe ɓe kooti lesdi maɓɓe.
1Samuel14:47 Wakkati Sawulu ɗon laamano Isra'iila
1Samuel14:48 O tiɗɗini ɓernde maako
1Samuel14:49 Sawulu woodi ɓiɓɓe worɓe tato: Yonatan e Isuwi e Malkisu'a. O woodi boo ɓiɓɓe rewɓe ɗiɗo: Innde mawniraawo
1Samuel14:50 Ahino'am ɓii Ahimaas woni debbo Sawulu. Innde mawɗo honooɓe maako
1Samuel14:51 ngam Kis baaba Sawulu e Neer baaba Abineer ɓe ɓiɓɓe Abiyel.
1Samuel14:52 Zamanu Sawulu fuu haɓre bee Filisti'en ɗon saati. Ngam maajum koo ndeye Sawulu yi'i goɗɗo cemmbiɗɗo
1Samuel15:1 Samuyila wari haa Sawulu
1Samuel15:2 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi yiɗi waataago ko yimɓe Amalek mbaɗi Isra'iila'en
1Samuel15:3 Yah
1Samuel15:4 Sawulu ewni yimɓe mum ɓe ngara haa Telayim. O limi ɓe ton: Honooɓe ujine teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo (200.000)
1Samuel15:5 Ɓe njahdi bee maako haa berniwol Amaleki'en
1Samuel15:6 Sawulu neldi habaru haa Keni'en
1Samuel15:7 Nden Sawulu ukkani Amaleki'en
1Samuel15:8 Sawulu e yimɓe mum nattini ɓe fuu bee kaafahi
1Samuel15:9 Ɓe acci mo o geeto
1Samuel15:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i Samuyila:
1Samuel15:11 “Ɓernde am ɗon naawa ngam mi laamini Sawulu
1Samuel15:12 Jaŋngo maajum o dawi cub
1Samuel15:13 Nde Samuyila yotti ton
1Samuel15:14 Ammaa Samuyila ƴami mo: “Ko mi nanata ɗo
1Samuel15:15 Sawulu jaabi: “Yimɓe koo'i na'i e dammooji ɓurɗi wooɗugo haa Amaleki'en ngam lii'anaago ɗi Jawmiraawo Allah maaɗa kirseteeɗi. Ammaa luttuɗi fuu min nattini ɗi.”
1Samuel15:16 Samuyila wi'i Sawulu: “He'i kam! Haa mi yecce ko Jawmiraawo wi'i yam jemmaare saaliinde.” Sawulu wi'i: “Mi ɗon heɗito.”
1Samuel15:17 Samuyila wi'i mo: “Wakkati a maraayno saman
1Samuel15:18 O neli ma
1Samuel15:19 Koni a ɗowtanaaki mo? Koni a yaawɗi ɓoftugo keɓal konu? A waɗi ko haanaay yeeso Jawmiraawo.”
1Samuel15:20 Sawulu jaabi: “Na mi ɗowtani umroore Jawmiraawo? Mi yehi bana o wi'i yam
1Samuel15:21 Ammaa yimɓe am nattinaay ɓurɗum wooɗugo haa keɓal konu
1Samuel15:22 Ammaa Samuyila wi'i: “Ɗume ɓuri fottango Jawmiraawo
1Samuel15:23 Luutugo umroore maako halli bana kaaramaaku
1Samuel15:24 Sawulu jaabi: “Gooŋga
1Samuel15:25 Ammaa jonta yaafanam hakke am
1Samuel15:26 Samuyila wi'i mo: “Aa'a
1Samuel15:27 Samuyila wayliti haa dilla. Ammaa Sawulu naŋngi gawargal limce Samuyila haa ngal seeki.
1Samuel15:28 Samuyila wi'i: “Bana nii Jawmiraawo seekiri laamu Isra'iila dow maaɗa hannde
1Samuel15:29 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila
1Samuel15:30 Sawulu wi'i: “Mi waɗi hakke. Ammaa teddinam jonta yeeso ndotti'en yimɓe am e yeeso Isra'iila'en
1Samuel15:31 Samuyila jaɓi
1Samuel15:32 Samuyila umri: “Ngaddaneeɗam Agag
1Samuel15:33 Ammaa Samuyila wi'i mo: “Kaafahi ma sooyni rewɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɓikkoy muuɗum'en. Bana nii daada ma boo sooyan ɓiyum jonta.” Nden o ta'i Agag geɓe geɓe yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Gilgal.
1Samuel15:34 Ɓaawo maajum Samuyila yehi haa Rama. Sawulu boo hooti saare mum haa Gibiya.
1Samuel15:35 Samuyila jooɗi nder suno ngam ɓernde Jawmiraawo metti daliila Sawulu mo o laaminino dow Isra'iila. O meetaay yi'ugo Sawulu haa nyalaade maayde maako.
1Samuel16:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i Samuyila: “Ndey a accata sunoraago Sawulu? Mi wudini mo ngam taa o tokko laamanaago Isra'iila. Hebbin luwal ma bee nebbam cenirɗam
1Samuel16:2 Samuyila wi'i: “Noy njahanmi ton? To Sawulu nani ɗum
1Samuel16:3 Ewna Yessa haa juulde kirseteeŋga man
1Samuel16:4 Samuyila ɗowtani Jawmiraawo
1Samuel16:5 O jaabi: “Jam! Mi wari ngam lii'anaago Jawmiraawo kirseteeŋga. Cene ko'e mon
1Samuel16:6 Nde ɓe ngari
1Samuel16:7 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Taa hakkilan darnde maako juutnde
1Samuel16:8 Yessa ewni Abinadabu
1Samuel16:9 Yessa waddi Samma
1Samuel16:10 Bana nii Yessa waddi ɓiɓɓe muuɗum njoweeɗiɗo yeeso Samuyila. Ammaa Samuyila wi'i: “Jawmiraawo suɓaay koo gooto maɓɓe.”
1Samuel16:11 Nden o ƴami Yessa: “Kamɓe tan ngoni ɓiɓɓe ma fuu na?” Yessa jaabi: “Aa'a
1Samuel16:12 Yessa neli goɗɗo
1Samuel16:13 Samuyila hoo'i luwal bee nebbam cenirɗam
1Samuel16:14 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo acci Sawulu
1Samuel16:15 Sukaaɓe Sawulu mbi'i mo: “Ndaa
1Samuel16:16 Naa ndikka min ɗaɓɓitane goɗɗo annduɗo fiyugo moolooru na? To ruuhuwol man wari dow maaɗa
1Samuel16:17 Sawulu jaabi: “Ndaaraneeɗam goɗɗo annduɗo fiyugo moolooru booɗɗum
1Samuel16:18 Gooto nder sukaaɓe maako wi'i: “Mi anndi goɗɗo. Yessa mo Baytilaama woodi ɓiɗɗo baawɗo moolooru. O konoowo cemmbiɗɗo boo
1Samuel16:19 Sawulu neli nelaaɓe haa Yessa
1Samuel16:20 Yessa hokki Daawuda jawgel mbeewa e wamnde rimdaande tamseeje e kanyakanyaawu inaboojam o yahra ɗum haa Sawulu.
1Samuel16:21 Bana nii Daawuda wari
1Samuel16:22 Sawulu neli goɗɗo haa Yessa
1Samuel16:23 Koo ndeye ruuhuwol iwŋgol haa Allah go wari dow Sawulu
1Samuel17:1 Filisti'en mooɓti jama'aare konu muuɗum'en haa Soko nder lesdi Yahuuda. Ɓe caŋngini haa Efes-Damiima
1Samuel17:2 Sawulu e Isra'iila'en boo mooɓi
1Samuel17:3 Filisti'en ndari dow hooseere to
1Samuel17:4 Soojeejo manaaɗo wurti saŋngeere Filisti'en. Innde maako Goliyat
1Samuel17:5 Hufneere maako e sulkewol maako fuu ɗum njamndi mboɗeeri. Teddeeŋga sulke man
1Samuel17:6 O woodi jamɗe boɗeeje haa korle maako. Dow balawal maako boo
1Samuel17:7 Kalasal labbo maako nanndi bee leggal cannyirgal. Ceeɓndi labbo maako ɗum njamndi ɓaleeri
1Samuel17:8 Goliyat dari
1Samuel17:9 To o waawti yam
1Samuel17:10 Nden o fuɗɗi jancugo caffuuji konu Isra'iila'en
1Samuel17:11 Nde Sawulu e Isra'iila'en nani bolle ɗe'e
1Samuel17:12 Daawuda go
1Samuel17:13 
1Samuel17:14 
1Samuel17:15 Saa'i feere feere Daawuda ɗon ummo haa saare Sawulu
1Samuel17:16 Ammaa Filistiijo go ɗon wara fajiri e kiikiiɗe fuu
1Samuel17:17 Nyannde feere Yessa wi'i Daawuda: “Yah haa deerɗiraaɓe ma haa saŋngeere konu. Yahran ɓe buhuuyel gabbe ca'aaɗe e tamseeje sappo.
1Samuel17:18 Hoo'u boo leeɓi sappo ngam mawɗo honooɓe ujineere. Laar no deerɗiraaɓe ma mba'i
1Samuel17:19 Ɓe ɗon ngondi bee Sawulu e worɓe Isra'iila fuu ngam haɓre nder waadiwol Leɗɗe-mawɗe.”
1Samuel17:20 Jaŋngo maajum Daawuda dawi cub
1Samuel17:21 Caffuuji Isra'iila'en e ɗi Filisti'en ɗon tiitotiri.
1Samuel17:22 Daawuda acci kuuje mum haa juŋngo aynoowo doŋgle
1Samuel17:23 Saa'i o ɗon wolida bee maɓɓe
1Samuel17:24 Worɓe Isra'iila
1Samuel17:25 Ɓe mbi'mbi'tiri: “A yi'i mo na? Ndaa mo ɗon wara! Kayya no o jancirta Isra'iila! Koo moy mbari Goliyat
1Samuel17:26 Daawuda ƴami worɓe dariiɓe kommbi muuɗum: “Mbarjaari ndiye mbaranɗo Filistiijo oo
1Samuel17:27 Yimɓe mbolwani mo haala mbarjaari go fahin.
1Samuel17:28 Eliyabu
1Samuel17:29 Daawuda jaabi: “Ko mbaɗmi kadi? Walaa koo ɗume
1Samuel17:30 Nden o wayliti
1Samuel17:31 Worɓe woɗɓe nani bolle Daawuda
1Samuel17:32 Daawuda wari
1Samuel17:33 Sawulu wi'i: “A fotaay ngam haɓre man
1Samuel17:34 Daawuda wi'i: “Barkaama
1Samuel17:35 mi taasna ɗum
1Samuel17:36 Mi waawti barooɗe e ɓoodi goɗɗi fuu. Filistiijo saadooniijo oo laatoto bana maaje
1Samuel17:37 Jawmiraawo hisni yam jagge barooɗe e ɓoodi goɗɗi
1Samuel17:38 Nden o hoo'i sulkewol maako e hufneere njamndi
1Samuel17:39 Daawuda wakki kaafahi Sawulu
1Samuel17:40 o hoo'i sawru maako haa juŋngo
1Samuel17:41 Goliyat ɓaditi Daawuda
1Samuel17:42 Nde o waawi yi'ugo Daawuda laaɓɗum
1Samuel17:43 Goliyat telɓani mo: “Koni ngarɗa haa am bee sawru? Mi rawaandu na?” O naalori Daawuda bee labbi maako fuu.
1Samuel17:44 Nden o janci mo: “War
1Samuel17:45 Daawuda jaabi mo: “An a wari dow am bee kaafahi e labbo e jaaral. Min kam mi wari bee innde Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
1Samuel17:46 Ngam maajum o nastinte hannde haa juŋngo am. Mi mbarete
1Samuel17:47 Mooɓtiiɓe haa ɗo fuu anndan Jawmiraawo walaa haaje kaafahi malla labbo ngam hisnugo yimɓe mum. Haɓre nde'e ɗum haɓre Jawmiraawo
1Samuel17:48 Nden Filistiijo ɓaditi ngam fottugo bee Daawuda. Daawuda boo yaawɗi
1Samuel17:49 hoo'i hayre haa booro mum
1Samuel17:50 Bana nii Daawuda jaalori Filistiijo bee piwlol e hayre
1Samuel17:51 Nden Daawuda yaawɗi
1Samuel17:52 Yimɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda ummi
1Samuel17:53 Nde Isra'iila'en timmini taasnugo Filisti'en
1Samuel17:54 Daawuda hoo'i hoore Goliyat
1Samuel17:55 Nde Sawulu yi'i Daawuda ɗonno yaha ngam fottugo bee Filistiijo go
1Samuel17:56 Laamiiɗo wi'i mo: “Heɓtu ɗum.”
1Samuel17:57 Nde Daawuda mbari Filistiijo
1Samuel17:58 Sawulu ƴami mo: “An suka
1Samuel18:1 Nde bolidal Sawulu bee Daawuda timmi
1Samuel18:2 Nyalaade maajum Sawulu accaay Daawuda hoota saare baaba mum
1Samuel18:3 Yonatan e Daawuda kaɓɓi alkawal soobiraaku
1Samuel18:4 Yonatan ɓorti ngapaleewol mum
1Samuel18:5 Koo toy Sawulu neli Daawuda fuu
1Samuel18:6 Ɓaawo Daawuda jaali Filistiijo go
1Samuel18:7 Nder gimol maɓɓe ɓe ɗon mbi'a: “Sawulu mbari ujineere
1Samuel18:8 Sawulu seyoraaki gimol man
1Samuel18:9 Nyalaade maajum Sawulu fuɗɗi laarugo Daawuda bee gite kalluɗe e kaajal.
1Samuel18:10 Jaŋngo maajum ruuhuwol kalluŋgol iwŋgol haa Allah jippi dow Sawulu
1Samuel18:11 Nden o ɓaŋgti labbo ngo
1Samuel18:12 Sawulu fuɗɗi hulugo Daawuda
1Samuel18:13 Ngam maajum Sawulu daayni Daawuda
1Samuel18:14 heɓi jaalorgal nder kuuɗe mum fuu
1Samuel18:15 Nde Sawulu yi'i ɗum
1Samuel18:16 Ammaa koo moy nder Isra'iila e nder Yahuuda yiɗi Daawuda ngam o ardiiɗo booɗɗo.
1Samuel18:17 Sawulu wi'i Daawuda: “Mi hokkete Meerab
1Samuel18:18 Daawuda jaabi mo: “Min kam mi moy? Ɓeye ngoni banndiraaɓe am e asŋgol amin nder Isra'iila? Mi fotaay mi laato esiraawo laamiiɗo.”
1Samuel18:19 Nde nyalaade ɓaŋgal waɗi
1Samuel18:20 Ammaa Mikal ɓii Sawulu debbo minyiraajo
1Samuel18:21 O numi: “Mi accan Daawuda ɓaŋga mo
1Samuel18:22 Sawulu umri saraaki'en mum: “Mbolwane Daawuda bee sirri
1Samuel18:23 Saraaki'en mbolwani Daawuda bana nii. Daawuda jaabi ɓe: “On tammi esirgo bee laamiiɗo ɗum koyɗum na? Naa mi leesɗo
1Samuel18:24 Kamɓe ɓe anndini ɗum Sawulu.
1Samuel18:25 O umri ɓe ɓe mbi'a Daawuda: “Laamiiɗo ɗaɓɓataa sadaaki haa maaɗa
1Samuel18:26 Saraaki'en ngecci Daawuda haala man fuu. Ɗum fottani mo o laato esiraawo laamiiɗo. Diga nyalaade ɓaŋgal siwaa
1Samuel18:27 Daawuda yehi bee worɓe mum
1Samuel18:28 Sawulu faami bee laaɓɗum Jawmiraawo ɗon wondi bee Daawuda. O faami boo ɓiyiiko debbo yiɗi Daawuda.
1Samuel18:29 Ngam maajum o tokki hulugo mo
1Samuel18:30 Ardiiɓe Filisti'en tokki haɓugo bee Isra'iila'en. Nde haɓre waɗi fuu
1Samuel19:1 Sawulu wi'i ɓiɗɗo muuɗum Yonatan e saraaki'en muuɗum o tammi mbarugo Daawuda. Ammaa Yonatan soobiri bee Daawuda masin.
1Samuel19:2 Ngam maajum o reentini Daawuda
1Samuel19:3 Min kam mi wurtoto
1Samuel19:4 Yonatan mani Daawuda haa noppi baaba mum. O wi'i mo: “Barkaama
1Samuel19:5 ngam o suklanaaki yoŋki maako nde o haɓi bee Goliyat
1Samuel19:6 Sawulu nanani Yonatan
1Samuel19:7 Yonatan ewni Daawuda
1Samuel19:8 Haɓre bee Filisti'en fuɗɗiti. Daawuda yehi
1Samuel19:9 Nyannde feere
1Samuel19:10 O ɗaɓɓi tiggugo Daawuda bee labbo haa mahol
1Samuel19:11 Sawulu neli nelaaɓe haa saare Daawuda
1Samuel19:12 O jippini mo gal wurdere mahol
1Samuel19:13 Nden Mikal hoo'i lawru saare
1Samuel19:14 Nde Sawulu neli nelaaɓe ngam naŋngugo Daawuda
1Samuel19:15 Sawulu neli ɓe fahin
1Samuel19:16 Nelaaɓe nasti suudu
1Samuel19:17 Sawulu ƴami Mikal: “Koni mbaɗɗa mi rikici bee wallugo konneejo am haa o daɗi?” Mikal jaabi mo: “O wi'i o mbaratam to mi yoofaay mo.”
1Samuel19:18 Ammaa Daawuda daɗi
1Samuel19:19 Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda ɗon ton
1Samuel19:20 o neli nelaaɓe ngam haa ɓe naŋnga mo. Wakkati ɓe njotti ton
1Samuel19:21 Goɗɗo wi'i ɗum Sawulu. O neli nelaaɓe woɗɓe. Kamɓe boo ɓe puɗɗi waɗugo annabaaku. Fahin Sawulu neli nelaaɓe
1Samuel19:22 Nden Sawulu bee hoore mum yehi Rama. Nde o yotti waawru mawndu haa Seku
1Samuel19:23 Saa'i o ɗon yaha ton
1Samuel19:24 O ɓorti limce maako
1Samuel20:1 Daawuda ummi Nayot haa Rama
1Samuel20:2 Yonatan wi'i: “Aa'a
1Samuel20:3 Ammaa Daawuda huni
1Samuel20:4 Yonatan wi'i: “Mi waɗante ko ngiɗɗa fuu.”
1Samuel20:5 Daawuda wi'i: “Booɗɗum
1Samuel20:6 To baaba ma heɓti mi waraay
1Samuel20:7 To baaba ma wi'i: Booɗɗum
1Samuel20:8 Useni
1Samuel20:9 Yonatan jaabi mo: “Aa'a
1Samuel20:10 Daawuda ƴami mo: “Noy mi anndirta to baaba ma jaabake ma bee tikkere?”
1Samuel20:11 Yonatan wi'i Daawuda: “War
1Samuel20:12 Yonatan wi'i: “Mi hunorake bee Jawmiraawo
1Samuel20:13 Non boo to o numi sarru ma
1Samuel20:14 To mi lutti bee yoŋki wakkati maajum
1Samuel20:15 Taa ittan danygol am amaana haa foroy
1Samuel20:16 Yonatan haɓɓi alkawal bee saare Daawuda
1Samuel20:17 Nden Yonatan ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Hunoranam bee yiide nde marɗa ngam am. Ngam min mi yiɗi ma bana ngiɗmi hoore am.”
1Samuel20:18 Ɓaawo maajum Yonatan wi'i Daawuda: “Jaŋngo ɗum fuɗɗoode lewru hesru. Ɓe ɗaɓɓititte ngam joonde ma haa faada nyaamdu ferwan.
1Samuel20:19 Faɓɓijaŋngo yah haa nokkuure nde nyukkuɗa nyannde go
1Samuel20:20 Min kam mi fiɗan kuri tati gal wakeere hayre man bana to huunde fiɗeego ɗon ton.
1Samuel20:21 Nden mi nela derkeejo haa o suɓta kuri man. To mi wi'i mo: Kuri njani gaa'e maaɗa
1Samuel20:22 Ammaa to mi wi'i mo: Kuri njani gaɗa maaɗa – nden kam dillu
1Samuel20:23 Ammaa siftor wolde alkawal hakkunde am bee maaɗa. Jawmiraawo tabitinan ngal haa foroy.”
1Samuel20:24 Daawuda nyukki bana o wi'no. Nde fuɗɗoode lewru hesru yotti
1Samuel20:25 O jooɗi dow joonde maako haa mahol bana o woowi. Yonatan jooɗi
1Samuel20:26 Nyannde maajum Sawulu wi'aay koo ɗume
1Samuel20:27 Ammaa koo nyalaade juulde ɗiɗawre boo
1Samuel20:28 Yonatan jaabi: “Daawuda tori yam duŋaye yahugo haa Baytilaama.
1Samuel20:29 O wi'i yam: Useni accam mi yaha
1Samuel20:30 Sawulu tikkani Yonatan masin
1Samuel20:31 Yaake Daawuda o geeto
1Samuel20:32 Yonatan ƴami baaba mum: “Ngam ɗume a yiɗi mbarugo mo? Ɗume o waɗi?”
1Samuel20:33 Ammaa Sawulu sakkini labbo mum haa yuwa Yonatan. Bana nii Yonatan anndiri anniya mbarugo Daawuda tabiti haa ɓernde Sawulu.
1Samuel20:34 Yonatan tikki masin
1Samuel20:35 Jaŋngo maajum fajiri Yonatan wurti
1Samuel20:36 O wi'i derkeejo: “Yaawɗa
1Samuel20:37 Derkeejo yotti pellel kurol man
1Samuel20:38 Yaawɗa
1Samuel20:39 O anndaa ko saawi nder haala maajum
1Samuel20:40 Yonatan hokki derkeejo lagaawal e kuri haa o hoora ɗum nder berniwol.
1Samuel20:41 Nde o dilli
1Samuel20:42 Nden Yonatan wi'i mo: “Yah jam! Taa yejjitit ko en kunotiri bee innde Jawmiraawo. Alkawal man tabiti hakkunde meeɗen

1Samuel21:15 Akis wi'i jaggiiɓe mum: “Ndaa
1Samuel21:16 Kadi yinnaaɓe haa ɗo ke'aay na? On ngiɗi o daamammi bee ginnawol maako na? Mi yiɗaa mo haa saare am.”
1Samuel22:1 Daawuda doggi ton
1Samuel22:2 Non boo yimɓe woɗɓe
1Samuel22:3 Daawuda ummi ton
1Samuel22:4 Bana nii o acciri saaro'en maako haa laamiiɗo Mo'abi'en. Ɓe njooɗi ton saa'i Daawuda ɗon nyukki nder gasol.
1Samuel22:5 Ammaa annabi Gada wi'i Daawuda: “Taa jooɗa haa ɗo nder gasol
1Samuel22:6 Nyannde feere Sawulu nani habaru yimɓe woɗɓe ngi'i Daawuda e yimɓe muuɗum. Saa'i maajum Sawulu ɗon jooɗi les aslahi gonki haa towndiire haa Gibiya
1Samuel22:7 O wi'i ɓe: “Naneeɗam
1Samuel22:8 Ngam maajum on tuurtani yam. Walaa koo gooto nder mooɗon anndini yam alkawal ɓiyam bee ɓii Yessa oo. Walaa koo gooto mooɗon suklani yam
1Samuel22:9 Do'ek Edoomiijo ɗon dari ton caka yimɓe Sawulu. O wi'i: “Ndaa
1Samuel22:10 Limanjo ƴami muuyo Jawmiraawo ngam maako
1Samuel22:11 Laamiiɗo Sawulu neli ɗaɓɓugo Ahimelek ɓii Ahitooba
1Samuel22:12 Sawulu wi'i: “Nan
1Samuel22:13 Sawulu wi'i mo: “Koni on tuurtani yam
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelek jaabi laamiiɗo: “Asee
1Samuel22:15 Nonnon
1Samuel22:16 Ammaa laamiiɗo wi'i: “Fakat
1Samuel22:17 O umri aynooɓe dariiɓe ton: “Taare liman'en Jawmiraawo
1Samuel22:18 Ngam maajum Sawulu wi'i Do'ek Edoomiijo: “An
1Samuel22:19 Nden Sawulu umri mbarugo jooɗiiɓe haa Noba

1Samuel22:21 o yecci mo no Sawulu mbardi liman'en Jawmiraawo.
