1Samuel22:23 Jooɗoda bee am
1Samuel23:1 Daawuda nani habaru Filisti'en ɗon ukkano Ke'ila
1Samuel23:2 Daawuda ƴami Jawmiraawo: “Mi yaha haɓugo bee Filisti'en na?” Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Yah
1Samuel23:3 Ammaa yimɓe maako mbi'i mo: “Koo haa ɗo nder lesdi Yahuuda boo en ɗon bee kulol
1Samuel23:4 Daawuda ƴami Jawmiraawo fahin. Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Umma
1Samuel23:5 Daawuda yehi Ke'ila
1Samuel23:6 Haa ton Abiyatar ɓii Ahimelek warino haa Daawuda
1Samuel23:7 Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda wari haa Ke'ila
1Samuel23:8 Sawulu ewni honooɓe Isra'iila'en fuu
1Samuel23:9 Daawuda faami Sawulu ɗon waɗa dabare honugo mo. Ngam maajum o umri Abiyatar
1Samuel23:10 Nden o wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
1Samuel23:11 Yimɓe Ke'ila ndokkatam haa juŋngo maako na? Sawulu waran na? Mi ɗon toro ma
1Samuel23:12 Daawuda ƴami: “Yimɓe Ke'ila ndokkatam
1Samuel23:13 Ngam maajum Daawuda ummi
1Samuel23:14 Daawuda faɓɓi nder gasi dow kooseeje nder ladde Zif haa Horeesa. Sawulu ɗaɓɓiti mo wakkati man fuu
1Samuel23:15 Daawuda anndi laaɓɗum Sawulu yiɗi mbarugo mo. Saa'i maajum Daawuda ɗon jooɗi haa Horeesa nder ladde Zif.
1Samuel23:16 Yonatan ɓii Sawulu yehi
1Samuel23:17 o wi'i mo: “Taa hul! Juŋngo baaba am heɓataa naawnugo ma. An a laatoto laamiiɗo Isra'iila
1Samuel23:18 Ɓe ɗiɗo fuu ɓe kaɓɓi alkawal soobaaku yeeso Jawmiraawo. Nden Yonatan hooti saare mum
1Samuel23:19 Yimɓe Zif ngari haa Sawulu haa Gibiya. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Daawuda ɗon nyukki haa lesdi amin
1Samuel23:20 War
1Samuel23:21 Sawulu wi'i ɓe: “Jawmiraawo barkiɗin on
1Samuel23:22 Njehe
1Samuel23:23 Mbiɗite nokkuuje fuu haa o waawi nyukkaago. To on anndi koo ɗume fuu bee laaɓɗum
1Samuel23:24 Kamɓe ɓe aarti Sawulu hootugo haa Zif. Ammaa Daawuda e worɓe mum njahno ladde hamaadaare Ma'on
1Samuel23:25 Sawulu e worɓe mum njehi ngam haa ɓe ɗaɓɓita mo ton. Nde Daawuda nani ɗum
1Samuel23:26 Sawulu e worɓe mum njehi haa wuttudu hooseere ndu'u
1Samuel23:27 Ɗon nii nelaaɗo wari haa Sawulu
1Samuel23:28 Sawulu acci taasnugo Daawuda
1Samuel24:1 Daawuda wa'i
1Samuel24:2 Nde Sawulu warti diga haɓre bee Filisti'en
1Samuel24:3 Sawulu hoo'i honooɓe ujine tato (3.000)
1Samuel24:4 O wari haa baalɗe dammooji kommbi laawol. Lowol ɗon ton. O nasti ngol ngam waɗugo haaje maako. Daawuda e worɓe mum ɗonno njooɗi ton.
1Samuel24:5 Worɓe Daawuda mbi'i: “Hannde woni nyalaade nde Jawmiraawo wi'i ma: Ndaa
1Samuel24:6 Ammaa ɓaawoɗon ɓernde maako de'itaay ngam ko o waɗino.
1Samuel24:7 O wi'i worɓe maako: “Jawmiraawo haɗam ɗum
1Samuel24:8 Bee bolle ɗe'e o haɗiri yimɓe maako ngam taa ɓe ukkano Sawulu. Nde Sawulu wurti lowol man
1Samuel24:9 Daawuda boo wurti
1Samuel24:10 wi'i: “Ngam ɗume a nananta yimɓe wi'anɓe ma mi yiɗi halkugo ma?
1Samuel24:11 Hanndeere nde'e ngi'ɗa bee gite ma no Jawmiraawo hokki ma nder juŋngo am
1Samuel24:12 Baaba am
1Samuel24:13 Jawmiraawo hiito hakkunde am bee maaɗa. Kaŋko o waato halleende nde mbaɗɗa mi
1Samuel24:14 A anndi geccawol kaakiraaɓe men: Halleende kam
1Samuel24:15 Anndu ko mbaɗata. Moy a taasnata? Laamiiɗo Isra'iila ɗon taasna rawaandu waatndu
1Samuel24:16 Mi accan kiita haa juŋngo Jawmiraawo
1Samuel24:17 Nde Daawuda timmini wolwugo
1Samuel24:18 Nden o wi'i Daawuda: “A semtini yam. A waɗani yam mbooɗeeŋga
1Samuel24:19 Hannde mbooɗeeŋga ma waŋgi
1Samuel24:20 Nde noy ɗum laatoto haa goɗɗo tawa konneejo mum
1Samuel24:21 Jonta anndumi a laatoto laamiiɗo fakat
1Samuel24:22 Ammaa hunoranam bee Jawmiraawo
1Samuel24:23 Daawuda huni dow maajum. Nden Sawulu hooti saare mum
1Samuel25:1 Saa'i maajum Samuyila maayi. Isra'iila'en mooɓi
1Samuel25:2 Haa wuro Ma'on woodi goɗɗo diskuɗo masin. Innde maako Nabal mo lenyol Kaaleb. O mari baali ujine tati (3.000) e be'i ujineere (1.000)
1Samuel25:3 
1Samuel25:4 
1Samuel25:5 o suɓi suka'en sappo nder worɓe maako
1Samuel25:6 Mbi'e mo: Ndaa nii Daawuda wi'i: Allah hokke sabbuŋgo
1Samuel25:7 Mi nani a mari meksooɓe gaasa baali ma. Anndu waynaaɓe ma ɗonno ngondi bee amin
1Samuel25:8 Ƴam sukaaɓe ma
1Samuel25:9 Kamɓe ɓe njehi
1Samuel25:10 Ammaa Nabal telɓani ɓe: “Daawuda
1Samuel25:11 Nyaamdu am e ndiyam am e kusel ngel kirsumi
1Samuel25:12 Ɓe lori haa Daawuda
1Samuel25:13 Daawuda umri worɓe mum: “Mbakke kaafaaje mon!” Koo moy wakki kaafahi mum. Kaŋko boo o wakki ki maako nden o yahdi bee worɓe teemeɗɗe nayo (400). Ammaa teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo (200)
1Samuel25:14 Ammaa gooto nder suka'en Nabal yehi haa Abigayel
1Samuel25:15 Fakat
1Samuel25:16 Wakkati min ngondi bee maɓɓe e min ndurdi fuu
1Samuel25:17 Useni
1Samuel25:18 Law Abigayel hoo'i tamseeje teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi
1Samuel25:19 Nden o umri sukaaɓe: “Njehe onon
1Samuel25:20 O wa'i wamnde maako
1Samuel25:21 Hiddeko ɓe potta
1Samuel25:22 Jawmiraawo hiito konne'en am to mi luttani mo gorko gooto nder yimɓe maako haa jaŋngo fajiri.”
1Samuel25:23 Nde Abigayel yi'i Daawuda
1Samuel25:24 O do'i les kosɗe Daawuda
1Samuel25:25 Useni
1Samuel25:26 Ɗum Jawmiraawo haɗi ma waataago aybe man e rufugo ƴiiƴam hannde. Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto
1Samuel25:27 Jaɓ dokkal ngal ngaddanmaami
1Samuel25:28 Yaafanam
1Samuel25:29 To goɗɗo taasni ma
1Samuel25:30 To Jawmiraawo laatini barkaaji ɗi o wi'no ma fuu
1Samuel25:31 nden kam walaa ko teddanta numo ɓernde ma
1Samuel25:32 Daawuda wi'i Abigayel: “Yettoore laatano Jawmiraawo
1Samuel25:33 An boo
1Samuel25:34 Ammaa fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto
1Samuel25:35 Daawuda jaɓi dokke Abigayel
1Samuel25:36 Nde Abigayel warti saare
1Samuel25:37 Jaŋngo maajum fajiri
1Samuel25:38 Ɓaawo nyalɗe sappo Jawmiraawo maayni mo.
1Samuel25:39 Nde Daawuda nani haala maajum
1Samuel25:40 Nelaaɓe maako ngari haa Abigayel haa Karmel
1Samuel25:41 Abigayel ummi
1Samuel25:42 O yaawɗi
1Samuel25:43 Daawuda aartuno te'ugo Ahino'am
1Samuel25:44 Ammaa Mikal
1Samuel26:1 Yimɓe Zif ngari haa Sawulu haa Gibiya. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Daawuda ɗon nyukki haa hooseere Hakila haa fuunaaŋge harde Yahuuda.”
1Samuel26:2 Sawulu ummi
1Samuel26:3 Nde ɓe njotti hooseere Hakila yeeso harde Yahuuda
1Samuel26:4 o neli horooɓe
1Samuel26:5 Nden o ummi bee hoore maako
1Samuel26:6 Daawuda ƴami Ahimelek Hetiijo e Abisay ɓii Seruyatu
1Samuel26:7 Wakkati jemma Daawuda e Abisay nasti saŋngeere. Ɓe caali worɓe taariiɓe Sawulu
1Samuel26:8 Abisay wi'i Daawuda: “Hannde Allah hokki konneejo ma haa juŋngo ma. Accu mi tigga mo bee labbo haa lesdi
1Samuel26:9 Ammaa Daawuda wi'i: “Taa halku mo! Kaŋko woni laamiiɗo mo Jawmiraawo suɓi. Kadi Jawmiraawo hiitataako mo meemi cuɓaaɗo maako na?
1Samuel26:10 Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto
1Samuel26:11 Jawmiraawo haɗammi meemugo laamiiɗo mo o suɓi. Ammaa hoocu labbo maako e jollooru maako
1Samuel26:12 Ɓe kooci labbo e jollooru
1Samuel26:13 Daawuda lori haa wakeere waadiwol feere
1Samuel26:14 Nden o hooli heedi ummaatoore e Abineer: “Abineer
1Samuel26:15 Daawuda wi'i: “Na a gorko? Moy nder Isra'iila foti haɓugo bee maaɗa? Kadi ngam ɗume a aynaay jaagorɗo ma laamiiɗo? Neeɓaay goɗɗo nasti saŋngeere ngam mbarugo mo.
1Samuel26:16 A waɗaay kuugal ma bana no fotti. Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto
1Samuel26:17 Sawulu annditi sawtu Daawuda. O ƴami: “Ɗum an na
1Samuel26:18 Nden o ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Ngam ɗume a taasnatammi? Ko mbaɗmaami? Ɗume woni aybe am?
1Samuel26:19 Nanam
1Samuel26:20 Taa accu ɓe mbarammi haa lesdi ndaayiindi bee Jawmiraawo. Ngam ɗume a loohoto yam bana gerlal nder kooseeje? Laamiiɗo Isra'iila wurti ngam naŋngugo pilpilyel.”
1Samuel26:21 Sawulu wi'i: “Mi waɗi aybe. Lorta
1Samuel26:22 Daawuda jaabi mo: “Ndaa ɗo labbo ma
1Samuel26:23 Jawmiraawo warjoto koo moy fodde adilaaku e gooŋgaaku maako. Hannde o nastini ma juŋngo am
1Samuel26:24 Bana min mi samɗini yoŋki ma hannde
1Samuel26:25 Sawulu wi'i: “Allah barkiɗine
1Samuel27:1 Daawuda numi: “Nyannde feere Sawulu mbaratam. Ndikka mi daɗa
1Samuel27:2 Daawuda ummi
1Samuel27:3 Ɓe njooɗi ton
1Samuel27:4 Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda ɗon haa Gaat
1Samuel27:5 Daawuda wi'i Akis: “To a yerdake yam
1Samuel27:6 Nyalaade maajum Akis hokki mo Cikilak. Ngam maajum laamiiɓe Yahuuda mari Cikilak haa wargo hannde.
1Samuel27:7 Daawuda faɓɓi nder lesdi Filisti'en nduuɓu e lebbi nayi.
1Samuel27:8 Wakkati maajum Daawuda e worɓe mum ɗon njaha
1Samuel27:9 Haa Daawuda yahata fuu
1Samuel27:10 Akis ƴama mo: “Toy njahɗon hippugo jonta?” Nden Daawuda jaaba: “Haa Lesdi Fombina
1Samuel27:11 Daawuda accaay koo moy
1Samuel27:12 Akis nuɗɗini Daawuda ngam o numi: “Daawuda wartiri hoore mum o ganyaaɗo haa yimɓe maako Isra'iila'en
1Samuel28:1 Wakkati maajum Filisti'en mooɓti jama'aaje konu muuɗum'en fahin ngam haa ɓe kaɓa bee Isra'iila'en. Akis wi'i Daawuda: “Walaa seko sam
1Samuel28:2 Daawuda jaabi: “Nonnon nii
1Samuel28:3 Samuyila maayi faɓɓi. Isra'iila'en fuu mboyi mo
1Samuel28:4 Kadi
1Samuel28:5 Nde Sawulu yi'i jama'aaje Filisti'en
1Samuel28:6 O ƴami Jawmiraawo ko o waɗata
1Samuel28:7 Ngam maajum Sawulu wi'i yimɓe mum: “Ɗaɓɓiteeɗam debbo carwoowo maayɓe
1Samuel28:8 Sawulu ɓorni limce goɗɗe ngam taa goɗɗo anndita mo
1Samuel28:9 Debbo jaabi: “A anndi ko Sawulu waɗi
1Samuel28:10 Ammaa Sawulu hunani mo: “Bana Jawmiraawo o geeto
1Samuel28:11 Nden debbo ƴami: “Moy ngurtinanmi ngam maaɗa?” Sawulu jaabi: “Waddu Samuyila.”
1Samuel28:12 Nde debbo yi'i Samuyila
1Samuel28:13 Laamiiɗo wi'i mo: “Taa hul
1Samuel28:14 Sawulu ƴami: “Noy ngol wa'i?” O jaabi: “Ɗum gorko nayeejo
1Samuel28:15 Samuyila ƴami mo: “Koni a daami yam? Ngam ɗume a wurtini yam?” Sawulu jaabi: “Woodi ko ɓillatammi masin: Filisti'en ɗon ɗaɓɓanammi haɓre. Allah boo seedi bee am
1Samuel28:16 Samuyila wi'i: “Koni a ƴamatammi to Jawmiraawo acci ma
1Samuel28:17 O waɗan jonta ko o anndini bee hunnduko am diga ɓooyma: O hoo'i laamu haa juŋngo maaɗa
1Samuel28:18 Jawmiraawo umruno ma a halka Amaleki'en e ko ɓe mari fuu. Ammaa an a ɗowtanaaki wolde maako
1Samuel28:19 Jawmiraawo hokkete haa juuɗe Filisti'en
1Samuel28:20 Bana Sawulu juutiri nii
1Samuel28:21 Debbo go ɓaditi mo
1Samuel28:22 Ammaa jonta an boo waɗ ko mi wi'ete
1Samuel28:23 Ammaa Sawulu sali nyaamugo. Ɗoftuɓe mo e debbo carwoowo tori mo ɗuuɗɗum
1Samuel28:24 Debbo woodi gaggel payŋgel haa saare. O yaawi
1Samuel28:25 O yahrani ɗum Sawulu e yimɓe mum
1Samuel29:1 Filisti'en mooɓti jama'aaje muuɗum'en fuu haa Afek. Isra'iila'en boo caŋngini kommbi seeɓoore haa Yisre'el.
1Samuel29:2 Nde laamiiɓe Filisti'en ɗon caalo bee mooɓe muuɗum'en fodde ujineeje e teemeɗɗe
1Samuel29:3 Mawɓe konu Filisti'en ƴami: “E ɗume Ibraniŋke'en mbaɗata ɗo?” Akis jaabi ɓe: “Ɗum Daawuda. Ɓooyma o suka Sawulu
1Samuel29:4 Ammaa mawɓe konu Filisti'en tikkani Akis
1Samuel29:5 Malla a yejjiti ko ɓe ngimani mo: Sawulu mbari ujineere
1Samuel29:6 Akis ewni Daawuda
1Samuel29:7 Kadi lorta
1Samuel29:8 Daawuda wi'i Akis: “Aybewol ngole mbaɗmi
1Samuel29:9 Akis jaabi mo: “Mi anndi. Yeeso am a koolaaɗo bana malaa'ikaajo Allah
1Samuel29:10 Ngam maajum ndawe cub
1Samuel29:11 Jaŋngo maajum Daawuda e worɓe mum ndawi cub
1Samuel30:1 Nyannde tataɓre
1Samuel30:2 Ɓe mbaraay koo gooto
1Samuel30:3 Nde Daawuda e worɓe mum ngarti
1Samuel30:4 
1Samuel30:5 Rewɓe Daawuda ɗiɗo boo ndahaama
1Samuel30:6 Daawuda sakli masin
1Samuel30:7 O umri Abiyatar ɓii Ahimelek
1Samuel30:8 Daawuda ƴami Jawmiraawo: “Mi taasna hippooɓe ɓe'e na? Mi jokkoto ɓe na?” Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Taasnu ɓe
1Samuel30:9 Saa'i man nden ɓe ndilli
1Samuel30:10 
1Samuel30:11 Ɓe tawi Misraajo suka mo heɓaay nyaamdu e njaram nyalɗe tati. Ɓe njahri mo haa Daawuda
1Samuel30:12 
1Samuel30:13 Daawuda ƴami mo: “Toy iwɗaa? Moy mari ma?” O jaabi: “Mi Misraajo
1Samuel30:14 Min kippino Lesdi Fombina
1Samuel30:15 Daawuda ƴami mo: “A yahratam haa mooɓre hippooɓe ɓe'e na?” Maccuɗo wi'i: “Hunoranam bee Allah a mbarataa yam
1Samuel30:16 Ɓe njehi
1Samuel30:17 Jaŋngo maajum nde weeti Daawuda ukkani ɓe
1Samuel30:18 Daawuda hisni ko ɓe koocuno fuu
1Samuel30:19 Walaa ko majji
1Samuel30:20 Dammooji e na'i maɓɓe
1Samuel30:21 Nde ɓe ɓadi maayo Besor
1Samuel30:22 Ammaa nder yahduɓe bee Daawuda woodi woɗɓe halluɓe e meere'en. Kamɓe ɓe mbi'i: “Ɓe njahdaay bee meeɗen nder haɓre
1Samuel30:23 Ammaa Daawuda wi'i: “Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Samuel30:24 Walaa mo yerdoto ko mbi'ɗon. Ndaa ko foti: Jahɗo konu e aynuɗo kuuje saŋngeere cenndan keɓal konu kal-kal.”
1Samuel30:25 Daawuda laatini ɗum umroore nder Isra'iila diga nyalaade maajum haa wargo hannde.
1Samuel30:26 Nde Daawuda warti Cikilak
1Samuel30:27 O neldi dokke man haa Baytila e Ramot nder Lesdi Fombina e Yattir
1Samuel30:28 haa Aro'er e Sifmot e Estemo'a
1Samuel30:29 haa Rakal e berniiji Yerahameeli'en e berniiji Keni'en
1Samuel30:30 haa Horma e Bor-Asan e Atak
1Samuel30:31 haa Heburuun e nokkuuje fuu haa Daawuda e worɓe mum keɓno hisrude.
1Samuel31:1 Filisti'en kaɓi bee Isra'iila'en haa hooseere Gilbo'a. Isra'iila'en ɗuuɗɓe mbaraama ton
1Samuel31:2 Filisti'en taasni Sawulu e ɓiɓɓe mum. Ɓe mbari Yonatan e Abinadabu e Malkisu'a
1Samuel31:3 Haɓre saati dow Sawulu. Nde fiɗooɓe kuri keɓti mo
1Samuel31:4 Sawulu wi'i doondoowo balmi mum: “Los kaafahi ma
1Samuel31:5 Nde doondoowo balmi go yi'i Sawulu maayi
1Samuel31:6 Bana nii Sawulu e ɓiɓɓe mum e doondoowo balmi mum e worɓe mum fuu maaydi nyalaade man.
1Samuel31:7 Isra'iila'en wonɓe gaɗa waadiwol e gaɗa Urdun
1Samuel31:8 Jaŋngo maajum Filisti'en ngari ngam ɓoftugo kuuje mbaraaɓe. Ɓe tawi Sawulu e ɓiɓɓe mum tato ɗon mbaali dow hooseere Gilbo'a.
1Samuel31:9 Ɓe ta'i hoore Sawulu
1Samuel31:10 Ɓe ndesi balmi Sawulu nder suudu Astarot
1Samuel31:11 Yimɓe wonɓe haa Yaabes nder lesdi Gile'at nani ko Filisti'en mbaɗi Sawulu.
1Samuel31:12 Worɓe maɓɓe semmbiɗɓe fuu ummi
1Samuel31:13 Nden ɓe koo'i i'e maɓɓe
2Samuel1:1 Ɓaawo maayde Sawulu
2Samuel1:2 Nyannde tataɓre goɗɗo iwi diga saŋngeere konu Sawulu
2Samuel1:3 Daawuda ƴami mo: “Diga toy ngarɗaa?” O jaabi: “Mi daɗi
2Samuel1:4 Daawuda ƴami mo: “Noy kubar? Yeccam ɗum!” O wi'i: “Jama'aare Isra'iila doggi
2Samuel1:5 Daawuda ƴami mo fahin: “Noy anndirɗa Sawulu e ɓiyum Yonatan maayi?”
2Samuel1:6 O jaabi: “Mi ɗonno dow hooseere Gilbo'a. Mi yi'i Sawulu ɗon tuggi dow labbo mum
2Samuel1:7 O wayliti
2Samuel1:8 O ƴami yam: An moy? Mi jaabi: Mi Amalekiijo.
2Samuel1:9 O wi'i yam: Ɓadita
2Samuel1:10 Mi anndi o yeeɗataa ɓaawo konne'en njaali mo. Ngam maajum mi ɓaditi mo
2Samuel1:11 Daawuda seeki limce mum
2Samuel1:12 Ɓe mboyi
2Samuel1:13 Daawuda ƴami suka gadduɗo kubar go: “Toy iwɗaa?” O jaabi: “Mi ɓii Amalekiijo koɗo nder Isra'iila.”
2Samuel1:14 Daawuda telɓani mo
2Samuel1:15 Daawuda ewni goɗɗo nder suka'en mum
2Samuel1:16 Daawuda wi'i Amalekiijo: “Aybe maayde ma ɗon dow hoore ma. Bolle ma kaɓɓi ma
2Samuel1:17 Daawuda waɗi gimol boyki dow Sawulu e ɓiyum Yonatan
2Samuel1:18 o inndi ngol “Gimol Lagaawal”
2Samuel1:19 “Yaa Isra'iila
2Samuel1:20 Taa anndine ɗum haa Gaat
2Samuel1:21 Onon kooseeje Gilbo'a
2Samuel1:22 Lagaawal Yonatan woofaay sam
2Samuel1:23 Sawulu e Yonatan
2Samuel1:24 Onon rewɓe Isra'iila'en
2Samuel1:25 Honooɓe ɓurduɓe semmbe maayi
2Samuel1:26 Kayto deerɗiraawo am Yonatan
2Samuel1:27 Ayye! Honooɓe ɓurduɓe semmbe maayi! Balmi maɓɓe natti
2Samuel2:1 Ɓaawo kuuje ɗe'e Daawuda ƴami Jawmiraawo: “Mi yaha haa gootol nder berniiji Yahuuda na?” Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Ooho.” Daawuda ƴami: “Toy njahanmi?” O jaabi: “Haa Heburuun.”
2Samuel2:2 Daawuda yehi ton
2Samuel2:3 Daawuda yahri boo worɓe wonduɓe bee muuɗum fuu
2Samuel2:4 Yimɓe Yahuuda ngari ton
2Samuel2:5 O neli nelaaɓe haa maɓɓe
2Samuel2:6 
2Samuel2:7 Tiɗɗine ɓerɗe mon
2Samuel2:8 Abineer ɓii Neer
2Samuel2:9 Ton o waɗi mo laamiiɗo dow Gile'at e Aser e Yisre'el e Efrayim e Benyamin
2Samuel2:10 Isboset woodi duuɓi cappanɗe nayi saa'i o laamo. O laami duuɓi ɗiɗi. Yimɓe Yahuuda tan tokki Daawuda.
2Samuel2:11 O laamani ɓe haa Heburuun duuɓi joweeɗiɗi e lebbi joweego.
2Samuel2:12 Abineer e yimɓe Isboset ngurti Mahanayim yahugo Gibiyon.
2Samuel2:13 Yo'ab ɓii Seruyatu e yimɓe Daawuda boo njehi ton. Ɓe potti haa heeleewo Gibiyon. Yimɓe Daawuda njooɗi haa wakeere heeleewo nde'e
2Samuel2:14 Abineer wi'i Yo'ab: “Accu sukaaɓe mbaɗana en fijirde konu.” Yo'ab jaɓi.
2Samuel2:15 Nden sukaaɓe ngurti
2Samuel2:16 Ɓe naŋngindiri ko'e maɓɓe
2Samuel2:17 Nden haɓre ummi hakkunde jama'aaje ɗiɗi fuu
2Samuel2:18 Ɓiɓɓe Seruyatu tato ɓe'e fuu ɗon ton: Yo'ab e Abisay e Asa'el. Asa'el o jaawɗo bana lelwa.
2Samuel2:19 O taasni Abineer bee tiinaare ɗuuɗnde.
2Samuel2:20 Abineer yeesiti
2Samuel2:21 Abineer wi'i mo: “Accu taasnugo yam! Tokka gooto nder sukaaɓe
2Samuel2:22 Abineer reentini mo fahin
2Samuel2:23 Ammaa Asa'el sali accugo mo. Ngam maajum Abineer yuwri mo ɓaawo ɓaawo haa reedu bee labbo haa ngo wurti gal ɓaawo maako. Ɗon nii Asa'el maayi
2Samuel2:24 Ammaa Yo'ab e Abisay tokki taasnugo Abineer. Saa'i naaŋge ɗon muta
2Samuel2:25 Yimɓe Benyamin mooɓti
2Samuel2:26 Abineer ewni Yo'ab: “A yiɗi kaafahi nattina yimɓe haa foroy na? Malla a anndaa no timmoode maajum hallirta? Ndey umrata yimɓe ma ɓe acca taasnugo banndiraaɓe muuɗum'en?”
2Samuel2:27 Yo'ab wi'i: “Fakat bana Allah o geeto
2Samuel2:28 Nden o fuufi luwal konu. Yimɓe maako acci taasnugo Isra'iila'en
2Samuel2:29 Jemmaare nde'e fuu Abineer e yimɓe mum ta'i nder Araba. Nden ɓe eeri maayo Urdun
2Samuel2:30 Nde Yo'ab acci taasnugo ɓe
2Samuel2:31 yimɓe Daawuda mbarino yimɓe Benyamin e yimɓe Abineer teemeɗɗe tato e cappanɗe njoweego (360).
2Samuel2:32 Ɓe kooci ɓanndu Asa'el
2Samuel3:1 Haɓre hakkunde yimɓe Sawulu e yimɓe Daawuda duuri. Semmbe yimɓe Daawuda ɗon ɓesdo ammaa yimɓe Sawulu ɗon tampa.
2Samuel3:2 Daawuda danyi ɓiɓɓe worɓe haa Heburuun. Ndaa inɗe maɓɓe: Ahino'am mo Yisre'el danyani mo Amnon
2Samuel3:3 Abigayel laatinooɗo debbo Nabal
2Samuel3:4 Nayaɓo woni Adoniya
2Samuel3:5 Njoweegoojo Yitiriyam
2Samuel3:6 Wakkati haɓre ɗonno tokki hakkunde saare Sawulu e saare Daawuda
2Samuel3:7 Nyannde go'o Isboset feli Abineer ngam daliila culaaɗo baaba maako Sawulu
2Samuel3:8 Abineer ɓerni masin
2Samuel3:9 Jawmiraawo hiito yam bee caatal to mi waɗanaay Daawuda ko Jawmiraawo hunani mo
2Samuel3:10 o wi'no o ɓortan saare Sawulu diga laamu
2Samuel3:11 Isboset waawaay jaabaago Abineer koo wolde woore
2Samuel3:12 Nden Abineer neli nelaaɓe haa Daawuda
2Samuel3:13 Daawuda jaabi: “Booɗɗum
2Samuel3:14 Daawuda neli boo nelaaɓe haa Isboset
2Samuel3:15 Isboset neli hoocugo mo haa goriiko Paltiyel ɓii Layis.
2Samuel3:16 Goriiko tokki mo bee bojji haa ɓe njotti Bahuriima. Nden Abineer wi'i mo: “Dillu jonta
2Samuel3:17 Abineer dawri bee ndotti'en Isra'iila. O wi'i ɓe: “Naa diga ɓooyma on ɗon ɗaɓɓa haa Daawuda wona laamiiɗo mon na?
2Samuel3:18 Kadi jonta woni saa'iire fottunde. Ciftore ko Jawmiraawo wi'no: Bee juŋngo jaggiiɗo am Daawuda kisnanmi yimɓe am Isra'iila'en juuɗe Filisti'en e konne'en muuɗum'en woɗɓe fuu.”
2Samuel3:19 Abineer wolidi bee yimɓe Benyamin boo. Nden o yehi haa Heburuun ngam haa o anndina Daawuda ko Isra'iila'en e yimɓe Benyamin narri waɗugo.
2Samuel3:20 Nde Abineer wari haa Heburuun
2Samuel3:21 Abineer wi'i mo: “Mi yahan jonta
2Samuel3:22 Wakkati seɗɗa ɓaawoɗon Yo'ab e yimɓe Daawuda ngarti diga jaɓtol feere. Ɓe ngaddi keɓal ɗuuɗŋgal. Nde Yo'ab warti bee yimɓe muuɗum
2Samuel3:23 
2Samuel3:24 Ngam maajum Yo'ab yehi haa laamiiɗo
2Samuel3:25 Naa a anndi Abineer? O wari ƴoyrugo ma tan
2Samuel3:26 Nde Yo'ab wurti saare laamiiɗo
2Samuel3:27 O lorti bee maɓɓe haa Heburuun. Yo'ab yahri mo feere maako haa nastirde berniwol
2Samuel3:28 Nde Daawuda nani haala maajum
2Samuel3:29 Ka ukkano Yo'ab e banndiraaɓe mum. Foroy woɗɓe nder asŋgol maako nyawa nyawuji ilooji malla saɗawre
2Samuel3:30 Bana nii Yo'ab e Abisay mbardiri Abineer
2Samuel3:31 Nden Daawuda umri Yo'ab e yimɓe wonduɓe bee muuɗum: “Ceeke limce mon
2Samuel3:32 Ɓe uwi Abineer haa Heburuun. Daawuda woyi bee sawtu haa yenaande maako
2Samuel3:33 Laamiiɗo yimi gimol boyki dow Abineer: “Kayto Abineer
2Samuel3:34 Juuɗe ma kaɓɓaaka
2Samuel3:35 Ɓaawoɗon ɓe tori Daawuda o nyaama seɗɗa hiddeko jemma waɗa
2Samuel3:36 Yimɓe ngi'i no Daawuda woyri Abineer
2Samuel3:37 Nyalaade maajum koo moy nder yimɓe Daawuda e nder Isra'iila fuu faami mbarki Abineer iwaay haa laamiiɗo.
2Samuel3:38 Kaŋko o wi'i saraaki'en maako: “On paamaay na? Hannde ardiiɗo mawɗo maayi nder Isra'iila.
2Samuel3:39 Koo mi laamiiɗo boo
2Samuel4:1 Nde Isboset ɓii Sawulu nani haala maayde Abineer haa Heburuun
2Samuel4:2 Isboset woodino ardiiɓe wiftooɓe ɗiɗo
2Samuel4:3 Ɓooyma
2Samuel4:4 Woodino taaniraawo Sawulu boo
2Samuel4:5 Rekab e Ba'ana go njehi haa saare Isboset. Ɓe njotti ton caka nyalawma
2Samuel4:6 Ɓe nasti saare ngam hoocugo alkamaari
2Samuel4:7 
2Samuel4:8 Ɓe njahri hoore Isboset haa Heburuun haa Daawuda. Ɓe mbi'i laamiiɗo: “Ndaa hoore Isboset ɓii konneejo ma Sawulu
2Samuel4:9 Daawuda jaabi ɓe: “Fakat mi ɗon wi'a bee innde Jawmiraawo geeto
2Samuel4:10 Naane goɗɗo wari haa am haa Cikilak
2Samuel4:11 Kadi on tammi mi hiitataako worɓe halluɓe mbarɓe goɗɗo gooŋgaajo baaliiɗo nder suudu mum na? Fakat mi ƴaman ƴiiƴam maako haa mooɗon
2Samuel4:12 Daawuda umri sukaaɓe mum
2Samuel5:1 Le'i Isra'iila fuu ngari haa Daawuda haa Heburuun. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Minin min banndiraaɓe ma nder ummaatoore woore.
2Samuel5:2 Koo naane
2Samuel5:3 Nden ndotti'en Isra'iila fuu ngari haa Heburuun. Laamiiɗo Daawuda haɓɓi alkawal bee maɓɓe yeeso Jawmiraawo. Ɓe moyti mo
2Samuel5:4 Daawuda woodi duuɓi cappanɗe tati
2Samuel5:5 Haa Heburuun o laamani Yahuuda duuɓi joweeɗiɗi e lebbi joweego. Haa Urusaliima boo o laami duuɓi cappanɗe tati e tati dow Isra'iila e Yahuuda fuu.
2Samuel5:6 Nden laamiiɗo Daawuda yahdi bee honooɓe muuɗum haa Urusaliima ngam honugo Yebusi'en jooɗiiɓe ton. Ammaa ɓe mbi'i mo: “A waawataa nyaamugo berniwol amin
2Samuel5:7 Daawuda nyaami berniwol cemmbiɗŋgol dow Siyona
2Samuel5:8 Nyalde maajum Daawuda wi'i: “Koo moy giɗɗo jaalaago Yebusi'en
2Samuel5:9 Daawuda yeni dow berniwol ngol
2Samuel5:10 Baawɗe Daawuda ɓesdi yeeso yeeso
2Samuel5:11 Hiram
2Samuel5:12 Daawuda annditi Jawmiraawo tabitini mo o laamiiɗo
2Samuel5:13 Ɓaawo Daawuda ummi Heburuun
2Samuel5:14 Ndaa inɗe ɓiɓɓe worɓe danyanaaɓe mo haa Urusaliima: Sammu'a e Sobaba e Natan e Suleymaanu
2Samuel5:15 e Yibehar e Elisuwa e Nefek e Yafiya
2Samuel5:16 e Eliisama e Eliyada e Elifelet.
2Samuel5:17 Nde Filisti'en nani Isra'iila'en mbaɗi Daawuda laamiiɗo muuɗum'en
2Samuel5:18 Filisti'en ngari
2Samuel5:19 Daawuda ƴami Jawmiraawo: “Mi haɓa bee Filisti'en na? A hokkatam jaalorgal dow maɓɓe na?” Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Yah
2Samuel5:20 Daawuda yehi
2Samuel5:21 Filisti'en ndoggi
2Samuel5:22 Fahin Filisti'en ngari
2Samuel5:23 Daawuda ƴami Jawmiraawo kadiboo. Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Taa ukkana ɓe diga ɗo
2Samuel5:24 To a nani sonyo palanɗe kosɗe dow ko'e leɗɗe man
2Samuel5:25 Daawuda waɗi ko Jawmiraawo umri mo. O mbari Filisti'en diga Geba haa yotti Gezer.
2Samuel6:1 Daawuda mooɓti honooɓe Isra'iila'en suɓaaɓe
2Samuel6:2 O yahdi bee maɓɓe haa Ba'ala nder lesdi Yahuuda ngam haa ɓe koo'oya sundukru Allah wi'eteendu fodde innde Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
2Samuel6:3 Ɓe njo'ini sundukru Allah dow moota ga'i kesa. Ɓe ngurtini ndu saare Abinadabu wonnde dow towndiire. Uzza e Ahiyo ɓiɓɓe Abinadabu ɗon ɗowa moota man
2Samuel6:4 Ahiyo ɗon ardo nga.
2Samuel6:5 Daawuda e Isra'iila'en fuu ɗon ngima bee seyo yeeso Jawmiraawo bee kuuje gimruɗe ɗe leɗɗe
2Samuel6:6 Nde ɓe njotti laarre Nakon
2Samuel6:7 Ammaa Jawmiraawo tikkani Uzza
2Samuel6:8 Ɓernde Daawuda metti ngam tikkere Jawmiraawo ukki dow Uzza. O inndi nokkuure nde'e Peres-Uzza
2Samuel6:9 Nyalaade maajum Daawuda huli Jawmiraawo
2Samuel6:10 Ngam maajum o yiɗaa yahrugo ndu haa maako nder Berniwol Daawuda. O selni ndu haa saare Obet-Edoom
2Samuel6:11 Sundukru Jawmiraawo faɓɓi ton lebbi tati. Jawmiraawo barkiɗini Obet-Edoom e saare mum fuu.
2Samuel6:12 Daawuda nani: “Jawmiraawo barkiɗini Obet-Edoom e ko o mari fuu ngam daliila sundukru alkawal Allah.” Ngam maajum o seyi
2Samuel6:13 Nde roondiiɓe ndu njehi palanɗe joweego
2Samuel6:14 Daawuda ɗon wama yeeso Jawmiraawo bee semmbe fuu
2Samuel6:15 Bana nii Daawuda e Isra'iila'en fuu njahri sundukru Jawmiraawo haa Urusaliima
2Samuel6:16 Wakkati sundukru Jawmiraawo ɗon nasta Berniwol Daawuda
2Samuel6:17 Ɓaawo man
2Samuel6:18 Nde Daawuda timmini lii'aago guleteeɗi e kirseteeɗi man
2Samuel6:19 Isra'iila'en worɓe e rewɓe wonɓe ton fuu
2Samuel6:20 Daawuda boo hooti
2Samuel6:21 Daawuda jaabi mo: “Mi waɗi ɗum ngam teddingo Jawmiraawo. Kaŋko o yerdi e o suɓi yam mbattudi baaba ma e saare mum
2Samuel6:22 mi ɓesdan famɗitingo hoore am ko ɓuri nii ammaa ɗum ustataa daraja am yeeso horɓe ɓe mbolwanɗa.”
2Samuel6:23 Mikal ɓii Sawulu heɓaay ɓiŋngel haa o maayi.
2Samuel7:1 Laamiiɗo Daawuda ɗon jooɗi haa saare mum. Jawmiraawo hokki mo siwtaare
2Samuel7:2 Nyannde feere laamiiɗo wi'i annabi Natan: “Ndaa
2Samuel7:3 Natan wi'i mo: “Waɗ ko ɓernde ma numi fuu
2Samuel7:4 Ammaa jemmaare maajum wolde Jawmiraawo warani Natan
2Samuel7:5 “Yah
2Samuel7:6 Mi meeɗaay jooɗaago nder suudu
2Samuel7:7 Koo toy njahmi caka Isra'iila'en fuu
2Samuel7:8 Jonta sey a wi'a jaggiiɗo am Daawuda: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi hoo'i ma haa waalde
2Samuel7:9 Mi wondi bee ma koo toy njahɗaa fuu
2Samuel7:10 Mi suɓani yimɓe am Isra'iila'en nokkuure joonde
2Samuel7:11 ɗum laati bana nii diga wakkati alkaali'en laamani yimɓe am Isra'iila'en. An boo mi hokkete siwtaare
2Samuel7:12 To balɗe ma timmi
2Samuel7:13 Kaŋko o nyiɓantam suudu
2Samuel7:14 Mi laatoto baaba maako
2Samuel7:15 Ammaa mi ittantaa mo mbooɗeeŋga am bana no ittumi nga dow Sawulu mo ndiiwmi yeeso maaɗa.
2Samuel7:16 Saare ma e laamu ma nduumoto
2Samuel7:17 Natan yecci Daawuda bolle ɗe'e fuu e wahayu oo fuu.
2Samuel7:18 Laamiiɗo Daawuda nasti suudu laymaaru
2Samuel7:19 Kanjum boo ɗum pamarum haa yeeso ma
2Samuel7:20 Ɗume mi ɓesdata wolwango ma? A anndi maccuɗo ma.
2Samuel7:21 A waɗi kuuje mawɗe ɗe'e fuu daliila koŋngol ma e anniya ma
2Samuel7:22 Fakat a mawɗo
2Samuel7:23 Walaa ummaatoore feere haa duniyaaru bana yimɓe ma Isra'iila'en. An sootti ɓe ngam haa ɓe laato yimɓe ma. A huuwi kuuɗe mawɗe kulniiɗe ngam maɓɓe e ngam lesdi ma
2Samuel7:24 A tabitini Isra'iila'en ɓe yimɓe ma haa foroy
2Samuel7:25 Ammaa jonta
2Samuel7:26 Innde ma ɓaŋgo haa foroy
2Samuel7:27 Yaa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
2Samuel7:28 Jonta
2Samuel7:29 Nden
2Samuel8:1 Ɓaawo kuuje ɗe'e
2Samuel8:2 Nden o jaali Mo'abi'en. O wallini naŋngaaɓe fuu haa lesdi
2Samuel8:3 Nden o jaali Hadad'ezer ɓii Rehob
2Samuel8:4 Daawuda hooci wa'iiɓe mootaaji pucci ujineere e teemeɗɗe njoweeɗiɗo (1.700) e honooɓe ujine noogas (20.000) haa maako. Daawuda soppi korle pucci mootaaji fuu
2Samuel8:5 Siriya'en ngari diga Damas ngam haa ɓe mballa Hadad'ezer
2Samuel8:6 Daawuda waɗi saŋngeere aynooɓe nder lesdi maɓɓe
2Samuel8:7 Daawuda hooci bawarɗe kaŋŋeeri ɗe sukaaɓe Hadad'ezer marno
2Samuel8:8 Haa Beeta e Berotay
2Samuel8:9 To'i
2Samuel8:10 Ngam maajum o neli ɓiyiiko Yoram haa laamiiɗo Daawuda
2Samuel8:11 Daawuda seni ɗe ngam Jawmiraawo
2Samuel8:12 Haa Siriya'en e Mo'abi'en e Ammooni'en e Filisti'en e Amaleki'en
2Samuel8:13 Daawuda mbari Siriya'en ujine sappo e njoweetato (18.000) nder Waadiwol Mannda. Nde o lorti
2Samuel8:14 O jo'ini caŋngeeje aynooɓe nder lesdi Edoom. Edoomi'en fuu laati maccuɓe Daawuda. Jawmiraawo hisni Daawuda koo toy o yehi.
2Samuel8:15 Daawuda laamani Isra'iila fuu. O ɗon waɗana yimɓe maako fuu kiita ndarnuka e ngooŋɗuka.
2Samuel8:16 Yo'ab ɓii Seruyatu woni mawɗo honooɓe
2Samuel8:17 Cadok ɓii Ahitooba e Ahimelek ɓii Abiyatar ngoni liman'en. Seraya woni binndoowo.
2Samuel8:18 Benaya ɓii Yoyada woni hooreejo Kereti'en e Peleti'en. Ɓiɓɓe Daawuda kamɓe boo ɓe liman'en.
2Samuel9:1 Nyannde feere Daawuda ƴami: “Woodi goɗɗo luttuɗo nder saare Sawulu na? Mi waɗana mo mbooɗeeŋga daliila Yonatan.”
2Samuel9:2 Ɓe tawi goɗɗo mo laatino suka saare Sawulu
2Samuel9:3 Laamiiɗo ƴami: “Kadi walaa luttuɗo nder saare Sawulu na? Mi yiɗi hebbitingo amaana fodde ko mbi'mi yeeso Allah.” Siba jaabi: “Lutti ɓii Yonatan gooto
2Samuel9:4 Laamiiɗo ƴami: “Toy mo?” Siba wi'i: “O ɗon haa saare Makir ɓii Ammiyel haa Loodebar.”
2Samuel9:5 Daawuda neli ɗaɓɓitoygo mo.
2Samuel9:6 Mefiboset ɓii Yonatan ɓii Sawulu wari haa Daawuda. O tuggi koppi yeeso maako. Daawuda wi'i: “Mefiboset.” O jaabi: “Na'am
2Samuel9:7 Daawuda wi'i mo: “Taa hul
2Samuel9:8 Fahin Mefiboset tuggi koppi
2Samuel9:9 Ammaa laamiiɗo ewni Siba
2Samuel9:10 Sey a rema gese maako
2Samuel9:11 O wi'i laamiiɗo: “Mi waɗan ko umruɗa maccuɗo ma fuu
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboset woodi ɓiŋngel gorgel
2Samuel9:13 Kaŋko o jooɗi haa Urusaliima
2Samuel10:1 Ɓaawo maajum
2Samuel10:2 Daawuda wi'i: “Mi waɗanan Hanun ɓii Nahas mbooɗeeŋga
2Samuel10:3 mawɓe Ammooni'en mbi'i laamiiɗo muuɗum'en: “A numi Daawuda neli de'itinooɓe haa maaɗa ngam siŋkango ma daliila maayde baaba ma na? O nelaay ɓe haa maaɗa ngam wiɗitaago e horugo e hippaago berniwol ngo'ol na?”
2Samuel10:4 Hanun umri ɓe naŋnga nelaaɓe Daawuda go. Ɓe naŋngi ɓe
2Samuel10:5 Worɓe ɓe'e cemti masin haa ɓe ngiɗaa hootugo. Nde Daawuda nani kubar maajum
2Samuel10:6 Nde Ammooni'en annditi ɓe toonyi Daawuda
2Samuel10:7 Nde Daawuda nani ɗum
2Samuel10:8 Ammooni'en ngurti berniwol muuɗum'en
2Samuel10:9 Nde Yo'ab yi'i konne'en taarake ɗum yeeso e ɓaawo fuu
2Samuel10:10 Yimɓe luttuɓe fuu
2Samuel10:11 Yo'ab wi'i Abisay: “To Siriya'en calorake yam
2Samuel10:12 Semmbiɗiɗ
2Samuel10:13 Nden Yo'ab e wonduɓe bee muuɗum njehi haɓoygo bee Siriya'en. Siriya'en ndoggi yeeso maako.
2Samuel10:14 Nde Ammooni'en ngi'i Siriya'en ndoggi
2Samuel10:15 Nde Siriya'en ngi'i Isra'iila'en njaali ɓe
2Samuel10:16 Hadad'ezer neli haa Siriya'en wonɓe gaɗa Efratis
2Samuel10:17 Nde Daawuda nani ɗum
2Samuel10:18 Isra'iila'en ndiiwi Siriya'en. Daawuda e yimɓe mum kalki mootaaji pucci teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi (700) e wa'iiɓe pucci ujine cappanɗe nayo (40.000). Ɓe njuwi boo Sobak
2Samuel10:19 Nde laamiiɓe ɗowtaniiɓe Hadad'ezer ngi'i Isra'iila'en njaali ɓe
2Samuel11:1 Mawri man
2Samuel11:2 Nyannde feere
2Samuel11:3 Daawuda neli ƴamugo haala maako. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Kaŋko woni Bat-Seeba ɓii Eliyam
2Samuel11:4 Daawuda neli nelaaɓe haa maako
2Samuel11:5 Ɓaawo maajum o reedi. O neli
2Samuel11:6 Daawuda neli haa Yo'ab
2Samuel11:7 Uriya wari haa Daawuda. Daawuda ƴami mo njamu Yo'ab e njamu yimɓe e kubar haɓre.
2Samuel11:8 Nden o wi'i Uriya: “Jippa haa saare ma
2Samuel11:9 Ammaa Uriya yahaay haa saare mum. O waali haa yolnde saare laamiiɗo
2Samuel11:10 Nde Daawuda nani Uriya jippaaki haa saare mum
2Samuel11:11 Uriya jaabi mo: “Sundukru alkawal Allah e yimɓe Yahuuda e Isra'iila fuu ɗon njooɗi nder laymaaji. Jaagorɗo am Yo'ab e mawɓe mum ɗon caŋngini nder ladde. Kadi min mi nasta saare am
2Samuel11:12 Daawuda wi'i Uriya: “Jooɗa haa ɗo hannde boo. Jaŋngo mi jaɓɓititte.” Bana nii Uriya faɓɓi nder Urusaliima nyalaade man e jaŋngo man boo.
2Samuel11:13 Nden Daawuda ewni Uriya. Uriya nyaami e yari yeeso maako. Daawuda wuykini mo. Ammaa koo jemma maajum boo Uriya hootaay saare mum. O yehi
2Samuel11:14 Nde weeti
2Samuel11:15 Ndaa ko o winndi: “Darnu Uriya haa nokkuure nde haɓre ɓuri saatugo. Nden lorte
2Samuel11:16 Wakkati Yo'ab ɗon ayna berniwol
2Samuel11:17 Yimɓe berniwol ngurti
2Samuel11:18 Yo'ab neldi Daawuda kubar haɓre fuu.
2Samuel11:19 O umri nelaaɗo: “To a timmini anndingo laamiiɗo kubar haɓre fuu
2Samuel11:20 teema o tikkan
2Samuel11:21 Moy mbari Abimelek ɓii Yerub-Ba'al? Naa debbo gonɗo dow mahol sakkini hayre namarde dow maako
2Samuel11:22 Nelaaɗo yehi
2Samuel11:23 O wi'i: “Konne'en ɓurdi min semmbe
2Samuel11:24 Haa ton wonɓe dow mahol piɗi yimɓe ma. Yimɓe amin woɗɓe maayi. Suka ma Uriya Hetiijo boo maayi.”
2Samuel11:25 Daawuda jaabi nelaaɗo: “Ndaa nii mbi'ata Yo'ab: Taa haala ka ɓille. Hannde kam kaafahi mbaran oo
2Samuel11:26 Nde debbo Uriya nani gorum maayi
2Samuel11:27 Nde o sudditi
2Samuel12:1 Jawmiraawo neli annabi Natan haa Daawuda. Natan yehi haa laamiiɗo
2Samuel12:2 Diskuɗo mari dammooji e na'i ɗuuɗɗi masin.
2Samuel12:3 Ammaa talakaajo walaa koo ɗume
2Samuel12:4 Nyannde feere koɗo wari haa diskuɗo go. Kaŋko o yiɗaa hoo'ugo haa dammooji maako malla haa na'i maako
2Samuel12:5 Tikkere Daawuda saati masin
2Samuel12:6 Sey o hokkita talakaajo baalel man cowi nayi
2Samuel12:7 Natan wi'i Daawuda: “An woni gorko man! Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
2Samuel12:8 Mi hokki ma saare jaagorɗo ma e rewɓe maako fuu. Mi hokki ma laamu dow Isra'iila e Yahuuda. To ɗum he'aayno
2Samuel12:9 Koni a meerɗini umrooje am? Koni kuuwɗa kalluɗum ɗu'um? A mbari Uriya Hetiijo bee kaafahi Ammooni'en
2Samuel12:10 Ngam a waɗi ɗum
2Samuel12:11 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi umminan sarru dow maaɗa diga nder saare ma. Yeeso maaɗa koocanmi rewɓe ma
2Samuel12:12 An kam a waɗi ɗum bee cuuɗiiɗum
2Samuel12:13 Daawuda wi'i Natan: “Mi waɗi aybe haa Jawmiraawo.” Natan jaabi mo: “Jawmiraawo yaafi aybe ma
2Samuel12:14 Ammaa ngam a yawi Jawmiraawo masin bee aybe ma
2Samuel12:15 Nden Natan hooti saare mum. Jawmiraawo nyawni ɓiŋngel ngel debbo Uriya danyani Daawuda
2Samuel12:16 Daawuda suumi
2Samuel12:17 Saraaki'en maako ngari ngam haa ɓe ummina mo
2Samuel12:18 Ɓaawo nyalɗe joweeɗiɗi ɓiŋngel maayi. Ɓe kuli anndingo ɗum Daawuda
2Samuel12:19 Nde Daawuda yi'i ɓe ɗon cofndotira
2Samuel12:20 Nden Daawuda ummi e lesdi
2Samuel12:21 Saraaki'en maako mbi'i mo: “Min paamaay ko mbaɗɗa. Saa'i ɓiŋngel ɗonno yeeɗa tawon
2Samuel12:22 O wi'i ɓe: “Saa'i ngel ɗon yeeɗi tawon
2Samuel12:23 Ammaa jonta ngel maayi. Ngam ɗume cuumotoomi? Kadi mi waawan wartirgo ngel na? Ɗum min hawtoyta bee maagel
2Samuel12:24 Daawuda yehi haa Bat-Seeba debbo muuɗum
2Samuel12:25 O anndini ɗum Daawuda bee hunnduko annabi Natan. Natan inndi ngel Yedidiya
2Samuel12:26 Yo'ab tokki haɓugo bee Rabba
2Samuel12:27 o neli nelaaɓe haa Daawuda
2Samuel12:28 Jonta war bee Isra'iila'en luttuɓe fuu
2Samuel12:29 Daawuda mooɓti yimɓe fuu
2Samuel12:30 O hooci woronnde wonnde dow hoore lawru Ammooni'en. Teddeeŋga maare waɗi baakin kilo cappanɗe tati (30). Hayre marnde saman ɗuuɗɗo ɗon haa maare. Daawuda waɗi nde dow hoore mum. O wurtini keɓal konu ɗuuɗŋgal masin diga berniwol man.
2Samuel12:31 O wurtini boo yimɓe wonɓe nder maagol. O dooli ɓe huuwugo bee ceekruɗe e tufirɗe njamndi e pe'irɗe njamndi
2Samuel13:1 Ɓaawoɗon ndaa ko waɗi: Absalom ɓii Daawuda woodi deerɗiraawo debbo ŋarniiɗo
2Samuel13:2 Yiide maajum sakli mo
2Samuel13:3 Ammaa Amnon woodi soobaajo
2Samuel13:4 O wi'i Amnon: “Yerima
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu wi'i mo: “Waala dow be'itte ma bana a nyawɗo. To baaba ma wari laarugo ma
2Samuel13:6 Amnon waɗi hoore muuɗum bana o nyawɗo
2Samuel13:7 Daawuda neli haa Tamar
2Samuel13:8 Tamar yehi
2Samuel13:9 Nden Tamar hoo'i feho
2Samuel13:10 Nden o wi'i Tamar: “Waddanam tamseeje haa ɗo haa nder suudu
2Samuel13:11 Nde o ɗon lii'ano mo ɗe
2Samuel13:12 Ammaa Tamar jaabi mo: “Naa non
2Samuel13:13 Toy njahanmi to a toski yam? An boo a laatoto bana baɗɗo zunuuba nder Isra'iila. Wolwu bee laamiiɗo
2Samuel13:14 Ammaa Amnon sali nanango mo
2Samuel13:15 Nden Amnon wanyi mo
2Samuel13:16 Tamar jaabi mo: “Naa non
2Samuel13:17 O ewni suka maako
2Samuel13:18 Suka waɗi ko o umri. Tamar ɗonno ɓorni irin suddaare nde juuɗe
2Samuel13:19 O seeki nde
2Samuel13:20 Nde Absalom
2Samuel13:21 Nde Daawuda nani haala maajum
2Samuel13:22 Ammaa Absalom wanyi Amnon ngam o toski deerɗiiko debbo. O sali koo wolwididgo bee maako.
2Samuel13:23 Duuɓi ɗiɗi ɓaawoɗon
2Samuel13:24 Nden o yehi haa laamiiɗo
2Samuel13:25 Ammaa laamiiɗo jaabi mo: “Naa non
2Samuel13:26 Nden Absalom wi'i: “To an a warataa
2Samuel13:27 Ammaa Absalom ɓilli mo haa laamiiɗo acci Amnon e ɓiɓɓe muuɗum woɗɓe fuu njahda bee maako.
2Samuel13:28 Nden Absalom umri sukaaɓe muuɗum: “Kakkile
2Samuel13:29 Sukaaɓe Absalom ɗowtani umroore man
2Samuel13:30 Diga ɓe ɗon haa laawol tawon
2Samuel13:31 Laamiiɗo ummi
2Samuel13:32 Ammaa Yonadabu ɓii Sime'a deerɗiraawo Daawuda wi'i: “Taa num ɓe mbari ɓiɓɓe ma fuu
2Samuel13:33 Taa jawmam laamiiɗo numa ɓiɓɓe muuɗum fuu maayi
2Samuel13:34 Nden Absalom doggi. Wakkati maajum aynoowo ɓaŋgti gite
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu wi'i Daawuda: “Ɗum ɓiɓɓe ma
2Samuel13:36 Nde o timmini wolwugo ɗum
2Samuel13:37 Daawuda woyi ɓiyum Amnon nyalɗe ɗuuɗɗe. Ammaa Absalom doggi
2Samuel13:38 
2Samuel13:39 Nde ɓernde Daawuda de'iti dow maayde Amnon
2Samuel14:1 Yo'ab ɓii Seruyatu anndi laamiiɗo yenwi ɓiyum Absalom.
2Samuel14:2 Ngam maajum o neli haa Teko'a
2Samuel14:3 Nden yah haa laamiiɗo
2Samuel14:4 Debbo Teko'aajo yehi haa laamiiɗo. O tuggi koppi
2Samuel14:5 Laamiiɗo ƴami mo: “Ko waɗi ma?” O jaabi: “Mi jurumɗo
2Samuel14:6 Mi woodino ɓiɓɓe worɓe ɗiɗo. Nyannde feere ɓe njokkiri haa ngesa. Walaa goɗɗo ton haa o sennda ɓe
2Samuel14:7 Jonta boo banndiraaɓe amin fuu ɗon ɓillammi haa mi wurtinana ɓe ɓiyam geeto. Ɓe ngiɗi mbarugo mo ngam o mbari deerɗiiko. Ɓe ngiɗi halkugo donoowo oo boo. Bana nii ɓe kalkan tammunde am ragareere
2Samuel14:8 Laamiiɗo wi'i mo: “Hootu saare ma
2Samuel14:9 Debbo wi'i: “Barkaama
2Samuel14:10 Laamiiɗo jaabi: “To goɗɗo tokkake ma bee haala
2Samuel14:11 Ammaa debbo wi'i mo: “Huna bee innde Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa ngam taa baatoowo ɓesda asar
2Samuel14:12 Debbo wi'i: “Accu korɗo ma ɓesda wolwango ma wolde woore
2Samuel14:13 Debbo wi'i: “Ngam ɗume a nufi aybewol irin ngo'ol dow yimɓe Allah? A duŋanaaki gudinaaɗo warta diga nokkuure nde o dogguno e mum. Bee bolle ma a do'iri hoore ma kiita.
2Samuel14:14 Enen fuu en maayan fakat. En ɗon nanndi bee ndiyam ndufaaɗam haa lesdi
2Samuel14:15 Ndaa
2Samuel14:16 Teema o nanan
2Samuel14:17 Mi tammi wolde maaɗa de'itintam
2Samuel14:18 Laamiiɗo wi'i debbo: “Haa mi ƴame huunde woore
2Samuel14:19 O ƴami: “Yo'ab yerɓi ma wolwugo bana nii na?” Debbo jaabi: “Fakat bana a geeto barkaama
2Samuel14:20 O ɗaɓɓi haa o waylita haala man bee hakkiilo. Ammaa an a mari hikma bana malaa'ikaajo Allah
2Samuel14:21 Nden laamiiɗo wi'i Yo'ab: “Booɗɗum
2Samuel14:22 Yo'ab tuggi koppi
2Samuel14:23 Nden o ummi
2Samuel14:24 Ammaa laamiiɗo wi'i: “Sey o hoota saare maako. Min kam mi yiɗaa o yi'ammi.” Ngam maajum Absalom yehi saare mum
2Samuel14:25 Nder lesdi Isra'iila fuu walaa gorko maŋgteteeɗo ngam daliila ŋarol mum bana Absalom. Diga hoore maako haa kosɗe maako o walaa batte.
2Samuel14:26 Haa timmoode hitaande fuu
2Samuel14:27 Absalom woodi ɓiɓɓe worɓe tato e ɓiɗɗo debbo gooto ŋarniiɗo
2Samuel14:28 O jooɗi haa Urusaliima duuɓi ɗiɗi
2Samuel14:29 O neli ewnaago Yo'ab ngam haa o wolwana laamiiɗo
2Samuel14:30 Ngam maajum Absalom wi'i yimɓe mum: “Ngesa Yo'ab ɗon heddi bee ngesa am. O woodi sa'iiruuri ton. Njehe
2Samuel14:31 Law Yo'ab wari haa suudu Absalom. O ƴami mo: “Koni yimɓe ma nguli ngesa am?”
2Samuel14:32 Absalom jaabi mo: “Ngam mi ewni ma
2Samuel14:33 Yo'ab yehi haa laamiiɗo
2Samuel15:1 Ɓaawo man Absalom heɓani hoore mum moota pucci e yimɓe cappanɗe njowo doggooɓe yeeso maako bee kosɗe.
2Samuel15:2 Nde weeti fuu o ummo fajiri cub
2Samuel15:3 nden kam o wi'a mo: “Haala ma laaɓi
2Samuel15:4 Nden Absalom ɓesda wi'ugo: “Kay! To mi laatake kiitoowo nder lesdi ndi'i
2Samuel15:5 To goɗɗo ɓaditake mo ngam tuggugo koppi yeeso maako
2Samuel15:6 Bana nii o waarani Isra'iila'en warɓe haa laamiiɗo ngam waɗaneego kiita fuu. Fewjere nde'e waylitani mo ɓerɗe yimɓe.
2Samuel15:7 Ɓaawo duuɓi cappanɗe nayi Absalom wi'i laamiiɗo: “Accu mi yaha Heburuun
2Samuel15:8 Ngam saa'i mi ɗonno jooɗi haa Gesur nder lesdi Siriya
2Samuel15:9 Laamiiɗo wi'i mo: “Yah jam!” Nden Absalom yehi haa Heburuun.
2Samuel15:10 Ammaa o neli nelaaɓe haa le'i Isra'iila fuu
2Samuel15:11 Worɓe Urusaliima ewnaaɓe teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo njahdi bee Absalom. Ammaa ɓe anndaano anniya maako sam.
2Samuel15:12 Nden Absalom neli haa Gilo ngam ewnoyaago Ahitofel
2Samuel15:13 Goɗɗo wari haa Daawuda
2Samuel15:14 Daawuda wi'i saraaki'en wonduɓe bee muuɗum haa Urusaliima fuu: “Umme
2Samuel15:15 Saraaki'en maako mbi'i mo: “Min taaskani waɗugo ko mbi'ɗa fuu
2Samuel15:16 Laamiiɗo wurti berniwol
2Samuel15:17 Nde laamiiɗo e yimɓe mum ngurti berniwol
2Samuel15:18 Yimɓe Daawuda fuu ɗon caalo yeeso maako
2Samuel15:19 Laamiiɗo wi'i Ittay
2Samuel15:20 Neeɓaay a wari haa amin
2Samuel15:21 Ammaa Ittay wi'i laamiiɗo: “Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto
2Samuel15:22 Daawuda wi'i mo: “Booɗɗum
2Samuel15:23 Yimɓe Urusaliima mboyi bee hoolo maŋngo
2Samuel15:24 Cadok
2Samuel15:25 Laamiiɗo wi'i Cadok: “Lornu sundukru Allah nder berniwol. To Jawmiraawo yerdake yam
2Samuel15:26 Ammaa to o yerdaaki yam
2Samuel15:27 Laamiiɗo ɓesdi wi'ugo Cadok: “A faami na? Lorta nder berniwol bee jam
2Samuel15:28 Ndaa
2Samuel15:29 Cadok e Abiyatar lorni sundukru Allah haa Urusaliima
2Samuel15:30 Ammaa Daawuda wa'i dow Hooseere Jaytunje. O ɗon yaha bilaa paɗe
2Samuel15:31 Goɗɗo wi'i Daawuda: “Ahitofel hawtani Absalom e waɗooɓe tuurtol.” Daawuda tori
2Samuel15:32 Nde Daawuda yotti dow hooseere haa yimɓe cujidanta Allah
2Samuel15:33 Daawuda wi'i mo: “To a yahdi bee am
2Samuel15:34 Ammaa to a jooɗake nder berniwol
2Samuel15:35 Cadok e Abiyatar
2Samuel15:36 Ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe Ahimaas e Yonatan ɗon ngondi bee maɓɓe
2Samuel15:37 Ngam maajum Husay
2Samuel16:1 Nde Daawuda saali yeereere hooseere
2Samuel16:2 Laamiiɗo ƴami Siba: “Ko mbaɗata bee kuuje ɗe'e?” Siba jaabi: “Ndaa
2Samuel16:3 Laamiiɗo ƴami: “Toy Mefiboset
2Samuel16:4 Laamiiɗo wi'i Siba: “To non kam
2Samuel16:5 Nde Daawuda yotti Bahuriima
2Samuel16:6 o ɗon fiɗa mo bee kaa'e
2Samuel16:7 Ndaa nii o hooldi: “Dillu ɗo
2Samuel16:8 Jonta Jawmiraawo hiitoto aybe ma dow saare Sawulu. Ƴiiƴam mbaraaɓe fuu waran dow hoore ma. Laamu ngu njaɓtuɗa haa juŋngo Sawulu
2Samuel16:9 Abisay ɓii Seruyatu wi'i laamiiɗo: “Koni rawaandu waatndu ndu'u huɗete
2Samuel16:10 Ammaa laamiiɗo wi'i: “Kadi ɗum haala mooɗon na
2Samuel16:11 Nden o wi'i Abisay e sukaaɓe maako fuu: “On anndi ɓiɗɗo am mo ndanymi ɗum
2Samuel16:12 Sey mi munyana kuudi maako jonta. Teema Jawmiraawo laaran ɓillaare am
2Samuel16:13 Daawuda e yimɓe mum tokkitini jahaaŋgal muuɗum'en
2Samuel16:14 Wakkati laamiiɗo e yimɓe mum fuu njotti waadiwol Urdun
2Samuel16:15 Absalom e Isra'iila'en tokkiiɓe mo fuu nasti Urusaliima. Ahitofel boo ɗon wondi bee maɓɓe.
2Samuel16:16 Husay Arkiijo
2Samuel16:17 Absalom ƴami mo: “E noy amaana ma bee soobaajo ma Daawuda? Ko waɗi a yahdaay bee maako?”
2Samuel16:18 Husay jaabi: “Aa'a
2Samuel16:19 Moy mi huuwanta kadi? Naa a ɓiɗɗo Daawuda na? Bana mi huuwrani baaba ma
2Samuel16:20 Absalom wi'i Ahitofel: “Dawranam. Ko mbaɗeten jonta?”
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofel jaabi mo: “Baaba ma acci sulaaɓe mum ngam aynugo saare. Hoo'u ɓe
2Samuel16:22 Ɓe ndarni laymaaru ngam Absalom dow soorowol nder laamorde. Absalom waaldi bee sulaaɓe baaba muuɗum yeeso Isra'iila'en fuu.
2Samuel16:23 Nder nyalɗe maajum
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofel wi'i Absalom: “Accu mi suɓa worɓe ujine sappo e ɗiɗo (12.000)
2Samuel17:2 Sey mi ukkano mo saa'i o comɗo
2Samuel17:3 Nden mi waddane yimɓe maako fuu. Ɓe ngaran haa maaɗa
2Samuel17:4 Sawari man fottani Absalom e ndotti'en Isra'iila fuu.
2Samuel17:5 Ammaa Absalom wi'i: “Ewne boo Husay Arkiijo
2Samuel17:6 Nde Husay wari haa maako
2Samuel17:7 Husay jaabi mo: “Jonta kam sawari Ahitofel wooɗaay.
2Samuel17:8 A anndi baaba ma
2Samuel17:9 Fakat o ɗon nyukki nder lowol feere malla haa nokkuure woɗnde. To o ukkanake ma
2Samuel17:10 Nden koo moy
2Samuel17:11 Ngam maajum ndaa sawari am: Mooɓtu Isra'iila'en fuu haa maaɗa
2Samuel17:12 En ukkanto mo bana saawawre solirta dow lesdi. Kaŋko e wonduɓe bee maako haa ɓe ngoni fuu
2Samuel17:13 To o doggi
2Samuel17:14 Absalom e Isra'iila'en fuu mbi'i: “Fakat
2Samuel17:15 Ɓaawo maajum Husay wi'i Cadok e Abiyatar
2Samuel17:16 Jonta kam
2Samuel17:17 Yonatan e Ahimaas ɗon ndari haa En-Rogel yaasi berniwol Urusaliima
2Samuel17:18 Ammaa nyannde maajum derkeejo feere yi'i ɓe
2Samuel17:19 Debbo maako hoo'i limce
2Samuel17:20 Sukaaɓe Absalom ngari haa saare man
2Samuel17:21 Nde ɓe ndilli
2Samuel17:22 Daawuda e yimɓe mum eeri maayo Urdun. Hiddeko weeta
2Samuel17:23 Nde Ahitofel yi'i Absalom yiɗaa tokkaago sawari maako
2Samuel17:24 Daawuda yotti Mahanayim
2Samuel17:25 Absalom waɗi Amasa mawɗo honooɓe mbattudi Yo'ab. Amasa woni ɓii goɗɗo Isra'iilaajo mo innde mum Itira. Abigayel
2Samuel17:26 Absalom e yimɓe mum Isra'iila'en caŋngini nder lesdi Gile'at.
2Samuel17:27 Nde Daawuda yotti Mahanayim
2Samuel17:28 ngaddani ɓe be'itte e taasaaje e payanɗe loope e alkamaari e sa'iiruuri e kuroori e gabbe ca'aaɗe e nyebbe e irin nyebbe feere
2Samuel17:29 e njumri bee kettuŋgol e leeɓol e dammooji. Ɓe ngaddani ɓe ɗum haa ɓe nyaama ngam ɓe numno weelo e ɗomka e comri torri Daawuda e yimɓe mum daliila jahaaŋgal muuɗum'en nder ladde.
2Samuel18:1 Daawuda limti jama'aare mum fuu
2Samuel18:2 Nden o hawti ɓe fuu nder geɓe mawɗe tati
2Samuel18:3 Ammaa ɓe mbi'i mo: “Aa'a
2Samuel18:4 Laamiiɗo wi'i: “Booɗɗum
2Samuel18:5 O umri Yo'ab e Abisay e Ittay: “Ngam daliila am kakkilane Absalom sukaajo oo.” Yimɓe fuu nani ko Daawuda umri ardiiɓe ɓe'e.
2Samuel18:6 Yimɓe Daawuda ngurti yaasi. Ɓe kaɓi bee Isra'iila'en nder laynde Efrayim.
2Samuel18:7 Ɓe njaali ɓe jaalorgal maŋngal
2Samuel18:8 Haɓre saŋkiti nder lesdi man fuu. Laynde mbari yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe
2Samuel18:9 Absalom fototiri bee yimɓe Daawuda
2Samuel18:10 Gooto nder yiiɓe ɗum
2Samuel18:11 Yo'ab wi'i mo: “Asee
2Samuel18:12 Ammaa gorko oo jaabi Yo'ab: “Koo to a limani yam ceede cardi ujineere haa newre am
2Samuel18:13 Fakat to mi ɗowtanaakino umroore laamiiɗo
2Samuel18:14 Yo'ab wi'i: “Kayya
2Samuel18:15 Sukaaɓe Yo'ab sappo
2Samuel18:16 Ɓaawo maajum Yo'ab fuufi luwal ngam haa o naŋgta yimɓe maako. Ɓe acci taasnugo Isra'iila'en.
2Samuel18:17 Ɓe koo'i ɓanndu Absalom
2Samuel18:18 Saa'i Absalom ɗonno yeeɗi tawon
2Samuel18:19 Ahimaas wi'i Yo'ab: “Accu mi yaawɗo
2Samuel18:20 Ammaa Yo'ab jaabi mo: “An a yahrantaa mo kubar hannde. Sey a yahra ngol nyannde feere
2Samuel18:21 Yo'ab umri Kusiijo
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaas fuɗɗiti
2Samuel18:23 Ahimaas jaabi: “Bee non fuu mi yahan.” Yo'ab wi'i mo: “Yah.” Ahimaas dilli
2Samuel18:24 Daawuda ɗon jooɗi haa nastirde berniwol Goɗɗo aynoowo wa'i dow soorowol dammugal haa dow mahol taariiŋgol berniwol. Nde o ɗon laara
2Samuel18:25 O anndini ɗum laamiiɗo. Laamiiɗo wi'i: “To ɗum gooto tan
2Samuel18:26 aynoowo yi'i goɗɗo feere boo ɗon wara bee pargal. O yecci ɗum doogariijo haa dammugal. Laamiiɗo wi'i: “Kaŋko boo o ɗon wadda kubaruwol booɗŋgol.”
2Samuel18:27 Aynoowo wi'i: “Mi ɗon yi'a arano ɗon yaawɗo bana Ahimaas.” Laamiiɗo wi'i: “Kaŋko woni goɗɗo booɗɗo. O ɗon warda bee kubaruwol ceynoowol.”
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaas wookani laamiiɗo: “Jam koo ɗume!” Nden o tuggi koppi
2Samuel18:29 Laamiiɗo ƴami mo: “E Absalom sukaajo oo
2Samuel18:30 Laamiiɗo wi'i mo: “Dara ɗo kommbi am.” O waɗi non.
2Samuel18:31 Kusiijo boo wari wi'i: “Mi waddi kubaruwol ceynoowol
2Samuel18:32 Laamiiɗo ƴami mo: “E noy Absalom sukaajo oo? O jamo na?” Kusiijo jaabi: “Konne'en ma e tuurtanɓe ma fuu
2Samuel19:1 Laamiiɗo diwtori ngam naaworla ɓernde mum. O wa'i dow soorowol gonŋgol dow dammugal wuro bee bojji: “Ayye ɓiŋngel am
2Samuel19:2 Yo'ab nani kubar: “Laamiiɗo ɗon woya Absalom bee gonɗi ɗuuɗɗi.”
2Samuel19:3 Nde yimɓe nani haala maajum
2Samuel19:4 Ɓe nasti berniwol ɓe jeeɗiiɓe
2Samuel19:5 Laamiiɗo ɗon jooɗi ton
2Samuel19:6 Yo'ab nasti haa laamiiɗo woni
2Samuel19:7 Ammaa a ɗon wanya yiɗɓe ma
2Samuel19:8 Umma
2Samuel19:9 Laamiiɗo ummi
2Samuel19:10 Koo toy nder Isra'iila yimɓe puɗɗi felindirgo. Ɓe ɗon mbi'a: “Laamiiɗo hisni en juuɗe Filisti'en e konne'en meeɗen woɗɓe fuu. Jonta boo o doggi yeeso Absalom
2Samuel19:11 Absalom mo moytuɗen
2Samuel19:12 Laamiiɗo Daawuda nani ko wolwa nder Isra'iila. Ngam maajum o neldi kubar haa Cadok e Abiyatar
2Samuel19:13 Naa on banndiraaɓe maako nder lenyol gootol na? Ko waɗi on ɗon cakito hoorugo mo?
2Samuel19:14 Mbi'e Amasa boo bee innde am: An woni banndiraawo am. Yeeso ɗo an laatoto haa foroy mawɗo honooɓe am mbattudi Yo'ab. Allah hiito yam bee caatal to mi gooŋɗinaay wolde am nde'e.”
2Samuel19:15 Bana nii Daawuda wartiri ɓerɗe yimɓe Yahuuda fuu haa muuɗum. Ɓe neldi kubar haa maako
2Samuel19:16 O ummi
2Samuel19:17 Sim'i ɓii Gera
2Samuel19:18 Yimɓe Benyamin ujineere ɗon ngondi bee maako. Siba
2Samuel19:19 Ɓe ngaddi koommbowal ngam haa ɓe eerna saare laamiiɗo
2Samuel19:20 wi'i: “Taa siftor aybewol ngol mbaɗmi dow maaɗa nyalaade nde ngurtiiɗa Urusaliima
2Samuel19:21 Mi anndi mi waɗi hakke. Ngam maajum ngarmi hannde
2Samuel19:22 Abisay ɓii Seruyatu wi'i: “Sim'i he'i mbareego
2Samuel19:23 Ammaa Daawuda wi'i: “Kadi ɗum haala mooɗon na
2Samuel19:24 Nden o wi'i Sim'i: “Mi hunanake ma a maayataa.”
2Samuel19:25 Mefiboset taaniraawo Sawulu boo wari jaɓɓaago laamiiɗo. Diga laamiiɗo dilluno haa o warti jam
2Samuel19:26 Nde o wari haa Urusaliima haa laamiiɗo
2Samuel19:27 O jaabi: “Barkaama
2Samuel19:28 
2Samuel19:29 Yimɓe saare baaba am fuu ke'i mbareego dow umroore ma
2Samuel19:30 Laamiiɗo wi'i: “Ɗum he'i
2Samuel19:31 Mefiboset wi'i laamiiɗo: “Accu Siba hoo'a ɗum fuu. An a warti jam
2Samuel19:32 Barjillay warno diga Rogeliima nder lesdi Gile'at
2Samuel19:33 Barjillay naywi masin
2Samuel19:34 Laamiiɗo wi'i mo: “Yahdu bee am haa Urusaliima
2Samuel19:35 Ammaa Barjillay jaabi: “Luttanaay yam balɗe ɗuuɗɗe
2Samuel19:36 Mi woodi duuɓi cappanɗe joweetati jonta
2Samuel19:37 Ko mi huuwani ma fuu
2Samuel19:38 Jonta kam accu mi hoota
2Samuel19:39 Laamiiɗo wi'i: “Booɗɗum
2Samuel19:40 Yimɓe Daawuda fuu eeri maayo
2Samuel19:41 Laamiiɗo yehi haa Gilgal
2Samuel19:42 Nden Isra'iila'en luttuɓe ngari haa laamiiɗo. Ɓe ƴami: “Koni banndiraaɓe amin yimɓe Yahuuda kooci ma
2Samuel19:43 Yimɓe Yahuuda njaabi: “Na laamiiɗo o goɗɗo lenyol amin! Ngam ɗume on mbaɗata haala? Kadi kaŋko wurni min na? Woodi dokkal o hokki min na?”

2Samuel20:1 Woodino goɗɗo lenyol Benyamin haa Gilgal. Innde maako Seba ɓii Bikiri
2Samuel20:2 Isra'iila'en fuu ndilli
2Samuel20:3 Nde Daawuda warti saare mum haa Urusaliima
2Samuel20:4 Ɓaawo man laamiiɗo wi'i Amasa: “Mooɓtanam worɓe Yahuuda fuu
2Samuel20:5 Nde wakkati man saali
2Samuel20:6 laamiiɗo wi'i Abisay: “Seba ɓii Bikiri ɗon nastina en nder saklere ko ɓuri Absalom. Hoo'u honooɓe am
2Samuel20:7 Abisay hoo'i yimɓe Yo'ab e honooɓe Daawuda suusɓe fuu
2Samuel20:8 Nde ɓe njotti hayre mawnde haa Gibiyon
2Samuel20:9 Yo'ab hoofni Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Amasa hakkilanaay laɓi haa juŋngo Yo'ab woɗŋgo. Yo'ab yuwi mo haa reedu
2Samuel20:11 Gooto nder sukaaɓe Yo'ab ɗon dari kommbi ɓanndu Amasa
2Samuel20:12 Ammaa Amasa ɗon waali nder ƴiiƴam mum haa caka laawol. Nde sukaajo go yi'i caalotooɗo fuu ɗon daro
2Samuel20:13 Ɓaawoɗon yimɓe fuu tokki Yo'ab ngam taasnugo Seba.
2Samuel20:14 Seba ta'i caka le'i Isra'iila fuu haa yotti Abel-Bayti-Ma'aka e Berim fuu. Kamɓe ɓe mooɓi haa maako
2Samuel20:15 Yo'ab e jama'aare mum ngari
2Samuel20:16 Woodino debbo marɗo hikma nder berniwol man. Kaŋko o hooli dow mahol
2Samuel20:17 Nde Yo'ab wari
2Samuel20:18 Debbo wi'i: “Woodi geccawol ɓooymawol bi'anŋgol: Ɓe ɗaɓɓitane sawari haa Abel. Bana nii saklere maɓɓe timman.
2Samuel20:19 Min fuu min yimɓe marɓe hoolaare e salaaman nder Isra'iila
2Samuel20:20 Yo'ab jaabi: “Aa'a
2Samuel20:21 Naa kanjum ngiɗmi. Ammaa woodi goɗɗo iwɗo kooseeje Efrayim nder berniwol mooɗon
2Samuel20:22 O lori haa yimɓe maako nder berniwol
2Samuel20:23 Yo'ab woni mawɗo honooɓe Isra'iila fuu. Benaya ɓii Yoyada woni hooreejo Kereti'en e Peleti'en.
2Samuel20:24 Adoniram woni kaliifaajo kuuɗe dooleeje. Yusafat ɓii Ahiluudi woni hunndukoojo laamiiɗo.
2Samuel20:25 Sewa woni binndoowo. Cadok e Abiyatar ngoni liman'en.
2Samuel20:26 Iira Ya'iriijo kaŋko boo o limanjo Daawuda.

2Samuel21:2 Gibiyoni'en ngonaay nder Isra'iila'en
2Samuel21:3 
2Samuel21:4 Gibiyoni'en njaabi: “Min njaɓataa cardi malla kaŋŋeeri haa saare Sawulu ngam kefergal aybe man. Min ngiɗaa mbarugo goɗɗo feere nder Isra'iila boo.” Daawuda wi'i: “Mi waɗan ko on mbi'i yam fuu!”
2Samuel21:5 Ɓe njaabi: “Sawulu muuyino halkugo min
2Samuel21:6 Ngam maajum hokku min worɓe njoweeɗiɗo nder ɓiɓɓe maako
2Samuel21:7 Ngam daliila hunayeere nde Daawuda bee soobaajo mum Yonatan ɓii Sawulu kuni yeeso Jawmiraawo
2Samuel21:8 O naŋngi Armooni e Mefiboset
2Samuel21:9 Kamɓe laamiiɗo hokki ɓe haa juuɗe Gibiyoni'en. Ɓe ɓili ɓe dow hooseere maɓɓe yeeso Jawmiraawo. Bana nii worɓe njoweeɗiɗo ɓe'e maaydi nyalaade woore. Ɗum wakkati puɗɗuki codol sa'iiruuri.
2Samuel21:10 Rispa
2Samuel21:11 Nde Daawuda nani ko Rispa ɓii Ayya debbo waɗani mbaraaɓe
2Samuel21:12 o neli hoo'ugo i'e Sawulu e ɓiyum Yonatan haa Yaabes nder lesdi Gile'at. Nde Filisti'en njaalino Sawulu dow hooseere Gilbo'a
2Samuel21:13 Diga ton Daawuda hoo'i i'e maɓɓe
2Samuel21:14 O yahri ɗe haa Ceela nder lesdi Benyamin
2Samuel21:15 Filisti'en puɗɗiti haɓre bee Isra'iila'en. Daawuda e yimɓe mum njippi
2Samuel21:16 Yisbi-Benob
2Samuel21:17 Ammaa Abisay ɓii Seruyatu walli Daawuda

2Samuel21:19 Fahin haɓre fuɗɗiti haa Gob
2Samuel21:20 Fahin haɓre fuɗɗiti haa Gaat. Woodino ton goɗɗo juutɗo
2Samuel21:21 O janci Isra'iila
2Samuel21:22 Ɓiɓɓe nayo ɓe'e ɓe danygol Rafa haa Gaat. Daawuda e yimɓe mum mbari ɓe.
2Samuel22:1 Nyalaade nde Jawmiraawo hisni Daawuda diga juuɗe konne'en muuɗum e juuɗe Sawulu fuu
2Samuel22:2 Yaa Jawmiraawo
2Samuel22:3 Yaa Allah
2Samuel22:4 Mi tori Jawmiraawo
2Samuel22:5 Waade taari yam bee ƴuuge maare
2Samuel22:6 Mi nasti tuuforli joonde maayɓe
2Samuel22:7 Nder ɓillaare am toriimi Jawmiraawo
2Samuel22:8 Nden lesdi dimmbi
2Samuel22:9 Cuurɗe ngurti haa kine maako
2Samuel22:10 O wuuri asama
2Samuel22:11 O wa'i dow keruba
2Samuel22:12 O suuɗi nder nyiɓre
2Samuel22:13 Bana ƴulɓe yiite
2Samuel22:14 Jawmiraawo telɓi haa asama bana felmaaŋgo
2Samuel22:15 O fiɗi kuri maako
2Samuel22:16 Ndiyam mbeela seeki
2Samuel22:17 Diga dow Jawmiraawo forti juŋngo mum
2Samuel22:18 O hisni yam juuɗe konneejo am cemmbiɗɗo e juuɗe wanyɓe yam fuu
2Samuel22:19 Nyalaade sarru am ɓe ukkani yam
2Samuel22:20 O wurtini yam ɓillaare
2Samuel22:21 Jawmiraawo warji yam fodde adilaaku am
2Samuel22:22 Ngam mi tokki laabi Jawmiraawo
2Samuel22:23 Mi ɗowtani kiitaaji maako fuu
2Samuel22:24 Mi walaa aybe yeeso maako
2Samuel22:25 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo warji yam fodde adilaaku am
2Samuel22:26 Yaa Jawmiraawo
2Samuel22:27 a laaɓɗo haa laaɓɓe
2Samuel22:28 A hisnan ummaatoore toskaande. A ɗon laara mawnitiiɓe
2Samuel22:29 Jawmiraawo woni pittirla am
2Samuel22:30 Bee ballal ma mi ukkanto mooɓre konne'en
2Samuel22:31 Laawol Allah
2Samuel22:32 Jawmiraawo meeɗen feere muuɗum woni Allah
2Samuel22:33 Allah woni hisrude am semmbiɗnde
2Samuel22:34 O laatini kosɗe am bana ɗe lelwa
2Samuel22:35 O ekkitini juuɗe am haɓre
2Samuel22:36 Yaa Jawmiraawo
2Samuel22:37 A yaajini babal am
2Samuel22:38 Mi taasni konne'en am
2Samuel22:39 Mi nattini ɓe
2Samuel22:40 A hokki yam semmbe ngam waɗugo haɓre
2Samuel22:41 A lorni konne'en am ɓaawo
2Samuel22:42 Ɓe tefi ballal
2Samuel22:43 Mi ɗiggini ɓe
2Samuel22:44 A hisni yam jokkirli ummaatoore am. A waɗi yam laamiiɗo ummaatooje
2Samuel22:45 Jananɓe tefi fottango yam bee bolle belɗe
2Samuel22:46 Jananɓe tampi
2Samuel22:47 Jawmiraawo o geeto! Yettoore laatano tapaare hisrude am! Maŋgtoore laatano Allah Kisnoowo yam cemmbiɗɗo!
2Samuel22:48 Allah o baatoowo konne'en am
2Samuel22:49 o kisnoowo yam diga juuɗe wanywanyɓe yam. A dokkoowo yam jaalorgal dow konne'en am

2Samuel23:1 Ndaa bolle Daawuda ragareeje: Nane
2Samuel23:2 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo ɗon dow am
2Samuel23:3 Allah aynoowo Isra'iila wi'i: “Laamaniiɗo yimɓe mum bee adilaaku
2Samuel23:4 o ɗon nanndi bee jayŋgol naaŋge fajiri
2Samuel23:5 Allah woonani danygol am
2Samuel23:6 Ammaa halluɓe ɗon nanndi bee gi'e gudinaaɗe ɗe goɗɗo meemataa bee juŋngo mum.
2Samuel23:7 Bee njamndi malla kalasal labbo o eftata ɗe
2Samuel23:8 Ndaa honooɓe Daawuda hoore'en suusɓe: Yoseb-ba-sebet Hakmoniijo woni hooreejo honooɓe tato. O bi'eteeɗo boo Adino Eskiijo. O dimmbi labbo maako dow konne'en teemeɗɗe njoweetato (800)
2Samuel23:9 Ɓaawo maako Eli'azaaru ɓii Doodo Ahohiijo. O gooto nder suusɓe tato. Kaŋko o wonduno bee Daawuda nde ɓe ndarti Filisti'en mooɓtiiɓe ngam haɓre
2Samuel23:10 Kaŋko o ɗon dari
2Samuel23:11 Tataɓo maɓɓe
2Samuel23:12 ammaa kaŋko o dari caka tayre ngesa man

2Samuel23:14 Saa'i maajum Daawuda ɗonno haa hisrude
2Samuel23:15 Daawuda yeli
2Samuel23:16 Suusɓe tato man nasti caka saŋngeere Filisti'en
2Samuel23:17 O wi'i: “Jawmiraawo

2Samuel23:19 O laati hooreejo suusɓe tato
2Samuel23:20 Benaya ɓii Yoyada mo Kabseyel
2Samuel23:21 O mbari boo Misraajo cemmbiɗɗo
2Samuel23:22 Kanjum Benaya ɓii Yoyada waɗi. O heɓi innde bana suusɓe tato go.
2Samuel23:23 O ɓurdi suusɓe cappanɗe tato go tedduŋgal
2Samuel23:24 Asa'el deerɗiraawo Yo'ab ɗon nder semmbiɗɓe cappanɗe tato go. Ndaa ɓe'e ngondi bee maako: Elhanan ɓii Doodo mo Baytilaama

2Samuel24:3 Ammaa Yo'ab wi'i laamiiɗo: “Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa ɓesda yimɓe muuɗum bana ɓe ɗuuɗiri nii cowi teemerre
2Samuel24:4 Bee non fuu laamiiɗo dooli Yo'ab e hoore'en jama'aare honooɓe ɓe ɗowtano umroore muuɗum. Ɓe ngurti saare laamiiɗo
2Samuel24:5 Ɓe eeri maayo Urdun

2Samuel24:7 Ɓe njehi haa berniwol Tirus e berniiji Hewi'en e Kanaani'en fuu
2Samuel24:8 Ɓe ngaanci nder lesdi fuu
2Samuel24:9 Yo'ab anndini laamiiɗo limgal yimɓe: Worɓe waawɓe konu nder Isra'iila ujine teemeɗɗe njoweetato (800.000) e worɓe ujine teemeɗɗe njowo (500.000) nder Yahuuda.

2Samuel24:15 Jawmiraawo neldi nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu nder Isra'iila
2Samuel24:16 Nde malaa'ikaajo forti juŋngo mum dow Urusaliima ngam haa o halka ngol boo
2Samuel24:17 Nde Daawuda yi'i malaa'ikaajo kalkanɗo yimɓe

2Samuel24:19 Daawuda waɗi ko Jawmiraawo umruno mo bee hunnduko Gada.

1Kings1:1 Laamiiɗo Daawuda ndottidi masin
1Kings1:2 Nden jaggiiɓe maako mbi'i mo: “Barkaama min njahan min ɗaɓɓitane paanyo debbo mo meeɗaay anndugo gorko sam ngam o huuwane e o hakkilane
1Kings1:3 Ɓe ɗaɓɓiti paanyo debbo ŋarniiɗo nder maral Isra'iila fuu. Ɓe tawi Abisag Sunemiijo
1Kings1:4 Paanyo debbo oo
1Kings1:5 Adoniya ɓii Daawuda mo Haggit danyani mo mawniti
1Kings1:6 Baaba maako meeɗaay felugo mo sam
1Kings1:7 Adoniya sarwotiri bee Yo'ab ɓii Seruyatu e Abiyatar limanjo. Ɓe mballi Adoniya
1Kings1:8 Ammaa Cadok limanjo e Benaya ɓii Yoyada e annabi Natan e Sim'i e Ree'i e yimɓe Daawuda suusɓe
1Kings1:9 Nyannde feere Adoniya taaski juulde mawnde
1Kings1:10 Ammaa o ewnaaki annabi Natan e Benaya e aynooɓe e laamiiɗo Suleymaanu
1Kings1:11 Nden Natan wi'i Bat-Seeba
1Kings1:12 Kadi nan ko mi sarwoto ma
1Kings1:13 Yah
1Kings1:14 Natan ɓesdi wi'ugo: Diga a ɗon wolida bee laamiiɗo tawon

1Kings1:16 Bat-Seeba turi
1Kings1:17 O jaabi mo: “Yaa jawmam
1Kings1:18 Ammaa ndaa jonta
