2Kings23:1 Laamiiɗo ewni ndotti'en Urusaliima e Yahuuda fuu haa muuɗum.
2Kings23:2 Nden o yahdi bee ummaatoore Urusaliima e Yahuuda e liman'en e annabi'en e yimɓe fuu
2Kings23:3 Nden laamiiɗo dari haa daŋraŋgal haykaliiru
2Kings23:4 Ɓaawo maajum laamiiɗo umri Hilkiyya hooreejo liman'en e liman'en woɗɓe e aynooɓe dammuɗe haykaliiru
2Kings23:5 O nattini liman'en labbi
2Kings23:6 O wurtini suura Asera diga haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Kings23:7 O yibbini cuuɗi nder haykaliiru
2Kings23:8 Nden o umri liman'en wonɓe nder berniiji Yahuuda fuu
2Kings23:9 Liman'en nokkuuje towɗe man mba'aakino haa hirsirde Jawmiraawo haa Urusaliima
2Kings23:10 E boo o soɓni nokkuure wi'eteende Tofet nder waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom
2Kings23:11 O itti suuraaji pucci ɗi laamiiɓe Yahuuda ndarnino ngam rewugo naaŋge haa nastirde haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Kings23:12 O yibbini kirsirɗe ɗe laamiiɓe Yahuuda mbaɗno dow soorowol Akas haa dow
2Kings23:13 O soɓni nokkuuje towɗe ɗe Suleymaanu waɗno haa fombina hooseere halkere. Nokkuuje ɗe'e tiitotiri bee Urusaliima. Suleymaanu
2Kings23:14 O fusi daŋraŋge labbi
2Kings23:15 O yibbini boo hirsirde wonnde haa Baytila e nokkuure townde nde Yerobo'am ɓii Nebat
2Kings23:16 Nde Yusiya wayliti
2Kings23:17 Nden laamiiɗo ƴami: “Maandorde ndeye ngi'anmi to?” Yimɓe berniwol njaabi mo: “Ɗum yenaande goɗɗo Allah
2Kings23:18 Yusiya wi'i: “Acce yenaande nde'e! Taa goɗɗo meema i'e maako!” Bana nii ɓe kisniri i'e maako bee i'e annabiijo garnooɗo diga Samariya.
2Kings23:19 Yusiya yibbini boo cuuɗi nokkuuje towɗe
2Kings23:20 O hirsi liman'en wulooɓe kirseteeɗi dow kirsirɗe ɗe'e fuu
2Kings23:21 Laamiiɗo Yusiya umri yimɓe fuu: “Mbaɗane Allah Jawmiraawo mon juulde Paska
2Kings23:22 Juulde Paska bana nde'e meeɗaay waɗeego
2Kings23:23 Ammaa nder nduuɓu laamu laamiiɗo Yusiya sappo e njoweetataɓu ɓe mbaɗani Jawmiraawo juulde Paska haa Urusaliima.
2Kings23:24 Yusiya ɗowtani boo umrooje binndaaɗe nder Deftere Tawreeta nde Hilkiyya hooreejo liman'en heɓti nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. O riiwi sarwooɓe maayɓe e laarooɓe
2Kings23:25 Walaa laamiiɗo bana maako aarti mo
2Kings23:26 Ammaa Jawmiraawo accaay tikkere muuɗum saatunde. Nde saati dow Yahuuda ngam ko Manassa waɗno fuu ngam tikkingo Jawmiraawo.
2Kings23:27 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi riiwan Yahuuda yeeso am boo bana ndiiwrumi Isra'iila. Mi wudinan Urusaliima
2Kings23:28 Luttuɗum haala Yusiya e kuuɗe mum fuu
2Kings23:29 Nder zamanu laamu maako
2Kings23:30 Nde o maayi
2Kings23:31 Yo'ahas woodi duuɓi noogas e tati
2Kings23:32 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo
2Kings23:33 Firawna Neko haɓɓi mo haa Ribla
2Kings23:34 O hokki Eliyakim ɓii Yusiya laamu haa pellel baaba maako. O sannji innde maako bee Yooyakim. Ammaa o hoo'i Yo'ahas
2Kings23:35 Yooyakim dooli yimɓe lesdi yoɓugo ceede fodde umroore Firawna. O hoo'i cardi e kaŋŋeeri haa yimɓe lesdi
2Kings23:36 Yooyakim woodi duuɓi noogas e jowi saa'i o laamo. O laami haa Urusaliima duuɓi sappo e go'o. Innde daada maako
2Kings23:37 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo
2Kings24:1 Nder zamanu maako
2Kings24:2 Nden Jawmiraawo neli mooɓe hippooɓe: Kaldiya'en e Siriya'en e Mo'abi'en e Ammooni'en dow Yooyakim
2Kings24:3 Ɗum laati fodde wolde Jawmiraawo dow yimɓe Yahuuda ngam wudingo ɓe daayiiɗum bee maako
2Kings24:4 o mbari yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɓe ngoodaa aybe
2Kings24:5 Luttuɗum haala Yooyakim e kuuɗe mum fuu
2Kings24:6 Nde Yooyakim maayi
2Kings24:7 Ammaa laamiiɗo Misra meetaay wurtaago lesdi muuɗum
2Kings24:8 Yooyakin woodi duuɓi sappo e joweetati
2Kings24:9 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo
2Kings24:10 Saa'i maajum honooɓe Nabukodonosor laamiiɗo Baabila ngari haa Urusaliima
2Kings24:11 Nabukodonosor laamiiɗo Baabila bee hoore mum wari hippi berniwol
2Kings24:12 Nden Yooyakin laamiiɗo Yahuuda
2Kings24:13 Nabukodonosor hooci ndesaaje haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e ndesaaje saare laamu fuu. O sampiti kuuje kaŋŋeeri ɗe Suleymaanu laamiiɗo Isra'iila waɗno nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo ngam dewal
2Kings24:14 O dahi yimɓe ummaatoore Urusaliima
2Kings24:15 O dahi laamiiɗo Yooyakin e daada muuɗum e rewɓe muuɗum e saraaki'en muuɗum e semmbiɗɓe muuɗum diga Urusaliima e mawɓe Yahuuda e
2Kings24:16 mawɓe ujine njoweeɗiɗo e marɓe sanaa'aaji e kila'en ujineere
2Kings24:17 O laamini Mattaniya
2Kings24:18 Sedekiya woodi duuɓi noogas e go'o
2Kings24:19 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo
2Kings24:20 Ɗum waɗi non ngam Jawmiraawo tikkani Urusaliima e Yahuuda haa o riiwi ɓe daayiiɗum bee maako. Sedekiya boo tuurtani laamiiɗo Baabila.
2Kings25:1 Nder nduuɓu laamu Sedekiya njoweenayaɓu
2Kings25:2 Ɓe jooɗi ton haa wargo nduuɓu laamiiɗo Sedekiya sappo e go'oowu.
2Kings25:3 Nyannde joweenayaɓre nder lewru nayaɓru
2Kings25:4 Kaldiya'en cumpiti mahol berniwol. Nde jemma waɗi
2Kings25:5 Ammaa jama'aaje konu Kaldiya'en taasni mo
2Kings25:6 Kaldiya'en naŋngi mo
2Kings25:7 Ɓe kirsidi ɓiɓɓe Sedekiya yeeso maako. Nden ɓe ɗoofi mo gite
2Kings25:8 Nder nduuɓu laamu Nabukodonosor laamiiɗo Baabila sappo e njoweenayaɓu
2Kings25:9 O wuli haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e saare laamu e cuuɗi Urusaliima e cuuɗi mawɓe fuu.
2Kings25:10 Jama'aare konu Kaldiya'en fuu e hooreejo aynooɓe ngibbini mahi taariiɗi Urusaliima.
2Kings25:11 Ɓaawo maajum Nebuzaradan dahi luttuɓe nder berniwol e hawtanɓe laamiiɗo Baabila e ummaatoore luttunde fuu.
2Kings25:12 Ammaa o acci laafuɓe woɗɓe nder lesdi haa ɓe laato remooɓe inabooje e gese.
2Kings25:13 Kaldiya'en pusi daŋraŋge njamndi mboɗeeri haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e jo'inirɗe e loonde njamndi mboɗeeri wonnde haa daldal haykaliiru. Ɓe njahri kuuje ɗe njamndi mboɗeeri ɗe'e haa Baabila.
2Kings25:14 Ɓe kooci boo kuuje ɗe njamndi mboɗeeri kuuwtinirteeɗe ngam dewal
2Kings25:15 Hooreejo aynooɓe hooci kuuje kaŋŋeeri e cardi corok bana pehe uurorɗe e taasaaje fuu.
2Kings25:16 Daŋraŋge ɗiɗi e loonde go e jo'inirɗe ɗe Suleymaanu waɗno ngam haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Kings25:17 Towirka daŋraŋgal gootal waɗi meetir joweenayi. Hoore njamndi mboɗeeri ɗonno dow maagal. Towirka hoore man waɗi meetir gootel bee reeta. Bamaaɗum e rummaanooje taari hoore man
2Kings25:18 Nden hooreejo aynooɓe hoo'i Seraya
2Kings25:19 Nder berniwol o hoo'i gooto nder saraaki'en maako kaliifaajo honooɓe e worɓe njowo caka ɓurɓe ɓadaago bee laamiiɗo
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradan
2Kings25:21 Laamiiɗo Baabila umri ɓoccugo ɓe e mbarugo ɓe haa Ribla nder lesdi Hamat. Ton ɓe maayi. Bana nii yimɓe Yahuuda ndahira diga lesdi muuɗum'en.
2Kings25:22 Nabukodonosor laamiiɗo Baabila ardini Gedaliya ɓii Ahikam taaniraawo Safan dow luttuɓe haa lesdi Yahuuda.
2Kings25:23 Nde hoore'en jama'aaje konu e yimɓe maɓɓe nani laamiiɗo Baabila ardini Gedaliya
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya hunani ɓe wi'i: “Taa kule jaggiiɓe Kaldiya'en ɓe'e. Njooɗe nder lesdi
2Kings25:25 Ammaa nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru hitaande man
2Kings25:26 Nden ummaatoore e hoore'en jama'aaje konu fuu ndoggi
2Kings25:27 Nder nduuɓu cappanɗe tati e njoweeɗiɗaɓu ɓaawo daheeki Yooyakin laamiiɗo Yahuuda diga Urusaliima
2Kings25:28 O mo'ani mo
2Kings25:29 Ɓe ɓorti Yooyakin limce fursina. O nyaami haa taabal laamiiɗo balɗe maako fuu.
2Kings25:30 Nguure maako
1Chronicles1:1 Ndaa danygol Aadamu: Aadamu danyi Setu
1Chronicles1:2 Enos danyi Keenan
1Chronicles1:3 Yarat danyi Henok
1Chronicles1:4 Nuuhu danyi Sem
1Chronicles1:5 Ɓiɓɓe Yafet ngoni: Gomer e Magog e Maday e Yawan e Tubal e Meesek e Tiras.
1Chronicles1:6 Ɓiɓɓe Gomer ngoni: Askanas e Difat e Togarma.
1Chronicles1:7 Ɓiɓɓe Yawan ngoni: Elisa e Tarsis e Kitti'en e Rodani'en.
1Chronicles1:8 Ɓiɓɓe Haamu ngoni: Kus e Misrayim e Put e Kanaana.
1Chronicles1:9 Ɓiɓɓe Kus ngoni: Seba e Hawila e Sabeta e Rama e Sabitka. Ɓiɓɓe Rama ngoni: Saba e Dedan.
1Chronicles1:10 Kus danyi Nimrudu
1Chronicles1:11 Misrayim danyi Luudi'en e Anami'en e Lehabi'en e Naftu'en
1Chronicles1:12 e Paturusi'en e Kaslu'en e Kaftori'en. Filisti'en iwi haa Kaslu'en.
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaana danyi Sidon
1Chronicles1:14 e Yebusi'en e Amoori'en e Girgasi'en
1Chronicles1:15 e Hewi'en e Arki'en e Siniti'en
1Chronicles1:16 e Arwidi'en e Cemariti'en e Hamati'en.
1Chronicles1:17 Ɓiɓɓe Sem ngoni: Elam e Assuru e Arfasada e Luuda e Aram e Uus e Hul e Geter e Meesek.
1Chronicles1:18 Arfasada danyi Selaha
1Chronicles1:19 Eber danyanaama ɓiɓɓe worɓe ɗiɗo. Innde gooto
1Chronicles1:20 Yoktan danyi Almodat e Selef e Hacamawet e Yeraha
1Chronicles1:21 e Hadoram e Usal e Dikila
1Chronicles1:22 e Ebal e Abimayel e Seba
1Chronicles1:23 e Ofir e Hawila e Yobaba. Fuu maɓɓe ɓe ɓiɓɓe Yoktan.
1Chronicles1:24 Ndaa danygol Sem: Sem danyi Arfasada
1Chronicles1:25 Eber
1Chronicles1:26 Saruku danyi Nahor
1Chronicles1:27 Abraama
1Chronicles1:28 Ɓiɓɓe Ibrahiima ngoni: Isiyaaku e Isma'iilu.
1Chronicles1:29 Ndaa danygol maɓɓe: Nebayot woni afo Isma'iilu. Nden o danyi Keedar e Aɗɓe'el e Mipsaam
1Chronicles1:30 e Misma e Duuma e Massa e Hadat e Tema
1Chronicles1:31 e Yetuuru e Naafis e Keduma. Kamɓe ngoni ɓiɓɓe Isma'iilu.
1Chronicles1:32 Ɓe'e ngoni ɓiɓɓe Ketura
1Chronicles1:33 Ɓiɓɓe Mediyan boo: Efa e Efer e Hanok e Abida e Elda'a. Ɓe fuu ɓe yimɓe danygol Ketura.
1Chronicles1:34 Ibrahiima danyi Isiyaaku. Ɓe'e ngoni ɓiɓɓe Isiyaaku: Isuwa e Isra'iila.
1Chronicles1:35 Ɓiɓɓe Isuwa boo: Elifas e Re'uwel e Ye'us e Ya'alaam e Koora.
1Chronicles1:36 Ɓiɓɓe Elifas boo: Teman e Omar e Cefi e Gatam e Kenas e Timna e Amalek.
1Chronicles1:37 Ɓiɓɓe Re'uwel boo: Nahat e Zeraha e Samma e Misa.
1Chronicles1:38 Ɓe'e ngoni ɓiɓɓe Se'ir: Lotan e Sobal e Cibe'on e Ana e Dison e Ecer e Disan.
1Chronicles1:39 Ɓiɓɓe Lotan boo: Hori e Homam. Timna
1Chronicles1:40 Ɓiɓɓe Sobal boo: Aliyan e Manahat e Ebal e Cefi e Onam. Ɓiɓɓe Cibe'on boo: Aya e Ana.
1Chronicles1:41 Ɓii Ana boo
1Chronicles1:42 Ɓiɓɓe Ezer boo: Bilhan e Za'awan e Ya'akan. Ɓiɓɓe Disan boo: Uus e Aaran.
1Chronicles1:43 Ndaa inɗe laamiiɓe Edoomi'en diga Isra'iila walaano laamiiɗo: Bela ɓii Be'or
1Chronicles1:44 Bela maayi. Yobaba ɓii Zeraha mo Bosra laami haa pellel maako.
1Chronicles1:45 Yobaba maayi. Husam mo lesdi Temani'en laami haa pellel maako.
1Chronicles1:46 Husam maayi. Hadat ɓii Bedaada
1Chronicles1:47 Hadat maayi. Samla mo Masreeka laami haa pellel maako.
1Chronicles1:48 Samla maayi. Sawulu mo Rehobot-dow-Maayo laami haa pellel maako.
1Chronicles1:49 Sawulu maayi. Ba'al-Hanan ɓii Akbor laami haa pellel maako.
1Chronicles1:50 Ba'al-Hanan maayi. Hadat laami haa pellel maako. Innde wuro maako
1Chronicles1:51 Hadat maayi. Ndaa yimɓe ɓe ardani lesdi Edoom: Timna
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama e Ela e Pinon
1Chronicles1:53 Kenas e Teman e Mipsaara
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiyel e Iram. Kamɓe ngoni ardiiɓe Edoom.
1Chronicles2:1 Ɓiɓɓe Isra'iila ngoni: Ruben
1Chronicles2:2 Dan
1Chronicles2:3 Ɓiɓɓe Yahuuda tato ɓe ɓii Su'a Kanaaniijo danyani mo ngoni: Eer e Oonan e Sela. Ammaa Eer
1Chronicles2:4 Ammaa Tamar
1Chronicles2:5 Ɓiɓɓe Peres ngoni: Hesruunu e Hamul.
1Chronicles2:6 Ɓiɓɓe Zeraha ngoni: Zimiri e Etan e Heman e Kalkol e Dara
1Chronicles2:7 Ɓii Karmi boo
1Chronicles2:8 Ɓii Etan boo
1Chronicles2:9 Ɓiɓɓe Hesruunu danyanaaɓe mo ngoni: Yerahameel e Ram e Kelubay.
1Chronicles2:10 Ram danyi Amminadabu
1Chronicles2:11 Nahasunu danyi Salma
1Chronicles2:12 Bo'es danyi Obet
1Chronicles2:13 Yessa danyi Eliyabu
1Chronicles2:14 e Netaneyel nayaɓo e Radday njowaɓo
1Chronicles2:15 e Ocem njoweegoojo e Daawuda njoweeɗiɗaɓo.
1Chronicles2:16 Deerɗiraaɓe maɓɓe rewɓe ngoni: Seruyatu e Abigayil. Ɓiɓɓe Seruyatu boo: Abisay e Yo'ab e Asa'el
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayil danyi Amasa. Baaba Amasa
1Chronicles2:18 Kaaleb ɓii Hesruunu danydi bee debbo muuɗum Ajuba e bee Yeri'ot. Ajuba danyi Yeser e Soobaba e Ardon.
1Chronicles2:19 Nden Ajuba maayi. Kaaleb ɓaŋgi Efratu
1Chronicles2:20 Huuru danyi Uuri
1Chronicles2:21 Ɓaawo maajum Hesruunu waaldi bee ɓii Makir debbo
1Chronicles2:22 Seguba danyi Ya'ir mo mari gure noogas e tati nder lesdi Gile'at.
1Chronicles2:23 Ammaa yimɓe Gesur e Siriya kooci gure Ya'ir haa maɓɓe
1Chronicles2:24 Ɓaawo maayde Hesruunu haa Kaaleb-Efratu
1Chronicles2:25 Ɓiɓɓe Yerahameel
1Chronicles2:26 Yerahameel woodi boo debbo feere
1Chronicles2:27 Ɓiɓɓe Ram
1Chronicles2:28 Ɓiɓɓe Onam boo: Sammay e Yada. Ɓiɓɓe Sammay boo: Nadab e Abisuru.
1Chronicles2:29 Innde debbo Abisuru
1Chronicles2:30 Ɓiɓɓe Nadab ngoni: Selet e Appayim. Selet maayi
1Chronicles2:31 Ɓii Appayim boo
1Chronicles2:32 Ɓiɓɓe Yada
1Chronicles2:33 Ɓiɓɓe Yonatan boo: Pelet e Zaaza. Kamɓe ngoni ɓiɓɓe Yerahameel.
1Chronicles2:34 Ammaa Seesan walaa ɓiɓɓe worɓe
1Chronicles2:35 Seesan te'ni maccuɗo muuɗum Yarha ɓiyum debbo. Kaŋko o danyani mo Attay.
1Chronicles2:36 Attay danyi Natan
1Chronicles2:37 Zabada danyi Efilal
1Chronicles2:38 Obet danyi Yeehu
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya danyi Heeles
1Chronicles2:40 El'aasa danyi Sismay
1Chronicles2:41 Sallum danyi Yekamiya
1Chronicles2:42 Ɓiɓɓe Kaaleb
1Chronicles2:43 Ɓiɓɓe Heburuun boo: Koora e Tappuha e Rekem e Sema.
1Chronicles2:44 Sema danyi Raham
1Chronicles2:45 Ɓii Sammay boo
1Chronicles2:46 Efa
1Chronicles2:47 Ɓiɓɓe Yaaday ngoni: Regem e Yotam e Geesan e Pelet e Efa e Sa'af.
1Chronicles2:48 Ma'aka
1Chronicles2:49 Nden o danyi Sa'af
1Chronicles2:50 Kamɓe ngoni ɓiɓɓe Kaaleb. Ɓiɓɓe Huuru
1Chronicles2:51 e Salma
1Chronicles2:52 Ɓiɓɓe Sobal
1Chronicles2:53 Ci'e nder danygol Kiriyat-Ye'arim ngoni: Yitiri'en e Puti'en e Sumati'en e Misirayi'en. Haa maɓɓe yimɓe Cor'a e Estawol iwi.
1Chronicles2:54 Ɓiɓɓe Salma ngoni: Baytilaama e Netofa'en e Atarot-Bayti-Yo'ab e reeta Manooha'en e Cor'i'en.
1Chronicles2:55 Geɓe nder lenyol winndooɓe jooɗiiɓe haa Ya'bes ngoni: Tirati'en e Simati'en e Sukati'en. Kamɓe ngoni Keni'en iwɓe haa Hammat
1Chronicles3:1 Ndaa ɓe'e ngoni ɓiɓɓe Daawuda danyaaɓe haa Heburuun: Amnon
1Chronicles3:2 Absalom
1Chronicles3:3 Sefatiya
1Chronicles3:4 Ɓiɓɓe Daawuda njoweego ɓe'e fuu ndanyaama haa Heburuun. Daawuda laami ton duuɓi joweeɗiɗi e lebbi joweego. Nden o laami haa Urusaliima duuɓi cappanɗe tati e tati.
1Chronicles3:5 Ndaa ɓe o danyi haa Urusaliima: Sim'a e Sobaba e Natan e Suleymaanu. Daada maɓɓe
1Chronicles3:6 Daawuda danyi boo Yibehar e Eliisama e Elifelet
1Chronicles3:7 e Nooga e Nefek e Yafiya
1Chronicles3:8 e Eliisama e Eliyada e Elifelet
1Chronicles3:9 Ɓe fuu ɓe ɓiɓɓe Daawuda
1Chronicles3:10 Ndaa ɓe'e ngoni danygol Suleymaanu: Suleymaanu danyi Robo'am
1Chronicles3:11 Yusafat danyi Yehoram
1Chronicles3:12 Yo'as danyi Amasiya
1Chronicles3:13 Yotam danyi Akas
1Chronicles3:14 Manassa danyi Amon
1Chronicles3:15 Ɓiɓɓe Yusiya ngoni: Yohanan woni afo maako
1Chronicles3:16 Danygol Yooyakim boo: Yooyakim danyi Yekoniya e Yekoniya danyi Sedekiya.
1Chronicles3:17 Ɓiɓɓe Yekoniya kaɓɓaaɗo boo ngoni: Salatiyel
1Chronicles3:18 e Malkiram e Pedaya e Senaccar e Yekamiya e Hosama e Nedabiya.
1Chronicles3:19 Ɓiɓɓe Pedaya boo: Zorobaabila e Sim'i. Ɓiɓɓe Zorobaabila boo: Mesullam e Hananiya. Selomit woni deerɗiraawo maɓɓe debbo.
1Chronicles3:20 O danyi boo Hasuba e Oheel e Berekiya e Hasadiya e Yusab-Hesed
1Chronicles3:21 Danygol Hananiya boo: Pelatiya e Yesa'ya e ɓiɓɓe Refaya e Arnan e Obadiya e Sekaniya.
1Chronicles3:22 Ɓii Sekaniya boo
1Chronicles3:23 Ɓiɓɓe Ne'ariya boo: Eliyo'enay e Hezekiya e Azrikam
1Chronicles3:24 Ɓiɓɓe Eliyo'enay boo: Hodawiya e Eliyasib e Pelaya e Akkubu e Yohanan e Delaya e Anani
1Chronicles4:1 Ndaa danygol Yahuuda: Yahuuda danyi Peres
1Chronicles4:2 Re'aya ɓii Sobal danyi Yahat
1Chronicles4:3 Ndaa danygol baaba Etam: Yisre'el e Yisma e Yidbas. Innde deerɗiraawo maɓɓe debbo boo
1Chronicles4:4 Nden Penuwel
1Chronicles4:5 Askuru
1Chronicles4:6 Na'ara danyani mo Ahujam e Hefer e Temni e Ahastaari. Kamɓe ngoni ɓiɓɓe Na'ara.
1Chronicles4:7 Ɓiɓɓe Heleya boo: Seret e Cohar e Etanan.
1Chronicles4:8 Koos danyi Anuba e Sobeba. Ci'e nder danygol Aharhel ɓii Harum boo iwi haa maako.
1Chronicles4:9 Ya'bes heɓi tedduŋgal ɓuri deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum. Daada maako hokki mo innde Ya'bes ngam bee bone o danyiri mo.
1Chronicles4:10 Ya'bes tori Allah Isra'iila
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub
1Chronicles4:12 Eston danyi Bayti-Rafa e Paseha e Tehinna
1Chronicles4:13 Ɓiɓɓe Kenas ngoni: Otniyel e Seraya. Ɓiɓɓe Otniyel boo: Hatat e Me'onotay.
1Chronicles4:14 Me'onotay danyi Ofra. Seraya danyi Yo'ab
1Chronicles4:15 Ɓiɓɓe Kaaleb ɓii Yefunna ngoni: Iiru e Ela e Na'am. Ɓii Ela boo
1Chronicles4:16 Ɓiɓɓe Yehallelel ngoni: Zif e Zifa e Tiriya e Asariilu.
1Chronicles4:17 Ɓiɓɓe Ejira ngoni: Yeter e Meret e Efer e Yalon. Meret ɓaŋgi Bitiya ɓii Firawna debbo
1Chronicles4:18 
1Chronicles4:19 Ɓiɓɓe debbo Hodiyya
1Chronicles4:20 Ɓiɓɓe Simona ngoni: Amnon e Rimna e Ben-Hanan e Tilon. Ɓiɓɓe Yisi ngoni: Zohet e Ben-Zohet.
1Chronicles4:21 Ɓiɓɓe Sela ɓii Yahuuda ngoni: Eer
1Chronicles4:22 Fahin Yokim e worɓe wuro Kojeba e Yo'as e Saraf
1Chronicles4:23 Kamɓe ɓe mahooɓe payanɗe
1Chronicles4:24 Ɓiɓɓe Simeyon ngoni: Nemuwel e Yamin e Yariba e Zeraha e Sawulu.
1Chronicles4:25 Ɓii Sawulu
1Chronicles4:26 Danygol Misma boo: Misma danyi Hamuwel
1Chronicles4:27 Sim'i woodi ɓiɓɓe worɓe sappo e njoweego e ɓiɓɓe rewɓe njoweego. Ammaa deerɗiraaɓe maako fuu ngalaa ɓiɓɓe ɗuuɗɓe
1Chronicles4:28 Ɓe ɗon njooɗi haa Biirsaba e Molada e Hacar-Su'al.
1Chronicles4:29 Non boo haa Bilha e Esem e Tolat
1Chronicles4:30 haa Betu'iila e Horma e Cikilak
1Chronicles4:31 haa Bayti-Markabot e Hacar-Susim e Bayti-Biri e Saarayim. Kanji ngonno berniiji maɓɓe diga Daawuda laamaaki tawon
1Chronicles4:32 bee gure maɓɓe. Etaam e Ayin e Rimmon e Token e Asan
1Chronicles4:33 bee gure maɓɓe piltuɗe berniiji ɗi'i fuu
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobab e Yamlek e Yoosa ɓii Amasiya
1Chronicles4:35 e Yo'el e Yeehu
1Chronicles4:36 e Eliyo'enay e Yakoba e Yesohaya e Asaya e Adiyel e Yesimiyel e Benaya
1Chronicles4:37 e Ziza ɓii Sifi
1Chronicles4:38 ɓe'e limtaaɓe innde innde laati ardiiɓe ci'e
1Chronicles4:39 Ngam maajum ɓe ndilli nastirde Gedor haa yotti fuunaaŋge waadiwol
1Chronicles4:40 Ɓe keɓi durduɗe booɗɗe
1Chronicles4:41 Limtaaɓe innde innde go ngari nder zamanu Hezekiya
1Chronicles4:42 Woɗɓe nder yimɓe Simeyon
1Chronicles4:43 Ɓe mbari daɗɓe Amaleki'en luttuɓe
1Chronicles5:1 Ruben woni afo baaba muuɗum. Ammaa o huuwi cemtiniiɗum
1Chronicles5:2 Yahuuda laati mawɗo caka deerɗum'en
1Chronicles5:3 Ɓiɓɓe Ruben
1Chronicles5:4 Ndaa danygol Yo'el: Yo'el danyi Sema'ya
1Chronicles5:5 Sim'i danyi Mika
1Chronicles5:6 Ba'al danyi Beera. O hooreejo yimɓe Ruben. Tigilat-Pileser
1Chronicles5:7 Banndiraaɓe maako fodde ci'e maɓɓe mbinndaama e nastinaama nder deftere asli bana ni'i: Ye'iyel woni arano
1Chronicles5:8 e Bela ɓii Azaza ɓii Sema ɓii Yo'el. Kaŋko o jooɗi haa Aro'er haa yotti Nebo e Ba'al-Me'on.
1Chronicles5:9 Heedi fuunaaŋge o jooɗi haa yotti nastirde ladde gaa'e maayo Efratis
1Chronicles5:10 Nder zamanu laamiiɗo Sawulu ɓe mbaɗi konu bee Hagari'en
1Chronicles5:11 Yimɓe Gada njooɗi
1Chronicles5:12 Yo'el arano
1Chronicles5:13 Banndiraaɓe maɓɓe fodde ci'e maɓɓe ngoni: Mika'iilu e Mesullam e Seba e Yoray e Ya'akan e Ziya e Eber
1Chronicles5:14 Ɓe ɓiɓɓe Abihayil ɓii Huuri ɓii Yaroha ɓii Gile'at ɓii Mika'iilu ɓii Yesisay ɓii Yahado ɓii Bus.
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi ɓii Abdiyel ɓii Guni woni baaba saare maɓɓe.
1Chronicles5:16 Kamɓe ɓe njooɗi nder lesɗe Gile'at e Baasan e nder gure maaje
1Chronicles5:17 Ɓe fuu ɓe mbinndaama nder deftere asli nder zamanu Yotam
1Chronicles5:18 Yimɓe Ruben e yimɓe Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa
1Chronicles5:19 Ɓe mbaɗi konu bee Hagari'en e yimɓe Yetuuru e Naafis e Nodaba.
1Chronicles5:20 Nder haɓre ɓe tori Allah
1Chronicles5:21 Ɓe kooci dabbaaji konne'en maɓɓe: Geelooɗi ujine cappanɗe jowi (50.000) e dammooji ujine teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi e cappanɗe jowi (250.000) e bamɗe ujine ɗiɗi (2.000)
1Chronicles5:22 Naawnaaɓe ɗuuɗɓe maayi
1Chronicles5:23 Yimɓe reeta lenyol Manassa njooɗi haa lesdi maajum diga Baasan haa yotti Ba'al-Hermoon e Seniira e hooseere Hermoon
1Chronicles5:24 Ndaa ɓe'e ngoni baaba-ci'e'en maɓɓe: Efer e Yisi e Eliyel e Ajiriyel e Yeremiya e Hodawiya e Yahadiyel
1Chronicles5:25 Yimɓe lenyol Ruben bee Gada e reeta lenyol Manassa ngewi umroore Allah kaakiraaɓe muuɗum'en
1Chronicles5:26 Ngam maajum Allah Isra'iila ummini ɓerɗe Pul e Tigilat-Pileser
1Chronicles5:27 Ɓiɓɓe Lewi ngoni: Gersom e Kahat e Meraari.
1Chronicles5:28 Ɓiɓɓe Kahat boo: Amram e Yicehar e Heburuun e Uzziyel.
1Chronicles5:29 Ɓiɓɓe Amram boo: Haruna e Muusa e Mariyama. Ɓiɓɓe Haruna boo: Nadab e Abihu e Eli'azaaru e Itamar.
1Chronicles5:30 Eli'azaaru danyi Pinehas
1Chronicles5:31 Abisu'a danyi Bukki
1Chronicles5:32 Uzzi danyi Zerahiya
1Chronicles5:33 Merayot danyi Amariya
1Chronicles5:34 Ahitooba danyi Cadok
1Chronicles5:35 Ahimaas danyi Azariya
1Chronicles5:36 Yohanan danyi Azariya mo laati limanjo nder haykaliiru ndu Suleymaanu nyiɓi haa Urusaliima.
1Chronicles5:37 Azariya danyi Amariya
1Chronicles5:38 Ahitooba danyi Cadok
1Chronicles5:39 Sallum danyi Hilkiyya
1Chronicles5:40 Azariya danyi Seraya
1Chronicles5:41 Yocadak dahaama
1Chronicles6:1 Ɓiɓɓe Lewi ngoni: Gersom e Kahat e Meraari.
1Chronicles6:2 Ndaa inɗe ɓiɓɓe Gersom: Libni e Sim'i.
1Chronicles6:3 Ɓiɓɓe Kahat boo: Amram e Yicehar e Heburuun e Uzziyel.
1Chronicles6:4 Ɓiɓɓe Meraari boo: Mahali e Musi. Ndaa ci'e Lewi'en fodde kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe:
1Chronicles6:5 Danygol Gersom: Gersom danyi Libni
1Chronicles6:6 Zimma danyi Yo'aha
1Chronicles6:7 Danygol Kahat boo: Kahat danyi Amminadabu
1Chronicles6:8 Assir danyi Elkaana
1Chronicles6:9 Assir danyi Tahat
1Chronicles6:10 Ɓiɓɓe Elkaana ngoni: Amasay e Ahimot.
1Chronicles6:11 Danygol Ahimot: Ahimot danyi Elkaana
1Chronicles6:12 Nahat danyi Eliyabu
1Chronicles6:13 Ɓiɓɓe Samuyila boo: Yo'el woni afo maako
1Chronicles6:14 Danygol Meraari boo: Meraari danyi Mahali
1Chronicles6:15 Uzza danyi Sim'a
1Chronicles6:16 Ndaa yimɓe ɓe Daawuda darni ngam ɗowugo gimi nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo ɓaawo ɓe njo'ini sundukru alkawal nder maaru.
1Chronicles6:17 Ɓe kuuwi kuugal man yeeso laymaaru fottirde bee yimugo haa saa'i Suleymaanu nyiɓi haykaliiru Jawmiraawo haa Urusaliima. Ɓe kuuwi kuugal maɓɓe fodde umroore nde ɓe umri ɓe.
1Chronicles6:18 Ndaa inɗe dariiɓe ton e ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe: Nder yimɓe Kahat
1Chronicles6:19 ɓii Elkaana
1Chronicles6:20 ɓii Cuuf
1Chronicles6:21 ɓii Elkaana
1Chronicles6:22 ɓii Tahat
1Chronicles6:23 ɓii Yicehar
1Chronicles6:24 Non boo Asaf banndiiko
1Chronicles6:25 ɓii Mika'iilu
1Chronicles6:26 ɓii Etani
1Chronicles6:27 ɓii Etan
1Chronicles6:28 ɓii Yahat
1Chronicles6:29 Nder yimɓe Meraari
1Chronicles6:30 ɓii Hasabiya
1Chronicles6:31 ɓii Amsi
1Chronicles6:32 ɓii Mahali
1Chronicles6:33 Banndiraaɓe maɓɓe Lewi'en kalfinaama kuuɗe fuu haa jooɗorde
1Chronicles6:34 Haruna bee ɓikkoy mum ɗon ngula kirsaaɗi dow hirsirde e uurle dow gulduɗum uurle. Kamɓe ngoni suklaniiɓe kuuje ɓurɗe senaago
1Chronicles6:35 Ndaa danygol Haruna: Haruna danyi Eli'azaaru
1Chronicles6:36 Abisu'a danyi Bukki
1Chronicles6:37 Zerahiya danyi Merayot
1Chronicles6:38 Ahitooba danyi Cadok
1Chronicles6:39 Ndaa no Lewi'en njooɗori fodde beerle maɓɓe nder maral maɓɓe: Ɓiɓɓe Haruna nder danygol Kahat
1Chronicles6:40 Ɓe keɓi berniwol Heburuun nder lesdi Yahuuda bee durduɗe maagol taariiɗe ngol.
1Chronicles6:41 Ammaa gese berniwol maajum bee gure maagol
1Chronicles6:42 Ɓe ndokki ɓiɓɓe Haruna boo berniiji kisruɗi ɗi'i: Heburuun e Libna bee durduɗe maagol e Yattir e Estemo'a bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:43 e Hiles bee durduɗe maagol e Debir bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:44 e Asan bee durduɗe maagol e Bayti-Semes bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:45 Haa lenyol Benyamin boo: Geba bee durduɗe maagol e Alemet bee durduɗe maagol e Anatot bee durduɗe maagol. Berniiji maɓɓe fuu
1Chronicles6:46 Danygol Kahat luttuŋgol heɓi berniiji sappo bee kur'u nder lenyol Efrayim e lenyol Dan e reeta lenyol Manassa.
1Chronicles6:47 Ci'e nder danygol Gersom keɓi berniiji sappo e tati bee kur'u
1Chronicles6:48 Ci'e nder danygol Meraari keɓi berniiji sappo e ɗiɗi bee kur'u
1Chronicles6:49 Bana nii Isra'iila'en ndokkiri Lewi'en berniiji ɗi bee durduɗe maaji.
1Chronicles6:50 Ɓe ta'i ɗum bee kur'u nder lenyol yimɓe Yahuuda e lenyol yimɓe Simeyon e lenyol yimɓe Benyamin
1Chronicles6:51 Ci'e nder danygol Kahat goɗɗe nastini berniiji maral maaje nder lenyol Efrayim.
1Chronicles6:52 Ɓe ndokki ɓe berniiji kisruɗi ɗi'i: Sikem bee durduɗe maagol nder lesdi kooseeje Efrayim e Gezer bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:53 e Yokme'am bee durduɗe maagol e Baytihurun bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:54 e Ayyalon bee durduɗe maagol e Gat-Rimmon bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:55 nder reeta lenyol Manassa boo: Aner bee durduɗe maagol e Bile'am bee durduɗe maagol. Kanji laatani danygol ɓiɓɓe Kahat luttuɓe.
1Chronicles6:56 Danygol Gersom heɓi berniiji ɗi'i nder yimɓe reeta lenyol Manassa: Golan nder Baasan bee durduɗe maagol e Astarot bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:57 Nder lenyol Issakar boo: Keedes bee durduɗe maagol e Daberat bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:58 e Ramot bee durduɗe maagol e Anem bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:59 Nder lenyol Aser boo: Masal bee durduɗe maagol e Abdon bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:60 e Hukok bee durduɗe maagol e Rehob bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:61 Nder lenyol Neftali boo: Keedes nder Galiili bee durduɗe maagol e Hammon bee durduɗe maagol e Kiriyatayim bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:62 Danygol Meraari luttuŋgol heɓi berniiji ɗi'i nder lenyol Zabulon: Rimmono bee durduɗe maagol e Taboora bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:63 Haa gaɗa Urdun
1Chronicles6:64 e Kedemot bee durduɗe maagol e Mefa'at bee durduɗe maagol.
1Chronicles6:65 Nder lenyol Gada boo: Ramot nder Gile'at bee durduɗe maagol e Mahanayim bee durduɗe maagol
1Chronicles6:66 e Hesbon bee durduɗe maagol e Ya'ajer bee durduɗe maagol.

1Chronicles7:3 Ɓii Uzzi

1Chronicles9:1 Bana nii Isra'iila'en fuu mbinndaama fodde gide muuɗum'en nder Deftere Laamiiɓe Isra'iila. Ammaa yimɓe Yahuuda dahaama haa Baabila ngam ɓe ngewi umroore Jawmiraawo.
1Chronicles9:2 Aartuɓe wartugo haa ɓe njooɗo nder maral maɓɓe e nder gure maɓɓe
1Chronicles9:3 Yimɓe Yahuuda e Benyamin e Efrayim e Manassa woɗɓe boo njooɗi haa Urusaliima.
1Chronicles9:4 Nder yimɓe Yahuuda: Utay ɓii Ammihudu ɓii Omiri ɓii Imiri ɓii Baani
1Chronicles9:5 e nder Selani'en boo: Asaya
1Chronicles9:6 Nder ɓiɓɓe Zeraha boo: Ye'uwel e banndiraaɓe maɓɓe teemeɗɗe njoweego e cappanɗe njoweenayo (690).
1Chronicles9:7 Nder yimɓe Benyamin boo: Sallu ɓii Mesullam ɓii Hodawiya ɓii Hassenuwa
1Chronicles9:8 e Yibniya ɓii Yeroham e Ela ɓii Uzzi ɓii Mikiri e Mesullam ɓii Sefatiya ɓii Re'uwel ɓii Yibniya.
1Chronicles9:9 Limgal banndiraaɓe maɓɓe fodde defte asli maɓɓe
1Chronicles9:10 Nder liman'en: Yeda'ya e Yoyaribu e Yakin
1Chronicles9:11 e Azariya ɓii Hilkiyya ɓii Mesullam ɓii Cadok ɓii Merayot ɓii Ahitooba
1Chronicles9:12 Non boo Adaya ɓii Yeroham ɓii Pashuuru ɓii Malkiya e Ma'asay ɓii Adiyel ɓii Yahasera ɓii Mesullam ɓii Mesillemit ɓii Immer
1Chronicles9:13 e banndiraaɓe maɓɓe
1Chronicles9:14 Nder Lewi'en Sema'ya ɓii Hassuba ɓii Azrikam ɓii Hasabiya mo danygol Meraari
1Chronicles9:15 e Bakbakkar e Heeres e Galal e Mattaniya ɓii Mika ɓii Zikiri ɓii Asaf
1Chronicles9:16 e Obadiya ɓii Sema'ya ɓii Galal ɓii Yedutuun e Berekiya ɓii Asa ɓii Elkaana
1Chronicles9:17 Ɓe'e ngoni aynooɓe dammuɗe: Sallum e Akkubu e Talmon e Ahiman e banndiraaɓe maɓɓe. Sallum woni hooreejo maɓɓe.
1Chronicles9:18 Haa wargo hannde ɓe ɗon ayna Dammugal Laamiiɗo haa wakeere suudu fuunaaŋgeere. Kamɓe ngoni aynooɓe dammuɗe saŋngeere Lewi'en.
1Chronicles9:19 Sallum ɓii Koore ɓii Ebiyasaf ɓii Koora e deerɗiraaɓe maako iwɓe haa saare baaba maako
1Chronicles9:20 Ɓooyma Pinehas ɓii Eli'azaaru wonno hooreejo maɓɓe
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya ɓii Meselemiya wonno aynoowo haa dammugal laymaaru fottirde.
1Chronicles9:22 Suɓaaɓe ngam aynugo dammuɗe
1Chronicles9:23 Kamɓe e ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe ndari ngam aynol haa dammuɗe haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
1Chronicles9:24 Aynooɓe dammuɗe go ndari haa alkibilaaji nayi fuu
1Chronicles9:25 Banndiraaɓe maɓɓe wonɓe nder gure boo
1Chronicles9:26 Aynooɓe nayo mawɓe go ɗon kuuwa kuugal muuɗum'en foroy. Lewi'en ayni cigorɗi e ndesaaje haa suudu Allah.
1Chronicles9:27 Koo bee jemma boo ɓe ɗon baŋnge haykaliiru nder taarde fuu
1Chronicles9:28 Lewi'en woɗɓe ɗon ngam aynugo kuuwruɗe. Ɓe limi ɗe
1Chronicles9:29 Woɗɓe fahin ɗon ngam aynugo kuuje goɗɗe e kuuje cenaaɗe fuu e kuroori ɗiggundi e inaboojam e nebbam e uurle uureteeɗe e kuuje uurɗe.
1Chronicles9:30 Ammaa woɗɓe haa ɓiɓɓe liman'en njilli kuuje uurɗe man.
1Chronicles9:31 Matitiya Lewiijo halfinaama kuugal sa'ugo tamseeje. O afo Sallum Kooraajo.
1Chronicles9:32 Woɗɓe haa banndiraaɓe maɓɓe nder yimɓe Kahat kalfinaama kuugal tamseeje jo'inteeɗe
1Chronicles9:33 Ammaa ɗowooɓe gimi
1Chronicles9:34 Kamɓe ngoni baaba-ci'e'en Lewi'en fodde deftere asli maɓɓe. Ɓe njooɗi haa Urusaliima.
1Chronicles9:35 Ye'iyel
1Chronicles9:36 Abdon woni afo maako
1Chronicles9:37 e Gedor e Ahiyo e Zekariya e Mikilot.

1Chronicles11:1 Isra'iila'en fuu mooɓti haa kommbi Daawuda haa Heburuun. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Minin min banndiraaɓe ma nder ummaatoore woore.
1Chronicles11:2 Koo naane
1Chronicles11:3 Ndotti'en Isra'iila fuu ngari haa laamiiɗo haa Heburuun. Daawuda haɓɓi alkawal bee maɓɓe ton yeeso Jawmiraawo. Ɓe moyti Daawuda
1Chronicles11:4 Daawuda e Isra'iila'en fuu njehi haa Urusaliima
1Chronicles11:5 Ɓe mbi'i Daawuda: “A waawataa nyaamugo berniwol amin.” Ammaa Daawuda nyaami berniwol cemmbiɗŋgol dow hooseere Siyona

1Chronicles11:9 Daawuda ɓesdi yeeso yeeso

1Chronicles11:17 Daawuda yeli
1Chronicles11:18 Suusɓe tato man nasti caka saŋngeere Filisti'en

1Chronicles11:20 Abisay deerɗiraawo Yo'ab woni hooreejo suusɓe tato man. O mbari konne'en teemeɗɗe tato bee labbo maako. O heɓi innde caka suusɓe tato

1Chronicles11:24 Kanjum Benaya ɓii Yoyada waɗi. O heɓi innde bana suusɓe tato go.
1Chronicles11:25 O ɓurdi suusɓe cappanɗe tato go tedduŋgal

1Chronicles16:35 Mbi'e: “Hisnu min
1Chronicles16:36 Maŋgtoore e yettoore laatano Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila foroy haa abada. Yimɓe fuu mbi'i: “Aamiina!” Ɓe maŋgti Jawmiraawo.
1Chronicles16:37 Daawuda acci Asaf e banndiraaɓe muuɗum ɓe njooɗo yeeso sundukru alkawal Jawmiraawo ngam huuwugo kuugal maɓɓe foroy
1Chronicles16:38 O acci boo Obet-Edoom e banndiraaɓe muuɗum cappanɗe njoweego e njoweetato. Non boo Obet-Edoom ɓii Yedutuun e Hosa ngam aynugo dammuɗe.
1Chronicles16:39 Ammaa Cadok limanjo e banndiraaɓe muuɗum liman'en
1Chronicles16:40 ngam lii'anaago Jawmiraawo guleteeɗi dow hirsirde
1Chronicles16:41 Heman e Yedutuun e suɓaaɓe woɗɓe
1Chronicles16:42 Heman e Yedutuun ngoodi boo algaytaaji e koŋsiije iidooje e kuuje gimruɗe feere ngam yimango Allah. Ɓiɓɓe Yedutuun ɗon ton ngam aynugo dammugal.
1Chronicles16:43 Nden yimɓe kooti
1Chronicles17:1 Nyannde feere nde Daawuda ɗon jooɗi haa saare mum

1Chronicles17:4 “Yah

1Chronicles17:6 Koo toy njahmi caka Isra'iila'en fuu
1Chronicles17:7 Jonta sey a wi'a jaggiiɗo am Daawuda: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi hoo'i ma haa waalde
1Chronicles17:8 Mi wondi bee ma koo toy njahɗaa fuu
1Chronicles17:9 Mi suɓani yimɓe am Isra'iila'en nokkuure joonde
1Chronicles17:10 Ɗum laati bana nii diga wakkati alkaali'en laamani yimɓe am Isra'iila'en. Mi toskinan konne'en ma fuu. Mi hokkete danygol boo.
1Chronicles17:11 To a maayi
1Chronicles17:12 Kaŋko o nyiɓantam suudu
1Chronicles17:13 Mi laatoto baaba maako
1Chronicles17:14 Mi tabitinan mo nder suudu am e nder laamu am haa foroy
1Chronicles17:15 Natan yecci Daawuda bolle ɗe'e e wahayu oo fuu.
1Chronicles17:16 Nden laamiiɗo Daawuda nasti suudu laymaaru

1Chronicles18:4 Daawuda hooci haa maako mootaaji pucci ujineere (1.000) e wa'iiɓe ujine njoweeɗiɗo (7.000) e honooɓe ujine noogas (20.000). Daawuda soppi korle pucci mootaaji fuu
1Chronicles18:5 Siriya'en ngari diga Damas ngam haa ɓe mballa Hadad'ezer

1Chronicles19:6 Nde Ammooni'en annditi ɓe toonyake Daawuda

1Chronicles25:1 Daawuda e mawɓe honooɓe cuɓi huuwooɓe caka yimɓe Asaf e Heman e Yedutuun
1Chronicles25:2 Nder ɓiɓɓe Asaf: Zakkur e Yusufu e Netaniya e Asareela. Ɓe ɗonno dow ardaaŋgal baaba maɓɓe Asaf mo ɗonno waɗa annabaaku dow ardaaŋgal laamiiɗo.
1Chronicles25:3 Nder saare Yedutuun boo: Ɓiɓɓe maako Gedaliya e Ceri e Esaaya e Hasabiya e Matitiya e Sim'i
1Chronicles25:4 Nder saare Heman boo
1Chronicles25:5 Ɓe fuu ɓe ɓiɓɓe Heman
1Chronicles25:6 Worɓe ɓe'e fuu ngimi bee koŋsiije e garayaaji e moolooji nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. Ɓe ɗonno dow ardaaŋgal baabiraaɓe maɓɓe Asaf e Yedutuun e Heman. Ɓe kuuwi kuugal maɓɓe haa haykaliiru Allah dow ardaaŋgal laamiiɗo.
1Chronicles25:7 Limgal maɓɓe bee banndiraaɓe maɓɓe annduɓe yimango Jawmiraawo fuu waɗi teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo e cappanɗe njoweetato e njoweetato (288).
1Chronicles25:8 Ɓe mbaɗi kur'u ngam kuugal maɓɓe
1Chronicles25:9 Kur'u aranu waŋgini Yusufu ɓii Asaf
1Chronicles25:10 tataɓu boo waŋgini Zakkur e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:11 nayaɓu boo waŋgini Yiciri e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗiraaɓe mum
1Chronicles25:12 njowaɓu boo waŋgini Netaniya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:13 njoweegoowu boo waŋgini Bukkiya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:14 njoweeɗiɗawu boo waŋgini Yesareela e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:15 njoweetataɓu boo waŋgini Esaaya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:16 njoweenayaɓu boo waŋgini Mattaniya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:17 sappoowu boo waŋgini Sim'i e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:18 sappo e ngo'oowu boo waŋgini Azareyel e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:19 sappo e ɗiɗawu boo waŋgini Sabiya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:20 sappo e tataɓu boo waŋgini Subayel e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en
1Chronicles25:21 sappo e nayaɓu boo waŋgini Mattitiya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en

1Chronicles25:23 sappo e njoweegoowu boo waŋgini Hananiya e ɓiɓɓe mum e deerɗum'en

1Chronicles26:1 Ndaa geɓe aynooɓe dammuɗe: Haa Koora'en
1Chronicles26:2 Meselemiya boo woodi ɓiɓɓe ɓe'e: Zekariya woni afo
1Chronicles26:3 Elam njowaɓo
1Chronicles26:4 Obet-Edoom woodi ɓiɓɓe ɓe'e: Sema'ya woni afo
1Chronicles26:5 Ammiyel njoweegoojo
1Chronicles26:6 Ɓiyiiko Sema'ya kaŋko boo o woodi ɓiɓɓe
1Chronicles26:7 Ɓiɓɓe Sema'ya ngoni: Otni e Refayel e Obet e Elzabat. Deerɗiraaɓe maako Elihu e Semakiya
1Chronicles26:8 Worɓe danygol Obet-Edoom fuu
1Chronicles26:9 Meselemiya boo woodi ɓiɓɓe e deerɗiraaɓe
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa mo danygol Meraari boo woodi ɓiɓɓe: Simiri woni arano
1Chronicles26:11 nden Hilkiyya ɗiɗaɓo
1Chronicles26:12 Geɓe ardiiɓe aynooɓe dammuɗe ɓe'e kuuwi bana banndiraaɓe maɓɓe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
1Chronicles26:13 Ɓe mbaɗi kur'u dow famarɓe e mawɓe ngam dammugal koo ngale fuu fodde ci'e muuɗum'en.
1Chronicles26:14 Kur'u ta'ani Selemiya dammugal fuunaaŋge. Nden ɓe mbaɗi kur'u ngam ɓiyiiko Zekariya
1Chronicles26:15 Obet-Edoom heɓi dammugal fombina
1Chronicles26:16 Suppim e Hosa keɓi dammugal hiirnaaŋge
1Chronicles26:17 Nyalaade fuu woodi Lewi'en njoweego haa fuunaaŋge
1Chronicles26:18 Haa babal heedi hiirnaaŋge woodi nayo haa laawol
1Chronicles26:19 Ɗe'e ngoni geɓe aynooɓe dammuɗe haa danygol Koora e danygol Meraari.
1Chronicles26:20 Ahiya gooto nder Lewi'en halfitinaama kuugal aynugo ndesaaje haa haykaliiru Allah e ndesaaje kuuje cenaaɗe:
1Chronicles26:21 Ɓiɓɓe La'adan mo danygol Gersom
1Chronicles26:22 e ɓiɓɓe mum e Zetam e Yo'el deerɗum. Ɓe kalfitinaama kuugal aynugo ndesaaje haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
1Chronicles26:23 Nder yimɓe Amram e Yicehar e Heburuun e Uzziyel boo:
1Chronicles26:24 Sebuwel ɓii Gersom ɓii Muusa woni hooreejo aynooɓe ndesaaje.
1Chronicles26:25 Banndiraaɓe maako boo: Eli'azaaru danyi Rehabiya
1Chronicles26:26 Selomit oo e deerɗiraaɓe mum ayni ndesaaje kuuje cenaaɗe
1Chronicles26:27 Ɓe ngurtinno ɗum nder keɓal konuuji ngam mo'itingo haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.

1Chronicles26:29 Kenaniya e ɓiɓɓe mum
1Chronicles26:30 Hasabiya e deerɗum'en

1Chronicles26:32 Yeriya e banndiraaɓe mum
1Chronicles27:1 Ndaa huuwanooɓe laamiiɗo Isra'iila'en fodde limle muuɗum'en
1Chronicles27:2 Yasobo'am ɓii Zabdiyel woni hooreejo yeɓre arannde ngam lewru aranndu. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:3 O iwi haa danygol Peres
1Chronicles27:4 Dooday Ahohiijo woni hooreejo yeɓre ngam lewru ɗiɗaɓru. Mikilot woni ɗowoowo nder yeɓre Dooday. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:5 Benaya ɓii Yoyada limanjo
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya oo woni gooto nder suusɓe cappanɗe tato
1Chronicles27:7 Asa'el deerɗiraawo Yo'ab woni nayaɓo ngam lewru nayaɓru. Ɓaawo maako ɓiyiiko Zebadiya laati hooreejo. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:8 Hooreejo njowaɓo ngam lewru jowaɓru
1Chronicles27:9 Iira ɓii Ikkes mo Teko'a woni njoweegoojo ngam lewru joweegooru. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:10 Heeles mo Pelon
1Chronicles27:11 Sibbekay Zaraajo mo Husa woni njoweetataɓo ngam lewru joweetataɓru. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:12 Abi'ezer Benyaminiijo mo Anatot woni njoweenayaɓo ngam lewru joweenayaɓru. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:13 Maharay Zaraajo mo Netofa woni sappoojo ngam lewru sappooru. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:14 Benaya Efrayimiijo mo Piraton woni sappo e go'oojo ngam lewru sappo e go'ooru. Yeɓre maako woodi worɓe ujine noogas e nayo (24.000).
1Chronicles27:15 Helday mo Netofa
1Chronicles27:16 Ndaa ardiiɓe le'i Isra'iila: Eli'ezer ɓii Zikiri woni ardiiɗo yimɓe Ruben. Sefatiya ɓii Ma'aka ardi yimɓe Simon.
1Chronicles27:17 Hasabiya ɓii Kemuwel ardi yimɓe Lewi. Cadok ardi yimɓe Haruna.
1Chronicles27:18 Elihu deerɗiraawo Daawuda ardi yimɓe Yahuuda. Omiri ɓii Mika'iilu ardi yimɓe Issakar.
1Chronicles27:19 Yisma'ya ɓii Obadiya ardi yimɓe Zabulon. Yerimot ɓii Asriyel ardi yimɓe Neftali.
1Chronicles27:20 Hose'a ɓii Azaziya ardi yimɓe Efrayim. Yo'el ɓii Pedaya ardi reeta lenyol Manassa.
1Chronicles27:21 Iddo ɓii Zekariya ardi reeta lenyol Manassa nder Gile'at. Ya'asiyel ɓii Abineer ardi yimɓe Benyamin.
1Chronicles27:22 Azareyel ɓii Yeroham ardi yimɓe Dan. Kamɓe ngoni mawɓe le'i Isra'iila.
1Chronicles27:23 Daawuda limaay derke'en ɓe duuɓi muuɗum'en cikaay noogas tawon
1Chronicles27:24 Yo'ab ɓii Seruyatu fuɗɗuno limugo
1Chronicles27:25 Azmawet ɓii Adiyel woni kaliifaajo dow ndesaaje laamiiɗo. Yonatan ɓii Uzziya woni kaliifaajo dow ndesaaje nder lesdi
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri ɓii Kelub woni mawɗo remooɓe gese.
1Chronicles27:27 Sim'i mo Rama woni kaliifaajo dow gese inabooje. Zabdi mo Sifam woni kaliifaajo dow nafuuda inabooje.
1Chronicles27:28 Ba'al-Hanan mo Geder woni kaliifaajo dow jaytunje e dundeeje nder lesdi towndiije. Yo'as woni kaliifaajo dow cigorɗi nebbam.
1Chronicles27:29 Siritay mo Saron woni kaliifaajo dow na'i duranɗi haa lesdi Saron. Safat ɓii Adilay woni kaliifaajo dow na'i duranɗi nder waadiiji.
1Chronicles27:30 Obil Isma'iiluujo woni kaliifaajo dow geelooɗi. Yehedeya mo Meronot halfitinaama bamɗe debbe.
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi Hagariijo woni kaliifaajo dow dammooji. Kamɓe fuu ɓe mawɓe aynooɓe marle laamiiɗo Daawuda.
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatan bappa Daawuda woni carwoowo
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofel woni carwoowo laamiiɗo
1Chronicles27:34 Ɓaawo maayde Ahitofel
1Chronicles28:1 Daawuda mooɓti mawɓe Isra'iila fuu haa Urusaliima: Baaba-ci'e'en e hoore'en geɓe huuwanooɓe laamiiɗo e ardiiɓe dow honooɓe ujineere e ardiiɓe dow honooɓe teemerre e aynooɓe marle e dabbaaji e ɓikkoy laamiiɗo e saraaki'en e suusɓe e marɓe daraja fuu.
1Chronicles28:2 Laamiiɗo Daawuda dari
1Chronicles28:3 Ammaa Allah wi'i yam: An a nyiɓataa suudu ngam innde am
1Chronicles28:4 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila suɓi yam nder saare baaba am haa mi laato laamiiɗo Isra'iila haa foroy
1Chronicles28:5 Jawmiraawo hokki yam ɓiɓɓe ɗuuɗɓe. Caka maɓɓe o suɓi ɓiyam Suleymaanu haa o jooɗo dow leeso laamu Jawmiraawo
1Chronicles28:6 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: Ɓiya Suleymaanu nyiɓan suudu am e babe am. Ngam mi suɓi mo o laato ɓiɗɗo am
1Chronicles28:7 Mi tabitinan laamu maako haa foroy
1Chronicles28:8 Ngam maajum yeeso Isra'iila
1Chronicles28:9 An boo
1Chronicles28:10 Hakkil jonta
1Chronicles28:11 Nden Daawuda hokki Suleymaanu suura zawleeru haykaliiru e cuuɗi maaru e cigorɗi maaru e cuuɗi dowji e geɓe haa nder haykaliiru e suudu jooɗordu ngam kefergal.
1Chronicles28:12 O tinndini mo boo kuuje ɗe numooji maako anndini mo fuu: Haala babe haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e cigorɗi taarotooɗi ndu e ndesaaje kuuje cenaaɗe
1Chronicles28:13 e haala geɓe liman'en e Lewi'en e kuuɗe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo fuu e kuuje ngam kuugal nder maaru fuu
1Chronicles28:14 e haala teddeeŋga kaŋŋeeri
1Chronicles28:15 e teddeeŋga kaŋŋeeri ngam jo'inirɗe kaŋŋeeri e pittirlaaji maaji ɗum kaŋŋeeri
1Chronicles28:16 Non boo teddeeŋga kaŋŋeeri ngam taabe tamseeje jo'inteeɗe e teddeeŋga cardi ngam taabe cardi.
1Chronicles28:17 Non boo haala tufirɗe e taasaaje e paalon kaŋŋeeri laaɓndi e njardukoy kaŋŋeeri e cardi
1Chronicles28:18 e haala gulduɗum uurle kaŋŋeeri laaɓndi bee teddeeŋga muuɗum e suura moota pucci bee nga keruba'en kaŋŋeeri weeɗanɓe bileeji muuɗum'en
1Chronicles28:19 Nden Daawuda wi'i: “Haala ka'a winndaama dow ɗereewol ngol Jawmiraawo hokki yam. Ngol faamtini yam kuuɗe gonɗe haa suura man fuu.”
1Chronicles28:20 Nden Daawuda wi'i ɓiyum Suleymaanu: “Sey a semmbiɗa
1Chronicles28:21 Ndaa geɓe liman'en e Lewi'en ngam kuugal nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo fuu. Marɓe anniya mbooɗka fuu e marɓe anndal fuu ngam huuwugo kuugal koo ngale ɗon ngondi bee maaɗa
1Chronicles29:1 Fahin laamiiɗo Daawuda wolwani jama'aare fuu
1Chronicles29:2 Bee baawɗe am fuu taaskitinmi kuuje ngam haykaliiru Allah am: Kaŋŋeeri ngam kuuje kaŋŋeeri e cardi ngam kuuje cardi e njamndi mboɗeeri ngam kuuje njamndi mboɗeeri e njamndi ɓaleeri ngam kuuje njamndi ɓaleeri e leɗɗe ngam kuuje leɗɗe e kaa'e onikis e kaa'e ngam jaagnugo e kaa'e ɓaleeje e ɗe noone feere feere e kaa'e marɗe saman e kaa'e daneeje ɗuuɗɗe masin.
1Chronicles29:3 Ko ɓuri ɗum
1Chronicles29:4 Kaŋŋeeri diga Ofir baakin kilo ujine cappanɗe joweenayi (90.000) e cardi laaɓndi baakin kilo ujine teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi e ujine sappo (210.000). Sey ɓe kuuwtinira ɗum ngam ɓasugo mahdi nder cuuɗi haykaliiru fuu
1Chronicles29:5 ngam huuwugo kuuje kaŋŋeeri e cardi e ngam kuuɗe fawne ɗe waɗooɓe sanaa'a mbaɗata. Kadi moy haa mooɗon yerdake hokkugo caahu ngam Jawmiraawo jonta bee anniya ɓernde mum?”
1Chronicles29:6 Baaba-ci'e'en e ardiiɓe le'i e ardiiɓe dow honooɓe ujineere e ardiiɓe dow honooɓe teemerre e mawɓe dow kuuɗe laamiiɗo
1Chronicles29:7 Ɓe ndokki ngam kuugal nder haykaliiru Allah kaŋŋeeri baakin kilo ujine teemerre e cappanɗe jowi (150.000) e ceede kaŋŋeeri ujine sappo (10.000) e cardi baakin kilo ujine teemeɗɗe tati (300.000) e njamndi mboɗeeri baakin kilo ujine teemeɗɗe jowi e cappanɗe nayi (540.000) e njamndi ɓaleeri baakin kilo miliyoŋje tati (3.000.000).
1Chronicles29:8 Marɓe kaa'e ɗuuɗa-samanje boo
1Chronicles29:9 Yimɓe ceyori caahu mawɓe
1Chronicles29:10 Nden Daawuda yetti Jawmiraawo yeeso jama'aare fuu
1Chronicles29:11 Yaa Jawmiraawo
1Chronicles29:12 Jeynitaare e tedduŋgal iwi haa maaɗa
1Chronicles29:13 Jonta kam
1Chronicles29:14 Min mi moy
1Chronicles29:15 Ngam min yiilotooɓe yeeso maaɗa
1Chronicles29:16 Yaa Allah Jawmiraawo amin
1Chronicles29:17 Yaa Allah am
1Chronicles29:18 Yaa Allah Jawmiraawo kaakiraaɓe amin Ibrahiima e Isiyaaku e Isra'iila
1Chronicles29:19 Ɓiyam Suleymaanu boo
1Chronicles29:20 Nden Daawuda wi'i yimɓe jama'aare fuu: “Ngette Jawmiraawo
1Chronicles29:21 Jaŋngo man ɓe lii'ani Jawmiraawo kirsaaɗi e guleteeɗi: Ga'i kalhali ujineere e jawɗi ujineere e njawkoy ujineere
1Chronicles29:22 Nyalaade man ɓe nyaami
1Chronicles29:23 Suleymaanu jooɗi haa leeso laamu Jawmiraawo
1Chronicles29:24 Mawɓe e suusɓe e ɓiɓɓe laamiiɗo Daawuda fuu ɗowtani laamiiɗo Suleymaanu.
1Chronicles29:25 Jawmiraawo mawnini Suleymaanu yeeso Isra'iila masin
1Chronicles29:26 Bana nii Daawuda ɓii Yessa laamori dow Isra'iila fuu.
1Chronicles29:27 O laamani Isra'iila duuɓi cappanɗe nayi: Duuɓi joweeɗiɗi o laami haa Heburuun
1Chronicles29:28 O maayi bee ndottaaku mbooɗŋgu
1Chronicles29:29 Haala Daawuda
1Chronicles29:30 Defte ɗe'e tinndini haala laamu maako e baawɗe maako e ko saali nder ngeendam maako e nder Isra'iila e laamuuji lesɗe fuu.
2Chronicles1:1 Suleymaanu ɓii Daawuda tabitini laamu muuɗum. Allah Jawmiraawo wondi bee maako
2Chronicles1:2 Suleymaanu hawti yimɓe Isra'iila fuu
2Chronicles1:3 Nden ɓe njehi haa nokkuure townde haa Gibiyon
2Chronicles1:4 Ammaa sundukru alkawal Allah
2Chronicles1:5 Hirsirde njamndi mboɗeeri nde Becaleel ɓii Uuri ɓii Huuru waɗno ɗum
2Chronicles1:6 Suleymaanu wa'i dow hirsirde man
2Chronicles1:7 Jemma man Allah waŋgani Suleymaanu
2Chronicles1:8 Suleymaanu jaabi mo: “A woonani baaba am Daawuda bee mbooɗeeŋga ɗuuɗŋga
2Chronicles1:9 Yaa Jawmiraawo Allah
2Chronicles1:10 Hokkam hikma e hakkiilo ngam ɗowugo yimɓe ɓe'e. Ngam moy foti laamanaago ummaatoore ma ɗuuɗnde nde'e?”
2Chronicles1:11 Allah wi'i Suleymaanu: “Nde a torake ɗu'um
2Chronicles1:12 ngam man a heɓan hikma e hakkiilo. Mi hokkete risku e jawdi e tedduŋgal boo
2Chronicles1:13 Nden Suleymaanu ummi haa laymaaru fottirde dow nokkuure townde haa Gibiyon
2Chronicles1:14 Suleymaanu mooɓti mootaaji pucci konu e pucci. Ɗum waɗi mootaaji ujineere e teemeɗɗe nayi (1.400) e pucci ujine sappo e ɗiɗi (12.000). Nden o jo'ini goɗɗi nder berniiji cigorɗi maaji
2Chronicles1:15 O ɗuɗɗini cardi e kaŋŋeeri haa Urusaliima bana kaa'e
2Chronicles1:16 Ɓe ngaddani Suleymaanu pucci diga Misra e Kuwe
2Chronicles1:17 Haa Misra ɓe njehi
2Chronicles1:18 Suleymaanu waɗi anniya nyiɓugo suudu ngam teddingo innde Jawmiraawo e suudu laamu ngam hoore mum.
2Chronicles2:1 O hoo'i roondooɓe ujine cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗo (70.000) e sehooɓe kaa'e haa kooseeje ujine cappanɗe njoweetato (80.000) e hakkilanooɓe kuugal ujine tato e teemeɗɗe njoweego (3.600).
2Chronicles2:2 Nden Suleymaanu neldi Hiram
2Chronicles2:3 Jonta nyiɓanmi suudu ngam teddingo innde Jawmiraawo Allah am
2Chronicles2:4 Suudu ndu nyiɓanmi
2Chronicles2:5 Ammaa to laatake asamanji bee asamanji ɓurɗi towugo fuu ke'ataa mo jooɗaago
2Chronicles2:6 Nden kam
2Chronicles2:7 Neldam leɗɗe cemmbiɗɗe e booɗɗe e leɗɗe sandalje diga Libanon boo
2Chronicles2:8 Ɓe pe'anammi leɗɗe ɗuuɗɗe
2Chronicles2:9 Huuwooɓe ma fe'ooɓe leɗɗe
2Chronicles2:10 Hiram
2Chronicles2:11 Yettoore laatano Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila
2Chronicles2:12 Ndaa
2Chronicles2:13 Daada maako iwi lenyol Dan
2Chronicles2:14 Alkamaari e sa'iiruuri e inaboojam e nebbam ko tammiiɗa hokkugo
2Chronicles2:15 Minin kam min pe'an leɗɗe haa Libanon
2Chronicles2:16 Suleymaanu limi jananɓe jooɗiiɓe nder Isra'iila fuu
2Chronicles2:17 Nder maɓɓe o hoo'i roondooɓe ujine cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗo (70.000) e sehooɓe kaa'e dow kooseeje ujine cappanɗe njoweetato (80.000) e hakkilanooɓe kuugal ujine tato e teemeɗɗe njoweego (3.600)
2Chronicles3:1 Suleymaanu fuɗɗi nyiɓugo haykaliiru Jawmiraawo haa Urusaliima
2Chronicles3:2 Suleymaanu fuɗɗi nyiɓugo nder nduuɓu laamu mum nayaɓu
2Chronicles3:3 Ndaa no Suleymaanu saɓɓiri caɓɓawal haykaliiru Jawmiraawo: Njuutirka maaru waɗi meetir cappanɗe tati
2Chronicles3:4 Zawleeru haa dammugal nastugo haykaliiru man
2Chronicles3:5 Nder nokkuure seniinde
2Chronicles3:6 O jaagnori suudu man bee kaa'e ɗuuɗa-samanje e kaŋŋeeri diga Parwayim.
2Chronicles3:7 O suddi nder suudu fuu
2Chronicles3:8 O mahi boo suudu ɓurndu senaago: Njaajirka maaru meetir sappo bana haykaliiru
2Chronicles3:9 Teddeeŋga suufuuje kaŋŋeeri ɗe o huuwtiniri ɗon reeta kilo. O ɓasi boo kaŋŋeeri haa nder cuuɗi dowji.
2Chronicles3:10 Nden o waɗi suuraaji keruba'en ɗiɗo bee njamndi ɓolinaandi ɓe cuddi ɗi bee kaŋŋeeri
2Chronicles3:11 Keruba'en man ɗon ndari
2Chronicles3:12 
2Chronicles3:13 
2Chronicles3:14 O sannyi boo wiirndallo bee battaaji carwinaaɗi e boɗeeji e boɗeeji coy e daneeji ɗigguɗi
2Chronicles3:15 O waɗi daŋraŋge juutɗe ɗiɗi ɗe meetir sappo e joweeɗiɗi ngam darnugo yeeso haykaliiru. Ko'e maaje jaagnaaɗe bee kuuje towɗe deydey meetir ɗiɗi bee reeta.
2Chronicles3:16 O waɗi callalluhoy bana koy suudu ɓurndu senaago
2Chronicles3:17 O darni daŋraŋge ɗe'e yeeso haykaliiru
2Chronicles4:1 Suleymaanu waɗi hirsirde njamndi mboɗeeri
2Chronicles4:2 O waɗi loonde njamndi ɓolinaandi. Cakaare maare ɗon meetir jowi
2Chronicles4:3 Haa les sera loonde
2Chronicles4:4 O jo'ini loonde man dow suuraaji ga'i njamndi sappo e ɗiɗi. Ga'i tati tiiti woyla
2Chronicles4:5 Tekkirka loonde ɗon bana njaajirka newre. O waɗi sera maare bana sera jardugel
2Chronicles4:6 O waɗi daarooje sappo
2Chronicles4:7 O waɗi jo'inirɗe pittirlaaji sappo ɗi kaŋŋeeri
2Chronicles4:8 O waɗi boo taabe sappo
2Chronicles4:9 O waɗi babal liman'en e babal maŋngal bee dammuɗe maagal. O suddi pareeje bee njamndi mboɗeeri.
2Chronicles4:10 O jo'ini loonde go haa wakeere haykaliiru nyaamre
2Chronicles4:11 Hiram waɗi payanɗe ngam ndoondi e pelji e pehe biccirɗe ƴiiƴam. Bana non o timminiri kuugal ngal laamiiɗo Suleymaanu umri mo huuwugo ngam haykaliiru Allah:
2Chronicles4:12 Daŋraŋge ɗiɗi bee ko'e jooɗotooɗe dow daŋraŋge man e irin bamaaɗi bana zubaaji ngam suddugo ko'e gonɗe dow daŋraŋge go
2Chronicles4:13 e suuraaji rummaanooje teemeɗɗe nayi (400) ngam bamaaɗi ɗiɗi go
2Chronicles4:14 O waɗi boo jo'inirɗe e daarooje dow maaje
2Chronicles4:15 e loonde go bee ga'i sappo e ɗiɗi ɗi loonde jooɗi les maare
2Chronicles4:16 e payanɗe ngam ndoondi e pelji e tufirɗe. Kuuje ɗe Hiram-Abi waɗani laamiiɗo Suleymaanu ngam haykaliiru Jawmiraawo fuu
2Chronicles4:17 Laamiiɗo umri ɓolingo ɗe haa waadiwol Urdun
2Chronicles4:18 Suleymaanu waɗi ɗe ɗuuɗɗe masin
2Chronicles4:19 Suleymaanu waɗi boo kuuje gonɗe nder haykaliiru Allah fuu: Gulduɗum uurle bee kaŋŋeeri e taabe ngam tamseeje jo'inteeɗe
2Chronicles4:20 e jo'inirɗe pittirlaaji e pittirlaaji maaji kuɓɓeteeɗi fodde umroore yeeso suudu ɓurndu senaago
2Chronicles4:21 e pinndi maaji e pittirlaaji e mekefje maaji
2Chronicles4:22 non boo laɓe e taasahoy e taasaaje e pehe uurorɗe
2Chronicles5:1 Nde Suleymaanu timmini huuwugo kuugal mahugo haykaliiru Jawmiraawo fuu
2Chronicles5:2 Ɓaawo man Suleymaanu mooɓti ndotti'en Isra'iila
2Chronicles5:3 Worɓe Isra'iila fuu mooɓti haa laamiiɗo Suleymaanu ngam juulde nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru.
2Chronicles5:4 Ndotti'en Isra'iila fuu ngari
2Chronicles5:5 njahri ndu

2Chronicles5:8 Keruba'en ɗon mbeeɗi bileeji muuɗum'en dow nokkuure taaskitinaande ngam sundukru
2Chronicles5:9 Cabbi man njuuti masin. To goɗɗo darake daayiiɗum seɗɗa bee sundukru yeeso suudu sakkitiindu

2Chronicles6:1 Nden Suleymaanu wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo

2Chronicles6:4 Nden o wi'i: “Mi yetti Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila! Bee baawɗe maako o hebbitini ko o iinani baaba am Daawuda. Ndaa ko o wi'i mo:
2Chronicles6:5 Diga nyalaade nde mi wurtini ummaatoore am nder lesdi Misra
2Chronicles6:6 Ammaa mi suɓi Urusaliima ngam haa innde am wona ton

2Chronicles6:11 Nder maaru njo'inmi sundukru alkawal ngal Jawmiraawo haɓɓuno bee Isra'iila'en.”

2Chronicles7:1 Nde Suleymaanu timmini do'aare nde'e
2Chronicles7:2 Liman'en mbaawaay nastugo haykaliiru ngam tedduŋgal Jawmiraawo hebbini ndu.
2Chronicles7:3 Isra'iila'en wonɓe ton fuu ngi'i no yiite jippori
2Chronicles7:4 Nden laamiiɗo e ummaatoore fuu lii'ani Jawmiraawo kirseteeɗi.
2Chronicles7:5 Suleymaanu lii'i ga'i ujine noogas e ɗiɗi (22.000) e dammooji ujine teemerre e noogas (120.000). Bana non laamiiɗo e ummaatoore fuu ceniri haykaliiru Allah.
2Chronicles7:6 Liman'en ndari haa nokkuuje muuɗum'en
2Chronicles7:7 Suleymaanu seni nokkuure caka babal yeeso haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles7:8 Saa'i maajum Suleymaanu e Isra'iila'en fuu mbaɗi juulde nyalɗe joweeɗiɗi
2Chronicles7:9 Nyannde joweetataɓre ɓe mooɓti mooɓtorde senaande
2Chronicles7:10 Nyannde noogas e tataɓre nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru
2Chronicles7:11 Bana non Suleymaanu timminiri mahugo haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e saare laamu. O mo'ini koo ɗume ko o anninino waɗugo haa cuuɗi ɗi'i.
2Chronicles7:12 Nden Jawmiraawo waŋgani mo bee jemma
2Chronicles7:13 To mi maɓɓi asama
2Chronicles7:14 to yimɓe ummaatoore am ɓe innde am ewnaama dow muuɗum'en leestini ko'e muuɗum'en
2Chronicles7:15 Diga jonta
2Chronicles7:16 Ndaa mi suɓi haykaliiru ndu'u
2Chronicles7:17 An boo
2Chronicles7:18 nden kam
2Chronicles7:19 Ammaa to on ngaylitake
2Chronicles7:20 nden kam mi sottinan on nder lesdi am ndi ndokkumi on. Haykaliiru ndu mi seni ngam tedduŋgal innde am
2Chronicles7:21 Haykaliiru woondu ndu'u laatoto winnde
2Chronicles7:22 Nden ɓe njaaboto mo: Ngam ɓe ngudini Jawmiraawo Allah baabiraaɓe maɓɓe mo wurtini ɓe lesdi Misra. Ɓe tokki ɗowanteeɓe woɗɓe
2Chronicles8:1 Nder duuɓi noogas Suleymaanu timmini nyiɓugo haykaliiru e saare mum.
2Chronicles8:2 O nyiɓti berniiji ɗi Hiram laamiiɗo Tirus hokkuno mo
2Chronicles8:3 Nden o yehi haa berniwol Hamat-Soba
2Chronicles8:4 O nyiɓti Tadmora nder ladde hamaadaare
2Chronicles8:5 O nyiɓti Baytihurun-dow e Baytihurun-les
2Chronicles8:6 O nyiɓi Ba'alat e gure cigorɗe maako fuu
2Chronicles8:7 Suleymaanu laatini luttuɓe Heti'en e Amoori'en e Perezzi'en e Hewi'en e Yebusi'en huuwooɓe kuuɗe dooleeje. Ɗum danygol ummaatooje ngol lutti nder lesdi ngam Isra'iila'en mbardaay ɗe. Ɓe fuu ɓe iwaay haa Isra'iila. Ɓe laati maccuɓe Isra'iila haa wargo hannde.
2Chronicles8:8 
2Chronicles8:9 Ammaa Isra'iila'en kam
2Chronicles8:10 Laamiiɗo Suleymaanu woodi ardiiɓe wakiili'en teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo e cappanɗe njowo (250). Kamɓe ɓe kakkilani ummaatoore.
2Chronicles8:11 Suleymaanu yahri ɓii Firawna debbo diga Berniwol Daawuda haa saare nde o nyiɓani mo
2Chronicles8:12 Saa'i man Suleymaanu fuɗɗi lii'anaago Jawmiraawo guleteeɗi dow hirsirde nde o waɗno yeeso zawleeru haykaliiru
2Chronicles8:13 fodde ko Muusa umrino dow kirseteeɗi kala nyalaade fuu: Nyalɗe ciwtorɗe e juulɗe lewru hesru e juulɗe tati nder hitaande
2Chronicles8:14 Fodde umroore baaba maako Daawuda
2Chronicles8:15 Ɓe luutaay umrooje laamiiɗo Daawuda dow liman'en e Lewi'en e ndesaaje
2Chronicles8:16 Bana nii kuugal Suleymaanu fuu tabitiri
2Chronicles8:17 Nden Suleymaanu yehi haa Esiyon-Geber e Elat haa fomoonde mbeela
2Chronicles8:18 Hiram neldi mo koommbooje bee juuɗe huuwooɓe mum e waawɓe laanyugo koommbooje dow mbeela. Ɓe njahdi bee huuwanooɓe Suleymaanu
2Chronicles9:1 Laamiiɗo debbo mo laamani lesdi Saba nani habaru maŋngu Suleymaanu. Nden o wari haa Urusaliima
2Chronicles9:2 Suleymaanu laɓɓinani mo ƴamɗe maako fuu
2Chronicles9:3 Nde laamiiɗo Saba debbo nani bolle Suleymaanu hikmaaje e laari laamorde nde o mahi
2Chronicles9:4 e nyaamdu saare maako e joonde saraaki'en maako e daraago huuwooɓe nder saare maako e limce maɓɓe e hokkooɓe mo njaramji e limce maɓɓe e guleteeɗi ɗi o lii'i haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles9:5 O wi'i Suleymaanu: “Ko nanmi haa lesdi am dow maaɗa e hikma maaɗa
2Chronicles9:6 Mi nuɗɗinaayno haala maajum
2Chronicles9:7 Seyo laatani yimɓe ma
2Chronicles9:8 Yettoore laatano Jawmiraawo Allah ma mo seyori ma
2Chronicles9:9 Nden o hokki laamiiɗo kaŋŋeeri
2Chronicles9:10 Dow maajum fuu
2Chronicles9:11 Bee leɗɗe man laamiiɗo suddi taŋkudi nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e saare mum. O waɗi boo moolooji e hooduuji ngam yimooɓe. Leɗɗe sandalje bana ɗe'e meeɗaayno yi'eego nder lesdi Yahuuda.
2Chronicles9:12 Laamiiɗo Suleymaanu hokki laamiiɗo Saba debbo ko o yiɗi e ko o ƴami mo fuu
2Chronicles9:13 Kala hitaande fuu
2Chronicles9:14 accu jomorgol kaŋŋeeri e cardi ngol filooɓe e soorrooɓe e ko laamiiɓe Arabiya e ngomna'en lesdi ngaddani mo.
2Chronicles9:15 Laamiiɗo Suleymaanu waɗi bawarɗe mawɗe teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi ɗe kaŋŋeeri tappaandi
2Chronicles9:16 Non boo bawarɗe pamare ɗe kaŋŋeeri tappaandi
2Chronicles9:17 Laamiiɗo waɗi leeso laamu maŋngo bee nyii'e nyiibi
2Chronicles9:18 Leeso laamu ngo'o woodi jaaɓruɗe joweego e jaaɓruɗum kosɗe ɗum kaŋŋeeri. Ciwtinorɗe juuɗe ɗon haa bakeeje joonde ɗiɗi fuu. Suuraaji barooɗe ɗiɗi ndari baŋnge ciwtinorɗe juuɗe
2Chronicles9:19 dow jaaɓruɗe boo suuraaji barooɗe sappo e ɗiɗi
2Chronicles9:20 Jarduɗe laamiiɗo Suleymaanu fuu ɗe kaŋŋeeri. Kuuje nder suudu Laynde Libanon fuu ɗe kaŋŋeeri laaɓndi
2Chronicles9:21 ngam laamiiɗo woodi koommbooje jahanɗe Tarsis
2Chronicles9:22 Laamiiɗo Suleymaanu ɓurdi laamiiɓe duniyaaru fuu risku e hikma.
2Chronicles9:23 Laamiiɓe duniyaaru fuu ɗaɓɓiti yi'ugo Suleymaanu haa nana hikma muuɗum ka Allah hokki ɗum.
2Chronicles9:24 Kala hitaande fuu
2Chronicles9:25 Suleymaanu woodi cuuɗi ujine nayi (4.000) ngam pucci e mootaaji mum. O woodi boo wa'otooɓe pucci ujine sappo e ɗiɗo (12.000). O jo'ini goɗɗi nder berniiji cigorɗi mootaaji
2Chronicles9:26 O laamani laamiiɓe fuu
2Chronicles9:27 O ɗuɗɗini cardi haa Urusaliima bana kaa'e
2Chronicles9:28 Filooɓe ngaddani mo pucci diga Misra e lesɗe goɗɗe fuu.
2Chronicles9:29 Luttuɗum haala Suleymaanu diga fuɗɗoode haa timmoode
2Chronicles9:30 Suleymaanu laamani Isra'iila fuu haa Urusaliima
2Chronicles9:31 Nden o maayi

2Chronicles11:20 Ɓaawoɗon o te'i Ma'aka ɓii Absalom. Kaŋko o danyani mo Abiya e Attay e Ziza e Selomit.

2Chronicles12:2 Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Robo'am njowaɓu
2Chronicles12:3 O woodi mootaaji pucci ujineere e teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi (1.200) e wa'iiɓe pucci ujine cappanɗe njoweego (60.000). Yimɓe Libiya e Sukkot e Etiyopiya ɗuuɗɓe masin ngardi bee Sisak diga Misra.

2Chronicles13:1 Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Yerobo'am sappo e njoweetataɓu
2Chronicles13:2 O laami haa Urusaliima duuɓi tati. Innde daada maako
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya fuɗɗi konu man bee honooɓe semmbiɗɓe suɓaaɓe ujine teemeɗɗe nayo (400.000). Yerobo'am darni caffuuji bee honooɓe semmbiɗɓe suɓaaɓe ujine teemeɗɗe njoweetato (800.000) ngam haɓre bee Abiya.
2Chronicles13:4 Abiya wa'i dari haa dow yeereere hooseere Semarayim nder lesdi kooseeje Efrayim
2Chronicles13:5 On anndaa na? Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila hokki Daawuda e danygol mum laamu Isra'iila haa foroy
2Chronicles13:6 Nden Yerobo'am ɓii Nebat
2Chronicles13:7 Meere'en woɗɓe kawti bee maako
2Chronicles13:8 Jonta on ngiɗi dartango laamu Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles13:9 Na on ngudini danygol Haruna
2Chronicles13:10 Ammaa minin kam

2Chronicles17:1 Yusafat ɓii Asa laami haa pellel baaba mum. O tabitini baawɗe maako dow Isra'iila.
2Chronicles17:2 O jo'ini honooɓe nder berniiji Yahuuda cemmbiɗɗi fuu e caŋngeeje aynooɓe koo toy nder lesdi Yahuuda
2Chronicles17:3 Jawmiraawo ɗon wondi bee Yusafat
2Chronicles17:4 Ammaa o ɗakkotiri bee Allah mo baaba maako jaggani
2Chronicles17:5 Ngam man Jawmiraawo tabitini laamu haa juŋngo Yusafat. Yimɓe Yahuuda fuu ngaddani mo dokke
2Chronicles17:6 Ɓernde maako seyori tokkaago laabi Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles17:7 Nder nduuɓu laamu maako tataɓu
2Chronicles17:8 Hawtaade bee maɓɓe o neli Lewi'en Sema'ya e Netaniya e Sebadiya e Asa'el e Semiramot e Yonatan e Adoniya e Tobiya e Tob-Adoniya
2Chronicles17:9 Ɓe ekkitini yimɓe Yahuuda bee deftere tawreeta Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles17:10 Jawmiraawo hulni laamuuji lesɗe taariiɗe Yahuuda fuu
2Chronicles17:11 Filisti'en woɗɓe ɗon ngaddana Yusafat dokke e cardi bana jomorgol. Arab'en boo ɗon ngaddana mo dammooji: Jawɗi baali ujine joweeɗiɗi e teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi (7.700) e jawɗi be'i ujine joweeɗiɗi e teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi (7.700).
2Chronicles17:12 Baawɗe Yusafat ɓesdi yeeso yeeso. O nyiɓi cuuɗi mawɗi cemmbiɗɗi e gure cigorɗe nder lesdi Yahuuda.
2Chronicles17:13 O mari sigaaji ɗuuɗɗi nder gure Yahuuda. Haa Urusaliima boo o woodi honooɓe semmbiɗɓe.
2Chronicles17:14 Ndaa geɓe maɓɓe fodde ci'e maɓɓe e hoore'en dow honooɓe ujineeje: Lenyol Yahuuda: Adena mawɗo honooɓe bee honooɓe semmbiɗɓe ujine teemeɗɗe tato (300.000)
2Chronicles17:15 e haa kommbi maako

2Chronicles17:17 lenyol Benyamin: Eliyada
2Chronicles17:18 e haa kommbi maako Yozabat bee taaskaniiɓe konu ujine teemerre e cappanɗe njoweetato (180.000).
2Chronicles17:19 Kamɓe ɓe njaggani laamiiɗo. Jo'inaaɓe nder berniiji cemmbiɗɗi nder Yahuuda fuu limaaka caka maɓɓe.

2Chronicles24:11 Koo ndeye ɓe njahri ndu haa Lewi'en haa ɓe linya ndu dow muuyo laamiiɗo
2Chronicles24:12 Laamiiɗo e Yoyada ndokka ceede man haa aynooɓe kuugal haa ɓe njoɓa huuwooɓe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. Kamɓe ɓe njoɓi sehooɓe kaa'e e sehooɓe leɗɗe ngam wo'itingo haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles24:13 Aynooɓe kuugal kuuwi bana nii
2Chronicles24:14 Nde kuugal maɓɓe timmi
2Chronicles24:15 Ammaa Yoyada naywi
2Chronicles24:16 Ɓe uwi mo nder Berniwol Daawuda baŋnge genaale laamiiɓe
2Chronicles24:17 Ɓaawo maayde Yoyada
2Chronicles24:18 Ɓe acci haykaliiru Jawmiraawo Allah kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe
2Chronicles24:19 Jawmiraawo neli annabi'en caka maɓɓe
2Chronicles24:20 Nden Ruuhu Allah wari dow Zekariya ɓii Yoyada limanjo. O dari yeeso ummaatoore
2Chronicles24:21 Yimɓe ummaatoore tuurtani Zekariya
2Chronicles24:22 Laamiiɗo Yo'as siftoraay mbooɗeeŋga nga Yoyada
2Chronicles24:23 Nde nduuɓu yaalti
2Chronicles24:24 Siriya'en ɗuuɗaay
2Chronicles24:25 Nden Siriya'en lori
2Chronicles24:26 Ndaa tuurtanɓe mo: Zabada mo daada mum wi'ete Sime'atu Ammooniijo e Yozabat mo daada mum wi'ete Simritu Mo'abiijo.
2Chronicles24:27 Haala ɓiɓɓe Yo'as e annabaakuuji ɗuuɗɗi dow maako e bo'itinki haykaliiru Allah
2Chronicles25:1 Amasiya woodi duuɓi noogas e jowi
2Chronicles25:2 Amasiya waɗi ko fottani Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles25:3 Nde Amasiya semmbiɗi nder laamu
2Chronicles25:4 Ammaa o mbaraay ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe. O waɗi fodde ko winnda nder tawreeta
2Chronicles25:5 Amasiya mooɓti worɓe nder laamu muuɗum
2Chronicles25:6 O hoo'i boo Isra'iila'en ujine teemerre (100.000)
2Chronicles25:7 Ammaa goɗɗo Allah wari haa maako
2Chronicles25:8 To ɓe njahdi bee maaɗa
2Chronicles25:9 Amasiya ƴami goɗɗo Allah man: “E noy cardi fuu ndi njoɓmi ngam jama'aare Isra'iila'en?” O jaabi: “Jawmiraawo waawan hokkugo ma ɓuranɗum ɗu'um!”
2Chronicles25:10 Amasiya senndiri jama'aare Isra'iila'en bee yimɓe mum
2Chronicles25:11 Nden Amasiya tiɗɗini ɓernde mum
2Chronicles25:12 Yimɓe Yahuuda naŋngi woɗɓe ujine sappo (10.000)
2Chronicles25:13 Ammaa jama'aare Isra'iila'en ɓe Amasiya wi'i ɓe kuuca ngam taa ɓe mballa mo nder haɓre
2Chronicles25:14 Nde Amasiya jaali Edoomi'en

2Chronicles26:1 Ummaatoore Yahuuda fuu laamini Uzziya haa pellel baaba mum Amasiya. Saa'i man Uzziya woodi duuɓi sappo e joweego.

2Chronicles26:4 O waɗi ko fottani Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles26:5 Saa'i Zekariya
2Chronicles26:6 Uzziya yehi

2Chronicles26:8 Ammooni'en njoɓi Uzziya jomorgol. Innde maako saŋkiti haa yotti nastirde Misra
2Chronicles26:9 Uzziya nyiɓi cuuɗi towɗi cemmbiɗɗi haa Urusaliima
2Chronicles26:10 O nyiɓi cuuɗi towɗi cemmbiɗɗi nder ladde boo
2Chronicles26:11 Uzziya woodi jama'aare honooɓe taaskaniiɓe konu fodde limgal muuɗum'en nde Ye'iyel
2Chronicles26:12 Limgal baaba-ci'e'en
2Chronicles26:13 Jama'aare konu ɗowtani ɓe. Limgal maare
2Chronicles26:14 Uzziya hokki ɓe fuu maɓɓe bawarɗe e labbe e kufneeje njamndi e sulkeeji e lagaaje e kaa'e cakkinteeɗe bee piwlol.
2Chronicles26:15 Huuwooɓe annduɓe mbaɗani mo piɗirɗe kuri e cakkinirɗe kaa'e mawɗe. O darni ɗe haa Urusaliima dow cuuɗi towɗi cemmbiɗɗi e tolɗi mahol. Habaru maako saŋkiti daayiiɗum

2Chronicles28:1 Akas woodi duuɓi noogas
2Chronicles28:2 Ammaa o tokki laabi laamiiɓe Isra'iila. O waɗi suuraaji ɓolinaaɗi ngam labbi Ba'alji.
2Chronicles28:3 O wuli uurle nder Waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom
2Chronicles28:4 O wuli kirsaaɗi e uureteeɗum haa nokkuuje towɗe e kooseehon e les leɗɗe bilititɗe fuu.
2Chronicles28:5 Jawmiraawo Allah maako yoofi mo nder juŋngo laamiiɗo Siriya'en. Laamiiɗo Siriya'en jaali mo
2Chronicles28:6 Nder nyalaade woore o mbari Yahuudu'en semmbiɗɓe ujine teemerre e noogas (120.000). Ɗum laati non ngam ɓe acci Jawmiraawo Allah kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe.
2Chronicles28:7 Zikiri Efrayimiijo
2Chronicles28:8 Nden honooɓe Isra'iila naŋngi rewɓe e ɓikkoy ujine teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo (200.000) caka yimɓe Yahuuda

2Chronicles28:11 Naneeɗam kadi! Njoofte naŋngaaɓe ɓe koocuɗon haa banndiraaɓe mon
2Chronicles28:12 Nden woɗɓe hoore'en lenyol Efrayim
2Chronicles28:13 ɓe mbi'i: “Taa ngadde naŋngaaɓe ɓe'e haa meeɗen. Ko tammiiɗon huuwugo
2Chronicles28:14 Honooɓe njoofti naŋngaaɓe e keɓal konu yeeso hoore'en e jama'aare fuu.
2Chronicles28:15 Worɓe suɓaaɓe innde innde puɗɗi wallugo naŋngaaɓe. Ɓe ɓorni temmbuɓe bee kuuje keɓal konu
2Chronicles28:16 Saa'i man laamiiɗo Akas neli haa laamiiɗo Assuura
2Chronicles28:17 Ngam Edoomi'en ngari fahin
2Chronicles28:18 Filisti'en boo kippi lesdi towndiije e Lesdi Fombina
2Chronicles28:19 Jawmiraawo leesni Yahuuda ngam daliila laamiiɗo Akas mo ɗuɗɗini ƴaggaare yimɓe Yahuuda
2Chronicles28:20 Tigilat-Pileser

2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya woodi duuɓi noogas e jowi
2Chronicles29:2 O waɗi ko fottani Jawmiraawo

2Chronicles29:4 O ewni liman'en e Lewi'en
2Chronicles29:5 O wi'i ɓe: “Naneeɗam
2Chronicles29:6 Ngam baabiraaɓe men ngewi umroore Allah Jawmiraawo men
2Chronicles29:7 Ɓe maɓɓi dammuɗe zawleeru haykaliiru
2Chronicles29:8 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo tikkani lesdi Yahuuda e Urusaliima
2Chronicles29:9 Ngam daliila tikkere nde'e baabiraaɓe men maayri bee kaafahi
2Chronicles29:10 Ammaa jonta mi annini haɓɓugo alkawal bee Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila
2Chronicles29:11 Ɓikkoy am
2Chronicles29:12 Lewi'en huuwooɓe ngoni: Nder danygol Kahat
2Chronicles29:13 Nder danygol Elicafan boo
2Chronicles29:14 Nder danygol Heman
2Chronicles29:15 Kamɓe ɓe mooɓti banndiraaɓe maɓɓe
2Chronicles29:16 Liman'en boo nasti ndu
2Chronicles29:17 Nder lewru aranndu
2Chronicles29:18 Ɓe nasti saare laamiiɗo
2Chronicles29:19 Kuuje ɗe laamiiɗo Akas soɓnino wakkati laamu mum fuu nde o yewno umroore Allah
2Chronicles29:20 Jaŋngo man
2Chronicles29:21 Ɓe ngaddi ga'i kalhali joweeɗiɗi e jawɗi baali joweeɗiɗi e njawkoy njoweeɗiɗoy e jawɗi be'i joweeɗiɗi kirseteeɗi ngam ittuki hakkeeji nder laamu e suudu seniindu e Yahuuda fuu. Hezekiya umri liman'en danygol Haruna lii'ano ɗi Jawmiraawo dow hirsirde.
2Chronicles29:22 Ɓe kirsi ga'i go. Liman'en koo'i ƴiiƴam maaji
2Chronicles29:23 Ɓaawo man ɓe ngaddi jawɗi be'i kirseteeɗi ngam ittuki hakkeeji
2Chronicles29:24 Nden liman'en kirsi ɗi
2Chronicles29:25 Hezekiya darni Lewi'en haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo bee koŋsiije e moolooji e garayaaji fodde umroore Daawuda e Gada gi'anoowo Daawuda e annabi Natan ngam umroore nde iwi diga Jawmiraawo bee kunnduɗe annabi'en muuɗum.
2Chronicles29:26 Lewi'en ndari ton bee kuuje gimruɗe ɗe Daawuda waɗno
2Chronicles29:27 Nden Hezekiya umri lii'aago guleteeɗi dow hirsirde. Saa'i liman'en puɗɗi lii'aago ɗi
2Chronicles29:28 Jama'aare fuu sujidi
2Chronicles29:29 Nde ɓe timmini ɗum

2Chronicles29:33 Ɓe ceni boo kirseteeɗi maɓɓe

2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiya neldi ewnaandu haa Isra'iila e Yahuuda fuu. O winndani le'i Efrayim e Manassa bataakeeji haa yimɓe ngara haa Urusaliima
2Chronicles30:2 Laamiiɗo e mawɓe mum e jama'aare haa Urusaliima fuu narri waɗugo juulde man nder lewru ɗiɗaɓru.
2Chronicles30:3 Ɓe mbaawaayno waɗugo nde nder saa'iire umraande
2Chronicles30:4 Haala lewru ɗiɗaɓru fottani laamiiɗo e jama'aare fuu.
2Chronicles30:5 Ngam maajum ɓe narri neldugo ewnaandu nder lesdi Isra'iila fuu
2Chronicles30:6 Yaawɗotooɓe njehi nder lesdi Isra'iila e Yahuuda fuu
2Chronicles30:7 Taa laate bana baabiraaɓe mon e banndiraaɓe mon yewɓe umroore Jawmiraawo Allah kaakiraaɓe muuɗum'en. Kamɓe

2Chronicles30:9 To on lortake haa maako
2Chronicles30:10 Yaawɗotooɓe go njehi haa gure fuu nder lesdi Efrayim e Manassa

2Chronicles30:12 Nder lesdi Yahuuda kam

2Chronicles30:14 Ɓe puɗɗiri bee ittugo kirsirɗe nder Urusaliima e gulduɗe uureteeɗum fuu
2Chronicles30:15 Nyannde sappo e nayaɓre nder lewru ɗiɗaɓru
2Chronicles30:16 Ɓe ndari haa nokkuure maɓɓe bana ko woowa fodde ko tawreeta Muusa
2Chronicles30:17 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe nder jama'aare cenaayno ko'e muuɗum'en. Ngam maajum Lewi'en kirsi njawkoy Paska ngam soɓɓe fuu
2Chronicles30:18 Ɗum laati non ngam ɓurna ummaatoore
2Chronicles30:19 mo ɓernde mum anniyi ɗowtanaago Jawmiraawo Allah kaakiraaɓe mum
2Chronicles30:20 Jawmiraawo jaɓi tornde Hezekiya

2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya suusɗini ɓerɗe Lewi'en

2Chronicles31:13 Yehiyel e Azaziya e Nahat e Asa'el e Yerimot e Yozabat e Eliyel e Ismakiya e Mahat e Benaya laati aynooɓe dow ardaaŋgal Konaniya e deerɗum Sim'i. Ɗum fuu ɗum laati dow umroore laamiiɗo Hezekiya e Azariya
2Chronicles31:14 Koore ɓii Yimna Lewiijo
2Chronicles31:15 Eden e Minyamin e Yeesu'a e Sema'ya e Amariya e Sekaniya mballiri mo bee hoolaare nder berniiji ɗi liman'en njooɗi. Ɓe cenndani banndiraaɓe maɓɓe Lewi'en dokke haa ndotti'en e haa sukaaɓe fodde geɓe muuɗum'en.
2Chronicles31:16 Koo moy gorko mo duuɓi tati e ko ɓuri mo innde muuɗum winndaama nder deftere asli
2Chronicles31:17 e liman'en ɓe inɗe muuɗum'en mbinndaama nder deftere asli fodde ci'e muuɗum'en e Lewi'en ɓe mari duuɓi noogas e ko ɓuri

2Chronicles32:12 Naa kaŋko itti nokkuuje Jawmiraawo towɗe e kirsirɗe mum
2Chronicles32:13 Kadi on anndaa ko min e kaakiraaɓe am kuuwi ummaatooje haa lesɗe goɗɗe na? Ɗowanteeɓe ummaatooje ɗe'e mbaawi hisnugo yimɓe muuɗum'en diga juŋngo laamiiɗo Assuura koo seɗɗa na?
2Chronicles32:14 Moy caka ɗowanteeɓe lesɗe ɗe kaakiraaɓe am nattini waawi hisnugo yimɓe muuɗum diga juŋngo am? Noy Allah mon waawrata hisnugo on diga juŋngo am?
2Chronicles32:15 Kadi

2Chronicles32:17 Laamiiɗo Assuura winnduno bataakeeji boo ngam jancugo Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila. Ndaa ko o winndi: “Ɗowanteeɓe ummaatooje lesɗe goɗɗe kisnaay yimɓe muuɗum'en diga juŋngo am. Bana non
2Chronicles32:18 Nelaaɓe maako kooli ɗum bee Ibraniŋkeere bee semmbe
2Chronicles32:19 Ɓe mbolwi dow Allah mo Urusaliima
2Chronicles32:20 Nden laamiiɗo Hezekiya e annabi Esaaya ɓii Amoosa tori Allah haa asama
2Chronicles32:21 Jawmiraawo neli malaa'ikaajo. Kaŋko o mbari honooɓe semmbiɗɓe e hoore'en e mawɓe fuu nder saŋngeere laamiiɗo Assuura. Laamiiɗo hooti lesdi mum
2Chronicles32:22 Bana non Jawmiraawo hisniri laamiiɗo Hezekiya e yimɓe Urusaliima juŋngo Sanherib
2Chronicles32:23 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe ngari Urusaliima
2Chronicles32:24 Nder wakkati man Hezekiya nyawi haa o ɓadake maayugo. O tori Jawmiraawo. Jawmiraawo jaɓani mo tornde nde
2Chronicles32:25 Ammaa Hezekiya yettaay Jawmiraawo boonanɗo mo
2Chronicles32:26 Nden Hezekiya e yimɓe Urusaliima leestini ko'e muuɗum'en. Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo ukkanaay ɓe tikkere mum
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiya laati diskuɗo
2Chronicles32:28 non boo cuuɗi cigorɗi ngam alkamaari e inaboojam kesam e nebbam e cuuɗi na'i e cuuɗi baali.
2Chronicles32:29 O nyiɓi berniiji
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiya sukki joldude maayel Gihon dowre
2Chronicles32:31 Ammaa nde wakiili'en Baabila nelaaɓe ngari haa maako
2Chronicles32:32 Luttuɗum haala Hezekiya e kuuɗe mum koolaaɗe
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiya maayi
2Chronicles33:1 Manassa woodi duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi
2Chronicles33:2 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo bee tokkaago kuuɗe nyidduɗe ɗe ummaatooje ɗe Jawmiraawo riiwno yeeso Isra'iila'en mbaɗno.
2Chronicles33:3 O nyiɓti nokkuuje towɗe ɗe baaba maako Hezekiya yibbinno go. O mahani Ba'alji kirsirɗe
2Chronicles33:4 O nyiɓi kirsirɗe ngam labbi nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles33:5 O nyiɓani tagle asama fuu kirsirɗe haa dalde ɗiɗi nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
2Chronicles33:6 O lii'i ɓiɓɓe maako worɓe
2Chronicles33:7 O darni suura lawru cehaaŋga nder haykaliiru Allah
2Chronicles33:8 To ummaatoore Isra'iila ɗowtanake ko umrumi nde fuu fodde tawreeta fuu
2Chronicles33:9 Ammaa Manassa esti yimɓe Yahuuda e Urusaliima
2Chronicles33:10 Jawmiraawo wolwani Manassa e yimɓe mum
2Chronicles33:11 Ngam man o acci mawɓe honooɓe laamiiɗo Assuura ngara dow maɓɓe. Ɓe naŋngi Manassa bee ngoodi
2Chronicles33:12 Nder ɓillaare maako o leestini hoore maako masin yeeso Allah kaakiraaɓe maako
2Chronicles33:13 Allah jaɓi tornde maako
2Chronicles33:14 Ɓaawo man Manassa nyiɓti mahol Berniwol Daawuda yaasiwol
2Chronicles33:15 O wurtini labbi jananni e suura lawru diga haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. O itti kirsirɗe ɗe o nyiɓno haa hooseere haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e Urusaliima. O wudini kuuje ɗe'e fuu yaasi berniwol.
2Chronicles33:16 Nden o nyiɓti hirsirde Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles33:17 Ummaatoore kam tokki lii'aago kirseteeɗi haa nokkuuje towɗe nder lesdi
2Chronicles33:18 Luttuɗum haala Manassa e kuuɗe e tornde mum nde o tori Allah e habaruuji yi'ooɓe wolwanɓe mo bee innde Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila
2Chronicles33:19 Tornde laamiiɗo e jaawaabu Allah e haala hakkeeji mum e no o yewri umroore Allah e nokkuuje towɗe ɗe o nyiɓi e suuraaji Asera e labbi ɗi o waɗi hiddeko o leestina hoore maako
2Chronicles33:20 Manassa maayi
2Chronicles33:21 Amon woodi duuɓi noogas e ɗiɗi
2Chronicles33:22 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles33:23 O leestinaay hoore maako yeeso Jawmiraawo bana baaba maako leestiniri nde. Amon ɗuɗɗini aybeeji mum.
2Chronicles33:24 Jaggiiɓe maako tuurtani mo. Ɓe mbari mo nder suudu maako.
2Chronicles33:25 Ammaa yimɓe lesdi Yahuuda mbari tuurtuɓe dow laamiiɗo Amon. Nden ɓe laamini ɓiyiiko Yusiya haa pellel maako.
2Chronicles34:1 Yusiya woodi duuɓi joweetati
2Chronicles34:2 O waɗi ko fottani Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles34:3 Nder nduuɓu laamu Yusiya njoweetataɓu
2Chronicles34:4 Ɓe ngibbini haa yeeso maako kirsirɗe Ba'alji
2Chronicles34:5 Yusiya wuli i'e liman'en labbi dow kirsirɗe maaji. Bana non o seniri lesdi Yahuuda e Urusaliima.
2Chronicles34:6 Koo haa berniiji Manassa e Efrayim e Simeyon haa yotti Neftali boo e nder bille taariiɗe
2Chronicles34:7 Nder lesdi Isra'iila fuu o yibbini kirsirɗe e daŋraŋge Asera
2Chronicles34:8 Nder nduuɓu laamu Yusiya sappo e njoweetataɓu
2Chronicles34:9 Ɓe njehi haa Hilkiyya
2Chronicles34:10 Ɓe ndokki ceede man haa aynooɓe kuugal haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. Kamɓe ɓe ndokki ɗe haa huuwooɓe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles34:11 Kamɓe boo
2Chronicles34:12 Huuwooɓe man ɗon kuuwa bee hoolaare. Ɓe kuuwi dow ardaaŋgal Yahat e Obadiya
2Chronicles34:13 Lewi'en woɗɓe laati hakkilanooɓe kuugal dow roondooɓe kuuje nyiɓugo e huuwooɓe kuuɗe feere feereeje. Woɗɓe boo laati winndooɓe e saraaki'en e aynooɓe dammuɗe.
2Chronicles34:14 Saa'i ɓe ɗon koo'a ceede cigaaɗe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles34:15 O wi'i Safan
2Chronicles34:16 Safan yahrani nde laamiiɗo
2Chronicles34:17 Ɓe njuppi ceede gonɗe nder sundukru haykaliiru
2Chronicles34:18 Nden Safan wi'i laamiiɗo: “Hilkiyya hokki yam deftere nde'e.” O jaŋngani nde laamiiɗo.
2Chronicles34:19 Nde laamiiɗo nani ko winnda nder tawreeta
2Chronicles34:20 Nden o umri Hilkiyya e Ahikam ɓii Safan e Abdon ɓii Mika e Safan binndoowo e Asaya
2Chronicles34:21 “Njehe
2Chronicles34:22 Hilkiyya e nelaaɓe laamiiɗo njehi haa annabi Hulda
2Chronicles34:23 O jaabi ɓe: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Mbi'e gorko nelɗo on:
2Chronicles34:24 Min Jawmiraawo mi ukkan sarru dow nokkuure nde'e e jooɗiiɓe haa maare
2Chronicles34:25 Mi waɗan ɗum
2Chronicles34:26 Laamiiɗo Yahuuda nelɗo on ƴamgo Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles34:27 Ɗum meemi ɓernde ma
2Chronicles34:28 Mi accete a maaya nder hayru. Ɓe mballinte nder yenaande ma bilaa yi'ugo sarru ngu ukkanmi Urusaliima e jooɗiiɓe ton.” Nelaaɓe ngartirani laamiiɗo jaawaabu man.
2Chronicles34:29 Laamiiɗo ewni ndotti'en Urusaliima e Yahuuda fuu.
2Chronicles34:30 Nden o yahdi bee ummaatoore Urusaliima e Yahuuda e liman'en e Lewi'en e yimɓe fuu
2Chronicles34:31 Nden laamiiɗo dari haa nokkuure muuɗum
2Chronicles34:32 Nden o nastini yimɓe Benyamin e wonɓe nder Urusaliima fuu nder alkawal man. Jooɗiiɓe haa Urusaliima mbaɗi fodde alkawal ngal ɓe kaɓɓi bee Allah kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe.
2Chronicles34:33 Koo toy nder lesdi maral yimɓe Isra'iila
2Chronicles35:1 Yusiya waɗani Jawmiraawo juulde Paska haa Urusaliima. Nyannde sappo e nayaɓre nder lewru aranndu
2Chronicles35:2 O darni liman'en ngam huuwugo kuuɗe muuɗum'en
2Chronicles35:3 O wolwani Lewi'en
2Chronicles35:4 Taaske fodde ci'e mon e geɓe kuugal mon
2Chronicles35:5 Ndare nder haykaliiru seniindu bana ni'i: Mooɓgal ci'e Lewi'en gootal fuu ngam mooɓgal ci'e Isra'iila'en banndiraaɓe mon gootal.
2Chronicles35:6 On kirsan njawkoy Paska. Cene ko'e mon jonta
2Chronicles35:7 Yusiya hokki yimɓe waɗɓe juulde Paska fuu njawkoy baali e be'i ujine cappanɗe tatoy (30.000)
2Chronicles35:8 Saraaki'en maako boo ndokki yimɓe e liman'en e Lewi'en caahu. Hilkiyya e Zekariya e Yehiyel
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniya e Sema'ya e Netaneyel
2Chronicles35:10 Nde ɓe taaskitini juulde Paska bana non
2Chronicles35:11 Lewi'en kirsi njawkoy
2Chronicles35:12 Lewi'en itti guleteeɗum maakoy
2Chronicles35:13 Lewi'en ca'i njawkoy Paska dow yiite fodde umroore. Ammaa ɓe ndefi geɓe cenaaɗe nder payanɗe e taasaaje e defruɗe goɗɗe. Nden ɓe njaawi
2Chronicles35:14 Ɓaawo man ɓe taaskitini nyaamdu Paska ngam ko'e maɓɓe e liman'en
2Chronicles35:15 Yimooɓe nder danygol Asaf boo ndari haa nokkuuje kuugal muuɗum'en fodde umroore Daawuda e Asaf e Heman e Yedutuun
2Chronicles35:16 Bana non ɓe kuuwrani Jawmiraawo kuugal fuu nder nyalaade man
2Chronicles35:17 Saa'i man
2Chronicles35:18 Juulde Paska bana nde'e meeɗaay waɗeego nder Isra'iila diga zamanu annabi Samuyila. Walaa laamiiɗo Isra'iila meeɗi waɗugo juulde Paska bana laamiiɗo Yusiya waari nde
2Chronicles35:19 Nder nduuɓu laamu Yusiya sappo e njoweetataɓu ɓe mbaɗi juulde Paska nde'e.
2Chronicles35:20 Ɓaawo Yusiya wo'itini haykaliiru
2Chronicles35:21 Ammaa Neko neldi mo habaru
2Chronicles35:22 Ammaa Yusiya accaay Neko
2Chronicles35:23 Fiɗooɓe bee kuri piɗi laamiiɗo Yusiya. O wi'i sukaaɓe maako: “Ngurtineeɗam haɓre
2Chronicles35:24 Sukaaɓe maako koo'i mo nder moota pucci maako
2Chronicles35:25 Annabi Yeremiya waɗi gimol boyki dow Yusiya. Yimooɓe worɓe e rewɓe fuu ɗon ngima gimi boyki dow Yusiya nder gimi muuɗum'en
2Chronicles35:26 Luttuɗum haala Yusiya e kuuɗe mum koolaaɗe fodde ko winnda nder tawreeta Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles35:27 haala maako diga fuɗɗoode haa timmoode winndaama nder Deftere Laamiiɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda.
2Chronicles36:1 Ɓaawo man yimɓe lesdi Yahuuda cuɓi Yo'ahas ɓii Yusiya
2Chronicles36:2 Yo'ahas woodi duuɓi noogas e tati
2Chronicles36:3 Neko
2Chronicles36:4 Laamiiɗo Misra waɗi Eliyakim deerɗiraawo Yo'ahas laamiiɗo Yahuuda e Urusaliima
2Chronicles36:5 Yooyakim woodi duuɓi noogas e jowi
2Chronicles36:6 Nabukodonosor laamiiɗo Baabila wari hippi mo
2Chronicles36:7 Nabukodonosor hooci kuuje goɗɗe haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles36:8 Luttuɗum haala Yooyakim e kuuɗe mum nyidduɗe e ko heɓi mo fuu
2Chronicles36:9 Yooyakin woodi duuɓi joweetati
2Chronicles36:10 Mawri man
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekiya woodi duuɓi noogas e go'o
2Chronicles36:12 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo Allah maako. O leestinaay hoore maako yeeso annabi Yeremiya
2Chronicles36:13 Laamiiɗo Nabukodonosor hunni mo bee innde Allah haa o ɗowtano mo. Ammaa o tuurtani mo. O saatini hoore maako
2Chronicles36:14 Mawɓe liman'en e yimɓe boo tokki yewugo umroore Allah. Ɓe kuuwi fodde kuuɗe nyidduɗe ɗe ummaatooje goɗɗe kuuwi fuu. Ɓe coɓni haykaliiru Jawmiraawo ndu o senno haa Urusaliima.
2Chronicles36:15 Nde ɗuuɗɗum Jawmiraawo Allah kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe nelani ɓe nelaaɓe mum
2Chronicles36:16 Ammaa ɓe njanci nelaaɓe Allah
2Chronicles36:17 Nden Jawmiraawo yahri laamiiɗo Kaldiya'en dow maɓɓe. O mbardi honooɓe Yahuuda suɓaaɓe bee kaafahi haa haykaliiru maɓɓe seniindu. O enɗaay suka'en e faanyɓe rewɓe
2Chronicles36:18 Laamiiɗo Kaldiya'en ɓofti kuuje mawɗe e pamare fuu haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
2Chronicles36:19 Honooɓe maako nguli haykaliiru Allah
2Chronicles36:20 O dahi daɗɓe kaafahi fuu haa Baabila. Ton ɓe laati maccuɓe maako e maccuɓe danygol maako haa wargo laamu Perezzi'en.
2Chronicles36:21 Bana nii Jawmiraawo hebbitiniri ko o wi'no bee hunnduko Yeremiya: “Lesdi ferwan
2Chronicles36:22 Nder nduuɓu Koores
2Chronicles36:23 “Ndaa nii Koores
Ezra1:1 Nder nduuɓu Koores
Ezra1:2 “Ndaa nii Koores
Ezra1:3 Moy caka mooɗon ɗon nder ummaatoore Allah? Allah wonda bee maako. Sey o yaha Urusaliima nder lesdi Yahuuda
Ezra1:4 Haa Yahuuduujo luttuɗo woni fuu
Ezra1:5 Baaba-ci'e'en nder le'i Yahuuda e Benyamin e liman'en e Lewi'en
Ezra1:6 Heeddiɗɗiraaɓe maɓɓe mballiti ɓe bee kuuje cardi e kaŋŋeeri e jawdi e dabbaaji e kuuje ɗuuɗa-samanje e caahuuji goɗɗi boo.
Ezra1:7 Laamiiɗo Koores wurtini kuuwruɗe haykaliiru Jawmiraawo ɗe Nabukodonosor hoocuno haa Urusaliima
Ezra1:8 Koores
Ezra1:9 Ndaa limgal maaje: Taasaaje kaŋŋeeri cappanɗe tati (30) e taasaaje cardi ujineere (1.000) e laɓe noogas e joweenayi (29)
Ezra1:10 e bulki kaŋŋeeri cappanɗe tati e bulki cardi teemeɗɗe nayi e sappo (410) e kuuwruɗe feere ujineere (1.000).
Ezra1:11 Limgal kuuwruɗe cardi e kaŋŋeeri fuu
Ezra2:1 Ndaa limtuki yimɓe lesdi Yahuuda wartuɓe diga daheeki. Nabukodonosor
Ezra2:2 Ɓe'e ngarti bee Zorobaabila e Yeesu'a e Nehemiya e Seraya e Re'elaya e Mardokay e Bilsan e Mispar e Biguway e Rehum e Ba'ana. Ndaa limgal Isra'iila'en:
