Ezra2:39 Danygol Harim
Ezra2:40 Limgal Lewi'en: Danygol Yeesu'a e Kadmiyel waato danygol Hodawiya
Ezra2:41 Limgal yimooɓe: Danygol Asaf
Ezra2:42 Limgal aynooɓe dammuɗe: Danygol Sallum e Ater e Talmon e Akkubu e Hatita e Sobay
Ezra2:43 Huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru ɗon nder danygol yimɓe ɓe'e: Ciiha e Hasufa e Tabba'ot e Keeros e Si'aha e Padoon e Lebana e Hagaba e Akkubu e Hagabu e Salmay e Hanan e Giddel e Gahar e Raaya e Recin e Nekoda e Gazzam e Uzza e Paseha e Besay e Asna e Me'uni'en e Nefusi'en e Bakabuk e Hasufa e Harhur e Bacalut e Mehida e Harasa e Barkos e Sisera e Tamaha e Niciha e Hatifa.
Ezra2:44 Jeyaaɓe Suleymaanu ɗon nder danygol yimɓe ɓe'e: Sotay e Soferet e Peruda e Ya'ala e Darkon e Giddel e Sefatiya e Hatil e Pokeret-Cebayim e Ami.
Ezra2:45 Limgal huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru e danygol jeyaaɓe Suleymaanu fuu
Ezra2:46 Woodi boo warɓe diga Tel-Melaha e Tel-Harsa e Kerub-Addan e Immer
Ezra2:47 Ɗum danygol Delaya e Tobiya e Nekoda
Ezra2:48 Caka liman'en boo: Danygol Hobaya e danygol Koos e danygol Barjillay. Kamɓe
Ezra2:49 Liman'en ɓe'e ɗaɓɓiti inɗe muuɗum'en nder defte asli muuɗum'en
Ezra2:50 Ngomna wi'i ɓe taa ɓe nyaama kuuje ɓurɗe senaago
Ezra2:51 Limgal yimɓe jama'aare fuu waɗi ujine cappanɗe nayo e ɗiɗo e teemeɗɗe tato e cappanɗe njoweego (42.360).
Ezra2:52 Ɓe ngoodi maccuɓe e horɓe nder jama'aare. Limgal maɓɓe waɗi ujine njoweeɗiɗo e teemeɗɗe tato e cappanɗe tato e njoweeɗiɗo (7.337). Ɓe ngoodi boo yimooɓe worɓe e rewɓe teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo (200).
Ezra2:53 Ɓe ngoodi pucci teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi e cappanɗe tati e joweego (736) e alfadariije teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi e cappanɗe nayi e jowi (245)
Ezra2:54 e geelooɗi teemeɗɗe nayi e cappanɗe tati e jowi (435) e bamɗe ujine joweego e teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi e noogas (6.720).
Ezra2:55 Nde ɓe njotti nokkuure haykaliiru Jawmiraawo haa Urusaliima
Ezra2:56 Ndaa ko ɓe ndokki fodde baawal maɓɓe: Ceede kaŋŋeeri ujine cappanɗe joweego e go'o (61.000) e cardi kilo ujine tati e teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi (3.700) e toggooje limanku teemerre (100).
Ezra2:57 Liman'en e Lewi'en e yimɓe woɗɓe e yimooɓe e aynooɓe dammuɗe e huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru njooɗi nder berniiji muuɗum'en
Ezra3:1 Nde lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru waɗi
Ezra3:2 Yeesu'a ɓii Yocadak bee deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum liman'en e Zorobaabila ɓii Salatiyel bee deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum nyiɓti hirsirde ngam Allah Isra'iila
Ezra3:3 Ɓe ndarni hirsirde dow caɓɓaaje haa nde darino naane koo to ɓe ɗon kula ummaatooje lesdi man. Dow hirsirde man ɓe lii'ani Jawmiraawo guleteeɗi
Ezra3:4 Ɓe mbaɗi boo Juulde Bukkaaji bana ko winnda
Ezra3:5 Ɓaawoɗon boo nguleteeŋga nyalaade nyalaade e guleteeɗi e dokke ngam juulde lewru hesru e ngam juulɗe goɗɗe cenaaɗe ngam Jawmiraawo
Ezra3:6 Diga nyannde go'oore nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru ɓe puɗɗi lii'anaago Jawmiraawo guleteeɗi
Ezra3:7 Ɓe njoɓi sehooɓe kaa'e e sehooɓe leɗɗe
Ezra3:8 Nder hitaande ɗiɗawre ɓaawo ɓe njotti nokkuure haykaliiru Allah haa Urusaliima
Ezra3:9 Yeesu'a bee ɓiɓɓe muuɗum e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum
Ezra3:10 Saa'i mahooɓe mballini caɓɓawal haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
Ezra3:11 Ɓe ngetti Jawmiraawo
Ezra3:12 Ɗuuɗɓe nder liman'en e Lewi'en e baaba-ci'e'en
Ezra3:13 Ummaatoore waawaay senndindirgo hoolo seyo bee hoolo bojji
Ezra4:1 Konne'en yimɓe Yahuuda e Benyamin nani wartuɓe daheeki ɗon nyiɓto haykaliiru Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila.
Ezra4:2 Ɓe ngari haa Zorobaabila e Yeesu'a e baaba-ci'e'en
Ezra4:3 Ammaa Zorobaabila e Yeesu'a e baaba-ci'e'en Isra'iila luttuɓe njaabi ɓe: “Haanaay en kawta ngam nyiɓtanaago Allah amin haykaliiru. Minin feere amin min nyiɓtoto ndu ngam Jawmiraawo
Ezra4:4 Ngam maajum yimɓe lesdi man puɗɗi tampingo e hulnugo yimɓe Yahuuda haa ɓe acca nyiɓtaago haykaliiru.
Ezra4:5 Ɓe njoɓi sarwooɓe ngam haɗugo anniya maɓɓe
Ezra4:6 Haa fuɗɗam laamu Ahasuwerus
Ezra4:7 Nder zamanu laamiiɗo Artahasta boo
Ezra4:8 Rehum
Ezra4:9 “Bataakewol iwŋgol haa Rehum
Ezra4:10 e ummaatooje luttuɗe ɗe Asnapar
Ezra4:11 Ndaa no bataakewol man winndira: Yahugo haa laamiiɗo Artahasta barkaama
Ezra4:12 Barkaama
Ezra4:13 Anndu barkaama
Ezra4:14 Minin min jeyaaɓe ma. Haanaay min munyana asar maaɗa
Ezra4:15 haa a linya defte habaruuji kaakiraaɓe ma. Nden a heɓtan nder defte man
Ezra4:16 Min ɗon anndine
Ezra4:17 Laamiiɗo neldi jaawaabu ni'i: “Bataakewol yahugo haa Rehum
Ezra4:18 Bataakewol ngol nelduɗon min
Ezra4:19 Nden umrumi linyugo haala berniwol ngo'ol. Min tawi: Diga ɓooyma ngol tuurtani laamiiɓe
Ezra4:20 Laamiiɓe marɓe baawɗe laami haa Urusaliima naane
Ezra4:21 Ngam maajum umre haɗugo yimɓe ɓe'e
Ezra4:22 Ndeente
Ezra4:23 Nde bataakewol iwŋgol haa laamiiɗo Artahasta go jaŋnganaama Rehum e Simsay
Ezra4:24 Nden ɓe acci kuugal haa haykaliiru Allah nder Urusaliima boo
Ezra5:1 Annabi Haggay e annabi Zekariya ɓii Iddo mbaɗi annabaaku bee innde Allah Isra'iila dow Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi Yahuuda e nder Urusaliima.
Ezra5:2 Nden Zorobaabila ɓii Salatiyel e Yeesu'a ɓii Yocadak puɗɗiti nyiɓtaago haykaliiru Allah haa Urusaliima. Annabi'en go ngondi bee maɓɓe
Ezra5:3 Saa'i man Tattanay
Ezra5:4 Ɓe ƴami boo: “Noy inɗe nyiɓtooɓe ndu?”
Ezra5:5 Ammaa Allah ayni ndotti'en Yahuudu'en
Ezra5:6 Ndaa bataakewol iwŋgol haa Tattanay ngomna lesdi hiirnaaŋge maayo Efratis e Setar-Bosnay e huuwdiɗɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en Afarsaki'en
Ezra5:7 Ndaa ko winnda nder kubaruwol ngol ɓe neldi mo: “Yahugo haa laamiiɗo Dariyus: Salaaman laatano ma nder koo ɗume fuu!
Ezra5:8 Barkaama
Ezra5:9 Min ƴami ndotti'en maɓɓe: Moy duŋani on nyiɓtugo suudu ndu'u e mahitaago mahi maaru?
Ezra5:10 Min ƴami boo inɗe maɓɓe. Min mbinndi inɗe hoore'en maɓɓe ngam haa min anndine.
Ezra5:11 Ndaa ko ɓe njaabi min: Min maccuɓe Allah marɗo asama e lesdi. Min ɗon nyiɓto haykaliiru nyiɓaanduno haa ɗo nder zamanu ɓooyma. Laamiiɗo Isra'iila mawɗo nyiɓno ndu
Ezra5:12 Ammaa kaakiraaɓe amin tikkini Allah mo asama. Ngam maajum o hokki ɓe haa juŋngo Nabukodonosor
Ezra5:13 Ammaa hitaande nde laamiiɗo Koores laamo dow Baabila
Ezra5:14 Kuuwruɗe haykaliiru Allah boo
Ezra5:15 O wi'i mo: Hoo'u kuuje ɗe'e
Ezra5:16 Nden Sesbaccar wari
Ezra5:17 Kadi jonta
Ezra6:1 Nden laamiiɗo Dariyus umri linyugo sigordu defte haa ndesaaji Baabila ngoni.
Ezra6:2 Haa Ahemeta
Ezra6:3 “Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Koores aranu
Ezra6:4 Ɓe nyiɓta ndu bee kaa'e cehaaɗe ɓale tati
Ezra6:5 Kuuwruɗe kaŋŋeeri e cardi iwɗe haa haykaliiru Allah
Ezra6:6 Nden laamiiɗo Dariyus umri ni'i: “Jonta
Ezra6:7 Taa kaɗe kuuɗe haykaliiru Allah. Acce ngomnaajo Yahuudu'en e ndotti'en muuɗum'en nyiɓto ndu haa nokkuure maaru.
Ezra6:8 Ndaa ko mi umrata on ngam haa on mballa ndotti'en Yahuudu'en ɓe'e nyiɓtaago haykaliiru Allah ndu'u: Njoɓe kuugal maɓɓe fuu bee tokkindirki
Ezra6:9 Non boo ga'i kalhali e jawɗi baali e njawkoy
Ezra6:10 ngam haa ɓe lii'ano Allah mo asama dokke pottuɗe
Ezra6:11 Ndaa ko mi umri boo: To goɗɗo luuti umroore nde'e
Ezra6:12 Mo luuti umroore nde'e
Ezra6:13 Tattanay
Ezra6:14 Ndotti'en Yahuudu'en boo tokki nyiɓtaago. Kuugal maɓɓe yehi yeeso yeeso ngam annabaaku Haggay e Zekariya ɓii Iddo suusɗini ɓe. Ɓe nyiɓti
Ezra6:15 Haykaliiru timmi nyannde tataɓre nder lewru wi'eteendu Adar
Ezra6:16 Isra'iila'en
Ezra6:17 Ngam juulde nde ɓe ngaddi kirseteeɗi: Ga'i kalhali teemerre (100) e jawɗi baali teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi (200) e njawkoy teemeɗɗe nayo (400). Ngam ittugo hakkeeji Isra'iila fuu boo ɓe lii'ani Allah jawɗi be'i sappo e ɗiɗi
Ezra6:18 Ɓe ndarni liman'en e Lewi'en fodde geɓe muuɗum'en ngam kuugal Allah haa Urusaliima
Ezra6:19 Nyannde sappo e nayaɓre nder lewru aranndu
Ezra6:20 Ngam liman'en e Lewi'en cenno ko'e muuɗum'en gooto gooto fuu
Ezra6:21 Isra'iila'en wartuɓe daheeki nyaami jawgel Paska
Ezra6:22 Nyalɗe joweeɗiɗi ɓe mbaɗi juulde tamseeje ɗe ufnaaka bee seyo
Ezra7:1 Ɓaawo man
Ezra7:2 
Ezra7:3 
Ezra7:4 
Ezra7:5 
Ezra7:6 
Ezra7:7 Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Artahasta njoweeɗiɗaɓu
Ezra7:8 Esira boo yotti ton nder lewru jowaɓru
Ezra7:9 O darnino nyannde go'oore nder lewru aranndu ngam dilluki maako diga Baabila. Nyannde go'oore nder lewru jowaɓru o yotti Urusaliima
Ezra7:10 Ngam Esira annini linyugo tawreeta Jawmiraawo e ɗowtanaago ka e anndingo Isra'iila farillaaji e kiitaaji.
Ezra7:11 Ndaa bataakewol ngol laamiiɗo Artahasta hokki limanjo Esira
Ezra7:12 “Bataakewol ngol iwi haa Artahasta
Ezra7:13 Ndaa ko mi umri: Koo moy nder ummaatoore Isra'iila gonɗo nder laamu am e liman'en e Lewi'en
Ezra7:14 Laamiiɗo e dawrooɓe muuɗum njoweeɗiɗo neli ma ngam linyugo no kuuje mba'i haa Yahuuda e Urusaliima fodde deftere umrooje Allah maaɗa wonnde haa juŋngo ma.
Ezra7:15 A yahra cardi e kaŋŋeeri ɗi laamiiɗo e dawrooɓe muuɗum ngaddani Allah Isra'iila mo haykaliiru mum ɗon haa Urusaliima caahuuji.
Ezra7:16 Non boo cardi e kaŋŋeeri ɗi keɓata nder lesdi Baabila fuu e caahuuji ummaatoore e liman'en ɗi ɓe ngaddi ngam haykaliiru Allah maɓɓe haa Urusaliima.
Ezra7:17 A huuwtinira ceede ɗe'e bee hakkiilo ngam soodugo ga'i kalhali e jawɗi baali e njawkoy
Ezra7:18 Cardi e kaŋŋeeri luttuɗi boo
Ezra7:19 Kuuwruɗe ɗe keɓata ngam dewal nder haykaliiru Allah maaɗa
Ezra7:20 To woodi haaje feere ngam haykaliiru Allah maaɗa
Ezra7:21 Min laamiiɗo Artahasta mi ɗon umra kaliifa'en ndesaaje nder lesdi hiirnaaŋge maayo Efratis fuu: Ko Esira
Ezra7:22 haa dillango cardi kilo ujine tati e alkamaari buhuuje teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi e inaboojam liitir ujine ɗiɗi e nebbam liitir ujine ɗiɗi
Ezra7:23 Ko Allah mo asama umri fuu
Ezra7:24 Mi ɗon anndina on boo: Liman'en e Lewi'en e yimooɓe e aynooɓe dammuɗe e huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru Allah e huuwooɓe woɗɓe nder maaru
Ezra7:25 An boo
Ezra7:26 Mo ɗowtanaaki umrooje Allah maaɗa e umroore laamiiɗo
Ezra7:27 Nden Esira wi'i: “Yettoore laatano Allah Jawmiraawo kaakiraaɓe meeɗen
Ezra7:28 Jawmiraawo woonani yam
Ezra8:1 Ndaa limtuki baaba-ci'e'en warduɓe bee am diga Baabila fodde defte asli muuɗum'en
Ezra8:2 Nder danygol Pinehas
Ezra8:3 ɓii Sekaniya
Ezra8:4 Nder danygol Pahat-Mo'ab
Ezra8:5 Nder danygol Zattu
Ezra8:6 Nder danygol Adiina
Ezra8:7 Nder danygol Elam
Ezra8:8 Nder danygol Sefatiya
Ezra8:9 Nder danygol Yo'ab
Ezra8:10 Nder danygol Baani
Ezra8:11 Nder danygol Bebay
Ezra8:12 Nder danygol Asgada
Ezra8:13 Nder danygol Adonikam
Ezra8:14 Nder danygol Biguway
Ezra8:15 Mi mooɓti yimɓe ɓe'e baŋnge maayo ngo ilata heedi Ahawa. Min caŋngini ton nyalɗe tati. Mi yi'i ummaatoore e liman'en ɗon
Ezra8:16 Ngam maajum nelmi ardiiɓe ɓe'e: Eli'ezer e Ariyel e Sema'ya e Elnatan e Yariba e Elnatan e Natan e Zekariya e Mesullam
Ezra8:17 mi hokki ɓe habaru ngam Iddo
Ezra8:18 Juŋngo Allah men wooɗŋgo wondi bee amin
Ezra8:19 Non boo Hasabiya e Yesa'ya mo danygol Meraari e deerɗiraaɓe maako e ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe
Ezra8:20 Haa huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru boo worɓe teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo e noogas (220)
Ezra8:21 Ton baŋnge maayo Ahawa umrumi suumaye
Ezra8:22 Mi semti toraago laamiiɗo haa o hokka min honooɓe e wa'iiɓe pucci ngam aynugo min yeeso konne'en haa laawol. Ngam min mbi'no mo: “Juŋngo Allah amin ɗon wondi bee ɗakkotooɓe mo fuu haa o woonana ɓe. Ammaa tikkere maako saatunde waran dow accuɓe mo fuu.”
Ezra8:23 Ngam maajum min cuumi
Ezra8:24 Nden cuɓmi sappo e ɗiɗo nder mawɓe liman'en
Ezra8:25 Mi awnani ɓe cardi e kaŋŋeeri e kuuwruɗe
Ezra8:26 Nden ndokkumi awnaaɗum haa juuɗe maɓɓe: Cardi baakin kilo ujine noogas (20.000) e kuuje cardi kilo teemerre (100) e kaŋŋeeri kilo ujine tati (3.000)
Ezra8:27 e bulki kaŋŋeeri noogas (20) ko waɗata ceede kaŋŋeeri ujineere (1.000) e kuuwruɗe njamndi mboɗeeri ɗelkanndi ɗiɗi
Ezra8:28 Mi wi'i ɓe: “On senaaɓe ngam Jawmiraawo
Ezra8:29 Ayne ɗum booɗɗum haa on awno ɗum yeeso mawɓe liman'en e Lewi'en e baaba-ci'e'en Isra'iila haa Urusaliima
Ezra8:30 Liman'en e Lewi'en koo'i cardi e kaŋŋeeri e kuuwruɗe man haa ɓe njahra ɗum haa haykaliiru Allah meeɗen haa Urusaliima.
Ezra8:31 Nyannde sappo e ɗiɗawre nder lewru aranndu min ummi haa maayo Ahawa
Ezra8:32 Nden min njotti Urusaliima. Min ciwti nyalɗe tati.
Ezra8:33 Nyalaade nayaɓre min awni cardi e kaŋŋeeri e kuuwruɗe go nder haykaliiru Allah men
Ezra8:34 Ɓe limti
Ezra8:35 Wartuɓe daheeki ngaddi dabbaaji guleteeɗi ngam Allah Isra'iila: Ga'i kalhali sappo e ɗiɗi ngam Isra'iila fuu e jawɗi baali cappanɗe joweenayi e joweego e njawkoy cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗoy e njoweeɗiɗoy e jawɗi be'i sappo e ɗiɗi ngam ittuki hakkeeji
Ezra8:36 Nden ɓe ndokki umrooje laamiiɗo haa ngomna'en e wakiili'en nder lesdi hiirnaaŋge Efratis
Ezra9:1 Ɓaawo man ardiiɓe ɓaditi yam
Ezra9:2 Ɓe te'i ɓiɓɓe jananɓe rewɓe
Ezra9:3 Nde mi nani ɗum
Ezra9:4 Nden ɗowtaniiɓe wolde Allah Isra'iila fuu mooɓi haa am ngam daliila sooynde hoolaare wartuɓe nde'e. Min mi tokki jooɗaago nder saklere haa wargo saa'iire nde ɓe lii'anto Allah dokkal nyaamdu kiikiiɗe.
Ezra9:5 Mi heɓti hoore am wakkati dokkal man. Nde mi ɗon ɓorni limce am ceekaaɗe go tawon
Ezra9:6 mi wi'i: “Yaa Allah am
Ezra9:7 Diga saa'i kaakiraaɓe amin haa wargo hannde min aybuɓe masin. Ngam daliila zunuubaaji amin a hokki min haa juuɗe laamiiɓe jananɓe
Ezra9:8 Jonta boo
Ezra9:9 Fakat min maccuɓe
Ezra9:10 Ammaa ɗume min mbi'ata jonta kadi
Ezra9:11 ɗe ndokkunooɗa min bee kunnduɗe jaggiiɓe ma annabi'en. A wi'no: Lesdi ndi nastoton ngam haa maron ndi
Ezra9:12 Ngam maajum
Ezra9:13 Min njari bone ngam kuuɗe amin kalluɗe e aybeeji amin ɗuuɗɗi. Ammaa an a hiitaaki min fodde zunuubaaji amin ɗuuɗɗi
Ezra9:14 Ɓaawo naawɗum ɗum fuu
Ezra9:15 Yaa Allah
Ezra10:1 Saa'i Esira ɗon toro Allah
Ezra10:2 Sekaniya ɓii Yehiyel
Ezra10:3 Sey en kaɓɓa alkawal bee Allah meeɗen jonta
Ezra10:4 Umma jonta
Ezra10:5 Esira ummi
Ezra10:6 Nden Esira dilli diga nokkuure muuɗum yeeso haykaliiru Allah
Ezra10:7 Ɓaawo man ɓe mbaɗi wooynaandu nder lesdi Yahuuda e nder Urusaliima ngam haa ɓe mooɓta wartuɓe daheeki fuu haa Urusaliima.
Ezra10:8 Ardiiɓe e ndotti'en carwootiri
Ezra10:9 Worɓe Yahuuda e Benyamin fuu mooɓi haa Urusaliima nder nyalɗe tati. Ɗum nyalaade noogasre nder lewru joweenayaɓru. Ɓe njooɗi haa daldal haykaliiru Allah
Ezra10:10 Esira
Ezra10:11 Ngam maajum mbaŋgine hakke mooɗon yeeso Jawmiraawo
Ezra10:12 Mooɓre fuu jaabi bee sawtu: “Nonnon
Ezra10:13 Ammaa yimɓe ɗuuɗi
Ezra10:14 Ndikka ardiiɓe amin ta'a haala man ngam jama'aare fuu. Koo moy nder gure amin
Ezra10:15 Ammaa Yonatan ɓii Asa'el e Yahajeya ɓii Tikuwa ngerdaaki
Ezra10:16 Wartuɓe daheeki mbaɗi bana non. Esira
Ezra10:17 
Ezra10:18 Caka liman'en
Ezra10:19 Ɓe ngerdi seerugo rewɓe maɓɓe. Ɓe ngaddi njawdiri mbaalu ndi kirseteendi ngam aybe maɓɓe.
Ezra10:20 Caka ɓiɓɓe Immer
Ezra10:21 Caka ɓiɓɓe Harim
Ezra10:22 Caka ɓiɓɓe Pashuuru
Ezra10:23 Caka Lewi'en: Yozabat e Sim'i e Kelaya bi'eteeɗo boo Kelita e Petahiya e Yahuuda e Eli'ezer.
Ezra10:24 Caka yimooɓe: Eliyasib. Caka aynooɓe dammuɗe: Sallum e Telem e Uuri.
Ezra10:25 Caka yimɓe Isra'iila boo: Nder danygol Par'os
Ezra10:26 Nder danygol Elam: Mattaniya e Zekariya e Yehiyel e Abdi e Yeremot e Eliya.
Ezra10:27 Nder danygol Zattu
Ezra10:28 Nder danygol Bebay: Yehohanan e Hananiya e Zabbay e Atalay.
Ezra10:29 Nder danygol Baani: Mesullam e Malluku e Adaya e Yasuba e Seyal e Ramot.
Ezra10:30 Nder danygol Pahat-Mo'ab: Adana e Kelal e Benaya e Ma'aseya e Mattaniya e Becaleel e Binnuy e Manassa.
Ezra10:31 Nder danygol Harim: Eli'ezer e Yissiya e Malkiya e Sema'ya e Simeyon
Ezra10:32 e Benyamin e Malluku e Semariya.
Ezra10:33 Nder danygol Hasum: Mattenay e Mattattay e Zabada e Elifelet e Yeremay e Manassa e Sim'i.
Ezra10:34 Nder danygol Baani: Ma'aday e Amram e Uyel
Ezra10:35 e Benaya e Bediya e Keluhi
Ezra10:36 e Waniya e Meremot e Eliyasib
Ezra10:37 e Mattaniya e Mattenay e Ya'asay.
Ezra10:38 Nder danygol Binnuy: Sim'i
Ezra10:39 e Selemiya e Natan e Adaya
Ezra10:40 e Makanadebay e Sasay e Saray
Ezra10:41 e Azareyel e Selemiya e Semariya
Ezra10:42 e Sallum e Amariya e Yusufu.
Ezra10:43 Nder danygol Nebo: Ye'iyel e Mattitiya e Zabada e Zebina e Yadday e Yo'el e Benaya.
Ezra10:44 Kamɓe fuu ɓe te'uno rewɓe jananɓe. Rewɓe woɗɓe ndanydino bee maɓɓe.
Nehemiah1:1 Ndaa haala Nehemiya ɓii Hakaliya: Nder lewru Kislew
Nehemiah1:2 Saa'i man Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Ɓe njaabi yam: “Luttuɓe ton nder lesdi
Nehemiah1:4 Nde mi nani haala ka mi jooɗi
Nehemiah1:5 mi wi'i: “Yaa Allah Jawmiraawo mo asama
Nehemiah1:6 Useni
Nehemiah1:7 Min mbaɗi kalluɗum masin dow maaɗa
Nehemiah1:8 Useni
Nehemiah1:9 Ammaa to on lortake haa am
Nehemiah1:10 Ɓe maccuɓe ma e ummaatoore ma. A sootti ɓe bee baawɗe ma mawɗe e juŋngo ma semmbiɗŋgo.
Nehemiah1:11 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Nehemiah2:1 Nder lewru Nisaanu
Nehemiah2:2 Laamiiɗo ƴami yam: “Ko waɗi a wonti hannde? A nyawaay boo! Fakat
Nehemiah2:3 mi wi'i laamiiɗo: “Allah hokke sabbuŋgo
Nehemiah2:4 Laamiiɗo ƴami yam: “Ko ngiɗɗa kadi?” Mi tori Allah mo asama
Nehemiah2:5 nden mi jaabi laamiiɗo: “To ɗum fottani ma
Nehemiah2:6 Laamiiɗo ɗonno jooɗodi bee daada saare muuɗum ƴami: “Haa ndeye jahaaŋgal ma duurata? Ndeye a lortoto?” Ɗum fottani mo o accammi mi dilla. Min boo mi wi'i mo wakkati man.
Nehemiah2:7 Fahin mi wi'i mo: “To ɗum fottani ma
Nehemiah2:8 Non boo bataakewol ngam Asaf
Nehemiah2:9 Nde mi yotti haa ngomna'en nder lesdi hiirnaaŋge maayo Efratis
Nehemiah2:10 Ammaa nde Samballat Horoniijo e Tobiya
Nehemiah2:11 Mi yotti Urusaliima
Nehemiah2:12 Nden jemma mi ummodi bee worɓe seɗɗa
Nehemiah2:13 Mi wurti haa dammugal waadiwol bee jemma
Nehemiah2:14 Nden mi saali kommbi Dammugal Seeɓoore e Weendu Laamiiɗo. Ammaa mba'anteewa am waawaay saalaago ton.
Nehemiah2:15 Ngam maajum
Nehemiah2:16 Kaliifa'en anndaa toy njahmi malla ko mbaɗmi. Ngam walaa ko mi anndini Yahuudu'en tawon
Nehemiah2:17 Nden mi wi'i ɓe: “On ɗon ngi'a en ɗon nder bone
Nehemiah2:18 Mi yecci ɓe no juŋngo Allah am wondiri bee am e ko laamiiɗo wi'no yam boo. Ɓe mbi'i: “Ummen
Nehemiah2:19 Samballat Horoniijo e Tobiya
Nehemiah2:20 Mi jaabi ɓe: “Allah mo asama hokkan min hayru. Minin jagganooɓe mo min puɗɗan nyiɓtaago. Ammaa onon on ngalaa geɗal koo baawɗe
Nehemiah3:1 Eliyasib
Nehemiah3:2 Kommbi maɓɓe
Nehemiah3:3 Yimɓe nder danygol Senaa nyiɓti Dammugal Liɗɗi. Ɓe kippi dow maagal bee leɗɗe
Nehemiah3:4 Kommbi maɓɓe
Nehemiah3:5 Kommbi maako boo
Nehemiah3:6 Yoyada ɓii Paseha e Mesullam ɓii Besodiya mbo'itini Dammugal Berniwol Kiiɗŋgol. Ɓe kippi dow maagal bee leɗɗe
Nehemiah3:7 Kommbi maɓɓe
Nehemiah3:8 Kommbi maɓɓe

Nehemiah4:1 Ammaa nde Samballat e Tobiya e Arab'en e Ammooni'en e yimɓe Asdod nani Yahuudu'en ɗon mbo'itina mahol Urusaliima booɗɗum e puɗɗi maɓɓugo gibbe
Nehemiah4:2 Ɓe fuu ɓe kawti ngam ɓe kaɓa bee Urusaliima
Nehemiah4:3 Min tori Allah amin. Jemma e naaŋge min ndarni aynooɓe ngam daliila maɓɓe.
Nehemiah4:4 Ammaa yimɓe Yahuuda mbi'i: “Roondooɓe tampi
Nehemiah4:5 Konne'en amin mbi'i: “Ɓe annditittaa e ɓe ngi'ataa koo ɗume haa to en njotti caka maɓɓe
Nehemiah4:6 Ammaa Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe kommbi maɓɓe ngari diga toy fuu
Nehemiah4:7 Ngam maajum ndarnumi yimɓe nder lugge
Nehemiah4:8 Nde ngi'mi ɗum
Nehemiah4:9 Konne'en amin nani min anndi nufayeeje maɓɓe
Nehemiah4:10 Diga saa'i maajum reeta suka'en am kuuwi
Nehemiah4:11 nyiɓtooɓe mahol fuu. Roondooɓe kuuwi bee juŋngo wooto
Nehemiah4:12 Nyiɓtooɓe fuu mbakki kaafaaje muuɗum'en

Nehemiah4:15 Bana non min kuuwri diga subaha haa saa'i nde koode mbaŋgi fahin. Reeta amin ɗon bee labbe haa juŋngo.

Nehemiah5:1 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe bee rewɓe muuɗum'en nder ummaatoore puɗɗi siŋkugo dow banndiraaɓe maɓɓe Yahuudu'en.
Nehemiah5:2 Woɗɓe mbi'i: “Minin bee ɓikkoy amin ngorkoy e ndehoy min ɗuuɗɓe
Nehemiah5:3 Woɗɓe boo mbi'i: “Doole min mballina gese amin e inabooje amin e cuuɗi amin jeŋngina
Nehemiah5:4 Woɗɓe fahin mbi'i: “Min njaɓi nyamaande dow gese amin e inabooje amin ngam min njoɓa laamiiɗo jomorgol.
Nehemiah5:5 Naa ɓalli amin poti bee ɓalli banndiraaɓe amin
Nehemiah5:6 Nde mi nani siŋkuye maɓɓe e bolle ɗe'e
Nehemiah5:7 Mi hoo'i anniya felugo mawɓe e kaliifa'en. Mi feli ɓe
Nehemiah5:8 Mi wi'i ɓe: “Minin min cootti banndiraaɓe amin Yahuudu'en soorraaɓe haa yimɓe ummaatooje feere fodde baawɗe amin. Nden kam
Nehemiah5:9 Mi wi'i: “Ko on mbaɗata
Nehemiah5:10 Koo min e deerɗiraaɓe am e sukaaɓe am boo
Nehemiah5:11 Ndokkite ɓe hannde nde'e gese maɓɓe e inabooje maɓɓe e jaytunje maɓɓe e cuuɗi maɓɓe. Njaafane ɓe riba ceede e hataka alkamaari e inaboojam kesam e nebbam
Nehemiah5:12 Ɓe njaabi: “Min ndokkitan ɓe ɗum
Nehemiah5:13 Nden mi fiɗɗi gawargal limce am
Nehemiah5:14 Laamiiɗo Artahasta waɗi yam ngomna dow lesdi Yahuuda nder nduuɓu muuɗum noogaswu. Mi ngomnaajo haa wargo nduuɓu maako cappanɗe tati e ɗiɗaɓu. Nder duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi man fuu mi huuwtiniraay ceede ngomna ngam nguure am
Nehemiah5:15 Ngomna'en aartuɓe yam teddani yimɓe
Nehemiah5:16 Mi huuwi boo haa bo'itinki mahol ngo'ol
Nehemiah5:17 Yahuudu'en e kaliifa'en teemerre e cappanɗe njowo nyaami nder saare am
Nehemiah5:18 Nyalaade fuu min taaskitini ngaari ngoori e baali cuɓaaɗi joweego e colli e ɓaawo nyalɗe sappo fuu min taaskitini inaboojam ɗuuɗɗam. Ammaa mi ƴamaay nguure am haa ngomna
Nehemiah5:19 Yaa Allah am
Nehemiah6:1 Nde Samballat e Tobiya e Gesem Arabjo e konne'en amin woɗɓe nani mi timmini nyiɓtaago mahol

Nehemiah7:54 Limgal yimɓe jama'aare fuu waɗi ujine cappanɗe nayo e ɗiɗo e teemeɗɗe tato e cappanɗe njoweego (42.360).
Nehemiah7:55 Ɓe ngoodi maccuɓe e horɓe nder jama'aare. Limgal maɓɓe waɗi ujine njoweeɗiɗo e teemeɗɗe tato e cappanɗe tato e njoweeɗiɗo (7.337). Ɓe ngoodi boo yimooɓe worɓe e rewɓe teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo e cappanɗe nayo e njowo (245)
Nehemiah7:56 e geelooɗi teemeɗɗe nayi e cappanɗe tati e jowi (435) e bamɗe ujine joweego e teemeɗɗe joweeɗiɗi e noogas (6.720).
Nehemiah7:57 Woɗɓe caka baaba-ci'e'en ndokki jawdi ngam kuugal nyiɓtaago. Ngomna waati haa ndesaari ceede kaŋŋeeri ujineere e taasaaje cappanɗe jowi e toggooje limanku teemeɗɗe jowi e cappanɗe tati (530).
Nehemiah7:58 Woɗɓe caka baaba-ci'e'en mbaati haa ndesaari kuugal: Ceede kaŋŋeeri ujine noogas e cardi baakin kilo ujineere e teemerre (1.100).
Nehemiah7:59 Yimɓe luttuɓe boo ndokki ceede kaŋŋeeri ujine noogas e cardi baakin kilo ujineere (1.000) e toggooje limanku cappanɗe joweego e joweeɗiɗi.
Nehemiah7:60 Liman'en e Lewi'en e aynooɓe dammuɗe e yimooɓe e yimɓe woɗɓe e huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru e Isra'iila'en fuu njooɗi nder gure muuɗum'en. Nde lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru waɗi
Nehemiah8:1 Ummaatoore fuu mooɓi bana goɗɗo gooto haa daldal yeeso Dammugal Ndiyam. Ɓe mbi'i moodibbo Esira o wadda deftere tawreeta Muusa
Nehemiah8:2 Nyannde go'oore nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru
Nehemiah8:3 O jaŋngi deftere man haa babal yeeso Dammugal Ndiyam
Nehemiah8:4 Moodibbo Esira dari dow ba'eteeɗum leggal ko ɓe mbaɗi ngam daliila man. Mattitiya e Sema e Anaya e Uriya e Hilkiyya e Ma'aseya ndari haa nyaamo maako. Pedaya e Miisayel e Malkiya e Hasum e Hasbaddana e Zekariya e Mesullam boo ndari haa nano maako.

Nehemiah10:36 Hitaande fuu

Nehemiah10:38 Non boo ko ɓuri wooɗugo haa kuroori amin e dokke ɓiɓɓe leɗɗe amin e inaboojam kesam e nebbam
Nehemiah10:39 Goɗɗo limanjo mo danygol Haruna wondan bee Lewi'en
Nehemiah10:40 Isra'iila'en e Lewi'en cigoto dokke alkamaari e inaboojam kesam e nebbam nder cigorɗi man. Kuuwruɗe suudu seniindu ɗon ton
Nehemiah11:1 Ardiiɓe ummaatoore njooɗi haa Urusaliima
Nehemiah11:2 Yimɓe mbarkiɗini jaɓɓe jooɗaago haa Urusaliima bee ngiɗa muuɗum'en fuu.
Nehemiah11:3 Ndaa inɗe ardiiɓe lesdi Yahuuda
Nehemiah11:4 woɗɓe nder le'i Yahuuda e Benyamin njooɗi haa Urusaliima. Nder yimɓe Yahuuda
Nehemiah11:5 e Ma'aseya ɓii Baruku ɓii Kol-Hooze ɓii Hazaya ɓii Adaya ɓii Yoyaribu ɓii Zekariya Siloniijo.
Nehemiah11:6 Ɓiɓɓe Peres
Nehemiah11:7 Nder yimɓe Benyamin: Sallu ɓii Mesullam ɓii Yo'eda ɓii Pedaya ɓii Kolaya ɓii Ma'aseya ɓii Itiyel ɓii Yesa'ya
Nehemiah11:8 e ɓaawo maako
Nehemiah11:9 Yo'el ɓii Zikiri woni kaliifaajo maɓɓe
Nehemiah11:10 Nder liman'en
Nehemiah11:11 e Seraya ɓii Hilkiyya ɓii Mesullam ɓii Cadok ɓii Merayot ɓii Ahitooba
Nehemiah11:12 e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en huuwooɓe kuugal nder haykaliiru
Nehemiah11:13 e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en
Nehemiah11:14 e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en honooɓe suusɓe teemerre e noogas e njoweetato (128). Zabdiyel ɓii Hagedolim woni kaliifaajo maɓɓe.
Nehemiah11:15 Nder Lewi'en kamɓe ngoni: Sema'ya ɓii Hassuba ɓii Ajirikam ɓii Hasbiya ɓii Bunni
Nehemiah11:16 e Sabbetay e Yozabat
Nehemiah11:17 Non boo Mattaniya ɓii Mika ɓii Zabdi ɓii Asaf
Nehemiah11:18 Limgal Lewi'en nder berniwol ceniiŋgol fuu waɗi teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo e cappanɗe njoweetato e nayo (284).
Nehemiah11:19 Aynooɓe dammuɗe ngoni: Akkubu e Talmon e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en aynooɓe dammuɗe
Nehemiah11:20 Isra'iila'en luttuɓe e liman'en e Lewi'en njooɗi nder berniiji Yahuuda fuu
Nehemiah11:21 Huuwooɓe kuuɗe pamare nder haykaliiru njooɗi haa towndiire Ofel. Ciiha e Gispa ngoni ardiiɓe maɓɓe.
Nehemiah11:22 Uzzi ɓii Baani ɓii Hasabiya ɓii Mattaniya ɓii Mika woni kaliifaajo Lewi'en haa Urusaliima. O goɗɗo danygol Asaf
Nehemiah11:23 Woodino umroore laamiiɗo e anniya timmuka dow kuuɗe yimooɓe nyalaade fuu.
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya ɓii Mesejabeyel mo danygol Zeraha ɓii Yahuuda woni dawranoowo laamiiɗo ngam haala ummaatoore fuu.
Nehemiah11:25 Yahuudu'en woɗɓe njooɗi nder gure caka gese muuɗum'en
Nehemiah11:26 haa Yeesu'a e Molada e Bayti-Polet
Nehemiah11:27 haa Hacar-Su'al
Nehemiah11:28 haa Cikilak
Nehemiah11:29 haa En-Rimmon e Car'a e Yarmut
Nehemiah11:30 haa Zanoha e Adullam e kawyeeji maaji
Nehemiah11:31 Yimɓe Benyamin njooɗi haa Geba e Mikmas e Ayya
Nehemiah11:32 haa Anatot e Noba e Ananiya
Nehemiah11:33 haa Hacoor e Rama e Gittayim
Nehemiah11:34 haa Hadida e Cebo'im e Neballat
Nehemiah11:35 haa Lodo e Oono e nder waadiwol Waɗooɓe Sanaa'a.
Nehemiah11:36 Lewi'en woɗɓe nder geɓe Yahuuda ndilli haa lesdi Benyamin.
Nehemiah12:1 Ndaa inɗe liman'en e Lewi'en warduɓe bee Zorobaabila ɓii Salatiyel e Yeesu'a: Seraya

Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada danyi Yonatan

Nehemiah12:19 Mattenay ngam saare Yoyaribu
Nehemiah12:20 Kallay ngam saare Sallay

Nehemiah12:24 Mawɓe Lewi'en
Nehemiah12:25

Nehemiah12:27 Saa'i cenki mahol Urusaliima
Nehemiah12:28 Yimooɓe ngari diga gure taariiɗe Urusaliima e kawyeeji Netofa'en e Bayti-Gilgal e laɗɗe Geba e Azmawet
Nehemiah12:29 
Nehemiah12:30 Liman'en e Lewi'en aarti senugo ko'e muuɗum'en. Nden ɓe ceni yimɓe e dammuɗe e mahol.
Nehemiah12:31 Min
Nehemiah12:32 Hosa'ya tokki nde bee reeta ardiiɓe Yahuuda.
Nehemiah12:33 Non boo Azariya e Esira e Mesullam
Nehemiah12:34 e Yahuuda e Benyamin e Sema'ya e Yeremiya
Nehemiah12:35 e woɗɓe liman'en bee algaytaaji e Zekariya ɓii Yonatan ɓii Sema'ya ɓii Mattaniya ɓii Mikaya ɓii Zakkur ɓii Asaf
Nehemiah12:36 e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en Sema'ya e Azareyel e Milalay e Gilalay e Ma'ay e Netaneyel e Yahuuda e Hanani
Nehemiah12:37 Ɓe mba'i Dammugal Seeɓoore
Nehemiah12:38 Yeɓre ɗiɗawre boo yehi gal juŋngo nano. Mi tokki nde bee reeta ardiiɓe Yahuuda feere dow mahol. Min tokki mahol dow suudu towndu wi'eteendu Defrudu
Nehemiah12:39 Min tokkiti dow Dammugal Efrayim e Dammugal Yesana e Dammugal Liɗɗi e suudu Hananiyel towndu e suudu towndu wi'eteendu Teemerre e Dammugal Baali. Min kaaɗi haa Dammugal Aynol.
Nehemiah12:40 Geɓe yimooɓe ɗiɗi fuu ndari haa haykaliiru Allah. Reeta kaliifa'en ɗon ngondi bee am
Nehemiah12:41 non boo liman'en Eliyakim e Ma'aseya e Miyamin e Mikaya e Eliyo'enay e Zekariya e Hananiya
Nehemiah12:42 e Ma'aseya e Sema'ya e Eli'azaaru e Uzzi e Yohanan e Malkiyya e Elam e Ezer. Nden yimooɓe puɗɗi yimugo
Nehemiah12:43 Nyannde maajum ɓe lii'ani Allah kirsaaɗi ɗuuɗɗi. Ɓe ceyi
Nehemiah12:44 Nyannde nde ɓe njo'ini aynooɓe haa cuuɗi cigorɗi ngam dokke e ɓenndalooje aartuɗe e zakkaaji
Nehemiah12:45 Ɓe kuuwi kuugal Allah maɓɓe e kuugal cenki. Yimooɓe e aynooɓe dammuɗe
Nehemiah12:46 Ngam diga ɓooyma
Nehemiah12:47 Nder zamanu Zorobaabila e zamanu Nehemiya
Nehemiah13:1 Nyannde nde ɓe njaŋngani ummaatoore deftere Muusa
Nehemiah13:2 ngam yaake ɓe potti bee Isra'iila'en
Nehemiah13:3 Nde yimɓe nani umroore tawreeta nde'e
Nehemiah13:4 Hiddeko kuuje ɗe'e laato
Nehemiah13:5 
Nehemiah13:6 Saa'i maajum mi walaaɗonno haa Urusaliima
Nehemiah13:7 Nde mi warti Urusaliima
Nehemiah13:8 Haala man fottanaay yam sam. Ngam maajum mi wurtini kuuje saare Tobiya fuu
Nehemiah13:9 Nden mi umri ɓe ɓe laɓɓini cigorɗi e mi nastini kuuje haykaliiru Allah e dokke e uurle bana naane.
Nehemiah13:10 Mi nani boo yimɓe ngaddaay geɗe Lewi'en. Ngam maajum Lewi'en e yimooɓe acci kuugal muuɗum'en
Nehemiah13:11 Mi feli kaliifa'en mi ƴami ɓe: “Koni haykaliiru Allah ferwi?” Nden mi mooɓti ɓe
Nehemiah13:12 Ɓaawo maajum yimɓe Yahuuda fuu ngaddi zakka alkamaari e inaboojam kesam e nebbam
Nehemiah13:13 Mi halfitini cigorɗi man haa Selemiya
Nehemiah13:14 Yaa Allah am
Nehemiah13:15 Saa'i man ngi'mi Yahuudu'en woɗɓe ɗon njaaɓa inabooje nder ɓiɗɗirɗe maaje nyalaade siwtorde
Nehemiah13:16 Woodi boo yimɓe Tirus jooɗiiɓe haa Urusaliima. Ɓe ɗon ngadda liɗɗi e kuuje filu feere feere
Nehemiah13:17 Mi feli mawɓe Yahuuda
Nehemiah13:18 Naa bana nii kaakiraaɓe mon boo mbaari na? Ngam man Allah men ukki sarru ngu'u fuu dow meeɗen e dow berniwol ngo'ol. Onon boo on ɗon tullitina ɓernuki Allah dow Isra'iila bee soɓnugo nyalaade siwtorde!”
Nehemiah13:19 Hiddeko nyalaade siwtorde fuɗɗa
Nehemiah13:20 Nden filooɓe e soorrooɓe kuuje feere feere mbaali yaasi Urusaliima
Nehemiah13:21 Mi feli ɓe
Nehemiah13:22 Nden mi umri Lewi'en ɓe cena ko'e maɓɓe
Nehemiah13:23 Saa'i man ngi'mi boo Yahuudu'en te'ɓe rewɓe iwɓe Asdod e Ammoon e Mo'ab.
Nehemiah13:24 Reeta ɓikkoy maɓɓe ɗon mbolwa Asdodre koo bolle ummaatoore feere
Nehemiah13:25 Mi feli ɓe
Nehemiah13:26 Mi wi'i ɓe: “Naa ngam rewɓe bana ɓe'e Suleymaanu
Nehemiah13:27 Kadi onon on poti waɗugo aybewol maŋngol ngo'ol
Nehemiah13:28 Gooto nder ɓiɓɓe Yoyada ɓii Eliyasib
Nehemiah13:29 Siftor ɓe
Nehemiah13:30 Mi seni ɓe diga kuuje jananne fuu
Nehemiah13:31 non boo ngam dokke leɗɗe bee saa'iije ta'aaɗe e dokkuki aartuɗum ɓenndugo. Yaa Allah am
Esther1:1 Ndaa ko laati nder zamanu Ahasuwerus: Wakkati man o laamani lesɗe teemerre e noogas e joweeɗiɗi (127)
Esther1:2 Saa'i o ɗon haa laamorde Suuza dow leeso laamu maako
Esther1:3 o waɗi nyaamduuji ngam mawɓe maako e saraaki'en maako fuu. Honooɓe iwɓe Persiya e Mediya e tedda-asli'en e ardiiɓe lesɗe maako ngari yeeso maako. O waɗi ɗum nder nduuɓu laamu maako tataɓu.
Esther1:4 Nyalɗe teemerre e cappanɗe joweetati (180) o holli ɓe risku laamu maako pantuŋgu e tedduŋgal maŋngu maako kaayeefiiwal.
Esther1:5 Nde wakkati man saali
Esther1:6 Wiirndallooji daneeji e carwinaaɗi ɗon ɓili bee kalagaaje cardi haa ɓoggi daneeji ɗigguɗi e boɗeeji caka daŋraŋge kaa'e daneeje. Leese kaŋŋeeri e cardi ɗon mbe'iti dow taŋkol baɗaaŋgol bee kaa'e cehaaɗe ɗelkooje e daneeje e oole e ɓaleeje.
Esther1:7 Yimɓe njari njaram nder njardukoy kaŋŋeeri feere feere. Laamiiɗo hokki ɓe inaboojam nguykinoojam ɗuuɗɗam fodde caahaaki laamiiɓe.
Esther1:8 Koo moy yari bana ɓernde muuɗum yiɗi. Laamiiɗo umruno wakiili'en saare mum ɓe mbaɗana ewnaaɗo fuu ko o yiɗi.
Esther1:9 Wasti
Esther1:10 Nyannde joweeɗiɗawre
Esther1:11 ɓe ngadda Wasti debbo maako yeeso maako
Esther1:12 Ammaa Wasti
Esther1:13 Nden o sarwotiri bee dawrooɓe maako annduɓe no goɗɗo huuwrata wakkatiiji fuu
Esther1:14 Ndaa inɗe dawrooɓe maako ɓurɓe ɓadaago mo: Karsena e Setar e Adamata e Tarsis e Meres e Marsena e Memukan
Esther1:15 Laamiiɗo ƴami ɓe: “Fodde umrooje men
Esther1:16 Memukan jaabi laamiiɗo e mawɓe: “Wasti
Esther1:17 Ngam rewɓe fuu anndan ko o waɗi
Esther1:18 Hannde rewɓe mawɓe nder Persiya e Mediya
Esther1:19 To ɗum fottani ma
Esther1:20 To a wooyni umroore nde'e nder njaajirka laamu maaɗa fuu
Esther1:21 Haala man fottani laamiiɗo e mawɓe
Esther1:22 O neldi bataakeeji nder lesɗe maako fuu – haa lesdi koo ndiye bee binndol mum e ummaatoore koo ndeye bee wolde mum – ngam haa gorko fuu tabita o jawmu saare maako
Esther2:1 Ɓaawo man
Esther2:2 Sukaaɓe jagganooɓe laamiiɗo mbi'i mo: “Barkaama
Esther2:3 Jo'in hakkilooɓe nder lesɗe maaɗa fuu
Esther2:4 Paanyo pottananɗo ma
Esther2:5 Woodi goɗɗo Yahuuduujo nder laamorde Suuza
Esther2:6 O gooto caka dahaaɓe ɓe Nabukodonosor laamiiɗo Baabila dahino diga Urusaliima hawtaade bee Yekoniya
Esther2:7 Hadassa
Esther2:8 Nde laamiiɗo anndini umroore muuɗum
Esther2:9 Paanyo oo fottani mo
Esther2:10 Ammaa Asta waŋginaay ummaatoore muuɗum e iwde muuɗum
Esther2:11 Kala nyalaade fuu Mardokay waanci yeeso daldal suudu rewɓe ngam anndugo njamu Asta e ko heɓata mo.
Esther2:12 Umroore rewɓe darni paanyo debbo fuu taasko lebbi sappo e ɗiɗi: O wujo nebbam baɗaadi lebbi joweego aartuɗi e lebbi joweego luttuɗi boo o wujo ngujam balsani e kuuje pawnirɗe goɗɗe. Ɓaawo man paanyo fuu yehi bee saa'i mum haa laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus.
Esther2:13 Paanyo ummiiɗo diga suudu rewɓe ngam yahugo haa suudu laamiiɗo fuu
Esther2:14 Kiikiiɗe o yehi ton
Esther2:15 Nde saa'i waɗi haa Asta ɓii Abihayil
Esther2:16 Ɓe njahri mo nder suudu laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus nder lewru sappooru wi'eteendu Tebet
Esther2:17 Laamiiɗo ɓuri yiɗugo Asta dow rewɓe woɗɓe fuu
Esther2:18 Nden o waɗi nyaamduuji ɗuuɗɗi ngam saraaki'en maako e sukaaɓe maako
Esther2:19 Mardokay ɗonno huuwa haa laamorde wakkati ɓe mooɓti faanyɓe fahin.
Esther2:20 Asta boo waŋginaay iwde mum e ummaatoore mum tawon
Esther2:21 Nyannde go'o
Esther2:22 Mardokay nani haala man
Esther2:23 Ɓe linyi haala man
Esther3:1 Ɓaawo man laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus ɓaŋgti Hamman ɓii Hammedata
Esther3:2 Huuwanooɓe laamiiɗo fuu tuggi koppi
Esther3:3 Huuwanooɓe laamiiɗo go ƴami mo: “Koni luutata umroore laamiiɗo?”
Esther3:4 Ɓe tokki ƴamgo mo nyalaade fuu
Esther3:5 Hamman yi'i Mardokay tuggaay koppi
Esther3:6 Nde ɓe anndini mo ummaatoore Mardokay
Esther3:7 Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus sappo e ɗiɗaɓu
Esther3:8 Nden Hamman wi'i laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus: “Woodi ummaatoore saŋkitiinde caka ummaatooje goɗɗe nder lesɗe laamu maaɗa fuu. Ɓe kawtataa bee woɗɓe. Umrooje maɓɓe potaay bee umrooje ummaatooje goɗɗe
Esther3:9 To ɗum fottani ma
Esther3:10 Laamiiɗo itti halagaare lammba haa juŋngo mum
Esther3:11 Nden o wi'i mo: “Cardi man
Esther3:12 Nyannde sappo e tataɓre nder lewru aranndu
Esther3:13 O neldi bataakeeji man bee yaawɗotooɓe haa lesɗe laamiiɗo fuu bee umroore mbarugo e halkugo e nattingo Yahuudu'en fuu
Esther3:14 Misaalu bataakewol go waŋgini umroore ngam lesdi koo ndiye
Esther3:15 Yaawɗotooɓe ndilli bee jaawal fodde umroore laamiiɗo. Umroore man waŋgi nder laamorde Suuza. Laamiiɗo e Hamman njooɗi
Esther4:1 Nde Mardokay nani haala man fuu
Esther4:2 haa o ɓadi yolnde laamiiɗo
Esther4:3 Nder lesdi koo ndiye
Esther4:4 Horɓe e sortaaɓe Asta
Esther4:5 Nden Asta ewni Hatak
Esther4:6 Hatak yehi haa Mardokay
Esther4:7 Mardokay yecci Hatak ko heɓi ɗum fuu. O anndini mo boo limgal cardi ndi Hamman iinino waddugo nder ndesaari laamiiɗo ngam mbarugo Yahuudu'en.
Esther4:8 O hokki mo boo misaalu bataakewol umroore ngam nattingo Yahuudu'en
Esther4:9 Hatak warti haa Asta
Esther4:10 Asta umri mo o lorto haa Mardokay
Esther4:11 “Sukaaɓe laamiiɗo e yimɓe nder lesɗe laamiiɗo fuu anndi ɗu'um: Umroore haɗi koo moy gorko malla debbo nastugo daldal ɓadiiŋgal suudu laamiiɗo
Esther4:12 Ɓe anndini Mardokay bolle Asta.
Esther4:13 Mardokay lorni mo bee jaawaabu ni'i: “Taa tamma an feere ma a hisan caka Yahuudu'en fuu ngam a ɗon nder saare laamiiɗo.
Esther4:14 To a jeeɗake nder saa'iire bana nde'e
Esther4:15 Asta neldi mo jaawaabu ni'i:
Esther4:16 “Yah
Esther4:17 Mardokay yehi
Esther5:1 Ɓaawo nyalɗe tati go Asta ɓorni limce laamu
Esther5:2 Nde o yi'i Asta ɗon dari haa daldal maako
Esther5:3 Laamiiɗo ƴami mo: “Ko waɗi
Esther5:4 Asta jaabi: “To a yerdake
Esther5:5 Laamiiɗo wi'i: “Law
Esther5:6 Saa'i ɓe ɗon njara inaboojam
Esther5:7 Asta jaabi: “Ko mi toroto
Esther5:8 To mi heɓi mo'ere haa maaɗa
Esther5:9 Nyannde man Hamman wurti
Esther5:10 Ammaa o naŋgti ɓernuki maako
Esther5:11 O wolwani ɓe haala risku maako ɗuuɗŋgu e ɓiɓɓe maako ɗuuɗɓe no laamiiɗo ɓaŋtiri mo dow saraaki'en e sukaaɓe muuɗum fuu.
Esther5:12 Nden o ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Asta
Esther5:13 Ammaa ɗum fuu ɗum laatani yam huunde meere
Esther5:14 Debbo maako Zeres e sooba'en maako fuu mbi'i mo: “Umru ɓe ndarna leggal ngal meetir noogas e jowi. Jaŋngo fajiri boo wolidu bee laamiiɗo ngam haa o umra ɓe ɓila Mardokay haa maagal. Ɓaawoɗon yah bee seyo
Esther6:1 Jemmaare nde'e laamiiɗo waawaay ɗaanaago. O umri ɓe ngaddana mo Deftere Siftinorde Habaruuji Nyalaaɗe. Goɗɗo jaŋngani mo nde.
Esther6:2 Ɓe tawi ko winnda dow Mardokay mo waŋgini nufaye Bigetan e Teres
Esther6:3 Laamiiɗo ƴami: “Tedduŋgal ngale e maŋngu nguye o heɓi ngam maajum?” Sukaaɓe maako njaabi: “Koo ko o heɓi.”
Esther6:4 Laamiiɗo ƴami fahin: “Moy woni haa daldal saare?” – Saa'i man Hamman nastino daldal suudu laamiiɗo yaasiwal ngam toraago mo o umra ɓilugo Mardokay haa leggal ngal o taaskitini ngam maako. –
Esther6:5 Sukaaɓe laamiiɗo njaabi: “Hamman ɗon dari haa daldal saare.” Laamiiɗo wi'i mo o nasta.
Esther6:6 Hamman nasti. Laamiiɗo ƴami mo: “Ɗume haandani goɗɗo mo laamiiɗo yiɗi teddingo?” Hamman numi nder ɓernde muuɗum: “Moye laamiiɗo yiɗi teddingo
Esther6:7 Ngam maajum o jaabi: “Goɗɗo mo ngiɗɗa teddingo
Esther6:8 sey ɓe ngadda alkibbaare nde an a meeɗi ɓornaago e puccu ngu a meeɗi wa'aago bee meetaleewol laamu dow hoore maagu.
Esther6:9 Gooto nder saraaki'en ma ɓurɓe maŋngu
Esther6:10 Laamiiɗo wi'i Hamman: “Law
Esther6:11 Hamman hoo'i alkibbaare e puccu
Esther6:12 Nden Mardokay lorti pellel kuugal mum
Esther6:13 O yecci debbo maako Zeres e soobiraaɓe maako ko heɓi mo. Dawrooɓe maako e debbo maako Zeres mbi'i mo: “A fuɗɗi leestugo yeeso Mardokay. To o Yahuuduujo fakat
Esther6:14 Saa'i ɓe ɗon mbolida tawon
Esther7:1 Laamiiɗo e Hamman ngari nyaamugo haa Asta
Esther7:2 Nyalaade ɗiɗawre nde'e boo
Esther7:3 Asta
Esther7:4 Ngam min coorraama
Esther7:5 Laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus ƴami debbo mum Asta: “Moy nufi waɗugo irin ɗu'um? Toy mo?”
Esther7:6 Asta jaabi: “Ganyo e konneejo man
Esther7:7 Laamiiɗo ɓerni
Esther7:8 Nde laamiiɗo warti jarne haa suudu nyaamduuji
Esther7:9 Harbona
Esther7:10 Ɓe ɓili Hamman dow leggal ngal o taaskitinno ngam Mardokay. Nden ɓernuki laamiiɗo feewti.
Esther8:1 Nyannde man laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus hokki debbo mum Asta mardi Hamman
Esther8:2 O hokki mo halagaare lammba nde o hoositi haa Hamman. Asta boo halfitini mo mardi Hamman.
Esther8:3 Fahin Asta wolwani laamiiɗo. O do'i les kosɗe maako
Esther8:4 Laamiiɗo lii'ani Asta sawru kaŋŋeeri laamu. Asta ummi
Esther8:5 Nden o wi'i: “To a yerdake
Esther8:6 Noy munyranmi sarru ngu tammi ukkanaago ummaatoore am? Noy munyranmi halkere banndiraaɓe am?”
Esther8:7 Laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus wi'i debbo mum Asta e Mardokay Yahuuduujo: “Mi hokki Asta mardi Hamman. Ɓe ɓili Hamman dow leggal
Esther8:8 Jonta mbinndane Yahuudu'en ko fottani on onon boo. Mbinnde ɗum bee innde am
Esther8:9 Nyannde man waato nyannde noogas e tataɓre nder lewru tataɓru wi'eteendu Siwaanu
Esther8:10 Ɓe mbinndi bataakeeji bee innde laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus
Esther8:11 Bee bataakeeji ɗi'i laamiiɗo duŋani Yahuudu'en nder gure fuu ɓe mooɓo
Esther8:12 Ɗum fuu ɗum laato nder lesɗe laamiiɗo koo toy
Esther8:13 Misaalu bataakewol man laati umroore nder lesdi koo ndiye ngam anndingo ummaatooje fuu. Yahuudu'en boo taasko nyalaade maajum ngam waataago konne'en muuɗum'en.
Esther8:14 Yaawɗotooɓe wa'iiɓe pucci saare laamiiɗo go ndilli bee jaawal fodde umroore laamiiɗo. Umroore nde'e wooynaama nder laamorde Suuza boo.
Esther8:15 Mardokay wurti diga laamiiɗo o ɓorniiɗo limce laamu carwinaaɗe e daneeje e alkibbaare raneere ɗiggunde e woɗeere
Esther8:16 Hayru e seyo e welwelo e tedduŋgal laatani Yahuudu'en.
Esther8:17 Haa berniwol e haa lesdi haa umroore laamiiɗo yotti fuu
Esther9:1 Nyalaade sappo e tataɓre nder lewru sappo e ɗiɗawru wi'eteendu Adar ɗum nyalaade hebbitingo umroore laamiiɗo. Konne'en tammino ɓe njaalotono Yahuudu'en nyalaade man. Ammaa haala fuu wayliti
Esther9:2 Ɓe mooɓi nder gure maɓɓe
Esther9:3 Mawɓe lesɗe fuu
Esther9:4 Kaŋko o laati mawɗo haa saare laamiiɗo
Esther9:5 Yahuudu'en mbardi konne'en muuɗum'en bee kaafaaje
Esther9:6 Nder laamorde Suuza ɓe mbari worɓe teemeɗɗe njowo.
Esther9:7 Non boo Parsandata e Dalfon e Aspata
Esther9:8 e Porata e Adaliya e Aridata
Esther9:9 e Parmasta e Arisay e Ariday e Wayejata
Esther9:10 ɓiɓɓe Hamman ɓii Hammedata
Esther9:11 Nyannde man laamiiɗo heɓi kubar limgal mbaraaɓe nder laamorde Suuza.
Esther9:12 O wi'i debbo maako Asta: “Nder laamorde
Esther9:13 Asta jaabi: “To ɗum fottani ma
Esther9:14 Laamiiɗo umri waɗugo bana non. Umroore man waŋgi nder Suuza
Esther9:15 Yahuudu'en wonɓe haa Suuza mooɓti nyannde sappo e nayaɓre nder lewru Adar. Ɓe mbari worɓe teemeɗɗe tato haa Suuza
Esther9:16 Yahuudu'en woɗɓe nder lesɗe laamiiɗo
Esther9:17 Kuuje ɗe'e fuu laati nder nyannde sappo e tataɓre nder lewru Adar. Nyannde sappo e nayaɓre ɓe ciwti
Esther9:18 Ammaa Yahuudu'en nder Suuza mooɓi nyannde sappo e tataɓre
Esther9:19 Ngam man Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe nder kawyeeji laatini nyannde sappo e nayaɓre nder lewru Adar juulde nyaamduuji e seyo e neldindirki nyaamduuji.
Esther9:20 Mardokay winndi kubaruuji ɗi'i. O neldi boo bataakeeji haa Yahuudu'en wonɓe nder lesɗe laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus
Esther9:21 O umri ɓe waɗugo juulde nder nyannde sappo e nayaɓre nder lewru Adar
Esther9:22 Ngam nder nyalɗe ɗe'e Yahuudu'en keɓi siwtaare
Esther9:23 Ko Mardokay winndani Yahuudu'en
Esther9:24 Ɓe mbaɗi ɗum
Esther9:25 Ammaa nde laamiiɗo nani haala man
Esther9:26 Ngam maajum Yahuudu'en ɗon mbi'a nyalɗe ɗe'e Puuriima
Esther9:27 ɓe tabitini ɗum
Esther9:28 Ɓe ciftora nyalɗe ɗe'e
Esther9:29 Asta ɓii Abihayil
Esther9:30 Ɓe neldi bataakeeji bee yelanaago Yahuudu'en wonɓe nder lesɗe laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus teemerre e noogas e joweeɗiɗi fuu jam e gooŋgaaku.
Esther9:31 Ɗum laati ngam tabitingo nyalɗe Puuriima bee saa'iije maaje
Esther9:32 Umroore Asta tabitini haala Puuriima ka'a
Esther10:1 Laamiiɗo Ahasuwerus umri jomorgol haa lesdi fuu e haa duuɗe mbeela.

Esther10:3 Mardokay Yahuuduujo laati ɗiɗaɓo laamiiɗo
Job1:1 Woodino goɗɗo haa lesdi Uus
Job1:2 O danyanaama ɓiɓɓe worɓe njoweeɗiɗo e ɓiɓɓe rewɓe tato.
Job1:3 O mari dammooji ujine joweeɗiɗi e geelooɗi ujine tati e ga'i cindaaɗi ɗiɗi ɗiɗi nde teemeɗɗe jowi e bamɗe debbe teemeɗɗe jowi e jeyaaɓe ɗuuɗɓe masin nder saare. Goɗɗo oo ɓuri yimɓe fuunaaŋge fuu maŋngu.
Job1:4 Ɓiɓɓe maako worɓe ɗonno mbeernindira haa ci'e muuɗum'en ngam nyaamugo
Job1:5 To nyalɗe man timmi
Job1:6 Nyannde feere ɓiɓɓe Allah ngari haa ndaro yeeso Jawmiraawo. Sayɗaanu boo wari caka maɓɓe.
Job1:7 Jawmiraawo ƴami mo: “Diga toy ngarɗa?” Sayɗaanu jaabi: “Mi yiiloyi koo toy haa duniyaaru.”

Job3:3 Nyalaade nde ndanyaami halka

Job3:5 Nyiɓre nyiɓɓunde mara nde. Sey duule caŋngina dow maare
Job3:6 Sey nyiɓre jaɓta jemmaare maajum

Job10:8 Juuɗe ma mbaɗi yam
Job10:9 Siftor
Job10:10 An rufi yam bana kosam. An nyallini yam bana torjam.
Job10:11 Bee laral e kusel a ɓorni yam
Job10:12 A hokki yam yoŋki e mo'ere
Job10:13 Ammaa woodi sirri a suuɗi haa ɓernde ma. Mi anndi ɗum ko woni nder numo ma:
Job10:14 To mi waɗi hakkeeji
Job10:15 Fakat
Job10:16 To mi ɓaŋgti hoore am
Job10:17 Foroy a ɗon darna wullooɓe yam
Job10:18 Koni ngurtinɗa mi diga reedu daada am? Mi maayanno hiddeko goɗɗo yi'ammi!
Job10:19 Mi laatanno bana mo waŋgaay sam
Job10:20 Naa balɗe am pamare lutti na? Accam haa mi welwita seɗɗa.
Job10:21 Neeɓataa mi dillan
Job10:22 Ton nyiɓre e bonnuki meere laamoto
Job11:1 Nden Cofar Na'amiijo wi'i:
Job11:2 Ɗuuɗal bolle ma heɓaay jaawaabu na? Waawugo wolde yiɗaa wi'go a gooŋɗuɗo!
Job11:3 An a tammi harakaaji ma nje'inan yimɓe na? Walaa cemtinɗo ma ngam a janci ɓe na?
Job11:4 An a wi'i: “Mi laaɓɗo nder bolle am
Job11:5 Asee
Job11:6 o waŋginanteno sirriiji hikma maako fuu
Job11:7 An a waawan heɓtugo lugguɗum Allah na? An a waawan faamdugo timmuki Baawɗo na?
Job11:8 Hikma maako ɓuri koo asama towugo
Job11:9 Ka ɓuri duniyaaru fuu juutugo
Job11:10 To Allah naŋngi aybuɗo
Job11:11 Ngam Allah anndi yimɓe meere'en
Job11:12 Paataaɗo laatataako hikmaajo sam
Job11:13 Ammaa an
Job11:14 To juuɗe ma tunwino bee halleende
Job11:15 nden kam
Job11:16 Nden a yejjitan torra e kalluɗum
Job11:17 Jayŋgol ngeendam ma ɓuran koo naaŋge boo
Job11:18 Nden a heɓan hoolaare e tammunde
Job11:19 Walaa ɓillanɗo ma to a ɗon siwto
Job11:20 Ammaa halluɓe coman tefugo ballal
Job12:1 Ayuba jaabi:
Job12:2 Fakat
Job12:3 Ammaa min boo mi woodi hakkiilo bana mooɗon
Job12:4 Mi laatake mo sooba mum janci ɗum
Job12:5 Mo nasti nder sarru
Job12:6 Laymaaji toonyooɓe ɗon tabiti
Job12:7 Ammaa
Job12:8 Wolwan lesdi
Job12:9 Kuuje ɗe'e fuu
Job12:10 Yoŋki geetum fuu ɗon haa juŋngo maako
Job12:11 Naa kuugal nofru ɗum nanugo bolle? Naa kuugal hunnduko ɗum mettugo nyaamdu?
Job12:12 Haa ndotti'en hikma tawete
Job12:13 Ammaa haa Allah hikma e baawɗe tawete
Job12:14 O yibbinan
Job12:15 To o haɗi iyeele
Job12:16 Haa maako tan semmbe e hikma fuu tawete
Job12:17 O ɓortan dawrooɓe
Job12:18 Kaɓɓorli laamiiɓe
Job12:19 O ɓortan koo liman'en
Job12:20 O haɗan hoolaaɓe boo wolwugo
Job12:21 O rufan yawaare dow mawɓe fuu

Job12:23 O mawninan ummaatooje
Job12:24 O laatinan mawɓe faataaɓe
Job12:25 Ɓe tefan bana wumɓe nder nyiɓɓuɗum
Job13:1 Ndaa
Job13:2 Ko on anndi fuu
Job13:3 Ammaa min
Job13:4 On cuddi faataare bee pewe tan
Job13:5 Asee
Job13:6 On nana hujja am
Job13:7 Bee pewe on mballirta Allah na? On laati fewooɓe ngam maako na?
Job13:8 On ndaroto wakeere maako na? On ceedanto Allah haa kiita na?
Job13:9 Ɗum fottanan on to o wiɗiti on na? On cargan mo bana ɓe cargirta neɗɗo na?
Job13:10 Fakat o felan on bee caatal
Job13:11 Bee maŋngu maako o hulnirta on
Job13:12 Ndaa

Job13:17 Sey on nana
Job13:18 Ndaare

Job13:20 Allah am
Job13:21 Ittanam juŋngo ma teddananŋgo yam
Job13:22 Ɓaawo maajum a ewno
Job13:23 Noy limgal aybeeji am e boofi am? Kadi anndinam tuurtol am e hakke am.
Job13:24 Ɗume waɗi haa cuuɗana mi yeeso ma
Job13:25 Ɗume ngiɗɗa? A taasna kuɗel joorŋgel na? Malla haakoyel meereyel a riiwata?

Job13:27 Callalluuji a haɓɓata haa kosɗe am

Job14:1 Koo moy neɗɗo
Job14:2 Bana pinndi o fuɗa
Job14:3 Irin maako a accataa hakkilango mo
Job14:4 Moy waawata wurtingo huunde laaɓnde diga huunde soɓnde? Walaa koo goɗɗo.
Job14:5 Ndaa

Job14:7 Lekki koo kiye fuu mari tammunde

Job15:1 Nden Elifas Temaniijo wi'i:
Job15:2 Hikmaajo jaaboto bee anndal henndu na? Henndu tan woni haa reedu maako na?
Job15:3 A ɗon gooŋɗina hoore ma bee bolle meere na malla a ɗon wolwa haala ka walaa nafuuda?
Job15:4 A ɗon wonna kulol ngol yimɓe mari heedi Allah
Job15:5 Halleende ɓernde ma ɗon wurto hunnduko ma
Job15:6 Haala ma do'ata ma kiita
Job15:7 Kadi ɓe ndanyi ma a afo yimɓe na? An aarti kooseehon kon fuu tageego na?
Job15:8 A anndi sirriiji Allah na? An feere ma mari hikma na?
Job15:9 Ɗume annduɗa minin min anndaa e ɗume paamɗa minin min paamaay?
Job15:10 Min ngoodi ndotti'en caka amin
Job15:11 A ɗon numa de'itinki Allah bee bolle amin ɗelemɗe ɗe'e nafataa ma na?
Job15:12 Ngam ɗume ɓernde ma ɗon sogge daayiiɗum? Ngam ɗume gite ma ɗon ma'a kalluɗum
Job15:13 haa tikkana koo Allah boo
Job15:14 Ko woni neɗɗo haa o laato laaɓɗo tal? Ko woni danyaaɗo e debbo haa o laato adiliijo?
Job15:15 Ndaa
Job15:16 Sakkomaa neɗɗo meereejo
Job15:17 Heɗitam
Job15:18 ko hikma'en anndini
Job15:19 Kamɓe tan
Job15:20 Bone tokkoto kalluɗo balɗe mum fuu
Job15:21 O ɗon nana hoolooji kulniiɗi tan
Job15:22 Walaa tammunde daɗugo nyiɓɓuki
Job15:23 O ɗon yiilo ngam tefugo nyaamdu. O anndi nyalaade nyiɓre ɗon reeni mo.
Job15:24 Tum ɓillaare e torra ɗon kulna mo bana laamiiɗo taaskaniiɗo haɓre.
Job15:25 Ngam o ɓaŋgti juŋngo dow Allah maako
Job15:26 O lettiiɗo konanɗo koo Allah boo
Job15:27 Yeeso maako fuu ɓellere
Job15:28 O ɗon jooɗi nder gure ɗe o nyaami ɗum
Job15:29 Risku maako fuu halkan
Job15:30 Nyiɓre waran
Job15:31 To o hoolake esto e rikici
Job15:32 Diga wakkati siwaa o ɗaylata
Job15:33 O ɗon sammina kecce bana inabohi
Job15:34 Mooɓre halluɓe fuu
Job15:35 Tum ɓe nufoto sarru e kalluɗi

Job16:20 Soobiraaɓe am

Job17:1 Poofɗe am ɗon ta'a

Job17:3 Useni yaa Allah
Job17:4 A haɗi ɓerɗe maɓɓe faamugo
Job17:5 Bana cennduɗo keɓal mum bee sooba'en saa'i weelo ɗon tampina ɓiyiiko'en
Job17:6 non mi laatanake yimɓe woɗɓe nyidduɗo

Job17:8 Ngam daliila man gooŋga'en fuu mbemmboto

Job17:15 Kadi

Job24:1 Koni Allah Baawɗo ta'aay nyalɗe ɗe o waɗata kiita? Koni yimɓe maako ngi'ataa nyalɗe man?
Job24:2 Woɗɓe cottinan keeri gese mum'en
Job24:3 Woɗɓe coggan koo wamnde atiimeejo boo
Job24:4 Ɓe ɗon ndiiwa talaka'en diga laawol
Job24:5 Bana bamɗe ladde
Job24:6 Sey ɓe mba'a huɗo haa geese
Job24:7 Ɓe ɗon mbaala ɓe holɓe
Job24:8 To ɓe ɗon nder kooseeje
Job24:9 Woɗɓe ɗon mbifta atiimeyel
Job24:10 Laafuɓe ngiiloto ɓe holɓe
Job24:11 Caka jarne ɓe ɓiɗɗan nebbam halluɓe
Job24:12 Ndaa
Job24:13 Woodi woɗɓe
Job24:14 Hidde weeta mbaroowo ko'e ummoto haa o mbara talakaajo e laafuɗo. Bee jemma boo o laatoto gujjo.
Job24:15 Daakaareejo ɗon reena garki jemma tan
Job24:16 Bee jemma wuyɓe ngasata cuuɗi yimɓe
Job24:17 Ɓe ɗon kula fajiri bee annoora mum
Job24:18 Goɗɗo kalluɗo fuu
Job24:19 Bana nguli ceeɗu yartirta ndiyam nduŋngu
Job24:20 Reedu danyɗo mo yejjitan mo
Job24:21 Kanjum laatanto mo toonyi dimaro
Job24:22 Allah bee baawɗe mum halkan marɓe baawɗe fuu. To o ummake
Job24:23 Koo o hokki ɓe de'ere
Job24:24 Ɓe ɓaŋgoto seɗɗa
Job24:25 Kadi naa bana nii na? Moy fewnatammi? Moy waawata meeriɗingo bolle am?
Job25:1 Nden Bildad Suhiijo wi'i:
Job25:2 Allah mari baawɗe e laamu fuu
Job25:3 Mooɓe maako
Job25:4 Noy neɗɗo laatorto adiliijo yeeso Allah
Job25:5 Yeeso maako koo lewru ɗelkataa
Job25:6 sakko neɗɗo laatiiɗo bana ngilŋgu meere? Haa yeeso maako
Job26:1 Ayuba jaabi:
Job26:2 Kay! A anndi no kisnirta laafuɗo
Job26:3 Kay! A anndi sarwango cooyɗo hakkiilo mum
Job26:4 Moy mbolwanɗa bolle ɗe'e? Moy loŋngi ma bolle ɗe'e?
Job26:5 Yimɓe maayɓe ɗon ndiwna les lesdi
Job26:6 Joonde maayɓe suuɗanaaki Allah
Job26:7 Allah we'iti woyla dow cookum tan
Job26:8 Allah saawan ndiyamji nder duule mum
Job26:9 Leeso laamu ɗon wiirni e gite fuu
Job26:10 Sera mbeela o diidi taariiŋgol ɗum
Job26:11 To o telɓani daŋraŋge asama
Job26:12 Allah seeki mbeela bee semmbe mum. Allah fusi Rahab bee faamu mum.
Job26:13 Poofɗe maako ɗon laɓɓina asama. Juŋngo maako boo sumpiti mboodi ndoggoori.
Job26:14 En ngi'aay kuuɗe maajum
Job27:1 Ayuba tokkitini haala muuɗum
Job27:2 Mi ɗon hunoro innde Allah geeto
Job27:3 To mi ɗon bee yoŋki
Job27:4 bolle kalluɗe ngurtataako hunnduko am
Job27:5 Mi meeɗataa gooŋɗingo ko mbi'ɗon yam! Haa mi maaya mi seedoto laaɓeeŋga am.
Job27:6 Mi jogoto adilaaku am
Job27:7 Sey konneejo am laato bana kalluɗo
Job27:8 Nyannde maayde
Job27:9 Kadi Allah ɗon nana to o wooki na
Job27:10 Nyannde man nden Baawɗo laatanto mo seyo na? Goɗɗo heɓan toraago mo koo ndey na?
Job27:11 Sey mi faamna on haala kuuɗe Allah fuu. Mi suuɗataa ko Allah Baawɗo nufoto.
Job27:12 Ammaa onon bee ko'e mon on ngi'i ɗum. Ɗume waɗi on ɗon mbolwa bolle meere non?
Job27:13 Ndaa geɗal ngal Allah yeɗi kalluɗo
Job27:14 Ɓiɓɓe maako ɗon ɗuuɗa ngam mbareego tan
Job27:15 Nyawuji kalluɗi mbaran ɓiɓɓe luttuɓe
Job27:16 To o waagi cardi bana mbulwuldi
Job27:17 ɗum adiliijo ɓornoto ɗe
Job27:18 Suudu maako ndu o nyiɓi walaa semmbe
Job27:19 O waaloto o diskuɗo. To o fini
Job27:20 Bana ilam
Job27:21 Henndu fuunaaŋge efta mo
Job27:22 Bilaa enɗam ndu faɗɗan mo bee caatal
Job27:23 Yimɓe kellan juuɗe to ɓe ngi'i ko heɓi mo
Job28:1 Woodi pellel ngam wasugo cardi
Job28:2 Nder lesdi ɓe ngurtinta njamndi
Job28:3 Ɓe ɗon nastina jayŋgol nder nyiɓre
Job28:4 Ɓe ɗon ngasa haa yaasi berniiji
Job28:5 Nyaamdu yimɓe ɗon fuɗa dow lesdi
Job28:6 Kaa'e maari ɗum pellel safira
Job28:7 Laawol yahugo ton
Job28:8 Kuuje ladde njahataa dow maagol
Job28:9 Juŋngo neɗɗo ɗon seeka tapaaje
Job28:10 Nder kooseeje o wasata laabi
Job28:11 O ɗon sukka ɓulduɗe ceeɓooje
Job28:12 Ammaa toy tagu tawata hikma? Malla toy woni iwde hakkiilo?
Job28:13 Walaa annduɗo saman hikma
Job28:14 Luggeeŋga ɗon wi'a: “Walaa haa ɗo”
Job28:15 Ka waawataa soodeego bee kaŋŋe
Job28:16 Kaŋŋe Ofir he'aay coggu maaka
Job28:17 Ka nanndintaake bee daarorgal laaɓŋgal
Job28:18 sakkomaa bee murjamje e ciralle
Job28:19 Ka nanndintaake bee tupas Etiyopiya
Job28:20 Kadi hikma
Job28:21 Ka ɗon suuɗani yiitere neɗɗo

Job28:23 Allah tan anndi laawol maaka
Job28:24 Kaŋko yi'ata keeri duniyaaru e kuuje gonɗe les asama fuu.
Job28:25 Nde o ta'ana henndu teddeeŋga
Job28:26 nde o waɗana iyeende umroore
Job28:27 saa'i maajum o wiɗiti hikma
Job28:28 Nden o wolwani neɗɗo
Job29:1 Ayuba tokkitini haala muuɗum
Job29:2 To mi laatakeno bana naane
Job29:3 saa'i pittirla maako ɗonno yaynana yam
Job29:4 bana laatiimino nder balɗe sukaaku am
Job29:5 saa'i Baawɗo ɗonno wondi bee am
Job29:6 saa'i kosam ɗonno ɗuuɗi haa na'i am
Job29:7 Nde dawrooɓe ɗonno mooɓto nder wuro am
Job29:8 saa'i suka'en ngi'no yam
Job29:9 Koo ardiiɓe boo naŋgtino e yeewtugo
Job29:10 Mawɓe tedduɓe fuu accino wolwugo
Job29:11 Koo moy nanino yam
Job29:12 Ngam nde laafuɗo wooki
Job29:13 Mi heɓino barka haa yimɓe torriiɓe fuu
Job29:14 Mi ɓornino adilaaku bana limce am
Job29:15 Bana gite laatinoomi haa bumɗo fuu
Job29:16 Baabiraawo laatinoomi haa talaka'en
Job29:17 I'al galaŋgal kalluɗo mi sampiti
Job29:18 Non mi tammi: Mi maayan nder saɓɓo am
Job29:19 heedi ndiyam mi juttina ɗaɗi am
Job29:20 koo ndey fuu tedduŋgal hoore am hesɗita
Job29:21 Yimɓe nanɓe yam fuu ɗon keɗito
Job29:22 Ɓaawo mbolwumi
Job29:23 Yimɓe keppani yam bana nduŋngu non
Job29:24 Nde ɓe ngalaa hoolaare
Job29:25 Min mi suɓani koo moy fuu laawol mum
Job30:1 Ammaa jonta
Job30:2 Walluru nduye ndeenanmi diga juuɗe maɓɓe? Ngam kamɓe ma semmbe maɓɓe timmi.
Job30:3 Daliila sooynde e weelo ɓe tampuɓe
Job30:4 Ɓe teɓan haako lammuko kommbi wumre
Job30:5 Yimɓe woɗɓe ɗon ndiiwa ɓe bee wookugo
Job30:6 Nder gaaruuji kulniiɗi ɓe njooɗoto
Job30:7 Ɓe ɗon koola nder guuɓe
Job30:8 Mooɓre meere'en non
Job30:9 Ammaa jonta
Job30:10 Mi ganyniiɗo haa maɓɓe
Job30:11 Allah fiisti lagaawal am
Job30:12 Mooɓre ummanake yam
Job30:13 Ɓe ɗon ta'ammi laawol
Job30:14 Ɓe ɗon caloro ceekgol
Job30:15 Kultoreeŋgol ɗon ummo
Job30:16 Kadi jonta ɓadiimi keerol ngeendam am
Job30:17 Nder jemmaaje fuu
Job30:18 Juŋngo Allah ɗon jogi ngapaleewol am
Job30:19 Allah hoo'i yam
Job30:20 Mi ɗon wookane – an a jaabaaki yam
Job30:21 Ndaa
Job30:22 Haa dow henndu a ɗon ɓaŋgtammi
Job30:23 Mi anndi a ɗon yahrammi haa maayde

Job30:25 Naa mi boyduɗo bee nastuɗo ɓillaare na? Naa joonde talakaajo ɓilli yam foroy na?

Job30:27 Jonta ɓernde am saklake
Job30:28 Mi ɗon yaha nder nyiɓre
Job30:29 Cuuli ladde laati deerɗiraaɓe am

Job31:1 Ndaa
Job31:2 Geɗal ngale mi heɓanno diga asama
Job31:3 Kadi halkere walaa ngam baɗɗo ɓeetaare na? Walaa sarru haa baɗɗo zunuubaaji na?
Job31:4 Kuuɗe ɗe mi huuwi fuu
Job31:5 To on numi mi huuwtiniri fewjere malla kosɗe am tokki laawol rikici
Job31:6 Allah kilammi dow awnorɗum gooŋgaajum
Job31:7 To palanɗe am celi laawol darnuŋgol malla ɓernde am jaɓi esto gite am malla aybewol lutti
Job31:8 nden ko aawanmi
Job31:9 To mi duŋake debbo esta ɓernde am
Job31:10 nden kam debbo am namana goɗɗo feere
Job31:11 Ngam fakat
Job31:12 Ngam ɗum nanndi bee yiite nder jahannama
Job31:13 To mi salino gooŋɗingo jeyaaɓe am
Job31:14 nden kam noy mbaɗannoomi yeeso Allah am? Ɗume njaabotoomi Allah to o ƴami yam?
Job31:15 Allah gooto oo tagi min bee maɓɓe fuu
Job31:16 Mi salaaki fortango talaka'en
Job31:17 Mi meeɗaay nyaamugo nyaamdu am min feere am
Job31:18 Bana baaba mi nyaamni ɓe nyalɗe fuu diga mi derkeejo
Job31:19 Koo ndey ngi'mi ɓilliiɗo cooyɗo limce malla laafuɗo cooyɗo koo mojaare
Job31:20 min mi ɓorni mo limce gaasa baali am
Job31:21 To mi sappi gooŋɗuɗo bee juŋngo am
Job31:22 nden kam balawal fiista diga ɓaawo
Job31:23 Mi ɗon hula taa kiita Allah do'a yam
Job31:24 Mi tuugtaaki dow jawdi ndi kaŋŋeeri am
Job31:25 Mi meeɗaay seyoraago ɗuuɗki risku am
Job31:26 Koo ndey ngi'mi no jayŋgol naaŋge ɗelkirta e no lewru yaynirta nder yahdu mum
Job31:27 mi meeɗaay jaɓugo esto haa nder ɓernde am bee sirri
Job31:28 Kaanduɗum irin aybe man hiite
Job31:29 Mi seyoraaki do'ere konneejo am
Job31:30 tum mi haɗiti hunnduko am waɗugo aybe
Job31:31 Koo moy hoɗi haa saare am
Job31:32 Walaa koɗo baalɗo yaasi
Job31:33 Mi meeɗaay suuɗugo aybe am bana ɗuuɗɓe cuuɗirta ɗi
Job31:34 Mi meeɗaay hulugo haala mooɓre yimɓe sam
Job31:35 Toy mi heɓata gooto haa o nanammi? Ndaa ɗo haala am! Jonta Baawɗo jaabammi! Toy wullaandu ndu konne'en am mbinndi ɗum?
Job31:36 Haa mi wakka wullaandu man dow balbe am
Job31:37 Nden mi limtana Allah ko mi waɗi fuu
Job31:38 To mi toonyake ngesa haa ka wulli yam
Job31:39 to mi nyaami haa maaka bilaa yoɓugo remɓe ka
Job31:40 taa ka fuɗna sa'iiruuri

Job37:1 Kanjum umminta diwŋgol nder ɓernde am
Job37:2 Sey on nana no Allah men riggirta
Job37:3 Ma'e maako ɗon njaynina asama fuu
Job37:4 Ɓaawo maaje pelmaali ɗon pelma tum
Job37:5 Sawtu Allah ɗon rigga
Job37:6 Allah umran iyeende toɓugo
Job37:7 Nii o haɗirta koo moy kuugal mum
Job37:8 Dabbaaji ladde fuu nastan nder nyukkorde
Job37:9 Ndaa
Job37:10 Poofɗe Allah ɗon kattina ndiyam
Job37:11 Kaŋko rimdata duule bee ndiyam boo
Job37:12 Ɗe ɗon njaha
Job37:13 Allah ɗon huuwtinira ɗum ngam eltugo yimɓe e ngam waŋgingo alaama mo'ere maako boo.
Job37:14 An Ayuba
Job37:15 A anndi no o umrata ɗe e no o yayninta ma'e nder duule na?
Job37:16 Malla a paamɗo no duule man leerdata? Ɗe ɗon mbaŋgina anndal kaayeefiiwal.
Job37:17 An kam
Job37:18 Bana Allah a we'itan asamaawu haa ngu saata bana daarorgal njamndi na?
Job37:19 Sey a anndina min ko min mbi'ata mo. Sooynde anndal ɗon haɗa min wolwugo.
Job37:20 Goɗɗo wi'an mo: “Accu mi wolwa na”? Sey ɓe mbi'a mo goɗɗo wolwi na?
Job37:21 Saa'i feere en ngi'ata naaŋge
Job37:22 Ɗelko bana kaŋŋeeri ɗon iwa diga woyla
Job37:23 Allah Baawɗo
Job37:24 Ngam daliila man sey yimɓe fuu kula mo. O laarataa yikkanɓe ɓe hikma'en.
Job38:1 Nden Jawmiraawo gonɗo nder henndu saatundu jaabi Ayuba
Job38:2 An a moy haa a hallina anniyaaji am bee bolle paataaɗe?
Job38:3 Sey a taasko
Job38:4 Nde mi jo'ina duniyaaru
Job38:5 Moy waɗi darɗe maaru
Job38:6 Haa dow ɗume caɓɓaaje maaru mbaali? Moy jo'ini hayre toldu maaru?
Job38:7 Koode baɓɓol fuu ngimi nder saa'iire man
Job38:8 Malla moy maɓɓi mbeela fuu bee dammuɗe
Job38:9 Min mi ɓorni nga duule
Job38:10 Nde mi ta'ani mbeela maajum keeri mum
Job38:11 Mbi'mi ɗum: “A yottoto haa ɗo! A saalataako ɗo! Ƴuuge maaɗa ƴaggiiɗe
Job38:12 An a meeɗi umrugo garki subaha na? A meeɗi anndingo beɗgol pellel muuɗum
Job38:13 haa ngol naŋnga duniyaaru ndu'u haa gawarle
Job38:14 Jayŋgol naaŋge ɗon waŋgina kooseeje fuu
Job38:15 Jayŋgol maajum ɗon sakla yimɓe halluɓe
Job38:16 An a meeɗi yottaago ɓulli mbeela na? An a meeɗi yiilaago les luggeeŋga na?
Job38:17 Jolɗe waade ɗe baŋguɗe haa maaɗa na? Malla dammuɗe maayde ngi'ɗa na?
Job38:18 An a faami njaajirka duniyaaru na? Sey a anndina yam to a anndi!
Job38:19 Toy jayŋgol jooɗoto? Toy pellel laatiiŋgel joonde nyiɓre boo?
Job38:20 An a hollan ɗum keerol laawol maajum na? An a umran ɗum hootugo haa saare na?
Job38:21 Kay
Job38:22 Siga iyeende hattiniinde
Job38:23 Min mi resi ɗe fuu ngam saa'i sarru
Job38:24 Toy laawol nokkuure naaŋge fuɗata malla pellel ngel henndu fuuna iwata?
Job38:25 Moy seekanta ndiyam iyeende ilduɗe? Moy seekata laawol ngam ma'ere e felmaaŋgo?
Job38:26 Moy toɓnata iyeende koo dow ladde
Job38:27 Moy ittanta ladde maajum ɗomka mum? Moy fuɗnata huɗo e haakooji ton?
Job38:28 Kadi iyeende man woodi baabiraawo na? Malla moy waɗi baade saawawre?
Job38:29 Kadi moy laati daada kattiniiɗam fuu? Moy ɓesni saawawre hattiniinde?
Job38:30 Jaaŋgol ukkanto ndiyam haa ɗam hattino bana hayre
Job38:31 Koode ɗaccuki kaɓɓirta bee ɓoggi na? Malla kaɓɓorli koode dulooje piistata?
Job38:32 An a eeŋginan burjuuji fuu bee saa'i man na? An a wurtinan koode iliiyuuje na?
Job38:33 An a anndi umrooje asamanji na? An a hokkan ɗi laamu dow duniyaaru na?
Job38:34 Sawtu maaɗa
Job38:35 An umrata ma'e ma'a na? Ɗe ɗon nootane: “Na'am” na?
Job38:36 Moy hokkata dumaral hakkiilo? Moy waɗi asgumri heɓa anndal?
Job38:37 Moy limata duule fuu bee hikma mum? Moy hersata bulki asama
Job38:38 haa mbulwuldi tamo
Job38:39 An a heɓnan mbarooga nyaamdu muuɗum na? An a humtanan ɓikkoy maaga haaje na
Job38:40 to koy ndeeni
Job38:41 Moy hokkata leekuwal ko ngal nyaamata
Job39:1 An a anndi ndey jabaaje ndimata na? Malla a giiɗo no lelji debbi ndimirta?
Job39:2 Lebbi noye ɗi ndeedata
Job39:3 Saa'i rimugo
Job39:4 Ɓikkoy maaji ɗon mawna
Job39:5 Moy rimɗini wamnde ladde
Job39:6 Min mi hokki nde ladde bana jooɗorde
Job39:7 Nde ɗon jala hoolo berniiji
Job39:8 Nde ɗon wa'o kooseeje haa nde dura ton
Job39:9 Kadi mbana huuwante kuugal na? Malla jemma nga waalan haa nder suudu dabbaaji ma?
Job39:10 Daande maaga
Job39:11 An a hooloto maŋngu semmbe maaga
Job39:12 A ɗon hoolo nga haa nga hoorane alkamaari maaɗa
Job39:13 Bee ceyiiɗum bileeji ndawu liilirta. Ɗi ɗon nanndi bileeji ngaasiyoowal na?
Job39:14 Nder mbulwuldi ngu wallinta geeraaɗe
Job39:15 Ndaa ngu yejjiti kosŋgal waawan fusgo ɗe malla ndabbaawa ladde waran
Job39:16 Bana njanannoy ngu saatanta ɓiyiigu'en
Job39:17 Min mi sooyni ngu hikma
Job39:18 Bee non fuu
Job39:19 An hokki puccu semmbe muuɗum na? An ɓorni ngu damsali haa daande na?
Job39:20 Haa ngu diwa bana mbaɓɓattu
Job39:21 Ngu ɗon ficca nder waadiwol
Job39:22 Ngu ɗon jala kulniiɗum
Job39:23 Haa dow puccu man ɓaaru kuri sonyata
Job39:24 Nden ngu naarja
Job39:25 Puccu jaaboto fuufre fuu bee forgo
Job39:26 Fodde sawari maaɗa ciilal fiirata
Job39:27 An a umminan dutal bee umroore ma
Job39:28 Dow tapaaje ngal jooɗata
Job39:29 Diga ton ngal ɗon laara kuuje nyaamugo
Job39:30 Ɓikkoy maagal ɗon njara ƴiiƴam tan
Job40:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i Ayuba:
Job40:2 An peloowo
Job40:3 Ayuba jaabi Jawmiraawo:
Job40:4 Min mi he'aay koo ɗume. Ɗume mi jaaboto? Sey mi waɗa juŋngo am dow hunnduko.
Job40:5 Mi wolwi nde woore
Job40:6 Nden Jawmiraawo gonɗo nder duluuru wi'i Ayuba:
Job40:7 Sey a taasko
Job40:8 A jaɓaay kiita ka mi ta'i na? A yiɗi aybingo yam ngam haa a adilina hoore ma na?
Job40:9 An a laati cemmbiɗɗo bana Allah na? An a rigga-sawtuujo bana maako na?
Job40:10 Bee ɓaŋgaare e tedduŋgal a jaagnoro
Job40:11 Laar mawnitiiɓe
Job40:12 Laar mawnitiiɓe fuu
Job40:13 Nder mbulwuldi uw mooɓgal maɓɓe fuu
Job40:14 Nden kam min boo mi maŋgtete ngam baawal ma
Job40:15 Laar ngabbu ngu tagmi bana maaɗa. Bana nagge ngu nyaamrata huɗo hecco boo.
Job40:16 Laar no semmbe nder keeci maagu ɗuuɗiri
Job40:17 Ngu ɗon saatina wicco bana leggal
Job40:18 I'e maagu ɗon caati bana njamndi
Job40:19 Kaŋgu woni kaayeefi caka tagle fuu
Job40:20 Haa kooseeje nyaamdu maagu iwata
Job40:21 Haa waalorde les jaaɓe ngabbu waaloto
Job40:22 Leɗɗe jaaɓe bee ɗowdi mum'en cuddan ngu e leɗɗe haa maayo fuu ɗon taari ngu.
Job40:23 Ndaa
Job40:24 Moy wumnata gite maagu
Job40:25 Ngilanŋgeewa
Job40:26 Kine maaga
Job40:27 Kadi kaŋga nga toroto ma enɗam na? Nga wolwante koŋnguɗi ɗelemɗi na?
Job40:28 Kadi a haɓɓan alkawal bee maaga
Job40:29 Noy? A fijan bee maaga bana bee collel na? Daande maaga
Job40:30 Loohotooɓe nga njahran nga haa luumo
Job40:31 Laral maaga
Job40:32 Toonya nga bee yowugo juŋngo ma dow maaga nde woore tan! Fakat a meetataa ɗum sam!
Job41:1 Anndu
Job41:2 Walaa yoora-ɓerndeejo tikkinanɗo nga
Job41:3 Moy waɗi konu bee maaga
Job41:4 Sey mi anndine haala terɗe maaga fuu
Job41:5 Moy seekata limce maaga
Job41:6 Kadi hunnduko maaga
Job41:7 Ɓaawo maaga
Job41:8 Gootal gootal ɗe njokkindiri
Job41:9 Gootal gootal ɗe takkotiri caatuɗum
Job41:10 To nga isli
Job41:11 Haa nder hunnduko maaga jame ngurtoto
Job41:12 Kine maaga ɗon cuura cuurɗe tekkuɗe
Job41:13 Poofɗe maaga kuɓɓan ƴulɓe yiite
Job41:14 Kayto! Hoɓɓudu maaga ɓuri semmbiɗgo. Koo moy fotti bee maaga
Job41:15 Kusel maaga haa buttuli hawtidi
Job41:16 Bana hayre
Job41:17 To nga ummake
Job41:18 A heɓataa a naawna nga bee kaafahi malla bee labbo e jaaral malla bee kurol boo.
Job41:19 Njamndi fuu
Job41:20 To a fiɗi kuri
Job41:21 Nga ɗon laara wandayre bana huɗo non. To a sakkini labbo boo
Job41:22 Haa les reedu nga woodi kuuje bana keeɗe
Job41:23 Nga ɗon ɓulna luggeeŋga bana defugo
Job41:24 Haa nga saali
Job41:25 Haa duniyaaru fuu walaa irin maaga sam
Job41:26 Bee ɓaŋgaare nga laardata ɓaŋgiiɗum fuu
Job42:1 Nden Ayuba jaabi Jawmiraawo:
Job42:2 Jonta anndumi an a mari baawɗe fuu
Job42:3 Ndaa
Job42:4 An a wi'no: “Accu mi wolwa. Min mi ƴamete
Job42:5 Nanɗe noppi tan
Job42:6 Ngam daliila man cemtiranmi bolle am
Job42:7 Ɓaawo Jawmiraawo wolwani Ayuba bolle ɗe'e fuu
Job42:8 Jonta kam
Job42:9 Nden Elifas Temaniijo e Bildad Suhiijo e Cofar Na'amatiijo njehi
Job42:10 Ɓaawo Ayuba do'ani sooba'en mum
Job42:11 Deerɗiiko'en worɓe e rewɓe fuu ngari haa maako e annduɓe mo diga naane fuu. Ɓe nyaamdi bee maako nder saare maako. Ɓe njurmini mo
Job42:12 Jawmiraawo barkiɗini Ayuba ko ɓuri naane. Ayuba heɓi dammooji ujine sappo e nayi e geelooɗi ujine joweego e ga'i cindaaɗi ɗiɗi ɗiɗi nde ujineere e bamɗe debbe ujineere.
Job42:13 O danyanaama ɓiɓɓe worɓe njoweeɗiɗo e ɓiɓɓe rewɓe tato.
Job42:14 Arano ɓiɓɓe rewɓe
Job42:15 Rewɓe wooɗɓe bana ɓiɓɓe Ayuba tawaaka nder lesdi fuu. Baaba maɓɓe yeɗi ɓe ndonŋgu caka deerɗiraaɓe maɓɓe worɓe.
Job42:16 Ɓaawo maajum Ayuba wuuri duuɓi teemerre e cappanɗe nayi. O yi'i ɓiɓɓe maako e ɓiɓɓe ɓiɓɓe maako
Job42:17 Nden Ayuba maayi

Psalms74:3 War

Psalms74:6 Ɓe pusi suuraaji cehaaɗi
Psalms74:7 Ɓe nguli suudu ma seniindu
Psalms74:8 Ɓe anninino nattingo min

Psalms74:11 Ngam ɗume caliɗa wallugo min

Psalms77:2 Mi wookanan Allah

Psalms77:6 Mi ɗon numta haala balɗe caaliiɗe
Psalms77:7 Mi ɗon waala numtugo gime am
Psalms77:8 “Jawmiraawo wudini min haa foroy na? O meetataa yerdaago min na?
Psalms77:9 Mbooɗeeŋga maako dow amin timmi haa foroy na? O acci wolwango min haa abada na?
Psalms77:10 Allah yejjiti enɗugo min na? Ɓernuki maako haɗi hinnuye maako na?”
Psalms77:11 Nden mbi'mi: “Ndaa ko ɓurata naawugo yam: Ɓaŋiiɗo acci woonango min bana naane!”

Psalms77:13 sey mi numta kuuɗe ma fuu

Psalms77:21 A ɗowi yimɓe ma bana tokkere bee juuɗe Muusa e Haruna.

Psalms78:2 Haa mi wolwana on bee balndol
Psalms78:3 Kaakiraaɓe meeɗen ngecci min ɗum

Psalms78:32 Ammaa bee non fuu ɓe tokki waɗugo hakke

Psalms78:34 Ammaa nde o fuɗɗi mbarugo ɓe

Psalms78:37 Ɓe ɗakkotiraay bee maako

Psalms78:39 Ngam o siftori ɓe maayanɓe
Psalms78:40 Ɓe tuurtani mo nder ladde nde ɗuuɗɗum
Psalms78:41 Fahin ɓe poondi mo

Psalms105:2 Ngime

Psalms105:8 O yejjitittaa alkawal maako haa foroy e ko o umri haa gide ujineere.
Psalms105:9 Ɗum alkawal maako bee Ibrahiima e hunayeere maako haa Isiyaaku.
Psalms105:10 Jawmiraawo haɓɓi alkawal duumiiŋgal bee Isra'iila
Psalms105:11 O wi'i: “Mi hokkete lesdi Kanaana
Psalms105:12 Saa'i man yimɓe Allah ɗuuɗaayno tawon

Psalms105:15 O wi'i: “Taa meeme moytaaɓe am
Psalms105:16 Nden Jawmiraawo neldi weelo nder lesdi maɓɓe

Psalms105:19 haa annabaaku maako gooŋɗi
Psalms105:20 Saa'i man laamiiɗo umri ɓe piista mo
Psalms105:21 ardini mo dow saare mum
Psalms105:22 O hokki mo baawɗe ɗowugo saraaki'en maako bana o yiɗi e ekkitingo dawrooɓe maako hikma.
Psalms105:23 Nden Isra'iila wari haa Misra

Psalms105:25 O wayli ɓerɗe Misra'en ngam ɓe nganya yimɓe maako
Psalms105:26 Nden o neli jaggiiɗo maako Muusa e Haruna

Psalms105:28 Allah neldi nyiɓre dow lesdi
Psalms105:29 O wartiri ndiyam maɓɓe ƴiiƴam
Psalms105:30 Lesdi maɓɓe heewi paaɓi
Psalms105:31 O umri
Psalms105:32 O neldi ɓe mallimallooje mbattudi iyeende
Psalms105:33 O wonni inabooje maɓɓe e ibbe maɓɓe
Psalms105:34 O umri
Psalms105:35 Ɗi nyaami haakooji lesdi maɓɓe fuu
Psalms105:36 O mbari ɓiɓɓe afɓe fuu nder lesdi maɓɓe.
Psalms105:37 Nden o wurtini yimɓe Isra'iila
Psalms105:38 Misra'en ceyori gurtaaki maɓɓe
Psalms105:39 O faddi ɓe bee ruulde
Psalms105:40 Ɓe ƴami mo kusel
Psalms105:41 O seeki tapaare
Psalms105:42 Ngam o siftori wolde maako seniinde nde o wolwani jaggiiɗo maako Ibrahiima.
Psalms105:43 Non o wurtiniri yimɓe maako bee seyo
Psalms105:44 O marni ɓe lesɗe ummaatooje goɗɗe
Psalms105:45 ngam haa ɓe njogo farillaaji maako
Psalms106:1 Halleluya! Ngette Jawmiraawo
Psalms106:2 Moy waawata anndingo kuuɗe Jawmiraawo mawɗe e yeeynugo maŋgtooje maako fuu?
Psalms106:3 Barka laatanto gooŋga'en
Psalms106:4 Siftoram nder mo'ere ma ngam ummaatoore ma
Psalms106:5 Accu mi yi'a hayru suɓaaɓe ma
Psalms106:6 Min mbaɗi hakke bana kaakiraaɓe amin
Psalms106:7 Kaakiraaɓe amin haa Misra paamaay kaayeefiiji ma
Psalms106:8 Ammaa Jawmiraawo walli ɓe
Psalms106:9 O telɓani maayo Maaliya
Psalms106:10 O hisni ɓe juuɗe wanyɓe ɓe
Psalms106:11 Ndiyam suddi toonyotooɓe ɓe. walaa koo gooto maɓɓe hisi.
Psalms106:12 Nden yimɓe maako nuɗɗini bolle maako
Psalms106:13 Ammaa law ɓe ngejjiti kuuɗe maako
Psalms106:14 Suuno naŋngi ɓe nder ladde. ɓe poondi Allah nder ladde hamaadaare.
Psalms106:15 O hokki ɓe ko ɓe ƴami nden o ukkani ɓe nyawu kalluŋgu.
Psalms106:16 Nder saŋngeere ɓe kaaji Muusa e Haruna
Psalms106:17 Lesdi seeki
Psalms106:18 Yiite wuli mooɓre maɓɓe
Psalms106:19 Ɓe mbaɗi suura gaggel haa Horeb
Psalms106:20 Ɓe cannjiri tedduŋgal Allah bee suura nagge meere!
Psalms106:21 Ɓe ngejjiti Allah kisnuɗo ɓe kuuwɗo kuuɗe mawɗe e kaayeefiije haa Misra
Psalms106:22 
Psalms106:23 O wi'no o halkan ɓe
Psalms106:24 Nden ɓe njawi lesdi ɓurndi wooɗugo ndi'i
Psalms106:25 Ɓe ngurŋgurti nder laymaaji maɓɓe
Psalms106:26 O ɓaŋgti juŋngo maako
Psalms106:27 o mbaran danygol maɓɓe caka ummaatooje
Psalms106:28 Nden yimɓe maako ɗakkotiri bee Ba'al-Pe'or
Psalms106:29 Ɓe ɓernini Jawmiraawo bee kuuɗe maɓɓe
Psalms106:30 Ammaa Pinehas ummi
Psalms106:31 Allah adilini mo haa foroy
Psalms106:32 Ɓe tikkini Jawmiraawo haa ndiyam Meriba
Psalms106:33 ngam ɓe mettini ɓernde Muusa
Psalms106:34 Ɓe nattinaay ummaatooje bana Jawmiraawo umruno ɓe.
Psalms106:35 Ammaa ɓe njillindiri bee maɓɓe
Psalms106:36 Ɓe ndewi labbi
Psalms106:37 Ɓe kirsani ginnaaji ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe worɓe e rewɓe
Psalms106:38 ɓe ndufi ƴiiƴam yimɓe ɓe ngalaa aybe
Psalms106:39 Ɓe coɓni ko'e maɓɓe bee kuuɗe maɓɓe
Psalms106:40 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo ɓernani yimɓe mum
Psalms106:41 O hokki ɓe haa juuɗe ummaatooje goɗɗe
Psalms106:42 Wanywanyɓe maɓɓe toonyi ɓe
Psalms106:43 Nde ɗuuɗɗum Jawmiraawo hisni ɓe
Psalms106:44 Ammaa bee man fuu Jawmiraawo laari ɓillaare maɓɓe
Psalms106:45 O siftori alkawal ngal o haɓɓi bee maɓɓe
Psalms106:46 O wayli numooji dahɓe ɓe fuu
Psalms106:47 Hisnu min
Psalms106:48 Yettoore laatano Jawmiraawo mo Allah Isra'iila foroy haa abada. Ummaatoore fuu wi'a: “Aamiina!” Halleluya!

Psalms107:3 O mooɓti ɓe diga lesɗe fuunaaŋge e hiirnaaŋge e woyla e fombina.
Psalms107:4 Woɗɓe maɓɓe ngiili nder ladde
Psalms107:5 Dolo e ɗomka torri ɓe
Psalms107:6 Nder ɓillaare maɓɓe ɓe ngookani Jawmiraawo

Psalms119:102 Mi selaay laawol kiitaaji ma
Psalms119:103 Bolle ma mbelani yam masin! Ɗe ɓuri koo njumri welugo.
Psalms119:104 Bee sarɗiiji ma keɓranmi hakkiilo
Psalms119:105 Wolde ma woni pittirla ngam palanɗe am
Psalms119:106 Mi hunake
Psalms119:107 Fakat mi torriiɗo masin
Psalms119:108 Yerda gettooje ɗe mi lii'ani ma
Psalms119:109 Mi ɗon haa daande maayde foroy
Psalms119:110 Halluɓe ɗon mbaɗammi tuuforgol

Psalms119:112 Mi huucitini ɓernde am dow farillaaji ma haa foroy

Psalms119:114 An woni nyukkorde am e wawarde am
Psalms119:115 Ndaayeeɗam

Psalms119:117 Tiigam haa mi hisa

Psalms119:119 A rufi halluɓe duniyaaru fuu bana mbuuwri

Psalms119:122 Tabitin hayru maccuɗo ma

Psalms119:124 Waɗan maccuɗo ma fodde mbooɗeeŋga ma
Psalms119:125 Mi maccuɗo ma

Psalms119:147 Diga weetaay mi ɗon toro ballal ma
Psalms119:148 Mi finan diga weetaay

Psalms119:150 Waɗooɓe halleende ɗon ɓadito
Psalms119:151 Ammaa an a ɓadiiɗo

Psalms119:153 Laar ɓillaare am
Psalms119:154 Jiŋngam

Psalms119:156 Ammaa enɗam ma ɗuuɗi

Psalms119:159 Laar no mi yiɗiri sarɗiiji ma
Psalms119:160 Dubbeere wolde ma ɗum gooŋga
Psalms119:161 Mawɓe ɗon taasnammi bilaa daliila

Psalms136:1 Ngette Jawmiraawo
Psalms136:2 Ngette Allah Mawɗo – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:3 Ngette Jawmiraawo jawmiraaɓe – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:4 Kaŋko feere maako ɗon waɗa kaayeefiiji mawɗi – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:5 O tagi asamanji bee hikma – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:6 O we'iti lesdi dow ndiyamji – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:7 O waɗi jayli mawɗi – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:8 naaŋge ngam laamanaago nyalawma – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada –
Psalms136:9 lewru e koode boo ngam laamanaago jemma – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:10 O mbari ɓiɓɓe Misra'en afɓe – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:11 O wurtini yimɓe Isra'iila diga Misra – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada –
Psalms136:12 bee juŋngo maako semmbiɗŋgo – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:13 O senndi maayo Maaliya geɓe ɗiɗi – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:14 O eerni yimɓe Isra'iila haa caka maago – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:15 O majjini Firawna e mooɓre honooɓe mum nder maago – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:16 O ɗowi ummaatoore maako nder ladde – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:17 O mbari laamiiɓe mawɓe – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada
Psalms136:18 o mbari laamiiɓe tedduɓe – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada
Psalms136:19 Sihon
Psalms136:20 e Ook
Psalms136:21 O hokki lesɗe maɓɓe haa ummaatoore maako – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada
Psalms136:22 ɗe laati maral Isra'iila'en jagganooɓe mo – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:23 O yejjitaay en saa'i en toskaaɓe – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:24 O hisni en juuɗe konne'en men – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:25 O ɗon nyaamna tagefooji fuu – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.
Psalms136:26 Ngette Allah mo asama – mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗon haa abada.

Ecclesiastes1:1 Ndaa bolle Gaazoowo ɓii Daawuda
Ecclesiastes1:2 Gaazoowo wi'i: Meereejum meere! Meere koros! Koo ɗume fuu woni meere.
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nafuuda kaye neɗɗo heɓata haa torra kuugal ngal o huuwata haa duniyaaru fuu?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Yidere saalo
Ecclesiastes1:5 Naaŋge fuɗa
Ecclesiastes1:6 Henndu yaha fombina
Ecclesiastes1:7 Maaje fuu ɗon ila haa mbeela
Ecclesiastes1:8 Kuuje fuu comnan haa ɓura tinndinoore. Yiitere somataa yi'ugo

Ecclesiastes1:10 To woodi huunde nde ɓe mbi'ata: “Ndaa ɗum kesum”
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ammaa walaa mo siftorta ɓooymaajum. Non boo ko saaloto nder balɗe garanɗe
Ecclesiastes1:12 Min Gaazoowo
Ecclesiastes1:13 Mi waɗi anniya ɗaɓɓititgo e linyugo bee hikma ko ɗon saalo les asama fuu. Tawmi: Allah sukli ɓiɓɓe Aadama bee suklere naawnde.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Mi yi'i kuuɗe kuuwaaɗe haa duniyaaru fuu. Ndaa
Ecclesiastes1:15 Leliiɗum leltataake
Ecclesiastes1:16 Mi numi: Ndaa
Ecclesiastes1:17 Mi waɗi anniya anndugo hikma non boo nginnaaku e faataare. Tawmi: Kanjum boo ɗum naŋngugo henndu.
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ngam hikma ɗuuɗka ɗon bee metteeŋga ɗuuɗŋga
Ecclesiastes2:1 Mi numi: Booɗɗum! Sey mi foonda ɓernde am bee seyo
Ecclesiastes2:2 Mi wi'i: Jaleeɗe ɗum nginnaaku
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nden mi hoo'i anniya seynugo ɓanndu am bee inaboojam
Ecclesiastes2:4 Mi huuwi kuuɗe mawɗe: Mi nyiɓani hoore am cuuɗi
Ecclesiastes2:5 Mi waɗani hoore am jarne e cuuraaɗe ngam waancugo. Mi jubi ton leɗɗe dimooje feere feere.
Ecclesiastes2:6 Mi waɗani hoore am okolooje ngam yarnugo lekkon njubaakon.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Mi soodi maccuɓe e horɓe
Ecclesiastes2:8 Mi mooɓtani hoore am cardi e kaŋŋeeri e ndesaaje laamiiɓe e ndesaaje taƴe lesdi. Mi heɓani hoore am yimooɓe worɓe e rewɓe
Ecclesiastes2:9 Mi mawni ko ɓuri aartunooɓe yam nder Urusaliima fuu. Hikma am boo ɗon wondi bee am.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ko fottani gite am fuu
Ecclesiastes2:11 Nden mi numti kuuɗe ɗe juuɗe am kuuwi e torra kuugal ngal kuuwmi: Ndaa
Ecclesiastes2:12 Nden mi numti haala hikma e nginnaaku e faataare. Kadi ɗume laamotooɗo ɓaawo laamiiɗo waɗata? Ko ɓe mbaɗi diga ɓooyma!
Ecclesiastes2:13 Tawmi: Nafuuda hikma ɓuri ka faataare bana nafuuda jayŋgol ɓurdi ka nyiɓre.
Ecclesiastes2:14 Hikmaajo anndi toy o yahata
Ecclesiastes2:15 Mi numi mi wi'i: Nde nii hoddiroore nde ukkanto paataaɗo

Ecclesiastes2:20 Ngam maajum torra kuugal ngal kuuwmi haa duniyaaru fuu nastini yam nder sooynde tammunde.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Neɗɗo torroto bee hikma e anndal e goniiku
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ɗume laatanto neɗɗo ngam torra kuugal mum ngal o sukli huuwugo haa duniyaaru fuu?

Ecclesiastes9:7 Yah

Ecclesiastes10:13 Fuɗɗam bolle maako ɗum faataare
Ecclesiastes10:14 Paataaɗo ɗuɗɗinan bolle. Neɗɗo anndaa ko tammi laataago. Walaa anndinanɗo mo ko laatoto ɓaawo maako.
