Isaiah1:1 Ndaa wahayu mo Esaaya ɓii Amoosa heɓi dow Yahuuda e Urusaliima nder zamanu Uzziya e Yotam e Akas e Hezekiya
Isaiah1:2 “Asamanji
Isaiah1:3 Ngaari anndi marɗo ɗum
Isaiah1:4 Bone laatanto ummaatoore hakke'en nde'e
Isaiah1:5 Haa toy ngiɗɗon goɗɗo fiya on fahin
Isaiah1:6 Teppere haa hoore fuu yamɗaay sam
Isaiah1:7 Lesdi mon laatake ladde meere
Isaiah1:8 Urusaliima warti bana daŋki nder ngesa inabooje
Isaiah1:9 To Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama luttanaayno en yeeɗɓe seɗɗa
Isaiah1:10 Nane wolde Jawmiraawo
Isaiah1:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ko yaali yam bee ɗuuɗeeŋga kirsaaɗi mon? Mi safti jawɗi gulaaɗi e ɓellere nyalbi. Mi seyortaako ƴiiƴam ga'i kalhali e baali e jawɗi be'i.
Isaiah1:12 Nde ngaroton sujidango yam
Isaiah1:13 Acce waddugo dokke hayamje. Uurle uurooje ɗe nyidduɗe yeeso am. Juulɗe lewru hesru e nyalɗe ciwtorɗe e mooɓtuki mooɓorle – min kam
Isaiah1:14 Mi wanyi juulɗe mon hakkunde lebbi e juulɗe mon goɗɗe fuu. Ɗe laatani yam doŋngal
Isaiah1:15 To on mbeeɗi juuɗe mooɗon ngam do'aago
Isaiah1:16 Ngiiwe
Isaiah1:17 Ekkite waɗugo ko wooɗi
Isaiah1:18 “Kadi
Isaiah1:19 To on njaɓi ɗowtanaago yam
Isaiah1:20 Ammaa to on calake
Isaiah1:21 Kayto! Berniwol koolaaŋgol naane laati bana debbo daakaareejo. Naane adili'en njooɗi ton
Isaiah1:22 Cardi ma laatake njamndi meere
Isaiah1:23 Ardiiɓe ma laatake tuurtooɓe
Isaiah1:24 Ngam maajum
Isaiah1:25 An Urusaliima
Isaiah1:26 Mi wartiran hiitooɓe bana naane
Isaiah1:27 To Siyona waɗi kiita ngooŋɗuka
Isaiah1:28 Ammaa tuurtooɓe e hakke'en
Isaiah1:29 On cemtan ngam on ndewi labbi les leɗɗe mawɗe
Isaiah1:30 On laatoto bana leɗɗe mawɗe ɗe haako maaje ɗayli
Isaiah1:31 Bana hottollo wuldata to fe'tere yiite meemi ko
Isaiah2:1 Ndaa wolde nde Esaaya ɓii Amoosa heɓi nder wahayu dow Yahuuda e Urusaliima:
Isaiah2:2 Haa nyalɗe ragareeje
Isaiah2:3 Ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe njahan ton
Isaiah2:4 O laatoto kiitoowo hakkunde ummaatooje
Isaiah2:5 Yimɓe Yaakubu
Isaiah2:6 Yaa Allah
Isaiah2:7 Lesdi maɓɓe heewi cardi e kaŋŋeeri
Isaiah2:8 Lesdi maɓɓe heewi labbi
Isaiah2:9 Neɗɗo turake
Isaiah2:10 Naste nder tapaaje
Isaiah2:11 Nyalaade man mawnitiiɗo leestan
Isaiah2:12 Ɗum nyalaade Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Isaiah2:13 O halkan leɗɗe Libanon fuu
Isaiah2:14 O leestinan kooseeje e towndiije towɗe fuu.
Isaiah2:15 O yibbinan cuuɗi towɗi fuu e mahi cemmbiɗɗi fuu.
Isaiah2:16 Non boo koommbooje Tarsis fuu e koommbooje ɓurɗe wooɗugo fuu.
Isaiah2:17 Mawnitiiɗo leestinteeɗo
Isaiah2:18 Labbi kalkidan fuu.
Isaiah2:19 Yimɓe nastan nder lowi tapaaje e gasɗe nder mbulwuldi ngam daaytaago bee kultoreeŋgol Jawmiraawo e ɗelko maŋngu maako
Isaiah2:20 Nyalaade man yimɓe koo'an labbi muuɗum'en ɗi cardi e kaŋŋeeri
Isaiah2:21 Nden ɓe nastan nder gaaruuji tapaaje e ceekli kooseeje ngam daaytaago kultoreeŋgol Jawmiraawo e ɗelko maŋngu maako
Isaiah2:22 Acce hoolaago neɗɗo mo woodi foofaaŋgo tan. Ɗume o nafata?
Isaiah3:1 Ndaa
Isaiah3:2 Non boo cemmbiɗɗo e konoowo
Isaiah3:3 hooreejo dow yimɓe cappanɗe njowo e tedduɗo
Isaiah3:4 Mi jo'inan derke'en ardiiɓe maɓɓe
Isaiah3:5 Caka ummaatoore
Isaiah3:6 Goɗɗo naŋngan deerɗum nder saare baaba mum
Isaiah3:7 Nyalaade man kaŋko o jaaboto: “Naa mi kurgoowo. Nder saare am walaa nyaamdu
Isaiah3:8 Fakat Urusaliima yani
Isaiah3:9 Ƴaggaare maɓɓe ɗon aybina ɓe. Ɓe ɗon mbaŋgina hakke maɓɓe bana yimɓe Sodoma
Isaiah3:10 Mbi'e adili'en keɓan hayru
Isaiah3:11 Bone laatanto kalluɗo! O yaran bone
Isaiah3:12 Toonyotooɓe ummaatoore am ɗum ɓikkoy
Isaiah3:13 Jawmiraawo ummi ngam wullaago
Isaiah3:14 Jawmiraawo hiitoto ndotti'en e ardiiɓe ummaatoore muuɗum
Isaiah3:15 Koni njaaɓoton ummaatoore am? Koni namoton geese talaka'en?” Nii Jawmiraawo Allah
Isaiah3:16 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Rewɓe Urusaliima mawniti
Isaiah3:17 Ngam maajum mi felliɗinan ɓe
Isaiah3:18 Nyalaade man
Isaiah3:19 palamje e seemdeeje e cuddaaje
Isaiah3:20 mojaaje e pegge e taadorli e paali uurdi e layaaji
Isaiah3:21 kalagaaje kooli e kalagaaje kine
Isaiah3:22 jaage e gude e marabbaaje e boorooji
Isaiah3:23 daarorɗe e limce ɗigguɗe e meetali e cuumli.
Isaiah3:24 Haa pellel uurdi kacceeŋga laatoto
Isaiah3:25 Urusaliima
Isaiah3:26 Berniwol Siyona uuman
Isaiah4:1 Nyalaade man rewɓe njoweeɗiɗo naŋngan gorko gooto
Isaiah4:2 Nyalaade man
Isaiah4:3 Nden kam luttuɓe Siyona e hisɓe wonɓe nder Urusaliima
Isaiah4:4 To Jawmiraawo itti tuundi rewɓe Urusaliima
Isaiah4:5 nden kam
Isaiah4:6 Ɗum laatoto bana ɗowdi suudu laymaaru saa'i nguli naaŋge
Isaiah5:1 Useni
Isaiah5:2 O remi ka
Isaiah5:3 Jonta
Isaiah5:4 Koni ka rimaay ɓiɓɓe belɗe
Isaiah5:5 Mi anndina on ko mi yiɗi waɗugo ngesa inabooje am: Mi ittan kowaagol haa na'i e dammooji dura ka. Mi yibbinan mahol taariiŋgol
Isaiah5:6 Mi wilan ka fuu
Isaiah5:7 Isra'iila woni ngesa inabooje Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Isaiah5:8 Bone laatanto mahooɓe suudu dow suudu
Isaiah5:9 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wolwani yam: “Fakat
Isaiah5:10 Ngam ngesa inabooje ka ɓoggi sappo
Isaiah5:11 Bone laatanto dawooɓe cub haa ɓe ɗaɓɓita nguykinoojam
Isaiah5:12 Hoodu e moolooru e mbaggu e ciidal e inaboojam moddinta juulɗe maɓɓe. Ammaa ɓe kakkilantaa kuugal Jawmiraawo
Isaiah5:13 Ngam maajum yimɓe ummaatoore am ndahaama
Isaiah5:14 Ngam man joonde maayɓe maɓɓititto masin
Isaiah5:15 Bana non neɗɗo turoto
Isaiah5:16 Ammaa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama ɓaŋgoto nder kiita ngooŋɗuka
Isaiah5:17 Baali nyaaman bana nder ngaynaaka
Isaiah5:18 Bone laatanto fooɗooɓe aybe muuɗum'en bee ɓoggi zammba e hakke muuɗum'en boo bee ɓoggi moota pucci.
Isaiah5:19 Ɓe ɗon mbi'a: “Sey Jawmiraawo yaawɗo
Isaiah5:20 Bone laatanto wi'ooɓe kalluɗum ɗum booɗɗum e booɗɗum boo ɗum kalluɗum
Isaiah5:21 Bone laatanto laarooɓe ko'e muuɗum'en ɓe hikma'en
Isaiah5:22 Bone laatanto waawɓe yarugo inaboojam e semmbiɗɓe jillugo nguykinoojam
Isaiah5:23 gooŋɗinooɓe kalluɗo ngam ɓe keɓa ngeenaari
Isaiah5:24 Ngam maajum
Isaiah5:25 Ngam maajum tikkere Jawmiraawo ɗon ukko dow ummaatoore mum. O ɗon forta juŋngo maako dow maɓɓe
Isaiah5:26 O darnanan yimɓe ummaatoore daayiinde tuutawal
Isaiah5:27 Walaa comɗo caka maɓɓe malla pergotooɗo. Walaa ngoŋnganɗo malla ɗaanotooɗo. Taadorgol keeci maɓɓe fiistaaki
Isaiah5:28 Kuri maɓɓe ceeɓi
Isaiah5:29 Hoolo maɓɓe bana ngo mbarooga
Isaiah5:30 Nyalaade man ɓe koolan dow Isra'iila bana mbeela hoolata. To goɗɗo laari haa lesdi
Isaiah6:1 Hitaande nde laamiiɗo Uzziya maayi
Isaiah6:2 Serafi'en ɗon dow maako. Koo moy maɓɓe woodi bileeji joweego: Ɗiɗi ngam wiirnugo yeeso
Isaiah6:3 Ɓe ɗon mbi'a: “Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama o ceniiɗo
Isaiah6:4 Caɓɓaaje haa dammuɗe haykaliiru ndiwni ngam sawtu ewnooɓe
Isaiah6:5 Nden mbi'mi: “Bone tawi yam! Mi halki
Isaiah6:6 Gooto serafi'en fiiri wari haa am
Isaiah6:7 O meemi hunnduko am
Isaiah6:8 Mi nani sawtu Jawmiraawo
Isaiah6:9 O wi'i: “Yah
Isaiah6:10 Saatin ɓerɗe yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e! Sukku ɓe noppi! Maɓɓu ɓe gite ngam taa ɓe ngi'a
Isaiah6:11 Mi ƴami: “Haa ndeye ɗum timmata
Isaiah6:12 haa to Jawmiraawo riiwi yimɓe daayiiɗum
Isaiah6:13 To yeɓre jooɗiiɓe ton woore nder sappo lutti nder lesdi
Isaiah7:1 Nder zamanu Akas ɓii Yotam ɓii Uzziya
Isaiah7:2 Yimɓe saare Daawuda anndinaama: “Jama'aare konu Siriya saŋngini haa lesdi Efrayim.” Ɓernde laamiiɗo e ɓerɗe yimɓe ummaatoore mum ndiwni bana leɗɗe laynde ndiwnirta nder henndu.
Isaiah7:3 Jawmiraawo wi'i Esaaya: “Wurta
Isaiah7:4 Wi' mo: Reenta
Isaiah7:5 Siriya'en nufani ma kalluɗum
Isaiah7:6 En njah
Isaiah7:7 Jawmiraawo wi'i nii: Ɗum waɗataako
Isaiah7:8 Ngam semmbe Siriya
Isaiah7:9 Ngam semmbe Efrayim
Isaiah7:10 Jawmiraawo wolwani Akas
Isaiah7:11 “Ƴam Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa o holle alaama ngonka koo nder joonde maayɓe haa les
Isaiah7:12 Akas wi'i: “Mi ƴamataa koo ɗume
Isaiah7:13 Esaaya wi'i: “Nane
Isaiah7:14 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo bee hoore muuɗum hokkan on alaama: Ndaa
Isaiah7:15 Kaŋko o nyaaman kettuŋgol e njumri haa to o he'i salaago kalluɗum e suɓugo booɗɗum.
Isaiah7:16 Ammaa hiddeko saa'i man waɗa
Isaiah7:17 Jawmiraawo yahran dow maaɗa e dow yimɓe ma e saare baaba ma nyalɗe bone ɗe meeɗaay laataago diga Efrayim seedi bee Yahuuda. O waɗan ɗum bee laamiiɗo Assuura.
Isaiah7:18 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo yoofan buubi gonɗi haa seɓatto maaje Misra e nyaaki gonɗi haa lesdi Assuura'en.
Isaiah7:19 Ɗi ngaran
Isaiah7:20 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo laɓan gaasa hoore e suufu
Isaiah7:21 Nyalaade man goɗɗo duran wiige e baali ɗiɗi.
Isaiah7:22 Ngam daliila ɗuuɗeeŋga kosam
Isaiah7:23 Nyalaade man
Isaiah7:24 Jahanɗo loohoyaago ton jogoto kuri e lagaawal
Isaiah7:25 Kooseeje demaaɗe bee baaneewo fuu
Isaiah8:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Hoo'u alluha makka
Isaiah8:2 Mi hoo'i bee am seedooɓe hoolaaɓe: Uriya
Isaiah8:3 Ɓaawo man mi nasti haa debbo am. O reedi
Isaiah8:4 Ngam hiddeko ɓiŋngel annda wi'go: Baaba am malla daada am
Isaiah8:5 Jawmiraawo tokki wolwango yam
Isaiah8:6 “Yimɓe ɓe'e ɗon njawo ndiyam Siloha ilanɗam bee hakkiilo
Isaiah8:7 Ngam man
Isaiah8:8 Ndiyam maago nastan Yahuuda
Isaiah8:9 Annde ɗum
Isaiah8:10 Nufe nufo ammaa ngo laatoto meere! Mbolwe ko ngiɗɗon
Isaiah8:11 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i yam saa'i o naŋngi yam bee semmbe
Isaiah8:12 “Taa ewne tuurtol ko yimɓe ɓe'e fuu ewnata tuurtol. Taa kule ko ɓe kulata
Isaiah8:13 Ammaa anndite Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama o ceniiɗo
Isaiah8:14 O laatanto laamuuji Isra'iila ɗiɗi nokkuure seniinde
Isaiah8:15 Ɗuuɗɓe caka maɓɓe pergoto
Isaiah8:16 Sey mi maɓɓa wahayuuji ɗi'i
Isaiah8:17 Mi ɗon heɗito Jawmiraawo mo wiirnani danygol Yaakubu yeeso muuɗum. Kaŋko mi tammori.
Isaiah8:18 Ndaa
Isaiah8:19 To yimɓe mbi'i on: “Sey on ƴama sarwotooɓe maayɓe e waɗooɓe hatti
Isaiah8:20 Njaabe ɓe: “Aa'a! Sey goɗɗo nana seedamku e ekkitinol Allah!” To on mbi'ataa non
Isaiah8:21 Ɓe ngiiloto nder lesdi
Isaiah8:22 ɓe ndaaran haa les
Isaiah8:23 Fakat
Isaiah9:1 Ummaatoore wonnde nder nyiɓre yi'i annoora makka. Annoora yaynani jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi ndi nyiɓre maayde.
Isaiah9:2 An yaa Jawmiraawo
Isaiah9:3 Ngam a yewi kaɓɓirgal doŋngal maɓɓe e leggal dow balbe maɓɓe e sawru toonyooɓe ɓe
Isaiah9:4 Paɗe caatuɗe ɗe honooɓe e limce tallaaɗe nder ƴiiƴam fuu
Isaiah9:5 En ndanyanaama ɓiŋngel
Isaiah9:6 O mawninan baawɗe laamu maako
Isaiah9:7 Jawmiraawo neli koŋngol dow danygol Yaakubu
Isaiah9:8 Ummaatoore fuu anndan ngol
Isaiah9:9 “Birikje ngibbi
Isaiah9:10 Ammaa Jawmiraawo jaalini konne'en Recin dow maɓɓe
Isaiah9:11 Siriya'en diga fuunaaŋge e Filisti'en diga hiirnaaŋge. Ɓe moɗan Isra'iila bee hunnduko makko. Bee non fuu
Isaiah9:12 Ammaa yimɓe ummaatoore lortaaki haa piyɗo ɓe
Isaiah9:13 Ngam man nder nyalaade woore
Isaiah9:14 Ndottiijo e tedduɗo
Isaiah9:15 Ɗowooɓe ummaatoore nde'e ɗon majjina nde
Isaiah9:16 Ngam man Jawmiraawo seyortaako derke'en maɓɓe
Isaiah9:17 Halleende wulan bana yiite wulanŋge gi'e e giŋngille
Isaiah9:18 Tikkere Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wuli lesdi
Isaiah9:19 Ɓe ɗon ceela kusel haa nyaamo
Isaiah9:20 Manassa ɗon nyaama Efrayim
Isaiah10:1 Bone laatanto umrooɓe umrooje kalluɗe e tiiɗanɓe winndugo sarɗiiji gaddanɗi sarru
Isaiah10:2 ngam ɓe calano talaka'en gooŋga nder kiita
Isaiah10:3 Ko mbaɗoton nyalaade kiita
Isaiah10:4 Walaa ko lutti
Isaiah10:5 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Bone laatanto Assuura! Mi ɗon huuwtinira ɓe bana sawru e ɓoccol ngam fiyugo yimɓe ɓe tikkanmi.
Isaiah10:6 Mi nelan ɓe dow ummaatoore hallunde
Isaiah10:7 Ammaa laamiiɗo Assuura hiitaaki bana non
Isaiah10:8 O ɗon manto
Isaiah10:9 Mi nyaami Kalno e Karkemis. Mi nyaami Hamat e Arpad. Mi nyaami Samariya e Damas.
Isaiah10:10 Juŋngo am yottake laamuuji labbi
Isaiah10:11 Mi halki Samariya e labbi maagol fuu. Bana non kuuwanmi Urusaliima e labbi maagol.”
Isaiah10:12 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i: “To mi timmini kuugal am fuu haa hooseere Siyona e Urusaliima
Isaiah10:13 Laamiiɗo Assuura ɗon manto
Isaiah10:14 Juŋngo am ɓofti jawdi ummaatooje bana geeraaɗe nder saɓɓo. Bana goɗɗo ɓoftirta geeraaɗe accaaɗe
Isaiah10:15 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Fe'irde juroto dow pe'anɗo bee maare na? Ceekruga mawnititto dow ceekanɗo bee maaga na? Ɓoccol dimmbintaa ɓaŋgtuɗo ɗum
Isaiah10:16 Ngam man Allah
Isaiah10:17 Annoora Isra'iila laatoto yiite
Isaiah10:18 Ka halkan laynde maako woonde e leɗɗe ciraka maako booɗɗe fuu. Ɗum laatoto bana nyawɗo jinnirta.
Isaiah10:19 Limgal luttuɗum haa leɗɗe laynde maako famɗitan masin
Isaiah10:20 Nyalaade man yimɓe Isra'iila luttuɓe
Isaiah10:21 Luttuɓe lortoto
Isaiah10:22 Koo to yimɓe Isra'iila ɗuuɗi bana njaareendi maayo
Isaiah10:23 Ngam Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama timminan nattere nder duniyaaru fuu
Isaiah10:24 Ngam man
Isaiah10:25 Ngam lutti seɗɗa
Isaiah10:26 Min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama mi ɓaŋgtan ɓoccol dow Assuura'en
Isaiah10:27 Nyalaade man
Isaiah10:28 Konne'en ɗon haa Ayyat
Isaiah10:29 Ɓe caali diirtorde
Isaiah10:30 Ngooke
Isaiah10:31 Yimɓe Madameena ɗon ndaɗa
Isaiah10:32 Hannde konne'en ɗon ndaro haa Noba. Ɓe ɗon purkito Siyona
Isaiah10:33 Ndaa
Isaiah10:34 Laynde sukkunde do'oto bee fe'irde
Isaiah11:1 Laamu laamiiɓe ɓe asŋgol Daawuda ɓii Yessa ittaama. Ammaa bana lisal keccal fuɗirta diga tuggere lekki
Isaiah11:2 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo ɗon dow maako
Isaiah11:3 O seyorto kulol Jawmiraawo. O hiitataako fodde giiɗe gite maako
Isaiah11:4 Ammaa o hiitanto laafuɓe fodde adilaaku
Isaiah11:5 Adilaaku e gooŋgaaku laatoto taadorgol maako.
Isaiah11:6 Nden saafaandu wondan bee bortel
Isaiah11:7 Nagge e ɓoodu ndurdan
Isaiah11:8 Ɓiŋngel musinanŋgel fijan haa ngaska culanndi
Isaiah11:9 Walaa kalluɗum
Isaiah11:10 Nyalaade man laamiiɗo keso mo asŋgol Yessa go daroto bana tuutawal ngam jama'aaje. Ummaatooje ɗaɓɓitan mo
Isaiah11:11 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo fortan juŋngo muuɗum ɗiɗaɓre fahin
Isaiah11:12 O ɓaŋgtan tuutawal ngam ummaatooje
Isaiah11:13 Kaajal Efrayim sottan
Isaiah11:14 Ummaatooje ɗiɗi ɗe'e ukkanto Filisti'en haa hiirnaaŋge
Isaiah11:15 Jawmiraawo ɓeeɓnan lonyoodu mbeela Misra
Isaiah11:16 Bana non laawol jaasŋgol ɗon ngam luttuɓe yimɓe maako
Isaiah12:1 Nyalaade man ummaatoore rimɗinaande wi'an: “Mi maŋgtete
Isaiah12:2 Allah woni kisndam am
Isaiah12:3 Bee seyo nyeɗoton ndiyam haa ceeɓooje kisndam.
Isaiah12:4 On mbi'an nyalaade man: “Ngette Jawmiraawo
Isaiah12:5 Ngimane Jawmiraawo! Ngam o huuwi kuuɗe mawɗe
Isaiah12:6 Ceye! Mbaɗe gookaali seyo
Isaiah13:1 Ndaa wahayu dow Baabila mo Esaaya ɓii Amoosa heɓi:
Isaiah13:2 Ndarne tuutawal dow hooseere sookre. Ngookane honooɓe. Ɓaase ɓe ɓe nastira dammuɗe tedda-asli'en.
Isaiah13:3 Mi umri senaaɓe am
Isaiah13:4 Nane hoolo dow kooseeje bana ngo yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe! Nane hoolo laamuuji e ummaatooje mooɓtiiɗe
Isaiah13:5 Honooɓe ɓe'e ɗon ngara diga lesdi daayiindi
Isaiah13:6 Mboye! Ngam nyalaade Jawmiraawo ɓaditake
Isaiah13:7 Ngam man juuɗe fuu tampan
Isaiah13:8 Ɓe caklake
Isaiah13:9 Ndaa
Isaiah13:10 Koode asama e dulooje muuɗum'en accan yaynugo. Naaŋge nyiɓɓan saa'i nge fuɗata
Isaiah13:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi hiitoto halleende duniyaaru e zunuuba halluɓe. Mi ittan daliila mawnitaare mawnitiiɓe
Isaiah13:12 Yimɓe ɗuuɗataa
Isaiah13:13 Ngam man ndimmbanmi asama
Isaiah13:14 Bana lelwa ndiiwaaŋga
Isaiah13:15 To konne'en tawi goɗɗo
Isaiah13:16 Ɓikkoy maɓɓe
Isaiah13:17 Allah wi'i: “Mi umminan Medi'en dow maɓɓe. Kamɓe ɓe kakkilantaa cardi
Isaiah13:18 Lagaaje e kuri maɓɓe ndo'an suka'en
Isaiah13:19 Baabila
Isaiah13:20 Walaa mo jooɗoto ton
Isaiah13:21 Ammaa dabbaaji ladde mbaalan ton
Isaiah13:22 Pobbi mboyan nder cuuɗi maagol cemmbiɗɗi
Isaiah14:1 Fakat
Isaiah14:2 Ummaatooje goɗɗe koocan e njahran ɓe haa lesdi maɓɓe
Isaiah14:3 Isra'iila
Isaiah14:4 a yimanan laamiiɗo Baabila gimol jancowol ngo'ol: “Yowwa
Isaiah14:5 Jawmiraawo yewi ɓoccol halluɓe e sawru toonyooɓe.
Isaiah14:6 O fiyi ummaatooje bee tikkere
Isaiah14:7 Lesdi fuu foofti
Isaiah14:8 Koo leɗɗe booɗɗe boo ɗon ceyoro do'ere ma. Leɗɗe cemmbiɗɗe haa Libanon fuu ɗon mbi'a: Diga a ɗon waali
Isaiah14:9 Joonde maayɓe haa les ɗon dimmbo ngam jaɓɓaago ma. Nde ummini mbeeluuji waato mawɓe lesdi fuu ngam maaɗa
Isaiah14:10 Ɓe fuu ɓe mbi'ete: Jonta an boo a tampuɗo
Isaiah14:11 Daraja ma do'ake nder joonde maayɓe bee hoolo moolooji ma fuu. Gilɗi laati be'itte ma
Isaiah14:12 Noy ndo'oriiɗa diga asama
Isaiah14:13 A numi nder ɓernde ma: Mi eeŋgan haa asama
Isaiah14:14 Mi eeŋgan dow duule ɓaŋgiiɗe
Isaiah14:15 Ammaa a do'aama nder joonde maayɓe
Isaiah14:16 Yi'anɓe ma fuu cutete
Isaiah14:17 O wartiri duniyaaru ladde meere
Isaiah14:18 Laamiiɓe ummaatooje fuu ɗon mbaali nder tedduŋgal
Isaiah14:19 Ammaa an
Isaiah14:20 A hawtataa bee laamiiɓe woɗɓe nder yenaande
Isaiah14:21 Taaskitine mbareeki ɓiɓɓe maako daliila zunuuba kaakiraaɓe muuɗum'en. Taa ɓe ummito
Isaiah14:22 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mi ummanto Baabila. Mi nattinan daraja ma e luttuɓe ton e danygol maɓɓe fuu. Min Jawmiraawo wi'i ɗum.
Isaiah14:23 Mi wartiran ngol maral camnale e waalowol. Mi wuuwan ngol bee buurɗi ɗi halkere. Min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i ɗum.”
Isaiah14:24 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama huni
Isaiah14:25 Mi fusan Assuura'en nder lesdi am
Isaiah14:26 Kanjum mi nufi ngam duniyaaru fuu. Kanjum woni juŋngo am fortaaŋgo dow ummaatooje fuu.”
Isaiah14:27 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama waɗi anniya
Isaiah14:28 Hitaande nde laamiiɗo Akas maayi
Isaiah14:29 Onon yimɓe Filistiya fuu
Isaiah14:30 Jawmiraawo nyaamnan yimɓe muuɗum miskini'en bana gaynaako
Isaiah14:31 Ngooke ngam ballal
Isaiah14:32 Ɗume en njaaboto nelaaɓe Filisti'en? En mbi'an ɓe: “Jawmiraawo jo'ini Siyona
Isaiah15:1 Ndaa koŋngol dow Mo'ab. Jemmaare woore ngol natti. Ar-Mo'ab wilaama non boo Kir-Mo'ab.
Isaiah15:2 Jooɗiiɓe haa Bayit e haa Dibon ɗon mba'o haa nokkuuje towɗe ngam woyugo ton. Yimɓe Mo'ab ɗon mboya berniiji Nebo e Medeba. Ko'e maɓɓe fuu pemmbaama
Isaiah15:3 Dow laabi Mo'ab ɓe ɗon ɓorno limce buhuuje. Dow soorooji e haa babe fuu
Isaiah15:4 Jooɗiiɓe haa Hesbon e El'ale ɗon ngooka
Isaiah15:5 Ɓernde am ɗon woya dow lesdi Mo'ab. Ngam dogguɓe maari ɗon ndogga haa yotti Co'ar e Egilat-Silisiya. Ɓe ɗon mba'o wa'orde Luhit bee bojji. Dow laawol Horonayim ɓe ɗon mbaɗa gookaali daliila halkere.
Isaiah15:6 Ndiyamji Nimrim ɓeeɓi. Huɗo ɗayli
Isaiah15:7 Ngam maajum ɓe njahran jawdi maɓɓe e ndesaaje maɓɓe haa lekki kommbi maayo.
Isaiah15:8 Gookaali ɗon nane haa keeri Mo'ab fuu. Bojji maɓɓe ɗon njotto Egilayim e Biir-Elim.
Isaiah15:9 Ndiyamji Dimoon keewi ƴiiƴam
Isaiah16:1 Diga berniwol Sela nder ladde
Isaiah16:2 Bana colli giilotooɗi
Isaiah16:3 Ɓe mbi'an yimɓe Yahuuda: “Ndokke min sawari
Isaiah16:4 Acce riiwaaɓe Mo'ab koɗa haa mooɗon
Isaiah16:5 leeso laamu tabitan dow mbooɗeeŋga
Isaiah16:6 Yimɓe Yahuuda mbi'an: “Min nani habaru mawnitaare Mo'ab
Isaiah16:7 Ngam maajum
Isaiah16:8 Ngam gese Hesbon njoori
Isaiah16:9 Ngam maajum mboyanmi dow inabooje Sibama bana yimɓe Ya'ajer mboyirta. Onon Hesbon e El'ale
Isaiah16:10 Seyo e welwelo njinni haa gese mon
Isaiah16:11 Mi ɗon uuma ngam Mo'ab
Isaiah16:12 Yimɓe Mo'ab ɗon tiino yahugo haa nokkuuje towɗe
Isaiah16:13 Kanjum woni koŋngol ngol Jawmiraawo wolwino dow Mo'ab.
Isaiah16:14 Jonta kam ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Lutti duuɓi tati kal-kal
Isaiah17:1 Ndaa koŋngol dow Damas. Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Yeeso ɗo
Isaiah17:2 Berniiji Aro'er perwan haa foroy
Isaiah17:3 Hisrude semmbiɗnde woodaa nder lesdi Efrayim
Isaiah17:4 “Nyalaade man tedduŋgal ummaatoore Yaakubu ustoto bana fayfayru goɗɗo timmirta.
Isaiah17:5 Isra'iila nanndan bee ngesa
Isaiah17:6 Woɗɓe maɓɓe luttan
Isaiah17:7 Nyalaade man yimɓe tijjoto heedi tagɗo ɓe
Isaiah17:8 Ɓe ndaarataa kirsirɗe ɗe juuɗe maɓɓe mbaɗi. Ɓe kakkilantaa ko kooli maɓɓe mbaɗi
Isaiah17:9 Nyalaade man
Isaiah17:10 Onon Isra'iila'en
Isaiah17:11 Ammaa koo to ndi fuɗi nyannde on njubi ndi
Isaiah17:12 Kayto! Hoolo jama'aaje ɗuuɗɗe! Ɗe ɗon koola bana hoolo mbeela. Dukoore ummaatooje! Ɗe ɗon nduka bana dukoore ndiyamji mawɗi.
Isaiah17:13 Ummaatooje ɗon nduka bana dukoore ndiyamji mawɗi. Ammaa Jawmiraawo ɗon telɓana ɓe
Isaiah17:14 Saa'i kiikiiɗe
Isaiah18:1 Kayto! Lesdi hoolo bileeji
Isaiah18:2 nelanndi nelaaɓe dow mbeela nder koommbooje kuuwraaɗe kewe. Onon nelaaɓe yaawɗotooɓe
Isaiah18:3 Onon yimɓe duniyaaru fuu
Isaiah18:4 Ngam ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Mi ɗon jooɗi haa nokkuure am
Isaiah18:5 Ngam hiddeko ɓe itta inabooje
Isaiah18:6 O accan ɓalli maɓɓe ngam jigaaje kooseeje e dabbaaji ladde. Ton jigaaje e dabbaaji ladde boo keɓoyta nyaamdu wakkati fuu.
Isaiah18:7 Wakkati man
Isaiah19:1 Ndaa koŋngol dow Misra. Jawmiraawo ɗon wara haa Misra bee jaawal
Isaiah19:2 “Mi umminan Misra'en dow Misra'en
Isaiah19:3 Misra'en ellititto
Isaiah19:4 Mi hokkan Misra'en haa juŋngo jaagorɗo caatuɗo
Isaiah19:5 Ndiyam mbeela leestan
Isaiah19:6 Maaje fuu kaccan
Isaiah19:7 Durduɗe maayo Niil gonɗe haa pomoole maago e ko aawa ton njooran
Isaiah19:8 Waawooɓe liɗɗi uuman
Isaiah19:9 Mottooɓe hottollo e leŋ mbemmboto.
Isaiah19:10 Sannyooɓe tampan
Isaiah19:11 Ardiiɓe berniwol Co'an
Isaiah19:12 An laamiiɗo Misra
Isaiah19:13 Ardiiɓe Co'an laati faataaɓe
Isaiah19:14 Jawmiraawo loowi ruuhu njiiɓru nder maɓɓe
Isaiah19:15 Walaa kuugal booɗŋgal nder Misra ngal hoore malla wicco malla dibinoohi malla kewal.
Isaiah19:16 Nyalaade man Misra'en nanndan bee rewɓe
Isaiah19:17 Lesdi Yahuuda laatanto Misra daliila kultoreeŋgol. Koo ndeye goɗɗo wolwata haala Yahuuda
Isaiah19:18 Nyalaade man
Isaiah19:19 Nyalaade man hirsirde Jawmiraawo wonan haa caka lesdi Misra
Isaiah19:20 Ɗum alaama e seedamku ngam Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama nder lesdi Misra. To toonyooɓe ɓilli ɓe
Isaiah19:21 Jawmiraawo anndinan hoore muuɗum haa Misra'en
Isaiah19:22 Jawmiraawo fiyan Misra'en. O fiyan ɓe
Isaiah19:23 Nyalaade man buuwol ummoto diga Misra haa Assuura. Assuura'en e Misra'en ngillotiran. Misra'en hawtaade bee Assuura'en njagganto Jawmiraawo.
Isaiah19:24 Nyalaade man Isra'iila laatoto daliila barka ngam duniyaaru fuu
Isaiah19:25 Jawmiraawo barkiɗinan bee wi'go: “Barka laatanto Misra

Isaiah20:2 Duuɓi tati hiddeko ɗum laato

Isaiah20:4 bana non laamiiɗo Assuura dahan haɓɓaaɓe Misra e daheteeɓe Etiyopiya
Isaiah20:5 Nden kam ɓe kultoran
Isaiah20:6 Nyalaade man
Isaiah21:1 Ndaa koŋngol dow ladde hamaadaare wonnde kommbi mbeela. Bana duluuji bifanɗi haa Lesdi Fombina
Isaiah21:2 Allah yi'ni yam kuuje kulniiɗe: Zammboowo ɗon zammbo
Isaiah21:3 Ngam man keeci am tampi
Isaiah21:4 Hoore am ɗon yiilo
Isaiah21:5 Mi yi'i ɓe ɗon ngurtina nyaamdu
Isaiah21:6 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Darnu aynoowo! Ko o yi'ata fuu
Isaiah21:7 To o yi'i mootaaji ɗi pucci ɗiɗi ɗiɗi ɗon ndasa
Isaiah21:8 Ndaa
Isaiah21:9 Ndaa
Isaiah21:10 Kayto! Ummaatoore am fiyaama bana ɓe piyrata alkamaari dow laarre! Ko nanmi haa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Isaiah21:11 Ndaa koŋngol dow Duuma. Haa kooseeje Se'ir goɗɗo ɗon ewno yam: “Aynoowo
Isaiah21:12 Aynoowo jaabi: “Subaha waɗan
Isaiah21:13 Ndaa koŋngol dow Arabiya. Nder guuɓe
Isaiah21:14 Ngaddane ɗomɗuɓe ndiyam. Onon jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi Tema
Isaiah21:15 Ngam ɓe ɗon ndogga yeeso kaafahi
Isaiah21:16 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Lutti nduuɓu ngootu kal-kal
Isaiah21:17 Limgal waawɓe lagaaje luttanɓe haa yimɓe Keedar famɗan masin. Min Jawmiraawo
Isaiah22:1 Ndaa koŋngol dow Waadiwol Wahayuuji. Koni yimɓe ma fuu mba'i dow soorooji
Isaiah22:2 an berniwol keewŋgol hoolo e laanyotiral
Isaiah22:3 Ardiiɓe konu ma fuu ndoggi. Fiɗooɓe lagaaje kaɓɓi ɓe. Yimɓe ma fuu kaɓɓidaama hawtaade yaake ɓe ɗonno ndogga daayiiɗum.
Isaiah22:4 Ngam maajum mbi'mi: Taa ndaareeɗam
Isaiah22:5 Ngam Allah
Isaiah22:6 Honooɓe Elam ngardi bee lagaaje e kuri
Isaiah22:7 Waadiiji Yahuuda ɓurɗi wooɗugo keewi mootaaji pucci
Isaiah22:8 Jawmiraawo itti aynol Yahuuda. Saa'i man on kuuciti gal balmi mon haa Suudu Laynde.
Isaiah22:9 On ngi'i gibbe ɗuuɗɗe nder mahi berniwol Daawuda. On mooɓti ndiyamji haa weendu lesru.
Isaiah22:10 On limi cuuɗi Urusaliima
Isaiah22:11 On mbaɗi okoloore hakkunde mahi ɗiɗi ngam mooɓtugo ndiyamji ilanɗi diga weendu ɓooymaaru. Ammaa on ngartanaay Allah baɗɗo kuuje ɗe'e
Isaiah22:12 Allah Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama ewni on nyalaade man haa on mboya
Isaiah22:13 Ammaa onon on ceyi
Isaiah22:14 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wolwani yam
Isaiah22:15 Ndaa nii Allah
Isaiah22:16 Ɗume a mari haa ɗo
Isaiah22:17 Ndaa
Isaiah22:18 o taggete bana taggol gaaraaji
Isaiah22:19 Jawmiraawo riiwete e joonde ma
Isaiah22:20 Jawmiraawo anndini Sebna: “Nyalaade man mi ewnoto suka am Eliyakim ɓii Hilkiyya.
Isaiah22:21 Mi ɓornan mo limce ma
Isaiah22:22 Mi wallinan maɓɓitirɗum saare Daawuda dow balawal maako. To o maɓɓiti
Isaiah22:23 Mi ɗisan mo bana suufuure haa nokkuure saatunde. O laatanto saare baaba maako daliila tedduŋgal.
Isaiah22:24 Ammaa deerɗiiko'en e banndiiko'en fuu laatanto mo doŋngal. Ɓe ɓiloto haa maako bana payanɗe e bulki e taasaaje e pehe ɓilirte haa suufuure ɗisiinde.”
Isaiah22:25 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Saa'i man suufuure ɗisiinde haa nokkuure saatunde ɗistoto
Isaiah23:1 Ndaa koŋngol dow Tirus: “Mboye
Isaiah23:2 Njeeɗe daliila kulol
Isaiah23:3 ɓe ngaddi ƴaamle gese diga maayo Sihor e maayo Niil
Isaiah23:4 Semtu
Isaiah23:5 To habaru do'ere Tirus yottake Misra
Isaiah23:6 Njehe haa Tarsis. Mboye
Isaiah23:7 Na ɗum berniwol mon ceyiiŋgol? Ngol fuɗɗi diga zamanuuji ɓooymaaji! Ngol neli yimɓe jooɗoyaago haa lesɗe daayiiɗe!
Isaiah23:8 Moy nufani ɗum Tirus
Isaiah23:9 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama nufi ɗum haa o wila ngol daliila mawnitaare marɓe daraja fuu
Isaiah23:10 Ndeme lesdi mon
Isaiah23:11 Jawmiraawo forti juŋngo muuɗum dow mbeela. O dimmbini laamuuji. O umri gibbinki berniiji Kanaana cemmbiɗɗi.
Isaiah23:12 O wi'i: “A meetataa welweltugo
Isaiah23:13 Ndaare Kaldiya'en! Lenyol maɓɓe woodaa. Assuura'en acci lesdi man haa dabbaaji ladde. Ɓe ndarni cuuɗi towɗi ngam hippugo
Isaiah23:14 Mboye
Isaiah23:15 Saa'i man yimɓe ngejjitan Tirus duuɓi cappanɗe joweeɗiɗi
Isaiah23:16 “Hoo'u moolooru
Isaiah23:17 To duuɓi cappanɗe joweeɗiɗi timmi
Isaiah23:18 Ammaa bote e ngeenaari daakaareeku maagol laatanto Jawmiraawo. Ɗum mooɓtataake
Isaiah24:1 Ndaa
Isaiah24:2 Kiita ngoota laatanto ummaatoore e limanjo
Isaiah24:3 Lesdi ferwan
Isaiah24:4 Lesdi ɗon nder suno
Isaiah24:5 Lesdi soɓi les jooɗiiɓe muuɗum
Isaiah24:6 Ngam maajum naaloore ɗon nyaama lesdi
Isaiah24:7 Inaboojam ɗon jinna
Isaiah24:8 Hoolo seyo bawɗi acci naneego
Isaiah24:9 Ɓe acci yarugo inaboojam bee gimi
Isaiah24:10 Berniwol perewŋgol yibbi
Isaiah24:11 Gookaali ɗon nder laabi ngam inaboojam woodaa. Seyo fuu majji
Isaiah24:12 Walaa ko lutti nder berniwol
Isaiah24:13 Bana non ɗum laatoto caka duniyaaru
Isaiah24:14 Ammaa luttanɓe kooldan
Isaiah24:15 “Teddine Jawmiraawo haa fuunaaŋge! Dow duule mbeela teddine innde Jawmiraawo Allah mo Isra'iila!”
Isaiah24:16 Haa keeri duniyaaru en nanan gimi dow Tedduŋgal Adiliijo. Ammaa min kam mi ɗon wi'a hoore am mi kalkuɗo. Bone laatanake yam! Zammbooɓe ɗon zammbo! Zammba maɓɓe ɗon ɓesdo!
Isaiah24:17 Kultoreeŋgol e tuuforgol e ngaska ɗon ndeena on
Isaiah24:18 Dogguɗo hoolo kultoreeŋgol do'oto nder ngaska
Isaiah24:19 Lesdi ɗon seeka
Isaiah24:20 Lesdi ɗon liilta bana guykuɗo
Isaiah24:21 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo hiitoto mooɓre konu asama haa asama e laamiiɓe duniyaaru boo dow lesdi.
Isaiah24:22 O mooɓtan ɓe fuu
Isaiah24:23 Lewru toskan
Isaiah25:1 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Isaiah25:2 A laatini berniwol waagaare kaa'e
Isaiah25:3 Ngam man ummaatoore semmbiɗnde teddinte. Berniiji ummaatooje toonyooje kulete.
Isaiah25:4 A laati aynirde laafuɓe e talaka'en nder ɓillaare maɓɓe
Isaiah25:5 bana nguleeŋga dow lesdi njoorndi. Ammaa an a naŋgti fitina jananɓe
Isaiah25:6 Dow hooseere Siyona nde'e Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama taaskanto ummaatooje fuu nyaamduuji belɗi
Isaiah25:7 Dow hooseere nde'e o ittan cuddirɗum ɗum jama'aaje cuddata fuu e wiirndallo wiirnanŋgo ummaatooje.
Isaiah25:8 O nattinan maayde haa abada. Allah Jawmiraawo woostan gonɗi haa geese fuu
Isaiah25:9 Nyalaade man yimɓe fuu mbi'an: “Kaŋko woni Allah meeɗen! Kaŋko kooliiɗen
Isaiah25:10 Juŋngo Jawmiraawo ɗon ayna hooseere nde'e. Ammaa o yaaɓan yimɓe Mo'ab haa nokkuure maɓɓe
Isaiah25:11 Ɓe mbeeɗan juuɗe maɓɓe nder maajam
Isaiah25:12 Mahi maɓɓe towɗi cemmbiɗɗi

Isaiah26:3 Mo ɓernde mum tabiti
Isaiah26:4 Koole Jawmiraawo haa foroy
Isaiah26:5 O leesni jooɗiiɓe dow towndiije
Isaiah26:6 Kosɗe talaka'en e laafuɓe ɗon njaaɓa ngol jonta.
Isaiah26:7 Laawol adili'en
Isaiah26:8 Yaa Jawmiraawo

Isaiah27:1 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo losan kaafahi muuɗum caatuki
Isaiah27:2 Nyalaade man
Isaiah27:3 “Min Jawmiraawo mi ɗon ayna ka
Isaiah27:4 Mi acci tikkango ka. To mi tawi gi'e e giŋngille
Isaiah27:5 Ammaa to goɗɗo yiɗi mi ayna ɗum
Isaiah27:6 Saa'i waran nde yimɓe Isra'iila
Isaiah27:7 Allah fiyaay ɓe naawɗum bana o fiyiri fiyooɓe ɓe. O mbaraay ɓe bana o mbardiri mbarooɓe ɓe.
Isaiah27:8 Jawmiraawo riiwi ɓe
Isaiah27:9 Ndaa nii yaafuye hakkeeji danygol Yaakubu heɓrete e ndaa nafuuda maare boo: Ɓe naman kaa'e kirsirɗe fuu bana ɓe namirta kaa'e daneeje
Isaiah27:10 Walaa koo gooto haa berniwol cemmbiɗŋgol. Ngol laati jooɗorde accaande
Isaiah27:11 To lice leɗɗe njoori

Isaiah27:13 Nyalaade man goɗɗo fuufan luwal maŋngal. Majjuɓe haa lesdi Assuura e riiwaaɓe haa lesdi Misra
Isaiah28:1 Kayto laamorde Efrayim! A laatake meetaleewol pawnaaŋgol gonŋgol dow waadiwol cemmbiɗŋgol. Wuykooɓe lesdi ma ɗon mantoro ma. Ammaa a nanndi bee pinndi ɗaylundi ngonndi dow ko'e wuykuɓe ɓe njaram do'i.
Isaiah28:2 Jawmiraawo woodi goɗɗo cemmbiɗɗo
Isaiah28:3 Ɓe njaaɓan berniwol nannduŋgol bee meetaleewol
Isaiah28:4 Ɓe njaaɓan boo pinndi ɗaylundi pawnandi berniwol Samariya gonŋgol dow waadiwol cemmbiɗŋgol. Samariya laatoto bana ibbe aartuɗe ɓenndugo: To goɗɗo yi'i ɗe
Isaiah28:5 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama laatanto yimɓe ummaatoore mum luttuɓe bana meetaleewol pawnaaŋgol
Isaiah28:6 o hokkan jooɗiiɗo dow leeso kiita ruuhu gooŋga
Isaiah28:7 Ammaa koo liman'en e annabi'en boo ɗon cakli daliila inaboojam
Isaiah28:8 Taabe haa ɓe njari fuu keewi tuure e tuundi haa babal luttaay.
Isaiah28:9 Ɓe ɗon mbolwa dow Jawmiraawo: “Moy o yiɗi ekkitingo faamu? Moy o yiɗi faamtingo habaru? Haa ɓikkoy entaakoy jonta na?
Isaiah28:10 Woodi dooka dow dooka
Isaiah28:11 Nonnon nii! Bee kunnduɗe ɗe ɓe paamataa
Isaiah28:12 kaŋko wi'no ɓe: “Ndaa siwtaare
Isaiah28:13 Wolde Jawmiraawo laatanto ɓe dooka dow dooka
Isaiah28:14 Ngam maajum
Isaiah28:15 On mbi'i: “Min kaɓɓi alkawal bee waade
Isaiah28:16 Ngam maajum Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ndaa
Isaiah28:17 Kiita ngooŋɗuka laatanto yam bana ɓoggol mahoowo e gooŋgaaku boo bana njamndi mahoowo poondirndi. Mallimallooje kalkan hisrude fewre
Isaiah28:18 Alkawal mooɗon bee waade fiistete! Kaɓɓotiral mooɗon bee joonde maayɓe tabitittaa. To masiibo nattinoowo ɗon saalo
Isaiah28:19 Nde o saaloto fuu
Isaiah28:20 Ɗum laatanto on bana nder balndol: Leeso rammi ngam naaɗaago
Isaiah28:21 Jawmiraawo ummoto bana haa hooseere Perasiima
Isaiah28:22 Ngam maajum taa njale dow bolle am
Isaiah28:23 Nane ko mbi'anmi
Isaiah28:24 Naa demoowo giɗɗo aawugo ɗon rema tum tum na? O ɗon rema
Isaiah28:25 Na to o wo'ini pellel man
Isaiah28:26 Bana nii Allah maako ekkitini mo laawol man
Isaiah28:27 O sorɓataa haako anisa bee corɓirɗum tedduɗum
Isaiah28:28 Haa goɗɗo tamsa tamseere
Isaiah28:29 Kanjum boo ɗum iwi haa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Isaiah29:1 Kayto Ariyel! berniwol Urusaliima
Isaiah29:2 Nden kam min Allah mi wilan Ariyel. Uumaali e gookaali mbaɗan
Isaiah29:3 Mi taarnete bee saŋngeere
Isaiah29:4 A leestan
Isaiah29:5 Ammaa mooɓre konne'en ma laatoto bana kuroori ɗiggundi
Isaiah29:6 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama jinjete bee riggaaŋgo e dimmbaaki lesdi e hoolo maŋngo
Isaiah29:7 Mooɓre jama'aaje ummaatooje hippiiɓe ma
Isaiah29:8 Bana to dolɗo hoyɗi o ɗon nyaama
Isaiah29:9 Kayɗine! Maɓɓe gite mon haa on mbuma fakat! Ɓe nguyki
Isaiah29:10 Ngam Jawmiraawo waanji ruuhu ɗoyŋgol tedduŋgol dow mooɗon. O maɓɓi gite mon
Isaiah29:11 Wahayu fuu suuɗani on bana bolle deftere maɓɓaande kab nde ɓe ndokki goɗɗo annduɗo jaŋngugo bee wi'ugo mo: “Jaŋngu ɗu'um ɗo
Isaiah29:12 Malla ɓe ndokki nde goɗɗo mo anndaa jaŋngugo bee wi'ugo mo: “Jaŋngu ɗu'um ɗo”
Isaiah29:13 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e ɗon ɓadito yam bee hunnduko tan
Isaiah29:14 Ngam man mi tokkoto hayɗingo yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e bee waɗango ɓe kuuje kayɗiniiɗe ɗuuɗɗe. Nden kam hikma hikma'en maɓɓe halkan
Isaiah29:15 Bone laatanto nyukkotooɓe yeeso Jawmiraawo ngam suuɗugo nufayeeje muuɗum'en
Isaiah29:16 Kayya
Isaiah29:17 Lutti seɗɗa
Isaiah29:18 Nyalaade maajum

Isaiah29:20 Ngam toonyooɓe e jancooɓe majjan
Isaiah29:21 non boo aybinanɓe woɗɓe yeeso kiita e tuufnananɓe kiitoowo tuuforli e sottinanɓe gooŋga gooŋga'en.

Isaiah29:24 Ellitiiɓe keɓan hakkiilo

Isaiah30:2 Ɓe ɗon njippo haa Misra bilaa ƴamugo muuyo am. Ɓe ɗon ndogga haa aynol Firawna
Isaiah30:3 Ammaa aynol Firawna laatanto ɓe mbustu
Isaiah30:4 Ardiiɓe maɓɓe njehi haa Co'an

Isaiah30:7 Ngam ballal Misra nafataa
Isaiah30:8 “War jonta
Isaiah30:9 Ngam ɓe yimɓe tuurtooɓe
Isaiah30:10 Ɓe ɗon mbi'a yi'ooɓe: Taa ngi'e! Annabi'en boo: Taa anndine wahayuuji gooŋgaaji! Ammaa mbi'e min bolle belɗe
Isaiah30:11 Ngaylite
Isaiah30:12 Ngam maajum
Isaiah30:13 aybewol ngo'ol laatanto on bana ceekgol nder mahol towŋgol
Isaiah30:14 Ɓe campitan ngol bana ɓe campititta fayannde loope. To nde fusi boo
Isaiah30:15 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo
Isaiah30:16 On mbi'i: Naa non! Ammaa min ndoggan bee pucci. Nonnon nii
Isaiah30:17 Ujineere ndoggan to gooto furkiti ɓe. To konne'en njowo purkitake on
Isaiah30:18 Ammaa Jawmiraawo ɗon reena wakkatiire nde o mo'anta on. O ummoto haa o hinno on. Ngam Jawmiraawo woni Allah baɗanɗo kiita ngooŋɗuka
Isaiah30:19 Onon yimɓe Siyona
Isaiah30:20 Jawmiraawo hokki on tamseere nder ɓillaare mon e ndiyam nder torra mon. Ekkitinoowo mon wiccitittaako fahin
Isaiah30:21 To on ɗon njaha gal nyaamo malla gal nano
Isaiah30:22 Labbi mon cuddaaɗi bee cardi
Isaiah30:23 Nden kam Jawmiraawo toɓnan iyeende dow aawdi mon ndi aawɗon nder lesdi. Lesdi fuɗnan nyaamdu welndu
Isaiah30:24 Ga'i e bamɗe ɗum ndemrirton ngesa
Isaiah30:25 Nyannde nde konne'en mon maaydi
Isaiah30:26 Jayŋgol lewru laatoto bana ngol naaŋge
Isaiah30:27 Ndaa
Isaiah30:28 Poofɗe maako nanndi bee maayo teelanŋgo yottotooŋgo daande goɗɗo
Isaiah30:29 Ammaa onon on ngiman bana nder jemmaare juulde seniinde. Ɓerɗe mooɗon ceyoto bana yahanɓe bee gime ciide haa hooseere Jawmiraawo mo tapaare hisnoore Isra'iila.
Isaiah30:30 Jawmiraawo nannan sawtu mum cemmbiɗɗo
Isaiah30:31 Assuura'en kultoran ngam sawtu Jawmiraawo
Isaiah30:32 Koo ndeye sawru kiita fiyata ɓe fuu
Isaiah30:33 Duuri

Isaiah31:3 Ngam Misra'en ɓe yimɓe

Isaiah31:6 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Onon yimɓe Isra'iila

Isaiah31:8 Assuura'en kalkan bee kaafahi ki laatanaaki neɗɗo. Kaafahi ki laatanaaki neɗɗo nyaaman ɓe. Ɓe ndoggan ngam daɗugo kaafahi
Isaiah31:9 Paddoowo ɓe doggan ngam kulol

Isaiah33:1 Bone laatante
Isaiah33:2 Yaa Jawmiraawo

Isaiah33:6 An Siyona
Isaiah33:7 Nane
Isaiah33:8 Buuwi perwi
Isaiah33:9 Lesdi ɗon nder suno
Isaiah33:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i ummaatooje: “Jonta mi ummoto! Jonta mi daroto! Jonta maŋngu am waŋgan!
Isaiah33:11 Onon reedu'en bee huɗo yoorko
Isaiah33:12 Ummaatooje laatoto ndoondi ɓolinirɗe e gi'e pe'aaɗe gulanɗe nder yiite.
Isaiah33:13 Nane ko mbaɗanmi
Isaiah33:14 Marɓe hakke nder Siyona ɗon kultora
Isaiah33:15 Mo ɗon yeeɗa nder adilaaku e ɗon wolwa gooŋga
Isaiah33:16 irin goɗɗo oo jooɗoto haa nokkuuje towɗe
Isaiah33:17 Gite ma ngi'an laamiiɗo nder tedduŋgal muuɗum fuu. A laaran lesdi peeciindi.
Isaiah33:18 Ɓernde ma siftoran kultoreeŋgol naane: Toy binndoowo? Toy jaɓoowo jomorgol? Toy linyoowo cuuɗi towɗi?
Isaiah33:19 A meetataa yi'ugo ummaatoore elewnde
Isaiah33:20 Laar Siyona
Isaiah33:21 Jawmiraawo mawɗo wondan bee meeɗen ton! Ngol laatoto nokkuure ɓulannde ilaali jaasɗi e maaje. Koommbooje marɗe laanyirɗe tokkataako ton
Isaiah33:22 Ɓoggi maagal tirti
Isaiah33:23

Isaiah34:1 Ɓadite
Isaiah34:2 Ngam Jawmiraawo ɗon tikkana yimɓe ummaatooje e mooɓe konu maaje fuu. O do'ani ɓe kiita nattineego
Isaiah34:3 Ɓe ngudinan mbaraaɓe maɓɓe
Isaiah34:4 Jayli asamanji campititto. Asamanji taggoto bana deftere taggaande
Isaiah34:5 Kaafahi Jawmiraawo ɗon ɓakkori bee ƴiiƴam haa asama. Ki ukkanto Edoom
Isaiah34:6 Ƴiiƴam ɗon simta diga kaafahi Jawmiraawo
Isaiah34:7 Yimɓe ndo'odotto bee bani e nga'oy e ga'i kalhali. Ƴiiƴam suddan lesdi maɓɓe
Isaiah34:8 Ngam ɗum laatani Jawmiraawo nyalaade waataago
Isaiah34:9 Maaje Edoom laatoto demmbere ɓaleere
Isaiah34:10 Jemma e naaŋge yiite maari nyifataako
Isaiah34:11 Duujiire e camnagel maran ndi
Isaiah34:12 Mawɓe maari ngonataa ton ngam laamingo laamiiɗo. Laamiiɓe maɓɓe fuu ngoodaa.
Isaiah34:13 Gi'e mawnan nder laamorɗe maari
Isaiah34:14 Kuuje ladde e pobbi pottotiran ton
Isaiah34:15 Foosokre boo waɗan waalorde ton
Isaiah34:16 Mbiɗite deftere Jawmiraawo
Isaiah34:17 O waɗani ɗe kur'u
Isaiah35:1 Harde e lesdi njoorndi ceyoto
Isaiah35:2 Nde heewan pinndi
Isaiah35:3 Cemmbiɗine juuɗe comɗe e koppi tampuɗi!
Isaiah35:4 Mbi'e ta'a-ɓerɗe'en: “Cemmbiɗe
Isaiah35:5 Nden wumɓe ngi'an
Isaiah35:6 Boosɗo diwan bana lelwa
Isaiah35:7 Njaareendi ngulndi laatoto coofol
Isaiah35:8 Buuwol bi'eteeŋgol Laawol-Ceniiŋgol wonan ton. Coɓɗo yahataa dow maagol
Isaiah35:9 Walaa mbarooga ton
Isaiah35:10 Rimɗinaaɓe Jawmiraawo ngartan
Isaiah36:1 Nder nduuɓu laamu Hezekiya sappo e nayaɓu
Isaiah36:2 Laamiiɗo Assuura neli mawɗo yarnooɓe mo bee jama'aare konu mawnde diga Lakis haa Urusaliima haa laamiiɗo Hezekiya. Mawɗo yarnooɓe go dari haa ildugol weendu ɓaŋgiindu
Isaiah36:3 Eliyakim ɓii Hilkiyya
Isaiah36:4 Mawɗo yarnooɓe man wi'i ɓe: “Mbi'e Hezekiya: Laamiiɗo mawɗo
Isaiah36:5 A tammi bolle meere ɗum sawari e baawɗe ngam konu na? Kadi
Isaiah36:6 Ndaa
Isaiah36:7 Ammaa to a wi'i yam: Min ɗon kooli Allah Jawmiraawo amin
Isaiah36:8 Kadi
Isaiah36:9 Noy a lornirta koo ngomnaajo ɓuranɗo leesugo caka maccuɓe jaagorɗo am? Ammaa a ɗon hoolo Misra ngam daliila mootaaji pucci e wa'otooɓe ɗi.
Isaiah36:10 Kadi
Isaiah36:11 Nden Eliyakim e Sebna e Yo'ak mbi'i mo: “Useni wolwan min Aramiyaare
Isaiah36:12 Mawɗo yarnooɓe go wi'i: “On tammi jaagorɗo am neli yam haa jaagorɗo mooɗon e haa mooɗon tan na? Naa ɗum laarani boo jooɗiiɓe dow mahol ɓe'e na? Kamɓe boo naa ɓe nyaaman bu'e maɓɓe
Isaiah36:13 Nden o dari
Isaiah36:14 Ndaa nii o wi'i: Taa Hezekiya sakla on
Isaiah36:15 Taa Hezekiya de'itina on bee Jawmiraawo
Isaiah36:16 Taa nanane Hezekiya
Isaiah36:17 haa mi wara
Isaiah36:18 Taa Hezekiya esta on bee wi'go: Jawmiraawo hisnan en. Kadi ɗowanteeɓe ummaatooje goɗɗe meeɗi hisnugo lesɗe muuɗum'en diga juŋngo laamiiɗo Assuura na?
Isaiah36:19 Toy ɗowanteeɓe Hamat e Arpad? Toy ɗowanteeɓe Sefarwayim? Ɓe kisni Samariya diga juŋngo am na?
Isaiah36:20 Ɓeye caka ɗowanteeɓe lesɗe ɗe'e fuu kisni lesɗe muuɗum'en e juŋngo am
Isaiah36:21 Ammaa yimɓe njeeɗi
Isaiah36:22 Nden Eliyakim ɓii Hilkiyya
Isaiah37:1 Nde laamiiɗo Hezekiya nani ɗum
Isaiah37:2 O neli Eliyakim
Isaiah37:3 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Ndaa ko Hezekiya wi'i: Nyalaade nde'e ɗum nyalaade ɓillaare e feloore e toskaare ngam amin
Isaiah37:4 Teema Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa nanan bolle mawɗo yarnooɓe
Isaiah37:5 Jaggiiɓe laamiiɗo Hezekiya ngari haa Esaaya
Isaiah37:6 Esaaya wi'i ɓe: “Nii mbi'oton jaagorɗo mooɗon: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Taa hul bolle kalluɗe ɗe nanɗa
Isaiah37:7 Ndaa
Isaiah37:8 Mawɗo yarnooɓe go lori
Isaiah37:9 Laamiiɗo nani habaru Tirhaka
Isaiah37:10 Ndaa nii mbi'oton Hezekiya laamiiɗo Yahuuda: “Taa Allah maaɗa mo koolotoɗa sakle
Isaiah37:11 Ndaa
Isaiah37:12 Nde kaakiraaɓe am nattini Goojan e Haran e Resef e ɓiɓɓe Eden wonɓe haa Telassar
Isaiah37:13 Toy laamiiɗo Hamat e laamiiɗo Arpad e laamiiɗo berniwol Sefarwayim e Hena e Iwwa?”
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiya jaɓi bataakewol ngol nelaaɓe ngaddi
Isaiah37:15 Nden o tori Jawmiraawo
Isaiah37:16 “Yaa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Isaiah37:17 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Isaiah37:18 Gooŋga
Isaiah37:19 Ɓe cakkini ɗowanteeɓe maaje nder yiite – gooŋga kam naa ɓe ɗowanteeɓe – ngam ɗum yimɓe mbaɗi ɗum bee leɗɗe e kaa'e. Ɓe mbirgi ɗum.
Isaiah37:20 Ammaa jonta
Isaiah37:21 Esaaya ɓii Amoosa neli haa Hezekiya
Isaiah37:22 Ndaa koŋngol ngol Jawmiraawo wi'i dow maako: Berniwol Urusaliima nannduŋgol bee paanyo debbo ɗon yawe
Isaiah37:23 Moy njancuɗa? Moy mbolwanɗa kalluka
Isaiah37:24 Bee kunnduɗe jaggiiɓe ma njancuɗa Jawmiraawo
Isaiah37:25 Mi wasi
Isaiah37:26 A nanaay no duuri mi taaskitini ɗum na? Mi nufi ɗum diga wakkati ɓooyma. Jonta timminmi ɗum
Isaiah37:27 Jooɗiiɓe ton ngalaa baawɗe
Isaiah37:28 Mi anndi yaake njooɗotooɗa
Isaiah37:29 A tikkani yam
Isaiah37:30 Nden Esaaya wi'i laamiiɗo Hezekiya: “Ndaa ko laatanto ma alaama: Hikka on nyaaman gabbe gariije
Isaiah37:31 Daɗɓe nder yimɓe lenyol Yahuuda
Isaiah37:32 Ngam daɗɓe
Isaiah37:33 Ngam maajum
Isaiah37:34 O loroto dow laawol ngol o wardi
Isaiah37:35 Min mi aynan berniwol ngo'ol haa mi hisna ngol
Isaiah37:36 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo yehi
Isaiah37:37 Sanherib
Isaiah37:38 Nyannde go'o
Isaiah38:1 Nder wakkati man Hezekiya nyawi haa o ɓadake maayugo. Annabi Esaaya ɓii Amoosa wari laarugo mo
Isaiah38:2 Nden Hezekiya wayliti gal mahol. O tori Jawmiraawo
Isaiah38:3 o wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Isaiah38:4 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani Esaaya
Isaiah38:5 “Yah
Isaiah38:6 Mi hisnete
Isaiah38:7 Kanjum laatante alaama diga Jawmiraawo
Isaiah38:8 Ndaa
Isaiah38:9 Ɓaawo Hezekiya
Isaiah38:10 “Mi numi: Haa reeta balɗe am ngonmi
Isaiah38:11 Mi numi mi meetataa yi'ugo Jawmiraawo nder lesdi yeeɗɓe. Mi meetataa laarugo yimɓe caka jooɗiiɓe nder duniyaaru.
Isaiah38:12 Jooɗorde am ittaama
Isaiah38:13 Jemma fuu mi wooki
Isaiah38:14 Mi siiki bana collel zawleeru
Isaiah38:15 Ɗume mi wi'ata mo? Ngam o jaabi yam
Isaiah38:16 Jawmiraawo ɗon wondi bee yimɓe muuɗum. Ɓe ngeeɗan e ruuhu maako yeeɗinan ko ɗon nder maɓɓe fuu. A nyawndatam
Isaiah38:17 Ndaa
Isaiah38:18 Ngam joonde maayɓe yettataa ma
Isaiah38:19 Ammaa geeto yettete
Isaiah38:20 Jawmiraawo hisni yam! Sey en ngimana mo bee moolooji ngeendam men fuu nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.”
Isaiah38:21 Esaaya wi'i ɓe koo'a tamre ibbe joorɗe
Isaiah38:22 Ammaa Hezekiya ƴami: “Alaama kaye gooŋɗinta mi heɓan yahugo haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo?”
Isaiah39:1 Saa'i maajum Merodak-Baladan ɓii Baladan
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya seyori ɗum. O holli nelaaɓe sigordu ndesaaje maako
Isaiah39:3 Nden annabi Esaaya wari haa laamiiɗo Hezekiya
Isaiah39:4 O ƴami: “Ɗume ɓe ngi'i nder saare ma?” Hezekiya jaabi: “Ɓe ngi'i koo ɗume ko woni nder saare am fuu. Walaa ko mi suuɗani ɓe nder ndesaaje am.”
Isaiah39:5 Esaaya wi'i Hezekiya: “Nan koŋngol Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama:
Isaiah39:6 Ndaa
Isaiah39:7 Ɓe koo'an woɗɓe nder danygol maaɗa
Isaiah39:8 Hezekiya wi'i Esaaya: “Koŋngol Jawmiraawo ngol mbolwuɗa
Isaiah40:1 “Nde'itine ummaatoore am
Isaiah40:2 “Mbelne ɓerɗe yimɓe Urusaliima. Anndine ɓe
Isaiah40:3 Goɗɗo ɗon hoola nder ladde: “Mo'inane Jawmiraawo laawol
Isaiah40:4 Waadiwol fuu towta
Isaiah40:5 Tedduŋgal Jawmiraawo waŋgan
Isaiah40:6 Goɗɗo wi'i: “Wooynu!” Mi ƴami: “Ɗume mi wooynata?” – “Wooynu: Yimɓe fuu nanndi bee fuɗŋgooji
Isaiah40:7 Fuɗŋgooji njooran
Isaiah40:8 Fuɗŋgooji njooran
Isaiah40:9 Wa'a dow hooseere townde
Isaiah40:10 Ndaa
Isaiah40:11 O duran tokkere maako bana gaynaako. O mooɓtan e o hoo'an mbaaloy dow juuɗe maako
Isaiah40:12 Moy foondi ndiyamji nder newre mum? Moy heerori asamanji bee hapakaare? Moy foondi mbulwuldi duniyaaru fuu bee etirgal? Moy foondi kooseeje dow awnorɗum e towndiije bee taasaaje?
Isaiah40:13 Moy foondi Ruuhu Jawmiraawo
Isaiah40:14 Bee moy o waadi sawari haa o heɓa anndal? Moy ekkitini mo kiita ngooŋɗuka? Moy faamtini mo hikma? Moy anndini mo laawol faamu?
Isaiah40:15 Ndaa
Isaiah40:16 Laynde Libanon he'ataa huɓɓugo yiite ngam maako
Isaiah40:17 Ummaatooje fuu laati meere yeeso maako
Isaiah40:18 Bee moy nanndinton Allah? Bee suura kaye nanndinton mo?
Isaiah40:19 Ɓolinoowo ɓolinan lawru
Isaiah40:20 Talakaajo mo waawataa hokkugo irin dokkal nga'al
Isaiah40:21 On anndaa ɗum na? On nanaay ɗum na? Ɓe ngeccaay on ɗum diga fuɗɗam na? On paamaay ɗum diga caɓɓuki duniyaaru na?
Isaiah40:22 Kaŋko o ɗon jooɗi haa dow taarde duniyaaru
Isaiah40:23 O ɗon laatina laamiiɓe huunde meere
Isaiah40:24 Neeɓaay ɓe njube
Isaiah40:25 Kadi
Isaiah40:26 Tijje dow
Isaiah40:27 Onon yimɓe Isra'iila
Isaiah40:28 On anndaa ɗum na? On nanaay ɗum na? Jawmiraawo
Isaiah40:29 O ɗon hokka comɗo semmbe
Isaiah40:30 Derke'en coman
Isaiah40:31 Ammaa hoolotooɓe Jawmiraawo
Isaiah41:1 “Onon duuɗe
Isaiah41:2 Moy ummini jaalotooɗo haa fuunaaŋge
Isaiah41:3 O ɗon taasna ɗe
Isaiah41:4 Moy waɗi ɗum? Moy waɗi ɗum
Isaiah41:5 Duuɗe ngi'i ɗum
Isaiah41:6 Yimɓe ɗon mballotira
Isaiah41:7 Baɗoowo sanaa'a ɗon semmbiɗina ɓolinoowo
Isaiah41:8 Ammaa an
Isaiah41:9 mi jogi ma diga keeri duniyaaru
Isaiah41:10 Taa hul
Isaiah41:11 Ndaa
Isaiah41:12 A ɗaɓɓitan wanyɓe ma
Isaiah41:13 Ngam min Jawmiraawo Allah maaɗa mi ɗon jogo nyaamo ma
Isaiah41:14 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Taa hul
Isaiah41:15 Ndaa
Isaiah41:16 A jaartan ɗe
Isaiah41:17 Laafuɓe e yurumɓe ɗon ɗaɓɓita ndiyam
Isaiah41:18 Mi ɓulnan maaje dow towndiije cooke
Isaiah41:19 Nder harde njo'inanmi leɗɗe cemmbiɗɗe e leɗɗe gaware e asuraaje e jaytunje. Nder ladde njubotoomi leɗɗe booɗɗe e irin leɗɗe booɗɗe mawɗe e pamare
Isaiah41:20 ngam haa ɓe ngi'a ɓe annda
Isaiah41:21 Jawmiraawo
Isaiah41:22 Mbaŋgine ɗi
Isaiah41:23 Mbi'e min ko warata ɓaawoɗon
Isaiah41:24 Ndaa
Isaiah41:25 Mi ummini goɗɗo woyla
Isaiah41:26 Moy caka mooɗon anndini ɗum diga fuɗɗam
Isaiah41:27 Aartuɗo yottaago haa Siyona wi'i: Ndaa
Isaiah41:28 Mi ɗon laara ɗowanteeɓe ɓe'e
Isaiah41:29 Ndaa
Isaiah42:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ndaa suka am
Isaiah42:2 O wookataa
Isaiah42:3 O yewataa kewal nyobbaaŋgal. O nyifataa pittirlayel cuuraaŋgel. Fakat o tabitinan kiita ngooŋɗuka.
Isaiah42:4 Kaŋko o tampataa
Isaiah42:5 Allah Jawmiraawo mo tagi asamanji
Isaiah42:6 “Min Jawmiraawo mi ewnori ma ngam adilaaku. Mi naŋngan juŋngo ma
Isaiah42:7 haa mbumtina wumɓe
Isaiah42:8 Min woni Jawmiraawo
Isaiah42:9 Kuuje aartanɗe laatake. Jonta kuuje kese anndinanmi. Hiddeko ɗe puɗɗa
Isaiah42:10 Ngimane Jawmiraawo yimre hesre
Isaiah42:11 Sey ladde hamaadaare bee gure gonɗe nder maare towna sawtu
Isaiah42:12 Sey ɓe teddina Jawmiraawo
Isaiah42:13 Jawmiraawo ɗon wurto bana jaaliiɗo
Isaiah42:14 Allah wi'i: “Duuri mi sirwi
Isaiah42:15 Mi ferwinan kooseeje e towndiije
Isaiah42:16 Mi yahran wumɓe dow laawol ngol ɓe anndaa
Isaiah42:17 Hooliiɓe labbi cehaaɗi
Isaiah42:18 “Nane
Isaiah42:19 Moy woni bumɗo
Isaiah42:20 On ngi'i ɗuuɗɗum
Isaiah42:21 Ɗum fottani Jawmiraawo o waŋgina maŋngu tawreeta maako
Isaiah42:22 Ammaa yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e ɓe jaɓtaaɓe
Isaiah42:23 Moy caka mooɗon nanata kuuje ɗe'e? Moy heɗititto
Isaiah42:24 Moy hokki Isra'iila
Isaiah42:25 Ngam maajum o rufi tikkere maako saatunde e o ukki konu caatuŋgu dow maɓɓe. Ɗum ukki dow maɓɓe koo toy fuu bana yiite
Isaiah43:1 Ammaa jonta
Isaiah43:2 To a ɗon ta'a caka ndiyam lugguɗam
Isaiah43:3 Ngam min woni Jawmiraawo Allah maaɗa
Isaiah43:4 A ɗon bee saman haa gite am
Isaiah43:5 Taa hul
Isaiah43:6 Mi wi'an woyla: Yooftu ɓe! Mi wi'an fombina boo: Taa jogita ɓe! Acce ɓiɓɓe am worɓe e rewɓe ngara diga daayiiɗum
Isaiah43:7 Ɓe ewnaaɓe bee innde am
Isaiah43:8 Ngurtine ummaatoore nde'e: Nde woodi gite
Isaiah43:9 Ummaatooje fuu mooɓotira
Isaiah43:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Onon yimɓe Isra'iila on seedanooɓe yam
Isaiah43:11 Min woni Jawmiraawo
Isaiah43:12 Mi anndini
Isaiah43:13 Koo yeeso ɗo
Isaiah43:14 Jawmiraawo coottoowo on
Isaiah43:15 Min woni Jawmiraawo
Isaiah43:16 Jawmiraawo seeki laawol dow mbeela
Isaiah43:17 yahri jama'aare konu semmbiɗnde bee mootaaji e pucci haa konu. Yimɓe maare ndo'ake
Isaiah43:18 Taa ciftore haala ɓooyma
Isaiah43:19 Ndaa
Isaiah43:20 Dabbaaji ladde teddintam
Isaiah43:21 Ummaatoore nde mbaɗmi ɗum ngam hoore am anndinan maŋgtoore am.
Isaiah43:22 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “On ewnaaki innde am nder do'a
Isaiah43:23 On ngaddanaay yam baali mon guleteeɗi. On teddinaay yam bee kirseteeɗi mon. Mi doolaay on waddango yam dokke nyaamdu
Isaiah43:24 On majjinaay ceede ngam soodanango yam ƴommbe belɗe. On kaarnaay yam bee ɓellere kirseteeɗi mon. Ammaa on macciɗini yam bee hakkeeji mon
Isaiah43:25 Min mi ittan zunuubaaji mon ngam daliila innde am
Isaiah43:26 Siftinoram ko a feliri yam
Isaiah43:27 Kaaka mon aartuɗo waɗi hakke
Isaiah43:28 Ngam maajum coɓnumi ardiiɓe suudu seniindu
Isaiah44:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Jonta nan kadi
Isaiah44:2 Min Jawmiraawo mi waɗi ma
Isaiah44:3 Ngam mi rufan ndiyam dow lesdi marndi haaje ndiyam e maaje dow lesdi njoorndi. Mi waanjan Ruuhu am dow ɓiɓɓe mon e barka am boo dow danygol mon.
Isaiah44:4 Ɓe puɗan caka huɗo
Isaiah44:5 Oo wi'an: Min mo Jawmiraawo. Oya ewnoto hoore mum bee innde Yaakubu. Goɗɗo winndan dow juŋngo mum: Min mo Jawmiraawo. Goɗɗo feere boo inndan hoore mum Isra'iila.”
Isaiah44:6 Jawmiraawo Laamiiɗo e coottoowo Isra'iila
Isaiah44:7 Moy nanndi bee am? Sey o wara
Isaiah44:8 Taa kultore
Isaiah44:9 Waɗooɓe labbi fuu ɓe huunde meere. Kuuɗe maɓɓe ɓurɗe wooɗugo nafataa sam. Ɗe laati seedooɓe maaji
Isaiah44:10 Ɗum faataare ngam mo waɗanta hoore mum ɗowanteeɗo malla ɓolinta suura lawru ka nafataa sam?
Isaiah44:11 Ndaa
Isaiah44:12 Kilaajo ɗon waɗa fe'irde
Isaiah44:13 Cehoowo foondan leggal
Isaiah44:14 O fe'a leɗɗe cemmbiɗɗe malla o hoo'a lekki makki e irin maaki
Isaiah44:15 Ɗum laatanto goɗɗo kuɓɓirɗum. O hoo'an goɗɗum maaje
Isaiah44:16 Reeta maaje o wulan ɗe. Bee reeta man o nyaanciran kusel
Isaiah44:17 Ammaa bee luttuɗum o waɗan ɗowanteeɗo
Isaiah44:18 Ɓe ngalaa anndal e faamu. Gite maɓɓe takkaama
Isaiah44:19 Walaa numanɗo koo gooto. Walaa anndal
Isaiah44:20 Ɗum faataare bana nyaamugo ndoondi. Faataare ɓernde maako majjini mo
Isaiah44:21 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Siftor ɗum
Isaiah44:22 Mi riiwan zunuubaaji ma bana cuurɗe
Isaiah44:23 Onon asamanji
Isaiah44:24 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Isaiah44:25 Mi ɗon wirga alaamaaji fewooɓe. Mi ɗon wartira waɗooɓe hatti faataaɓe. Mi ɗon lortina hikma'en ɓaawo
Isaiah44:26 Ammaa mi ɗon tabitina wolde suka am
Isaiah44:27 Mi wi'an ndiyam lugguɗam: Yoor! Mi ɓeeɓnan maaje maaɗa!
Isaiah44:28 Mi wi'an Koores: A gaynaako am! A hiɓɓinan muuyo am fuu. A umran nyiɓtaago Urusaliima. A umran wallingo caɓɓaaje haykaliiru boo.”
Isaiah45:1 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i Koores laamiiɗo mo o moyti
Isaiah45:2 “Min mi ardoto ma
Isaiah45:3 Mi hokkete ndesaaje sirriije e nyukkiiɗe haa annda min woni Jawmiraawo
Isaiah45:4 Mi ewni ma bee innde ma daliila Yaakubu suka am e daliila ummaatoore Isra'iila nde cuɓmi ɗum. Mi hokki ma soomoore teddunde
Isaiah45:5 Min woni Jawmiraawo
Isaiah45:6 Mi waɗi ɗum haa yimɓe diga fuunaaŋge haa hiirnaaŋge paama
Isaiah45:7 Mi waɗi annoora
Isaiah45:8 Asamanji
Isaiah45:9 Bone laatanto jokkiranɗo bee baɗɗo ɗum
Isaiah45:10 Bone laatanto bi'anɗo baaba mum: Koni ndanyata? Malla daada mum: Koni ɓesnata?
Isaiah45:11 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Isaiah45:12 Min waɗi lesdi
Isaiah45:13 Min ummini Koores nder adilaaku
Isaiah45:14 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Risku Misra e bote filu Etiyopiya e Seba'en juuta-darɗe'en ngaran haa mooɗon
Isaiah45:15 Fakat a Allah cuuɗiiɗo
Isaiah45:16 Sehooɓe labbi fuu cemtan
Isaiah45:17 Ammaa yimɓe Isra'iila keɓan kisndam nduumiiɗam haa Jawmiraawo. Ɓe cemtataa
Isaiah45:18 Jawmiraawo tagi asamanji
Isaiah45:19 Mi wolwaay nder cuuɗiiɗum malla haa nokkuure nyiɓɓunde. Mi wi'aay yimɓe danygol Yaakubu: Ɗaɓɓiteeɗam meere! Ngam min woni Jawmiraawo
Isaiah45:20 Mooɓotire
Isaiah45:21 Ngare
Isaiah45:22 “Kadi ngaylite haa am
Isaiah45:23 Mi ɗon hunoro hoore am
Isaiah45:24 Yimɓe ɓe'e mbi'an: Haa Jawmiraawo tan adilaaku e semmbe ngoni. Ammaa wanyɓe yam fuu ngaran yeeso am
Isaiah45:25 Min Jawmiraawo mi adilinan danygol Isra'iila fuu
Isaiah46:1 “Beel turake
Isaiah46:2 Labbi ɗi'i ngibbi
Isaiah46:3 Naneeɗam
Isaiah46:4 Mi wallan on boo haa yotto ndottaaku mon
Isaiah46:5 Bee ɗume nanndinton yam haa on potna yam bee maako? Bee moy nanndinton yam haa min nanndida?
Isaiah46:6 Yimɓe maɓɓitan boorooji muuɗum'en
Isaiah46:7 Ɓe eftan ndu dow balbe maɓɓe
Isaiah46:8 Ciftore ɗum
Isaiah46:9 Ciftore kuuje aartuɗe
Isaiah46:10 Diga fuɗɗoode
Isaiah46:11 Mi ewnoto dutal haa fuunaaŋge
Isaiah46:12 Naneeɗam
Isaiah46:13 Mi ɗon ɓadina adilaaku am
Isaiah47:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “An Baabila
Isaiah47:2 Hoo'u namarde
Isaiah47:3 Temmbuki ma waŋga
Isaiah47:4 Non coottoowo amin wi'i. Innde maako Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Isaiah47:5 Jooɗa siriw
Isaiah47:6 Mi tikkanino ummaatoore am
Isaiah47:7 A ɗonno wi'a: Mi laamoto haa foroy. A hakkilanaay kuuje ɗe'e
Isaiah47:8 Jonta kam
Isaiah47:9 Ammaa kuuje ɗiɗi ɗe'e: Sooynde gorko e sooynde ɓikkoy ngaran dow ma nder saa'iire woore
Isaiah47:10 A ɗonno hoolo halleende ma. A wi'i: Walaa mo yi'atammi. Hikma ma e anndal ma majjini ma. A wi'i nder ɓernde ma: Sey min
Isaiah47:11 Sarru waran dow ma
Isaiah47:12 “Kadi
Isaiah47:13 A somi ngam sawariiji ɗi keɓɗa fuu. Sey annduɓe haala koode asama
Isaiah47:14 Ndaa
Isaiah47:15 Hiila'en ɓe comnuɗa hoore ma daliila muuɗum'en laatoto bana non. A tiini sarwaago ɓe diga nderkaaku ma. Jonta boo koo moy ɗon tiito yeeso muuɗum
Isaiah48:1 Nane ɗu'um
Isaiah48:2 On ɗon ewno ko'e mon bee innde berniwol ceniiŋgol
Isaiah48:3 Diga ɓooyma mi wooyni
Isaiah48:4 Mi anndi ko'e mon caati bana njamndi
Isaiah48:5 Ngam maajum anndinmi on ɗum diga ɓooyma
Isaiah48:6 On nani ɗum
Isaiah48:7 Jonta ɗe tagaama
Isaiah48:8 On meeɗaay nanugo koo anndugo ɗe. Noppi mon maɓɓitaaki diga ɓooyma. Ngam mi anndi on zammbooɓe
Isaiah48:9 Ngam daliila innde am paasitanmi tikkere am. Ngam daliila maŋgtoore am naŋgtumi hoore am
Isaiah48:10 Ndaa
Isaiah48:11 Ngam daliila hoore am tan mbaɗanmi ɗum. Mi accataa goɗɗo soɓna innde am. Mi hokkataa goɗɗo feere tedduŋgal am.”
Isaiah48:12 “Naneeɗam
Isaiah48:13 Juŋngo am saɓɓi lesdi
Isaiah48:14 Mooɓe
Isaiah48:15 Min
Isaiah48:16 Ɓaditeeɗam
Isaiah48:17 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Isaiah48:18 Kadi
Isaiah48:19 Danygol mon laatotono bana njaareendi
Isaiah48:20 Ngurte Baabila
Isaiah48:21 Ɓe maatataa ɗomka haa ladde haa o ɗowata ɓe. O ilnanan ɓe ndiyam e tapaare. O seekan tapaare
Isaiah48:22 “Walaa salaaman ngam halluɓe sam.” Nii Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Isaiah49:1 Naneeɗam
Isaiah49:2 O waɗi hunnduko am bana kaafahi belki. O suddi yam bee ɗowdi juŋngo maako. O wartiri yam kurol ceeɓŋgol
Isaiah49:3 O wi'i yam: “An Isra'iila
Isaiah49:4 Ammaa mi wi'i: “Mi somni hoore am meere
Isaiah49:5 Jonta Jawmiraawo ɗon wolwa – O waɗi yam diga reedu daada am haa mi laato suka maako
Isaiah49:6 O wi'i: “Laataago suka am ummitinanɗo le'i Yaakubu
Isaiah49:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Isaiah49:8 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Wakkati mo'ere mi jaɓi tornde ma
Isaiah49:9 haa mbi'a haɓɓaaɓe: Ngurte
Isaiah49:10 Ɓe maatataa dolo koo ɗomka fahin. Henndu wulndu e naaŋge naawnataa ɓe
Isaiah49:11 Mi wartiran kooseeje am fuu laawol. Buuwi am towtan dow lesdi.
Isaiah49:12 Ndaa
Isaiah49:13 Koole bee seyo
Isaiah49:14 Ammaa Siyona wi'i: “Jawmiraawo acci yam
Isaiah49:15 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Debbo yejjitan musinanŋgel mum na? O enɗataa ɓii reedu maako na? Koo to daada yejjiti ɓiyum
Isaiah49:16 Ndaa
Isaiah49:17 Ɓiɓɓe ma ɗon ngara bee jaawal
Isaiah49:18 Tijja
Isaiah49:19 Lesdi ma nattinaama
Isaiah49:20 Ɓikkoy maaɗa koy cooynooɗa mbi'ete: Nokkuure nde'e faaɗani min
Isaiah49:21 An boo a wi'an nder ɓernde ma: Moy danyani yam koy? Mi sooyno ɓikkoy
Isaiah49:22 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo Allah wi'i: “Mi ɓaŋgtan juŋngo am heedi ummaatooje
Isaiah49:23 Laamiiɓe laatoto nyaamnooɓe ma
Isaiah49:24 Ɓe njaɓtan konoowo keɓal muuɗum na? Haɓɓaaɓe marɗo baawɗe ndaɗan na?
Isaiah49:25 Jawmiraawo ɗon wi'a: “Nonnon
Isaiah49:26 Mi nyaamnan ɓillooɓe ma kusel ɓalli muuɗum'en. Ɓe nguykiran ƴiiƴam maɓɓe bana bee inaboojam kesam. Nden kam
Isaiah50:1 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Toy ɗereewol ceergal ngol mi seeri daada mooɗon bee maajum? Malla tokkiiɗo yam nyamaande moy coorrumi on haa muuɗum? Ndaa on coorraama ngam daliila zunuubaaji mon. Ngam daliila aybeeji mon daada mooɗon seeraama.
Isaiah50:2 Nde ngarmi
Isaiah50:3 Mi ɓornan asamanji nyiɓre
Isaiah50:4 Allah Jawmiraawo hokki yam ɗemŋgal pukara'en haa mi waawa semmbiɗingo comɗo bee wolde. O findinammi nde weeti fuu
Isaiah50:5 Allah Jawmiraawo maɓɓitani yam nofru
Isaiah50:6 Mi hokki ɓoccuɓe yam ɓaawo am
Isaiah50:7 Ammaa Allah Jawmiraawo walli yam. Ngam maajum mi toskaaki. Ngam maajum mi suusɗini hoore am
Isaiah50:8 Adilinanɗo yam o ɓadiiɗo. Moy yiɗi wullaago yam? Sey ndaroden haa kiita. Moy dartinta gooŋga am? O ɓadito yam!
Isaiah50:9 Ndaa
Isaiah50:10 Moy caka mooɗon ɗon hula Jawmiraawo bee nanugo sawtu suka maako? Koo moy jahanɗo nder nyiɓre
Isaiah50:11 Ammaa onon huɓɓuɓe yiite

Isaiah51:2 Ciftore kaaka mon Ibrahiima e Saraatu
Isaiah51:3 Jawmiraawo de'itinan Siyona

Isaiah51:9 Fin

Isaiah51:16 Mi we'iti asamanji
Isaiah51:17 Fin

Isaiah52:5 Jonta boo

Isaiah52:7 Ɗume wooɗiri dow kooseeje bana kosɗe gaazoowo habaru seyo? O ɗon wooyna salaaman

Isaiah52:11 Ndille
Isaiah52:12 Taa ngurte bee jaawal

Isaiah52:14 Ɗuuɗɓe kultori daliila maako
Isaiah52:15 Bana non boo ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe kayɗinan ngam maako
Isaiah53:1 Moy nuɗɗini ko nanɗen? Haa moy Jawmiraawo waŋginani juŋngo mum?

Isaiah53:3 Yimɓe njawi mo
Isaiah53:4 “Asee boo naaworlaaji meeɗen o roondi
Isaiah53:5 Ammaa o yuwaama daliila zunuubaaji meeɗen
Isaiah53:6 Enen fuu en majjino bana baali
Isaiah53:7 Ɓe toonyi mo
Isaiah53:8 Ɓe naŋngi mo bee semmbe
Isaiah53:9 Ɓe mbaɗi yenaande maako caka halluɓe

Isaiah53:11 Daliila torraaji ɗi o yari
Isaiah53:12 Ngam maajum ndokkan mo mi geɗal maako caka mawɓe
Isaiah54:1 “Ummin gookaali seyo

Isaiah54:3 Ngam a yaajan haa nyaamo e nano. Danygol ma heɓtan lesdi ndi ummaatooje nyaami ɗum
Isaiah54:4 Taa hul
Isaiah54:5 Ngam tagɗo ma laatoto gorko ma
Isaiah54:6 A nanndi bee debbo accaaɗo

Isaiah54:10 Koo to kooseeje cotti
Isaiah54:11 An Urusaliima
Isaiah54:12 Mi lamsoto mahi ma bee kaa'e boɗeeje. Mi waɗan dammuɗe ma bee kaa'e ɗelkooje e mahi taariiɗi ma fuu bee kaa'e marɗe saman.
Isaiah54:13 Ɓikkoy ma fuu laatoto pukara'en Jawmiraawo. Salaaman ɓikkoy maaɗa ɗuuɗan.

Isaiah54:15 To goɗɗo ukkanake ma
Isaiah54:16 “Ndaa

Isaiah55:1 Hey! Onon ɗomɗuɓe
Isaiah55:2 Koni ndokkoton cardi ngam ko laataaki nyaamdu? Koni ndokkoton ngeenaari mon ngam kuuje ɗe kaarnataa? Naneeɗam booɗɗum! Nyaame kuuje booɗɗe
Isaiah55:3 Keɗite! Ngare haa am. Nane! Nden on ngeeɗan. Mi haɓɓan alkawal duumiiŋgal bee mooɗon
Isaiah55:4 Ndaa

Isaiah56:1 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Kakkilane kiita ngooŋɗuka
Isaiah56:2 Barka laatanto neɗɗo baɗanɗo ɗum
Isaiah56:3 Jananno mo hawtani yimɓe Jawmiraawo
Isaiah56:4 Ngam Jawmiraawo wi'i sortaaɓe: “To on kakkilani nyalɗe ciwtorɗe am
Isaiah56:5 nden kam mi hokkan on ko ɓurata ɓiɓɓe worɓe e rewɓe
Isaiah56:6 Jananɓe hawtananɓe yimɓe Jawmiraawo ngam jagganaago mo
Isaiah56:7 mi yahran ɓe haa hooseere am seniinde

Isaiah57:1 Adili'en ɗon kalka
Isaiah57:2 Ɓe njahan haa nokkuure salaaman. Tokkiiɓe laawol darnuŋgol ciwtoto dow baalorɗe muuɗum'en.
Isaiah57:3 Ɓadite
Isaiah57:4 Dow moy njaloton? Dow moy maɓɓititton kunnduɗe
Isaiah57:5 On ɗon mbaalda bee labbi mon les leɗɗe mawɗe

Isaiah57:7 On ɗon mbe'iti be'itte mon dow hooseere townde
Isaiah57:8 On ɗon njo'ina ciftinorɗe labbi mon haa ɓaawo dammuɗe cuuɗi mon. On ngayliti
Isaiah57:9 On ɗon nguja ɓalli mon bee nebbam e uurle ngam yahugo sujidango lawru wi'eteendu Laamiiɗo. On ɗon nela nelaaɓe mon daayiiɗum
Isaiah57:10 On njanci haa on comi
Isaiah57:11 “Kadi
Isaiah57:12 Ammaa mi waŋginan adilaaku mon e kuuɗe mon. On naftortaako ɗum sam.
Isaiah57:13 To on mboyi

Isaiah57:15 Allah Ɓaŋiiɗo
Isaiah57:16 Ngam mi jokkirtaa bee maɓɓe haa foroy
Isaiah57:17 Mi tikkani ɓe
Isaiah57:18 Mi yi'i kuuɗe maɓɓe. Ammaa mi yamɗitinan ɓe
Isaiah57:19 mi waɗan maŋgtoore haa kunnduɗe maɓɓe. Salaaman! Salaaman laatano daayiiɓe e ɓadiiɓe fuu! Non Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi yamɗitinan ɓe.
Isaiah57:20 Ammaa halluɓe nanndi bee mbeela ndimmbotooŋga
Isaiah57:21 Woodaa salaaman ngam halluɓe.” Non Allah am wi'i.
Isaiah58:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Hoolu bee sawtu
Isaiah58:2 Ɓe ɗon ƴama muuyo am nde weeti fuu
Isaiah58:3 Yimɓe ƴami: “Ko suumaye nafata to a faalataa ɗum? Ko yaŋgititgo ko'e amin nafata to a hakkilantaa ɗum?” Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Ndaa
Isaiah58:4 Suumaye mon ɗon yahra on haa jokkirgol e haɓre e kutupaaje naawɗe. On cuumaaki hannde bana no haandi sakko mi nana do'aaje mon diga dow.
Isaiah58:5 On ɗon leestina ko'e. Kanjum woni suumayeere nde ngerdotoomi na? On ɗon tura ko'e mon bana kewal
Isaiah58:6 Ndaa

Isaiah58:8 Nden kam annoora mon yaynan bana jayŋgol fajiri

Isaiah58:11 Min Jawmiraawo mi ɗowan on foroy

Isaiah58:14 nden kam ɓerɗe mon keɓan welwelo haa am. Mi daaynan on cakle duniyaaru fuu. Mi laatinan on jaaliiɓe
Isaiah59:1 Kay! Juŋngo Jawmiraawo rammaay ngam hisnugo on. Noppi maako pahɗaay ngam nanango on.

Isaiah59:3 Juuɗe mon coɓi bee ƴiiƴam

Isaiah59:5 Ɓe ɗon cosɓina geeraaɗe poosokje

Isaiah59:18 O warjoto koo moy fodde kuuɗe mum

Isaiah60:20 Naaŋge maaɗa mutataa

Isaiah61:1 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo Allah ɗon dow am. Ngam Jawmiraawo moyti yam
Isaiah61:2 O neli yam yeeynugo hitaande baŋguki mo'ere Jawmiraawo e nyalaade nde Allah men waatoto konne'en mum. O neli yam de'itingo wonɓe nder suno fuu
Isaiah61:3 meetugo yimɓe Siyona jooɗiiɓe nder ndoondi
Isaiah61:4 Ɓe nyiɓtoto bille ɓooymaaje
Isaiah61:5 Jananɓe ngaran
Isaiah61:6 Ammaa onon on ewneteeɓe liman'en Jawmiraawo. Ɓe ewnan on suka'en Allah meeɗen. On nyaaman risku ummaatooje
Isaiah61:7 Haa pellel toskaare
Isaiah61:8 Ngam min Jawmiraawo mi yiɗi kiita ngooŋɗuka. Mi ɗon wanya jaɓtuki e halleende. Mi hokkan yimɓe am mbarjaari maɓɓe bee hoolaare
Isaiah61:9 Ummaatooje anndan danygol maɓɓe

Isaiah62:3 A laatoto meetaleewol ɗelkanŋgol haa juŋngo Jawmiraawo
Isaiah62:4 A meetataa wi'eego: Accaaɗo. Ɓe meetataa wi'ugo lesdi ma: Geewaaɗo. Ammaa ɓe mbi'ete: Ceynanɗo Jawmiraawo
Isaiah62:5 Bana suka te'irta paanyo debbo

Isaiah63:2 Ngam ɗume limce ma mbooji
Isaiah63:3 “Min feere am ɓiɗɗi inabooje nder ɓiɗɗirde. Koo goɗɗo gooto nder ummaatooje wondaayno bee am. Mi yaaɓi ɗe nder tikkere am
Isaiah63:4 Mi nufi nyalaade waataago konne'en am
Isaiah63:5 Mi laari koo toy
Isaiah63:6 Nder tikkere am
Isaiah63:7 Mi siftoran ko Jawmiraawo waɗi nder mbooɗeeŋga mum
Isaiah63:8 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Fakat
Isaiah63:9 diga ɓillaaje maɓɓe fuu. Naa nelaaɗo hisni ɓe

Jeremiah7:26 Ammaa on nanaay
Jeremiah7:27 An boo

Jeremiah7:29 Onon yimɓe Urusaliima

Jeremiah7:32 Jawmiraawo wi'i: Fakat
Jeremiah7:33 Ɓalli yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e laatoto nyaamdu colli e dabbaaji ladde

Jeremiah8:8 Noy mbi'roton: Min mari hakkiilo
Jeremiah8:9 Hikma'en mooɗon toskake

Jeremiah8:15 En tammino jam

Jeremiah15:3 Mi ta'ani ɓe masiibooji nayi: Kaafahi ngam mbarugo ɓe
Jeremiah15:4 Mi laatinan ɓe nyidduɓe haa laamuuji duniyaaru fuu ngam daliila kuuɗe ɗe Manassa ɓii Hezekiya
Jeremiah15:5 Onon yimɓe Urusaliima
Jeremiah15:6 Onon on ngudini yam

Jeremiah15:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Fakat mi hisni ma haa keɓa hayru. Mi huni konne'en ma torete saa'i ɓe ɗon nder ɓillaare e bone.
Jeremiah15:12 Walaa gewanɗo njamndi ɓaleeri
Jeremiah15:13 Mi nelan konne'en haa ɓe njaɓta jawdi e ndesaaji yimɓe am
Jeremiah15:14 Mi laatinan ɓe maccuɓe konne'en maɓɓe nder lesdi ndi ɓe anndaa
Jeremiah15:15 Yeremiya wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo

Jeremiah15:17 Mi meeɗaay jooɗodaago bee jalanɓe haa mi welwita bee maɓɓe. Mi maati juŋngo maaɗa dow am
Jeremiah15:18 Ngam ɗume naaworla am jinnataa? Ngam ɗume huuduure am nyawndataako? Ngam ɗume nde sali hurgaago? A laatani yam bana maayel ngel hoolataake ngam ndiyam maagel ɓeeɓan!”

Jeremiah16:4 Ɓe maayran nyawuji kalluɗi
Jeremiah16:5 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Taa nastu saare suniiɓe
Jeremiah16:6 Mawɓe e leesɓe nder lesdi ndi'i maayan
Jeremiah16:7 Walaa mo nyaamdata koo yardata bee goɗɗo ngam de'itingo mo to goɗɗo saare maako maayi
Jeremiah16:8 Taa nastu saare haa yimɓe ɗon mbaɗa juulde
Jeremiah16:9 Nan ko mbi'anmi
Jeremiah16:10 To a anndini yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e kuuje ɗe'e fuu
Jeremiah16:11 Nden yeccu ɓe: Jawmiraawo wi'i: Kaakiraaɓe mooɗon acci yam
Jeremiah16:12 Onon boo on mbaɗi kalluɗum ko ɓuri kaakiraaɓe mooɗon. Koo moy mooɗon ɗon waɗa ko ɓernde mum saatunde
Jeremiah16:13 Ngam maajum ndiiwanmi on diga lesdi ndi'i haa lesdi ndi on meeɗaay anndugo

Jeremiah16:15 ammaa o wi'an: Fakat bana Jawmiraawo mo wartiri yimɓe Isra'iila diga lesdi woyla e lesɗe ɗe o saŋkitino ɓe fuu
Jeremiah16:16 “Mi nelan waawooɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɓe ngara naŋngugo yimɓe ɓe'e. Nden mi nelan loohooɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɓe loohoto ɓe dow kooseeje e towndiije e nder ceekli tapaaje fuu.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah16:17 “Mi ɗon yi'a kuuɗe maɓɓe
Jeremiah16:18 Mi waatoto aybe maɓɓe e hakkeeji maɓɓe cowi ɗiɗi. Ngam ɓe coɓni lesdi am bee labbi maɓɓe maayɗi
Jeremiah16:19 Yeremiya wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah16:20 Goɗɗo waawan waɗango hoore mum ɗowanteeɓe na? Alhaali boo naa ɗum ɗowanteeɓe bee gooŋga!”
Jeremiah16:21 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Jonta anndinanmi ɓe semmbe am e baawɗe am. Nden ɓe anndan min woni Jawmiraawo.”

Jeremiah17:2 Nden kam ɓiɓɓe mon ciftoran kirsirɗe e daŋraŋge Asera baŋnge leɗɗe kecce fuu e dow towndiije.
Jeremiah17:3 Onon rewanɓe labbi dow kooseeje e nder waadiiji
Jeremiah17:4 Doole juuɗe mon njoofa lesdi ndi ndokkumi on. Mi laatinan on maccuɓe konne'en mooɗon nder lesdi ndi on anndaa
Jeremiah17:5 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Naaloore dow neɗɗo mo hooloto ɓii-Aadamaajo
Jeremiah17:6 O nanndi bee wumre nder ladde hamaadaare
Jeremiah17:7 Barka laatanto neɗɗo mo hooloto Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah17:8 O nanndi bee lekki jubaaki baŋnge ndiyam
Jeremiah17:9 Ɓernde neɗɗo ɓuri koo ɗume fuu naafikaaku
Jeremiah17:10 Min Jawmiraawo mi linyan ɓernde

Jeremiah17:12 Suudu amin seniindu woni jooɗorde tedduŋgal
Jeremiah17:13 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah17:14 Yeremiya wi'i: “Yamɗitinam
Jeremiah17:15 Yimɓe ɗon mbi'ammi: Toy koŋngol Jawmiraawo go? Sey ngol hiɓɓa kadi!
Jeremiah17:16 Min mi meeɗaay yerɓugo ma a nela sarru dow maɓɓe. Mi yelaay nyalaade bone ngam maɓɓe. An a anndi ɗum
Jeremiah17:17 Taa laatanam daliila kultoreeŋgol
Jeremiah17:18 Semtin toonyooɓe yam
Jeremiah17:19 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Yah
Jeremiah17:20 Wi' laamiiɓe e yimɓe Yahuuda e jooɗiiɓe haa Urusaliima
Jeremiah17:21 Ndaa ko o wi'i: Kakkilane ko'e mooɗon
Jeremiah17:22 Taa ngurtine doŋngal e cuuɗi mon nyannde siwtorde
Jeremiah17:23 Kamɓe ɓe nananaay yam
Jeremiah17:24 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Sey on ɗowtano yam booɗɗum. Taa on nastina doŋngal koo ngale haa dammuɗe berniwol ngo'ol nyannde siwtorde. Cene nyannde maajum
Jeremiah17:25 Nden kam laamiiɓe mon e ardiiɓe mon njooɗoto dow leeso laamu Daawuda. Ɓe mba'oto pucci e mootaaji pucci
Jeremiah17:26 Woɗɓe ngaran diga berniiji Yahuuda e gure taariiɗe Urusaliima
Jeremiah17:27 Ammaa sey on ɗowtano yam. Sey on cena nyannde siwtorde
Jeremiah18:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah18:2 “Umma
Jeremiah18:3 Mi yehi haa saare mahoowo payanɗe man. O ɗonno huuwa haa kuuwruɗum maako.
Jeremiah18:4 Fayannde nde o ɗon maha
Jeremiah18:5 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Jeremiah18:6 “Onon yimɓe Isra'iila
Jeremiah18:7 “Saa'i feere mi wi'an mi ɗoofa ummaatoore koo laamu
Jeremiah18:8 Ammaa to ummaatoore man wayliti
Jeremiah18:9 Saa'i feere boo mi wi'an mi nyiɓa ummaatoore koo laamu
Jeremiah18:10 Ammaa to ummaatoore man waɗi kalluɗum yeeso am
Jeremiah18:11 Jonta kadi
Jeremiah18:12 Ammaa ɓe njaaboto: Aa'a
Jeremiah18:13 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ƴame ummaatooje fuu. Moy meeɗi nanugo irin ɗu'um? Yimɓe Isra'iila mbaɗi nyidduɗum masin.
Jeremiah18:14 Mallimallooje cuddataa geereeje kooseeje Libanon tum na? Ndiyamji peewɗi ilooji e kooseeje man ɓeeɓan na?
Jeremiah18:15 Ammaa yimɓe ummaatoore am ngejjiti yam
Jeremiah18:16 Ɓe laatini lesdi maɓɓe kulniindi
Jeremiah18:17 Mi saŋkitan yimɓe am yeeso konne'en maɓɓe bana collaaje ɗe henndu fuunaaŋge umminta. To halkere maɓɓe wari
Jeremiah18:18 Nden yimɓe mbi'i: “Ngare
Jeremiah18:19 Yeremiya tori Allah
Jeremiah18:20 Kadi halleende laatoto ngeenaari ngam mbooɗeeŋga na? Ammaa kamɓe ɓe ngasi ngaska ngam halkugo yam. Siftor no mi darori yeeso maaɗa
Jeremiah18:21 Ngam maajum yooftu ɓikkoy maɓɓe haa koy maaya bee weelo
Jeremiah18:22 Nel mooɓre jaɓtooɓe bee juhuki dow maɓɓe
Jeremiah18:23 Ammaa an
Jeremiah19:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i ni'i: “Yah
Jeremiah19:2 Yahdu bee maɓɓe haa Waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom
Jeremiah19:3 Wi': Sey on nana wolde Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah19:4 Mi waɗan ɗum ngam yimɓe acci yam
Jeremiah19:5 Ɓe nyiɓi nokkuuje towɗe ngam Ba'al
Jeremiah19:6 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: Saa'i waran nde ɓe ewnataako nokkuure nde'e Tofet malla Waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom
Jeremiah19:7 Haa nokkuure nde'e mbilanmi nufayeeje Yahuuda e Urusaliima. Mi do'an yimɓe bee kaafahi konne'en maɓɓe yiɗɓe mbarugo ɓe. Mi nyaamnan colli e dabbaaji ɓalli maɓɓe.
Jeremiah19:8 Mi wilan berniwol ngo'ol
Jeremiah19:9 Mi nyaamnan jooɗiiɓe nder maagol kusel ɓikkoy muuɗum'en ngorkoy e ndehoy. Konne'en maɓɓe e yiɗɓe mbarugo kippoto berniwol. Nder ɓillaare nde'e
Jeremiah19:10 Nden pusa mbulku go yeeso yahduɓe bee ma
Jeremiah19:11 yeccu ɓe: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi fusan yimɓe ɓe'e e berniwol ngo'ol bana goɗɗo fusrata mbulku
Jeremiah19:12 Bana non waaranmi berniwol ngo'ol e jooɗiiɓe ton. Mi laatinan ngol bana Tofet.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah19:13 “Cuuɗi Urusaliima e cuuɗi laamiiɓe Yahuuda waato soorooji haa ɓe ngulani jama'aare asama fuu uurle dow muuɗum

Jeremiah19:15 “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama

Jeremiah20:5 Mi accan konne'en njaɓta jawdi berniwol ngo'ol e risku maagol e kuuje maagol marɗe saman fuu. Ndesaaji laamiiɓe Yahuuda boo
Jeremiah20:6 An boo

Jeremiah20:15 Naaloore dow ceynuɗo baaba am masin

Jeremiah21:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yeremiya saa'i laamiiɗo Sedekiya neli Pashuuru ɓii Malkiya e Sefaniya ɓii Ma'aseya

Jeremiah22:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Yah haa saare laamiiɗo Yahuuda
Jeremiah22:2 Nane wolde Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah22:3 Ndaa nii o wi'i: Mbaɗe kiita ngooŋɗuka e adilaaku. Kisne jaɓtaaɗo nder juŋngo toonyoowo. Taa ɓille hoɗɓe e atiime'en e rewɓe yurumɓe
Jeremiah22:4 To on mbaɗi ko umrumi on
Jeremiah22:5 Ammaa to on ɗowtanaaki bolle ɗe'e
Jeremiah22:6 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Laamorde laamiiɗo Yahuuda wooɗi haa gite am bana lesdi Gile'at e yeereere hooseere Libanon. Ammaa mi wartiran nde winnde e nokkuure ferwunde.
Jeremiah22:7 Mi nelan worɓe ngam wilugo nde. Koo moy maɓɓe wara bee fe'irde mum
Jeremiah22:8 Ɓaawoɗon yimɓe ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe caaloto baŋnge berniwol ngo'ol
Jeremiah22:9 Nden ɓe njaaboto: Ngam jooɗiiɓe ton piisti alkawal bee Jawmiraawo Allah muuɗum'en
Jeremiah22:10 Onon yimɓe Yahuuda
Jeremiah22:11 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Sallum ɓii Yusiya mo laami haa pellel baaba muuɗum Yusiya
Jeremiah22:12 O maayan haa lesdi ndi ɓe ndahi mo
Jeremiah22:13 “Bone laatanto nyiɓanɗo saare mum bee sooynde adilaaku e cuuɗi mum dowji bee aybe
Jeremiah22:14 Bone laatanto bi'ɗo: Mi nyiɓan saare mawnde
Jeremiah22:15 Kadi a laamiiɗo ngam a ɗuɗɗina cuuɗi bee leɗɗe booɗɗe na? Baaba ma nyaami
Jeremiah22:16 O jiŋngi laafuɗo e talakaajo
Jeremiah22:17 Ammaa sey riba maaɗa kalluka tan a suklanto. A ɗon mbara yimɓe ɓe ngalaa aybe
Jeremiah22:18 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah22:19 O heɓan uwol bana ngol wamnde. Ɓe ndasan ɓanndu maako yaasi dammuɗe Urusaliima
Jeremiah22:20 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “An Urusaliima
Jeremiah22:21 Mi wolwani ma saa'i a jooɗi jam
Jeremiah22:22 Henndu ruuynan ardiiɓe ma
Jeremiah22:23 A ɗon hoolɗina caka leɗɗe booɗɗe iwɗe Libanon. Ammaa a uuman
Jeremiah22:24 Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Koniya ɓii Yooyakim
Jeremiah22:25 mi hokkete haa juuɗe yiɗɓe mbarugo ma
Jeremiah22:26 Mi sakkinte bee daada ma haa lesdi ndi on ndanyaaka nder muuɗum
Jeremiah22:27 On meetataa wartugo lesdi ndi ngenwoton wartugo nder muuɗum.”
Jeremiah22:28 Yeremiya wi'i: “Kadi Koniya laati bana mbulku pusŋgu ngu goɗɗo yiɗaa
Jeremiah22:29 Lesdi! Lesdi! Lesdi! Nan wolde Jawmiraawo!
Jeremiah22:30 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mbinnde innde gorko oo bana mo walaa ɓikkoy
Jeremiah23:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Kayto! Ardiiɓe yimɓe am ɓe halluɓe! Ɓe acci yimɓe am majja
Jeremiah23:2 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i dow ardiiɓe ɗowanɓe ummaatoore muuɗum: “On caŋkiti yimɓe am
Jeremiah23:3 Mi mooɓtan yimɓe am luttuɓe diga lesɗe haa ndiiwmi ɓe fuu
Jeremiah23:4 Mi darnan ardiiɓe dow maɓɓe ngam hakkilango ɓe
Jeremiah23:5 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i ɗon wara haa mi suɓa goɗɗo mo danygol Daawuda bi'eteeɗo Fuɗŋgo
Jeremiah23:6 Nder balɗe maako Yahuuda rimɗinte
Jeremiah23:7 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i ɗon wara nde kunotooɗo meetataa wi'ugo: Fakat bana Jawmiraawo mo wurtini yimɓe Isra'iila e Misra o geeto.
Jeremiah23:8 Ammaa o wi'an: Fakat Jawmiraawo o geeto. Kaŋko wartiri yimɓe Isra'iila diga lesdi woyla e lesɗe ɗe o saŋkitino ɓe fuu haa ɓe njooɗo nder lesdi maɓɓe.”
Jeremiah23:9 Ndaa ko Yeremiya wi'i dow annabi'en: “Ɓernde am ta'i
Jeremiah23:10 Lesdi heewi jeenooɓe
Jeremiah23:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: Annabi'en e liman'en mbonnake
Jeremiah23:12 Ngam maajum laawol maɓɓe laatoto laawol moostanŋgol e nyiɓɓuŋgol. Mi waɗan ɓe pergo
Jeremiah23:13 Mi yi'i faataare annabi'en haa Samariya. Ɓe mbaɗi annabaaku bee innde Ba'al
Jeremiah23:14 Ammaa mi yi'i annabi'en haa Urusaliima ɗon mbaɗa ko ɓuri nyiddugo. Ɓe ɗon mbaɗa njeenu
Jeremiah23:15 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah23:16 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Taa nane bolle annabi'en. Ɓe ɗon kebbina ɓerɗe mooɗon bee tammunde meere. Ɓe ɗon anndina on ko ɓe ngi'i
Jeremiah23:17 Ɓe ɗon mbi'a yawotooɓe yam: Jawmiraawo wi'i jam wondan bee mooɗon. Ɓe ɗon mbi'a saata-ko'e'en boo: Sarru ukkantaako on.”
Jeremiah23:18 Moy caka annabi'en ɓe'e meeɗi jooɗaago nder dawriinde Jawmiraawo? Moy laari mo
Jeremiah23:19 Tikkere Jawmiraawo waran bana henndu saatundu
Jeremiah23:20 Nde naŋgtataako
Jeremiah23:21 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Min mi nelaay annabi'en ɓe'e
Jeremiah23:22 To ɓe ndawridino bee am
Jeremiah23:23 Kadi mi Allah gi'anɗo ko ɓadi tan na? Naa non! Mi Allah gi'anɗo ko daayi boo.
Jeremiah23:24 Woodi nyukkotooɗo haa pellel ngel mi yi'ataa mo na? Non Jawmiraawo wi'i. Naa min woni gonɗo koo toy haa asama e dow lesdi na?
Jeremiah23:25 Annabi'en waɗɓe annabaaku fewre bee innde am
Jeremiah23:26 Haa ndey annabi'en ɓe'e accata estugo yimɓe am bee hasugo pewe maɓɓe malla anndingo ɓe ko numooji maɓɓe nufi?
Jeremiah23:27 Ɓe tammi bee yeccirgo koyɗi maɓɓe ɓe mbaɗan yimɓe am ngejjita innde am
Jeremiah23:28 Annabiijo mo yi'i koyɗol
Jeremiah23:29 “Wolde am nanndi bee yiite malla bee tappirɗum ko fusata tapaare.” – Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah23:30 “Ngam maajum mi ɗon hona annabi'en ɓe'e. Ɓe ɗon koocindira bolle am
Jeremiah23:31 Mi ɗon hona annabi'en wolwanɓe bolle muuɗum'en
Jeremiah23:32 “Mi ɗon hona annabi'en waazanɓe koyɗi pewooji. Ɓe ɗon majjina ummaatoore am bee pewe maɓɓe e manooje maɓɓe. Min mi nelaay ɓe
Jeremiah23:33 “An Yeremiya
Jeremiah23:34 To limanjo malla annabiijo malla gooto nder ummaatoore am wi'i: Ɗo woni koŋngol Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah23:35 Ndikka koo moy ƴama keeddiɗɗum malla banndum: Ɗume Jawmiraawo jaabi
Jeremiah23:36 Taa goɗɗo meeta wi'ugo: Ɗo woni koŋngol Jawmiraawo. Bolle ɗe goɗɗo man wolwata laataaki koŋngol Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah23:37 Sey a ƴama annabi'en: Ɗume Jawmiraawo jaabi
Jeremiah23:38 To ɓe mbi'i ma: Ɗo woni koŋngol Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah23:39 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah23:40 Mi suddan on bee jancoore duumiinde e toskaare duumiinde nde yejjitittaake.”
Jeremiah24:1 Jawmiraawo yi'ni yam cilaaje ɗiɗi keewɗe ibbe jo'inaaɗe yeeso haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. Ɗum waɗi ɓaawo nde Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah24:2 Silaawo wooto heewi ibbe booɗɗe masin

Jeremiah24:4 Nden Jawmiraawo wi'i yam.

Jeremiah25:1 Nder nduuɓu Yooyakim ɓii Yusiya
