Jeremiah25:3 “Diga nduuɓu Yusiya ɓii Amon
Jeremiah25:4 Jawmiraawo tokki nelango on jaggiiɓe mum annabi'en fuu
Jeremiah25:5 Ɓe mbi'i koo moy mooɗon acca laabi mum kalluɗi e kuuɗe mum kalluɗe
Jeremiah25:6 Ɓe mbi'i on
Jeremiah25:7 Jawmiraawo bee hoore mum wi'i: On cali nanango yam. Ammaa on tikkini yam bee labbi ɗi mbaɗɗon. Bana nii on njaanyani ko'e mooɗon sarru.”
Jeremiah25:8 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “On cali nanugo bolle am.
Jeremiah25:9 Ngam maajum ewnotoomi ummaatooje woyla fuu e suka am Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah25:10 Mi je'inan hoolo seyo e welwelo caka maɓɓe
Jeremiah25:11 Lesdi ndi'i fuu laatoto bille e ladde meere. Yimɓe ummaatooje ɗe'e fuu laatoto huuwanooɓe laamiiɗo Baabila duuɓi cappanɗe joweeɗiɗi.
Jeremiah25:12 Ammaa to duuɓi cappanɗe joweeɗiɗi caalake
Jeremiah25:13 “Mi hiitoto lesdi man fodde ko mbi'mi dow maari fuu
Jeremiah25:14 Ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe e laamiiɓe mawɓe macciɗinan Kaldiya'en
Jeremiah25:15 Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah25:16 Ɓaawo ɗe njari ngel
Jeremiah25:17 Nden mi hoo'i jardugel man nder juŋngo Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah25:18 Mi yarni ngel Urusaliima e gure lesdi Yahuuda fuu
Jeremiah25:19 Nden mi yarni ngel Firawna
Jeremiah25:20 e jananɓe wonɓe haa Misra e laamiiɓe lesdi Uus e laamiiɓe berniiji Filisti'en fuu: Askalon e Gaaza e Ekuruun e luttuɗum Asdod.
Jeremiah25:21 Non boo yimɓe Edoom e Mo'ab e Ammoon
Jeremiah25:22 laamiiɓe Tirus e Sidon fuu
Jeremiah25:23 e berniiji Dedan e Tema e Bus e yimɓe laɓa-taarna'en fuu.
Jeremiah25:24 Non boo laamiiɓe Arabiya e laamiiɓe jananɓe jooɗiiɓe nder ladde
Jeremiah25:25 e laamiiɓe Zimiri e laamiiɓe Elam e laamiiɓe Mediya fuu
Jeremiah25:26 e laamiiɓe woyla ɓadiiɓe e daayiiɓe fuu. Laamuuji duniyaaru fuu njari ngel bee tokkindirko
Jeremiah25:27 Nden Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Yeccu yimɓe
Jeremiah25:28 To ɓe calake hoo'ugo jardugel nder juŋngo maaɗa e yarugo ngel
Jeremiah25:29 Mi fuɗɗiran ukkugo sarru dow berniwol haa innde am woni. Onon kam on tammi on ndaɗan kiita na? Woodaa! On keɓan kiita
Jeremiah25:30 “An Yeremiya
Jeremiah25:31 Hoolo man yottoto keeri duniyaaru
Jeremiah25:32 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Sarru ɗon ukkano ummaatoore nde'e
Jeremiah25:33 Nyalaade man mbaraaɓe Jawmiraawo mbaaloto dow lesdi
Jeremiah25:34 Mboye
Jeremiah25:35 Laawol hisugo woodaa ngam ardiiɓe
Jeremiah25:36 Ardiiɓe ɗon mboya
Jeremiah25:37 Lesɗe maɓɓe de'itɗe kalki ngam tikkere Jawmiraawo saatunde.
Jeremiah25:38 O acci yimɓe maako bana mbarooga wurtorto lowol mum
Jeremiah26:1 Saa'i Yooyakim ɓii Yusiya fuɗɗi laamaago nder lesdi Yahuuda
Jeremiah26:2 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Dara haa daldal haykaliiru
Jeremiah26:3 Teema ɓe nanan
Jeremiah26:4 Yeccu ɓe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Naneeɗam
Jeremiah26:5 kakkilane bolle sukaaɓe am annabi'en ɓe tokkiimi nelugo haa mooɗon. Ammaa on nanaay.
Jeremiah26:6 To on ɗowtanaaki yam
Jeremiah26:7 Liman'en e annabi'en e ummaatoore fuu keɗiti yaake Yeremiya wolwi bolle ɗe'e haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
Jeremiah26:8 Nde Yeremiya timmini wolwugo ko Jawmiraawo umruno mo o wolwana ummaatoore fuu
Jeremiah26:9 Koni mbaɗɗa annabaaku bee innde Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah26:10 Nde ardiiɓe Yahuuda nani haala man
Jeremiah26:11 Nden liman'en e annabi'en mbi'i ardiiɓe e ummaatoore fuu: “Gorko oo he'i kiita mbareego
Jeremiah26:12 Ammaa Yeremiya wi'i ardiiɓe e ummaatoore fuu: “Jawmiraawo neli yam waɗugo annabaaku dow suudu ndu'u e berniwol ngo'ol
Jeremiah26:13 Ammaa jonta mbo'ine laabi mon e kuuɗe mon kadi. Nane bolle Jawmiraawo Allah mon. Nden kam Jawmiraawo faasitan ukkango on sarru ngu o wi'no.
Jeremiah26:14 Min kam
Jeremiah26:15 Ammaa annde fakat: To on mbari yam
Jeremiah26:16 Nden ardiiɓe e ummaatoore fuu mbi'i liman'en e annabi'en: “Gorko oo he'aay kiita mbareego
Jeremiah26:17 Ɓaawo man woɗɓe caka ndotti'en ummi
Jeremiah26:18 “Nder zamanu laamiiɗo Hezekiya
Jeremiah26:19 Laamiiɗo Hezekiya e yimɓe Yahuuda fuu mbaraay Mika. Ammaa Hezekiya huli Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah26:20 Woodi boo goɗɗo feere mo waɗi annabaaku bee innde Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah26:21 Nde laamiiɗo Yooyakim e honooɓe muuɗum e ardiiɓe muuɗum fuu nani bolle Uriya
Jeremiah26:22 Nden laamiiɗo Yooyakim neli Elnatan ɓii Akbor bee worɓe woɗɓe haa Misra.
Jeremiah26:23 Ɓe ngaddi Uriya diga ton
Jeremiah26:24 Ahikam ɓii Safan faddi Yeremiya
Jeremiah27:1 Nde Sedekiya ɓii Yusiya fuɗɗi laamaago nder lesdi Yahuuda
Jeremiah27:2 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Waɗan hoore ma kaɓɓirgal e ɓoggi
Jeremiah27:3 Nden neldu ɗum laamiiɓe Edoom e Mo'ab e Ammoon e Tirus e Sidon
Jeremiah27:4 Yeccu ɓe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah27:5 Min bee baawɗe am mawɗe e juŋngo am fortaaŋgo tagrumi lesdi e yimɓe e dabbaaji gonɗi dow maari. Mi hokkan ɗum haa juŋngo mo ngiɗmi.
Jeremiah27:6 Min hokki ummaatooje ɗe'e fuu haa juŋngo suka am Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah27:7 Ummaatooje fuu njagganto mo. Ɗe njagganto ɓiɗɗo maako e taaniraawo maako boo
Jeremiah27:8 To ummaatoore wonnde malla laamu salake jagganaago Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah27:9 Taa nanane annabi'en mon
Jeremiah27:10 Ɓe ɗon mbaɗa on annabaaku fewre haa ɓe ndaayna on e lesdi mon
Jeremiah27:11 Ammaa to ummaatoore jaɓi kaɓɓirgal laamiiɗo Baabila
Jeremiah27:12 Yeremiya yecci Sedekiya
Jeremiah27:13 Walaa haaje on maayra bee konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu
Jeremiah27:14 Taa nane bolle annabi'en wi'anɓe on: On njaggantaako laamiiɗo Baabila. Ngam ɓe ɗon mbaɗa on annabaaku fewre.
Jeremiah27:15 Jawmiraawo wi'i: Min kam
Jeremiah27:16 Nden Yeremiya wolwani liman'en e ummaatoore fuu: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Taa nane bolle annabi'en mon waɗananɓe on annabaaku ni'i: Yeeso seɗɗa ɓe ngartiran kuuwruɗe haykaliiru Jawmiraawo diga Baabila. Ɓe ɗon pewana on.
Jeremiah27:17 Taa nanane ɓe. Njaggane laamiiɗo Baabila
Jeremiah27:18 To kamɓe ɓe laati annabi'en fakat
Jeremiah27:19 Saa'i Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah27:20 
Jeremiah27:21 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah27:22 Ɓe ndahan ɗe haa Baabila. Ton ɗe ngonata
Jeremiah28:1 Hitaande man
Jeremiah28:2 “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah28:3 Hiddeko duuɓi ɗiɗi timma
Jeremiah28:4 Mi wartiran boo Yekoniya ɓii Yooyakim
Jeremiah28:5 Annabi Yeremiya jaabi annabi Hananiya yeeso liman'en e ummaatoore dariinde nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo fuu.
Jeremiah28:6 O wi'i: “Aamiina
Jeremiah28:7 Tan nii nan wolde nde mbi'anmaami
Jeremiah28:8 Annabi'en aartuɓe en
Jeremiah28:9 Ammaa mo waɗi annabaaku jam – to jam man laatake
Jeremiah28:10 Annabi Hananiya hooci kaɓɓirgal dow daande annabi Yeremiya go
Jeremiah28:11 Nden o wolwi yeeso ummaatoore fuu: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Bana nii ngewranmi kaɓɓirgal ngal Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah28:12 Ɓaawo nde annabi Hananiya yewi kaɓɓirgal dow daande annabi Yeremiya
Jeremiah28:13 “Yah yeccu Hananiya: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: A yewi kaɓɓirgal ngal leggal
Jeremiah28:14 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah28:15 Nden annabi Yeremiya wi'i annabi Hananiya: “Nan
Jeremiah28:16 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah28:17 Annabi Hananiya maayi hitaande man nden
Jeremiah29:1 Diga Urusaliima
Jeremiah29:2 O winndi ngol ɓaawo laamiiɗo Yekoniya e daada mum e saraaki'en mum e ardiiɓe Yahuuda e Urusaliima e kila'en e worɓe waɗooɓe sanaa'a fuu ndilli diga Urusaliima.
Jeremiah29:3 Sedekiya
Jeremiah29:4 “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah29:5 Mahe cuuɗi
Jeremiah29:6 Te'e rewɓe
Jeremiah29:7 Kakkilane salaaman berniwol ngol ndahmi on
Jeremiah29:8 Min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah29:9 Ɓe ɗon mbaɗa on annabaaku fewre bee innde am
Jeremiah29:10 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “To Baabila waɗi duuɓi cappanɗe joweeɗiɗi
Jeremiah29:11 Mi anndi nufayeeje am dow mooɗon. Mi ɗon nufano on hayru
Jeremiah29:12 On ewnoto yam
Jeremiah29:13 On ɗaɓɓitittam
Jeremiah29:14 Fakat on tawatam. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i. Mi wartiran joonde mon bana naane
Jeremiah29:15 On ɗon mbi'a Jawmiraawo hokki on annabi'en haa Baabila.
Jeremiah29:16 Nane ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow laamiiɗo jooɗiiɗo dow leeso laamu Daawuda e banndiraaɓe mon luttuɓe haa Urusaliima fuu
Jeremiah29:17 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi nelan konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu caka maɓɓe. Mi laatinan ɓe bana ibbe nyolɗe ɗe yimɓe ngiɗaa nyaamugo ngam ɗe mbonnake masin.
Jeremiah29:18 Mi taasnan ɓe bee konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu
Jeremiah29:19 Kanjum fuu ɗum laatoto ngam ɓe ɗowtanaaki bolle am ɗe tokkiimi neldugo haa maɓɓe bee kunnduɗe sukaaɓe am annabi'en
Jeremiah29:20 Ammaa onon dahaaɓe ɓe ngurtinmi Urusaliima
Jeremiah29:21 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah29:22 To goɗɗo nder dahaaɓe diga Urusaliima haa Baabila yiɗi naalugo goɗɗo feere
Jeremiah29:23 Kanjum woni kiita maɓɓe
Jeremiah29:24 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yeremiya: “Yeccu Semaya Nehelamiijo:
Jeremiah29:25 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah29:26 Jawmiraawo darni ma a limanjo haa pellel Yoyada limanjo
Jeremiah29:27 Koni a felaay Yeremiya mo Anatot mo wolwani on bana annabiijo?
Jeremiah29:28 Jonta boo o neldi min habaru haa Baabila
Jeremiah29:29 Limanjo Sefaniya jaŋngani annabi Yeremiya bataakewol ngo'ol.
Jeremiah29:30 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah29:31 “Neldu habaru haa dahaaɓe fuu
Jeremiah29:32 
Jeremiah30:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya.
Jeremiah30:2 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah30:3 Ngam nyalaade mi wartirta joonde yimɓe ummaatoore am Isra'iila e Yahuuda bana naane ɗon wara. Mi hooran ɓe haa lesdi ndi marnumi kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe
Jeremiah30:4 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Isra'iila e Yahuuda:
Jeremiah30:5 “Mi nani wookaandu kultoreeŋgol e kulol
Jeremiah30:6 Ƴame goɗɗo: Gorko meeɗi ɓesnugo na? Ngam ɗume mi ɗon yi'a worɓe fuu bee juuɗe muuɗum'en dow keeci muuɗum'en
Jeremiah30:7 Kayto! Nyalaade hulniinde ɗon wara
Jeremiah30:8 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Nyalaade man ngewanmi kaɓɓirgal dow daaɗe maɓɓe
Jeremiah30:9 Ammaa ɓe njagganto Jawmiraawo Allah maɓɓe e laamiiɗo maɓɓe Daawuda mo umminanmi ngam maɓɓe.
Jeremiah30:10 Onon yimɓe danygol suka am Yaakubu
Jeremiah30:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi ɗon wondi bee mooɗon ngam hisnugo on. Mi nattinan ummaatooje fuu haa caŋkititmi on. Ammaa onon
Jeremiah30:12 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i Urusaliima: “Naawnere ma nyawndataako
Jeremiah30:13 Walaa jiŋnganɗo ma
Jeremiah30:14 Waaye'en ma fuu ngejjiti ma
Jeremiah30:15 Koni mboyata ngam piyɗe ma
Jeremiah30:16 Ammaa moɗooɓe ma
Jeremiah30:17 Min mi yamɗitinte
Jeremiah30:18 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi wartiran joonde danygol Yaakubu bana naane
Jeremiah30:19 Jooɗotooɓe ton ngiman maŋgtooje
Jeremiah30:20 Danygol Yaakubu laatoto bana naane
Jeremiah30:21 Hooreejo maɓɓe iwan caka maɓɓe
Jeremiah30:22 On laatoto ummaatoore am
Jeremiah30:23 Ndaa Jawmiraawo tuurti! Tikkere maako saatunde ummake! Nde ɗon bana duluuru ukkotoondu dow ko'e halluɓe. Nde jinnataa
Jeremiah30:24 
Jeremiah31:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i maajum mi laatoto Allah ngam ci'e yimɓe Isra'iila fuu
Jeremiah31:2 Yimɓe daɗɓe kaafahi keɓi mo'ere nder ladde. Isra'iila ɓadi heɓugo de'ere.
Jeremiah31:3 Jawmiraawo waŋgani ɓe diga daayiiɗum
Jeremiah31:4 Mi darnitan on haa on ndaro
Jeremiah31:5 On njuboto gese inabooje fahin dow kooseeje Samariya
Jeremiah31:6 Fakat saa'i ɗon wara haa aynooɓe koola dow kooseeje Efrayim: Umme
Jeremiah31:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mbaɗe hoolo seyo ngam daliila Yaakubu
Jeremiah31:8 Ndaa
Jeremiah31:9 Ɓe ngardan bee bojji
Jeremiah31:10 Onon ummaatooje
Jeremiah31:11 Ngam Jawmiraawo sootti yimɓe Yaakubu
Jeremiah31:12 Ɓe ngaran
Jeremiah31:13 Nden faanyɓe ngaman bee seyo
Jeremiah31:14 Mi haarnan liman'en bee kusel marŋgel ɓellere
Jeremiah31:15 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Gookaali ummi haa Rama
Jeremiah31:16 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Accu woyugo e ilnugo gonɗi! Mbarjaari torra ma ɗon
Jeremiah31:17 Yeeso ɗo
Jeremiah31:18 “Mi nani yimɓe Efrayim ɗon mboya
Jeremiah31:19 Min ngayliti
Jeremiah31:20 An Efrayim
Jeremiah31:21 “Darnu alaamaaji
Jeremiah31:22 Haa ndey on accata yiilaago
Jeremiah31:23 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah31:24 Yimɓe njooɗoto nder lesdi Yahuuda e nder gure maari fuu
Jeremiah31:25 Mi semmbiɗinan koo moy comɗo
Jeremiah31:26 Nden Yeremiya fini
Jeremiah31:27 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i ɗon wara haa mi hebbina lesdi Isra'iila e lesdi Yahuuda bee yimɓe e dabbaaji.
Jeremiah31:28 Bana mi tiɗɗiniri ɗoofugo e fe'ugo
Jeremiah31:29 “Saa'i man ɓe meetataa wi'ugo: Baabiraaɓe muri lammuɗum
Jeremiah31:30 Naa non
Jeremiah31:31 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Nyalɗe ɗon ngara haa mi haɓɓa alkawal kesal bee yimɓe Isra'iila e yimɓe Yahuuda.
Jeremiah31:32 Ngal laatataako bana alkawal ngal kaɓɓumi bee kaakiraaɓe maɓɓe nyannde mi naŋngi juuɗe maɓɓe ngam wurtingo ɓe lesdi Misra. Koo mi laati jawmiiɓe
Jeremiah31:33 Ammaa to saa'i man wari
Jeremiah31:34 Walaa haaje goɗɗo ekkitina keeddiɗɗum malla deerɗum
Jeremiah31:35 Jawmiraawo jo'ini naaŋge ngam yaynugo nyalawma
Jeremiah31:36 
Jeremiah31:37 To goɗɗo waawi foondugo asamanji e wiɗitaago caɓɓaaje lesdi
Jeremiah31:38 “Saa'i ɗon wara nde yimɓe nyiɓtoto berniwol ngo'ol
Jeremiah31:39 “Diga ton keerol maagol yahan gal hiirnaaŋge haa yotto towndiire Gareb
Jeremiah31:40 Waadiwol nyawmanɗe e ndoondi e babe fuu haa yotto maayel Kederon
Jeremiah32:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya nder nduuɓu Sedekiya
Jeremiah32:2 Saa'i man honooɓe laamiiɗo Baabila ɗon kippo Urusaliima. Annabi Yeremiya o kaɓɓaaɗo haa daldal saare laamiiɗo Yahuuda haa ɓe aynata naŋngaaɓe.
Jeremiah32:3 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya maɓɓi mo ton
Jeremiah32:4 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya daɗataa Kaldiya'en
Jeremiah32:5 O yahran Sedekiya haa Baabila. Ton o jooɗoto haa saa'i mi yaali mo fahin. Koo to on kaɓi bee Kaldiya'en
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremiya wi'i: “Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Jeremiah32:7 Hananiyel ɓii bappa ma Sallum
Jeremiah32:8 Ɗum laati bana Jawmiraawo wi'no. Hananiyel
Jeremiah32:9 Mi soodi ngesa man haa Anatot e juŋngo Hananiyel
Jeremiah32:10 Mi winndi ɗereewol coggu
Jeremiah32:11 Nden mi hoo'i ɗereewol coggu maɓɓaaŋgol e misaaluwol maagol maɓɓitiiŋgol.
Jeremiah32:12 Mi hokki ɗereeji man ɗiɗi fuu haa Baruku ɓii Neriya ɓii Mahaseya
Jeremiah32:13 Nden mi umri Baruku yeeso maɓɓe
Jeremiah32:14 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah32:15 Ngam min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah32:16 Nde mi hokki Baruku ɓii Neriya ɗereewol coggu go
Jeremiah32:17 “Yaa Allah Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah32:18 A ɗon mo'ana gide ujineeje
Jeremiah32:19 Nufayeeje ma e kuuɗe ma ɗe mawɗe. Gite ma ɗon ndaara laabi ɓiɓɓe Aadama fuu
Jeremiah32:20 A waɗi alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji nder lesdi Misra. A ɗon tokko waɗugo ɗi haa wargo hannde
Jeremiah32:21 A wurtini yimɓe ummaatoore ma diga lesdi Misra bee alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji e juŋngo ma semmbiɗŋgo
Jeremiah32:22 A hokki ɓe lesdi ndi'i
Jeremiah32:23 Ammaa nde ɓe nasti ndi
Jeremiah32:24 Ndaa
Jeremiah32:25 Ammaa bee non fuu
Jeremiah32:26 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah32:27 “Min woni Jawmiraawo Allah mo yimɓe fuu. Walaa ko salortammi.
Jeremiah32:28 Ngam maajum mbi'mi: Mi hokkan berniwol ngo'ol haa juuɗe Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah32:29 Kaldiya'en honanɓe berniwol ngo'ol
Jeremiah32:30 Diga fuɗɗam yimɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda ɗon mbaɗa kalluɗum tum yeeso am. Ɓe ɗon tikkinammi tum bee kuuɗe maɓɓe kalluɗe.
Jeremiah32:31 Berniwol ngo'ol tikkini yam
Jeremiah32:32 ngam yimɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda fuu
Jeremiah32:33 Ɓe ngaylitani yam ɓaawe
Jeremiah32:34 Ko ɓuri hallugo boo
Jeremiah32:35 Ɓe mahi towndiije ngam Ba'al nder waadiwol Ɓii-Hinnom
Jeremiah32:36 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i: “On mbi'i dow Urusaliima: Berniwol ngo'ol yani haa juŋngo laamiiɗo Baabila ngam daliila konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu.
Jeremiah32:37 Nder tikkere am e ɓernuki am caatuki caŋkititmi yimɓe am haa lesɗe fuu. Mi mooɓtan ɓe ton
Jeremiah32:38 Nden ɓe laatoto ummaatoore am
Jeremiah32:39 Mi hokkan ɓe hakkiilo wooto e laawol gootol
Jeremiah32:40 Mi haɓɓan alkawal duumiiŋgal bee maɓɓe
Jeremiah32:41 Mi seyorto woonango ɓe. Bee ɓernde am e muuyo am fuu tabitinanmi ɓe bee hoolaare nder lesdi ndi'i.
Jeremiah32:42 Bana njahrirmi sarru naawŋgu ngu'u fuu dow yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e
Jeremiah32:43 On mbi'i lesdi ndi'i ferwan
Jeremiah32:44 Ɓe coodan ɗe bee ceede
Jeremiah33:1 Saa'i nde Yeremiya ɗonno maɓɓi nder daldal saare laamiiɗo haa aynooɓe aynata
Jeremiah33:2 Jawmiraawo mo tagi duniyaaru
Jeremiah33:3 “Ewnam
Jeremiah33:4 Min Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah33:5 
Jeremiah33:6 Ammaa mi hurgan ngol
Jeremiah33:7 Mi wo'itinan joonde Yahuuda e Isra'iila
Jeremiah33:8 Mi laɓɓinan ɓe e aybeeji maɓɓe ɗi ɓe mbaɗno heedi am fuu
Jeremiah33:9 Urusaliima laatanto yam daliila seyo e maŋgtoore e tedduŋgal. Yimɓe ummaatooje duniyaaru fuu kulan
Jeremiah33:10 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Yimɓe mbi'i nokkuure nde'e ferwi
Jeremiah33:11 hoolo seyo e welwelo

Jeremiah33:13 Nder gure fuu
Jeremiah33:14 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i ɗon wara haa mi hiɓɓina iinaaji ɗi mi iinani yimɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda.
Jeremiah33:15 Saa'i man umminanmi goɗɗo mo danygol Daawuda bi'eteeɗo Fuɗŋgo
Jeremiah33:16 Saa'i man Yahuuda hisan
Jeremiah33:17 Min Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: Foroy goɗɗo danygol Daawuda jooɗoto dow leeso laamu Isra'iila.
Jeremiah33:18 Tum liman'en ɓe lenyol Lewi ndaroto yeeso am ngam lii'aago guleteeɗi e dokke nyaamdu e kirseteeɗi nyalaade nyalaade fuu.”
Jeremiah33:19 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah33:20 o wi'i mo: “On mbaawataa fiistugo alkawal am bee nyalawma
Jeremiah33:21 Bana non boo walaa mo waawata fiistugo alkawal am bee suka am Daawuda
Jeremiah33:22 Mi ɗuɗɗinan danygol suka am Daawuda e limgal liman'en Lewi'en jagganiiɓe yam
Jeremiah33:23 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah33:24 “A nani ko yimɓe mbi'ata na? Ɓe ɗon mbi'a: Jawmiraawo wudini yimɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda ɓe o suɓi naane. Ɓe ɗon njawo yimɓe am
Jeremiah33:25 Ammaa min Jawmiraawo mi haɓɓi alkawal bee nyalawma e bee jemma
Jeremiah33:26 Fakat bana mi tabitini ɗum
Jeremiah34:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya saa'i Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah34:2 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i Yeremiya: “Yah
Jeremiah34:3 An boo a daɗataa mo
Jeremiah34:4 An Sedekiya
Jeremiah34:5 A maayan nder de'ere. Bana yimɓe ngulno uurle ngam kaakiraaɓe ma laamiiɓe aartuɓe ma
Jeremiah34:6 Annabi Yeremiya lornani laamiiɗo Sedekiya bolle ɗe'e fuu haa Urusaliima.
Jeremiah34:7 Saa'i man honooɓe laamiiɗo Baabila ɗon kaɓa bee berniwol. Ɓe ɗon kaɓa boo bee Lakis e Azeka
Jeremiah34:8 Fahin Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah34:9 Ɓe narri koo moy yoofa maccuɗo mum Ibraniŋkeejo fuu e korɗo mum Ibraniŋkeejo
Jeremiah34:10 Ardiiɓe e ummaatoore fuu njaɓi alkawal nga'al ngam yoofugo maccuɓe e horɓe muuɗum'en
Jeremiah34:11 Ammaa ɓaawoɗon numooji maɓɓe ngayliti
Jeremiah34:12 Saa'i man Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya.
Jeremiah34:13 Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah34:14 Nde duuɓi joweeɗiɗi njaalti fuu
Jeremiah34:15 Onon boo
Jeremiah34:16 Ammaa jonta numooji mon ngayliti
Jeremiah34:17 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: On ɗowtanaaki yam
Jeremiah34:18 Ardiiɓe Yahuuda e Urusaliima e saraaki'en e liman'en e yimɓe lesdi fuu kaɓɓi alkawal yeeso am. Ɓe ta'i gaggel caka cak
Jeremiah34:19 
Jeremiah34:20 Mi hokkan ɓe haa konne'en maɓɓe yiɗɓe mbarugo ɓe. Ɓalli maɓɓe laatanto colli e dabbaaji ladde nyaamdu.
Jeremiah34:21 Mi hokkan Sedekiya
Jeremiah34:22 Mi umran ɓe ɓe lorto
Jeremiah35:1 Nder zamanu Yooyakim ɓii Yusiya
Jeremiah35:2 “Yah haa Rekabi'en
Jeremiah35:3 Yeremiya mooɓti Rekabi'en fuu
Jeremiah35:4 yahri ɓe haa haykaliiru
Jeremiah35:5 Nden Yeremiya jo'inani Rekabi'en njardukoy e bulki bee nguykinoojam
Jeremiah35:6 Ammaa ɓe njaabi: “Min njarataa nguykinoojam
Jeremiah35:7 O haɗi min boo mahugo cuuɗi e remugo lesdi e jubaago gese inabooje e marugo ɗe. O umri min min njooɗo nder cuuɗi laymaaji ngeendam amin fuu
Jeremiah35:8 Min ɗowtani umrooje Yonadabu ɓii Rekab
Jeremiah35:9 Min mahataa cuuɗi ngam jooɗaago ton. Min marataa inabooje
Jeremiah35:10 Min ɗon njooɗi haa cuuɗi laymaaji
Jeremiah35:11 Ammaa nde Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah35:12 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya.
Jeremiah35:13 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah35:14 Rekabi'en ɗowtani umroore kaakiraawo muuɗum'en Yonadabu ɓii Rekab
Jeremiah35:15 Mi tokki nelugo sukaaɓe am annabi'en haa mooɗon
Jeremiah35:16 Ɓiɓɓe Yonadabu ɓii Rekab ɗowtani umrooje kaakiraawo muuɗum'en
Jeremiah35:17 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah35:18 Nden Yeremiya wolwani Rekabi'en: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah35:19 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah36:1 Nder nduuɓu Yooyakim ɓii Yusiya
Jeremiah36:2 “Hoo'u deftere taggaande
Jeremiah36:3 Teema
Jeremiah36:4 Yeremiya ewni Baruku ɓii Neriya
Jeremiah36:5 Nden Yeremiya wi'i Baruku: “Ɓe kaɗi yam yahugo haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
Jeremiah36:6 Sey a yaha
Jeremiah36:7 Teema tornde maɓɓe yottoto Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah36:8 Nden Baruku ɓii Neriya yehi
Jeremiah36:9 Nder nduuɓu Yooyakim ɓii Yusiya
Jeremiah36:10 Baruku jaŋngi haa deftere bolle Yeremiya fuu haa noppi yimɓe ummaatoore. Ɗum laati nder haykaliiru
Jeremiah36:11 Mika ɓii Gemariya ɓii Safan nani bolle Jawmiraawo gonɗe nder deftere go.
Jeremiah36:12 O yehi haa saare laamiiɗo
Jeremiah36:13 Mika lornani ɓe ko o nani fuu nde Baruku jaŋngani ummaatoore ko winnda nder deftere.
Jeremiah36:14 Nden saraaki'en neli Yehuudi ɓii Netaniya ɓii Selemiya ɓii Kusi haa Baruku
Jeremiah36:15 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Jooɗa
Jeremiah36:16 Nde ɓe nani nde fuu
Jeremiah36:17 Nden ɓe ƴami mo: “Yeccu min
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku jaabi: “O anndini yam bolle ɗe'e fuu
Jeremiah36:19 Nden saraaki'en mbi'i mo: “Sey on nyukko
Jeremiah36:20 Saraaki'en ndesi deftere go haa suudu Eliisama
Jeremiah36:21 Laamiiɗo neli Yehuudi
Jeremiah36:22 Ɗum lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru
Jeremiah36:23 Nde Yehuudi jaŋngi jabbi tati koo nayi
Jeremiah36:24 Laamiiɗo e suka'en mum nanɓe bolle ɗe'e kultoraay
Jeremiah36:25 Elnatan e Delaya e Gemariya torino laamiiɗo taa o wula deftere
Jeremiah36:26 Nden o umri ɓiyiiko Yerahameel e Seraya ɓii Ajiriyel e Selemiya ɓii Abdeyel
Jeremiah36:27 Ɓaawo laamiiɗo wuli deftere nde Yeremiya anndinino Baruku
Jeremiah36:28 “Hoo'u deftere woɗnde
Jeremiah36:29 Waɗ annabaaku dow laamiiɗo Yooyakim: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: A wuli deftere nde'e
Jeremiah36:30 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah36:31 Mi hiitoto mo
Jeremiah36:32 Nden Yeremiya hoo'i deftere woɗnde
Jeremiah37:1 Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah37:2 Ammaa Sedekiya e suka'en mum e yimɓe lesdi ɗowtanaaki ko Jawmiraawo wi'i bee hunnduko annabi Yeremiya.
Jeremiah37:3 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya neli Yehukal ɓii Selemiya e Sefaniya ɓii Ma'aseya
Jeremiah37:4 Saa'i man Yeremiya ɗon waanca caka yimɓe tawon
Jeremiah37:5 Jama'aare konu Firawna wurtino Misra. Nde Kaldiya'en hippunooɓe Urusaliima nani haala ka'a
Jeremiah37:6 Jawmiraawo wolwani annabi Yeremiya:
Jeremiah37:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah37:8 Kaldiya'en loroto haa ɗo ngam honugo berniwol ngo'ol. Ɓe nyaaman ngol
Jeremiah37:9 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Taa pewane ko'e mon bee wi'ugo: Kaldiya'en accan en
Jeremiah37:10 Koo to on njaalake jama'aare Kaldiya'en honɓe on fuu
Jeremiah37:11 Jama'aare konu Kaldiya'en daayti
Jeremiah37:12 Saa'i man Yeremiya wurti Urusaliima
Jeremiah37:13 Ammaa nde o yotti Dammugal Benyamin
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya wi'i: “Ɗum fewre! Mi yiɗaa hawtango ɓe.” Ammaa Yiriya nananaay mo. O jogiti Yeremiya
Jeremiah37:15 Kamɓe ɓe tikkani Yeremiya
Jeremiah37:16 Ɓe njolli mo nder ngaska
Jeremiah37:17 Nden laamiiɗo Sedekiya neli ɗaɓɓitoygo mo. Nder saare maako o ƴami Yeremiya bee sirri: “Woodi wolde iwnde diga Jawmiraawo na?” Yeremiya jaabi: “Ooho
Jeremiah37:18 Nden Yeremiya ƴami laamiiɗo Sedekiya: “Aybewol ngole mbaɗmi dow maaɗa koo dow saraaki'en ma e ummaatoore ma haa on nastini yam nder fursina?
Jeremiah37:19 Toy annabi'en mon waɗɓe on annabaaku
Jeremiah37:20 Useni
Jeremiah37:21 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya umri ɓe maɓɓa Yeremiya haa daldal saare laamiiɗo haa aynooɓe aynata. Ton ɓe ndokka mo nyalɗe fuu tamseere diga Laawol Tamsooɓe
Jeremiah38:1 Sefatiya ɓii Mattan e Gedaliya ɓii Pashuuru e Yukal ɓii Selemiya e Pashuuru ɓii Malkiya nani ko Yeremiya wi'i yimɓe ummaatoore fuu
Jeremiah38:2 “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mo jooɗoto nder berniwol ngo'ol maayran bee konu malla weelo malla nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu. Ammaa mo wurtoto ngam hawtango Kaldiya'en
Jeremiah38:3 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi hokkan berniwol ngo'ol haa jama'aare konu laamiiɗo Baabila
Jeremiah38:4 Nden saraaki'en mbi'i laamiiɗo: “Sey gorko oo maaya! Bee wolwugo bana nii o ɗon tampina honooɓe luttuɓe nder berniwol men e non boo ummaatoore fuu. O ɗaɓɓataa salaaman ummaatoore nde'e
Jeremiah38:5 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya jaabi: “Ndaa mo haa juuɗe mon
Jeremiah38:6 Kamɓe ɓe koo'i Yeremiya
Jeremiah38:7 Ton nder saare laamiiɗo woodi Etiyopiyaajo saraakiijo
Jeremiah38:8 Ebed-Melek wurti saare laamiiɗo
Jeremiah38:9 “Barkaama
Jeremiah38:10 Nden laamiiɗo umri Ebed-Melek Etiyopiyaajo o hoo'a worɓe cappanɗe tato wonɓe ton
Jeremiah38:11 Ebed-Melek hoo'i worɓe man
Jeremiah38:12 Nden o wi'i Yeremiya: “Waɗ limce e leppi les naafɗe ma dow ɓoggi.” Yeremiya waɗi bana non.
Jeremiah38:13 Ɓe pooɗi mo bee ɓoggi
Jeremiah38:14 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya umri waddugo annabi Yeremiya haa maako haa dammugal haykaliiru Jawmiraawo tataɓal. O wi'i Yeremiya: “Mi yiɗi ƴamugo ma ƴamol gootol. Taa suuɗam koo ɗume.”
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya jaabi mo: “To mi wi'i ma gooŋga
Jeremiah38:16 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya hunani Yeremiya bee sirri
Jeremiah38:17 Nden Yeremiya wi'i Sedekiya: “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah38:18 Ammaa to a hawtanaay mawɓe laamiiɗo Baabila
Jeremiah38:19 Laamiiɗo Sedekiya wi'i Yeremiya: “Mi ɗon hula Yahuudu'en hawtanɓe Kaldiya'en. Teema Kaldiya'en ndokkatam haa juuɗe maɓɓe
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya jaabi: “A hokkataake haa juuɗe maɓɓe. Useni ɗowtana bolle Jawmiraawo ɗe mbi'maami. Nden kam a heɓan hayru
Jeremiah38:21 Ammaa ndaa ko Jawmiraawo yi'ni yam to a salake wurtaago:
Jeremiah38:22 Ɓe ngurtinan rewɓe luttuɓe nder saare laamiiɗo Yahuuda fuu haa mawɓe laamiiɗo Baabila. Ndaa ko rewɓe mbi'ata dow maaɗa: Sooba'en ma esti ma
Jeremiah38:23 Yeremiya ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Ɓe ngurtinan rewɓe ma e ɓikkoy ma fuu haa Kaldiya'en. An boo a daɗataa ɓe
Jeremiah38:24 Sedekiya jaabi Yeremiya: “Taata goɗɗo annda ko en mbolidi
Jeremiah38:25 To saraaki'en nani mi wolidi bee ma
Jeremiah38:26 nden kam yeccu ɓe no a tori yam
Jeremiah38:27 Saraaki'en fuu ngari haa Yeremiya
Jeremiah38:28 Yeremiya boo jooɗi haa daldal saare laamiiɗo haa aynooɓe aynata haa nyalaade Kaldiya'en nyaami Urusaliima.
Jeremiah39:1 Nder nduuɓu Sedekiya
Jeremiah39:2 Nder nduuɓu Sedekiya sappo e go'oowu
Jeremiah39:3 Nden mawɓe laamiiɗo Baabila fuu nasti
Jeremiah39:4 Nde Sedekiya
Jeremiah39:5 Ammaa jama'aare konu Kaldiya'en taasni ɓe
Jeremiah39:6 O umri hirsugo ɓiɓɓe Sedekiya yeeso maako. O umri hirsugo tedduɓe Yahuuda boo.
Jeremiah39:7 Nden o ɗoofi gite Sedekiya
Jeremiah39:8 Kaldiya'en nguli saare laamiiɗo e cuuɗi yimɓe
Jeremiah39:9 Nden Nebuzaradan
Jeremiah39:10 Walaa mo o acci
Jeremiah39:11 Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah39:12 “Hoo'u Yeremiya
Jeremiah39:13 Ngam man Nebuzaradan
Jeremiah39:14 neli ɗaɓɓitoygo Yeremiya haa daldal saare laamiiɗo haa aynooɓe aynata. Ɓe acci mo haa juŋngo Gedaliya ɓii Ahikam ɓii Safan
Jeremiah39:15 Saa'i Yeremiya ɗonno haɓɓi haa daldal saare laamiiɗo haa aynooɓe aynata
Jeremiah39:16 “Yah
Jeremiah39:17 Ammaa mi hisnete nyalaade man. A hokkataake haa juuɗe yimɓe ɓe kulata.
Jeremiah39:18 Mi aynete fakat
Jeremiah40:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah40:2 Hooreejo aynooɓe go umri waddugo Yeremiya
Jeremiah40:3 Jonta o timmini ko o wi'no
Jeremiah40:4 Jonta piistanmi callalluuji haa juuɗe ma
Jeremiah40:5 Ammaa Yeremiya dillaay tawon. Ngam maajum Nebuzaradan wi'i mo: “Lorta haa Gedaliya ɓii Ahikam ɓii Safan mo laamiiɗo Baabila waɗi ngomna dow gure Yahuuda. Jooɗoda bee maako caka yimɓe malla yah haa nokkuure koo ndeye fottanannde ma fuu.” Nden o hokki mo dokkal e njooɓaari laawol
Jeremiah40:6 Yeremiya yehi haa Gedaliya ɓii Ahikam
Jeremiah40:7 Nden mawɓe jama'aaje konu wonɓe nder ladde e honooɓe muuɗum'en nani laamiiɗo Baabila waɗi Gedaliya ɓii Ahikam ngomna lesdi fuu
Jeremiah40:8 Ngam maajum Isma'iilu ɓii Netaniya e Yohanan ɓii Kareha e Seraya ɓii Tanhumet e ɓiɓɓe Efay Netofaajo e Yaajaniya Ma'akatiijo
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya ɓii Ahikam ɓii Safan hunani ɓe: “Taa kule jagganaago Kaldiya'en. Njooɗe nder lesdi
Jeremiah40:10 Min mi jooɗoto haa Mispa
Jeremiah40:11 Yahuudu'en wonɓe haa Mo'ab e Ammoon e Edoom e lesɗe goɗɗe
Jeremiah40:12 Ngam maajum ɓe ngurti haa nokkuuje ɓe caŋkiti fuu
Jeremiah40:13 Ɓaawo man Yohanan ɓii Kareha e mawɓe konu woɗɓe go ngari haa Gedaliya haa Mispa
Jeremiah40:14 mbi'i: “A anndi na? Ba'alis
Jeremiah40:15 Nden Yohanan wi'i mo bee sirri: “Accu mi yaha
Jeremiah40:16 Ammaa Gedaliya jaabi mo: “Taa waɗ ɗum. Ko mbi'ɗa dow Isma'iilu
Jeremiah41:1 Nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru
Jeremiah41:2 Isma'iilu e worɓe mum sappo losi kaafaaje muuɗum'en
Jeremiah41:3 Nden Isma'iilu mbari Yahuudu'en wonduɓe bee Gedaliya haa Mispa fuu e honooɓe Kaldiya'en wonɓe ton.
Jeremiah41:4 Jaŋngo man
Jeremiah41:5 worɓe cappanɗe njoweetato ngari diga Sikem e Silo e Samariya. Ɓe laɓno bakkuɗe maɓɓe
Jeremiah41:6 Isma'iilu ɓii Netaniya wurti Mispa ngam fottugo bee maɓɓe
Jeremiah41:7 Nde ɓe nasti wuro
Jeremiah41:8 Ammaa woodi worɓe sappo caka maɓɓe ɓe mbi'i Isma'iilu: “Useni taa mbar min! Min nyukkini alkamaari e sa'iiruuri e nebbam e njumri nder gese.” Ngam man o acci ɓe
Jeremiah41:9 Ɓulndu ndu Isma'iilu sakkini ɓalli mbaraaɓe go nder muuɗum
Jeremiah41:10 Nden o naŋngi ɓiɓɓe laamiiɗo rewɓe e yimɓe luttuɓe haa Mispa ɓe Nebuzaradan
Jeremiah41:11 Ammaa Yohanan ɓii Kareha e mawɓe wonduɓe bee maako fuu nani kalluɗum ko Isma'iilu ɓii Netaniya waɗi.
Jeremiah41:12 Ɓe mooɓti worɓe maɓɓe fuu
Jeremiah41:13 Nde naŋngaaɓe Isma'iilu diga Mispa ngi'i Yohanan e mawɓe konu woɗɓe
Jeremiah41:14 
Jeremiah41:15 Ammaa Isma'iilu e worɓe njoweetato ndaɗi Yohanan
Jeremiah41:16 Nden Yohanan ɓii Kareha e mawɓe konu wonduɓe bee maako kooci honooɓe e rewɓe e ɓikkoy e suka'en laamiiɗo
Jeremiah41:17 ɓe ndilli. Ɓe njippi wakkati seɗɗa haa hoɗorde Kimham baŋnge Baytilaama. Ɓe annini yahugo haa Misra
Jeremiah41:18 ngam daaytaago bee Kaldiya'en. Ɓe kuli Kaldiya'en
Jeremiah42:1 Yohanan ɓii Kareha e Yejaniya. ɓii Hosa'ya e mawɓe konu woɗɓe fuu ngardi bee yimɓe mawɓe e leesɓe fuu
Jeremiah42:2 haa annabi Yeremiya
Jeremiah42:3 Ngam maajum tora Jawmiraawo haa o anndina min laawol ngol min tokkoto e ko min mbaɗata boo.”
Jeremiah42:4 Annabi Yeremiya jaabi ɓe: “Booɗɗum
Jeremiah42:5 Ɓe mbi'i Yeremiya: “Jawmiraawo laato ceedoowo gooŋɗuɗo koolniiɗo dow amin
Jeremiah42:6 Koo booɗɗum koo kalluɗum
Jeremiah42:7 Ɓaawo nyalɗe sappo
Jeremiah42:8 Yeremiya ewni Yohanan ɓii Kareha e mawɓe konu wonduɓe bee maako e yimɓe mawɓe e leesɓe fuu
Jeremiah42:9 wi'i ɓe: “Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo

Jeremiah43:1 Nde Yeremiya timmini yeccugo yimɓe ummaatoore ko Jawmiraawo Allah maɓɓe neli mo anndingo ɓe fuu
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya ɓii Hosa'ya e Yohanan ɓii Kareha e worɓe elewɓe fuu mbi'i mo: “A ɗon fewa! Jawmiraawo Allah amin nelaay ma wi'ugo min
Jeremiah43:3 Ammaa Baruku ɓii Neriya ummini ma dow amin
Jeremiah43:4 Bana non Yohanan e mawɓe konu fuu e ummaatoore fuu ɗowtanaaki Jawmiraawo umruɗo ɓe jooɗaago nder lesdi Yahuuda.
Jeremiah43:5 Yohanan e mawɓe konu fuu koo'i luttuɓe Yahuuda fuu
Jeremiah43:6 worɓe
Jeremiah43:7 Ɓe ɗowtanaaki umroore Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah43:8 Haa Tahapanes Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya
Jeremiah43:9 “Hoo'u kaa'e mawɗe
Jeremiah43:10 Nden yeccu ɓe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah43:11 O waran o hippo lesdi Misra. Mo hoddirana maayugo
Jeremiah43:12 Mi huɓɓan yiite nder cuuɗi ɗowanteeɓe Misra. Laamiiɗo Baabila wulan ɗowanteeɓe Misra malla o yahran ɓe haa Baabila. O laɓɓinan lesdi Misra bana gaynaako ittirta tenɗi haa limce mum. Ɓaawo man o hoota jam.
Jeremiah43:13 O yibbinan daŋraŋge cenaaɗe haa Bayti-Semes nder lesdi Misra
Jeremiah44:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya ngam Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi Misra fuu
Jeremiah44:2 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah44:3 Mi waɗi ɗum ngam yimɓe maaji kuuwi kuuɗe kalluɗe
Jeremiah44:4 Mi tokki nelugo suka'en am annabi'en haa maɓɓe
Jeremiah44:5 Ammaa kamɓe ɓe nanaay
Jeremiah44:6 Ngam man ndufmi tikkere am e ɓernuki am dow berniiji Yahuuda e laabi Urusaliima
Jeremiah44:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah44:8 Koni on tikkintammi bee kuuɗe mon
Jeremiah44:9 On ngejjiti zunuubaaji kaakiraaɓe mon na
Jeremiah44:10 Haa wargo hannde on leestinaay ko'e mon
Jeremiah44:11 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah44:12 Mi hoocan luttuɓe Yahuuda waɗɓe anniya yahugo Misra ngam faɓɓoygo ton
Jeremiah44:13 Mi hiitoto jooɗiiɓe nder Misra
Jeremiah44:14 Luttuɓe Yahuuda warɓe haa Misra ngam faɓɓoygo ton
Jeremiah44:15 Nden worɓe annduɓe rewɓe muuɗum'en ɗon ngulana ɗowanteeɓe woɗɓe uurle e mooɓre rewɓe hawtuɓe dariiɓe ton e Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe haa Paturus nder lesdi Misra
Jeremiah44:16 “Min nanataa ko mbi'ɗa min bee innde Jawmiraawo.
Jeremiah44:17 Fakat min mbaɗan ko min mbi'i fuu. Min ngulana ɗowanteeɗo debbo bi'eteeɗo Mayramjo Asama uurle
Jeremiah44:18 Ammaa diga min acci wulango Mayramjo Asama uurle e waɗango mo dokke dufeteeɗe
Jeremiah44:19 Rewɓe ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Saa'i min lii'ani Mayramjo Asama tamseeje nannduɗe jaati maako
Jeremiah44:20 Yeremiya wi'i ummaatoore fuu
Jeremiah44:21 “Uurle ɗe ngulɗon nder gure Yahuuda e dow laabi Urusaliima kam
Jeremiah44:22 Jawmiraawo waawaay munyango kuuɗe mon kalluɗe nyidduɗe. Ngam maajum lesdi mon laati winnde
Jeremiah44:23 On ngulani ɗowanteeɓe woɗɓe uurle
Jeremiah44:24 Nden Yeremiya wi'i ummaatoore e rewɓe fuu: “Nane wolde Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah44:25 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah44:26 Ammaa nane wolde Jawmiraawo jonta
Jeremiah44:27 Mi tiɗɗinan waɗugo on sarru
Jeremiah44:28 Ammaa yimɓe seɗɗa caka mooɗon ndaɗan kaafahi
Jeremiah44:29 Min Jawmiraawo mi hokkan on alaama haa anndon no bolle sarru ɗe anndinmi on ngooŋɗirta fakat.
Jeremiah44:30 Ndaa
Jeremiah45:1 Nder nduuɓu Yooyakim ɓii Yusiya
Jeremiah45:2 “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah45:3 a wi'i: Bone laatani yam! Jawmiraawo ɓesdi mettamɓeram dow naaworlaaji am. Mi somi uumugo
Jeremiah45:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yeremiya o yecca Baruku: “Mi yibbinan ko nyiɓmi
Jeremiah45:5 A ɗon ɗaɓɓana hoore ma kuuje mawɗe na? Taa ɗaɓɓu koo ɗume! Ndaa
Jeremiah46:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya ko laarani ummaatooje.
Jeremiah46:2 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Misra. O wolwi haala mooɓre konu Firawna Neko
Jeremiah46:3 Mawɓe konu Misra ɗon koola: “Kooce bawarɗe e ndarganaaje
Jeremiah46:4 Mbaate kirke dow pucci mon
Jeremiah46:5 Jawmiraawo ƴami: “Ɗume mi yi'ata? Koni ɓe ɗon ndiwna
Jeremiah46:6 Yaawɗotooɓe ndaɗataa
Jeremiah46:7 Ɗume ɓesdoto bana Niil
Jeremiah46:8 Misra ɗon ɓesdo bana Niil
Jeremiah46:9 Naste haɓre
Jeremiah46:10 Ammaa nyalaade nde'e woni nyalaade Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah46:11 Onon yimɓe Misra
Jeremiah46:12 Ummaatooje nani haala toskaare mon. Duniyaaru fuu nani bojji mooɗon. Cemmbiɗɗo oo ɗon fergo dow oya
Jeremiah46:13 Jawmiraawo wolwani annabi Yeremiya
Jeremiah46:14 “Ngooyne ɗum nder berniiji Misra
Jeremiah46:15 Ko waɗi ɗowanteeɗo mon mawɗo do'i? O ummitittaako. Jawmiraawo do'i mo.
Jeremiah46:16 Honooɓe mon ɗuuɗɓe pergi
Jeremiah46:17 Ndokke Firawna
Jeremiah46:18 Mi geeto. Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama woni innde am. Fakat bana mi geeto
Jeremiah46:19 Kaɓɓe kuuje mon ngam on ndaheteeɓe
Jeremiah46:20 Misra laatino bana wiige wooɗŋge
Jeremiah46:21 Koo honooɓe ɓe Misra hoosi haya boo laati bana nyalahoy paykoy. Kamɓe boo ɓe mbaawaay dartaago
Jeremiah46:22 Misra ɗon dogga bana mboodi
Jeremiah46:23 Ɓe ɗon pe'a laynde maari sukkunde nde goɗɗo waawataa nastugo
Jeremiah46:24 “Yimɓe Misra cemti
Jeremiah46:25 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah46:26 Mi hokkan ɓe haa juuɗe yimɓe yiɗɓe mbarugo ɓe
Jeremiah46:27 “Onon danygol suka am Yaakubu
Jeremiah46:28 Taa kule
Jeremiah47:1 Hiddeko Firawna haɓa bee Gaaza
Jeremiah47:2 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ndiyamji ɗon ɓesdo haa woyla
Jeremiah47:3 Ɓe nanan hoolo koloŋgi pucci e riggaaŋgo mootaaji pucci e hoolo pallooje maaji. Baabiraaɓe ngeecitittaako gal ɓikkoy muuɗum'en
Jeremiah47:4 Saa'i waɗi ngam halkugo Filistiya fuu
Jeremiah47:5 Mettamɓeram wari haa Gaaza
Jeremiah47:6 On ɗon ngooka: Kayto! Haa ndey kaafahi Jawmiraawo accata fiyugo? Lora nder suudu ma
Jeremiah47:7 Noy ki siwtorto to min Jawmiraawo umri ki? Mi neli ki ta'ugo Askalon e jooɗiiɓe haa fomoonde mbeela!” Ton o yahrata ki.
Jeremiah48:1 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Jeremiah48:2 Maŋngu Mo'ab majji. Haa Hesbon
Jeremiah48:3 Yimɓe ɗon ngooka haa Horonayim: Halkere e yibbere naawnde!
Jeremiah48:4 Mo'ab sampitaama! Nane no ɓikkoy mboyrata.
Jeremiah48:5 Nane hoolo bojji dogguɓe dow laawol wa'iiŋgol haa Lukit e gookaali bone dow laawol jippiiŋgol haa Horonayim.
Jeremiah48:6 Ɓe ɗon mbi'a: Ndogge
Jeremiah48:7 An Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:8 Nattinoowo ukkanto berniwol koo ngole
Jeremiah48:9 “Mbaɗane lesdi Mo'ab bileeji
Jeremiah48:10 Naaloore dow koo moy kuuwanɗo kuugal Jawmiraawo bee yeebaare. Naaloore dow naŋgtanɗo kaafahi mum e rufugo ƴiiƴam.
Jeremiah48:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Diga fuɗɗam Mo'ab jooɗi bee de'ere e hoolaare
Jeremiah48:12 
Jeremiah48:13 Nden Mo'abi'en cemtiran lawru Kemos
Jeremiah48:14 Onon worɓe Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:15 Kalkoowo lesdi Mo'ab wa'i dow berniiji maari
Jeremiah48:16 “Halkere Mo'ab ɓadake wargo
Jeremiah48:17 Onon heeddiɗɗiraaɓe Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:18 Onon jooɗiiɓe Dibon
Jeremiah48:19 Onon jooɗiiɓe haa Aro'er
Jeremiah48:20 Ɓe njaaboto: Lesdi Mo'ab nattinaama! Mboye ndi
Jeremiah48:21 Kiita wari dow berniiji ƴoolde
Jeremiah48:22 e Dibon e Nebo e Bayti-Dibilatayim
Jeremiah48:23 e Kiriyatayim e Bayti-Gamul e Bayti-Me'on
Jeremiah48:24 e Keriyot e Bosra e berniiji Mo'ab ɓadiiɗi e daayiiɗi fuu.
Jeremiah48:25 Baawɗe Mo'ab ta'i
Jeremiah48:26 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Nguykine Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:27 An Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:28 Onon jooɗiiɓe Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:29 Mo'ab ɗon mawnito masin. Mi nani no yimɓe maari mawnitori
Jeremiah48:30 Min Jawmiraawo mi anndi ƴaggaare maɓɓe. Njuka maɓɓe laati meere
Jeremiah48:31 Ngam maajum mboyanmi Mo'ab
Jeremiah48:32 Mi woyan yimɓe Sibama ko ɓuri yimɓe Ya'ajer. An berniwol Sibama
Jeremiah48:33 Seyo e welwelo majji nder lesdi Mo'ab ndimoori. Inaboojam acci ilugo e ɓiɗɗirɗe
Jeremiah48:34 Yimɓe Hesbon e El'ale ɗon mboya
Jeremiah48:35 Mi nattinan nder Mo'ab koo moy gulanɗo uurle haa towndiije e lii'antooɗo labbi mum kirseteeɗi.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah48:36 “Ngam maajum ɓernde am ɗon woya dow Mo'ab e yimɓe Kir-Heeres
Jeremiah48:37 Koo moy femmbi hoore mum
Jeremiah48:38 Dow soorooji lesdi Mo'ab e babe maari fuu
Jeremiah48:39 “Mo'ab nattinaama! Mboye! Lesdi Mo'ab toskake
Jeremiah48:40 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ummaatoore suuyan dow Mo'ab bana dutal ngal weeɗi bileeji mum.
Jeremiah48:41 Kiriyot nyaamaama
Jeremiah48:42 Mo'ab natti
Jeremiah48:43 Kultoreeŋgol e ngaska e tuuforgol laatanto on
Jeremiah48:44 “Dogguɗo kultoreeŋgol do'oto nder ngaska. Gurtiiɗo ngaska nastan tuuforgol. Ngam mi taynori hitaande hiitaago Mo'ab.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah48:45 “Dogguɓe tampi
Jeremiah48:46 Bone laatani Mo'ab! Yimɓe sujidanɓe Kemos kalki. Ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe worɓe e rewɓe laati haɓɓaaɓe dahaaɓe.
Jeremiah48:47 Ammaa haa timmoode balɗe ngartiranmi Mo'ab bana naane.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i. Kanjum woni kiita maako dow Mo'ab.
Jeremiah49:1 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Ammooni'en: “Woodaa worɓe haa Isra'iila na? Woodaa ronooɓe ton na? Koni sujidanooɓe lawru Milkom kooci lesdi lenyol Gada
Jeremiah49:2 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i ɗon wara haa mi nanna Ammooni'en nder berniwol Rabba hoolo konu. Ngol laatoto bille. Konne'en ngulan gure maagol bee yiite. Nden Isra'iila'en keɓtan lesdi muuɗum'en haa hoocuɓe ndi.
Jeremiah49:3 Onon yimɓe Hesbon
Jeremiah49:4 Onon yimɓe tuurtooɓe
Jeremiah49:5 Ndaa
Jeremiah49:6 “Ammaa ɓaawoɗon ngartiranmi joonde Ammooni'en dahaaɓe bana naane.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah49:7 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i dow Edoom: “Hikma jinni haa Teman na? Sarwooɓe Edoomi'en marɓe faamu ngalaa sawari na? Hikma maɓɓe majji na?
Jeremiah49:8 Onon yimɓe Dedan
Jeremiah49:9 To ittooɓe inabooje ngari haa mooɗon
Jeremiah49:10 Min mi ɓorti danygol Isuwa fuu
Jeremiah49:11 Acce atiime'en mon
Jeremiah49:12 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Koo yimɓe woɗɓe ɓe ke'aay hiiteego
Jeremiah49:13 Mi hunori innde am: Berniwol Bosra laatoto kulniiŋgol
Jeremiah49:14 Yeremiya wi'i: “Mi nani koŋngol iwŋgol haa Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah49:15 Mi leestinan on caka ummaatooje
Jeremiah49:16 On tammi ɗe ɗon kula on
Jeremiah49:17 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi laatinan lesdi Edoom daliila kultoreeŋgol. Koo moy caalotooɗo hultoran
Jeremiah49:18 
Jeremiah49:19 Mi waran bana mbarooga ngurtiiŋga laynde sukkunde baŋnge maayo Urdun
Jeremiah49:20 Ngam maajum nane ko min Jawmiraawo mi nufani yimɓe Edoom
Jeremiah49:21 Hoolo yibbere Edoom dimmbinan lesdi
Jeremiah49:22 Konne'en ukkanto Bosra bana dutal leeranŋgal haa dow. Nyalaade man semmbiɗɓe Edoom kulan bana debbo ɓesnanɗo.”
Jeremiah49:23 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Damas: “Yimɓe nder berniiji Hamat e Arpad ɗon caklo
Jeremiah49:24 Yimɓe Damas tampi
Jeremiah49:25 Kayya! Berniwol tedduŋgol ngo'ol
Jeremiah49:26 Nyalaade man
Jeremiah49:27 “Mi huɓɓan yiite dow mahi Damas
Jeremiah49:28 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow yimɓe Keedar e laamiiɓe berniwol Hacoor ɓe Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah49:29 Kooce cuuɗi laymaaji maɓɓe e dammooji maɓɓe
Jeremiah49:30 Onon yimɓe Hacoor
Jeremiah49:31 O wi'i: Umme
Jeremiah49:32 “Njaɓte geelooɗi maɓɓe
Jeremiah49:33 “Hacoor laatoto ladde meere
Jeremiah49:34 Nde Sedekiya fuɗɗi laamanaago Yahuuda
Jeremiah49:35 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Baawɗe yimɓe Elam
Jeremiah49:36 Mi umminan keni haa alkibilaaji nayi fuu
Jeremiah49:37 Mi hulnan Elami'en yeeso konne'en maɓɓe yiɗɓe mbarugo ɓe. Bee tikkere am saatunde ukkananmi ɓe sarru. Mi yoofa kaafahi
Jeremiah49:38 “Mi nattinan laamiiɓe e saraaki'en Elam
Jeremiah49:39 Ammaa haa timmoode balɗe ngartiranmi joonde Elam bana naane.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Jeremiah50:1 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i bee hunnduko annabi Yeremiya dow Baabila
Jeremiah50:2 “Anndine ɗum caka ummaatooje
Jeremiah50:3 Ummaatoore iwnde woyla wari haɓugo bee lesdi Baabila
Jeremiah50:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Wakkati man yimɓe Isra'iila e yimɓe Yahuuda kawtan
Jeremiah50:5 Ɓe ƴaman laawol Siyona
Jeremiah50:6 Yimɓe ummaatoore am laati bana baali majjuɗi. Waynaaɓe maɓɓe majjini ɓe dow kooseeje. Ɓe ngiili bana baali diga hooseere nde'e haa ndeya
Jeremiah50:7 Fottuɓe bee maɓɓe fuu ukkani ɓe. Konne'en maɓɓe mbi'i: Ko min mbaɗi
Jeremiah50:8 Onon yimɓe Isra'iila
Jeremiah50:9 Mi ɗon ummina mooɓgal ummaatooje mawɗe haa woyla
Jeremiah50:10 Lesdi Kaldiya laatoto keɓal konu
Jeremiah50:11 “Onon yimɓe Baabila
Jeremiah50:12 Lesdi mooɗon
Jeremiah50:13 Ngam daliila tikkere am
Jeremiah50:14 Onon fiɗooɓe kuri
Jeremiah50:15 Ummine gookaali konu nder taarde maagol fuu. Jonta berniwol Baabila yoofi balmi mum. Cuuɗi maagol cemmbiɗɗi ngibbi
Jeremiah50:16 Nattine aawooɓe e sodooɓe haa Baabila. Koo moy jooɗiiɗo ton hulan kaafahi
Jeremiah50:17 Yimɓe Isra'iila laati bana baali majjuɗi ɗi barooɗe ndiiwi. Laamiiɗo Assuura aarti nyaamugo ɓe. Haa ragare
Jeremiah50:18 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah50:19 Mi hooran yimɓe Isra'iila haa durduɗe muuɗum'en
Jeremiah50:20 Min Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: Wakkati man
Jeremiah50:21 “Ukkane yimɓe Meratayim e Pekoda
Jeremiah50:22 Hoolo konu ummi nder lesdi
Jeremiah50:23 Lesdi Baabila laati bana tappirɗum. Ndi tappi
Jeremiah50:24 An Baabila
Jeremiah50:25 Mi maɓɓiti sigordu balmi am
Jeremiah50:26 Umme diga alkibilaaji fuu! Ngare
Jeremiah50:27 
Jeremiah50:28 Nane haraka dogguɓe
Jeremiah50:29 Umre fiɗooɓe kuri ɓe ngara haa Baabila
Jeremiah50:30 Ngam maajum suka'en maagol njanan nder babe maagol
Jeremiah50:31 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “An Baabila
Jeremiah50:32 Nden ummaatoore ma ƴaggiinde fergoto
Jeremiah50:33 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Yimɓe Isra'iila e Yahuuda ɓe toonyaaɓe. Dahɓe ɓe fuu ɗon njogito ɓe
Jeremiah50:34 Ammaa kisnoowo ɓe o cemmbiɗɗo
Jeremiah50:35 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Kaafahi waran dow Kaldiya'en
Jeremiah50:36 Kaafahi waran dow waɗooɓe hatti maagol
Jeremiah50:37 Kaafahi fiyan pucci maagol e mootaaji pucci maagol. Kaafahi waran dow honooɓe maagol jananɓe
Jeremiah50:38 Hokkere waran dow ndiyamji maagol
Jeremiah50:39 Ngam maajum kuuje ladde e pobbi e dabbi njooɗodotto ton
Jeremiah50:40 Nattere Baabila laatoto bana nattere berniiji Sodoma e Gomorra e gure taariiɗe ɗi. Walaa mo jooɗoto ton
Jeremiah50:41 “Ndaa
Jeremiah50:42 Ɓe ɗon njogi lagaaje e labbe
Jeremiah50:43 Laamiiɗo Baabila nani habaru maɓɓe
Jeremiah50:44 Min Jawmiraawo mi waran bana mbarooga ngurtiiŋga laynde sukkunde baŋnge maayo Urdun
Jeremiah50:45 Ngam maajum nane ko min Jawmiraawo nufani berniwol Baabila
Jeremiah50:46 Hoolo yibbere Baabila dimmbinan lesdi
Jeremiah51:1 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi ɗon ummina henndu nattinooru Baabila e Kaldiya'en jooɗiiɓe ton.
Jeremiah51:2 Mi nelan jananɓe haa Baabila
Jeremiah51:3 Taa acce honooɓe Baabila tira lagaaje malla ɓorno sulke. Taa acce suka'en ndaɗa! Nattine mooɓre konu maɓɓe fuu!
Jeremiah51:4 Yuwaaɓe njanan
Jeremiah51:5 Min Allah Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama mi wudinaay Isra'iila e Yahuuda bana rewɓe yurumɓe koo nde lesdi maɓɓe heewi hakkeeji yeeso Ceniiɗo Isra'iila.
Jeremiah51:6 Ndogge Baabila
Jeremiah51:7 Berniwol Baabila laati jardugel kaŋŋeeri nder juŋngo am haa wuykina duniyaaru fuu. Ummaatooje njari nguykinoojam maagol
Jeremiah51:8 Jonta nii Baabila do'i
Jeremiah51:9 Jananɓe jooɗiiɓe ton mbi'i: Min muuyno yamɗitingo Baabila
Jeremiah51:10 Yimɓe Allah ɗon mbi'a: “Jawmiraawo gooŋɗini en. Ngare
Jeremiah51:11 Jawmiraawo ummini ɓerɗe laamiiɓe Mediya
Jeremiah51:12 Ɓaŋgte tuutawal konu ngam ukkanaago mahi Baabila! Cemmbiɗine aynol. Ndarne aynooɓe
Jeremiah51:13 Berniwol Baabila ɗon jooɗi kommbi maaje ɗuuɗɗe
Jeremiah51:14 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama hunori hoore muuɗum: “An Baabila
Jeremiah51:15 Jawmiraawo waɗi lesdi bee baawɗe mum
Jeremiah51:16 To o umri
Jeremiah51:17 Yimɓe fuu ɓe faataaɓe
Jeremiah51:18 Ɗi kuuje meereeje
Jeremiah51:19 Ammaa Allah laatiiɗo geɗal Yaakubu laataaki bana non. Kaŋko woni tagɗo kuuje fuu
Jeremiah51:20 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “An Baabila
Jeremiah51:21 Bee maaɗa tappirmi puccu e ba'iiɗo ngu
Jeremiah51:22 Bee maaɗa tappirmi gorko e debbo
Jeremiah51:23 Bee maaɗa tappirmi gaynaako e tokkere mum
Jeremiah51:24 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “On ngi'an no mi waatorto Baabila e yimɓe Kaldiya kalluɗum ko ɓe mbaɗi Siyona fuu.
Jeremiah51:25 An Baabila
Jeremiah51:26 Walaa koo'anɗo hayre haa bille maaɗa
Jeremiah51:27 “Ɓaŋgte tuutawal nder lesdi! Puufe luwal konu haa ummaatooje nana ɗum! Taaskitine ummaatooje ngam haɓre bee Baabila! Ewne laamuuji Araraada e Minni e Askanas
Jeremiah51:28 Taaskitine laamiiɓe Medi'en e ngomna'en maɓɓe e kaliifa'en maɓɓe e ummaatooje ɗe ɓe laamanto fuu. Taaskitine ummaatooje ɗe'e ngam haɓugo bee Baabila.
Jeremiah51:29 Lesdi ɗon dimmbo
Jeremiah51:30 Honooɓe Baabila acci haɓre
Jeremiah51:31 Waddooɓe habaru ɗon tokkotiri ngam anndingo laamiiɗo Baabila no konne'en kippake berniwol koo toy fuu.
Jeremiah51:32 Ɓe koo'i eerorɗe maayo
Jeremiah51:33 Halkere Baabila ɓadake. Ɗum laatoto bana goɗɗo taaskitinta laarre. Lutti seɗɗa
Jeremiah51:34 Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah51:35 Sey yimɓe Siyona mbi'a: “Toonyaare nde yimɓe Baabila toonyori min
Jeremiah51:36 Ngam maajum
Jeremiah51:37 Nden Baabila laatoto waagaare kaa'e e jooɗorde cuuli. Woodaa mo jooɗoto ton. Caalotooɗo fuu hultoran
Jeremiah51:38 Yimɓe Baabila fuu ɗon ubba bana barooɗe
Jeremiah51:39 Nde suuno naŋngi ɓe
Jeremiah51:40 Bana njawkon
Jeremiah51:41 “Sesak
Jeremiah51:42 Mbeela wa'i
Jeremiah51:43 Gure maagol perwi
Jeremiah51:44 Mi hiitoto Beel
Jeremiah51:45 Onon yimɓe Isra'iila
Jeremiah51:46 Taa ɓerɗe mon ta'a
Jeremiah51:47 Ngam maajum saa'i ɗon wara haa mi hiito labbi Baabila cehaaɗi. Lesdi fuu toskoto
Jeremiah51:48 Nden asama e lesdi e ko woni nder maajum fuu mbelmbeltan ngam Baabila
Jeremiah51:49 
Jeremiah51:50 “Onon daɗɓe kaafahi
Jeremiah51:51 On ɗon mbi'a: Min toski bee nanugo jancooɓe
Jeremiah51:52 Ngam maajum mbi'anmi: Saa'i ɗon wara haa mi hiito labbi Baabila cehaaɗi
Jeremiah51:53 Koo to Baabila eeŋgi haa yotto asama
Jeremiah51:54 “Nane gookaali diga Baabila e hoolo yibbere mawnde nder lesdi Kaldiya'en.
Jeremiah51:55 Jawmiraawo ɗon wila Baabila
Jeremiah51:56 Ɓe ngari nattingo Baabila. Semmbiɗɓe maagol kaɓɓaama
Jeremiah51:57 O wuykinan ardiiɓe maagol e hikma'en maagol
Jeremiah51:58 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Konne'en ngibbinan mahi Baabila tekkuɗi fuu
Jeremiah51:59 Seraya ɓii Neriya ɓii Mahaseya wonno saraakiijo ɓadiiɗo laamiiɗo Sedekiya. Nder nduuɓu Sedekiya
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya winndino haala sarru ngu tammi ukkanaago Baabila fuu
Jeremiah51:61 Nden o wi'i Seraya: “To a yottake Baabila
Jeremiah51:62 Nden waɗ do'a ni'i: Yaa Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah51:63 An Seraya
Jeremiah51:64 nden wi': Bana nii Baabila yollorto
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiya woodi duuɓi noogas e go'o
Jeremiah52:2 O waɗi kalluɗum yeeso Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah52:3 Ɗum waɗi non ngam Jawmiraawo tikkani Urusaliima e Yahuuda haa o riiwi ɓe daayiiɗum bee maako. Sedekiya boo tuurtani laamiiɗo Baabila.
Jeremiah52:4 Nder nduuɓu laamu Sedekiya njoweenayaɓu
Jeremiah52:5 Berniwol ngo'ol hippaama haa yotti nduuɓu laamiiɗo Sedekiya sappo e go'oowu.
Jeremiah52:6 Nyannde joweenayaɓre nder lewru nayaɓru
Jeremiah52:7 Kaldiya'en cumpiti mahol berniwol. Nde jemma waɗi
Jeremiah52:8 Ammaa jama'aaje konu Kaldiya'en taasni mo
Jeremiah52:9 Ɓe naŋngi laamiiɗo
Jeremiah52:10 Laamiiɗo Baabila umri hirsugo ɓiɓɓe Sedekiya yeeso maako. O umri hirsugo mawɓe Yahuuda boo.
Jeremiah52:11 Nden o umri ɓe ɗoofa gite Sedekiya
Jeremiah52:12 Nder nduuɓu laamu Nabukodonosor
Jeremiah52:13 O wuli haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e saare laamu e cuuɗi Urusaliima e cuuɗi mawɓe fuu.
Jeremiah52:14 Jama'aare konu Kaldiya'en fuu e hooreejo aynooɓe ngibbini mahi taariiɗi Urusaliima.
Jeremiah52:15 Yimɓe luttuɓe
Jeremiah52:16 Ammaa o acci laafuɓe woɗɓe nder lesdi haa ɓe laato remooɓe inabooje e gese.
Jeremiah52:17 Kaldiya'en pusi daŋraŋge njamndi mboɗeeri haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e jo'inirɗe e loonde njamndi mboɗeeri wonnde haa daldal haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah52:18 Ɓe kooci boo kuuje ɗe njamndi mboɗeeri kuuwtinirteeɗe ngam dewal
Jeremiah52:19 Hooreejo aynooɓe go hooci boo daarooje
Jeremiah52:20 Daŋraŋge ɗiɗi e loonde go bee ga'i sappo e ɗiɗi ɗi njamndi mboɗeeri les maaru e jo'inirɗe ɗe laamiiɗo Suleymaanu waɗno ngam haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
Jeremiah52:21 Towirka daŋraŋgal gootal waɗi meetir joweenayi. Ɓoggol ngol meetir joweego taaroto ngal. Ngal cookal
Jeremiah52:22

Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradan

Ezekiel6:13 Nden on paaman min mi Jawmiraawo
Ezekiel6:14 Mi fortan juŋngo am ngam honugo ɓe
Ezekiel7:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel7:2 “Ɓii-Aadama

Ezekiel7:4 Mi laarataa on bee enɗam sam
Ezekiel7:5 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Sarru dow sarru! Ndaa ngu ɗon wara!
Ezekiel7:6 Timmoode ɗon wara
Ezekiel7:7 Onon yimɓe lesdi
Ezekiel7:8 Jonta mi ɓadi rufugo ɓernuki am dow mooɗon
Ezekiel7:9 Mi laarataa on bee enɗam
Ezekiel7:10 Ndaa nyalaade go! Ndaa
Ezekiel7:11 toonyaare ɗon ummo ngam laataago ɓoccol halleende. Ɓe majji
Ezekiel7:12 Wakkati yottake
Ezekiel7:13 Coorroowo heɓtataa ko soorri
Ezekiel7:14 Ɓe puufan luwal
Ezekiel7:15 Haa yaasi

Ezekiel7:18 Ɓe ɓornoto limce buhuuje
Ezekiel7:19 Ɓe ngudinan cardi maɓɓe haa laabi
Ezekiel7:20 Ɓe mantori kuuje maɓɓe marɗe saman
Ezekiel7:21 Mi hokkan ɗum haa juuɗe jananɓe
Ezekiel7:22 Mi wiirnan ɓe gite am
Ezekiel7:23 Waɗ callallu! Ngam lesdi heewi aybeeji dufki ƴiiƴam
Ezekiel7:24 Mi waddan ummaatooje ɓurɗe hallugo

Ezekiel7:26 Sarru dow sarru
Ezekiel7:27 Laamiiɗo sunoto
Ezekiel8:1 Nder nduuɓu joweego'oowu

Ezekiel8:4 Tedduŋgal Allah Isra'iila boo ɗon ton

Ezekiel8:6 O wi'i yam: “Ɓii-Aadama

Ezekiel8:8 O wi'i yam: “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel8:9 O wi'i yam: “Nastu
Ezekiel8:10 Mi nasti

Ezekiel8:14 Nden o yahri yam haa nastirde dammugal ngal daldal haykaliiru Jawmiraawo

Ezekiel8:17 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel8:18 Ngam maajum maatinanmi ɓe tikkere am. Mi laarataa ɓe bee enɗam
Ezekiel9:1 Nden nanmi Jawmiraawo towni sawtu
Ezekiel9:2 Ndaa worɓe njoweego ɗon ngara dow laawol iwŋgol dammugal ɓaŋgiiŋgal tiitanŋgal woyla
Ezekiel9:3 Tedduŋgal Allah Isra'iila ummi diga keruba'en
Ezekiel9:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Saala caka berniwol Urusaliima
Ezekiel9:5 Nden mi nani o wi'i woɗɓe: “Tokke mo nder berniwol
Ezekiel9:6 Mbare nayeeɓe e sukaaɓe e faanyɓe rewɓe e ɓikkoy e rewɓe. Ammaa marɗo maandorde fuu taa meeme mo. Puɗɗe haa suudu am seniindu!” Ɓe puɗɗi bee ndotti'en wonɓe yeeso haykaliiru.
Ezekiel9:7 O wi'i ɓe: “Coɓne haykaliiru
Ezekiel9:8 Saa'i ɓe ɗon mbara

Ezekiel9:10 Ngam maajum min boo mi enɗataa

Ezekiel10:1 Mi laari fahin. Haa dow kippol

Ezekiel10:19 Mi laari keruba'en ɓaŋgti bileeji muuɗum'en
Ezekiel10:20 Ɗum tagle geete ɗe ngi'noomi les Allah Isra'iila
Ezekiel10:21 Koo moy maɓɓe woodi geese nayi e bileeji nayi e ko nanndi bee juuɗe neɗɗo ɗon les bileeji maɓɓe.
Ezekiel10:22 Geese maɓɓe nanndi bee ɗe ngi'noomi haa maayo Kebar. Ɗum kamɓe man. Koo moy maɓɓe tiiti yeeso muuɗum cir.

Ezekiel16:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel16:2 “Anndin berniwol Urusaliima haala kuuɗe maagol nyidduɗe.
Ezekiel16:3 Yeccu ngol: Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i ma: An Urusaliima
Ezekiel16:4 Haa danyeeki ma
Ezekiel16:5 Walaa koo gooto yurmini ma haa o waɗane irin kuuɗe ɗe'e
Ezekiel16:6 Mi saali
Ezekiel16:7 Mi mawnini ma! Mi laatini ma bana fuɗŋgo ladde. A mawni
Ezekiel16:8 Kadiboo mi saali
Ezekiel16:9 “Mi yiiwi ma
Ezekiel16:10 Mi ɓorni ma limce tuppitaaɗe
Ezekiel16:11 Mi hokki ma fawne e jawe ngam juuɗe ma e koɗel ngam daande ma
Ezekiel16:12 mi waɗi halagaare haa kine ma e yerihon haa noppi ma
Ezekiel16:13 Bana nii a pawniiɗo bee cardi e kaŋŋeeri
Ezekiel16:14 Innde ma saŋkiti haa ummaatooje ngam daliila ŋarol ma
Ezekiel16:15 “Ammaa a ɓaari ŋarol ma. Ɗuuɗɓe maŋgti ma
Ezekiel16:16 A hoo'i limce ma marɗe noone feere feere
Ezekiel16:17 Fawne ma booɗɗe baɗaaɗe bee cardi am e kaŋŋeeri am ndi ndokkumaami
Ezekiel16:18 A hoo'i limce ma tuppitaaɗe
Ezekiel16:19 Non boo nyaamdu am ndu ndokkumaami
Ezekiel16:20 “A hoo'i ɓiɓɓe ma worɓe e rewɓe ɓe ndanyanɗa mi
Ezekiel16:21 a hirsi ɓikkoy am
Ezekiel16:22 Nder kuuɗe ma nyidduɗe e daakaareeku ma fuu ngejjititɗa wakkati a ɓiŋngelno
Ezekiel16:23 Ɓaawo halleende ma nde'e fuu – Kayto! Bone laatanto ma”
Ezekiel16:24 “Ɓaawoɗon
Ezekiel16:25 A nyiɓi nokkuuje towɗe haa kawtirɗe laabi koo ɗeye
Ezekiel16:26 A waɗi daakaareeku bee heeddiɗɗiraaɓe ma Misra'en mawna-jakari'en
Ezekiel16:27 Ndaa mi forti juŋngo am dow maaɗa
Ezekiel16:28 A waɗi daakaareeku bee Assuura'en
Ezekiel16:29 A ɗuɗɗini daakaareeku ma haa Baabila
Ezekiel16:30 Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Kayya
Ezekiel16:31 A waɗi waagaare lesdi ngam waɗugo daakaareeku haa kawtirɗe laabi fuu
Ezekiel16:32 An debbo jeenoowo
Ezekiel16:33 Rewɓe daakaare'en fuu keɓan caahuuji. Ammaa an a hokki caahuuji ma haa waaye'en ma fuu
Ezekiel16:34 An a luuti dabare rewɓe daakaare'en woɗɓe fuu. Walaa mo ɗaɓɓiti ma. A jaɓaay ngeenaari
Ezekiel16:35 Ngam maajum
Ezekiel16:36 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “A sudditi les maaɗa
Ezekiel16:37 Ngam maajum mi mooɓtan waaye'en ma ɓe pottanɗa fuu
Ezekiel16:38 Mi hiitete kiita rewɓe jeenooɓe e rufooɓe ƴiiƴam
Ezekiel16:39 Mi hokkete haa juuɗe maɓɓe. Ɓe mbilan waagaare lesdi ma
Ezekiel16:40 Ɓaawo maajum ɓe mooɓtan yimɓe dow maaɗa
Ezekiel16:41 Ɓe ngulan cuuɗi ma
Ezekiel16:42 Bana non peewtiniranmi ɓernde am e accanmi kaajal am. Mi de'itan
Ezekiel16:43 Nde nii a siftoraay wakkati nderkaaku ma
Ezekiel16:44 Baɗoowo balndi fuu waɗan balndol ngo'ol bee maaɗa: Bana daada wa'i
Ezekiel16:45 A ɓii debbo jawiiɗo gorum e ɓiyum'en. A deerɗu deerɗa'en yawiiɓe worɓe muuɗum'en e ɓikkoy muuɗum'en. Daada mon o Hetiijo
Ezekiel16:46 Adda ma
Ezekiel16:47 Tokkaago laabi maɓɓe e kuuɗe maɓɓe nyidduɗe he'aay ma
Ezekiel16:48 Bana min Allah Jawmiraawo mi geeto
Ezekiel16:49 Halleende deerɗa Sodoma
Ezekiel16:50 Ɓe mawnitiiɓe
Ezekiel16:51 Samariya waɗaay koo reeta hakkeeji maaɗa. Kuuɗe ma nyidduɗe ɓuri ɗe maako ɗuuɗugo. Ngam daliila kuuɗe maaɗa nyidduɗe fuu
Ezekiel16:52 Sey an boo a roondo toskaare ma jonta
Ezekiel16:53 Ammaa mi wartiran joonde maɓɓe bana naane
Ezekiel16:54 ngam a roondo toskaare ma
Ezekiel16:55 Deerɗa'en Sodoma e Samariya bee ɓiɓɓe muuɗum'en rewɓe laatoto bana naane. Nden an boo bee ɓiya'en rewɓe
Ezekiel16:56 Saa'i a mawnitiiɗono
Ezekiel16:57 Saa'i man halleende maaɗa waŋgaayno tawon. Jonta rewɓe Edoom e heeddiɗɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en fuu ɗon kuɗe
Ezekiel16:58 Sey a roondo kiita kuuɗe ma nyidduɗe cemtiniiɗe.” Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Ezekiel16:59 Ngam ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi waɗete fodde kuuɗe ma
Ezekiel16:60 Ammaa min mi yejjitittaa alkawal ngal kaɓɓumi bee maaɗa saa'i a paanyono. Mi tabitinan alkawal duumiiŋgal bee maaɗa.
Ezekiel16:61 An boo a siftoran kuuɗe ma caaliiɗe. A semtan to deerɗa'en ngari haa maaɗa
Ezekiel16:62 Min mi haɓɓan alkawal bee maaɗa
Ezekiel16:63 ngam haa a siftora ko saali
Ezekiel17:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel17:2 “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel17:3 Wi' ɓe: Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: Dutal maŋngal bee bileeji juutɗi
Ezekiel17:4 yahri lisal keccal nga'al haa lesdi filooɓe
Ezekiel17:5 Nden dutal hoo'i leggel keccel haa lesdi
Ezekiel17:6 Ngel naŋgti
Ezekiel17:7 Woodi dutal feere maŋngal
Ezekiel17:8 asee boo ki dari nder ngesa mbooɗka bee ndiyam ɗuuɗɗam
Ezekiel17:9 Ngam maajum min Allah Jawmiraawo mi ɗon ƴama: Inabohi bana maaki waɗan ɓenndalooje ɗuuɗɗe na? Dutal aranal ɗoofataa ɗaɗi maaki na? Ngal sammintaa ɓiɓɓe maaki
Ezekiel17:10 Ki naŋgti. Ammaa ki waɗan ɓenndalooje ɗuuɗɗe na? To henndu fuunaaŋge faɗɗi ki
Ezekiel17:11 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel17:12 “Yeccu tuurtooɓe ɓe'e: On anndaa ko ɗum saawi na? Yeccu ɓe: Ndaa
Ezekiel17:13 Nden o hoo'i goɗɗo mo danygol laamiiɗo
Ezekiel17:14 ngam o famɗitina laamu
Ezekiel17:15 Ammaa laamiiɗo Yahuuda tuurtani mo
Ezekiel17:16 Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Fakat bana mi geeto
Ezekiel17:17 Koo Firawna bee jama'aare konu mum ɗuuɗnde boo waawataa wallugo mo
Ezekiel17:18 O yawi hunayeere
Ezekiel17:19 Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Fakat bana mi geeto
Ezekiel17:20 Mi we'itan zubaawol am dow maako
Ezekiel17:21 Honooɓe maako suɓaaɓe maayran bee kaafahi
Ezekiel17:22 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Min boo mi hoo'an lisel keccel ɓurŋgel towugo haa lekki cemmbiɗki
Ezekiel17:23 dow hooseere ɓurnde towugo nder lesdi Isra'iila. Ngel wilitan
Ezekiel17:24 Nden leɗɗe fuu nder lesdi paaman min woni Jawmiraawo. Mi fe'an leɗɗe towɗe
Ezekiel18:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel18:2 “Koni on tokkoto waɗugo balndol ngo'ol nder lesdi Isra'iila
Ezekiel18:3 Fakat bana min Allah Jawmiraawo mi geeto
Ezekiel18:4 Yoŋki koo moy
Ezekiel18:5 Ndaare goɗɗo adiliijo
Ezekiel18:6 mo nyaamataa kirsanaaɗum labbi dow kooseeje
Ezekiel18:7 O toonyataa goɗɗo
Ezekiel18:8 O hokkataa nyamaande bee ndiyam sam. O saloto waɗugo kalluɗum
Ezekiel18:9 O ɗowtanto umrooje am
Ezekiel18:10 “Ammaa teema o danyi ɓiɗɗo pasoowo
Ezekiel18:11 ɗe baaba mum meeɗaay huuwugo. O ɗon nyaama kirsanaaɗum labbi dow kooseeje
Ezekiel18:12 O ɗon toonya laafuɓe
Ezekiel18:13 O ɗon hokka nyamaande bee ndiyam
Ezekiel18:14 Ammaa teema o danyi ɓiɗɗo
Ezekiel18:15 o nyaamaay kirsanaaɗum labbi dow kooseeje
Ezekiel18:16 o toonyaay goɗɗo
Ezekiel18:17 O waɗaay halleende
Ezekiel18:18 Ɗum baaba maako toonyino woɗɓe
Ezekiel18:19 Ammaa onon on ɗon mbi'a: Ngam ɗume ɓiɗɗo yarataa bone ngam hakkeeji baaba mum? Ngam ɓiɗɗo waɗi gooŋgaaku e adilaaku. O ɗowtani farillaaji am fuu
Ezekiel18:20 Baɗɗo hakke
Ezekiel18:21 To kalluɗo acci waɗugo hakkeeji fuu
Ezekiel18:22 Mi siftortaa hakkeeji maako sam. O yeeɗan ngam daliila kuuɗe adiliije ɗe o huuwi.
Ezekiel18:23 Min Allah Jawmiraawo mi ɗon ƴama on: Kadi mi seyorto maayde kalluɗo na? Walaa
Ezekiel18:24 Ammaa to adiliijo acci adilaaku mum
Ezekiel18:25 Ammaa on ɗon mbi'a: Laawol Jawmiraawo fottaay. Nane
Ezekiel18:26 To adiliijo acci adilaaku mum
Ezekiel18:27 To kalluɗo acci halleende mum
Ezekiel18:28 To o annditi tuurtolji maako
Ezekiel18:29 Ammaa onon yimɓe Isra'iila'en on ɗon mbi'a: Laawol Jawmiraawo fottaay. On ɗon numa laabi am pottaay na? Kayya

Ezekiel18:31 Acce tuurtolji mon fuu

Ezekiel19:3 O mawnini ɓiŋngel gootel caka maakoy
Ezekiel19:4 Yimɓe ummaatooje nani habaru maaga
Ezekiel19:5 Daada reeni haa somi

Ezekiel19:7 Nga ɗon fusa laamorɗe maɓɓe cemmbiɗɗe
Ezekiel19:8 Ummaatooje taariiɗe fuu ngari
Ezekiel19:9 Nden ɓe ndasi nga

Ezekiel20:1 Nder nduuɓu njoweeɗiɗaɓu
Ezekiel20:2 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel20:3 “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel20:4 Nden o tokki wi'ugo: “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel20:5 Yeccu ɓe: Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: Nyalaade nde mi suɓi Isra'iila
Ezekiel20:6 Nyalaade man mi ɓaŋgti juŋngo
Ezekiel20:7 Mi umri ɓe ngudina labbi maɓɓe nyidduɗi estanɗi ɓe

Ezekiel20:10 Mi wurtini ɓe lesdi Misra
Ezekiel20:11 Mi anndini ɓe farillaaji am
Ezekiel20:12 Mi hokki ɓe nyalɗe ciwtorɗe boo
Ezekiel20:13 Ammaa yimɓe Isra'iila tuurtani yam nder ladde. Ɓe ɗowtanaaki farillaaji am
Ezekiel20:14 Ammaa mi waɗaay ɗum
Ezekiel20:15 Fahin mi hunani ɓe nder ladde
Ezekiel20:16 Ngam ɓe njawi farillaaji am
Ezekiel20:17 Ammaa mi enɗi ɓe. Mi mbaraay ɓe
Ezekiel20:18 Mi yecci ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe nder ladde: Taa tokke umrooje baabiraaɓe mon
Ezekiel20:19 Min woni Allah Jawmiraawo mooɗon. Ɗowtane farillaaji am e kiitaaji am.
Ezekiel20:20 Cene nyalɗe ciwtorɗe ɗe ndarnumi
Ezekiel20:21 “Ammaa ɓikkoy boo tuurtani yam. Ɓe ɗowtanaaki farillaaji am
Ezekiel20:22 Ammaa mi halkaay ɓe
Ezekiel20:23 Nder ladde boo
Ezekiel20:24 ngam ɓe ɗowtanaaki farillaaji am
Ezekiel20:25 Nden mi hokki ɓe farillaaji kalluɗi e kiitaaji ɗi ngeeɗintaa ɗowtaniiɓe ɗi.
Ezekiel20:26 Mi soɓni ɓe bee dokke maɓɓe
Ezekiel20:27 Ngam maajum
Ezekiel20:28 Mi nastini ɓe nder lesdi ndi kuniimi hokkugo ɓe. Nde ɓe ngi'i towndiije e leɗɗe cukkuɗe
Ezekiel20:29 Mi ƴami ɓe: Nokkuure townde nde njahoton
Ezekiel20:30 Ngam maajum yeccu yimɓe Isra'iila ni'i: Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: Onon on coɓni ko'e mooɗon bee tokkaago ko kaakiraaɓe mooɗon mbaɗno
Ezekiel20:31 Haa wargo hannde on ɗon coɓna ko'e mon
Ezekiel20:32 On nufi laataago bana ummaatooje goɗɗe
Ezekiel20:33 Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Fakat bana mi geeto
Ezekiel20:34 Mi wurtinan on nder ummaatooje
Ezekiel20:35 Mi yahran on nder ladde. Ton ndarnanmi on yeeso am
Ezekiel20:36 Mi ta'anan on kiita bana kuuwrumi kaakiraaɓe mon nder ladde Misra.” Non Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i.
Ezekiel20:37 “Mi saalinan on les sawru am
Ezekiel20:38 Mi wurtinan tuurtaniiɓe yam e mbarooɓe ko'e caka mooɗon. Mi wurtinan ɓe lesdi ndi ɓe ngoni jonta
Ezekiel20:39 Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Onon yimɓe Isra'iila
Ezekiel20:40 Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Haa ton dow hooseere am seniinde

Ezekiel20:42 Mi hooran on haa lesdi Isra'iila ndi kuniimi hokkugo kaakiraaɓe mon. Nden kam on paaman min woni Jawmiraawo.
Ezekiel20:43 Ton on ciftoran kuuɗe mon coɓnuɗe on fuu. On ndaaran ko'e mon on nyidduɓe ngam kuuɗe mon kalluɗe ɗe kuuwɗon fuu.
Ezekiel20:44 Onon yimɓe Isra'iila

Ezekiel23:39 Ɓe kirsi ɓikkoy maɓɓe

Ezekiel25:5 Mi wartiran berniwol Rabba durduɗe geelooɗi
Ezekiel25:6 Ngam ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “On kelli juuɗe mon
Ezekiel25:7 Ngam maajum portanmi juŋngo am
Ezekiel25:8 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mo'ab e Se'ir mbi'i: Yimɓe Yahuuda foti kal bee ummaatooje goɗɗe!
Ezekiel25:9 Ngam maajum maɓɓitanmi keerol lesdi Mo'ab
Ezekiel25:10 Mi accan yimɓe ladde fuunaaŋge nyaama lesdi Mo'ab e lesdi Ammoon
Ezekiel25:11 Mi hiitoto yimɓe Mo'ab. Nden ɓe paaman min woni Jawmiraawo.”
Ezekiel25:12 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Yimɓe Edoom koni yimɓe Yahuuda bee suuno waataago. Bana nii ɓe laatori aybuɓe masin.
Ezekiel25:13 Ngam maajum min Allah Jawmiraawo mi fortan juŋngo am ngam honugo lesdi Edoom
Ezekiel25:14 Mi waatoto Edoom bee juuɗe Isra'iila'en
Ezekiel25:15 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Filisti'en koni saare Yahuuda bee suuno waataago e nganyŋgu diga ɓooyma. Ɓe mbaati ɓe bee caatal ngam halkugo ɓe.
Ezekiel25:16 Ngam maajum min Allah Jawmiraawo mi fortan juŋngo am ngam honugo Filisti'en. Mi nattinan Kereti'en e luttuɓe jooɗiiɓe haa fomoonde mbeela.
Ezekiel25:17 Mi fiyan ɓe bee tikkere
Ezekiel26:1 Nder nduuɓu sappo e go'oowu
Ezekiel26:2 “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel26:3 Ngam maajum min Allah Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: An berniwol Tirus
Ezekiel26:4 Ɗe pusan mahi taariiɗi ma
Ezekiel26:5 Naŋngooɓe liɗɗi ndiiran zubaaji muuɗum'en dow maaje caka mbeela. Min Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i ɗum. Ummaatooje njaɓtan kuuje maagol
Ezekiel26:6 mbaran yimɓe gure maagol gonɗe haa fomoonde bee kaafahi. Nden kam Tirus faaman min woni Jawmiraawo.”
Ezekiel26:7 Ngam ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi waddan Nabukodonosor
Ezekiel26:8 Honooɓe maako mbaran yimɓe gure maaɗa gonɗe haa fomoonde bee kaafahi. Ɓe taarnete bee kuuje kipporɗe
Ezekiel26:9 Nden ɓe ɓadinan kuuje ceekruɗe haa mahol ma
Ezekiel26:10 Pucci maɓɓe umminan collaaje ɗuuɗɗe
Ezekiel26:11 Kororamje pucci maɓɓe ndamman buuwi ma
Ezekiel26:12 Ɓe njaɓtan riskuuji ma e kuuje filu ma. Ɓe ngibbinan mahi ma
Ezekiel26:13 Mi je'inan gimi ma e hoolo moolooji ma.
Ezekiel26:14 Mi laatinte tapaare sookre
Ezekiel26:15 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i berniwol Tirus: “Saa'i do'ere ma
Ezekiel26:16 Laamiiɓe ummaatooje haa mbeela fuu njippoto leese laamu muuɗum'en. Ɓe ɓortan ngapaleeji maɓɓe e alkibbaaje maɓɓe tuppitaaɗe
Ezekiel26:17 Ɓe ngiman gimol boyki ngo'ol dow maaɗa: Kayto! Berniwol maŋgtaaŋgol halki nder mbeela. Yimɓe maagol laamanino ndiyamji
Ezekiel26:18 Ammaa jonta
Ezekiel26:19 Ndaa nii Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i berniwol Tirus: “Mi sookɗinte bana bille berniiji ɗe ngalaa jooɗiiɓe ton. Mi suddete bee ndiyamji diga luggeeŋga mbeela.
Ezekiel26:20 Mi diirtinte haa diirtuɓe nder ngaska lugguka
Ezekiel26:21 Mi laatinte ciftinorɗum kulniiɗum
Ezekiel27:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel27:2 “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel27:3 berniwol jooɗiiŋgol haa sera mbeela
Ezekiel27:4 Keeri ma ɗon haa caka mbeela. Nyiɓooɓe ma mbooɗini ma bana koommbowal timmuŋgal.
Ezekiel27:5 Ɓe mbaɗi reedu ma bee leɗɗe caatuɗe iwɗe hooseere Seniira
Ezekiel27:6 Ɓe mbaɗi laanyirɗe ma bee leɗɗe towɗe iwɗe lesdi Baasan
Ezekiel27:7 Bee limce tuppitaaɗe iwɗe Misra ɓe mbaari leppi mawɗi ɗi henndu yerɓirta koommbowal
Ezekiel27:8 Yimɓe diga lesdi Sidon e Aruwat ngonno laanyooɓe ma
Ezekiel27:9 Ndotti'en e waawɓe diga Gebal mbo'itini ceekɗi ma. Yimɓe diga koommbooje mbeela fuu mbaɗi filu nder maaɗa.
Ezekiel27:10 Honooɓe diga Persiya e Lidiya e Put ɗonno nder jama'aare konu ma. Ɓe ɓili bawarɗe maɓɓe e kufneeje maɓɓe njamndiije nder maaɗa. Kamɓe ngaddani ma tedduŋgal.
Ezekiel27:11 Honooɓe diga Aruwat ayni mahi taariiɗi ma hawtaade bee honooɓe maaɗa
Ezekiel27:12 Yimɓe lesdi Tarsis mbaɗi filu bee maaɗa daliila risku ma fantuŋgu. Ɓe cannji kuuje ma bee cardi e njamndi ɓaleeri e jamɗe goɗɗe.
Ezekiel27:13 Yunaniya e Tubal e Meesek mbaɗi filu bee maaɗa
Ezekiel27:14 Yimɓe Bayti-Togarma cannji kuuje ma bee pucci kuuwooji e pucci konu ba'eteeɗi e alfadariije.
Ezekiel27:15 Rodani'en laati fildooɓe bee ma. Yimɓe jooɗiiɓe haa duuɗe ɗuuɗɗe mbaɗi filu bee ma
Ezekiel27:16 Yimɓe Edoom laati fildooɓe bee ma. Ɓe cannji kuuje ma ɗuuɗɗe
Ezekiel27:17 Yahuuda e Isra'iila laati filooɓe ma. Ɓe cannji kuuje ma bee alkamaari iwndi haa Minnit e gawri e njumri e nebbam jaytunje e cittaaje.
Ezekiel27:18 Damas filani ma ngam daliila kuuje ma ɗuuɗɗe e risku ma fantuŋgu. Ɓe coodani ma inaboojam diga Helbon e gaasa baali diga Sahar.
Ezekiel27:19 Yimɓe Dan e Yunaniya ummi berniwol Uzal
Ezekiel27:20 Yimɓe Dedan njaɓi kuuje ma
Ezekiel27:21 Arab'en e laamiiɓe lesdi Keedar mbaɗi filu bee ma. Ɓe cannji kuuje ma bee njawkoy e jawɗi baali e be'i.
Ezekiel27:22 Filooɓe Seba e Rama pilani ma
Ezekiel27:23 Berniiji Haran e Kanne e Eden e filooɓe Seba e Assuura e Kilmat fuu mbaɗi filu bee ma.
Ezekiel27:24 Ɓe njaɓi kuuje ma
Ezekiel27:25 Koommbooje iwɗe haa Tarsis njahri kuuje filu ma. A laati bana koommbowal dow ndiyam
Ezekiel27:26 Laanyooɓe njahri ma dow ndiyamji mawɗi. Ammaa henndu fuunaaŋge saatundu fusi ma haa caka mbeela.
Ezekiel27:27 Riskuuji ma e kuuje ma fuu
Ezekiel27:28 Hoolo hoore'en ma yahan daayiiɗum
Ezekiel27:29 Laanyooɓe e hoore'en e huuwooɓe fuu accan koommbooje muuɗum'en
Ezekiel27:30 Ɓe fuu ɓe mboyete bee bojji caatuɗi
Ezekiel27:31 ɓe pemmban gaasa ko'e maɓɓe
Ezekiel27:32 Ɓe ngiman gimol ngo'ol ngam woyugo ma: Moy nanndi bee Tirus
Ezekiel27:33 Saa'i a neldi kuuje ma dow ndiyamji
Ezekiel27:34 Ammaa jonta a fusi dow ndiyam
Ezekiel27:35 Masiibo ma hulni jooɗiiɓe haa duuɗe fuu. Koo laamiiɓe maɓɓe boo kultori
Ezekiel27:36 Filooɓe nder ummaatooje fuu ɗon ciika ngam a laati kulniiɗum. A natti haa foroy!”
Ezekiel28:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel28:2 “Ɓii-Aadama

Ezekiel28:4 Anndal ma e hakkiilo ma ndiskini ma. A heɓi cardi e kaŋŋeeri
Ezekiel28:5 Bee anndal ma ɗuuɗŋgal e filu ma a ɗuɗɗiniri maral ma. Ngam daliila risku ma
Ezekiel28:6 Ngam maajum min Allah Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: Ngam a nanndini numo ma bee numo am
Ezekiel28:7 ndaa
Ezekiel28:8 A maayan maayde naawnde nder luggeeŋga ndiyamji
Ezekiel28:9 To ɓe ngari mbarugo ma
Ezekiel28:10 A maayan maayde yurumnde bana saadooni'en haa juuɗe jananɓe ɓe'e. Min Allah Jawmiraawo wi'i ɗum.”
Ezekiel28:11 Kadiboo Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel28:12 “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel28:13 A ɗon jooɗi nder Adnin
Ezekiel28:14 Mi laatinino ma keruba mawɗo
Ezekiel28:15 A walaano feloore diga nyannde tageeki ma haa halleende ma waŋgi.
Ezekiel28:16 A sukli bee filu
Ezekiel28:17 Ɓernde ma mawniti ngam daliila ŋarol ma
Ezekiel28:18 Bee aybeeji ma ɗuuɗɗi e filu ma kalluŋgu a soɓniri nokkuuje ma cenaaɗe. Ngam maajum kuɓɓumi yiite nder maaɗa
Ezekiel28:19 Annduɓe ma nder ummaatooje kultori daliila maaɗa
Ezekiel28:20 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam

Ezekiel28:23 Mi ukkante nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu

Ezekiel28:26 Ɓe njooɗoto ton bee hoolaare

Ezekiel31:1 Nder nduuɓu sappo e go'oowu

Ezekiel32:22 Assuura ɗon ton bee jama'aare konu mum
Ezekiel32:23 Genaale maɓɓe ɗon haa nokkuure ɓurnde luggugo nder joonde maayɓe. Ɓe fuu ɓe mbaraaɓe bee kaafahi

Ezekiel33:1 Ndaa Jawmiraawo wolwani yam
Ezekiel33:2 “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel33:3 kaŋko
Ezekiel33:4 ammaa nanɗo hoolo luwal hakkilanaay ngo
Ezekiel33:5 Aybe maayde maako loroto dow hoore maako
Ezekiel33:6 Ammaa to aynoowo yi'i konne'en ɗon ngara
Ezekiel33:7 An
Ezekiel33:8 To mi wi'i goɗɗo kalluɗo: An kalluɗo
Ezekiel33:9 Ammaa to a maatini kalluɗo ngam o acca yahdu maako hallundu
Ezekiel33:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Ɓii-Aadama
Ezekiel33:11 Yeccu ɓe: Fakat bana min Allah Jawmiraawo mi geeto
Ezekiel33:12 An
Ezekiel33:13 To mi wi'i adiliijo: Fakat a yeeɗan
Ezekiel33:14 Non boo to mi wi'i kalluɗo: Fakat a maayan
Ezekiel33:15 waato o hokkitan ko jaɓɗo nyamaande wallinani mo jeŋngina
Ezekiel33:16 Mi siftortaa hakkeeji maako sam. O yeeɗan ngam o waɗi gooŋgaaku e adilaaku.
Ezekiel33:17 Yimɓe lenyol ma ɗon mbi'a: Laawol Jawmiraawo fottaay. Kayya

Ezekiel33:19 Non boo to kalluɗo acci halleende mum
