Micah4:13 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Umma
Micah4:14 Ammaa jonta
Micah5:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “An Baytilaama-Efrata
Micah5:2 Ngam man Jawmiraawo accan yimɓe muuɗum
Micah5:3 Kaŋko o ummoto
Micah5:4 Kaŋko bee hoore maako laatoto salaaman maɓɓe. To Assuura'en ngari lesdi meeɗen
Micah5:5 Kamɓe ɓe nduran lesdi Assuura bee kaafahi e lesdi Nimrudu bee kaafahi losaaki. Bana non Jawmiraawo hisnirta en juuɗe Assuura'en
Micah5:6 Luttuɓe Yaakubu laatoto caka ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe bana saawawre iwnde haa Jawmiraawo
Micah5:7 Luttuɓe Yaakubu laatoto caka ummaatooje e caka jama'aaje ɗuuɗɗe bana mbarooga caka dabbaaji nder laynde
Micah5:8 Isra'iila'en
Micah5:9 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Saa'i man mi nattinan pucci mon caka mooɗon
Micah5:10 Mi yibbinan gure nder lesdi mon e berniiji mon cemmbiɗɗi fuu.
Micah5:11 Mi nattinan hiilaaji ɗi mbaɗoton
Micah5:12 Mi nattinan labbi mon cehaaɗi e daŋraŋge labbi mooɗon. On meetataa sujidango kuuje ɗe juuɗe mon mbaɗi.
Micah5:13 Mi ɗoofan daŋraŋge Asera mon caka mooɗon
Micah5:14 Bee tikkere e ɓernuki mbaatortoomi ummaatooje ɗe ɗowtanaaki yam fuu.”
Micah6:1 Nane ko Jawmiraawo wolwi
Micah6:2 Kooseeje
Micah6:3 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Yimɓe ummaatoore am
Micah6:4 Mi wurtini on lesdi Misra
Micah6:5 Ummaatoore am
Micah6:6 Bee ɗume ɓaditotoomi Jawmiraawo e kofotoomi yeeso Allah Ɓaŋiiɗo? Mi ɓadito mo bee guleteeɗi koo bee nyalbi na?
Micah6:7 Jawmiraawo yerdoto jawɗi baali ujineere koo maahoy nebbam ujine sappo na? Mi hokka mo afo am
Micah6:8 An neɗɗo
Micah6:9 Jawmiraawo ɗon wolwana berniwol – Kulanɗo mo
Micah6:10 Woodi ndesaaji rikiciiji haa saare kalluɗo e etirgal pamɗitinaaŋgal ngal nganymi na?
Micah6:11 Mi aybintaa huuwtiniranɓe awnorɗum rikiciijum
Micah6:12 Riskuɓe berniwol keewi toonyaare
Micah6:13 Ngam maajum puɗɗumi fiyugo on bee nyawuji
Micah6:14 On nyaaman
Micah6:15 On aawan
Micah6:16 On ɗon njogo umrooje laamiiɗo Omiri
Micah7:1 Kayto! Mi ɗon bana goɗɗo jahanɗo teɓugo ɓiɓɓe leɗɗe saa'i ittugo ko lutti haa gese inabooje wakkati teɓki: Walaa inaboore haa mi nyaama sam! Walaa ibbere aartunde nde ɓernde am yenwata!
Micah7:2 Hoolaaɓe ngalaa nder lesdi
Micah7:3 Juuɗe maɓɓe anndi waɗugo kalluɗum masin. Ardiiɓe e hiitooɓe ɗon ƴama dokke
Micah7:4 Wooɗa-gikkuujo caka maɓɓe nanndi bee wumre gi'e. Gooŋɗuɗo maɓɓe ɓuri wumre gi'e hallugo. Nyalaade kiita nde aynooɓe mon mbi'no on ɗon wara. Nden kam saklere hoo'an on.
Micah7:5 Taa nuɗɗin soobaajo ma
Micah7:6 Ngam ɓiɗɗo gorko yawoto baaba mum
Micah7:7 Ammaa min
Micah7:8 An konneejo am
Micah7:9 Sey mi ɓusa tikkere Jawmiraawo
Micah7:10 Konneejo am yi'an ɗum
Micah7:11 An Urusaliima
Micah7:12 Nyalaade man yimɓe ngaran haa maaɗa diga Assuura e diga berniiji Misra
Micah7:13 Ammaa duniyaaru laatoto winnde daliila jooɗiiɓe nder maaru e daliila ngeenaari halleende maɓɓe.
Micah7:14 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Micah7:15 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Bana nder nyalɗe gurtaaki ma diga Misra
Micah7:16 Ummaatooje goɗɗe ngi'an ɗum
Micah7:17 Ɗe tahan mbulwuldi bana mboodi
Micah7:18 Moy ɗowanteeɗo nanndi bee maaɗa? A yaafoto aybe
Micah7:19 A hinnoto min fahin
Micah7:20 A waŋginanan Yaakubu gooŋgaaku e danygol Ibrahiima boo hoolaare
Nahum1:1 Ɗo woni koŋngol dow Niniwe. Deftere nde'e ɗon anndina ko Nahum Elkosiijo yi'i.
Nahum1:2 Jawmiraawo o Allah kaajuɗo
Nahum1:3 Jawmiraawo o tikkataa law
Nahum1:4 O telɓanan mbeela e nga yooran
Nahum1:5 Kooseeje ndiwnan daliila maako
Nahum1:6 Moy dartoto yeeso ɓernuki maako? Moy waawata dartanaago tikkere maako saatunde? Ɓernuki maako ɗon waanjo bana yiite
Nahum1:7 Jawmiraawo o booɗɗo
Nahum1:8 O hisnan ɓe e ilam mawɗam. Ammaa o nattinan nokkuure berniwol
Nahum1:9 Ɗume nufoton dow Jawmiraawo? Kaŋko o nattinan on fuu. Walaa haaje sarru waɗa nde ɗiɗi.
Nahum1:10 Koo to on laatake bana wumre gi'e naŋngindiranɗe
Nahum1:11 An Niniwe
Nahum1:12 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo ɗon wi'a: “Koo to ɓe ngardi ɓe fuu e no ɓe ɗuuɗɗiri fuu
Nahum1:13 Jonta ngewanmi kaɓɓirgal maɓɓe
Nahum1:14 An Niniwe
Nahum2:1 Ndaa gooynoowo habaru salaaman ɗon dow kooseeje
Nahum2:2 An Niniwe
Nahum2:3 Ngam Jawmiraawo ɗon wartira maŋngu Yaakubu e ngu Isra'iila
Nahum2:4 Bawarɗe honooɓe nattinoowo go mbooji. Semmbiɗɓe maako ɗon ɓorni limce boɗeeje. O ɗon darna mootaaji maako bana jame yiite jaynanɗe
Nahum2:5 Mootaaji pucci ɗon caamna dow laabi
Nahum2:6 O ewnoto mawɓe honooɓe maako semmbiɗɓe
Nahum2:7 Dammuɗe maaje ɗon maɓɓiti
Nahum2:8 Ɓe ngurtini debbo laamiiɗo
Nahum2:9 Ɓooyma berniwol Niniwe nanndino bee weendu heewndu ndiyamji. Ammaa ndaa yimɓe ɗon ndogga diga maagol! Ndare
Nahum2:10 Kooce cardi! Kooce kaŋŋeeri! Woodi ndesaaje ɗe timmataa sam e kuuje ɗuuɗɗe feere feere marɗe saman.
Nahum2:11 Koo ɗume fuu yaaɓaama e jaɓtaama e wonnaama koo toy! Ɓerɗe yimɓe ta'i
Nahum2:12 Toy ɗowirde barooɗe e nokkuure haa ɓiɓɓe maaje nyaamata? To mbarooga dilli tefoygo nyaamdu
Nahum2:13 Mbarooga faɗɗi
Nahum2:14 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mi ɗon monni ma. Mi wulan mootaaji pucci konu ma haa cuurɗe ummo. Kaafahi nyaaman mbarookoy maaɗa. Mi nattinan keɓal ma haa lesdi. Daaɗe nelaaɓe ma meetataa naneego.”
Nahum3:1 Bone laatanto berniwol dufanŋgol ƴiiƴam
Nahum3:2 Hoolo ɓoccol e hoolo kosɗe mootaaji ɗon ton
Nahum3:3 samnooɓe ummake e kaafaaje jaynanɗe e labbe ɗelkanɗe
Nahum3:4 Ɗum waɗi daliila kuuɗe daakaareeku ɗuuɗɗe ɗe daakaareejo oo huuwi. O ɗon esta bee ŋarol maako
Nahum3:5 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mi ɗon monni ma. Mi ɓaŋgtan gawarle limce ma dow yeeso ma
Nahum3:6 Mi rufan mbuuwri dow maaɗa
Nahum3:7 Nden koo moy yi'i ma doggan daayiiɗum bee ma
Nahum3:8 An Niniwe
Nahum3:9 Etiyopiya e Misra ngonno semmbe maagol ɗe ngalaa keerol. Yimɓe Put e Libiya ngonno wallooɓe ngol.
Nahum3:10 Ammaa jooɗiiɓe maagol ndahaama
Nahum3:11 An boo a wuykan
Nahum3:12 Berniiji ma cemmbiɗɗi fuu nanndi bee ibbe ɗe ɓiɓɓe maaje aartuɗe ɓenndi. To goɗɗo dimmbi ɗe
Nahum3:13 Honooɓe ma wonduɓe bee maaɗa laati bana rewɓe. Dammuɗe lesdi ma maɓɓitake jaasɗum yeeso konne'en ma
Nahum3:14 Nyeɗ ndiyam! Ngam konne'en taarake ma. Wo'itin mahol ma cemmbiɗŋgol. Sey a jiiɓa loope
Nahum3:15 Bee non fuu
Nahum3:16 A ɗuɗɗini filooɓe ma ko ɓuri koode asamanji
Nahum3:17 
Nahum3:18 An laamiiɗo Assuura
Nahum3:19 Walaa lekki ngam naawnere ma
Habakkuk1:1 Ɗo woni koŋngol ngol Jawmiraawo wolwani annabi Habakuk nder wahayu mum.
Habakkuk1:2 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Habakkuk1:3 Ngam ɗume a yi'natammi halleende yimɓe? Ngam ɗume a ɗon laara torraaji amin
Habakkuk1:4 Ngam man tawreeta ɗowtanaaka
Habakkuk1:5 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ndaare caka ummaatooje
Habakkuk1:6 Ndaa
Habakkuk1:7 Ɓe kuleteeɓe e ruggotooɓe. Kamɓe ndarnata baawɗe maɓɓe e ko haandani ɓe.
Habakkuk1:8 Pucci maɓɓe ɓuri paaɗaaji yaawugo
Habakkuk1:9 Yimɓe ummaatoore nde fuu ɗon ngara ngam toonyaago. Geese maɓɓe fuu ɗon tiito yeeso. Ɓe ɗon mooɓta dahaaɓe ɗuuɗɓe bana njaareendi.
Habakkuk1:10 Ɓe ɗon njanca laamiiɓe
Habakkuk1:11 Ɓaawo man ɓe tokkoto yeeso bana henndu
Habakkuk1:12 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Habakkuk1:13 Gite ma ngi'ataa halleende
Habakkuk1:14 A ɗon nanndina ɓiɓɓe Aadama bee liɗɗi nder mbeela
Habakkuk1:15 Kaldiya'en ɓe'e ɗon naŋnga yimɓe ɓe'e fuu bee kunayel
Habakkuk1:16 Ɓe ɗon lii'ano zubaawol kirseteeɗi
Habakkuk1:17 Ngam man ɓe njuppata zubaaji maɓɓe
Habakkuk2:1 Sey mi wa'o haa nokkuure aynirde am
Habakkuk2:2 Jawmiraawo jaabi yam
Habakkuk2:3 Wahayu man hiɓɓan to saa'i man yottake
Habakkuk2:4 Ɓernde cooyɗo adilaaku ɗon mawnito
Habakkuk2:5 Fakat risku zammboto
Habakkuk2:6 Yimɓe ɓe'e fuu taaliran mo
Habakkuk2:7 Law ɓe tokkiiɗa nyamaande ummoto
Habakkuk2:8 Ngam an
Habakkuk2:9 Bone laatanto ɗaɓɓitanɗo riba kalluka ngam saare muuɗum
Habakkuk2:10 Bee dabareeji ma a fooɗani saare ma toskaare
Habakkuk2:11 Koo hayre nder mahol boo ɗon wooka dow maaɗa
Habakkuk2:12 Bone laatanto nyiɓanɗo wuro dow ƴiiƴam
Habakkuk2:13 Kadi
Habakkuk2:14 Ngam duniyaaru heewan anndal tedduŋgal Jawmiraawo
Habakkuk2:15 Bone laatanto jarnanɗo keeddiɗɗum'en
Habakkuk2:16 A haari bee toskaare
Habakkuk2:17 Ngam toonyaare nde a toonyiri Libanon
Habakkuk2:18 Ɗume suura nafata haa cehoowo seha ka? Ɗume suura njamndi ɓolinaandi ngam ekkitingo fewre nafata? Ngam ɗume goɗɗo waɗata hoolaare mum haa labbi ɗi mbolwataa nde nii kaŋko waɗi ɗi bee juuɗe maako?
Habakkuk2:19 Bone laatanto bi'anɗo leggal: “Fin!” Malla hayre muukaare: “Umma!” Lawru waawi ekkitingo na? Yaasi maaru takkaama bee kaŋŋeeri e cardi
Habakkuk2:20 Ammaa Jawmiraawo ɗon nder haykaliiru mum seniindu. Sey duniyaaru fuu sirwo yeeso maako.
Habakkuk3:1 Ndaa do'aare annabi Habakuk bee daande gimi boyki:
Habakkuk3:2 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Habakkuk3:3 Allah ɗon wara diga Teman
Habakkuk3:4 Bana ɗelko annoora
Habakkuk3:5 Nyawu kalluŋgu ndaaɓoowu ɗon ardo mo
Habakkuk3:6 O dari
Habakkuk3:7 Mi yi'i sarru ukkani laymaaji Kusan
Habakkuk3:8 Yaa Jawmiraawo
Habakkuk3:9 A taaskitini lagaawal ma
Habakkuk3:10 Kooseeje ngi'i ma
Habakkuk3:11 Naaŋge e lewru ndari haa nokkuuje muuɗum'en
Habakkuk3:12 Bee tikkere caalortooɗa lesdi
Habakkuk3:13 A wurti ngam hisnugo ummaatoore ma e ngam hisnugo moytaaɗo ma. A yibbini suudu kalluɗo diga tiitol haa les
Habakkuk3:14 Bee kuri maɓɓe a sumpiti ko'e ardiiɓe honooɓe maako
Habakkuk3:15 Bee pucci ma njaaɓuɗa mbeela
Habakkuk3:16 Mi nani ɗum. Ɓanndu am fuu ɗon diwna
Habakkuk3:17 Koo to ibbi finnataa
Habakkuk3:18 ammaa min mi seyorto Jawmiraawo
Habakkuk3:19 Jawmiraawo Baawɗo woni semmbe am
Zephaniah1:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Sefaniya ɓii Kusi ɓii Gedaliya ɓii Amariya ɓii Hezekiya
Zephaniah1:2 “Mi nattinan ko woni dow lesdi fuu.
Zephaniah1:3 Mi nattinan yimɓe e dabbaaji
Zephaniah1:4 Mi fortan juŋngo am ngam honugo Yahuuda e jooɗiiɓe haa Urusaliima. Mi nattinan luttuɗum diina Ba'al haa nokkuure nde'e
Zephaniah1:5 Mi halkan wa'otooɓe dow soorowol ngam sujidango jayli asamanji e sujidanooɓe hunortooɓe ndego bee innde Jawmiraawo e ndego boo bee innde lawru Milkom.
Zephaniah1:6 Mi halkan loriiɓe
Zephaniah1:7 Cirwe yeeso Jawmiraawo Allah! Ngam nyalaade maako ɓaditake. O taaskitini kirseteeŋga
Zephaniah1:8 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Nyalaade nde lii'otoomi kirseteeŋga
Zephaniah1:9 Nyalaade man kiitotoomi diwanɓe les dammugal
Zephaniah1:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Nyalaade man gookaali mbaɗan haa dammugal bi'eteeŋgal Dammugal Liɗɗi e bojji haa Fattude Hesre e haraka dow towndiije.
Zephaniah1:11 Mboye
Zephaniah1:12 Saa'i man mbiɗitittoomi Urusaliima bee pittirlaaji
Zephaniah1:13 Woɗɓe njaɓtan jawdi maɓɓe
Zephaniah1:14 Nyalaade Jawmiraawo mawnde ɓaditake
Zephaniah1:15 Nde laatoto nyalaade tikkere
Zephaniah1:16 nyalaade luwal konu e hoolo dow berniiji cemmbiɗɗi e kisruɗe towɗe.
Zephaniah1:17 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi hulnan yimɓe haa ɓe njaha bana wumɓe
Zephaniah1:18 Cardi maɓɓe e kaŋŋeeri maɓɓe kisnataa ɓe nyalaade nde tikkere Jawmiraawo waŋgata
Zephaniah2:1 Mooɓte
Zephaniah2:2 hiddeko on caŋkito
Zephaniah2:3 Ɗakkotire bee Jawmiraawo
Zephaniah2:4 Gaaza ferwan
Zephaniah2:5 Kayto! Bone laatanto on
Zephaniah2:6 Lesdi ma kommbi mbeela laatoto durduɗe
Zephaniah2:7 Luttuɓe Yahuuda maran lesdi man
Zephaniah2:8 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mi nani jancoore Mo'ab e kuudi Ammooni'en
Zephaniah2:9 Ngam maajum min Allah mo Isra'iila'en cujidanta ɗum wi'i: Fakat bana mi geeto lesdi Mo'ab laatoto bana Sodoma
Zephaniah2:10 Ɗum waɗan daliila mawnitaare maɓɓe
Zephaniah2:11 Jawmiraawo laatanto ɓe kulniiɗo
Zephaniah2:12 Onon Etiyopiya'en boo
Zephaniah2:13 Jawmiraawo fortan juŋngo muuɗum gal woyla
Zephaniah2:14 Tokke mbaaloto ton
Zephaniah2:15 Bana non berniwol ceyiiŋgol koolɗiniiŋgol laatorto
Zephaniah3:1 Bone laatanto berniwol tuurtoowol
Zephaniah3:2 Ngol ɗowtaaki
Zephaniah3:3 Saraaki'en caka maagol ɓe barooɗe ngurɓotooɗe
Zephaniah3:4 Annabi'en maagol ɓe elewɓe
Zephaniah3:5 Ammaa Jawmiraawo o adiliijo caka maagol
Zephaniah3:6 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi nattini ummaatooje
Zephaniah3:7 Mi tammi: Jonta ngol hulatam sike
Zephaniah3:8 Ngam maajum ndeeneeɗam”
Zephaniah3:9 “Ɓaawo man ndokkanmi ummaatooje kunnduɗe laaɓɗe
Zephaniah3:10 Diga gaɗa maaje Etiyopiya
Zephaniah3:11 Nyalaade man on meetataa semtoraago tuurtol mon dow am. Nder wakkati man nden ittanmi jurotooɓe mawnitiiɓe caka mooɗon
Zephaniah3:12 Mi luttanan hoore am ummaatoore ne'iinde laafunde caka mooɗon. Nde hisran bee innde Jawmiraawo.
Zephaniah3:13 Luttuɓe Isra'iila mbaɗataa kalluɗum
Zephaniah3:14 Sey on ngima
Zephaniah3:15 Jawmiraawo itti kiita dow maaɗa
Zephaniah3:16 Saa'i man Urusaliima nanan habaru ni'i: “Taa hul
Zephaniah3:17 Jawmiraawo Allah maaɗa ɗon wondi bee maaɗa
Zephaniah3:18 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi ittanan on sarru
Zephaniah3:19 Ndaa
Zephaniah3:20 Saa'i man ngartiranmi on
Haggai1:1 Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Dariyus ɗiɗaɓu
Haggai1:2 “Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Ummaatoore nde'e ɗon wi'a
Haggai1:3 Nden Jawmiraawo wi'i bee hunnduko annabi Haggay:
Haggai1:4 “Ɗum saa'i ngam mooɗon haa njooɗooɗon nder cuuɗi ɓasaaɗi leɗɗe
Haggai1:5 Jonta ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Numte kuuɗe mon!
Haggai1:6 On aawi ɗuuɗɗum
Haggai1:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Numte kuuɗe mon!
Haggai1:8 Mba'e dow hooseere
Haggai1:9 On tammi on keɓan ɗuuɗɗum
Haggai1:10 Ngam maajum asamanji njogitani on saawawre
Haggai1:11 Mi umri hokkere waɗa dow lesdi e kooseeje e dow demetirle e ko lesdi fuɗnata fuu. Ngam daliila hokkere man
Haggai1:12 Zorobaabila ɓii Salatiyel e Yosuwa ɓii Yocadak
Haggai1:13 Nden Haggay
Haggai1:14 Jawmiraawo suusɗini Zorobaabila ɓii Salatiyel
Haggai1:15 Ɗum waɗi nder nyannde noogas e nayaɓre haa lewru joweego'ooru
Haggai2:1 Nder lewru joweeɗiɗaɓru
Haggai2:2 “Wolwan Zorobaabila ɓii Salatiyel
Haggai2:3 Moy caka mooɗon onon luttuɓe yi'nooɓe tedduŋgal haykaliiru naane? E noy ndaarɗon ndu jonta? Naa ndu laati bana huunde meere haa gite mooɗon na?
Haggai2:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i: An Zorobaabila
Haggai2:5 fodde alkawal ngal kaɓɓumi bee kaakiraaɓe mooɗon
Haggai2:6 Ngam ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Nii seɗɗa mi dimmban asamanji e lesdi
Haggai2:7 Mi dimmban ummaatooje fuu
Haggai2:8 Cardi e kaŋŋeeri
Haggai2:9 Tedduŋgal haykaliiru ɗiɗawru ndu'u ɓuran ngal aranndu. Mi jo'inan salaaman e hayru haa nokkuure nde'e”
Haggai2:10 Nder nduuɓu Dariyus ɗiɗaɓu
Haggai2:11 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Ƴam liman'en ko ɓe anndi dow haala ka'a:
Haggai2:12 To goɗɗo saawi kusel cenaaŋgel nder gawargal limce muuɗum
Haggai2:13 Haggay tokki ƴamugo: “To goɗɗo soɓi bee meemugo maayɗo
Haggai2:14 Nden Haggay wi'i: “Jawmiraawo wi'i: Bana non yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e laatori yeeso am
Haggai2:15 Ammaa jonta
Haggai2:16 nde goɗɗo wari haa waagaare nde o tammoto muudooje noogas
Haggai2:17 Mi nattini nafuuda kuuɗe juuɗe mon fuu
Haggai2:18 Kakkilane ko waɗete diga hannde yahugo yeeso
Haggai2:19 Aawdi jinni haa beembal na? Inabohi e ibbi e rummaanoohi e jaytunhi ndimaay na? Ammaa diga hannde puɗɗanmi barkiɗingo on.”
Haggai2:20 Fahin Jawmiraawo wolwani Haggay nder nyannde noogas e nayaɓre lewru man
Haggai2:21 “Wolwan Zorobaabila
Haggai2:22 mi yibbinan leese laamuuji
Haggai2:23 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Nyalaade man mi hoo'ete
Zechariah1:1 Nder nduuɓu Dariyus laamiiɗo Persiya ɗiɗaɓu
Zechariah1:2 “Min Jawmiraawo mi tikkani kaakiraaɓe mooɗon masin.
Zechariah1:3 Wi' ɓe
Zechariah1:4 Taa laate bana kaakiraaɓe mon. Annabi'en ɓooyma ngooynani ɓe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Lorte e laabi mooɗon kalluɗi
Zechariah1:5 Toy kaakiraaɓe mooɗon? Annabi'en boo ɗon ngeeɗa haa foroy na?
Zechariah1:6 Ammaa mi ukkani kaakiraaɓe mooɗon naalooje fodde bolle am e farillaaji am ɗum umrumi sukaaɓe am annabi'en. Nden ɓe lorti
Zechariah1:7 Nyalaade noogas e nayaɓre nder lewru sappo e go'ooru
Zechariah1:8 Haŋki ngi'mi kayɗiniiɗum: Goɗɗo ba'iiɗo puccu mboɗeewu ɗon dari caka leɗɗe asuraaje nder luggere. Ɓaawo maako woodi pucci boɗeeji e puri e daneeji.
Zechariah1:9 Mi ƴami malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am: “Pucci ɗi'i ɗum ɗume
Zechariah1:10 Ba'iiɗo puccu caka asuraaje go wi'i: “Wa'iiɓe ɗi ngoni ɓe Jawmiraawo neli ngam ɓe taaroya duniyaaru.”
Zechariah1:11 Ɓe mbolwani malaa'ikaajo ba'iiɗo puccu caka asuraaje go: “Min taaroyi duniyaaru fuu
Zechariah1:12 Nden malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Zechariah1:13 Jawmiraawo jaabi malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am bee bolle booɗɗe
Zechariah1:14 Nden malaa'ikaajo oo wi'i yam: “Wooynu ni'i: Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi mari yiide haajunde masin dow Urusaliima e Siyona.
Zechariah1:15 Mi heewi tikkere dow ummaatooje koolɗiniiɗe
Zechariah1:16 Ngam man Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi wartanan Urusaliima bee enɗam. Haykaliiru am nder maagol nyiɓtete
Zechariah1:17 Kadiboo wooynu: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Berniiji am keewan kuuje booɗɗe fahin. Jawmiraawo de'itinan Siyona
Zechariah2:1 Mi tijji
Zechariah2:2 Mi ƴami malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am: “Luwe ɗe'e ɗum ɗume?” O jaabi yam: “Kanje ngoni luwe caŋkititɗe Yahuuda e Isra'iila e Urusaliima.”
Zechariah2:3 Kadiboo Jawmiraawo yi'ni yam kila'en nayo.
Zechariah2:4 Mi ƴami: “Ɗume ɓe ngari waɗugo?” O jaabi: “Luwe go caŋkiti Yahuuda
Zechariah2:5 Mi tijji
Zechariah2:6 Mi ƴami mo: “Toy njahataa?” O jaabi yam: “Haa Urusaliima
Zechariah2:7 Saa'i malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am go ɗon yaha
Zechariah2:8 Malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am go wi'i mo: “Yaawɗa law
Zechariah2:9 Jawmiraawo wi'i: Min bee hoore am mi faddan ngol bana mahol yiite. Haa caka maagol boo
Zechariah2:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i yimɓe muuɗum: “Onon ɓe mi saŋkiti haa alkibilaaji nayi fuu
Zechariah2:11 Onon yimɓe Urusaliima
Zechariah2:12 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama mo neli yam wi'i dow ummaatooje jaɓtuɗe on kuuje: “Meemɗo on
Zechariah2:13 Ndaa
Zechariah2:14 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ceye
Zechariah2:15 Nyalaade man ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe ɗakkoto Jawmiraawo
Zechariah2:16 Yahuuda laatoto maral Jawmiraawo nder lesdi ceniindi fahin. Urusaliima boo wartan berniwol ngol o suɓi ɗum fahin.
Zechariah2:17 Sey koo moy fuu sirwo yeeso Jawmiraawo! Ngam o ummake diga jooɗorde maako seniinde.
Zechariah3:1 Nden Jawmiraawo yi'ni yam Yosuwa
Zechariah3:2 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Jawmiraawo telɓane
Zechariah3:3 Yosuwa ɗonno ɓorni limce tunwuɗe
Zechariah3:4 Malaa'ikaajo umri suka'en wonduɓe bee muuɗum: “Ɓorte mo limce tunwuɗe ɗe'e.” Nden o wi'i Yosuwa: “Ndaa
Zechariah3:5 O wi'i: “Meete mo meetaleewol laaɓŋgol!” Ɓe meeti ngol dow hoore maako. Nden ɓe ɓorni mo limce laaɓɗe. Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo ɗon dari.
Zechariah3:6 Ɓaawo man malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo umri Yosuwa:
Zechariah3:7 “Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: To a tokkake laabi am
Zechariah3:8 Nan
Zechariah3:9 Ndaa hayre nde mi wallinta yeeso Yosuwa. Dow hayre nde'e
Zechariah3:10 Nyalaade man on ewnotirto ngam jooɗaago jam les inabooje mooɗon e les ibbe mooɗon. Non Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i. ”
Zechariah4:1 Malaa'ikaajo bolidannooɗo bee am lorti haa am
Zechariah4:2 O ƴami yam: “Ɗume ngi'ata?” Mi jaabi: “Mi ɗon yi'a jo'inirɗum pittirlaaji
Zechariah4:3 Woodi boo jaytunje ɗiɗi baŋnge taasawo. Jaytunhi gooti haa wakeere nyaamre
Zechariah4:4 Mi ƴami malaa'ikaajo bolwananɗo yam go: “Barkaama
Zechariah4:5 O jaabi yam: “A anndaa ko ɗum yiɗi anndingo na?” Mi wi'i: “Mi anndaa
Zechariah4:6 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i yam: “Ndaa wolde Jawmiraawo ngam Zorobaabila: A hiɓɓintaa kaliifaaku maaɗa bee cuusal malla bee semmbe maaɗa
Zechariah4:7 An hooseere mawnde
Zechariah4:8 Jawmiraawo wolwani yam fahin
Zechariah4:9 “Juuɗe Zorobaabila mballini caɓɓawal haykaliiru. Kanje lamsinta ndu boo.” Non annditirton Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama neli yam haa mooɗon.
Zechariah4:10 “Mo yawi fuɗɗoode kuuje pamare
Zechariah4:11 Nden mi ƴami malaa'ikaajo: “Jaytunje ɗiɗi haa nyaamre e nannde jo'inirɗum pittirlaaji
Zechariah4:12 Fahin ƴammoomi: “Ɗume lice jaytunje ɗiɗi baŋnge ilnirɗe ɗe kaŋŋeeri ilnooje nebbam sayeejam anndinta?”
Zechariah4:13 O wi'i yam: “A anndaa ko ɗum yiɗi anndingo na?” Mi jaabi: “Mi anndaa
Zechariah4:14 Nden o wi'i yam kadi: “Kanje ngoni yimɓe ɗiɗo
Zechariah5:1 Mi tijji fahin
Zechariah5:2 Malaa'ikaajo ƴami yam: “Ɗume ngi'ata?” Mi jaabi: “Mi ɗon yi'a deftere taggaande ɗon fiira. Njuutirka maare waɗi meetir sappo (10)
Zechariah5:3 O wi'i yam: “Ɗum naaloore tammiinde ukkanaago duniyaaru fuu. Haa wakeere woore ɗum winndaama: Koo moy wujji
Zechariah5:4 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Mi neldi naaloore nde'e ngam haa nde nasta suudu gujjo e suudu kunotooɗo dow fewre bee innde am. Nde jooɗoto ton
Zechariah5:5 Malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am ɓaditi
Zechariah5:6 Mi ƴami mo: “Ɗum ɗume?” O jaabi: “Ko waŋgata ton
Zechariah5:7 Nden maɓɓoode nde dalma maɓɓiti diga hunnduko etirgal go. Mi yi'i debbo ɗon jooɗi nder maagal.
Zechariah5:8 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i: “Kaŋko woni zunuuba.” Nden o wudini mo nder etirgal
Zechariah5:9 Nde mi tijji fahin
Zechariah5:10 Mi ƴami malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am: “Toy ɓe njahrata ngal?”
Zechariah5:11 O jaabi yam: “Woɗɓe ɗon nyiɓana debbo go suudu haa Sine'ar. To ndu timmi
Zechariah6:1 Mi tijji fahin
Zechariah6:2 Pucci boɗeeji ɗon kaɓɓindiri haa moota arana
Zechariah6:3 Haa tataɓa ɗum pucci daneeji
Zechariah6:4 Mi ƴami malaa'ikaajo bolidanɗo bee am: “Ɗume kanji boo ɗi anndinta
Zechariah6:5 O jaabi ƴam: “Ɗum keni asama nayi. Ɗi ɗonno ndari yeeso Jawmu duniyaaru fuu. Jonta kam ɗi ɗon ndilla.”
Zechariah6:6 Pucci ɓaleeji kaɓɓindiraaɗi haa moota go ndilli gal lesdi woyla. Daneeji tokki ɗi ɓaawo
Zechariah6:7 Pucci boɗeeji ɓaditi
Zechariah6:8 Nden o ewni yam
Zechariah6:9 Jawmiraawo wolwani yam wi'i:
Zechariah6:10 “Jaɓ dokke haa juuɗe Helday e Tobiya e Yada'ya
Zechariah6:11 Hoo'u cardi e kaŋŋeeri
Zechariah6:12 Nden wi' mo: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: Woodi goɗɗo mo innde muuɗum Fuɗŋgo haa ɗo. O fuɗan haa nokkuure nde o daroto
Zechariah6:13 Kaŋko nyiɓata haykaliiru Jawmiraawo. O ɓornoto tedduŋgal. O jooɗoto dow leeso laamu maako ngam o laamo. Limanjo goɗɗo wonan haa nyaamo maako. Narral timmuŋgal laatoto hakkunde maɓɓe.
Zechariah6:14 Ammaa fawnere go walline nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo
Zechariah6:15 Yimɓe ngaran diga daayiiɗum
Zechariah7:1 Nder nduuɓu laamiiɗo Dariyus nayaɓu
Zechariah7:2 Saa'i man yimɓe Baytila nelno Sareser e Regem-Melek bee yimɓe woɗɓe ngam ɓe toro Jawmiraawo
Zechariah7:3 ɓe ƴama liman'en huuwanɓe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama e annabi'en: “Min tokko woyugo e suumaago nder lewru jowaɓru bana min ɗonno mbaɗa duuɓi ɗuuɗɗi na?”
Zechariah7:4 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wolwani yam
Zechariah7:5 “Yeccu yimɓe lesdi e liman'en fuu: Saa'i on cuumi
Zechariah7:6 Nde on nyaami
Zechariah7:7 Bolle ɗe'e Jawmiraawo wi'no bee kunnduɗe annabi'en ɓooyma boo. Saa'i maajum yimɓe ɗonno njooɗi haa Urusaliima
Zechariah7:8 Jawmiraawo wolwani Zekariya ni'i:
Zechariah7:9 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mbaɗe kiita ngooŋɗuka
Zechariah7:10 Taa toonye atiime'en e rewɓe yurumɓe e hoɗɓe e talaka'en. Taa koo moy nufano goɗɗo kalluɗum.”
Zechariah7:11 Ammaa yimɓe cali nanugo. Ɓe ngayliti ɓaawo
Zechariah7:12 Ɓe caatini ɓerɗe maɓɓe bana hayre saatunde
Zechariah7:13 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo mo asama wi'i: “Mi ewni ɓe
Zechariah7:14 Mi saŋkiti ɓe caka ummaatooje koo ɗeye fuu ɗe ɓe anndaano. Lesdi wilaama ɓaawo dilluki maɓɓe
Zechariah8:1 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wolwani yam
Zechariah8:2 “Min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama
Zechariah8:3 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi wartan haa Siyona
Zechariah8:4 “Min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama mi wi'i: Ndotti'en worɓe e fulerewɓe njooɗoto fahin haa laabi Urusaliima. Koo moy maɓɓe woodi sawru haa juŋngo muuɗum ngam ɗuuɗeeŋga balɗe muuɗum.
Zechariah8:5 Babe berniwol keewan ɓikkoy
Zechariah8:6 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “To ɗum laatani luttuɓe yimɓe ɓe'e kayɗiniiɗum nder nyalɗe man
Zechariah8:7 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Ndaare
Zechariah8:8 Mi wartiran ɓe
Zechariah8:9 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Cemmbiɗine juuɗe mooɗon
Zechariah8:10 Ngam hiddeko nyalɗe ɗe'e ngara
Zechariah8:11 Min Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama mi wi'i: Jonta kam mi laatantaako luttuɓe yimɓe ɓe'e bana laatoriimi nder nyalɗe caaliiɗe.
Zechariah8:12 Jonta kam
Zechariah8:13 Onon yimɓe Yahuuda e Isra'iila
Zechariah8:14 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mi anninino ukkanaago on sarru
Zechariah8:15 Ammaa jonta mi annini woonango Urusaliima e yimɓe Yahuuda. Taa kultore sam!
Zechariah8:16 Ndaa ko ngiɗmi on mbaɗa: Mbolwindire gooŋga
Zechariah8:17 Taa koo moy nufano keeddiɗɗum kalluɗum nder ɓernde mum
Zechariah8:18 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wolwani yam
Zechariah8:19 wi'i: “Suumaago nder lewru nayaɓru e jowaɓru e joweeɗiɗawru e sappooru laatanto yimɓe ummaatoore Yahuuda nyalɗe juulɗe e welwelo e seyo. Ammaa ngiɗe gooŋgaaku e salaaman.”
Zechariah8:20 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Fakat
Zechariah8:21 Jooɗiiɓe nder berniwol ngo'ol njahan haa jooɗiiɓe nder berniwol ngola
Zechariah8:22 Ummaatooje ɗuuɗɗe e cemmbiɗɗe ngaran haa Urusaliima ngam fottugo bee Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama e toraago mo.
Zechariah8:23 Saa'i man yimɓe sappo wolwanɓe ɗemɗe feere feere njogoto limce Yahuuduujo gooto
Zechariah9:1 Ɗo woni koŋngol Jawmiraawo. Jawmiraawo wolwi dow lesdi Hadarak
Zechariah9:2 O ɗon wolwa dow Hamat
Zechariah9:3 Tirus mahi mahol paddirgol. Ngol mooɓti cardi bana mbulwuldi e kaŋŋeeri laaɓndi boo bana loope dow laawol.
Zechariah9:4 Ammaa Jawmiraawo hoo'an ngol
Zechariah9:5 To berniwol Askalon yi'i ɗum
Zechariah9:6 Njaalu'en njooɗoto haa Asdod. Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi nattinan mawnitaare Filisti'en.
Zechariah9:7 Mi wiftan diga kunnduɗe maɓɓe kusel marŋgel ƴiiƴam e diga caka nyii'e maɓɓe boo coɓŋgel lii'anaaŋgel labbi. Kamɓe boo ɓe laatoto luttuɓe ɓe Allah meeɗen
Zechariah9:8 Min bee hoore am mi saŋnginan nder lesdi am ngam aynugo ndi. Mi faddan ndi ngam konne'en saalotooɓe. Walaa jananno koo gooto meetataa wargo haa yarna ummaatoore am bone
Zechariah9:9 An berniwol Siyona
Zechariah9:10 O nattinan mootaaji pucci konu nder Efrayim
Zechariah9:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ngam daliila alkawal am bee mooɗon
Zechariah9:12 Onon haɓɓaaɓe heewɓe tammunde
Zechariah9:13 Mi wartiran lesdi Yahuuda bana lagaawal konu
Zechariah9:14 Nden Jawmiraawo waŋgan dow maɓɓe. Kurol maako ɗelkan bana ma'ere. Allah Jawmiraawo fuufan luwal konu
Zechariah9:15 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama aynan yimɓe mum. Ɓe kalkan konne'en
Zechariah9:16 Nyalaade maajum Allah Jawmiraawo hisnan ummaatoore mum bana gaynaako hisnirta tokkere baali mum. Bana kaa'e ɗuuɗa-samanje haa meetaleewol laamiiɗo
Zechariah9:17 Ɓe ceyoto
Zechariah10:1 Tore Jawmiraawo
Zechariah10:2 Labbi ɗon carwo on fewre
Zechariah10:3 Tikkere am saatanan waynaaɓe
Zechariah10:4 Diga Yahuuda laamiiɓe feere feere ngurtoto. Ɓe semmbiɗɓe bana hayre talkumoore
Zechariah10:5 Yimɓe Yahuuda nanndan bee honooɓe semmbiɗɓe
Zechariah10:6 Mi semmbiɗinan yimɓe Yahuuda
Zechariah10:7 Worɓe Efrayim laatoto honooɓe semmbiɗɓe. Ɓerɗe maɓɓe ceyoto bana to ɓe njari inaboojam. To ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe ngi'i ɗum
Zechariah10:8 Mi ewnoto yimɓe ummaatoore am
Zechariah10:9 Mi saŋkiti ɓe caka ummaatooje bana ɓe caakirta aawdi
Zechariah10:10 Mi wartiran ɓe diga lesdi Misra e lesdi Assuura. Mi mooɓtan ɓe
Zechariah10:11 Ɓe eeroto Maayo Masiibo
Zechariah10:12 Mi semmbiɗinan ummaatoore am Isra'iila
Zechariah11:1 An Libanon
Zechariah11:2 Uuma
Zechariah11:3 Nane
Zechariah11:4 Jawmiraawo Allah am wi'i yam: “Waynu baali taaskitinaaɗi ngam hirseego!
Zechariah11:5 Soodooɓe ɗi ɗon kirsa ɗi
Zechariah11:6 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi enɗataa jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi! Mi hokkan koo moy haa juŋngo keeddiɗɗum e juŋngo laamiiɗo mum. Kamɓe ɓe mbonnan lesdi
Zechariah11:7 Mi duri baali ɗi soorrooɓe taaskitini ngam hirseego. Mi hoo'i cabbi ɗiɗi. Wooru maaji
Zechariah11:8 Mi riiwi waynaaɓe tato nder lewru wooru. Nden mi fuɗɗi wanyugo baali
Zechariah11:9 Nden kadi mi wi'i ɗi: “Mi durataa on fahin! Mbaatanɗi
Zechariah11:10 Mi hoo'i sawru am: Mbooɗeeŋga go
Zechariah11:11 Ngal fiistaama nyalaade man. Soorrooɓe baali hakkilananɓe yam go annditi ɗum wolde Jawmiraawo.
Zechariah11:12 Nden kadi mi wi'i ɓe: “To ɗum fottani on
Zechariah11:13 Ɓe poondi yam mi ke'anɗo ngeenaari mboondi! Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Sakkinan ɗum ɓolinoowo.” Mi hoo'i ceede cardi cappanɗe tati go
Zechariah11:14 Nden mi yewi sawru am ɗiɗawru wi'eteendu kawtal go. Bana non piistumi deerɗiraagu hakkunde Yahuuda e Isra'iila.
Zechariah11:15 Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: “Hoo'u fahin kuuje kuugal gaynaako paataaɗo.
Zechariah11:16 Ndaa
Zechariah11:17 Bone laatano gaynaako meereejo gudinanɗo tokkere! Kaafahi wara dow juŋngo maako e dow yiitere maako nyaamre! Juŋngo maako waata! Yiitere maako nyaamre wuma!”
Zechariah12:1 Ɗo woni koŋngol Jawmiraawo dow Isra'iila. Jawmiraawo mo we'iti asamanji
Zechariah12:2 “Ndaa
Zechariah12:3 Nder wakkati man laatinanmi Urusaliima bana hayre teddunde ngam ummaatooje fuu. Yiɗɓe eftugo nde fuu ɓoostoto. Nden ummaatooje duniyaaru fuu mooɓan ngam honugo ngol.
Zechariah12:4 Nyalaade man mi hulnan pucci maɓɓe
Zechariah12:5 Nden mawɓe Yahuuda mbi'an nder ɓerɗe muuɗum'en: Jooɗiiɓe nder Urusaliima cemmbiɗi
Zechariah12:6 Nyalaade man laatinanmi mawɓe Yahuuda bana yiite njamnaaŋge les leɗɗe
Zechariah12:7 Jawmiraawo aartan hisna ci'e Yahuuda tawon
Zechariah12:8 Saa'i man Jawmiraawo aynan jooɗiiɓe nder Urusaliima. Tampuɓe caka maɓɓe laatoto semmbiɗɓe bana Daawuda. Yimɓe danygol Daawuda boo laatanto ɓe bana Allah
Zechariah12:9 Nyalaade man mi halkan ummaatooje ukkantooɗe Urusaliima fuu.
Zechariah12:10 Ammaa dow saare Daawuda e jooɗiiɓe nder Urusaliima mbaannjanmi ruuhu mbooɗeeŋga e do'a. Ɓe tijjoto yam ngam daliila am
Zechariah12:11 Nyalaade man bojji ɗuuɗan haa Urusaliima
Zechariah12:12 Saare koo ndeye nder lesdi fuu sunoto feere mum. Yimɓe danygol saare Daawuda boo feere mum: Worɓe feere muuɗum'en e rewɓe maɓɓe feere muuɗum'en. Lenyol danygol saare Natan feere mum: Worɓe feere muuɗum'en e rewɓe boo feere muuɗum'en.
Zechariah12:13 Yimɓe danygol saare Lewi feere mum'en. Worɓe feere muuɗum'en e rewɓe maɓɓe feere muuɗum'en. Yimɓe danygol saare Sim'i feere mum'en. Worɓe feere muuɗum'en e rewɓe maɓɓe feere muuɗum'en.
Zechariah12:14 Non boo ci'e luttuɗe fuu: Worɓe feere muuɗum'en e rewɓe maɓɓe feere muuɗum'en.”
Zechariah13:1 “Nyalaade maajum saare Daawuda e jooɗiiɓe nder Urusaliima keɓan seeɓoore maɓɓitiinde ngam lootugo hakke e coɓɗum fuu.”
Zechariah13:2 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Saa'i man nattinanmi inɗe labbi nder lesdi
Zechariah13:3 To goɗɗo tokkake waɗugo annabaaku
Zechariah13:4 Saa'i man annabi'en cemtan ngam koyɗi muuɗum'en ɗi ɓe koyɗi saa'i ɓe ɗon mbaɗa annabaakuuji maɓɓe. Ɓe meetataa ɓornugo alkibbaare annabi'en huuwraande bee gaasa ngam zammbaago yimɓe.
Zechariah13:5 Koo moy maɓɓe wi'an: Naa mi annabiijo
Zechariah13:6 To goɗɗo ƴami mo: E ɗume ɓattajje ɗe'e dow wiɓɓere maaɗa? Nden kam o jaaboto: Mi naawnaama haa suudu waaye'en am.”
Zechariah13:7 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “An kaafahi
Zechariah13:8 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Nden
Zechariah13:9 Mi nastinan luttanɓe bee yoŋki ɓe'e nder yiite ngam laɓɓingo ɓe bana goɗɗo laɓɓinirta cardi. Mi foondan ɓe bana goɗɗo laɓɓinirta kaŋŋeeri. Nden kadi ɓe toroto yam
Zechariah14:1 Ndaa
Zechariah14:2 Jawmiraawo mooɓtan yimɓe ummaatooje fuu haa Urusaliima ngam konu. Ɓe nyaama berniwol
Zechariah14:3 Nden Jawmiraawo wurtoto
Zechariah14:4 Nyalaade man kosɗe maako ndaroto dow Hooseere Jaytunje
Zechariah14:5 On ndoggan gal waadiwol ceekŋgol caka towndiije go
Zechariah14:6 Nyalaade man jayŋgol e jaaŋgol e mallimallooje ngonataa.
Zechariah14:7 Nde laatoto nyalaade feereere. Jawmiraawo tan anndi nde. Nde walaa nyalawma
Zechariah14:8 Nyalaade man ndiyam ndokkanɗam ngeendam ɓuloyan diga Urusaliima. Reeta maajam ilan haa mbeela fuunaaŋge
Zechariah14:9 Nden Jawmiraawo laamanto duniyaaru fuu. Saa'i man kaŋko tan wonata Jawmiraawo
Zechariah14:10 Lesdi taariindi Urusaliima fuu laatoto yayre
Zechariah14:11 Yimɓe njooɗoto ton
Zechariah14:12 Ndaa masiibooji ɗi Jawmiraawo ukkanto yimɓe ummaatooje honiiɓe Urusaliima fuu: O nyolnan kusel ɓalli maɓɓe diga ɓe ɗon ndari dow kosɗe maɓɓe tawon. Gite maɓɓe nyolan nder gasɗe muuɗum'en
Zechariah14:13 Nyalaade man Jawmiraawo hebbinan ɓe bee kultoreeŋgol maŋngol. Ɓe kaɓan hakkunde maɓɓe. Koo moy ukkanto keeddiɗɗum.
Zechariah14:14 Yimɓe Yahuuda boo kaɓan ngam wallugo Urusaliima. Ɓe njaɓtan mardi ummaatooje taariiɗe fuu: Kaŋŋeeri e cardi e limce ɗuuɗɗe masin.
Zechariah14:15 Masiibo ukkanto pucci e alfadariije e geelooɗi e bamɗe e dabbaaji gonɗi nder caŋngeeje ɗe'e fuu. Masiibo oo nanndi bee oya go.
Zechariah14:16 Nden yimɓe luttanɓe haa ummaatooje ummaniiɗe Urusaliima fuu ngaran ton nde hitaande yaalti fuu
Zechariah14:17 To asŋgol koo ngole nder duniyaaru waraay sujidango Laamiiɗo haa Urusaliima
Zechariah14:18 To asŋgol Misra waraay haa Urusaliima ngam waɗugo juulde bukkaaji
Zechariah14:19 Bana non kiita waran dow Misra e ummaatooje ɗe ngarataa waɗugo juulde bukkaaji.
Zechariah14:20 Nder wakkati man
Zechariah14:21 Payanɗe gonɗe nder Urusaliima e Yahuuda fuu laatoto cenaaɗe ngam Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama. Lii'otooɓe kirseteeɗi fuu kuuwtiniran ɗe
Malachi1:1 Ndaa koŋngol ngol Jawmiraawo wolwi bee hunnduko Malakiya:
Malachi1:2 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Mi yiɗi on.” Ammaa onon on ɗon ƴama: “Ɗume hollata a yiɗi min?” Jawmiraawo ɗon jaabo: “Naa Isuwa woni deerɗu Yaakubu? Ammaa Yaakubu ngiɗmi
Malachi1:3 Isuwa kam mi wanyi ɗum. Mi wartiri kooseeje maako bille meere
Malachi1:4 To Edoomi'en mbi'i: “Ɓe mbili min gure
Malachi1:5 Gite mooɗon ngi'an ɗum. Nden on mbi'an: “Jawmiraawo woni mawɗo
Malachi1:6 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i liman'en: “Ɓiɗɗo teddinan baaba mum
Malachi1:7 Bee lii'aago nyaamdu soɓndu dow hirsirde am. Ammaa on ɗon mbi'a: Bee ɗume min coɓniri ma? Bee numugo: Taabal Jawmiraawo woni huunde meere.
Malachi1:8 To on lii'anake yam dabbaaji bumɗi kirseteeɗi
Malachi1:9 Jonta tore Allah haa o mo'ana en. Nde nii on lii'anake mo dokke bana nii
Malachi1:10 “Ayye! Ɓuranno to gooto mon maɓɓi dammuɗe haykaliiru
Malachi1:11 Ngam diga fuɗirde naaŋge haa mutirde maage
Malachi1:12 Ammaa onon on ɗon coɓna innde am bee wi'ugo: Taabal Jawmiraawo soɓi
Malachi1:13 On ɗon mbi'a boo: Kayya
Malachi1:14 Naaloore dow rikiciijo marɗo njawdiri ndi o togani yam nder tokkere maako
Malachi2:1 “Jonta kam
Malachi2:2 To on nanaay
Malachi2:3 “Ndaa
Malachi2:4 Nden on anndan min mi umri umroore nde'e ngam mooɗon
Malachi2:5 Alkawal am bee maako laatino ngeendam e salaaman. Mi hokki mo ɗum ɗiɗi fuu ngam haa o hulammi. Nden o huli yam
Malachi2:6 Kiita gooŋgaaha wonno haa hunnduko maako. Zammba woodaa haa hunnduko maako. O tokki yam bee hoolaare e ɓernde gooŋgaare. O lortini ɗuuɗɓe diga aybeeji maɓɓe.
Malachi2:7 Ngam kuugal limanjo ɗum ekkitingo anndal Allah. Yimɓe ɗaɓɓitan kiita haa maako
Malachi2:8 Ammaa onon
Malachi2:9 Ngam man mi yawni on
Malachi2:10 Naa en fuu en ngoodi Baabiraawo gooto na? Naa Allah gooto tagi en fuu na? Koni en zammbotirta? Koni en njawi alkawal ngal Allah haɓɓuno bee kaakiraaɓe meeɗen?
Malachi2:11 Yahuuda waɗi zammba nder Isra'iila e nder Urusaliima. Yahuudu'en kuuwi kuuɗe nyidduɗe. Yahuuda soɓni nokkuure seniinde nde Jawmiraawo yiɗi bee te'ugo faanyɓe tokkiiɓe ɗowanteeɗo jananno.
Malachi2:12 Mo huuwata irin ɗu'um
Malachi2:13 Woodi boo huunde ɗiɗawre nde on mbaɗata: On ɗon cudda hirsirde Jawmiraawo bee gonɗi e bojji e uumaali
Malachi2:14 Ammaa on ɗon ƴama: “Ngam ɗume?” Ngam Jawmiraawo laati ceedoowo hakkunde maaɗa e debbo sukaaku ma. Debbo oo woni kawtiɗɗiraawo ma mo kaɓɓuɗa alkawal bee muuɗum
Malachi2:15 Naa Jawmiraawo laatini on goɗɗo gooto nder ɓanndu e ruuhu na? Ɗume goɗɗo oo ɗaɓɓata? Naa heɓugo ɓikkoy koy Allah hokkata? Ngam maajum kakkilane ko'e mooɗon. Taa goɗɗo zammbo debbo sukaaku muuɗum.
Malachi2:16 Jawmiraawo Allah mo Isra'iila wi'i: “Mi ɗon wanya ceergal bana mi wanyirta goɗɗo mo soɓni limce mum bee toonyaare. Ngam maajum kakkilane ko'e mooɗon. Taa on mbaɗa zammba.” Non Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i.
Malachi2:17 On ɗon comna Jawmiraawo bee bolle mon. Ammaa on ɗon ƴama: “Bee ɗume min comni mo?” Bee wi'ugo: “Waɗanɓe halleende fuu ɗon pottana Allah
Malachi3:1 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Ndaa
Malachi3:2 Ammaa moy waawata ɓusugo nyalaade garki maako? Moy waawata dartaago nyalaade nde o waŋgoyta? Ngam o laatoto bana yiite ɓolinoowo
Malachi3:3 O jooɗoto bana ɓolinoowo e laɓɓinoowo cardi. O laɓɓinan ɓiɓɓe Lewi
Malachi3:4 Nden dokke Yahuuda e Urusaliima pottanan Jawmiraawo
Malachi3:5 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Mi waranan on ngam kiita. Mi yaawɗoto laataago ceedoowo dow waɗooɓe hiila e jeenooɓe e seedooɓe fewre
Malachi3:6 “Min
Malachi3:7 Diga saa'i kaakiraaɓe mon on celi laawol farillaaji am
Malachi3:8 Goɗɗo waawan zammbaago Allah na? Ammaa onon on ɗon zammbo yam. On ɗon mbi'a: Noy min zammbori ma? Haa zakka e haa dokkal boo.
Malachi3:9 On naalaaɓe
Malachi3:10 Ngadde zakka fuu nder sigordu
Malachi3:11 Mi telɓanan nyaamooji ngam mooɗon
Malachi3:12 Ummaatooje fuu ewnoto on barkiɗinaaɓe
Malachi3:13 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Bolle mooɗon caati dow am. Ammaa on ɗon ƴama: Ɗume min mbolwindiri dow maaɗa?
Malachi3:14 On mbi'i: Jagganaago Jawmiraawo woni meere. Ko nafata to min kakkilani umrooje maako? Ko nafata to min cunake yeeso Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama?
Malachi3:15 Jonta min ɗon ndaara yedduɓe bana kamɓe ngoni barkiɗinaaɓe. Waɗanɓe halleende keɓi hayru. Naa kanjum tan
Malachi3:16 Nden hulɓe Jawmiraawo mbolwindiri. Jawmiraawo boo heɗiti
Malachi3:17 Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama wi'i: “Kamɓe ɓe laatoto yiɗaaɓe am nder nyalaade nde taaskitinanmi. Mi enɗan ɓe
Malachi3:18 Nden on cenndindiran gooŋgaajo bee kalluɗo fahin
Malachi3:19 “Fakat
Malachi3:20 “Ammaa teddinanɓe innde am kam
Malachi3:21 On ndamman halluɓe
Malachi3:22 “Ciftore tawreeta ka mi hokki jagganoowo yam Muusa dow hooseere Sina
Malachi3:23 Ndaa
Malachi3:24 Kaŋko o lortinan ɓerɗe baabiraaɓe haa ɓikkoy e ɓerɗe ɓikkoy haa baabiraaɓe maakoy
Matthew1:1 Ndaa inɗe kaakiraaɓe nder asŋgol Yeesu Almasiihu
Matthew1:2 Ibrahiima danyi Isiyaaku
Matthew1:3 Yahuuda danyi Peres e Zara
Matthew1:4 Siriya danyi Amminadabu
Matthew1:5 Salmuuna danyi Bo'es
Matthew1:6 Yessa danyi laamiiɗo Daawuda. Daawuda danyi Suleymaanu
Matthew1:7 Suleymaanu danyi Robo'am
Matthew1:8 Asa danyi Yosafat
Matthew1:9 Uzziya danyi Yotam
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya danyi Manassa
Matthew1:11 Yusiya danyi Yekoniya e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum saa'i daheeki Isra'iila'en haa Baabila.
Matthew1:12 Ɓaawo daheeki Isra'iila'en haa lesdi Baabila
Matthew1:13 Zorobaabila danyi Abihuda
Matthew1:14 Ajora danyi Cadok
Matthew1:15 Eliyuda danyi Eli'azaaru
Matthew1:16 Yaakubu danyi Yusufu
Matthew1:17 Diga Ibrahiima haa Daawuda waɗi gide sappo e nayi; diga Daawuda haa daheeki Isra'iila'en haa Baabila boo waɗi gide sappo e nayi; diga daheeki Isra'iila'en haa Baabila haa Almasiihu danya boo waɗi gide sappo e nayi.
Matthew1:18 Ndaa nii danyeeki Yeesu Almasiihu laatori. Daada maako Mariyama o kaɓɓanaaɗo Yusufu
Matthew1:19 Yusufu kaɓɓanɗo mo o adiliijo
Matthew1:20 Nde o ɗonno numta haala ka'a
Matthew1:21 O tammi danyugo ɓiɗɗo gorko
Matthew1:22 Ɗum fuu ɗum laati ngam hiɓɓingo ko Jawmiraawo wi'no bee hunnduko annabiijo:
Matthew1:23 “Paanyo debbo mo annda gorko reedan
Matthew1:24 Nde Yusufu fini
Matthew1:25 ammaa o hawtaay bee maako haa o danyi ɓiyiiko gorko. Yusufu inndi mo Yeesu.
Matthew2:1 Yeesu danyaama haa Baytilaama
Matthew2:2 Ɓe ƴami: “Toy ɓiŋngel danyaaŋgel laatiiŋgel laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en woni? Ngam min ngi'i horre maagel haa fuunaaŋge e min ngari sujidango ngel.”
Matthew2:3 Nde laamiiɗo Hirudus nani ɗum
Matthew2:4 O mooɓti mawɓe liman'en ummaatoore e moodiɓɓe tawreeta fuu
Matthew2:5 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Haa Baytilaama
Matthew2:6 An Baytilaama nder lesdi Yahudiya
Matthew2:7 Nden Hirudus ewni annduɓe alaamaaji koode go bee sirri
Matthew2:8 O neli ɓe haa Baytilaama
Matthew2:9 Nde ɓe nani ko laamiiɗo wi'i ɓe
Matthew2:10 Nde ɓe ngi'i horre
Matthew2:11 Ɓe nasti suudu
Matthew2:12 Ɓaawoɗon Allah reentini ɓe nder koyɗol taa ɓe loro haa Hirudus. Ɓe kooti lesdi maɓɓe bee laawol feere.
Matthew2:13 Nde linyooɓe alaamaaji go ndilli
Matthew2:14 Nden Yusufu ummi
Matthew2:15 O jooɗi ton haa yotti maayde Hirudus
Matthew2:16 Nde Hirudus faami annduɓe alaamaaji koode go cargi mo
Matthew2:17 Bana nii annabaaku Yeremiya hiɓɓiri:
Matthew2:18 “Gookaali mbaɗi haa Rama
Matthew2:19 Nde Hirudus maayi
Matthew2:20 o wi'i mo: “Umma
Matthew2:21 Yusufu ummi
Matthew2:22 Ammaa nde o nani Arkilawus roni laamu baaba muuɗum Hirudus dow lesdi Yahudiya
Matthew2:23 o jooɗi nder berniwol bi'eteeŋgol Nasaratu. Ɗum waɗi non ngam hiɓɓingo bolle annabi'en
Matthew3:1 Wakkati man Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma waŋgi
Matthew3:2 O wi'i: “Tuube
Matthew3:3 Yuhanna woni mo Esaaya wolwino dow muuɗum
Matthew3:4 Yuhanna ɗon ɓorni limce kuuwraaɗe bee gaasa ngeelooba
Matthew3:5 Yimɓe Urusaliima e lesdi Yahudiya e lesdi kommbi maayo Urdun fuu
Matthew3:6 Ɓe mbaŋgini hakkeeji maɓɓe
Matthew3:7 Nde Yuhanna yi'i Farisa'en e Saduki'en ɗuuɗɓe ɗon ngara haa maako ngam o waɗana ɓe baptisma
Matthew3:8 Nden kam kuuwe kuuɗe ɗe mbaŋginta on tuubi.
Matthew3:9 Taa nume nder ɓerɗe mooɗon: Ibrahiima woni kaaka amin. Ngam mi ɗon wi'a on
Matthew3:10 Fe'irde ɗon taaski ngam fe'ugo lekki diga ɗaɗi mum
Matthew3:11 Min mi ɗon waɗana on baptisma bee ndiyam ngam tuubu mooɗon. Ammaa garanɗo ɓaawo am waɗanan on baptisma bee Ruuhu Ceniiɗo e bee yiite. Kaŋko o ɓuri yam baawɗe piw. Mi he'aay koo fiistugo ɓoggi paɗe maako.
Matthew3:12 O woodi jaartirɗum haa juŋngo maako ngam senndirgo alkamaari bee nyaande. O mooɓtan alkamaari haa beembal maako
Matthew3:13 Nden Yeesu ummi lesdi Galiili
Matthew3:14 Yuhanna jaɓaay
Matthew3:15 Ammaa Yeesu jaabi mo: “Yerda ɗum jonta
Matthew3:16 waɗani mo baptisma. Nde Yeesu wurti ndiyam
Matthew3:17 Sawtu boo iwi haa asama
Matthew4:1 Nden Ruuhu Allah yahri Yeesu haa ladde hamaadaare ngam haa Iblisa jarribo mo.
Matthew4:2 Yeesu waɗi suumaye nyalawmaaje e jemmaaje cappanɗe nayi
Matthew4:3 Iblisa ɓaditi
Matthew4:4 Yeesu jaabi: “Deftere wi'i: Neɗɗo yeeɗirtaa nyaamdu tan
Matthew4:5 Nden Iblisa yahri mo haa berniwol ceniiŋgol
Matthew4:6 wi'i mo: “To a Ɓiɗɗo Allah kam
Matthew4:7 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Deftere wi'i boo: Taa jarriba Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa.”
Matthew4:8 Fahin Iblisa yahri mo dow hooseere townde masin
Matthew4:9 o wi'i mo: “Ɗum fuu mi hokkete to a tuggi koppi
Matthew4:10 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i mo: “Dillu
Matthew4:11 Nden Iblisa acci Yeesu
Matthew4:12 Nde Yeesu nani ɓe nastini Yuhanna suudu daŋngay
Matthew4:13 O wurti Nasaratu
Matthew4:14 ngam haa bolle ɗe annabi Esaaya wolwino kiɓɓa:
Matthew4:15 “Lesdi Zabulon e lesdi Neftali
Matthew4:16 ummaatoore jooɗiinde nder nyiɓre yi'i annoora makka. Jooɗiiɓe nder lesdi e nyiɓre maayde boo
Matthew4:17 Diga saa'i man Yeesu fuɗɗi waazugo. O wi'i: “Tuube
Matthew4:18 Nde Yeesu ɗon saalo kommbi weendu Galiili
Matthew4:19 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Tokkeeɗam
Matthew4:20 Law ɓe acci zubaaji maɓɓe
Matthew4:21 O yehi yeeso seɗɗa
Matthew4:22 Law ɓe acci koommbowal e baaba maɓɓe
Matthew4:23 Yeesu yilli lesdi Galiili fuu
Matthew4:24 Habaru maako saŋkiti nder lesdi Siriya fuu. Ɓe ngaddani mo torraaɓe nyawuji feere feere e yinnaaɓe e marɓe paɗɗe e jiijiiɓe
Matthew4:25 Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde tokki mo. Ɓe ngari diga lesdi Galiili e Gure-sappo e Urusaliima e lesdi Yahudiya e lesdi gaɗa maayo Urdun.
Matthew5:1 Nde Yeesu yi'i mooɓre ɗuuɗnde nde'e
Matthew5:2 O fuɗɗi ekkitingo ɓe
Matthew5:3 “Barka laatanto annduɓe ko'e muuɗum'en ɓe talaka'en fodde Ruuhu
Matthew5:4 Barka laatanto woyanɓe
Matthew5:5 Barka laatanto yaŋkiniiɓe
Matthew5:6 Barka laatanto ɗaɓɓanɓe waɗugo muuyo Allah bee ɓernde fuu
Matthew5:7 Barka laatanto enɗooɓe
Matthew5:8 Barka laatanto laaɓa-ɓerɗe'en
Matthew5:9 Barka laatanto sulhindiranɓe yimɓe
Matthew5:10 Barka laatanto toonyaaɓe ngam ɓe ɗon ngaɗa ko Allah yiɗi
Matthew5:11 Barka laatanto on
Matthew5:12 Ceye
Matthew5:13 “Onon ngoni mannda ngam duniyaaru: Ammaa to lammeeŋga mannda ittake
Matthew5:14 Onon ngoni annoora ngam duniyaaru
Matthew5:15 Ɓe njamnataa boo pittirla ngam suuɗugo nga les bokoti. Ammaa ɓe njo'ina nga dow jo'inirɗum pittirla
Matthew5:16 Sey annoora mooɗon yayna bana non yeeso yimɓe
Matthew5:17 “Taa nume mi wari fiistugo tawreeta Muusa malla bolle annabi'en. Mi waraay ngam fiistugo ɗum
Matthew5:18 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: No asama e lesdi nduurdi fuu
Matthew5:19 Ngam man koo moy luuti umroore ɓurdunde famɗugo nder tawreeta malla ekkitini woɗɓe waɗugo bana non
Matthew5:20 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: On keɓataa nastugo laamu asamanji sam
Matthew5:21 “On nani ko wi'a haa kaakiraaɓe meeɗen: Taa mbar-hoore. Koo moy mbari goɗɗo
Matthew5:22 Ammaa min mi ɗon wi'a on: Koo moy tikkani deerɗum
Matthew5:23 Ngam maajum to a wari haa hirsirde bee dokkal ma
Matthew5:24 nden kam accu dokkal maaɗa haa hirsirde ton
Matthew5:25 To goɗɗo wullake ma
Matthew5:26 Gooŋga mbi'anmaami: A wurtataako ton sam
Matthew5:27 “On nani ɗum wi'aama: Taa waɗ njeenu.
Matthew5:28 Ammaa min mi ɗon wi'a on: Koo moy to laari debbo bee suuno
Matthew5:29 To yiitere ma nyaamre laatanake ma fergere
Matthew5:30 To juŋngo ma nyaamo laatanake ma fergere
Matthew5:31 “Ɗum wi'aama boo: Mo yiɗi seerugo debbo mum
Matthew5:32 Ammaa min mi ɗon wi'a on: Koo moy seeri debbo muuɗum
Matthew5:33 “On nani boo ko wi'a kaakiraaɓe meeɗen: Taa huna dow fewre
Matthew5:34 Ammaa min mi ɗon wi'a on: Taa kunore sam
Matthew5:35 koo bee lesdi
Matthew5:36 Taa kunore koo bee ko'e mon boo
Matthew5:37 Sey ooho mooɗon laato ooho
Matthew5:38 “On nani ɗum wi'aama: Yiitere bee yiitere
Matthew5:39 Ammaa min mi ɗon wi'a on: Taa mbaate baɗɗo on halleende. To goɗɗo maari ma haa galaŋgal nyaamal
Matthew5:40 To goɗɗo yiɗi wullaago ma ngam o jaɓta toggoyel maaɗa
Matthew5:41 To goɗɗo dooli ma yahugo kilomeetir gootel
Matthew5:42 To goɗɗo ƴami ma huunde
Matthew5:43 “On nani ɗum wi'aama: Yiɗ keeddiɗɗiraawo ma
Matthew5:44 Ammaa min mi ɗon wi'a on: Ngiɗe konne'en mooɗon
Matthew5:45 ngam haa on laato ɓiɓɓe Baabiraawo mooɗon mo asama. O ɗon fuɗna naaŋge maako dow halluɓe e wooɗɓe fuu
Matthew5:46 Mbarjaari ndiye Allah tammi hokkugo on to on ngiɗi yiɗɓe on tan? Koo jomnooɓe boo ɗon mbaɗa bana non!
Matthew5:47 To on ɗon koofna banndiraaɓe mooɗon tan
Matthew5:48 Laate on timmuɓe
Matthew6:1 “Kakkile: Taa kuuwe kuuɗe adilaaku ngam yimɓe ngi'a on. To on mbaɗi non
Matthew6:2 To a ɗon hokka talakaajo huunde
Matthew6:3 Ammaa an
Matthew6:4 ngam haa dokkal ma wona nder cuuɗiiɗum
Matthew6:5 “Nde on ɗon mbaɗa do'a fuu
Matthew6:6 Ammaa an
Matthew6:7 To on ɗon mbaɗa do'a
Matthew6:8 Taa mbaɗe bana maɓɓe
Matthew6:9 Ngam man
Matthew6:10 Laamu maaɗa wara. Muuyo ma laato nder duniyaaru bana haa asama.
Matthew6:11 Hokku min nyaamdu deydey haaje amin hannde.
Matthew6:12 Yaafana min aybeeji amin
Matthew6:13 Aynu min ngam taa min nasta jarribeeki
Matthew6:14 To on njaafanake woɗɓe aybeeji muuɗum'en
Matthew6:15 Ammaa to on njaafanaaki woɗɓe
Matthew6:16 “Nde on ɗon cuumo fuu
Matthew6:17 Ammaa an
Matthew6:18 ngam taa yimɓe anndita a ɗon suumi. Sey Baabiraawo ma gonɗo nder cuuɗiiɗum kaŋko tan anndi. O ɗon yi'a ko mbaɗata nder cuuɗiiɗum
Matthew6:19 “Taa paggane ko'e mooɗon jawdi haa duniyaaru
Matthew6:20 Ammaa paggane ko'e mooɗon jawdi haa asama
Matthew6:21 Ngam haa jawdi maaɗa woni
Matthew6:22 “Gite laati pittirla ɓanndu. To gite maaɗa njame
Matthew6:23 Ammaa to gite maaɗa njamɗaay
Matthew6:24 “Walaa mo waawata jagganaago jaagorɓe ɗiɗo
Matthew6:25 “Ngam maajum mi ɗon wi'a on: Taa caklane nguure mooɗon
Matthew6:26 Ndaare colli: Ɗi aawataa
Matthew6:27 Moy caka mooɗon waawi ɓesdugo balɗe muuɗum koo seɗɗa bee saklere muuɗum?
Matthew6:28 Ngam ɗume on caklanto haala limce? Ndaare pinndi ladde no ndi mawnirta. Ndi huuwataa
Matthew6:29 ammaa mi ɗon wi'a on: koo Suleymaanu bee daraja muuɗum fuu meeɗaay ɓornaago limce booɗɗe bana ngoori man.
Matthew6:30 Allah ɓorni huɗooji ɗi tawe hannde nder ladde
Matthew6:31 Ngam maajum taa cakle ko'e mooɗon bee wi'go: Ɗume min nyaamata? Malla: Ɗume min njarata? Malla: Ɗume min ɓornoto?
Matthew6:32 Heefeerɓe cuklanto kuuje ɗe'e nde weeti fuu. Ammaa Baabiraawo mooɗon mo asama anndi on ngoodi haaje kuuje ɗe'e fuu.
Matthew6:33 Aarte suklanaago laamu Allah e adilaaku muuɗum
Matthew6:34 Taa caklane haala jaŋngo
Matthew7:1 “Taa laate hiitooɓe woɗɓe ngam taa Allah hiito on.
Matthew7:2 Ngam Allah hiitoto on bana on kiitori woɗɓe
Matthew7:3 Koni a ɗon yi'a kuɗel haa yiitere deerɗa
Matthew7:4 Noy mbi'rata deerɗa: Accu mi ittane kuɗel haa yiitere ma
Matthew7:5 An naafikiijo
Matthew7:6 Taa ndokke dawaaɗi huunde seniinde
Matthew7:7 “Tore
Matthew7:8 Ngam koo moy tori
Matthew7:9 Moyjo caka mooɗon
Matthew7:10 Malla to ngel ƴami ɗum liiŋgu
Matthew7:11 Onon halluɓe maa
Matthew7:12 Ngam maajum mbaɗane yimɓe ko ngiɗɗon ɓe mbaɗana on fuu. Kanjum Tawreeta Muusa e defte annabi'en caawi.”
Matthew7:13 “Nastire dammugal paaɗŋgal. Ngam dammugal jaasŋgal e laawol jaasŋgol ɗon njahra haa halkere
Matthew7:14 Ammaa dammugal paaɗŋgal e laawol paaɗŋgol ɗon njahra haa ngeendam
Matthew7:15 “Ndeente e fewooɓe wi'anɓe ɓe annabi'en
Matthew7:16 On annditan ɓe nder kuuɗe maɓɓe. Gi'e ndimataa inabooje
Matthew7:17 Non boo
Matthew7:18 Lekki booɗki rimataa ɓiɓɓe kalluɗe
Matthew7:19 Lekki ki rimataa ɓiɓɓe booɗɗe fuu
Matthew7:20 Bana non boo on annditiran fewooɓe wi'anɓe ɓe annabi'en bee kuuɗe maɓɓe.”
Matthew7:21 “Annde
Matthew7:22 Nyalaade man
Matthew7:23 Nden mi wi'an ɓe bee baŋguɗum: Mi meeɗaay anndugo on sam
Matthew7:24 “Ngam maajum koo moy nani bolle ɗe'e
Matthew7:25 Iyeende toɓi
Matthew7:26 Ammaa koo moy nani bolle ɗe'e
Matthew7:27 Iyeende toɓi
Matthew7:28 Nde Yeesu timmini wolwugo bolle ɗe'e
Matthew7:29 ngam o ekkitinaay ɓe bana moodiɓɓe tawreeta ekkitinirta
Matthew8:1 Nden Yeesu jippi hooseere go
Matthew8:2 Kuturuujo ɓaditi mo
Matthew8:3 Yeesu forti juŋngo muuɗum
Matthew8:4 Nden Yeesu wi'i mo: “Hakkil: Taa yeccu koo moy haala ka sam
Matthew8:5 Yeesu nasti Kafarnahum. Goɗɗo Romaajo
Matthew8:6 wi'i: “Jawmiraawo
Matthew8:7 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Mi yahan yamɗitingo mo.”
Matthew8:8 Ammaa mawɗo sooje'en go wi'i: “Jawmiraawo
Matthew8:9 Min boo mi woodi mawɓe dow am
Matthew8:10 Nde Yeesu nani bolle maako ɗe'e
Matthew8:11 Mi ɗon wi'a on: Ɗuuɗɓe ngaran diga fuunaaŋge e hiirnaaŋge
Matthew8:12 Ammaa yimɓe ɓe Allah suɓino ngam laamu muuɗum
Matthew8:13 Yeesu wi'i mawɗo sooje'en go: “Hootu saare ma
Matthew8:14 Yeesu yehi saare Piyer
Matthew8:15 Yeesu meemi juŋngo maako
Matthew8:16 Nde kiikiiɗe waɗi
Matthew8:17 O waɗi non ngam hiɓɓingo ko annabi Esaaya wi'i: “O hooci tampe meeɗen e o roondi nyawuji meeɗen.”
Matthew8:18 Nde Yeesu yi'i mooɓre ɗuuɗnde ɗon taari mo
Matthew8:19 Goɗɗo nder moodiɓɓe tawreeta ɓaditi mo
Matthew8:20 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Doldolɗe ngoodi gasɗe
Matthew8:21 Goɗɗo feere nder pukara'en maako wi'i: “Moodibbo
Matthew8:22 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Tokkam
Matthew8:23 Nden Yeesu nasti koommbowal
Matthew8:24 Law henndu saatundu ummi dow weendu haa ƴuuge ndiyam cuddi koommbowal. Ammaa Yeesu ɗon ɗaani.
Matthew8:25 Pukara'en ngari haa maako
Matthew8:26 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Ngam ɗume kultorɗon
Matthew8:27 Yimɓe kayɗini
Matthew8:28 Nde Yeesu yotti gaɗa weendu nder lesdi Gadarena'en
Matthew8:29 Ɓe kooli
Matthew8:30 Woodino tokkere gaduuji ɗuuɗɗi haa nokkuure man
Matthew8:31 Ginnaaji go tori Yeesu
Matthew8:32 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɗi: “Njehe.” Ɗi ngurti
Matthew8:33 Durooɓe gaduuji go ndoggi
Matthew8:34 Yimɓe wuro fuu ngurti ngam fottugo bee Yeesu. Nde ɓe ngi'i mo
Matthew9:1 Yeesu nasti koommbowal
Matthew9:2 Ɓe ngaddani mo waata-terɗeejo
Matthew9:3 Moodiɓɓe tawreeta woɗɓe numi: “Gorko oo ɗon wolwa kalluka dow Allah.”
Matthew9:4 Yeesu anndi numooji maɓɓe
Matthew9:5 Ko ɓuri hoygo? Wi'go mo: Hakkeeji maaɗa njaafaama naa malla wi'go mo: Umma
Matthew9:6 Ammaa ngam haa mi faamtina on Ɓii-neɗɗo woodi baawɗe yaafaago hakkeeji nder duniyaaru…” Nden o wi'i waata-terɗeejo go: “Umma
Matthew9:7 O ummi
Matthew9:8 Nde yimɓe ngi'i ɗum
Matthew9:9 Yeesu ummi nokkuure man
Matthew9:10 Nde Yeesu ɗon nyaamda bee pukara'en muuɗum haa saare Matta
Matthew9:11 Farisa'en ngi'i ɗum
Matthew9:12 Yeesu nani ko ɓe mbi'i
Matthew9:13 Ndille
Matthew9:14 Nden pukara'en Yuhanna ngari haa Yeesu
Matthew9:15 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Kadi on tammi ewnaaɓe haa ɓaŋgal cunoto saa'i ɓe ɗon ngondi bee ɓaŋɗo na? Naa non sam! Wakkati waran ɓaŋɗo tawataake bee maɓɓe
Matthew9:16 Walaa mo takkata leppel kesel dow limce kiiɗɗe
Matthew9:17 Walaa mo loowata inaboojam kesam nder kanyakanyaaji kiiɗɗi boo. Ngam inaboojam kesam seekan ɗi
Matthew9:18 Saa'i Yeesu ɗon wolwana ɓe bolle ɗe'e
Matthew9:19 Yeesu ummi
Matthew9:20 Woodi debbo torraaɗo nyawu ilugo ƴiiƴam waɗi duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi. O ɓaditi gal ɓaawo Yeesu
Matthew9:21 ngam o numno: “To mi meemi koo limce maako tan
Matthew9:22 Yeesu yeesiti
Matthew9:23 Nde Yeesu yotti saare mawɗo go
Matthew9:24 o wi'i: “Ngurte ɗo
Matthew9:25 Nde ɓe ngurtini mooɓre nde'e fuu yaasi
Matthew9:26 Habaru man saŋkiti nder lesdi man fuu.
Matthew9:27 Nde Yeesu ummi nokkuure man
Matthew9:28 Nde Yeesu nasti saare
Matthew9:29 Nden Yeesu meemi gite maɓɓe
Matthew9:30 Law gite maɓɓe mbumti. Nden Yeesu barri ɓe
Matthew9:31 Ammaa kamɓe ɓe njehi
Matthew9:32 Saa'i ɓe ɗon ndilla
Matthew9:33 Yeesu riiwi ginnawol man
Matthew9:34 Ammaa Farisa'en mbi'i: “Bee baawɗe laamiiɗo ginnaaji o riiwrata ginnaaji!”
Matthew9:35 Yeesu yiiloyi berniiji e gure fuu. O ekkitini yimɓe nder cuuɗi dewal Yahuudu'en
Matthew9:36 Nde Yeesu yi'i mooɓe
Matthew9:37 Nden o wi'i pukara'en maako: “Ƴaamle ɗuuɗi
Matthew9:38 Tore Jawmu ƴaamnde o ɓesda nelugo sodooɓe haa ƴaamnde maako.”
Matthew10:1 Yeesu ewni pukara'en muuɗum sappo e ɗiɗo. O hokki ɓe baawɗe riiwugo ginnaaji e nyawndugo yimɓe diga nyawuji feere feere fuu.
Matthew10:2 Ndaa inɗe nelaaɓe sappo e ɗiɗo man: Aran
Matthew10:3 Filip e Bartolome
Matthew10:4 Simon Kanaaniijo e Yahuuda Iskariyot zammbotooɗo Yeesu.
Matthew10:5 Yeesu neli pukara'en sappo e ɗiɗo ɓe'e
Matthew10:6 Ammaa njehe haa Isra'iila'en laatiiɓe bana baali majjuɗi.
Matthew10:7 Njehe
Matthew10:8 Njamɗitine nyawɓe
Matthew10:9 Taa njoge kaŋŋeeri malla cardi malla ceede.
Matthew10:10 Taa njoge booro ngam jahaaŋgal malla limce ɗiɗi. Taa koo'e paɗe malla sawru boo
Matthew10:11 To on nasti berniwol malla wuro fuu
Matthew10:12 To on ɗon nasta saare goɗɗo
Matthew10:13 To yimɓe saare man njaɓɓake on
Matthew10:14 To on nasti saare malla wuro
Matthew10:15 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Nyalaade darŋgal
Matthew10:16 “Ndaa
Matthew10:17 Ammaa ndeene ko'e mooɗon
Matthew10:18 Ɓe njahran on yeeso ngomna'en e laamiiɓe ngam daliila am
Matthew10:19 To ɓe njahri on yeeso hiitooɓe
Matthew10:20 Ngam naa onon tammi wolwugo
Matthew10:21 Yimɓe ndokkan deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum'en ngam mbareego
Matthew10:22 Yimɓe fuu nganyan on ngam daliila am. Ammaa mo munyi haa timmoode
Matthew10:23 To ɓe puɗɗi toonyaago on haa berniwol ngol
Matthew10:24 Jaŋngoowo ɓurataa jaŋnginoowo muuɗum maŋngu
Matthew10:25 To jaŋngoowo yottake darnde jaŋnginoowo muuɗum
Matthew10:26 “Kadi
Matthew10:27 Ko mi wi'ata on nder nyiɓre
Matthew10:28 Taa kule yimɓe ngam koo ɓe mbaawan mbarugo ɓalli mooɗon
Matthew10:29 Ɓe coorrataa colloy ɗiɗoy baakin suleyje ɗiɗi na? Ammaa walaa koo gootel maakoy do'oto haa lesdi sonaa to Baabiraawo mooɗon yerdake ɗum.
Matthew10:30 Onon boo
Matthew10:31 Ngam maajum taa kultore
Matthew10:32 “Koo moy seedi yeeso yimɓe o anndi yam
Matthew10:33 Ammaa mo yeddi yam yeeso yimɓe
Matthew10:34 “Taa nume mi waddi salaaman haa duniyaaru. Naa salaaman ngaddumi
Matthew10:35 Mi wari ngam waadugo ɓiɗɗo gorko bee baaba mum
Matthew10:36 Yimɓe saare goɗɗo laatoto wanywanyɓe mum.
Matthew10:37 Koo moy ɓuri yiɗugo baaba muuɗum malla daada muuɗum dow am
Matthew10:38 Koo moy to hoo'aay gaafaaŋgal muuɗum
Matthew10:39 Koo moy yiɗi aynugo yoŋki muuɗum
Matthew10:40 “Koo moy jaɓɓi on
Matthew10:41 Koo moy jaɓɓi annabiijo ngam o annabiijo
Matthew10:42 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Koo moy hokki koo ndiyam peewɗam nder jardugel haa ɓurɗo leesugo caka pukara'en am ɓe'e ngam o pukaraajo am
Matthew11:1 Nde Yeesu timmini umrugo pukara'en muuɗum sappo e ɗiɗo
Matthew11:2 Saa'i man Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma ɗon nder fursina
Matthew11:3 ɓe ƴami mo: “An woni mo min nani waran na? Malla min ndeena goɗɗo feere?”
Matthew11:4 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Njehe
Matthew11:5 Wumɓe ɗon ngi'a
Matthew11:6 Barka laatanto koo moy mo accaay nuɗɗingo yam sam.”
Matthew11:7 Saa'i pukara'en Yuhanna ɗon ndilla
Matthew11:8 Ɗume on njehi laaroygo kadi? Goɗɗo ɓorniiɗo limce booɗɗe na? Ammaa ɓorniiɓe limce booɗɗe
Matthew11:9 Kadi ɗume on njehi laaroygo? Annabiijo na? Ooho! Mi ɗon wi'a on: Fakat
Matthew11:10 Ngam Allah seedi dow Yuhanna nder Deftere
Matthew11:11 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Caka ɓiɓɓe Aadama fuu walaa mo ɓuri Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma maŋngu
Matthew11:12 Diga zamanu Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma haa wargo hannde
Matthew11:13 Tawreeta Muusa e annabi'en fuu mbaɗi annabaaku dow laamu asamanji haa yotti saa'i Yuhanna.
Matthew11:14 To on njaɓi ko mbi'anmi kam
Matthew11:15 Mo woodi noppi fuu
Matthew11:16 Bee ɓeye nanndinanmi yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u? Ɓe nanndi bee ɓikkoy njooɗiikoy haa luuɓe. Koy ɗon ngookana ɓikkoy ngoɗkoy
Matthew11:17 Min puufani on algaytaaru
Matthew11:18 Ngam Yuhanna wari
Matthew11:19 Ɓii-neɗɗo wari
Matthew11:20 Nden Yeesu fuɗɗi felugo berniiji ɗi o waɗi kaayeefiiji ɗuuɗɗi ton
Matthew11:21 “Bone laatano ma
Matthew11:22 Ngam maajum mi ɗon anndina on: Nyalaade darŋgal
Matthew11:23 An Kafarnahum
Matthew11:24 Ngam maajum mi ɗon wi'a on: Nyalaade darŋgal
Matthew11:25 Saa'i man Yeesu wi'i: “Yaa Baabiraawo
Matthew11:26 Nonnon yaa Baabiraawo
Matthew11:27 Nden o wi'i: “Baabiraawo am halfini yam kuuje fuu. Walaa annduɗo Ɓiɗɗo sonaa Baabiraawo
Matthew11:28 Onon somɓe e roondiiɓe doŋgle tedduɗe fuu
Matthew11:29 Ndoonde kaɓɓirgal am
Matthew11:30 Ngam ɗum koyɗum roondaago kaɓɓirgal am e ko mi roondata on boo
Matthew12:1 Saa'i man
Matthew12:2 Nde Farisa'en ngi'i ɗum
Matthew12:3 O jaabi ɓe: “On meeɗaay jaŋngugo ko Daawuda waɗino
Matthew12:4 Ɓe nasti suudu Allah
Matthew12:5 Malla on meeɗaay jaŋngugo nder tawreeta
Matthew12:6 Mi ɗon wi'a on: Ndaa
Matthew12:7 To on paamino ko saawi nder bolle ɗe'e: Enɗam ngiɗmi
Matthew12:8 Ngam Ɓii-neɗɗo woni Jawmu nyalaade siwtorde.”
Matthew12:9 Yeesu ummi ton
Matthew12:10 Woodi goɗɗo waata-juŋngoojo ton. Farisa'en ngiɗi wullaago Yeesu
Matthew12:11 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Goɗɗo caka mooɗon
Matthew12:12 Fakat
Matthew12:13 Nden o wi'i gorko go: “Fortu juŋngo ma.” O forti ngo
Matthew12:14 Nden Farisa'en ngurti
Matthew12:15 Ammaa Yeesu faami anniya maɓɓe
Matthew12:16 Ammaa o barri ɓe
Matthew12:17 Ɗum hiɓɓini annabaaku Esaaya
Matthew12:18 “Allah wi'i: Ndaa suka am mo mi suɓi
Matthew12:19 O jokkirtaa bee goɗɗo
Matthew12:20 O yewataa kewal nyobbaaŋgal. O nyifataa pittirlayel
Matthew12:21 Ummaatooje fuu tammorto innde maako.”
Matthew12:22 Nden ɓe ngaddani Yeesu goɗɗo mo ginnawol ɗon nder muuɗum
Matthew12:23 Ɗum hayɗini mooɓe fuu
Matthew12:24 Nde Farisa'en nani ɗum
Matthew12:25 Yeesu anndi numooji maɓɓe
Matthew12:26 To Sayɗaanu ɗon riiwa Sayɗaanu
Matthew12:27 To min mi ɗon riiwa ginnaaji bee baawɗe Be'elzebul
Matthew12:28 Ammaa to bee baawɗe Ruuhu Allah ndiiwranmi ginnaaji boo
Matthew12:29 Walaa mo waawataa nastugo saare cemmbiɗɗo
Matthew12:30 Mo wondaay bee am
Matthew12:31 Ngam maajum mi ɗon wi'a on: Neɗɗo heɓan yaafuye hakkeeji mum e bolle mum kalluɗe dow Allah fuu. Ammaa mo wolwi kalluka dow Ruuhu Ceniiɗo
Matthew12:32 Koo bolwanɗo kalluka dow Ɓii-neɗɗo boo
Matthew12:33 “To lekki wooɗi
Matthew12:34 Onon ɓiɓɓe poosokje
Matthew12:35 Neɗɗo booɗɗo ɗon wurtina kuuje booɗɗe nder siga mum mbooɗka
Matthew12:36 Mi ɗon wi'a on: Nyalaade darŋgal
Matthew12:37 Allah gooŋɗinte fodde bolle maaɗa malla boo o aybinte.”
Matthew12:38 Nden woɗɓe nder moodiɓɓe tawreeta e Farisa'en mbi'i Yeesu: “Moodibbo
Matthew12:39 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u
Matthew12:40 Bana Yonas waɗi nyalawmaaje tati e jemmaaje tati nder reedu liiŋgu
Matthew12:41 Nyalaade darŋgal
Matthew12:42 Laamiiɗo debbo
Matthew12:43 “To ruuhuwol coɓŋgol wurtake goɗɗo
Matthew12:44 nden kam ngol wi'an: Mi loroto haa suudu am ndu mi wurtino. To ngol lori haa maaru
Matthew12:45 nden ngol yaha
Matthew12:46 Saa'i Yeesu ɗon wolwana mooɓre tawon
Matthew12:47 Goɗɗo feere wi'i mo: “Ndaa
Matthew12:48 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Moy woni daada am? Ɓeye ngoni deerɗiraaɓe am?”
Matthew12:49 Nden o sappi pukara'en maako
Matthew12:50 Ngam waɗanɓe muuyo Baabiraawo am mo asama fuu
Matthew13:1 Nyalaade man Yeesu wurti saare
Matthew13:2 Mooɓe ɗuuɗɗe ngari haa maako. Ngam man o nasti koommbowal
Matthew13:3 O ekkitini nde kuuje ɗuuɗɗe bee balndi. O wi'i ɓe: “Demoowo yehi ngesa ngam saakoygo.
Matthew13:4 Nde o ɗon saaka
Matthew13:5 Aawdi ngoɗndi saami haa korka'e
Matthew13:6 Nde naaŋge fuɗi
Matthew13:7 Aawdi ngoɗndi soli caka gi'e. Gi'e mawnidi bee maari
Matthew13:8 Ammaa aawdi ngoɗndi soli haa lesdi mboondi
Matthew13:9 Mo woodi noppi fuu
Matthew13:10 Ɓaawoɗon pukara'en ngari haa Yeesu
Matthew13:11 O jaabi ɓe: “Onon
Matthew13:12 Ngam marɗo huunde
Matthew13:13 Ngam man mi ɗon wolwana ɓe bee balndi. Ngam ɓe ɗon ndaara
Matthew13:14 Bana nii annabaaku Esaaya gooŋɗiri ngam maɓɓe
Matthew13:15 Ngam ɓerɗe yimɓe ɓe'e maatataa koo ɗume
Matthew13:16 Ammaa onon
Matthew13:17 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Annabi'en e adili'en ngiɗno yi'ugo ko ngi'oton
Matthew13:18 “Onon
Matthew13:19 Yimɓe woɗɓe nani habaru laamu asamanji
Matthew13:20 Woɗɓe nanndi bee aawdi colndi haa korka'e. Kamɓe
Matthew13:21 Ammaa ɓe ngalaa ɗaɗi
Matthew13:22 Woɗɓe boo nanndi bee aawdi caka gi'e. Kamɓe
Matthew13:23 Ammaa woɗɓe nanndi bee aawdi colndi haa lesdi mboondi. Kamɓe
Matthew13:24 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol feere
Matthew13:25 Jemmaare feere
Matthew13:26 Nde alkamaari mawni
Matthew13:27 Huuwooɓe jawmu ngesa ngari
Matthew13:28 O wi'i ɓe: Ganyo am waɗi ɗum. Huuwanooɓe ƴami mo: Nden kam a yiɗi min ɗoofa ɗe na?
Matthew13:29 O jaabi ɓe: Aa'a
Matthew13:30 Acce ɗum fuu ɗum mawnida haa wakkati codol. Saa'i man mi wi'an sodooɓe: Aarte mooɓtugo geene
Matthew13:31 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol feere boo
Matthew13:32 Ndi ɓuri aawdiiji fuu famɗugo
Matthew13:33 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol feere fahin
Matthew13:34 Kuuje ɗe'e fuu Yeesu wolwani yimɓe bee balndi
Matthew13:35 ngam hiɓɓingo annabaaku Esaaya. Kaŋko o wi'i: “Mi wolwan bee balndi
Matthew13:36 Nden Yeesu acci yimɓe
Matthew13:37 O wi'i ɓe: “Mo saaki aawdi mboondi
Matthew13:38 Ngesa ɗum duniyaaru
Matthew13:39 Ganyo mo saaki ɗe boo
Matthew13:40 Bana ɓe mooɓtirta geene
Matthew13:41 Ɓii-neɗɗo nelan malaa'ika'en muuɗum
Matthew13:42 ɓe ngudina ɓe nder yiite ɓolinirde. Haa ton ɓe mboyan
Matthew13:43 Ammaa saa'i man adili'en njaynan bana naaŋge nder laamu Baabiraawo muuɗum'en. Mo woodi noppi fuu
Matthew13:44 “Laamu asamanji nanndi bee jawdi ndi ɓe nyukkini nder ngesa. Mo tawi ndi
Matthew13:45 “Fahin
Matthew13:46 Nde o tawi luuluuri marndi saman masin
Matthew13:47 “Laamu asamanji nanndi boo bee zubaawol ngol waawooɓe ngubi nder weendu
Matthew13:48 Nde ngol heewi
Matthew13:49 Bana non ɗum laatoto haa timmuki duniyaaru boo: Malaa'ika'en ngaran
Matthew13:50 ɓe nguboto halluɓe nder yiite ɓolinirde. Haa ton ɓe mboyan
Matthew13:51 Yeesu ƴami pukara'en muuɗum: “On paami bolle ɗe fuu na?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Ooho
Matthew13:52 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ngam maajum koo moy moodibboojo tawreeta
Matthew13:53 Nde Yeesu timmini wolwango yimɓe balndi ɗi'i
Matthew13:54 o yehi haa berniwol ngol o mawni. O fuɗɗi ekkitingo yimɓe nder suudu dewal maɓɓe. Wonɓe ton kayɗini
Matthew13:55 Naa kaŋko woni ɓii cehoowo na? Naa Mariyama woni daada maako na? Naa Yaakuba e Yoses e Simon e Yahuuda ngoni deerɗiraaɓe maako na?
Matthew13:56 Naa deerɗiraaɓe maako rewɓe boo ɗon ngondi bee meeɗen haa ɗo na? Noy o waawri waɗugo kuuje ɗe fuu?”
Matthew13:57 Ngam maajum ɓe cali nuɗɗingo mo. Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ɓe teddinan annabiijo koo toy fuu
Matthew13:58 Ngam daliila sooynde nuɗɗinki maɓɓe
Matthew14:1 Saa'i man Hirudus Antipas nani habaru Yeesu.
Matthew14:2 O wi'i sukaaɓe maako: “Kaŋko woni Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma
Matthew14:3 Naane Hirudus umrino
Matthew14:4 ngam Yuhanna wi'no mo: “Haanaay a te'a Hirudiya.”
Matthew14:5 Hirudus yiɗino mbarugo Yuhanna
Matthew14:6 Nyannde siftinorde danyeeki Hirudus
Matthew14:7 O hunani mo o hokkan mo ko o ƴami fuu.
Matthew14:8 Daada maako loowi mo bolle
Matthew14:9 Ɗum suni laamiiɗo
Matthew14:10 Hirudus neli goɗɗo haa suudu fursina
Matthew14:11 O waddi nde nder le'al
Matthew14:12 Pukara'en Yuhanna ngari
Matthew14:13 Nde Yeesu nani habaru man
Matthew14:14 Nde Yeesu wurti koommbowal
Matthew14:15 Nde kiikiiɗe waɗi
Matthew14:16 Yeesu jaabi: “Haanaay ɓe ndilla
Matthew14:17 Ammaa ɓe mbi'i mo: “Min ngalaa koo ɗume
Matthew14:18 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ngaddaneeɗam ɗum haa ɗo.”
Matthew14:19 Nden o umri mooɓe njooɗo dow huɗo. O hoosi tamseeje jowi e liɗɗi ɗiɗi go
Matthew14:20 Ɓe fuu ɓe nyaami
Matthew14:21 Limgal nyaamɓe tamseeje dillani baakin worɓe ujine njowo
Matthew14:22 Nden law Yeesu dooli pukara'en muuɗum ɓe nasta koommbowal
Matthew14:23 O jaɓɓiti ɓe
Matthew14:24 Nde koommbowal daayi masin bee fomoonde
Matthew14:25 Gal subaha
Matthew14:26 Nde pukara'en ngi'i mo o ɗon yaha dow ndiyam
Matthew14:27 Law Yeesu wolwani ɓe
Matthew14:28 Piyer wi'i mo: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Matthew14:29 Yeesu wi'i mo: “War.” Piyer wurti koommbowal
Matthew14:30 Ammaa nde o yi'i henndu
Matthew14:31 Law Yeesu forti juŋngo muuɗum
Matthew14:32 Nde ɓe nasti koommbowal ɓe ɗiɗo fuu
Matthew14:33 Nden pukara'en wonɓe nder koommbowal cujidani Yeesu
Matthew14:34 Ɓe eeri weendu
Matthew14:35 Nde yimɓe lesdi man annditi Yeesu
Matthew14:36 Ɓe tori mo o acca nyawɓe man meema gawargal limce maako tan
Matthew15:1 Farisa'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ngari diga Urusaliima haa Yeesu
Matthew15:2 “Koni pukara'en maaɗa ɗowtantaako al'aada kaakiraaɓe meeɗen? Ngam ɓe ɗon nyaama bilaa lootugo juuɗe.”
Matthew15:3 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Onon
Matthew15:4 Allah wi'i: Teddin baaba ma e daada ma
Matthew15:5 Ammaa onon on ɗon mbi'a: To goɗɗo wi'i baaba malla daada mum: Geɗal jawdi am ndi mi waawanno wallugo ma bee maari
Matthew15:6 Nden kam walaa haaje o teddina baaba maako. Bana non on mbonni umroore Allah ngam daliila al'aada mooɗon.
Matthew15:7 Naafiki'en! Annabaaku ngu Esaaya waɗi dow mooɗon gooŋɗi:
Matthew15:8 Allah wi'i: Yimɓe ummaatoore nde'e ɗon teddinammi bee kunnduɗe tan
Matthew15:9 Ɓe ɗon cujidanammi meere
Matthew15:10 Nden Yeesu ewni yimɓe
Matthew15:11 Naa ko nastata hunnduko neɗɗo soɓnata mo
Matthew15:12 Pukara'en ngari haa Yeesu
Matthew15:13 O jaabi ɓe: “Fuɗŋgo ngo Baabiraawo mo asama tiggaay fuu
Matthew15:14 Acce ɓe
Matthew15:15 Piyer wi'i mo: “Faamtin min balndol ngol.”
Matthew15:16 Yeesu wi'i: “Haa jonta
Matthew15:17 Ko nastata hunnduko neɗɗo fuu
Matthew15:18 Ammaa ko wurtoto hunnduko
Matthew15:19 Ngam haa ɓernde neɗɗo
Matthew15:20 Kanjum soɓnata neɗɗo. Ammaa nyaamugo bilaa lootugo juuɗe
Matthew15:21 Yeesu ummi nokkuure man
Matthew15:22 Debbo Kanaaniijo
Matthew15:23 Ammaa Yeesu jaabaaki mo. Pukara'en maako ɓaditi mo
Matthew15:24 Yeesu jaabi: “Mi nelaaka haa yimɓe feere
Matthew15:25 Ammaa debbo go wari
Matthew15:26 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Wooɗaay hoo'ugo nyaamdu ɓikkoy
Matthew15:27 Debbo wi'i: “Nonnon
Matthew15:28 Nden Yeesu wi'i: “An debbo
Matthew15:29 Yeesu ummi nokkuure man
Matthew15:30 Mooɓe ɗuuɗɗe ngari haa maako
Matthew15:31 Yimɓe mooɓre kayɗini nde ɓe ngi'i muuka'en ɗon mbolwa
Matthew15:32 Yeesu ewni pukara'en muuɗum
Matthew15:33 Pukara'en mbi'i mo: “Haa toy keɓeten tamseeje nder ladde hamaadaare ɗo
Matthew15:34 Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Tamseeje noy marɗon?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Tamseeje joweeɗiɗi e liikon seɗɗa.”
Matthew15:35 Nden Yeesu umri mooɓre jooɗo.
Matthew15:36 O hoo'i tamseeje joweeɗiɗi e liɗɗi go
Matthew15:37 Yimɓe fuu nyaami
Matthew15:38 Limgal nyaamɓe nyaamdu man dillani worɓe ujine nayo
Matthew15:39 Nde Yeesu jaɓɓiti mooɓre
Matthew16:1 Farisa'en e Saduki'en ngari haa Yeesu ngam jarribaago mo. Ɓe ƴami mo o waŋginana ɓe alaama iwka diga asama.
Matthew16:2 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “To naaŋge muti
Matthew16:3 Fajiri boo
Matthew16:4 Yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u
Matthew16:5 Pukara'en eeri weendu. Ɓe ngejjiti hoo'ugo tamseeje.
Matthew16:6 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Kakkile
Matthew16:7 Pukara'en carwootiri
Matthew16:8 Yeesu anndi ko ɓe numata. O ƴami ɓe: “Koni mbi'oton on ngalaa tamseeje
Matthew16:9 On paamaay tawon na? On ciftortaa haala tamseeje jowi ɗe mi senndani yimɓe ujine njowo e limgal cilaaje ɗe on adi
Matthew16:10 e haala tamseeje joweeɗiɗi ɗe mi senndani yimɓe ujine nayo e limgal cilaaje ɗe on adi na?
Matthew16:11 Koni on paamataa? Mi wolwanaay on haala tamseeje! Kakkilane ufnirɗum Farisa'en e Saduki'en.”
Matthew16:12 Nden pukara'en paami o wi'aay ɓe ayna ko'e maɓɓe e ufnirɗum tamseeje ammaa ekkitinol Farisa'en e Saduki'en.
Matthew16:13 Yeesu yehi lesdi Kaysariya-Filippi. Ton o ƴami pukara'en maako: “Yimɓe ɗon mbi'a
Matthew16:14 Ɓe njaabi mo: “Woɗɓe ɗon mbi'a an woni Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma
Matthew16:15 Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Onon boo
Matthew16:16 Simon Piyer jaabi mo: “An woni Almasiihu
Matthew16:17 Yeesu wi'i mo: “A barkiɗinaaɗo
Matthew16:18 Mi ɗon wi'e: An woni Piyer waato tapaare. Dow tapaare man mi mahan jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe yam. Koo maayde jaalataako nde sam.
Matthew16:19 Mi hokkete maɓɓitirɗum laamu asamanji. Ko a haɓɓi haa duniyaaru
Matthew16:20 Nden Yeesu umri pukara'en muuɗum taa ɓe ngecca koo moy kanyum woni Almasiihu.
Matthew16:21 Diga saa'i man Yeesu fuɗɗi faamtingo pukara'en muuɗum
Matthew16:22 Piyer wicciti mo sera
Matthew16:23 Ammaa Yeesu yeesiti
Matthew16:24 Nden Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “To goɗɗo yiɗi tokkaago yam
Matthew16:25 Ngam koo moy yiɗi hisnugo yoŋki muuɗum
Matthew16:26 To neɗɗo heɓi duniyaaru fuu
Matthew16:27 Ngam Ɓii-neɗɗo waran nder tedduŋgal Baabiraawo mum bee malaa'ika'en mum
Matthew16:28 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on
Matthew17:1 Ɓaawo nyalɗe joweego
Matthew17:2 Jaati maako wayliti haa gite maɓɓe
Matthew17:3 Nden Muusa e Eliya mbaŋgani ɓe
Matthew17:4 Piyer wi'i Yeesu: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Matthew17:5 Nde o ɗon wolwa tawon
Matthew17:6 Nde pukara'en nani ɗum
Matthew17:7 Yeesu ɓaditi ɓe
Matthew17:8 Ɓe ɓaŋgti gite maɓɓe
Matthew17:9 Nde ɓe ɗon njippo hooseere go
Matthew17:10 Nden pukara'en ƴami mo: “Ngam ɗume moodiɓɓe tawreeta ɗon mbi'a sey Eliya aarta wargo tawon?”
Matthew17:11 O jaabi ɓe: “Gooŋga Eliya aartan wargo
Matthew17:12 Ammaa mi ɗon wi'a on Eliya wari timmi
Matthew17:13 Pukara'en paami o wolwani ɓe haala Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma.
Matthew17:14 Nde ɓe njotti haa mooɓre
Matthew17:15 wi'i: “Yaa Jawmiraawo
Matthew17:16 Mi waddi ngel haa pukara'en maaɗa
Matthew17:17 Yeesu wi'i: “Hey yimɓe sooya-nuɗɗinki'en
Matthew17:18 Yeesu telɓani ginnawol
Matthew17:19 Ɓaawoɗon pukara'en Yeesu ngari haa maako feere maɓɓe
Matthew17:20 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Ngam nuɗɗinki mooɗon famɗi. Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: To on ngoodi nuɗɗinki koo seɗɗa bana gawel citta
Matthew17:21 Ammaa irin ginnawol ngo'ol wurtintaake sonaa bee do'aago e suumaago.]”
Matthew17:22 Pukara'en Yeesu kawti haa lesdi Galiili. Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ɓe tammi hokkugo Ɓii-neɗɗo haa juuɗe yimɓe
Matthew17:23 yimɓe man mbaran mo
Matthew17:24 Nde Yeesu bee pukara'en muuɗum njotti Kafarnahum
Matthew17:25 Piyer jaabi: “O ɗon yoɓa.” Saa'i Piyer nasti suudu
Matthew17:26 Piyer jaabi: “Ɗum jananɓe njoɓata.” Yeesu wi'i: “Nden kam ɓiɓɓe lesdi njoɓataa.
Matthew17:27 Ammaa ngam taa en mettina ɓe ɓerɗe
Matthew18:1 Saa'i man pukara'en Yeesu ɓaditi mo
Matthew18:2 Yeesu ewni ɓiŋngel pamarel
Matthew18:3 O wi'i: “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: To on ngaylitaaki haa on laato bana ɓikkoy pamaroy
Matthew18:4 Ngam maajum mo leestini hoore muuɗum bana ɓiŋngel nge'el
Matthew18:5 Koo moy jaɓi ɓiŋngel pamarel bana nge'el ngam daliila innde am
Matthew18:6 “To goɗɗo do'i gooto ɓurɗo famɗugo caka nuɗɗinɓe yam nder hakke
Matthew18:7 Bone laatanto duniyaaru ngam ndu ɗon nastina yimɓe nder hakke! Doole ko do'ata yimɓe nder hakke wona
Matthew18:8 To juŋngo ma malla kosŋgal ma nastinte nder hakke
Matthew18:9 To yiitere ma nastinte nder hakke
Matthew18:10 “Kakkile ngam taa on njawo gooto haa famarɓe ɓe'e. Mi ɗon wi'a on: Malaa'ika'en maɓɓe haa asama ɗon ndari tum yeeso Baabiraawo am mo asama. [
Matthew18:11 Ngam Ɓii-neɗɗo wari hisnugo mo majji.]
Matthew18:12 Ko numɗon? To goɗɗo woodi baali teemerre
Matthew18:13 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: To o heɓti ngu
Matthew18:14 Bana non boo
Matthew18:15 “To deerɗiraawo ma waɗi ma aybe
Matthew18:16 Ammaa to o salake nanango ma
Matthew18:17 To o salake nanango ɓe boo
Matthew18:18 “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Ko on kaɓɓi haa duniyaaru
Matthew18:19 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on fahin: To haa duniyaaru ndu yimɓe ɗiɗo caka mooɗon narri dow ko ɓe ƴamatammi fuu
Matthew18:20 Ngam haa yimɓe ɗiɗo malla tato kawti ngam innde am fuu
Matthew18:21 Nden Piyer wari haa Yeesu
Matthew18:22 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Aa'a
Matthew18:23 Ngam maajum laamu asamanji nanndi bee laamiiɗo mo yiɗi huuwooɓe mum mbaɗana mo lisaafi jawdi maako.
Matthew18:24 Nde o fuɗɗi kuugal man
Matthew18:25 Goɗɗo man walaa ko o yoɓra nyamaande nde. Jaagorɗo maako umri ɓe coorra mo
Matthew18:26 Gorko go tuggi koppi yeeso jaagorɗo muuɗum
Matthew18:27 Jaagorɗo maako yurmini mo
Matthew18:28 Kuuwoowo man wurti
Matthew18:29 Kuuwdiɗɗiraawo maako do'i les kosɗe maako
Matthew18:30 Ammaa o sali
Matthew18:31 Nde huuwdiɗɗiraaɓe maako woɗɓe ngi'i ɗum
Matthew18:32 Nden jaagorɗo ewni kuuwoowo go
Matthew18:33 Kadi haandaayno a enɗa kuuwdiɗɗiraawo ma bana mi enɗiri ma na?
Matthew18:34 Jaagorɗo ɓernani mo
Matthew18:35 Bana non boo Baabiraawo am mo asama waɗanta on
Matthew19:1 Nde Yeesu timmini wolwugo
Matthew19:2 Mooɓe ɗuuɗɗe tokki mo
Matthew19:3 Farisa'en ngari haa maako ngam jarribaago mo. Ɓe ƴami mo: “Tawreeta duŋani gorko seera debbo mum ngam daliila koo kaye na?”
Matthew19:4 O jaabi ɓe: “On njaŋngaay ko winnda na? Haa fuɗɗam Allah tagi gorko e debbo.”
Matthew19:5 Nden o wi'i: “Ngam maajum gorko accan baaba muuɗum e daada muuɗum
Matthew19:6 Bana non ɓe laatataako yimɓe ɗiɗo ɓaawoɗon
Matthew19:7 Farisa'en ƴami mo: “To non kam
Matthew19:8 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Muusa duŋani on ɗum daliila caatal ɓerɗe mooɗon. Ammaa diga fuɗɗam ɗum laataaki non.
Matthew19:9 Mi ɗon wi'a on: Mo seeri debbo muuɗum
Matthew19:10 Pukara'en maako mbi'i mo: “To haala gorko bee debbo laatake non
Matthew19:11 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Naa yimɓe fuu njaɓata haala ka
Matthew19:12 Woɗɓe laati wahraaɓe diga danyeeki muuɗum'en
Matthew19:13 Nden yimɓe ngaddi ɓikkoy pamaroy haa Yeesu ngam haa o yowa juuɗe maako dow maakoy
Matthew19:14 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Acce ɓikkoy pamaroy ngara haa am
Matthew19:15 O yowi juuɗe maako dow maakoy
Matthew19:16 Goɗɗo feere wari haa Yeesu
Matthew19:17 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Ngam ɗume a ƴami yam ko wooɗi? Walaa booɗɗo
Matthew19:18 O ƴami Yeesu: “Umrooje ɗeye?” Yeesu jaabi mo: “Taa mbar-hoore
Matthew19:19 Teddin baaba ma e daada ma
Matthew19:20 Suka go wi'i: “Umrooje ɗe'e fuu
Matthew19:21 Yeesu wi'i mo: “To a yiɗi laataago timmuɗo
Matthew19:22 Nde suka nani bolle ɗe
Matthew19:23 Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Ɗum caɗɗum haa diskuɗo nasta laamu asamanji.
Matthew19:24 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on fahin: Ngeelooba saalo nder wurdere baatal ɓuri hoyugo dow diskuɗo nasta laamu Allah.”
Matthew19:25 Nde pukara'en nani ɗum
Matthew19:26 Yeesu suti ɓe
Matthew19:27 Nden Piyer wi'i mo: “Ndaa
Matthew19:28 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Saa'i Ɓii-neɗɗo jooɗoto dow leeso laamu muuɗum tedduŋgo nde kuuje fuu kesɗiti
Matthew19:29 Koo moy acci saare muuɗum e deerɗiraaɓe worɓe e rewɓe malla saaro'en malla ɓikkoy malla gese muuɗum ngam daliila innde am
Matthew19:30 Ɗuuɗɓe aartuɓe laatoto sakkitiiɓe
Matthew20:1 “Laamu asamanji nanndi bee jawmu ngesa mo wurti fajiri cub ngam tefoygo huuwooɓe ngam ngesa inabooje muuɗum.
Matthew20:2 O narri bee maɓɓe
Matthew20:3 O wurti fahin saa'a joweenayi
Matthew20:4 O wi'i ɓe: Njehe haa ngesa am onon boo
Matthew20:5 Ɓe ndilli haa ngesa maako. Jawmu saare wurti fahin caka nyalawma
Matthew20:6 Saa'a jowi o wurti fahin
Matthew20:7 Ɓe njaabi: Ngam walaa mo tefi min ngam kuugal sam. O wi'i ɓe: Njehe
Matthew20:8 Nde naaŋge muti

Matthew20:11 Nde ɓe njaɓi

Matthew20:18 “Nane

Matthew20:21 Yeesu ƴami mo: “Ko ngiɗɗaa?” O jaabi: “Nyannde a laamake

Matthew20:24 Nde pukara'en sappo luttuɓe nani haala ka'a
Matthew20:25 Nden Yeesu ewni ɓe fuu
Matthew20:26 Ammaa taa ɗum wona non caka mooɗon. To gooto mooɗon yiɗi laataago mawɗo

Matthew22:1 Kadiboo Yeesu waɗani ɓe balndi
Matthew22:2 “Laamu asamanji nanndi bee laamiiɗo mo waɗi juulde ɓaŋgal ɓiyum.
Matthew22:3 O neli suka'en maako haa ewnaaɓe haa nyaamdu juulde man
Matthew22:4 Fahin o neli suka'en feere bee umroore bana ni'i: Mbi'e ewnaaɓe: Ga'i am e nyalbi am payɗi kirsaama
Matthew22:5 Ammaa ewnaaɓe kakkilanaay ɗum
Matthew22:6 luttuɓe naŋngi suka'en laamiiɗo go
Matthew22:7 Laamiiɗo ɓerni
Matthew22:8 Nden o wi'i suka'en maako: Nyaamdu juulde ɓaŋgal defaama

Matthew22:10 Sukaaɓe go njehi haa laabi
Matthew22:11 Laamiiɗo nasti ngam laarugo ewnaaɓe. Ton o yi'i goɗɗo
Matthew22:12 O wi'i mo: Soobaajo am
Matthew22:13 Nden laamiiɗo wi'i jaggiiɓe muuɗum: Kaɓɓe kosɗe maako e juuɗe maako

Matthew22:17 Wi' min ko a numata: Ɗum kaanduɗum hokkugo laamiiɗo Roma jomorgol na malla naa non?”
Matthew22:18 Ammaa Yeesu anndi numo maɓɓe halluŋgo
Matthew22:19 Kolleeɗam ceede ɗe ɓe njoɓrata jomorgol.” Ɓe ngaddani mo suleyre.

Matthew22:26 Ɗum laati bana non dow ɗiɗaɓo

Matthew22:28 Nyannde ummitineeki maayɓe kam

Matthew22:30 To maayɓe ummitake
Matthew22:31 On njaŋngaay ko Allah wolwani on dow ummitineeki maayɓe na? O wi'i:
Matthew22:32 Min woni Allah Ibrahiima e Allah Isiyaaku e Allah Yaakubu. Mi Allah yeeɗɓe naa mo maayɓe!”
Matthew22:33 Ekkitinol maako hayɗini mooɓe nanɗe mo fuu.

Matthew22:40 Tawreeta Muusa e ko annabi'en ngaazini fuu ɗon ndari dow umrooje ɗiɗi ɗe'e.”

Matthew25:3 Faataaɓe ngaddi pittirlaaji muuɗum'en
Matthew25:4 Hakkilɓe ngaddi pittirlaaji muuɗum'en
Matthew25:5 Nde ɓaŋɗo waraay law

Matthew25:18 Ammaa keɓɗo ceede kaŋŋeeri teemerre dilli

Matthew25:21 Jaagorɗo maako wi'i mo: Booɗɗum

Matthew25:25 Mi huli

Matthew25:27 haandino a resa ceede am haa sigooɓe ceede
Matthew25:28 Njaɓte ceede kaŋŋeeri teemerre go haa maako
Matthew25:29 Ngam koo moy marɗo huunde
Matthew25:30 Ammaa kuuwoowo meereejo go
Matthew25:31 “To Ɓii-neɗɗo wari nder tedduŋgal muuɗum bee malaa'ika'en muuɗum fuu

Matthew25:33 O darnan baali haa nyaamo maako
Matthew25:34 Nden laamiiɗo wi'an wonɓe haa nyaamo muuɗum: Ngare
Matthew25:35 Ngam mi beelaaɗono
Matthew25:36 mi walaano limce
Matthew25:37 Nden adili'en ɓe'e ƴaman mo: Jawmiraawo
Matthew25:38 Ndey min ngi'i ma a koɗo
Matthew25:39 Ndey min ngi'i ma a nyawɗo malla a kaɓɓaaɗo nder suudu fursina

Matthew25:42 Ngam mi beelaaɗono
Matthew25:43 Mi koɗono
