Matthew25:46 Kamɓe ɓe nastan haa yaŋgada nduumiika
Matthew26:1 Nde Yeesu timmini wolwugo bolle ɗe'e fuu
Matthew26:2 “On anndi lutti nyalɗe ɗiɗi haa juulde Paska waɗa. Ɓe ndokkan Ɓii-neɗɗo ngam ɓilugo mo dow leggal gaafaaŋgal.”
Matthew26:3 Saa'i man mawɓe liman'en e ndotti'en ummaatoore kawti haa saare Kayafas
Matthew26:4 Ɓe carwootiri haa ɓe ƴoyra Yeesu
Matthew26:5 Ammaa ɓe mbi'i: “Taa en mbaɗa ɗum wakkati juulde
Matthew26:6 Yaake Yeesu ɗonno haa Baytaniya nder saare Simon
Matthew26:7 debbo feere ɓaditi mo. O ɗon jogi faandu saɗndu heewndu uurdi marndi saman masin. O rufi ndi dow hoore Yeesu saa'i o ɗonno nyaama.
Matthew26:8 Nde pukara'en ngi'i ɗum
Matthew26:9 To ɓe coorrino uurdi man
Matthew26:10 Nde Yeesu anndi ko ɓe mbolwata
Matthew26:11 Ngam talaka'en ngondan bee mooɗon foroy
Matthew26:12 O rufi uurdi dow ɓanndu am ngam uweeki am.
Matthew26:13 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Haa ɓe ngaazoto Linjiila ka'a nder duniyaaru fuu
Matthew26:14 Nden gooto nder pukara'en sappo e ɗiɗo mo innde muuɗum Yahuuda Iskariyot
Matthew26:15 O wi'i ɓe: “Ɗume on ndokkatammi to mi hokki on Yeesu?” Ɓe limani mo ceede cardi cappanɗe tati.
Matthew26:16 Diga saa'i man Yahuuda fuɗɗi tefugo saa'iire fottannde haa o hokka ɓe Yeesu.
Matthew26:17 Nder nyalaade go'oore juulde tamseeje ɗe ufnaaka
Matthew26:18 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Njehe nder berniwol
Matthew26:19 Pukara'en mbaɗi ko Yeesu umri ɓe
Matthew26:20 Nde kiikiiɗe waɗi
Matthew26:21 Nde ɓe ɗon nyaama
Matthew26:22 Ɗum suni pukara'en masin
Matthew26:23 Yeesu jaabi: “Mo ɗon suuwa juŋngo mum bee am nder le'al jonta
Matthew26:24 Gooŋga Ɓii-neɗɗo maayan bana ko winnda dow maako. Ammaa bone laatanto mo zammboto Ɓii-neɗɗo
Matthew26:25 Yahuuda zammbotooɗo mo ƴami: “Naa ɗum min sika
Matthew26:26 Nde ɓe ɗon nyaama
Matthew26:27 Nden o hoo'i jardugel
Matthew26:28 ngam ɗum ƴiiƴam am
Matthew26:29 Mi ɗon wi'a on: Yeeso ɗo
Matthew26:30 Nden ɓe ngimi gime maŋgtooje
Matthew26:31 Dow laawol Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “Jemmaare nde'e on accatam on fuu. Ngam Deftere wi'i: Mi mbaran gaynaako
Matthew26:32 Ammaa to mi ummitake
Matthew26:33 Piyer wi'i mo: “Koo to yimɓe fuu acci ma
Matthew26:34 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Gooŋga mbi'anmaami: Jemmaare nde'e
Matthew26:35 Piyer wi'i mo: “Mi meeɗataa wi'go mi anndaa ma koo to doole mi maayda bee maaɗa.” Pukara'en luttuɓe fuu mbi'i non.
Matthew26:36 Nden Yeesu wardi bee pukara'en muuɗum haa nokkuure wi'eteende Gecemane
Matthew26:37 O yahdi bee Piyer e ɓiɓɓe Zebede ɗiɗo
Matthew26:38 Nden o wi'i ɓe: “Torra ɓernde am yiɗi mbarugo yam. Tokke jooɗaago haa ɗo
Matthew26:39 O yehi yeeso seɗɗa
Matthew26:40 O lori haa pukara'en tato go
Matthew26:41 Ayne
Matthew26:42 O yehi ɗiɗawre
Matthew26:43 O lorti haa pukara'en maako fahin
Matthew26:44 O acci ɓe
Matthew26:45 Nden o lorti haa pukara'en maako
Matthew26:46 Umme
Matthew26:47 Diga Yeesu timminaay wolwugo tawon
Matthew26:48 Yahuuda
Matthew26:49 Law Yahuuda ɓaditi Yeesu
Matthew26:50 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Soobaajo
Matthew26:51 Gooto nder wonduɓe bee Yeesu losi kaafahi muuɗum
Matthew26:52 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i mo: “Waatu kaafahi maaɗa haa suudu maaki! Ngam hoosanɓe kaafahi kalkiran bee maaki.
Matthew26:53 Malla a anndaa mi waawanno toraago Baabiraawo am ballal
Matthew26:54 Ammaa to non kam
Matthew26:55 Saa'i man
Matthew26:56 Ammaa ɗum fuu ɗum waɗi ngam haa ko winnda nder defte annabi'en ngooŋɗa.” Nden pukara'en fuu acci mo
Matthew26:57 Naŋnguɓe Yeesu njahri mo haa saare Kayafas
Matthew26:58 Piyer tokki Yeesu haa daayiiɗum
Matthew26:59 Mawɓe liman'en e hiitooɓe nder dawriinde fuu ɗaɓɓi wullaandu dow Yeesu haa ɓe ndo'a mo kiita maayde.
Matthew26:60 Ammaa ɓe keɓaay
Matthew26:61 mbi'i: “Goɗɗo oo wi'no: Mi waawan yibbingo haykaliiru Allah
Matthew26:62 Hooreejo liman'en ummi
Matthew26:63 Ammaa Yeesu jeeɗi. Nden hooreejo liman'en wi'i mo: “Mi ɗon hunne bee innde Allah geeto
Matthew26:64 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Nonnon
Matthew26:65 Nden hooreejo liman'en seeki limce muuɗum
Matthew26:66 Ko mbi'ɗon?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “O he'i mbareego.”
Matthew26:67 Nden ɓe tuuti mo tuuɗe haa yeeso
Matthew26:68 ɓe mbi'i: “An Almasiihu
Matthew26:69 Piyer ɗonno jooɗi haa daldal saare go
Matthew26:70 Ammaa Piyer yeddi ɗum yeeso yimɓe fuu
Matthew26:71 Nde o yehi gal dammugal zawleeru
Matthew26:72 Piyer yeddi fahin
Matthew26:73 Yeeso seɗɗa
Matthew26:74 Nden Piyer wi'i: “Allah hiito yam to mi fewi. Mi hunake
Matthew26:75 Piyer siftori ko Yeesu wi'no mo: “Hiddeko asgumri u'a
Matthew27:1 Fajiri cub
Matthew27:2 Ɓe kaɓɓi mo
Matthew27:3 Nde Yahuuda
Matthew27:4 O wi'i ɓe: “Mi waɗi hakke
Matthew27:5 Yahuuda wudini ceede go nder haykaliiru. Nden o dilli
Matthew27:6 Mawɓe liman'en koo'i ceede go
Matthew27:7 Ɓe ndawri
Matthew27:8 Ngam maajum ɓe ɗon ewno ngesa man Ngesa-ƴiiƴam haa wargo hannde.
Matthew27:9 Bana nii ko annabi Yeremiya wi'i
Matthew27:10 ɓe coodi ngesa mahoowo payanɗe
Matthew27:11 Ɓe ndarni Yeesu yeeso Pilaatu ngomnaajo. Nden o ƴami mo: “An woni laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en na?” Yeesu jaabi mo: “Nonnon
Matthew27:12 Ammaa yaake mawɓe liman'en e ndotti'en ngulli mo
Matthew27:13 Nden Pilaatu ƴami mo: “A nanaay gullaali ɗi ɓe ngulli ma fuu na?”
Matthew27:14 Ammaa Yeesu jaabaaki mo koo wolde woore
Matthew27:15 Nde juulde Paska waɗi fuu
Matthew27:16 Saa'i man woodino kaɓɓaaɗo nanaaɗo
Matthew27:17 Nden Pilaatu ƴami yimɓe mooɓtiiɓe: “Moy on ngiɗi mi yoofana on? Barabbas naa malla Yeesu bi'eteeɗo Almasiihu?”
Matthew27:18 Ngam o anndi ɓe njahri Yeesu haa maako daliila kaajal.
Matthew27:19 Saa'i Pilaatu ɗon jooɗi haa leeso kiita
Matthew27:20 Mawɓe liman'en e ndotti'en irni mooɓe fuu haa ɓe ƴama o yoofa Barabbas
Matthew27:21 Ngomna ƴami ɓe fahin: “Moy caka yimɓe ɗiɗo ɓe'e on ngiɗi mi yoofana on?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Yoofan min Barabbas!”
Matthew27:22 O ƴami ɓe: “Ɗume mi waɗata Yeesu bi'eteeɗo Almasiihu kadi?” Ɓe njaabi ɓe fuu: “Ɓil mo dow leggal gaafaaŋgal!”
Matthew27:23 Pilaatu ƴami ɓe: “Halleende ndeye o waɗi?” Ammaa ɓe ɓesdi wookugo bee sawtu
Matthew27:24 Nde Pilaatu yi'i o waawataa waɗugo koo ɗume
Matthew27:25 Ummaatoore fuu wi'i: “Ƴiiƴam maako yowo dow amin e ɓiɓɓe amin!”
Matthew27:26 Nden Pilaatu yoofani ɓe Barabbas
Matthew27:27 Sooje'en Pilaatu ngomnaajo njahri Yeesu haa laamorde
Matthew27:28 Ɓe ɓorti mo
Matthew27:29 ɓe mbaɗi meetaleewol gi'e
Matthew27:30 Ɓe tuuti mo tuuɗe
Matthew27:31 Nde ɓe timmini jancugo mo
Matthew27:32 Nde ɓe ɗon ngurto
Matthew27:33 Ɓe njotti haa nokkuure wi'eteende Golgota
Matthew27:34 Ton ɓe ndokki mo inaboojam njillindiraaɗam bee ndiyam kaaɗɗam
Matthew27:35 Ɓe ɓili mo haa leggal gaafaaŋgal. Ɓe cenndi limce maako hakkunde maɓɓe bee waɗugo kur'u.
Matthew27:36 Nden ɓe njooɗi ton
Matthew27:37 Ɓe mbinndi daliila kiita maako dow alluha
Matthew27:38 Ɓe ɓildi fasooɓe ɗiɗo bee maako
Matthew27:39 Saalotooɓe ton ndimmbini ko'e muuɗum'en
Matthew27:40 mbi'i: “A wi'no a yibbinan haykaliiru
Matthew27:41 Mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta e ndotti'en boo njanci mo
Matthew27:42 “O hisni yimɓe feere
Matthew27:43 O ɗon hooli Allah
Matthew27:44 Fasooɓe ɓildaaɓe bee maako boo kallini mo bana non.
Matthew27:45 Diga caka nyalawma nyiɓre waɗi dow lesdi fuu
Matthew27:46 Deydey saa'a tati Yeesu hooli bee sawtu
Matthew27:47 Woɗɓe dariiɓe ton nani ɗum
Matthew27:48 Gooto maɓɓe doggi law
Matthew27:49 Ammaa woɗɓe mbi'i: “Sey en ndeena haa en ndaara to Eliya waran ngam hisnugo mo.”
Matthew27:50 Yeesu hooli bee sawtu fahin
Matthew27:51 Wakkati man wiirndallo nder haykaliiru seeki caka cak
Matthew27:52 genaale maɓɓiti
Matthew27:53 Ɓe ngurti genaale ɓaawo ummitineeki Yeesu
Matthew27:54 Nde ardiiɗo dow sooje'en Roma teemerre e aynooɓe woɗɓe wonduɓe bee muuɗum ngi'i dimmbannde lesdi bee ko waɗi fuu
Matthew27:55 Rewɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɗonno ton
Matthew27:56 Mariyama mo wuro Magdala e Mariyama
Matthew27:57 Nde kiikiiɗe waɗi
Matthew27:58 O yehi haa Pilaatu
Matthew27:59 Yusufu hoosi ndu
Matthew27:60 Nden o wallini ndu nder yenaande hesre nde o wasino nder tapaare ngam hoore maako. O talli hayre mawnde
Matthew27:61 Mariyama mo Magdala e Mariyama goɗɗo ɗon njooɗi ton
Matthew27:62 Jaŋngo man
Matthew27:63 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Barkaama
Matthew27:64 Ndikka a umra ɓe ayna yenaande maako nyalɗe tati
Matthew27:65 Pilaatu wi'i ɓe: “Ndaa sooje'en. Njehe
Matthew27:66 Ɓe njehi
Matthew28:1 Ɓaawo nyannde siwtorde
Matthew28:2 Dimmbannde lesdi mawnde waɗi
Matthew28:3 Jaati maako ɗon yayna bana ma'ere
Matthew28:4 Nde aynooɓe ngi'i mo
Matthew28:5 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i rewɓe: “Taa kultore onon kam
Matthew28:6 O walaaɗon haa ɗo
Matthew28:7 Nden njehe law
Matthew28:8 Rewɓe ndilli diga yenaande bee jaawal
Matthew28:9 Nden Yeesu fotti bee maɓɓe
Matthew28:10 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Taa kultore! Njehe
Matthew28:11 Nde rewɓe go ɗon ndilla
Matthew28:12 Mawɓe ɓe'e carwootiri bee ndotti'en. Nde ɓe narri
Matthew28:13 ɓe mbi'i ɓe: “Mbi'e: Pukara'en maako ngari jemma
Matthew28:14 To ngomna nani haala ka
Matthew28:15 Sooje'en go njaɓi ceede man
Matthew28:16 Pukara'en sappo e go'o ndilli haa lesdi Galiili
Matthew28:17 Nde ɓe ngi'i mo
Matthew28:18 Yeesu ɓaditi ɓe
Matthew28:19 Ndille haa yimɓe ummaatooje fuu
Matthew28:20 Ekkitine ɓe haa ɓe tokko ko mi umri on fuu. Min mi ɗon wondi bee mooɗon nyalɗe fuu haa yotto timmuki duniyaaru.”
Mark1:1 Haa ɗo Kubaruwol Belŋgol dow Yeesu Almasiihu Ɓiɗɗo Allah fuɗɗi.
Mark1:2 Bana ko winnda nder deftere annabi Esaaya: “Allah wi'i: Ndaa mi ɗon nela nelaaɗo am yeeso ma
Mark1:3 Goɗɗo ɗon hoola nder ladde: Mo'inane Jawmiraawo laawol. Mbaɗane mo buuwi darnuɗi!”
Mark1:4 Bana non Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma waŋgi nder ladde
Mark1:5 Lesdi Yahudiya e yimɓe Urusaliima fuu ngari haa Yuhanna
Mark1:6 Yuhanna ɗon ɓorni limce kuuwraaɗe bee gaasa ngeelooba
Mark1:7 Nder waazu maako
Mark1:8 Min mi waɗani on baptisma bee ndiyam
Mark1:9 Nder nyalɗe maajum Yeesu wari diga Nasaratu nder lesdi Galiili
Mark1:10 Wakkati Yeesu ɗon wurto ndiyam
Mark1:11 Sawtu iwi diga asamanji
Mark1:12 Law Ruuhu Allah dilliri Yeesu nder ladde.
Mark1:13 O jooɗi ton nyalɗe cappanɗe nayi
Mark1:14 Ɓaawo naŋngeeki Yuhanna
Mark1:15 o wi'i: “Saa'i waɗi
Mark1:16 Nde Yeesu tokki laawol kommbi weendu Galiili
Mark1:17 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Tokkeeɗam
Mark1:18 Law ɓe acci zubaaji maɓɓe
Mark1:19 Nde o yehi yeeso seɗɗa
Mark1:20 O ewni ɓe
Mark1:21 Yeesu e pukara'en muuɗum nasti berniwol Kafarnahum. Nde nyannde siwtorde waɗi
Mark1:22 Heɗitiiɓe ekkitinol maako kayɗini masin
Mark1:23 Woodino nder suudu man goɗɗo mo ruuhuwol coɓŋgol torri
Mark1:24 O wi'i: “An Yeesu Nasaratuujo
Mark1:25 Yeesu telɓani ruuhu coɓŋgu
Mark1:26 Ngu ɓosli gorko go
Mark1:27 Yimɓe fuu kayɗini
Mark1:28 Law habaru Yeesu saŋkiti koo toy fuu nder lesdi Galiili.
Mark1:29 Ɓe ngurti suudu dewal Yahuudu'en
Mark1:30 Esiraawo Simon debbo ɗon waali o nyawɗo yontere. Nde Yeesu wari
Mark1:31 Yeesu yehi haa maako
Mark1:32 Nde naaŋge muti
Mark1:33 Ummaatoore berniwol man fuu mooɓi haa yolnde saare.
Mark1:34 Yeesu yamɗitini nyawɓe ɗuuɗɓe e nyawuji maɓɓe feere feere
Mark1:35 Jaŋngo maajum Yeesu dawi cub. O wurti
Mark1:36 Simon e wonduɓe bee muuɗum taasni mo
Mark1:37 Nde ɓe tawi mo
Mark1:38 Ammaa o jaabi: “Ndillen haa kawyeeji ɓadiiɗi
Mark1:39 Bana non
Mark1:40 Kuturuujo wari haa Yeesu
Mark1:41 Yeesu yurmini mo
Mark1:42 Law saɗawre acci mo
Mark1:43 Nden
Mark1:44 “Hakkil
Mark1:45 Ammaa goɗɗo oo dilli
Mark2:1 Ɓaawo nyalɗe seɗɗa
Mark2:2 Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde hawti haa babal luttaay koo haa yolnde boo. Nden Yeesu waazini ɓe Kubaruwol Belŋgol.
Mark2:3 Yimɓe feere ngari haa maako
Mark2:4 Ammaa ɓe mbaawaay yottingo mo haa Yeesu ngam yimɓe ɗuuɗi. Nden ɓe maɓɓiti kippol suudu haa dow nokkuure nde Yeesu woni. Nden ɓe nastini waata-terɗeejo baaliiɗo dow be'itte mum
Mark2:5 Nde Yeesu yi'i nuɗɗinki yimɓe ɓe'e
Mark2:6 Moodiɓɓe tawreeta woɗɓe jooɗiiɓe ton numi nder ɓerɗe maɓɓe:
Mark2:7 “Koni goɗɗo oo wolwata kalluka bana ka'a? Moy waawata yaafaago hakkeeji sonaa Allah feere mum?”
Mark2:8 Yeesu annditi nder muuɗum ko ɓe numi. O ƴami ɓe: “Koni numoton bana nii?
Mark2:9 Ko ɓuri hoyugo? Wi'go waata-terɗeejo: Hakkeeji maaɗa njaafaama naa malla wi'go mo: Umma
Mark2:10 Ammaa ngam haa mi faamtina on Ɓii-neɗɗo woodi baawɗe yaafaago hakkeeji nder duniyaaru.” Nden o wi'i waata-terɗeejo:
Mark2:11 “Mi ɗon wi'e: Umma
Mark2:12 Law o ummi
Mark2:13 Yeesu dilli fahin haa weendu Galiili. Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe ngari haa maako
Mark2:14 Nde o ɗon tokki laawol
Mark2:15 Ɓaawo man Yeesu jooɗodi nder saare Lewi bee pukara'en muuɗum e jomnooɓe e hakke'en ɗuuɗɓe tokkiiɓe mo
Mark2:16 Moodiɓɓe Farisa'en Woɗɓe ngi'i mo o ɗon nyaamda bee jomnooɓe e hakke'en
Mark2:17 Nde Yeesu nani ɗum
Mark2:18 Nyannde feere pukara'en Yuhanna e Farisa'en ɗonno cuumo. Woɗɓe ngari ƴami Yeesu: “Ngam ɗume pukara'en Yuhanna e Farisa'en ɗon cuumo
Mark2:19 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “On numi ewnaaɓe haa ɓaŋgal cuumoto nde ɓaŋɗo ɗon wondi bee maɓɓe na? Walaa sam! Ɓe cuumataako yaake ɓaŋɗo ɗon wondi bee maɓɓe.
Mark2:20 Ammaa saa'i waran nde ɓaŋɗo tawataake caka maɓɓe
Mark2:21 Walaa mo takkata leppel kesel dow limce kiiɗɗe
Mark2:22 Non boo goɗɗo loowataa inaboojam kesam nder kanyakanyaaji kiiɗɗi
Mark2:23 Nyannde siwtorde Yeesu ɗonno saalo nder gese alkamaari. Pukara'en maako puɗɗi ittugo cammeeje alkamaari dow laawol.
Mark2:24 Nden Farisa'en mbi'i Yeesu: “Laar
Mark2:25 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “On meeɗaay jaŋngugo ko Daawuda waɗi nde kaŋko e wonduɓe bee maako ɓe maati dolo e ɓe keɓaayno nyaamdu na?
Mark2:26 O nasti suudu Allah
Mark2:27 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe fahin: “Nyalaade siwtorde waɗaama ngam neɗɗo. Neɗɗo waɗaaka ngam nyalaade siwtorde.
Mark2:28 Ngam maajum
Mark3:1 Ɓaawoɗon
Mark3:2 Farisa'en ɗonno ayna Yeesu ngam yi'ugo to o yamɗitinan goɗɗo nyannde siwtorde
Mark3:3 Yeesu wi'i waata-juŋngoojo go: “Umma
Mark3:4 Nden Yeesu ƴami yimɓe ɓe ɗonno ndaara mo: “Ɗume tawreeta meeɗen duŋi nyalaade siwtorde? Waɗugo mbooɗeeŋga naa malla waɗugo halleende? Hisnugo yoŋki goɗɗo naa malla mbarugo mo?” Ammaa ɓe cali jaabaago mo.
Mark3:5 Yeesu laari ɓe fuu bee tikkere
Mark3:6 Farisa'en ngurti suudu dewal Yahuudu'en
Mark3:7 Yeesu dillidi bee pukara'en muuɗum haa weendu Galiili. Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde tokki mo. Nde iwi diga Galiili e Yahudiya
Mark3:8 e Urusaliima e Idumaya
Mark3:9 Nden Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum ɓe tefana mo koommbowal
Mark3:10 Ngam o yamɗitini yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe
Mark3:11 Nde yimɓe ɓe ruuhuuji coɓɗi torri ngi'i Yeesu
Mark3:12 Ammaa Yeesu umri ɗi bee caatal
Mark3:13 Nden Yeesu wa'i dow towndiire
Mark3:14 Bana nii o waɗi ɓe nelaaɓe sappo e ɗiɗo
Mark3:15 o hokki ɓe boo baawɗe riiwugo ginnaaji.
Mark3:16 Ndaa nelaaɓe sappo e ɗiɗo ɓe o suɓi: Simon (Yeesu inndi mo Piyer)
Mark3:17 e Yaakuba e Yuhanna
Mark3:18 e Andire e Filip e Bartolome e Matta e Tomas e Yaakuba ɓii Halfa e Tadde e Simon Kanaaniijo
Mark3:19 e Yahuuda Iskariyot zammbotooɗo Yeesu.
Mark3:20 Ɓaawo man Yeesu warti saare. Mooɓre hawti fahin
Mark3:21 Nde banndiraaɓe maako nani haala man
Mark3:22 Moodiɓɓe tawreeta warɓe diga Urusaliima mbi'i: “Be'elzebul ɗon nder maako
Mark3:23 Nden Yeesu ewni ɓe
Mark3:24 To laamu senndake geɓe geɓe
Mark3:25 To yimɓe saare narraay hakkunde maɓɓe
Mark3:26 Non boo to Sayɗaanu ɗon dartano hoore muuɗum
Mark3:27 Goɗɗo waawataa nastugo saare cemmbiɗɗo ngam jaɓtugo jawdi maako
Mark3:28 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on
Mark3:29 Ammaa mo wolwi kalluka dow Ruuhu Ceniiɗo
Mark3:30 Yeesu wi'i non ngam woɗɓe mbi'no: “O woodi ruuhuwol kalluŋgol.”
Mark3:31 Daada e deerɗiraaɓe Yeesu ngari. Ɓe ndari yaasi
Mark3:32 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɗon njooɗodi bee Yeesu. Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Daada ma e deerɗiraaɓe ma ɗon yaasi
Mark3:33 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Moy woni daada am e ɓeye ngoni deerɗiraaɓe am?”
Mark3:34 Nden o laari yimɓe taariiɓe mo
Mark3:35 Waɗanɓe muuyo Allah fuu
Mark4:1 Fahin Yeesu fuɗɗi ekkitingo yimɓe haa fomoonde weendu Galiili. Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde masin mooɓi haa maako. Ngam maajum o nasti koommbowal
Mark4:2 O ekkitini ɓe kuuje ɗuuɗɗe bee balndi. Nder ekkitinol maako o wi'i ɓe:
Mark4:3 “Keɗite! Nyannde feere demoowo yehi ngesa ngam saakoygo.
Mark4:4 Nde o ɗon saaka
Mark4:5 Aawdi ngoɗndi soli haa korka'e
Mark4:6 Nde naaŋge ɓaŋgti
Mark4:7 Aawdi ngoɗndi boo soli caka gi'e. Gi'e mawni
Mark4:8 Ammaa aawdi ngoɗndi soli haa lesdi mboondi
Mark4:9 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Mo woodi noppi ngam nanugo
Mark4:10 Nde Yeesu jooɗi feere muuɗum
Mark4:11 O jaabi ɓe: “Onon
Mark4:12 Ngam maajum ɓe ɗon ndaara
Mark4:13 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “On paamaay balndol ngo'ol na? Nden kam noy on mbaawrata faamugo balndi goɗɗi?
Mark4:14 Demoowo ɗon saaka wolde Allah.
Mark4:15 Woɗɓe nanndi bee aawdi dow laawol
Mark4:16 Woɗɓe nanndi bee aawdi colndi haa korka'e. To ɓe nani wolde Allah
Mark4:17 Ammaa nde waɗataa ɗaɗi nder maɓɓe
Mark4:18 Woɗɓe boo nanndi bee aawdi caka gi'e. Ɓe nani wolde Allah
Mark4:19 ammaa laruuraaji duniyaaru ndu e esto jawdi e suunooji feere feere nastan ɓerɗe maɓɓe
Mark4:20 Woɗɓe fahin
Mark4:21 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Goɗɗo jamnan pittirla ngam jo'ingo nga les bokoti malla les leeso na? Naa o jo'inan nga dow jo'inirɗum?
Mark4:22 Ngam cuuɗiiɗum fuu waŋgan nyalaade woɗnde
Mark4:23 Mo woodi noppi fuu nana!”
Mark4:24 Fahin Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Kakkilane ko on nanata. Allah foondan ko o hokkata on bee poondirgol ngol on poondirta e o ɓesdan dow maajum fahin.
Mark4:25 Ngam marɗo huunde
Mark4:26 Fahin Yeesu wi'i: “Laamu Allah nanndi bee goɗɗo mo rufi aawdi haa lesdi.
Mark4:27 Nden o yaha o ɗaano jemma
Mark4:28 Lesdi ndin ɗon fuɗna ko rufa: Aran fuɗŋgo
Mark4:29 To alkamaari ɓenndi
Mark4:30 Fahin Yeesu wi'i: “Bee ɗume nanndinten laamu Allah? Bee balndol ngole en paamtinta haala maagu?
Mark4:31 Ngu nanndi bee gawel citta. Ndi ɓuri aawdi duniyaaru fuu famɗugo.
Mark4:32 Ammaa to ɓe aawi ndi
Mark4:33 Yeesu waazini yimɓe Kubaruwol Belŋgol bee balndi ɗuuɗɗi bana ɗi'i
Mark4:34 O wolwani ɓe tum bee balndi. Ammaa nde o luttidi bee pukara'en maako kamɓe feere maɓɓe
Mark4:35 Nyannde maajum nde hiiri
Mark4:36 Nden ɓe acci mooɓre. Pukara'en nasti koommbowal ngal Yeesu nasti
Mark4:37 Henndu saatundu ummi
Mark4:38 Yeesu ɗon haa sakkitorde koommbowal
Mark4:39 Nde o fini
Mark4:40 Nden Yeesu wi'i pukara'en: “Ngam ɗume on kultori? Haa jonta on koolaaki yam na?”
Mark4:41 Ammaa ɓe kultorino masin
Mark5:1 Yeesu e pukara'en muuɗum njotti Galiili nder lesdi Geraseni'en gaɗa weendu.
Mark5:2 Nde Yeesu wurti koommbowal
Mark5:3 O ɗonno yeeɗa caka genaale. Walaa baawɗo haɓɓugo mo
Mark5:4 Nde ɗuuɗɗum yimɓe kaɓɓuno mo bee ge'elle e callalluuji
Mark5:5 Tum jemma e naaŋge fuu o ɗon caka genaale e nder kooseeje
Mark5:6 Ammaa nde o eewi Yeesu
Mark5:7 Nden o wooki
Mark5:8 O wi'i ɗum ngam Yeesu wi'no mo: “An ruuhu coɓŋgu
Mark5:9 Nden Yeesu ƴami mo: “Noy innde ma?” O jaabi: “Innde am Mooɓre
Mark5:10 O tori Yeesu ɗuuɗɗum
Mark5:11 Woodi tokkere gaduuji ɗuuɗɗi ton
Mark5:12 Ruuhuuji coɓɗi go tori Yeesu: “Nel min haa gaduuji ɗi ngam min nasta nder maaji.”
Mark5:13 Yeesu duŋani ɗi. Ɗi ngurti diga goɗɗo oo
Mark5:14 Durooɓe gaduuji ndoggi
Mark5:15 Ɓe ngari haa Yeesu
Mark5:16 Yi'ɓe ɗum fuu ngecci yimɓe ko waɗi marɗono ginnaaji go e ko fe'ani gaduuji.
Mark5:17 Nden yimɓe puɗɗi toraago Yeesu
Mark5:18 Yaake Yeesu ɗon nasta koommbowal
Mark5:19 Yeesu duŋanaaki mo
Mark5:20 Goɗɗo oo dilli
Mark5:21 Yeesu eerti weendu bee koommbowal
Mark5:22 Gooto haa ardiiɓe suudu dewal Yahuudu'en mo innde muuɗum Jayrus wari haa maako. Nde o yi'i Yeesu
Mark5:23 o tori mo ɗuuɗɗum
Mark5:24 Yeesu dillidi bee maako. Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde yahdi bee maako
Mark5:25 Woodi boo debbo feere ton. Duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi
Mark5:26 O yehi haa hurgooɓe ɗuuɗɓe
Mark5:27 Nde o nani habaru Yeesu
Mark5:28 Ngam o numno: “To mi heɓi mi meemi koo limce maako tan
Mark5:29 Nde o meemi limce Yeesu
Mark5:30 Wakkati man Yeesu anndi semmbe wurti haa muuɗum. O wayliti caka mooɓre
Mark5:31 Pukara'en maako njaabi: “A ɗon yi'a mooɓre ɗon ɓiɗɗe. Noy ƴamrata: Moy meemi yam?”
Mark5:32 Ammaa Yeesu laari taariiɓe mo haa o yi'a debbo meemɗo mo.
Mark5:33 Debbo oo diwni ngam kulol ngam o anndi ko waɗi mo
Mark5:34 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Ɓiŋngel am
Mark5:35 Diga Yeesu timminaay wolwugo tawon
Mark5:36 Ammaa Yeesu faalaay bolle maɓɓe. O wi'i Jayrus: “Taa hul
Mark5:37 Nden o duŋanaay koo gooto yahda bee maako
Mark5:38 Nde ɓe njotti saare Jayrus ardiiɗo suudu dewal Yahuudu'en
Mark5:39 O nasti saare
Mark5:40 Ɓe njanci mo. Nden o wurtini ɓe fuu. O luttidi bee baaba ɓiŋngel e daada maagel e pukara'en maako tato go
Mark5:41 O naŋngi juŋngo maagel
Mark5:42 Law ɓiŋngel deyel ummi
Mark5:43 Ammaa Yeesu barri ɓe bee caatal
Mark6:1 Yeesu ummi nokkuure maajum
Mark6:2 Nde nyannde siwtorde waɗi
Mark6:3 Naa kaŋko woni cehoowo? Naa o ɓii Mariyama e deerɗiraawo Yaakuba e Yoses e Yahuuda e Simon? Naa deerɗiraaɓe maako rewɓe boo ɗon ngondi bee meeɗen haa ɗo?” Ngam maajum ɓe cali nuɗɗingo mo.
Mark6:4 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Yimɓe ɗon teddina annabiijo koo toy
Mark6:5 Yeesu waawaay waɗugo kaayeefiwol koo ngole ton
Mark6:6 O hayɗini ngam sooynde nuɗɗinki maɓɓe. Ɓaawo maajum Yeesu yiiloyi haa gure lesdi man fuu
Mark6:7 O ewni pukara'en maako sappo e ɗiɗo
Mark6:8 O hokki ɓe umroore nde'e: “Taa njoge koo ɗume ngam jahaaŋgal
Mark6:9 Koo'e paɗe
Mark6:10 Fahin o wi'i ɓe: “To on nasti wuro woɗŋgo
Mark6:11 To on ngari haa wuro ngo ɓe cali jaɓɓaago on malla nanango on
Mark6:12 Pukara'en ndilli
Mark6:13 Ɓe ndiiwi ruuhuuji coɓɗi ɗuuɗɗi
Mark6:14 Ammaa laamiiɗo Hirudus nani habaru Yeesu
Mark6:15 Ammaa woɗɓe mbi'i: “Ɗum Eliya.” Woɗɓe boo mbi'i: “Ɗum annabiijo bana gooto annabi'en ɓooyma.”
Mark6:16 Nde Hirudus nani ɗum
Mark6:17 Naane Hirudus bee hoore muuɗum umrino
Mark6:18 Ngam Yuhanna wi'no Hirudus: “Haanaay a te'a debbo deerɗa.”
Mark6:19 Ngam maajum Hirudiya wanyi Yuhanna
Mark6:20 ngam Hirudus huli Yuhanna
Mark6:21 Nde nyalaade siftinorde danyeeki Hirudus yotti
Mark6:22 Ɓii Hirudiya debbo nasti

Mark6:24 Paanyo wurti
Mark6:25 Law paanyo lori haa laamiiɗo
Mark6:26 Ɗum suni laamiiɗo
Mark6:27 Nden o neli gooto nder sooje'en aynanɓe mo
Mark6:28 Nden o waddi nde nder le'al
Mark6:29 Nde pukara'en Yuhanna nani ɗum
Mark6:30 Nelaaɓe go lorti
Mark6:31 Ammaa
Mark6:32 Nden ɓe nasti koommbowal
Mark6:33 Ammaa ɗuuɗɓe ngi'i ɓe ɗon ndilla e ɓe paami haa ɓe njahata
Mark6:34 Nde Yeesu jippi koommbowal
Mark6:35 Nde hiiri
Mark6:36 Jaɓɓita yimɓe ɓe ndilla haa kawyeeji e gure ɓadiiɗe ɓe cooda ko ɓe nyaamata.”
Mark6:37 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Onon man ndokke ɓe ko ɓe nyaamata.” Pukara'en mbi'i mo: “A yiɗi min njaha
Mark6:38 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Tamseeje noy marɗon? Njehe
Mark6:39 Nden
Mark6:40 Ɓe njo'ini yimɓe teemerre teemerre
Mark6:41 Nden Yeesu hoo'i tamseeje jowi e liɗɗi ɗiɗi go
Mark6:42 Ɓe fuu ɓe nyaami
Mark6:43 Pukara'en mooɓti luttuɗum tamseeje e liɗɗi go
Mark6:44 Limgal nyaamɓe tamseeje man waɗi worɓe ujine njowo.
Mark6:45 Ɓaawo man Yeesu dooli pukara'en muuɗum ɓe nasta koommbowal
Mark6:46 Ɓaawo o jaɓɓiti nde
Mark6:47 Nde jemma waɗi
Mark6:48 O yi'i pukara'en maako ɗon kaɓda laanyugo koommbowal
Mark6:49 Nde ɓe ngi'i mo o ɗon yaha dow ndiyam
Mark6:50 Ngam ɓe fuu ɓe ngi'i mo
Mark6:51 Nden o nasti koommbowal
Mark6:52 Ngam ɓe paamaay kaayeefiwol tamseeje go
Mark6:53 Nde ɓe timmini eeraago weendu
Mark6:54 Ɓe ngurti koommbowal
Mark6:55 ɓe ndoggoy koo toy nder lesdi man fuu
Mark6:56 Koo toy Yeesu yehi
Mark7:1 Farisa'en e woɗɓe nder moodiɓɓe tawreeta warɓe diga Urusaliima kawti haa Yeesu.
Mark7:2 Ɓe ngi'i woɗɓe caka pukara'en maako ɗon nyaama bee juuɗe coɓɗe
Mark7:3 Ngam Farisa'en e Yahuudu'en fuu ɗon kakkilana al'aadaaji kaakiraaɓe
Mark7:4 To ɓe ngarti luumo
Mark7:5 Farisa'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ƴami Yeesu: “Koni pukara'en maaɗa ɗowtantaako al'aada kaakiraaɓe meeɗen
Mark7:6 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Annabaaku ngu Esaaya waɗi dow mooɗon gooŋɗi. On naafiki'en
Mark7:7 Ɓe ɗon cujidanammi meere
Mark7:8 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “On acci umrooje Allah
Mark7:9 Nden o ɓesdi wi'ugo: “On mbaawi wudingo umroore Allah ngam jogaago al'aada mooɗon.
Mark7:10 Muusa wi'i: Teddin baaba ma e daada ma. Koo moy wolwi kalluka dow baaba malla daada mum
Mark7:11 Ammaa onon
Mark7:12 nden kam walaa haaje o walla baaba malla daada maako fahin
Mark7:13 Bana nii
Mark7:14 Fahin Yeesu ewni yimɓe ɓe ngara haa maako
Mark7:15 Walaa koo ɗume ko woni yaasi neɗɗo waawata soɓnugo mo bee nastugo nder maako. Ammaa ko wurtoto haa maako
Mark7:16 [Mo woodi noppi ngam nanugo nana!]”
Mark7:17 Nde Yeesu seedi bee mooɓre
Mark7:18 O wi'i ɓe: “Onon boo on ngoodaa faamu na? On paamaay nii ko nastata neɗɗo diga yaasi fuu
Mark7:19 ngam ɗum nastataa ɓernde maako
Mark7:20 Fahin o wi'i: “Ko wurtoto diga nder neɗɗo
Mark7:21 Ngam haa nder
Mark7:22 e njeenu e suuno e halleende e fewjere e kuuje cemtiniiɗe e kaajal e kuudi kallundi e mawnitaare e faataare.
Mark7:23 Kuuje kalluɗe ɗe'e fuu nder neɗɗo ɗe iwata
Mark7:24 Yeesu ummi ton
Mark7:25 Nden debbo mo ruuhu coɓŋgu ɗon torra ɓiŋngel muuɗum deyel
Mark7:26 Debbo oo
Mark7:27 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i mo: “Accu ɓikkoy kaara tawon
Mark7:28 Debbo wi'i mo: “Nonnon yaa Jawmiraawo
Mark7:29 Nden Yeesu wi'i mo: “Ngam daliila wolde maaɗa nde'e
Mark7:30 O hooti
Mark7:31 Ɓaawo man Yeesu wurti lesdi Tirus. O saali gal lesdi Sidon
Mark7:32 Ɓe ngaddani mo goɗɗo paho mo waawataa wolwugo laaɓɗum. Ɓe tori mo o wallina juŋngo dow maako.
Mark7:33 Nden Yeesu wurtini mo nder mooɓre
Mark7:34 Nden o tijji asama
Mark7:35 Law noppi maako cukkiti
Mark7:36 Yeesu umri ɓe fuu taa ɓe anndina goɗɗo haala man. Ammaa koo nde o ɗuɗɗini bolle
Mark7:37 Nanɓe ɗum kayɗini masin
Mark8:1 Saa'i man mooɓre ɗuuɗnde mooɓti fahin. Nde ɓe ngoodaa ko ɓe nyaama
Mark8:2 “Mi ɗon yurmina yimɓe ɓe'e
Mark8:3 To mi jaɓɓiti ɓe
Mark8:4 Pukara'en maako mbi'i mo: “Noy goɗɗo heɓrata nyaamdu he'anndu yimɓe ɓe fuu haa nder ladde hamaadaare nde'e?”
Mark8:5 Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Tamseeje noy marɗon?” Ɓe njaabi: “Joweeɗiɗi.”
Mark8:6 O umri yimɓe njooɗo. Nden o hoo'i tamseeje joweeɗiɗi go
Mark8:7 Ɓe ngoodi boo liɗɗi pamari seɗɗa. Yeesu waɗi yettoore ngam maaji
Mark8:8 Ɓe fuu ɓe nyaami
Mark8:9 Limgal yimɓe man waɗi baakin worɓe ujine nayo
Mark8:10 Law o nasti koommbowal bee pukara'en maako
Mark8:11 Farisa'en ngari puɗɗi waabotirgo bee Yeesu. Ɓe ngiɗi jarribaago mo. Ngam maajum ɓe ƴami mo o waŋginana ɓe alaama iwka diga asama.
Mark8:12 Yeesu uumi nder muuɗum
Mark8:13 Nden o acci ɓe
Mark8:14 Pukara'en ngejjiti hoo'ugo tamseeje. Ɓe ngalaa tamseeje
Mark8:15 Yeesu reentini ɓe
Mark8:16 Pukara'en carwootiri
Mark8:17 Yeesu anndi ko ɓe mbi'i
Mark8:18 On ngoodi gite
Mark8:19 Nde mi senndani yimɓe ujine njowo tamseeje jowi
Mark8:20 “Yeesu wi'i ɓe
Mark8:21 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Haa jonta on ngalaa faamu na?”
Mark8:22 Ɓe njotti Baytisayda
Mark8:23 Yeesu naŋngi juŋngo bumɗo oo
Mark8:24 Bumɗo ɓaŋgti gite
Mark8:25 Fahin Yeesu wallini juuɗe dow gite maako
Mark8:26 Nden Yeesu jaɓɓiti mo
Mark8:27 Ɓaawoɗon Yeesu e pukara'en muuɗum ndilli gure ɓadiiɗe bee Kaysariya Filippi. Dow laawol
Mark8:28 Ɓe njaabi mo: “Woɗɓe ɗon mbi'a an woni Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma. Woɗɓe boo ɗon mbi'a an woni Eliya. Fahin woɗɓe ɗon ndaare bana gooto annabi'en ɓooyma.”
Mark8:29 Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Onon boo
Mark8:30 Nden Yeesu umri ɓe bee caatal
Mark8:31 Nden Yeesu fuɗɗi anndingo pukara'en muuɗum
Mark8:32 O wi'i ɓe ɗum bee baŋguɗum. Piyer wicciti mo sera

Mark8:34 Nden Yeesu ewni mooɓre e pukara'en muuɗum

Mark8:36 To goɗɗo heɓi duniyaaru fuu
Mark8:37 Malla woodi ko goɗɗo waawata hokkugo ngam soottugo yoŋki maako na? Walaa sam!
Mark8:38 To goɗɗo semti yam e bolle am hannde caka yimɓe halluɓe

Mark9:9 Nde ɓe ɗon njippo hooseere go

Mark9:30 Ɓe ummi ton

Mark9:32 Pukara'en paamaay maana anndinol ngol
Mark9:33 Ɓe njotti Kafarnahum. Nde ɓe nasti saare

Mark10:1 Yeesu ummi nokkuure man
Mark10:2 Farisa'en woɗɓe ngari haa maako ngam jarribaago mo. Ɓe ƴami mo: “Tawreeta duŋanake gorko seera debbo mum na?”
Mark10:3 Yeesu jaabori ɓe bee ƴamol ngol: “Ɗume Muusa umri on?”
Mark10:4 Ɓe njaabi: “Muusa duŋani gorko winnda ɗereewol ceergal
Mark10:5 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ngam caatal ko'e mooɗon Muusa winndani on umroore nde'e.
Mark10:6 Ammaa haa fuɗɗam
Mark10:7 Ngam maajum gorko accan baaba muuɗum e daada muuɗum
Mark10:8 Ɓe ɗiɗo fuu ɓe laatoto ɓanndu wooru. Bana non ɓe laatataako yimɓe ɗiɗo ɓaawoɗon
Mark10:9 Ngam maajum taa neɗɗo fiista ko Allah haɓɓi.”
Mark10:10 Nde ɓe nasti saare
Mark10:11 Yeesu faamtini ɓe
Mark10:12 Non boo to debbo acci gorko muuɗum
Mark10:13 Yimɓe ngaddi ɓikkoy pamaroy haa Yeesu ngam o meema koy. Ammaa pukara'en caatani yimɓe ɓe.
Mark10:14 Nde Yeesu yi'i ɗum
Mark10:15 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Mark10:16 Nden o huufi ɓikkoy go
Mark10:17 Nde Yeesu ɗon yaha dow laawol
Mark10:18 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Ngam ɗume a wi'ata yam mi booɗɗo? Sey Allah gooto tan woni booɗɗo.
Mark10:19 A anndi umrooje: Taa mbar-hoore
Mark10:20 Goɗɗo oo wi'i: “Moodibbo
Mark10:21 Yeesu suti mo bee yiide
Mark10:22 Ammaa nde goɗɗo oo nani bolle ɗe'e
Mark10:23 Yeesu laari pukara'en muuɗum
Mark10:24 Bolle ɗe'e kayɗini pukara'en masin. Ammaa Yeesu wi'i ɓe fahin: “Ɓikkoy am
Mark10:25 Ngeelooba saalo nder wurdere baatal ɓuri hoyugo dow diskuɗo nasta laamu Allah.”
Mark10:26 Pukara'en ɓesdi hayɗingo masin
Mark10:27 Yeesu suti ɓe
Mark10:28 Nden Piyer wi'i mo: “Ndaa minin min acci kuuje fuu
Mark10:29 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Gooŋga. Min boo mi ɗon wi'a on: Koo moy acci saare malla deerɗiraaɓe malla daada malla baaba malla ɓikkoy malla gese muuɗum ngam daliila am e ngam Linjiila
Mark10:30 o heɓtan ɗum cowi teemerre nder ngeendam maako jonta: Calaaje e deerɗiraaɓe worɓe e rewɓe e daadiraaɓe e ɓikkoy e gese e bee toonyaaŋgeeji boo. Nder zamanuuru waranndu boo o heɓan ngeendam nduumiiɗam.
Mark10:31 Ɗuuɗɓe aartuɓe laatoto sakkitiiɓe
Mark10:32 Ɓe ɗon dow laawol yahugo Urusaliima. Yeesu ɗon ardi pukara'en muuɗum
Mark10:33 O wi'i ɓe: “Nane
Mark10:34 Kamɓe boo ɓe njancan mo
Mark10:35 Nden Yaakuba e Yuhanna ɓiɓɓe Zebede ɓaditi Yeesu
Mark10:36 Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Ɗume on ngiɗi mi waɗana on?”
Mark10:37 Ɓe njaabi mo: “To a jooɗake dow leeso laamu ma nder tedduŋgal ma
Mark10:38 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “On anndaa ko torotooɗon. On mbaawan yarugo jardugel bone ngel mi yarata na malla jaɓugo baptisma bone ɗe mi jaɓata na?”
Mark10:39 Ɓe njaabi mo: “Min mbaawan.” Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Gooŋga
Mark10:40 Ammaa ko laarani jooɗaago haa nyaamo malla haa nano am
Mark10:41 Nde pukara'en sappo luttuɓe nani haala man
Mark10:42 Nden Yeesu ewni ɓe fuu
Mark10:43 Ammaa taa ɗum wona non caka mooɗon. To gooto mooɗon yiɗi laataago mawɗo
Mark10:44 Mo yiɗi ardaago caka mooɗon
Mark10:45 Ngam Ɓii-neɗɗo boo waraay ngam yimɓe kuuwana mo
Mark10:46 Ɓe njotti Yeriko. Nde Yeesu wurti wuro maajum bee pukara'en muuɗum e mooɓre ɗuuɗnde
Mark10:47 Nde o nani Yeesu Nasaratuujo ɗon saalo
Mark10:48 Ɗuuɗɓe telɓani mo
Mark10:49 Yeesu dari
Mark10:50 Nden o wudini alkibbaare maako
Mark10:51 Yeesu ƴami mo: “Ɗume ngiɗɗa mi waɗane?” Bumɗo jaabi: “Moodibbo
Mark10:52 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Yah
Mark11:1 Nde ɓe ɓaditi Urusaliima
Mark11:2 o wi'i ɓe: “Njehe wuro wonŋgo yeeso mooɗon. To on nasti ngo
Mark11:3 To goɗɗo ƴami on: Koni piistoton nde? Njaabe mo: Jawmiraawo woodi haaje maare
Mark11:4 Nden ɓe ndilli
Mark11:5 Woɗɓe dariiɓe ton ƴami ɓe: “Ɗume mbaɗoton ɗo? Ngam ɗume piistoton molde nde?”
Mark11:6 Ɓe njaabi bana Yeesu wi'no ɓe
Mark11:7 Ɓe ngaddani Yeesu molde
Mark11:8 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe mbe'iti limce muuɗum'en dow laawol
Mark11:9 Yimɓe ardiiɓe Yeesu e tokkiiɓe ɓaawo fuu kooli
Mark11:10 Allah barkiɗina laamu ngaranŋgu
Mark11:11 Yeesu nasti Urusaliima. O nasti haykaliiru boo
Mark11:12 Jaŋngo maajum nde ɓe ngurti Baytaniya
Mark11:13 O eewi ibbi bee haakooji ɗuuɗɗi
Mark11:14 Nden Yeesu wi'i ibbi: “Taa goɗɗo meeta nyaamugo ibbe haa maaɗa!” Pukara'en maako nani.
Mark11:15 Nde ɓe njotti Urusaliima
Mark11:16 O accaay koo gooto saalo nder haykaliiru bee doŋngal.
Mark11:17 Nden o ekkitini yimɓe
Mark11:18 Mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta nani haala man
Mark11:19 Nde hiiri
Mark11:20 Jaŋngo man fajiri
Mark11:21 Piyer siftori
Mark11:22 Nden Yeesu jaabi pukara'en muuɗum: “Nuɗɗine Allah.
Mark11:23 Gooŋga mi ɗon wi'a on
Mark11:24 Ngam maajum mi ɗon wi'a on: Nde on toroto huunde fuu
Mark11:25 Yaake on ndarake ngam waɗugo do'a
Mark11:26 [Ammaa to on njaafaaki woɗɓe
Mark11:27 Ɓe lorti haa Urusaliima. Yaake Yeesu ɗon waanca nder haykaliiru
Mark11:28 Ɓe ƴami mo: “Bee duŋayeere moy a waarata kuuje ɗe'e? Moy duŋani ma waɗugo bana nii?”
Mark11:29 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Min boo mi ƴaman on huunde woore. To on njaabake yam
Mark11:30 Moy duŋani Yuhanna waɗango yimɓe baptisma? Allah naa malla yimɓe? Njaabe.”
Mark11:31 Nden ɓe carwootiri
Mark11:32 Haa en njaabo ɗum yimɓe…” ndaa ɓe ɗon kula ummaatoore ngam yimɓe fuu ndaari Yuhanna o annabiijo fakat.
Mark11:33 Nden ɓe njaabi Yeesu: “Min anndaa.” Yeesu wi'i: “Min boo mi wi'ataa on bee duŋayeere moy mbaɗanmi kuuje ɗe'e.”
Mark12:1 Nden Yeesu fuɗɗi wolwango ɓe bee balndi. O wi'i: “Goɗɗo jubi ngesa inabooje
Mark12:2 Nde saa'i teɓugo inabooje waɗi
Mark12:3 Ammaa ɓe naŋngi jaggiiɗo oo
Mark12:4 Nden jawmu ngesa neli jaggiiɗo muuɗum feere. Kaŋko boo remooɓe naawni mo haa hoore
Mark12:5 Jawmu ngesa neli jaggiiɗo muuɗum feere fahin
Mark12:6 Luttani jawmu ngesa ɓiɗɗo gooto tan
Mark12:7 Ammaa remooɓe ɓe'e carwootiri
Mark12:8 Nden ɓe naŋngi ɓiɗɗo go
Mark12:9 Nden Yeesu tokki wi'ugo: “Ɗume jawmu ngesa waɗata? O waran
Mark12:10 Walaa seko on njaŋngi aaya ka'a: Hayre nde mahooɓe ngudini
Mark12:11 Jawmiraawo waɗi ɗum
Mark12:12 Mawɓe Yahuudu'en ɗaɓɓi naŋngugo Yeesu
Mark12:13 Ɓe neli Farisa'en woɗɓe e yimɓe Hirudus haa Yeesu ngam naŋngugo mo nder ƴamol tuufnorgol.
Mark12:14 Ɓe ngari
Mark12:15 Nde Yeesu anndi naafikaare maɓɓe
Mark12:16 Ɓe ngaddani mo. Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Suura moy e innde moy dow maare?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Kaysara
Mark12:17 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Njoɓe Kaysara
Mark12:18 Saduki'en wi'anɓe maayɓe ummitittaako ngari haa Yeesu. Ɓe ƴami mo ƴamol ngo'ol:
Mark12:19 “Moodibbo
Mark12:20 Woodino deerɗiraaɓe njoweeɗiɗo. Arano te'i debbo
Mark12:21 Ɗiɗaɓo te'i mo
Mark12:22 Haa njoweeɗiɗo te'ɓe debbo oo fuu maayi
Mark12:23 Nyalaade ummitineeki
Mark12:24 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “On ɗon mboofa masin! Ngam on anndaa Defte Ceniiɗe
Mark12:25 Ngam to maayɓe ummitake
Mark12:26 Ko laarani haala maayɓe e ummitineeki maɓɓe
Mark12:27 Allah o Allah yeeɗɓe
Mark12:28 Gooto nder Moodiɓɓe tawreeta nani kujjootiral maɓɓe
Mark12:29 Yeesu jaabi: “Ndaa umroore ɓurnde mawnugo: Onon Isra'iila'en
Mark12:30 Yiɗ Jawmiraawo
Mark12:31 Ndaa umroore ɗiɗawre: Yiɗ keeddiɗɗiraawo maaɗa bana hoore maaɗa. Walaa umroore feere ɓuri ɗe'e. ”
Mark12:32 Nden moodibbo tawreeta wi'i Yeesu: “Booɗɗum moodibbo. Ko a wi'i
Mark12:33 Sey koo moy fuu yiɗa Allah bee ɓernde e hakkiilo e semmbe mum fuu
Mark12:34 Yeesu nani o jaabi booɗɗum bee hikma
Mark12:35 Nde Yeesu ɗon ekkitina nder haykaliiru
Mark12:36 Ngam Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ɗowi Daawuda
Mark12:37 Daawuda bee hoore muuɗum ewni mo Jawmiraawo
Mark12:38 Ndaa ko o ɗon ekkitina koo moy: “Ndeente e moodiɓɓe tawreeta
Mark12:39 Nder cuuɗi dewal Yahuudu'en
Mark12:40 Ɓe ɗon njaɓta marle rewɓe yurumɓe
Mark12:41 Nden Yeesu jooɗi baŋnge baatirɗum ceede nder haykaliiru. O hakkilani yimɓe waatanɓe ceede nder baatirɗum ceede man. Riskuɓe ɗuuɗɓe ndokki ceede ɗuuɗɗe.
Mark12:42 Debbo jurumɗo talakaajo boo wari
Mark12:43 Yeesu ewni pukara'en muuɗum
Mark12:44 Ngam kamɓe ɓe ndokki seɗɗa diga ɗuuɗeeŋga jawdi maɓɓe
Mark13:1 Nde Yeesu wurti haykaliiru

Mark13:6 Ɗuuɗɓe ngaran bee innde am
Mark13:7 To on nani habaru konuuji ɓadiiɗi e daayiiɗi
Mark13:8 Ummaatoore haɓan bee ummaatoore woɗnde
Mark13:9 Ammaa onon
Mark13:10 Sey ummaatooje fuu nana waazu Linjiila tawon.
Mark13:11 To ɓe naŋngi on
Mark13:12 Yimɓe ndokkan deerɗiraaɓe maɓɓe ngam mbareego
Mark13:13 Koo moy fuu wanyan on daliila innde am. Ammaa mo munyi haa timmoode

Mark13:15 Mo ɗon dow soorowol
Mark13:16 Mo ɗon haa ngesa
Mark13:17 Kayto! Bone laatanto reedu'en e musininanɓe nder nyalɗe man!
Mark13:18 Tore Allah ngam taa ɗum laato saa'i duumol.
Mark13:19 Ngam nder nyalɗe maajum ɓillaare naawnde waɗan
Mark13:20 To Allah ustaayno limgal nyalɗe man
Mark13:21 Wakkati man
Mark13:22 Ngam fewooɓe wi'anɓe ɓe almasiihu'en malla ɓe annabi'en mbaŋgan
Mark13:23 Onon
Mark13:24 Nder nyalɗe ɓaawo ɓillaare nde'e
Mark13:25 koode asama njanan
Mark13:26 Nden Ɓii-neɗɗo waŋgan gite yimɓe
Mark13:27 O nelan malaa'ika'en haa alkibilaaji nayi ngam mooɓtugo suɓaaɓe maako diga keerol duniyaaru ngo'ol haa ngola.
Mark13:28 Paame ko ibbi anndinta on: To lice maaki kesɗiti
Mark13:29 Bana non onon boo
Mark13:30 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Kuuje ɗe'e fuu laatoto hiddeko yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u fuu maayda.

Mark14:1 Lutti nyalɗe ɗiɗi haa juulde Paska e tamseeje ɗe ufnaaka waɗe. Mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ɗaɓɓi no ɓe ƴoyra Yeesu

Mark14:4 Woɗɓe caka yimɓe ton ɓerni
Mark14:5 To o soorrino ɗam ko ɓuri suleyje cardi teemeɗɗe tati

Mark14:38 Ayne

Mark14:42 Umme

Mark14:44 Yahuuda zammbotooɗo Yeesu hokkuno ɓe alaama
Mark14:45 Nde o yotti
Mark14:46 Nden woɗɓe boo ukki dow Yeesu
Mark14:47 Ammaa gooto haa dariiɓe ton losi kaafahi muuɗum

Mark14:54 Piyer tokki daayiiɗum

Mark15:1 Fajiri cub

Mark15:6 Nde juulde Paska waɗi fuu

Mark15:8 Nden yimɓe mooɓre ndilli haa saare Pilaatu

Mark15:10 Ngam o anndi

Mark15:16 Sooje'en njahri Yeesu haa daldal laamorde
Mark15:17 Ɓe ɓorni mo mojaare woɗeere
Mark15:18 Nden ɓe koofni mo: “Allah woonane

Mark15:20 Nde ɓe timmini jancugo mo

Mark15:22 Ɓe njahri Yeesu haa nokkuure nde ɓe mbi'ata Golgota bana wi'ugo: nokkuure Gumbal-hoore.
Mark15:23 Ton ɓe ngiɗi yarnugo mo inaboojam ɓennduɗam jillaaɗam bee ɗacce
Mark15:24 Nden ɓe ɓili mo haa leggal gaafaaŋgal
Mark15:25 Ɗum ɗonno saa'a joweenayi fajiri
Mark15:26 Ɓe mbinndi daliila kiita maako dow alluha bana ni'i: “Laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en.”
Mark15:27 Ɓe ɓildi fasooɓe ɗiɗo bee Yeesu haa leɗɗe gaafaaɗe
Mark15:28 [Bana nii ko deftere wi'i gooŋɗiri
Mark15:29 Saalotooɓe ton ndimmbini ko'e muuɗum'en
Mark15:30 Jippa leggal gaafaaŋgal kadi
Mark15:31 Bana non boo mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta njanci Yeesu
Mark15:32 Sey en ngi'a Almasiihu
Mark15:33 Caka naaŋge nyiɓre suddi lesdi fuu haa yotti saa'a tati asiri.
Mark15:34 Saa'a tati Yeesu hooli bee sawtu: “ Elohi
Mark15:35 Woɗɓe dariiɓe ton nani ɗum
Mark15:36 Gooto maɓɓe yaawi suuwi sooso nder lammuɗam
Mark15:37 Ammaa Yeesu hooli bee semmbe
Mark15:38 Wiirndallo nder haykaliiru seeki caka cak diga dow haa les.
Mark15:39 Nde ardiiɗo dow sooje'en Roma teemerre dariiɗo les leggal gaafaaŋgal yi'i no Yeesu maayri
Mark15:40 Woodi boo rewɓe ton
Mark15:41 Ɓe tokkino Yeesu

Mark15:44 Pilaatu hayɗini nanugo Yeesu maayi law bana nii. O ewni mawɗo sooje'en go
Mark15:45 Ɓaawo mawɗo sooje'en Roma anndini mo habaru man

Mark15:47 Mariyama mo Magdala e Mariyama daada Yoses ndaari haa ɓe mballini ɓanndu Yeesu.
Mark16:1 Nde nyannde siwtorde saali
Mark16:2 Alat
Mark16:3 Ɓe mbi'mbi'tiri hakkunde maɓɓe: “Moy sottinanta en hayre haa nastirde yenaande?”
Mark16:4 Ammaa nde ɓe ɓaŋgti gite
Mark16:5 Ɓe nasti nder yenaande. Ɓe ngi'i suka ɗon jooɗi ton haa wakeere nyaamre
Mark16:6 Ammaa o wi'i ɓe: “Taa kultore! On ɗon ɗaɓɓita Yeesu Nasaratuujo mo ɓe ɓilino haa leggal gaafaaŋgal. O walaaɗon haa ɗo
Mark16:7 Jonta ndille
Mark16:8 Rewɓe ngurti yenaande man
Mark16:9 Ɓaawo Yeesu ummiti diga maayde
Mark16:10 O yehi
Mark16:11 Ɓe nani Mariyama ɗon wi'a: “Yeesu o geeto
Mark16:12 Ɓaawo maajum Yeesu waŋgani ɗiɗo maɓɓe bee jaati feere
Mark16:13 Ɓe lori
Mark16:14 Ɓaawoɗon Yeesu waŋgani pukara'en sappo e go'o saa'i ɓe ɗon nyaama. O feli ɓe ngam sooynde nuɗɗinki maɓɓe. O feli ɓe boo ngam caatal ɓerɗe maɓɓe
Mark16:15 Nden o wi'i ɓe: “Njehe koo toy nder duniyaaru
Mark16:16 Koo moy nuɗɗini
Mark16:17 Nuɗɗinɓe mbaŋginan alaamaaji ɗi'i: Ɓe ndiiwan ginnaaji bee innde am
Mark16:18 To ɓe naŋngi boɗɗe bee juuɗe malla to ɓe njari njaram mbaroojam
Mark16:19 Ɓaawo nde Jawmiraawo timmini wolwango pukara'en muuɗum
Mark16:20 Pukara'en kam ndilli
Luke1:1 Yaa Teyofilus tedduɗo: Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe kaɓdi winndugo kubaruwol kuuje laatiiɗe caka meeɗen.
Luke1:2 Ɓe mbinndi ko min nani haa yi'ɓe kuuje ɗe'e bee gite muuɗum'en diga fuɗɗam
Luke1:3 Ngam maajum nde mi humpiti laaɓka kuuje ɗe'e fuu diga fuɗɗoode maaje
Luke1:4 Mi waɗi ɗum ngam haa a faama hoolɗinaare ekkitinolji ɗi keɓɗa.
Luke1:5 Nder zamanu Hirudus ɗonno laamani lesdi Yahudiya
Luke1:6 Ɓe ɗiɗo fuu ɓe adili'en yeeso Allah
Luke1:7 Ammaa ɓe ngalaano ɓiŋngel
Luke1:8 Nyannde feere Zekariya ɗon huuwa kuugal limanku muuɗum yeeso Allah
Luke1:9 Liman'en mboowi senndugo kuuɗe hakkunde muuɗum'en bee waɗugo kur'u. Nyalaade man
Luke1:10 Saa'i o ɗon wula uurle
Luke1:11 Ɗon nii
Luke1:12 Nde o yi'i mo
Luke1:13 Ammaa malaa'ikaajo wi'i mo: “Taa hultor
Luke1:14 A seyoto masin
Luke1:15 Ngam o laatoto mawɗo yeeso Jawmiraawo. O yarataa inaboojam malla nguykinoojam koo ɗame. O kebbinteeɗo bee Ruuhu Ceniiɗo diga nder reedu daada maako.
Luke1:16 O lornan Isra'iila'en ɗuuɗɓe haa Jawmiraawo Allah maɓɓe.
Luke1:17 O aartan Jawmiraawo wargo nder ruuhu e baawɗe ɗe annabi Eliya heɓno
Luke1:18 Ammaa Zekariya wi'i malaa'ikaajo: “Noy anndiranmi ɗum gooŋga? Ngam min mi naywi
Luke1:19 Malaa'ikaajo jaabi mo: “Min mi Jibirilla
Luke1:20 Ammaa a nuɗɗinaay bolle am tammiiɗe gooŋɗugo to wakkati man waɗi. Ngam maajum a laatoto muukaajo
Luke1:21 Saa'i man yimɓe ɗon ndeena Zekariya. Ɓe kayɗini ngam o neeɓi nder haykaliiru.
Luke1:22 Nde o wurti
Luke1:23 Nde wakkati kuugal Zekariya nder haykaliiru timmi
Luke1:24 Nyalɗe seɗɗa ɓaawoɗon
Luke1:25 “Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo waɗani yam: O ittani yam semteende ndimaraaku am caka yimɓe fuu.”
Luke1:26 Nde Elizabet reedi
Luke1:27 O neli mo haa paanyo debbo
Luke1:28 Malaa'ikaajo wari haa maako
Luke1:29 Bolle ɗe'e cakli Mariyama masin
Luke1:30 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i mo: “Taa hultor
Luke1:31 A tammi reedugo
Luke1:32 O laatoto mawɗo
Luke1:33 O laamanto ummaatoore Isra'iila haa foroy
Luke1:34 Mariyama wi'i malaa'ikaajo: “Noy ɗum laatorto
Luke1:35 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i mo: “Ruuhu Ceniiɗo waran dow maaɗa
Luke1:36 Elizabet
Luke1:37 Ngam walaa ko saɗani Allah.”
Luke1:38 Mariyama wi'i: “Min mi korɗo Jawmiraawo
Luke1:39 Nder balɗe man Mariyama ummi
Luke1:40 O nasti saare Zekariya
Luke1:41 Saa'i Elizabet nani koofŋgol Mariyama
Luke1:42 wi'i bee sawtu: “A barkiɗinaaɗo caka rewɓe fuu
Luke1:43 Min mi moye haa daada Jawmiraawo am wara haa am?
Luke1:44 Ngam ndaa
Luke1:45 Barka laatani ma ngam a nuɗɗini ko Jawmiraawo wi'i ma
Luke1:46 Nden Mariyama wi'i: “Nafsu am ɗon maŋgta Jawmiraawo
Luke1:47 ɓernde am ɗon heewi seyo ngam Allah am
Luke1:48 Ngam o yerdi laarugo korɗo maako leesɗo. Fakat
Luke1:49 ngam Allah Baawɗo waɗani yam kuuje mawɗe! Innde maako woni Ceniiɗo
Luke1:50 enɗam maako ɗon dow hulɓe mo diga yidere haa yidere.
Luke1:51 O huuwi kuuɗe mawɗe bee juŋngo maako semmbiɗŋgo
Luke1:52 O jippini semmbiɗɓe diga leese laamu muuɗum'en
Luke1:53 O haarni dolɓe bee kuuje booɗɗe
Luke1:54 O walli Isra'iila
Luke1:55 bana o wi'no kaakiraaɓe meeɗen
Luke1:56 Mariyama jooɗodi bee Elizabet ko dillani lebbi tati
Luke1:57 Nde saa'i Elizabet danyata yotti
Luke1:58 Heeddiɗɗiraaɓe maako e banndiraaɓe maako nani Jawmiraawo waɗani mo enɗam ɗuuɗɗam
Luke1:59 Nde nyalaade joweetataɓre waɗi
Luke1:60 Ammaa daada maagel wi'i: “Aa'a
Luke1:61 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Walaa koo gooto nder banndiraaɓe ma mari innde nde'e.”
Luke1:62 Nden ɓe mbaɗani baaba maagel alaama bolle bee juuɗe
Luke1:63 Zekariya anndini ɓe
Luke1:64 Saa'i man nden hunnduko Zekariya maɓɓiti
Luke1:65 Heeddiɗɗiraaɓe maako fuu kultori masin. Haa lesdi kooseeje Yahudiya fuu ɓe mbolwi haala kuuje ɗe'e.
Luke1:66 Nanɓe ɗum fuu tokki numugo: “Ɗume ɓiŋngel nge'el tammi laataago?” Ngam fakat
Luke1:67 Zekariya
Luke1:68 “Yettoore laatano Allah
Luke1:69 O darnani en kisnoowo cemmbiɗɗo
Luke1:70 Kanjum woni ko o anndinno diga ɓooyma bee kunnduɗe annabi'en maako seniiɓe
Luke1:71 o wi'no o rimɗinan en diga juuɗe konne'en meeɗen
Luke1:72 O waŋginani kaakiraaɓe meeɗen enɗam maako
Luke1:73 Ngam Allah hunani kaakiraawo meeɗen Ibrahiima
Luke1:74 o hisnan en baawɗe konne'en meeɗen
Luke1:75 ngam haa en laato yimɓe maako seniiɓe e adili'en nder balɗe ngeendam meeɗen fuu.
Luke1:76 An boo
Luke1:77 A anndinan yimɓe maako o hisnan ɓe
Luke1:78 Allah meeɗen o keewɗo enɗam
Luke1:79 ngam yaynango wonɓe nder nyiɓre e les ɗowdi maayde e ɗowugo kosɗe meeɗen dow laawol salaaman.”
Luke1:80 Yuhanna mawni
Luke2:1 Nder saa'i man laamiiɗo Agustus
Luke2:2 Kaŋgol woni binndol aranol

Luke2:5 O yehi ton ngam winndeego
Luke2:6 Yaake ɓe ɗon ton
Luke2:7 O danyi ɓiŋngel gorgel
Luke2:8 Woodino waynaaɓe haa ladde nder lesdi maajum

Luke2:11 Jemmaare hanndeere nde'e

Luke2:13 Law

Luke2:22 Nde wakkati laɓɓinki Mariyama fodde tawreeta Muusa hiɓɓi
Luke2:23 Ngam tawreeta Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Ɓiɗɗo gorko afo fuu
Luke2:24 Ɓe ngari boo ngam ɓe lii'o kirseteeɗum bana Jawmiraawo umri: “Pooli masar ɗiɗi malla pooloy ɗiɗoy.”
Luke2:25 Woodino goɗɗo feere ton
Luke2:26 anndini mo o maayataa
Luke2:27 Ruuhu yerɓi mo
Luke2:28 Simeyon hoo'i ngel haa juuɗe muuɗum
Luke2:29 “Jonta yaa Jawmiraawo
Luke2:30 Ngam mi yi'i kisndam maaɗa bee gite am
Luke2:31 kisndam ɗam a taaskitinani ummaatooje fuu.
Luke2:32 Kanjum woni annoora ka waŋginte haa ummaatooje goɗɗe
Luke2:33 Baaba e daada Yeesu kayɗini nde ɓe nani Simeyon ɗon wolwa dow maako bana non.
Luke2:34 Simeyon barkiɗini ɓe e o wi'i Mariyama
Luke2:35 O waŋginan numooji yimɓe cuuɗiiɗi. An bee hoore maaɗa boo
Luke2:36 Woodino annabiijo debbo
Luke2:37 O jooɗi o jurumɗo haa duuɓi maako mbaɗi cappanɗe joweetati e nayi. O ɗon haa haykaliiru tum
Luke2:38 O wari wakkati man
Luke2:39 Nde saaro'en Yeesu timmini waɗugo ko tawreeta Jawmiraawo umri
Luke2:40 Ɓiŋngel tokki mawnugo e semmbiɗiɗgo
Luke2:41 Hitaande fuu saaro'en Yeesu ɗon njaha Urusaliima ngam waɗugo juulde Paska.
Luke2:42 Nde Yeesu waɗi duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi
Luke2:43 Nde juulde timmi
Luke2:44 Ɓe tammino o ɗon wondi bee yahdanɓe bee maɓɓe. Ɓe njehi baakin nyalaade woore
Luke2:45 Ammaa ɓe keɓtaay mo
Luke2:46 Nyannde tataɓre maajum
Luke2:47 Nanooɓe mo fuu kayɗini daliila faamu maako e jaawaabuuji ɗi o jaabori.
Luke2:48 Nde saaro'en maako ngi'i mo
Luke2:49 O jaabi ɓe
Luke2:50 Ammaa ɓe paamaay ko o wi'i ɓe.

Luke3:1 Nder hitaande sappo e jowaɓre haa laamu Tiberiyus Kaysara
Luke3:2 Annas e Kayafas ngonno mawɓe liman'en. Saa'i man Allah wolwani Yuhanna ɓii Zekariya nder ladde.
Luke3:3 O waanci lesdi kommbi maayo Urdun fuu
Luke3:4 Ɗum laati bana annabi Esaaya winnduno nder deftere muuɗum: “Goɗɗo ɗon hoola nder ladde: Mo'inane Jawmiraawo laawol
Luke3:5 Waadiwol fuu fottitan
Luke3:6 Yimɓe fuu ngi'an kisndam Allah.”
Luke3:7 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe ngari haa Yuhanna ngam o waɗana ɓe baptisma. O wi'i ɓe: “Ɓiɓɓe poosokje
Luke3:8 Kuuwe kuuɗe ɗe mbaŋginta on tuubi! Taa nume nder ɓerɗe mooɗon
Luke3:9 Jonta ma fe'irde ɗon taaski ngam fe'ugo lekki diga ɗaɗi mum: Lekki ki rimataa ɓiɓɓe booɗɗe fuu
Luke3:10 Yimɓe ƴami mo: “Ɗume haani min mbaɗa kadi?”
Luke3:11 O jaabi ɓe: “Mo mari toggooje ɗiɗi
Luke3:12 Jomnooɓe boo ngari haa Yuhanna ngam ɓe njaɓa baptisma
Luke3:13 O jaabi ɓe: “Taa on njomna yimɓe ɓura ko ɓe umri on jaɓugo haa maɓɓe.”
Luke3:14 Sooje'en boo ngari
Luke3:15 Yimɓe ɗonno ndeena bee tammunde
Luke3:16 Yuhanna wi'i ɓe fuu maɓɓe: “Min mi ɗon waɗana on baptisma bee ndiyam
Luke3:17 O woodi jaartirɗum haa juŋngo maako
Luke3:18 Bee wasuyeeji ɗuuɗɗi
Luke3:19 Yuhanna feli Hirudus ngam o te'i Hirudiya
Luke3:20 Nden Hirudus waɗi ko ɓuri hallugo fahin: O nastini Yuhanna fursina.
Luke3:21 Ɓaawo yimɓe fuu njaɓi baptisma
Luke3:22 Ruuhu Allah jippi dow maako bana poola. Sawtu boo iwi haa asama
Luke3:23 Yeesu waɗi baakin duuɓi cappanɗe tati nde o fuɗɗi kuugal maako. Fodde ko yimɓe numi

Luke4:1 Yeesu loroyi diga Urdun
Luke4:2 Iblisa jarribi mo ton nyalɗe cappanɗe nayi. O nyaamaay sam nyalɗe man e nde nyalɗe ɗe'e caali
Luke4:3 Iblisa wi'i mo: “To a Ɓiɗɗo Allah kam
Luke4:4 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Deftere wi'i: Neɗɗo yeeɗirtaa nyaamdu tan.”
Luke4:5 Iblisa yahri mo haa dow
Luke4:6 o wi'i mo: “Mi hokkete baawɗe e risku laamuuji ɗi'i fuu
Luke4:7 Ɗum fuu mi hokkete to a sujidani yam.”
Luke4:8 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Deftere wi'i: Sujidan Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa tan
Luke4:9 Fahin
Luke4:10 ngam deftere wi'i: Allah umran malaa'ika'en muuɗum ngam aynugo ma.
Luke4:11 Fahin boo: Ɓe taɓɓoto ma bee juuɗe maɓɓe
Luke4:12 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Deftere wi'i: Taa jarriba Allah Jawmiraawo maaɗa.”
Luke4:13 Nde Iblisa timmini jarribaago Yeesu bee dabare mum fuu
Luke4:14 Yeesu lori haa lesdi Galiili
Luke4:15 O ekkitini yimɓe nder cuuɗi dewal Yahuudu'en
Luke4:16 Yeesu yehi Nasaratu
Luke4:17 ɓe ndokki mo deftere annabi Esaaya taggaande
Luke4:18 “Ruuhu Jawmiraawo ɗon dow am
Luke4:19 ngam yeeynugo hitaande baŋguki mo'ere Jawmiraawo.”
Luke4:20 Nden o taggi deftere go
Luke4:21 Nden o fuɗɗi wolwango ɓe: “Aayaaje binndaaɗe ɗe'e
Luke4:22 Ɓe fuu ɓe ngerdi haala maako
Luke4:23 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Fakat
Luke4:24 Fahin o wi'i: “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on
Luke4:25 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke4:26 Ammaa Allah nelaay Eliya haa jurumɗo koo gooto maɓɓe
Luke4:27 Kuturu'en ɗuuɗɓe ɗonno boo nder lesdi Isra'iila zamanu annabi Elisa. Ammaa koo gooto maɓɓe yamɗitaay
Luke4:28 Yimɓe wonɓe nder suudu dewal man fuu keewi tikkere
Luke4:29 Ɓe ummi
Luke4:30 Ammaa o wurti caka maɓɓe
Luke4:31 Yeesu yehi Kafarnahum
Luke4:32 Ɓe kayɗini dow no o ekkitinirta
Luke4:33 Woodino goɗɗo feere nder suudu dewal man
Luke4:34 “Hey
Luke4:35 Yeesu ruggi ruuhuwol coɓŋgol go
Luke4:36 Yimɓe fuu kayɗini
Luke4:37 Ɓe mbolwi haala Yeesu haa lesdi maajum fuu.
Luke4:38 Yeesu wurti suudu dewal Yahuudu'en
Luke4:39 O turi dow nyawɗo go
Luke4:40 Haa mutki naaŋge
Luke4:41 Ginnaaji ngurti yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe
Luke4:42 Nde weeti
Luke4:43 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Haani mi waazina kubaruwol belŋgol ngol laamu Allah haa gure goɗɗe boo
Luke4:44 O dilli
Luke5:1 Nyannde feere Yeesu ɗon dari dow fomoonde weendu Genesaret
Luke5:2 O yi'i koommbooje ɗiɗi haa fomoonde
Luke5:3 Yeesu nasti nder gootal koommbooje man
Luke5:4 Nde o timmini wolwugo
Luke5:5 Simon jaabi mo: “Jaagorɗo
Luke5:6 Ɓe cakkini zubaaji
Luke5:7 Ɓe ewni hawtiɗiraaɓe maɓɓe woɗɓe nder koommbowal feere ngam ɓe ngara
Luke5:8 Nde Simon Piyer yi'i ɗum
Luke5:9 Simon e yimɓe wonduɓe bee maako fuu kayɗini ngam ɗuuɗal liɗɗi ɗi ɓe ngaawi.
Luke5:10 Non boo Yaakuba e Yuhanna ɓiɓɓe Zebede
Luke5:11 Ɓe njahri koommbooje maɓɓe haa fomoonde
Luke5:12 Nde Yeesu ɗon nder wuro feere
Luke5:13 Yeesu forti juŋngo
Luke5:14 Yeesu umri mo: “Taa a yecca ɗum koo moy
Luke5:15 Koo non fuu haala Yeesu ɓesdi saŋkitaago caka yimɓe yeeso yeeso. Mooɓe ɗuuɗɗe ngari haa maako ngam nanugo mo e ngam o yamɗitini ɓe diga nyawuji maɓɓe boo.
Luke5:16 Ammaa Yeesu woowi wurtaago
Luke5:17 Nyannde feere Yeesu ɗonno ekkitina. Farisa'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ɗon njooɗi ton. Ɓe ngaroyi diga gure lesdi Galiili
Luke5:18 Yimɓe ngaddi goɗɗo waata-terɗeejo dow be'itte
Luke5:19 Ammaa ɓe anndaa toy ɓe nastinirta mo
Luke5:20 Nde Yeesu yi'i nuɗɗinki maɓɓe
Luke5:21 Moodiɓɓe tawreeta e Farisa'en puɗɗi numugo: “Ɗum neɗɗo moye oo
Luke5:22 Yeesu anndi numooji maɓɓe
Luke5:23 Ko ɓuri hoyugo? Wi'go: Hakkeeji maaɗa njaafaama naa malla wi'go: Umma
Luke5:24 Ammaa ngam haa mi faamtina on Ɓii-neɗɗo woodi baawɗe nder duniyaaru yaafaago hakkeeji.” Nden o wi'i waata-terɗeejo go: “Mi ɗon wi'e: Umma
Luke5:25 Nyawɗo go ummi law yeeso yimɓe fuu
Luke5:26 Yimɓe kayɗini
Luke5:27 Ɓaawo maajum Yeesu wurti
Luke5:28 Lewi ummi
Luke5:29 Nden Lewi waɗi nyaamduuji ɗuuɗɗi haa saare muuɗum ngam Yeesu. Jomnooɓe e woɗɓe feere ɗuuɗɓe nyaamdi bee maɓɓe.
Luke5:30 Ɗum fottanaay Farisa'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta
Luke5:31 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Yamɓe ngalaa haaje kurgoowo
Luke5:32 Mi waraay ewnaago adili'en
Luke5:33 Farisa'en mbi'i Yeesu: “Pukara'en Yuhanna ɗon cuumo ndego
Luke5:34 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “On ɗon tammo on mbaawan doolugo ewnaaɓe haa ɓaŋgal ɓe cuumo nde ɓaŋɗo ɗon wondi bee maɓɓe na? Naa non sam.
Luke5:35 Ammaa wakkati waran
Luke5:36 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol ngo'ol: “Walaa mo seekata leppol haa limce kese ngam o mo'ina limce kiiɗɗe. To o waɗi non
Luke5:37 Walaa mo loowata inaboojam kesam nder kanyakanyaaji kiiɗɗi. To o waɗi non
Luke5:38 Ammaa sey ɓe loowa inaboojam kesam nder kanyakanyaaji kesi.
Luke5:39 Walaa mo marata haaje inaboojam kesam to o aartiri kiiɗɗam
Luke6:1 Nyannde siwtorde woɗnde
Luke6:2 Farisa'en woɗɓe mbi'i ɓe: “Ngam ɗume on ɗon ngaɗa ko tawreeta duŋaaki nyannde siwtorde?”
Luke6:3 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “On njaŋngaay ko Daawuda bee yimɓe muuɗum mbaɗno nyannde feere
Luke6:4 O nasti suudu Allah
Luke6:5 Yeesu ɓesdi wi'ugo: “ Ɓii-neɗɗo woni Jawmu nyalaade siwtorde.”
Luke6:6 Nyannde siwtorde woɗnde boo
Luke6:7 Moodiɓɓe tawreeta e Farisa'en ɗonno ayna ngam haa ɓe ngi'a to Yeesu yamɗitinan goɗɗo nyannde siwtorde
Luke6:8 Ammaa Yeesu anndi numooji maɓɓe. O wi'i waata-juŋngoojo go: “Umma
Luke6:9 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Mi ɗon ƴama on: Ɗume tawreeta meeɗen duŋi waɗugo nder nyalaade siwtorde? Mbooɗeeŋga naa malla halleende? Hisnugo yoŋki neɗɗo naa malla halkugo ki?”
Luke6:10 O laari ɓe fuu
Luke6:11 Moodiɓɓe Tawreeta e Farisa'en keewi tikkere masin
Luke6:12 Nyannde man Yeesu wa'i dow hooseere ngam haa o waɗa do'a
Luke6:13 Nde weeti
Luke6:14 Simon mo o inndi ɗum boo Piyer e deerɗum Andire
Luke6:15 Matta e Tomas
Luke6:16 Yahuuda ɓii Yaakuba e Yahuuda Iskariyot
Luke6:17 Yeesu jippidi hooseere go bee maɓɓe
Luke6:18 Ɓe ngari ngam nanugo mo e ngam o yamɗitina ɓe diga nyawuji maɓɓe. Torraaɓe ruuhuuji coɓɗi boo ngari
Luke6:19 Yimɓe fuu ɗonno tefa meemugo mo
Luke6:20 Nden Yeesu laari pukara'en muuɗum
Luke6:21 Barka laatano on
Luke6:22 Barka laatanto on
Luke6:23 Mbelmbelte nyannde maajum
Luke6:24 Ammaa bone laatano on
Luke6:25 Bone laatano on
Luke6:26 Bone laatano on
Luke6:27 “Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke6:28 Mbarkiɗine naalanɓe on. Ndo'ane torranɓe on.
Luke6:29 To goɗɗo maari ma haa galaŋgal nga'al
Luke6:30 Hokku toriiɗo ma koo ɗume fuu. To goɗɗo hoosi ko marɗa
Luke6:31 Mbaɗane yimɓe ko ngiɗɗon ɓe mbaɗana on.
Luke6:32 To on ngiɗi yiɗɓe on tan
Luke6:33 To on ɗon mbaɗa mbooɗeeŋga haa waɗananɓe on mbooɗeeŋga
Luke6:34 To on ɗon ndokka nyamaande haa ɓe on tammoto njoɓan on tan
Luke6:35 Ammaa ngiɗe konne'en mooɗon
Luke6:36 Laate enɗooɓe bana Baabiraawo mooɗon o enɗuɗo.”
Luke6:37 “Taa laate hiitooɓe woɗɓe
Luke6:38 Ndokke woɗɓe
Luke6:39 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol fahin: “Bumɗo waawan ɗowugo bumɗo na? Ɓe ɗiɗo fuu ɓe ndo'ataako nder ngaska na?
Luke6:40 Jaŋngoowo ɓurataa jaŋnginoowo muuɗum maŋngu
Luke6:41 Koni a ɗon yi'a kuɗel haa yiitere deerɗa
Luke6:42 Noy mbi'rata deerɗa: Accu mi ittane kuɗel haa yiitere ma
Luke6:43 “Walaa lekki booɗki rimata ɓiɓɓe kalluɗe
Luke6:44 Lekki fuu ɗon annditire diga ɓiɓɓe muuɗum. Ɓe teɓataa ibbe haa lekki gi'e. Ɓe teɓataa inabooje haa jaajiihi.
Luke6:45 Neɗɗo booɗɗo ɗon wurtina mbooɗeeŋga diga siga ɓernde mum mbooɗka. Neɗɗo kalluɗo boo ɗon wurtina halleende diga siga ɓernde mum kalluka. Ngam ko ɓernde neɗɗo heewri kanjum hunnduko wolwata.”
Luke6:46 “Ngam ɗume ewnotooɗon yam Jawmiraawo
Luke6:47 Koo moy garanɗo haa am
Luke6:48 O nanndi bee neɗɗo mahanɗo suudu
Luke6:49 Ammaa nananɗo bolle am
Luke7:1 Nde Yeesu timmini wolwango mooɓre bolle ɗe'e
Luke7:2 Woodi ton Romaajo
Luke7:3 Nde mawɗo sooje'en oo nani habaru Yeesu
Luke7:4 Ɓe ngari haa Yeesu
Luke7:5 ngam o yiɗi ummaatoore meeɗen
Luke7:6 Nden Yeesu dillidi bee maɓɓe. Nde o daayotiraay fahin bee saare
Luke7:7 Ngam maajum mi laari mi he'aay yahugo haa maaɗa bee hoore am. Ammaa wolwu wolde woore tan
Luke7:8 Min boo
Luke7:9 Nde Yeesu nani bolle ɗe'e
Luke7:10 Nde nelaaɓe lori haa saare mawɗo sooje'en
Luke7:11 Ɓaawoɗon Yeesu yehi haa wuro wi'eteeŋgo Nayin. Pukara'en maako bee yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe njahdi bee maako.
Luke7:12 Nde o ɓadi nastorde wuro
Luke7:13 Nde Yeesu yi'i mo
Luke7:14 Nden o yehi
Luke7:15 Maayɗo ummi
Luke7:16 Yimɓe fuu kultori
Luke7:17 Habaru Yeesu saŋkiti haa lesdi Yahudiya e lesɗe taariiɗe fuu.
Luke7:18 Pukara'en Yuhanna ngecci mo kuuje ɗe'e fuu. O ewni ɗiɗo nder maɓɓe
Luke7:19 o neli ɓe haa Jawmiraawo
Luke7:20 Nde ɓe ngari haa Yeesu
Luke7:21 Nder wakkati man nden boo Yeesu yamɗitini ɗuuɗɓe marɓe nyawuji feere feere e marɓe ruuhuuji coɓɗi e o wumtini wumɓe ɗuuɗɓe.
Luke7:22 Nden o jaabi nelaaɓe Yuhanna go: “Njehe
Luke7:23 Barka laatanto koo moy mo accaay nuɗɗingo yam sam.”
Luke7:24 Nde nelaaɓe Yuhanna ndilli
Luke7:25 Kadi ɗume njahɗon laaroygo? Goɗɗo ɓorniiɗo limce booɗɗe na? Ɓorniiɓe limce booɗɗe
Luke7:26 Ɗume njahɗon laaroygo kadi? Annabiijo na? Ooho
Luke7:27 Ngam Yuhanna woni mo deftere wi'i dow muuɗum: Allah wi'i: Mi nelan nelaaɗo am yeeso ma
Luke7:28 Yeesu wi'i fahin: “Mi ɗon wi'a on: Caka ɓiɓɓe Aadama fuu walaa ɓurɗo Yuhanna maŋngu. Ammaa mo ɓuri leesugo haa laamu Allah
Luke7:29 Ummaatoore e jomnooɓe nanɓe mo fuu annditi adilaaku Allah
Luke7:30 Ammaa Farisa'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ngudini muuyo Allah ngam maɓɓe
Luke7:31 Yeesu tokki wi'ugo: “Bee moy nanndinanmi yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u? Bee ɓeye ɓe nanndinte?
Luke7:32 Ɓe nanndi bee ɓikkoy njooɗiikoy haa luumo
Luke7:33 Ngam Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma wari
Luke7:34 Ɓii-neɗɗo wari
Luke7:35 Ammaa hikma Allah gooŋɗinaama haa yimɓe ɓe njaɓi ka fuu.”
Luke7:36 Farisaajo feere ewni Yeesu ngam o nyaamda bee maako. Yeesu yehi haa saare Farisaajo man
Luke7:37 Woodi debbo hakkeejo haa wuro man. Nde o nani Yeesu ɗon nyaama haa saare Farisaajo go
Luke7:38 O dari ɓaawo Yeesu heedi kosɗe muuɗum. O ɗon woya
Luke7:39 Nde Farisaajo ewniiɗo Yeesu go yi'i ɗum
Luke7:40 Yeesu fuɗɗi wolwugo
Luke7:41 Yeesu wi'i: “Woodi goɗɗo mo tokki yimɓe ɗiɗo nyamaande. O tokki arano suleyje cardi teemeɗɗe jowi e gooto boo cappanɗe jowi.
Luke7:42 Ɓe mbaawaay yoɓugo mo. Ngam maajum o yaafani ɓe
Luke7:43 Simon jaabi: “Mi tammi mo o yaafani ɓurɗum ɗuuɗugo.” Yeesu wi'i mo: “Gooŋga mbi'ɗa.”
Luke7:44 Nden Yeesu wayliti gal debbo
Luke7:45 A hebbaaki yam
Luke7:46 A rufaay nebbam dow hoore am
Luke7:47 Ngam maajum mi ɗon wi'e: Yiide maako mawnde waŋgini hakkeeji maako ɗuuɗɗi njaafaama. Ammaa mo ɓe njaafani pamarum
Luke7:48 Nden Yeesu wi'i debbo: “Hakkeeji maaɗa njaafaama.”
Luke7:49 Nyaamdanɓe bee maako puɗɗi numugo: “Moy oo
Luke7:50 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i debbo: “Nuɗɗinki ma hisni ma

Luke8:2 
Luke8:3 e Yowanna
Luke8:4 Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe diga gure feere feere ngari
Luke8:5 “Demoowo yehi ngesa ngam saakoygo. Nde o ɗon saaka
Luke8:6 Aawdi ngoɗndi boo soli haa pellel kaa'e. Ndi fuɗi
Luke8:7 Fahin aawdi ngoɗndi soli caka gi'e
Luke8:8 Ammaa ngoɗndi boo soli haa lesdi mboondi. Aawre fuɗi
Luke8:9 Pukara'en Yeesu ƴami mo ko balndol ngo'ol yiɗi wi'go.
Luke8:10 O jaabi: “Haa mooɗon ɗum hokkaama anndugo sirriiji laamu Allah
Luke8:11 “Ndaa ko balndol ngo'ol yiɗi wi'go: Aawdi ɗum wolde Allah.
Luke8:12 Woɗɓe feere nanndi bee sera laawol haa aawdi soli. Ɗum nananɓe
Luke8:13 Woɗɓe boo nanndi bee pellel kaa'e
Luke8:14 Aawdi colndi caka gi'e boo
Luke8:15 Aawdi colndi nder lesdi mboondi
Luke8:16 Walaa jamnanɗo pittirla ngam jo'ingo nga les bokoti malla les leeso. Ammaa o jo'inan nga dow jo'inirɗum pittirla
Luke8:17 Ngam walaa cuuɗiiɗum ɗum waŋgintaake
Luke8:18 “Kakkilane no nanroton. Ngam marɗo huunde
Luke8:19 Daada Yeesu e deerɗiraaɓe muuɗum ngari
Luke8:20 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Daada maaɗa e deerɗiraaɓe maaɗa ɗon yaasi
Luke8:21 Ammaa o jaabi: “Daada am e deerɗiraaɓe am ngoni nananɓe wolde Allah
Luke8:22 Nyannde feere Yeesu nasti koommbowal bee pukara'en muuɗum
Luke8:23 Nde ɓe ɗon eero bee koommbowal
Luke8:24 Pukara'en ɓaditi mo
Luke8:25 Yeesu wi'i pukara'en: “Toy nuɗɗinki mooɗon kadi?” Ammaa ɓe kultori
Luke8:26 Ɓe njotti haa lesdi Geraseni'en gaɗa weendu Galiili.
Luke8:27 Nde Yeesu wurti koommbowal
Luke8:28 Nde o yi'i Yeesu
Luke8:29 Ngam Yeesu ɗonno umra ruuhuwol coɓŋgol wurto haa maako. Ngol ɗonno naŋnga mo nde ɗuuɗɗum
Luke8:30 Yeesu ƴami mo: “Noy innde ma?” O jaabi: “Innde am Mooɓre”
Luke8:31 Ɗi tori Yeesu taa o riiwa ɗi
Luke8:32 Woodi tokkere gaduuji haa ton
Luke8:33 Nden ruuhuuji coɓɗi ngurti haa gorko go
Luke8:34 Nde durooɓe gaduuji ngi'i ko waɗi
Luke8:35 Yimɓe ngurti haa ɓe ndaara ko waɗi. Ɓe ngari haa Yeesu
Luke8:36 Yi'ɓe ko waɗi ngecci ɓe no ginnaaɗo yamɗitiri.
Luke8:37 Geraseni'en nder lesdi man fuu tori Yeesu o wurto lesdi maɓɓe
Luke8:38 Goɗɗo mo ruuhuuji coɓɗi ngurti haa mum go
Luke8:39 “Hootu saare ma
Luke8:40 Nde Yeesu wartoyi

Luke8:42 ngam o woodi ɓiŋngel deyel
Luke8:43 Woodi boo debbo feere ton. Duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi o nyawɗo nyawu ilol ƴiiƴam. O majjini jawdi maako fuu haa hurgooɓe
Luke8:44 O ɓaditi Yeesu haa ɓaawo
Luke8:45 Yeesu ƴami: “Moy meemi yam?” Koo moy fuu wi'i: “Naa min.” Piyer wi'i: “Jaagorɗo

Luke8:47 Nde debbo yi'i o waawataa suuɗaago

Luke9:1 Yeesu mooɓti pukara'en sappo e ɗiɗo
Luke9:2 O neli ɓe waazingo laamu Allah e hurgugo nyawɓe.
Luke9:3 O wi'i ɓe: “Taa koo'e koo ɗume ngam jahaaŋgal
Luke9:4 Saare nde ɓe mbeerni on fuu
Luke9:5 To yimɓe cali jaɓɓaago on haa wuro
Luke9:6 Ɓe ndilli
Luke9:7 Hirudus
Luke9:8 Woɗɓe boo mbi'i: “Eliya waŋgi.” Fahin woɗɓe mbi'i: “Gooto haa annabi'en ɓooyma ummitake.”
Luke9:9 Ammaa Hirudus wi'i: “Mi ta'i hoore Yuhanna. Goɗɗo moy nananmi ɓe mbi'anta kuuje bana ɗe'e?” O annini yi'ugo mo.
Luke9:10 Nelaaɓe ngarti
Luke9:11 Ammaa nde yimɓe nani ɗum
Luke9:12 Nde naaŋge ɓadake mutugo
Luke9:13 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ndokke ɓe ko ɓe nyaama
Luke9:14 Limgal yimɓe man dillani ujine njowo. Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “Njo'ine ɓe cappanɗe njowo cappanɗe njowo.”
Luke9:15 Ɓe mbaɗi bana non

Luke9:17 Ɓe fuu ɓe nyaami
Luke9:18 Nyannde feere Yeesu ɗon waɗa do'a feere muuɗum. Pukara'en ɗon ngondi bee maako. O ƴami ɓe: “Mooɓe ɗon mbi'a min mi moy?”
Luke9:19 Ɓe njaabi: “Woɗɓe ɗon mbi'a an woni Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma
Luke9:20 O ƴami ɓe: “Onon boo
Luke9:21 Yeesu umri ɓe bee caatal ngam taa ɓe mbi'a ɗum koo moy.
Luke9:22 O ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Haani Ɓii-neɗɗo yara bone ɗuuɗɗum
Luke9:23 O wi'i yimɓe fuu fahin: “To goɗɗo yiɗi tokkaago yam
Luke9:24 Ngam koo moy yiɗi hisnugo yoŋki muuɗum
Luke9:25 Ɗume ɗum nafata goɗɗo to o heɓi duniyaaru fuu ammaa o majjini yoŋki maako malla o halki hoore maako?
Luke9:26 To goɗɗo semti yam e bolle am
Luke9:27 Gooŋga mbi'an mi on

Luke9:29 Nde o ɗon do'o
Luke9:30 Ɗon nii
Luke9:31 Ɓe mbaŋgi nder tedduŋgal
Luke9:32 Piyer e wonduɓe bee maako ɗoyɗi teddani ɓe
Luke9:33 Nde yimɓe ɗiɗo go ɗon ceeda bee Yeesu
Luke9:34 Nde o ɗon wolwa ɗum
Luke9:35 Sawtu wurti ruuldere go
Luke9:36 Nde sawtu go wolwi
Luke9:37 Nde ɓe njippi hooseere jaŋngo man
Luke9:38 Goɗɗo hooli nder mooɓre go
Luke9:39 Wakkati feere ruuhuwol ɗon naŋnga ngel
Luke9:40 Mi tori pukara'en ma ɓe ndiiwa ngol
Luke9:41 Yeesu jaabi: “Hey yimɓe sooya nuɗɗinki'en
Luke9:42 Nde ngel ɗon wara
Luke9:43 Ɓe fuu ɓe kayɗini ngam daliila maŋngu Allah. Nde koo moy hayɗini dow ko Yeesu waɗi fuu
Luke9:44 “Keɗite booɗɗum ko mbi'anmi on jonta: Ɓe ndokkan Ɓii-neɗɗo haa juuɗe yimɓe.”
Luke9:45 Ammaa pukara'en paamaay maana maaka
Luke9:46 Nden pukara'en puɗɗi ƴamƴamtirgo moy laatoto mawɗo caka maɓɓe.
Luke9:47 Ammaa nde Yeesu anndi dow ɗume ɓe ɗon ƴamƴamtindira

Luke9:49 Yuhanna wi'i: “Jaagorɗo
Luke9:50 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Taa kaɗe mo
Luke9:51 Nde wakkati dilluki maako haa asama ɓadake
Luke9:52 O neli nelaaɓe yeeso maako. Ɓe ndilli
Luke9:53 Ammaa wonɓe nder wuro ngo njaɓɓaaki mo

Luke9:55 Ammaa Yeesu yeesiti
Luke9:56 Nden ɓe ndilli wuro woɗŋgo.
Luke9:57 Nde ɓe ɗon dow laawol
Luke9:58 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Doldolɗe ngoodi gasɗe
Luke9:59 O wi'i goɗɗo feere: “Tokkam!” Goɗɗo man wi'i mo: “Duŋanam mi yaha
Luke9:60 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i mo: “Accu maayɓe uwa maayɓe muuɗum'en
Luke9:61 Goɗɗo feere boo wi'i mo: “Mi tokkete

Luke10:7 Njooɗe haa saare maajum
Luke10:8 To on nasti wuro koo ngoye

Luke10:15 An Kafarnahum

Luke10:28 Yeesu wi'i mo: “A jaabake booɗɗum

Luke11:1 Nyannde feere Yeesu ɗonno waɗa do'a haa nokkuure woɗnde. Nde o timmini
Luke11:2 O wi'i ɓe: “To on ɗon mbaɗa do'a
Luke11:3 Hokku min nyaamdu deydey haaje amin nyalaade fuu.
Luke11:4 Yaafana min hakkeeji amin
Luke11:5 O wi'i ɓe fahin: “To gooto mooɗon woodi soobaajo
Luke11:6 Ngam gooto nder sooba'en am wari haa am
Luke11:7 Ammaa soobaajo mo nder suudu go boo jaabake mo: Taa daamam
Luke11:8 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke11:9 Min kam mi ɗon wi'a on: Tore
Luke11:10 Ngam koo moy tori
Luke11:11 Moy haa mooɗon to o baaba
Luke11:12 Malla to ngel torake mo yeeraande
Luke11:13 Onon halluɓe maa
Luke11:14 Yeesu wurtini ginnawol muukɗinŋgol goɗɗo. Nde ginnawol man wurti
Luke11:15 Ammaa woɗɓe feere mbi'i: “Bee baawɗe Be'elzebul laamiiɗo ginnaaji o riiwrata ɗi.”
Luke11:16 Woɗɓe boo ngiɗi jarribaago mo
Luke11:17 Ammaa nde Yeesu anndi numooji maɓɓe
Luke11:18 To Sayɗaanu honi hoore mum
Luke11:19 To min mi ɗon riiwa ginnaaji bee baawɗe Be'elzebul
Luke11:20 Ammaa to bee baawɗe Allah ndiiwranmi ginnaaji boo
Luke11:21 To goɗɗo cemmbiɗɗo taaskiiɗo bee balmi ɗon ayna saare muuɗum
Luke11:22 Ammaa to ɓurɗo mo semmbe wari dow maako
Luke11:23 Mo wondaay bee am
Luke11:24 “To ruuhuwol coɓŋgol wurtake goɗɗo
Luke11:25 To ngol lori haa maaru
Luke11:26 Nden ngol yaha
Luke11:27 Nde Yeesu wolwi bana nii
Luke11:28 Ammaa kaŋko o wi'i: “Barka laatanto nananɓe wolde Allah
Luke11:29 Nde yimɓe ɗon mooɓto kommbi Yeesu
Luke11:30 Ngam bana Yonas laatino alaama haa yimɓe Niniwe
Luke11:31 Laamiiɗo debbo
Luke11:32 Nyalaade darŋgal
Luke11:33 “Walaa mo jamnata pittirla
Luke11:34 Gite ma laati pittirla ɓanndu maaɗa. To gite ma njame
Luke11:35 Hakkil
Luke11:36 To ɓanndu ma fuu ɗon nder annoora
Luke11:37 Nde Yeesu timmini wolwugo
Luke11:38 Farisaajo hayɗini nde o yi'i Yeesu fuɗɗi nyaamugo bilaa lootugo juuɗe muuɗum.
Luke11:39 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Onon Farisa'en
Luke11:40 Sooya-hakkiilo'en
Luke11:41 Caahe talaka'en ko woni nder jardugel mooɗon e nyaamrugel mooɗon
Luke11:42 Ammaa bone laatano on
Luke11:43 Bone laatano on
Luke11:44 Bone laatano on! Ngam on nanndi bee genaale ɗe yimɓe njahata dow mum'en bilaa anndugo ɗum.”
Luke11:45 Nden gooto haa moodiɓɓe tawreeta wi'i Yeesu: “Moodibbo
Luke11:46 Yeesu jaabi: “Bone laatano on
Luke11:47 Bone laatano on! Ngam on ɗon maha genaale annabi'en ɓe kaakiraaɓe mooɗon mbari.
Luke11:48 To non kam on ɗon ceedo kuuɗe kaakiraaɓe mooɗon
Luke11:49 Ngam maajum hikma Allah wi'i: Mi nelan annabi'en e nelaaɓe
Luke11:50 Mi ƴamtan ƴiiƴam annabi'en ndufaaɗam diga puɗɗuki duniyaaru haa yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u
Luke11:51 diga ƴiiƴam Habila haa yotto ƴiiƴam Zekariya
Luke11:52 Bone laatanto on
Luke11:53 Saa'i o wurti ton
Luke11:54 Ɓe tuufni mo nder bolle ngam haa ɓe nana kalluka diga hunnduko maako
Luke12:1 Wakkati man yimɓe ujineeje mooɓotiri haa ɓe ɗon njaaɓnjaaɓtira. Yeesu fuɗɗi wolwango pukara'en muuɗum: “Kakkilane ufnirɗum Farisa'en
Luke12:2 Cuuɗiiɗum fuu waŋgan
Luke12:3 Ngam ko mbolwuɗon nder nyiɓre fuu
Luke12:4 “Mi ɗon wi'a on ɗum
Luke12:5 Mi hollan on mo kuloton: Kule mo waawi mbarugo
Luke12:6 Ɓe coorrataa colloy njowoy bee suleyje ɗiɗi na? Ammaa Allah yejjitittaa koo gootel maakoy.
Luke12:7 Koo gaasaaji ko'e mooɗon limaaɗi fuu. Taa kule sam
Luke12:8 “Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke12:9 Ammaa mo yeddi yam yeeso yimɓe
Luke12:10 Koo moy wolwi kalluka dow Ɓii-neɗɗo
Luke12:11 To ɓe njahri on hiiteego nder cuuɗi dewal Yahuudu'en malla yeeso laamiiɓe e marɓe baawɗe
Luke12:12 Ngam Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ekkitinan on ko mbi'oton nder saa'iire man.”
Luke12:13 Goɗɗo nder mooɓre wi'i Yeesu: “Moodibbo
Luke12:14 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Hey an! Moy waɗi yam kiitoowo dow mooɗon malla cenndoowo jawdi mon?”
Luke12:15 Nden o wi'i ɓe: “Ndeente e suunooji koo ɗiye
Luke12:16 O wolwani ɓe balndol ngo'ol: “Woodi goɗɗo diskuɗo
Luke12:17 O numi nder ɓernde maako: Ko mbaɗanmi? Ngam mi walaa babal haa mooɓtanmi ƴaamnde am.
Luke12:18 O wi'i: Yowwa
Luke12:19 Nden mi wi'ana yoŋki am: A woodi jawdi ɗuuɗndi sigaandi
Luke12:20 Ammaa Allah wi'i mo: Sooya-hakkiiloojo
Luke12:21 Bana nii ɗum laatanto mo mooɓtani hoore mum jawdi
Luke12:22 Ɓaawoɗon Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “Ngam maajum mi ɗon wi'a on: Taa caklane nguure mooɗon
Luke12:23 Ngam yoŋki ɓuri nyaamdu saman
Luke12:24 Ndaare leekuuje: Ɗe aawataa
Luke12:25 Moy caka mooɗon waawi ɓesdugo balɗe muuɗum koo seɗɗa bee saklere muuɗum?
Luke12:26 Nde on mbaawataa waɗugo koo peetum
Luke12:27 Ndaare pinndi ladde no ndi mawnirta. Ndi huuwataa
Luke12:28 Allah ɓorni huɗooji ɗi tawe hannde nder ladde
Luke12:29 Taa ɓillore ko nyaamoton malla ko njaroton. Taa cakle ko'e mooɗon.
Luke12:30 Heefeerɓe duniyaaru cuklanto kuuje ɗe'e nde weeti fuu. Ammaa Baabiraawo mooɗon anndi on ngoodi haaje kuuje ɗe'e.
Luke12:31 Aarte suklanaago laamu maako
Luke12:32 “Taa kultore
Luke12:33 Coorre ko marɗon
Luke12:34 Ngam haa jawdi mooɗon woni
Luke12:35 “Taaskitine ko'e mon
Luke12:36 Laate bana yimɓe reenanɓe jaagorɗo muuɗum'en gartanɗo diga ɓaŋgal
Luke12:37 Barka laatano suka'en ɓe jaagorɗo mum'en yaake wartata
Luke12:38 Barka laatano suka'en ɓe'e
Luke12:39 Paame booɗɗum: To jawmu saare anndino saa'iire ndeye gujjo warata
Luke12:40 Onon boo
Luke12:41 Piyer wi'i mo: “Jawmiraawo
Luke12:42 Jawmiraawo jaabi: “Moy woni kaliifaajo koolaaɗo
Luke12:43 Barka laatanto kuuwoowo oo
Luke12:44 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Jaagorɗo darnan mo dow jawdi muuɗum fuu.
Luke12:45 Ammaa to kuuwoowo man wi'i nder ɓernde muuɗum: Jaagorɗo am neeɓi wartugo
Luke12:46 jaagorɗo wartoyan nyalaade nde suka oo tammataako e nder saa'iire nde o anndaa. O riiwan mo
Luke12:47 Kuuwoowo annduɗo ko jaagorɗo mum yiɗi
Luke12:48 Ammaa mo anndaa ko jaagorɗo mum yiɗi
Luke12:49 “Mi wari ngam sakkingo yiite dow lesdi. Mi yiɗino nge huɓɓe jonta!
Luke12:50 Woodi baptisma ka njaɓanmi
Luke12:51 On tammi mi wari ngam waddugo salaaman dow lesdi na? Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke12:52 Ngam yeeso ɗo
Luke12:53 Baaba waadan bee ɓiyum
Luke12:54 Yeesu wi'i mooɓre fahin: “To on ngi'i ruuldere ummake haa hiirnaaŋge
Luke12:55 To on ngi'i henndu iwi fombina boo
Luke12:56 Naafiki'en! On anndi fassitirgo ko laatoto dow lesdi e ko laatoto haa dow
Luke12:57 “Ngam ɗume on keɓtantaa ko'e mon ko haani waɗugo?
Luke12:58 To a ɗon yahda bee mo njokkirɗa haa pellel kiita
Luke12:59 Mi ɗon wi'e: A wurtataako ton sam
Luke13:1 Saa'i man yimɓe woɗɓe wonɓe ton ngecci Yeesu haala yimɓe Galiili ɓe Pilaatu mbarno nde ɓe ɗonno lii'ano Allah kirseteeɗi.
Luke13:2 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “On tammi Galiili'en man laatino hakke'en ɓuri Galiili'en woɗɓe ngam sarru man heɓi ɓe na?
Luke13:3 Aa'a
Luke13:4 Malla yimɓe sappo e njoweetato ɓe mahdi suudu aynirdu yibbi dow muuɗum'en haa Silowam
Luke13:5 Aa'a mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke13:6 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol ngo'ol: “Goɗɗo feere woodi ibbi ki o jubi nder ngesa maako
Luke13:7 Nden o wi'i aynoowo ngesa: Ndaa duuɓi tati mi ɗon tefa ibbe haa ibbi ki'i
Luke13:8 Aynoowo ngesa wi'i mo: “Jaagorɗo
Luke13:9 Teema hitaande warannde ki riman
Luke13:10 Yeesu ɗonno ekkitina nder suudu dewal Yahuudu'en woɗndu nyannde siwtorde.
Luke13:11 Woodino debbo haa ton
Luke13:12 Nde Yeesu yi'i mo
Luke13:13 O jo'ini juuɗe maako dow hoore debbo
Luke13:14 Ammaa ardiiɗo suudu dewal Yahuudu'en ɓerni ngam jamɗitinki goɗɗo nyannde siwtorde
Luke13:15 Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: “Naafiki'en! Koo moy mooɗon yoofataa ngaari mum malla wamnde mum diga nyaamnirde nyannde siwtorde
Luke13:16 Debbo mo danygol Ibrahiima
Luke13:17 Nde o wolwi bana nii
Luke13:18 Yeesu wi'i fahin: “Bee ɗume laamu Allah nanndi? Bee ɗume nanndinanmi ngu?
Luke13:19 Ngu nanndi bee gawel citta
Luke13:20 Yeesu wi'i fahin: “Bee ɗume nanndinanmi laamu Allah?
Luke13:21 Ngu nanndi bee ufnirɗum ɗum debbo hoo'i
Luke13:22 Yeesu saali berniiji e gure
Luke13:23 Goɗɗo wi'i mo: “Jawmiraawo
Luke13:24 “Tiiɗe nastirgo dammugal paaɗŋgal. Mi ɗon wi'a on: Ɗuuɗɓe ngiɗi nastugo
Luke13:25 To jawmu saare ummake
Luke13:26 Nden on puɗɗan wi'ugo: Min nyaami
Luke13:27 Ammaa o jaaboto on: Ndille
Luke13:28 On mboyan
Luke13:29 Yimɓe ngaran diga fuunaaŋge e hiirnaaŋge
Luke13:30 Nden kadi yimɓe aartuɓe cakkititto e sakkitiiɓe boo aartoto.”
Luke13:31 Wakkati man nden
Luke13:32 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Njehe
Luke13:33 Ammaa sey mi tokkita laawol am hannde
Luke13:34 Urusaliima! Urusaliima! A mbari annabi'en
Luke13:35 Ndaa

Luke14:2 Ndaa goɗɗo mo ɓanndu mum uppi daliila nyawu ɗon ndari yeeso maako.
Luke14:3 Yeesu ƴami moodiɓɓe tawreeta e Farisa'en
Luke14:4 Ɓe njeeɗi. Nden Yeesu jogi nyawɗo go
Luke14:5 Nden o wi'i ɓe: “Moy caka mooɗon
Luke14:6 Ɓe mbaawaay jaabaago mo koo ɗume dow maajum.
Luke14:7 Yeesu yi'i no ewnaaɓe cuɓri joole tedduɗe
Luke14:8 “To goɗɗo ewnake ma haa nyaamduuji ɓaŋgal
Luke14:9 Taa mo ewni on ɗiɗo fuu wara wi'e: Accan oo ɗo babal nga'al. A semtan jooɗoyaago haa babal ɓaawowal.
Luke14:10 Ammaa to a ewnaama
Luke14:11 Ngam mo mawnini hoore mum

Luke14:14 A heɓan barka ngam ɓe mbaawataa warjaago ma. Allah warjoto ma ɗum nyannde ummitineeki adili'en.”

Luke14:17 Wakkati nyaamugo
Luke14:18 Ɓe fuu maɓɓe ɓe puɗɗi yelditaago. Arano wi'i suka go: Mi soodi ngesa
Luke14:19 Goɗɗo boo wi'i: Mi soodi ga'i sappo cindaaɗi ɗiɗi ɗiɗi
Luke14:20 Goɗɗo feere boo wi'i: Mi ɓaŋgi neeɓaay
Luke14:21 Suka lorti haa jaagorɗo muuɗum
Luke14:22 Suka yehi
Luke14:23 Jaagorɗo wi'i suka go: Yah haa buuwi e laabi kommbi gese
Luke14:24 Mi ɗon wi'a on: Koo gooto haa aartuɓe ewneego mettataa nyaamdu am!”

Luke15:3 Nden o wolwani ɓe balndol ngo'ol:
Luke15:4 “To goɗɗo haa mooɗon woodi baali teemerre
Luke15:5 To o heɓti
Luke15:6 to o warti saare
Luke15:7 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke15:8 “Malla debbo moy
Luke15:9 To o heɓti nde
Luke15:10 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke15:11 Yeesu wi'i fahin: “Gorko feere woodino ɓiɓɓe ɗiɗo.
Luke15:12 Minyiraawo wi'i baaba mum: Baaba
Luke15:13 Ɓaawo balɗe seɗɗa
Luke15:14 Nde o timmini ɗum fuu
Luke15:15 O yehi
Luke15:16 O yiɗi nyaamugo ko gaduuji nyaamata
Luke15:17 Nden o fuɗɗi numtugo joonde maako
Luke15:18 Mi loroto haa baaba am
Luke15:19 mi he'aay ewneego ɓiya fahin. Waɗam bana gooto caka huuwanooɓe ma.
Luke15:20 O lori haa baaba maako. Nde o ɗon daayi tawon
Luke15:21 Ɓiɗɗo go wi'i mo: Baaba am
Luke15:22 Ammaa baaba wi'i suka'en muuɗum: Njaawɗe ngadde ngapaleewol ɓurŋgol wooɗugo
Luke15:23 Ngadde gaggel payŋgel
Luke15:24 Ngam ɓiɗɗo am oo
Luke15:25 Wakkati man ɓiɗɗo afo ɗonno haa ngesa. Nde o ɗon warta
Luke15:26 O ewni gooto suka'en
Luke15:27 Suka man wi'i mo: Deerɗiraawo ma warti
Luke15:28 Nden ɓiɗɗo afo go ɓerni
Luke15:29 Ammaa o jaabi baaba maako: Ndaa duuɓi ɗuuɗɗi mi ɗon huuwane
Luke15:30 Ammaa nde ɓiɗɗo ma oo warti
Luke15:31 Baaba wi'i mo: Ɓiŋngel am
Luke15:32 Haani ngaɗen juulde
Luke16:1 Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “Goɗɗo diskuɗo woodino kaliifaajo. Ɓe ngari
Luke16:2 Diskuɗo ewni mo
Luke16:3 Kaliifaajo go numi nder ɓernde mum: No mbaɗanmi? Ngam jaagorɗo am ɗon itta kaliifaaku jawdi mum haa am? Remugo
Luke16:4 Yowwa
Luke16:5 O ewni gooto gooto jaɓɓe nyamaale haa jaagorɗo maako fuu. O wi'i arano: Noy jaagorɗo am tokkoto ma?
Luke16:6 O jaabi: Nebbam jaytunje goŋgoŋji teemerre. Nden kaliifaajo wi'i mo: Ndaa ɗereewol ma. Law
Luke16:7 Nden o wi'i goɗɗo feere boo: Noy jaagorɗo am tokkoto ma? O jaabi: Buhuuje alkamaari teemerre. Kaliifaajo wi'i mo: Ndaa ɗereewol ma
Luke16:8 Jaagorɗo mani kaliifaajo faasikiijo oo

Luke16:10 Mo huuwi kuugal pamaral bee hoolaare
Luke16:11 To on laataaki hoolaaɓe bee jawdi duniyaaru kalfitinaandi on
Luke16:12 To on laataaki hoolaaɓe bee jawdi yimɓe feere
Luke16:13 “Walaa suka mo waawata jagganaago jaagorɓe ɗiɗo
Luke16:14 Farisa'en

Luke16:16 Tawreeta Muusa e defte annabi'en ɗonno haa yotti wakkati Yuhanna baɗoowo baptisma. Diga wakkati man boo kubaruwol belŋgol ngol laamu Allah wooynaama
Luke16:17 Koyɗum asama e lesdi majjita dow harfeere tawreeta woore halka.

Luke16:22 Talakaajo oo maayi
Luke16:23 Nde o ɗon yaŋgito haa joonde maayɓe
Luke16:24 O wooki

Luke16:26 Dow maajum fuu boo
Luke16:27 Diskuɗo wi'i: Mi ɗon toro ma kadi
Luke16:28 Ngam mi woodi deerɗiraaɓe njowo
Luke16:29 Nden Ibrahiima jaabi mo: Muusa e annabi'en fuu ɗon
Luke16:30 Diskuɗo wi'i: Naa non
Luke16:31 Ibrahiima wi'i mo: To ɓe nananaay Muusa e annabi'en
Luke17:1 Yeesu wi'i pukara'en muuɗum: “Walaa mo waawata haɗugo ko nastinta yimɓe nder hakke. Ammaa bone laatanto neɗɗo mo laati daliila maajum!
Luke17:2 Ndikkana mo ɓe ɓila hayre namarde mawnde haa daande maako
Luke17:3 Kakkilane ko'e mooɗon! To deerɗiraawo ma waɗi hakke
Luke17:4 To o waɗi ma aybe nde joweeɗiɗi nder nyalaade
Luke17:5 Nelaaɓe mbi'i Jawmiraawo: “Ɓesdan min nuɗɗinki!”
Luke17:6 Jawmiraawo boo wi'i: “To on ngoodi nuɗɗinki koo seɗɗa bana gawel citta
Luke17:7 “Moy haa mooɗon mari kuuwoowo
Luke17:8 Naa o wi'an mo: Taaskitinam ko mi nyaama
Luke17:9 Kadi o yettan suka oo ngam o huuwani mo ko o umri mo na?
Luke17:10 Bana non onon boo
Luke17:11 Nde Yeesu ɗon yaha Urusaliima
Luke17:12 O ɗonno nasta wuro feere
Luke17:13 ɓe towni sawtu
Luke17:14 Nde o yi'i ɓe
Luke17:15 Gooto maɓɓe
Luke17:16 O sujidi kommbi Yeesu
Luke17:17 Yeesu ƴami: “Naa sappo fuu njamɗiti na? E toy njoweenayo woɗɓe?
Luke17:18 Walaa koo gooto mo numi loraago
Luke17:19 Nden o wi'i mo: “Umma
Luke17:20 Farisa'en ƴami Yeesu: “Ndeye laamu Allah warata?” O jaabi ɓe: “Laamu Allah warataa bee alaamaaji gi'eteeɗi.
Luke17:21 Ɓe mbi'ataa boo: Ndaare ngu ɗon ɗo malla ngu ɗon to ngam laamu Allah ɗon caka mooɗon.”
Luke17:22 O wi'i pukara'en: “Nyalɗe ngaran
Luke17:23 Ɓe mbi'an on: Ndaa o ɗon ɗo
Luke17:24 Ngam bana ma'ere ma'irta wakeere asama nde'e nden jayŋgol maare ɗon yotto haa wakeere ndeya
Luke17:25 Ammaa aran
Luke17:26 Ko laatino nder zamanu Nuuhu

Luke17:29 Ammaa nyalaade Ludu wurti Sodoma
Luke17:30 Bana non ɗum laatoto nyannde baŋguki Ɓii-neɗɗo.
Luke17:31 Nyalaade man
Luke17:32 Ciftore debbo Ludu.
