Luke18:2 O wi'i ɓe: “Woodino haa berniwol feere kiitoowo mo hulataa Allah sam
Luke18:3 Woodi boo nder berniwol man debbo jurumɗo mo ɗon wara tum
Luke18:4 Kiitoowo man sali
Luke18:5 ammaa nde nii jurumɗo oo ɗon daamammi
Luke18:6 Jawmiraawo ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Nane booɗɗum ko kiitoowo kalluɗo oo wi'ata.
Luke18:7 Kadi
Luke18:8 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke18:9 Yeesu wolwi balndol feere fahin ngam laaranɓe ko'e muuɗum'en ɓe adili'en
Luke18:10 “Yimɓe ɗiɗo njehi haa haykaliiru ngam waɗugo do'a
Luke18:11 Farisaajo dari
Luke18:12 Mi ɗon suumo asaweere fuu nde ɗiɗi
Luke18:13 Jomnoowo dari daayiiɗum
Luke18:14 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke18:15 Ɓe ngaddani Yeesu ɓikkoy pamaroy ngam o meema koy
Luke18:16 Yeesu ɓadini ɓikkoy go kommbi mum
Luke18:17 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Mo jaɓaay laamu Allah bana ɓiŋngel pamarel
Luke18:18 Yahuuduujo mawɗo feere ƴami Yeesu: “Moodibbo booɗɗo
Luke18:19 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Ngam ɗume a wi'ata yam mi booɗɗo? Walaa booɗɗo
Luke18:20 A anndi umrooje: Taa waɗ njeenu
Luke18:21 Gorko go wi'i: “Mi ɗowtani umrooje ɗe'e fuu diga mi derkeejo tawon.”
Luke18:22 Nde Yeesu nani ɗum
Luke18:23 Nde o nani bolle ɗe'e
Luke18:24 Nde Yeesu yi'i o cuniiɗo
Luke18:25 Ngeelooba saalo nder wurdere baatal ɓuri hoyugo dow diskuɗo nasta laamu Allah.”
Luke18:26 Nanɓe mo mbi'i: “To non kam
Luke18:27 Yeesu jaabi: “Ko waɗataako haa yimɓe
Luke18:28 Nden Piyer wi'i: “Ndaa
Luke18:29 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on
Luke18:30 heɓan cowi ɗuuɗɗi nder zamanuuru jontaaru ndu'u e nder waranndu boo o heɓan ngeendam nduumiiɗam.”
Luke18:31 Yeesu ewni pukara'en sappo e ɗiɗo haa muuɗum
Luke18:32 Ngam ɓe ndokkan mo haa juuɗe heefeerɓe
Luke18:33 ɓe ɓoccan mo. Ɓaawoɗon ɓe mbaran mo
Luke18:34 Ammaa ɓe paamaay koo ɗume nder ko o wi'i. Haala ka'a laati cuuɗiika haa maɓɓe
Luke18:35 Nde Yeesu ɓadi Yeriko
Luke18:36 Nde o nani mooɓre ɗon saalo
Luke18:37 Ɓe anndini mo: “Ɗum Yeesu Nasaratuujo saaloto.”
Luke18:38 O hooli: “Yeesu
Luke18:39 Ardiiɓe yeeso peli mo
Luke18:40 Yeesu dari
Luke18:41 “Ɗume ngiɗɗa mi waɗane?” O jaabi: “Jawmiraawo
Luke18:42 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Wumtu
Luke18:43 Wakkati man nden o wumti
Luke19:1 Yeesu nasti Yeriko
Luke19:2 Ndaa
Luke19:3 O tefi yi'ugo moy woni Yeesu
Luke19:4 O doggi haa yeeso
Luke19:5 Nde Yeesu yotti haa nokkuure man
Luke19:6 Jakayus yaawɗi jippi
Luke19:7 Nde yimɓe ngi'i ɗum
Luke19:8 Ammaa Jakayus dari yeeso Jawmiraawo
Luke19:9 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Kisndam nasti nder saare nde'e hannde
Luke19:10 Ngam Ɓii-neɗɗo wari ɗaɓɓititgo
Luke19:11 Yimɓe ɗon nana bolle Yeesu. Nde o ɗon ɓadito Urusaliima
Luke19:12 O wi'i: “Goɗɗo tedda-asŋgoljo dilli lesdi ndaayiindi ngam o heɓana hoore maako laamu
Luke19:13 O ewni sappo nder suka'en maako
Luke19:14 Ammaa yimɓe lesdi maako nganyi mo
Luke19:15 Nde ɓe laamini mo
Luke19:16 Arano wari
Luke19:17 Jaagorɗo wi'i mo: Booɗɗum
Luke19:18 Ɗiɗaɓo wari
Luke19:19 O wi'i mo: An boo laamana berniiji jowi!
Luke19:20 Goɗɗo boo wari
Luke19:21 ngam mi huli ma
Luke19:22 Jaagorɗo wi'i mo: Mi hiitete dow bolle ma
Luke19:23 Ngam ɗume a jo'inaay ceede am haa sigordu ceede
Luke19:24 O wolwani wonɓe ton: Njaɓte mo suleyre man
Luke19:25 Ɓe mbi'i mo: Jaagorɗo
Luke19:26 Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke19:27 Konne'en am ɓe'e
Luke19:28 Ɓaawo bolle ɗe'e
Luke19:29 Nde o ɓadake Baytifaaji e Baytaniya
Luke19:30 wi'i ɓe: “Njehe haa wuro yeeso too. To on nasti ngo
Luke19:31 To goɗɗo ƴami on koni piistoton nde? Njaabe mo: Jawmiraawo woodi haaje maare.”
Luke19:32 Nelaaɓe njehi
Luke19:33 Nde ɓe ɗon piista wamnde
Luke19:34 Ɓe njaabi: “Jawmiraawo woodi haaje maare.”
Luke19:35 Ɓe ngaddi wamnde go haa Yeesu
Luke19:36 Nde o fuɗɗi yahugo
Luke19:37 Nde o ɗon ɓadito Urusaliima heedi diirtorde Hooseere Jaytunje
Luke19:38 Ɓe mbi'i: “Barka laatano laamiiɗo garanɗo bee innde Jawmiraawo! Salaaman haa asama
Luke19:39 Farisa'en woɗɓe diga caka yimɓe mbolwani Yeesu: “Moodibbo
Luke19:40 Yeesu jaabi: “Mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke19:41 Nde Yeesu ɓaditi berniwol
Luke19:42 o wi'i: “Mi yiɗi a anndano an boo ko woni salaaman maaɗa hanndeere nde'e! Ammaa jonta ɗum suuɗaama haa gite maaɗa.
Luke19:43 Nyalɗe ngarante
Luke19:44 Ɓe ndo'ete
Luke19:45 Nden Yeesu nasti haykaliiru
Luke19:46 o wi'i ɓe: “Ndaa ko winnda haa Deftere: Suudu am laatoto suudu waɗugo do'a
Luke19:47 O ɗon ekkitina nder haykaliiru nyalaade fuu. Mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta e ardiiɓe yimɓe ɗonno tefa mbarugo mo.
Luke19:48 Ammaa ɓe anndaa ɗume ɓe mbaɗata
Luke20:1 Nyannde feere Yeesu ɗon ekkitina yimɓe nder haykaliiru
Luke20:2 ƴami mo: “Yeccu min bee duŋayeere moy a waarata kuuje ɗe'e? Malla moy duŋani ma waɗugo bana nii?”
Luke20:3 O jaabi ɓe: “Min boo mi ƴaman on huunde woore. Mbi'eeɗam:
Luke20:4 Moy duŋani Yuhanna waɗango yimɓe baptisma? Allah naa malla yimɓe?”
Luke20:5 Ammaa ɓe mbi'mbi'tiri: “To en mbi'i: Allah
Luke20:6 To en mbi'i: Yimɓe
Luke20:7 Nden ɓe njaabi: “Min anndaa.”
Luke20:8 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Min boo mi wi'ataa on bee duŋayeere moy mbaɗanmi kuuje ɗe'e.”
Luke20:9 Ɓaawo man Yeesu fuɗɗi wolwango yimɓe balndol ngo'ol: “Goɗɗo jubi ngesa inabooje
Luke20:10 Nde saa'i teɓugo inabooje waɗi
Luke20:11 Jawmu ngesa inabooje neli jaggiiɗo mum feere
Luke20:12 O neli tataɓo fahin
Luke20:13 Jawmu ngesa inabooje wi'i: Ko mbaɗanmi? Mi nelan ɓiɗɗo am giɗaaɗo
Luke20:14 Ammaa nde remooɓe ngi'i mo
Luke20:15 Ɓe ndasi mo yaasi ngesa
Luke20:16 O waran
Luke20:17 Ammaa Yeesu suti ɓe
Luke20:18 Koo moy do'i dow hayre nde'e
Luke20:19 Moodiɓɓe tawreeta e mawɓe Farisa'en tefi naŋngugo Yeesu saa'i man nden
Luke20:20 Ɓe puɗɗi aynugo Yeesu
Luke20:21 Ɓe ƴami mo: “Moodibbo
Luke20:22 Kaanduɗum min ndokka laamiiɗo Roma jomorgol naa malla taa min ndokka?”
Luke20:23 Yeesu annditi faasikaare maɓɓe
Luke20:24 “Kolleeɗam suleyre. Suura moy e innde moy ɗo?” Ɓe njaabi: “Kaysara
Luke20:25 O wi'i ɓe: “Nden kam njoɓe Kaysara ko haanani mo
Luke20:26 Ɓe keɓaay naŋngirgo mo yeeso yimɓe nder bolle maako. Ammaa ɓe kayɗini ngam jaawaabu maako
Luke20:27 Saduki'en woɗɓe ɓaditi Yeesu. Kamɓe ngoni wi'anɓe maayɓe ummitittaako. Ɓe ƴami Yeesu ƴamol ngo'ol:
Luke20:28 “Moodibbo
Luke20:29 Woodino deerɗiraaɓe njoweeɗiɗo. Arano te'i debbo
Luke20:30 Ɗiɗaɓo te'i debbo go
Luke20:31 non boo bee tataɓo. Ɗum laati bana non haa njoweeɗiɗo fuu maaydi bilaa heɓugo ɓiŋngel.
Luke20:32 Ragare man boo debbo maayi.
Luke20:33 Kadi nyannde ummitineeki maayɓe kam
Luke20:34 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u ɗon te'indira.
Luke20:35 Ammaa he'iiɓe heɓugo geɗal haa zamanuuru waranndu e haa ummitineeki maayɓe
Luke20:36 Ngam ɓe maayataa fahin. Ɓe nanndi bee malaa'ika'en
Luke20:37 Muusa wi'i laaɓɗum maayɓe ummititto bee yoŋki nder aayaaje ko winnda dow haala wumre
Luke20:38 Allah laataaki Allah maayɓe
Luke20:39 Woɗɓe haa moodiɓɓe
Luke20:40 Ɓe kuli ƴamugo mo ƴamol goɗŋgol.
Luke20:41 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Noy ɓe mbi'rata Almasiihu o ɓii Daawuda?
Luke20:42 Ngam Daawuda bee hoore muuɗum wi'i nder deftere Jabuura: Jawmiraawo wolwani jawmam: Jooɗa haa nyaamo am
Luke20:43 haa to mi laatini konne'en ma jaaɓruɗum kosɗe ma.
Luke20:44 Daawuda ewni mo Jawmiraawo
Luke20:45 Yeesu wolwani pukara'en muuɗum yeeso nananɓe mo fuu
Luke20:46 “Ndeente e moodiɓɓe tawreeta
Luke20:47 Ɓe ɗon njaɓta marle rewɓe yurumɓe
Luke21:1 Yeesu ɓaŋgti gite
Luke21:2 O yi'i debbo jurumɗo talakaajo hokki suleyje pamare ɗiɗi.
Luke21:3 Nden o wi'i: “Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Debbo jurumɗo talakaajo oo
Luke21:4 Ngam kamɓe ɓe ndokki seɗɗa diga ɗuuɗeeŋga jawdi maɓɓe
Luke21:5 Nde woɗɓe ɗon mbolwa dow haykaliiru
Luke21:6 “Nyalɗe ngaran
Luke21:7 Ɓe ƴami mo: “Jawmiraawo
Luke21:8 Yeesu jaabi: “Kakkile ngam taa on majjina ko'e mooɗon. Ngam ɗuuɗɓe ngaran bee innde am
Luke21:9 To on nani haala konuuji e tuurtolji
Luke21:10 Nden o wi'i ɓe: “Ummaatoore ummanto ummaatoore
Luke21:11 Dimmbanɗe lesdi mawɗe laatoto
Luke21:12 Ammaa hiddeko ɗum laato
Luke21:13 Kuuje ɗe'e fuu ngaranan on ngam ceedanon yam.
Luke21:14 Njoge ɗum haa ɓerɗe mooɗon ngam taa on taaskitina hujjaaji mon.
Luke21:15 Ngam mi hokkan on wolde e hikma
Luke21:16 Koo saaro'en mon e deerɗiraaɓe mon e banndiraaɓe mon e soobiraaɓe mon ɓe zammboto on
Luke21:17 Koo moy fuu wanyan on ngam innde am.
Luke21:18 Ammaa koo gaasaawol hoore mooɗon halkataa.
Luke21:19 Bee tiɗɗinaare mon on kisnan yoŋkiiji mooɗon.”
Luke21:20 “To on ngi'i honooɓe taarake berniwol Urusaliima
Luke21:21 Wakkati man
Luke21:22 Ngam ɗum laatoto nyalɗe baatol ngam hiɓɓingo ko winnda fuu.
Luke21:23 Kayto! Bone laatanto rewɓe reedu'en e musininanɓe nyalɗe man! Ngam ɓillaare mawnde laatoto nder lesdi ndi'i e tikkere Allah boo dow ummaatoore nde'e.
Luke21:24 Ɓe mbareteeɓe bee kaafaaje
Luke21:25 “Alaamaaji laatoto haa naaŋge
Luke21:26 Yimɓe maayan ngam kulol dow ko tammi wargo dow lesdi. Ngam baawɗeeji asama boo ndimmboto.
Luke21:27 Nden Ɓii-neɗɗo waŋgan gite yimɓe
Luke21:28 To kuuje ɗe puɗɗi laataago
Luke21:29 Yeesu wolwani ɓe balndol: “Ndaare ibbi e leɗɗe goɗɗe fuu.
Luke21:30 To on ngi'i ɗe ɗon mbilita
Luke21:31 Bana non
Luke21:32 Gooŋga mbi'anmi on: Kuuje ɗe'e fuu laatoto hiddeko yimɓe zamanuuru ndu'u fuu maayda.
Luke21:33 Asama e lesdi njinnan
Luke21:34 “Ndeene ko'e mooɗon ngam taa ɓerɗe mon cuklano ɗuuɗal nyaamduuji e njaramji e laruuraaji duniyaaru
Luke21:35 Ngam ɗum waran bana zubaawol dow yimɓe dow lesdi fuu.
Luke21:36 Ngam maajum ayne
Luke21:37 Nyalawma Yeesu ɗon ekkitina nder haykaliiru
Luke21:38 Fajiri yimɓe fuu ɗon njaha haa maako nder haykaliiru ngam nanugo mo.
Luke22:1 Juulde tamseeje ɗe ufnaaka
Luke22:2 Mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ɗon ɗaɓɓa dabare haa ɓe mbara Yeesu
Luke22:3 Nden Sayɗaanu nasti nder Yahuuda
Luke22:4 O yehi
Luke22:5 Ɓe ceyi
Luke22:6 Yahuuda jaɓi
Luke22:7 Nyalaade tamseeje ɗe ufnaaka
Luke22:8 Yeesu neli Piyer e Yuhanna
Luke22:9 Ɓe ƴami: “Toy ngiɗɗa min taaskitina ndu?”
Luke22:10 O jaabi ɓe: “Ndaa
Luke22:11 mbi'e jawmu saare man: Moodibbo wi'i: Toy suudu haa mi nyaama kiirtaari Paska bee pukara'en am?
Luke22:12 O hollan on suudu mawndu
Luke22:13 Ɓe njehi
Luke22:14 Nde wakkati man waɗi

Luke22:16 Ngam mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke22:17 Nden o hoo'i jardugel
Luke22:18 ngam mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke22:19 Ɓaawoɗon o hoo'i tamseere
Luke22:20 Bana non boo
Luke22:21 Ammaa ndaa zammbotooɗo yam ɗon nyaamda bee am haa ɗo.
Luke22:22 Fakat
Luke22:23 Ɓe puɗɗi ƴamƴamtirgo
Luke22:24 Ngaaba ummi hakkunde nelaaɓe dow moy caka maɓɓe tammiiɗo laataago mawɗo
Luke22:25 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Laamiiɓe ummaatooje ɗon laamano ɗe
Luke22:26 Ammaa ngam mooɗon kam
Luke22:27 Moy ɓurdi maŋngu
Luke22:28 Onon ngoni wonduɓe bee am tum nder jarribooje am.
Luke22:29 Mi hokki on laamu bana Baabiraawo am hokkiri yam.
Luke22:30 Nden on nyaaman
Luke22:31 Jawmiraawo wi'i: “Simon! Simon! Sayɗaanu ƴami duŋayeere ngam dimmbugo on
Luke22:32 Ammaa mi torake ngam maaɗa
Luke22:33 Piyer wi'i mo: “Jawmiraawo
Luke22:34 Yeesu wi'i: “Piyer
Luke22:35 Yeesu wi'i ɓe fahin: “Nde mi nelno on bilaa booro ceede
Luke22:36 O wi'i ɓe: “Ammaa jonta naa non. Marɗo booro ceede hoo'a ngo
Luke22:37 Ngam mi ɗon wi'a on
Luke22:38 Ɓe mbi'i: “Jawmiraawo
Luke22:39 Nden Yeesu wurti
Luke22:40 Nde o yotti nokkuure man
Luke22:41 Nden o daayti ɓe baakin sakkinannde hayre
Luke22:42 o wi'i: “Baabiraawo
Luke22:43 Nden malaa'ikaajo waŋgani mo diga asama ngam semmbiɗingo mo.
Luke22:44 Nde ɗum suni mo masin
Luke22:45 Ɓaawo waɗugo do'a
Luke22:46 O wi'i ɓe: “Ngam ɗume ɗaanotooɗon? Umme
Luke22:47 Nde Yeesu ɗon wolwa tawon
Luke22:48 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Yahuuda
Luke22:49 Nde wonduɓe bee Yeesu ngi'i ko tammi laataago
Luke22:50 Gooto maɓɓe soppi suka hooreejo liman'en
Luke22:51 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i: “Acce ɗum!” O meemi nofru gorko go
Luke22:52 Ɓaawoɗon Yeesu wi'i mawɓe liman'en e mawɓe aynooɓe haykaliiru e ndotti'en warɓe naŋngugo mo: “Koni on ngari bee kaafaaje e cabbi ngam naŋngugo yam bana mi pasoowo?
Luke22:53 Nyalɗe fuu mi ɗonno bee mooɗon nder haykaliiru
Luke22:54 Ɓe naŋngi Yeesu
Luke22:55 Ɓe kuɓɓi yiite caka daldal saare
Luke22:56 Paanyo debbo
Luke22:57 Ammaa Piyer yeddi ɗum
Luke22:58 Ɓaawo seɗɗa goɗɗo feere boo yi'i mo
Luke22:59 Ɓaawo saa'iire woore goɗɗo feere tabitini haala man
Luke22:60 Piyer jaabi: “Gorko
Luke22:61 Jawmiraawo yeesiti
Luke22:62 Piyer wurti haa yaasi
Luke22:63 Yimɓe aynooɓe Yeesu njanci mo
Luke22:64 Ɓe cuddi gite maako
Luke22:65 Ɓe mbolwani mo bolle kuɗooje goɗɗe ɗuuɗɗe.
Luke22:66 Nde weeti
Luke22:67 Ɓe mbi'i: “To an woni Almasiihu
Luke22:68 To mi ƴami on boo on njaabataako.
Luke22:69 Yeeso ɗo Ɓii-neɗɗo jooɗoto haa nyaamo Allah Baawɗo.”
Luke22:70 Ɓe fuu ɓe mbi'i: “An kam a Ɓiɗɗo Allah na?” O jaabi ɓe: “Nonnon bana on mbi'i.”
Luke22:71 Nden ɓe mbi'i: “En ngoodi haaje seedamku fahin na? Enen bee ko'e meeɗen en nani ɗum diga hunnduko maako!”
Luke23:1 Ɓe ummodi ɓe fuu
Luke23:2 Ɓe puɗɗi wullaago mo
Luke23:3 Pilaatu ƴami mo bana ni'i: “An woni laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en na?” Yeesu jaabi mo: “Nonnon bana mbi'ɗa.”
Luke23:4 Pilaatu wi'i mawɓe liman'en e mooɓre fuu: “Mi tawaay koo ɗume haa gorko oo ngam hiitaago mo.”
Luke23:5 Ammaa ɓe tiinani wi'ugo: “O ɗon tuurtina ummaatoore bee waazingo nder lesdi Yahuuda diga Galiili
Luke23:6 Nde Pilaatu nani ɗum
Luke23:7 Nde o nani Yeesu iwi haa maral laamu Hirudus
Luke23:8 Nde Hirudus yi'i Yeesu
Luke23:9 O ƴami mo ƴamɗe ɗuuɗɗe
Luke23:10 Mawɓe liman'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta ɗonno ton. Ɓe ngulli mo bee semmbe.
Luke23:11 Hirudus e sooje'en muuɗum njanci mo e ɓe njawi mo. Ɓe ɓorni mo mojaare ɗelkannde
Luke23:12 Nyannde man nden Hirudus e Pilaatu coobiri
Luke23:13 Pilaatu mooɓti mawɓe liman'en e mawɓe yimɓe e yimɓe fuu.
Luke23:14 O wi'i ɓe: “On ngaddani yam goɗɗo oo bee wi'go o ɗon ummina tuurtol caka ummaatoore. Ndaa
Luke23:15 Hirudus boo tawaay
Luke23:16 Ngam maajum mi ɓoccan mo
Luke23:17 Ngam kala juulde Paska fuu
Luke23:18 Ɓe puɗɗi wookugo bee semmbe
Luke23:19 Gorko oo nastinaama fursina ngam fitina feere nder berniwol e ngam daliila mbar-hoore boo.
Luke23:20 Pilaatu wolwani ɓe fahin ngam o yiɗi yoofugo Yeesu.
Luke23:21 Ɓe kooli bee sawtu: “Ɓil mo haa leggal gaafaaŋgal! Ɓil mo!”
Luke23:22 Pilaatu wi'i ɓe nde tataɓre: “Aybe ɗume o waɗi? Mi tawaay aybe haa maako ko he'i mbareego sam. Mi ɓoccan mo
Luke23:23 Ammaa ɓe tiinani ɗum
Luke23:24 Pilaatu yerdi waɗango ɓe ko ɓe ƴami.
Luke23:25 O yoofi nastinaaɗo fursina ngam fitina e mbar-hoore
Luke23:26 Nde ɓe ɗon njahra Yeesu
Luke23:27 Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde tokki mo. Rewɓe piyi biɓɓe muuɗum'en
Luke23:28 Yeesu yeesiti gal maɓɓe
Luke23:29 Ngam ndaa
Luke23:30 Nden yimɓe mbi'an kooseeje: Ndo'e dow amin! Ɓe mbi'an towndiije boo: Cudde min!
Luke23:31 Ngam to ɓe ngaɗani leggal keccal bana nii
Luke23:32 Ɓe njahri worɓe halluɓe ɗiɗo
Luke23:33 Nde ɓe njotti haa nokkuure wi'eteende Gumbal-hoore
Luke23:34 Yeesu wi'i: “Baabiraawo
Luke23:35 Ummaatoore ɗonno ndari ton
Luke23:36 Sooje'en boo njanci mo
Luke23:37 ɓe mbi'i: “To a laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en kam
Luke23:38 Ɓe mbinndi haa dow leggal gaafaaŋgal ngal ɓe ɓili mo: “Oo woni laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en.”
Luke23:39 Gooto nder halluɓe ɓildaaɓe bee maako go
Luke23:40 Ammaa ɗiɗaɓo feli mo
Luke23:41 Ngam meeɗen kam kiita ka foti deydey kuuɗe meeɗen
Luke23:42 Nden o wi'i: “Yeesu
Luke23:43 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Gooŋga mbi'anmaami
Luke23:44 Yaake man ɗum caka nyalawma
Luke23:45 
Luke23:46 Yeesu towni sawtu bee semmbe
Luke23:47 Nde ardiiɗo dow sooje'en Roma teemerre yi'i ko laati
Luke23:48 Yimɓe warnooɓe laarugo fuu
Luke23:49 Soobiraaɓe maako fuu e rewɓe tokkinooɓe mo diga Galiili
Luke23:50 Woodi goɗɗo bi'eteeɗo Yusufu
Luke23:51 
Luke23:52 O yehi haa Pilaatu
Luke23:53 O jippini ndu diga gaafaaŋgal
Luke23:54 Ɗum nyannde taaskara siwtorde. Nde ɓadino nastugo.
Luke23:55 Rewɓe wardunooɓe bee Yeesu diga Galiili

Luke24:2 Ɓe tawi hayre maɓɓunoonde yenaande go
Luke24:3 Ɓe nasti
Luke24:4 Nde ɓe ɗon cakli dow ɗum ko laati
Luke24:5 Rewɓe go kultori
Luke24:6 O walaaɗon haa ɗo
Luke24:7 Doole Ɓii-neɗɗo hokke haa juuɗe hakke'en
Luke24:8 Nden ɓe ciftori bolle Yeesu.
Luke24:9 Ɓe acci yenaande
Luke24:10 Kamɓe ngoni: Mariyama mo Magdala e Yowanna e Mariyama daada Yaakuba e rewɓe woɗɓe wonduɓe bee maɓɓe.
Luke24:11 Pukara'en ndaari haala rewɓe bana meereeha
Luke24:12 Ammaa Piyer ummi
Luke24:13 Nyannde man nden pukara'en ɗiɗo ɗonno njaha haa wuro wi'eteeŋgo Emmawus
Luke24:14 Ɓe ɗonno ngeewta dow ko laati ɗo fuu.
Luke24:15 Nde ɓe ɗon ngeewtida hakkunde maɓɓe
Luke24:16 Ɓe ngi'i mo
Luke24:17 Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Dow ɗume ngeewtoton nder yahdu mon?” Nden ɓe ndari
Luke24:18 Gooto maɓɓe bi'eteeɗo Keleyopas jaabi mo: “An feere ma woni koɗo nder Urusaliima ɗo mo anndaa ko laati balɗe ɗe'e na?”
Luke24:19 O ƴami ɓe: “Ɗume laati?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Ko laati dow Yeesu
Luke24:20 no mawɓe liman'en amin e mawɓe amin zammbori mo
Luke24:21 Min tammino kaŋko rimɗintano Isra'iila. Ammaa bee maajum fuu
Luke24:22 Fahin rewɓe woɗɓe caka amin kayɗini min
Luke24:23 ɓe tawaay ɓanndu maako. Ɓe ngarti
Luke24:24 Woɗɓe caka amin njehi haa yenaande
Luke24:25 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Hey onon sooya-faamu'en
Luke24:26 Naa doole Almasiihu torroro kuuje ɗe'e fuu hiddeko o nasta tedduŋgal maako na?”
Luke24:27 O fuɗɗiri diga defte Muusa haa defte annabi'en fuu
Luke24:28 Nde ɓe ɓadake wuro ngo ɓe njahata
Luke24:29 Ammaa ɓe ɓilli mo bee wi'go: “Jooɗoda bee amin
Luke24:30 Nde o jooɗi bee maɓɓe haa o nyaama
Luke24:31 Nden gite maɓɓe maɓɓiti
Luke24:32 Ɓe mbi'mbi'tiri caka maɓɓe: “Ɓerɗe meeɗen ngulaay nder meeɗen nde o wolwani en haa laawol
Luke24:33 Nder wakkati man nden ɓe ummi
Luke24:34 ɓe ɗon mbi'a: “Fakat Jawmiraawo ummitake
Luke24:35 Kamɓe boo ɓe ngecci ɓe ko tawi ɓe haa laawol
Luke24:36 Yaake nde ɓe ɗon mbolwa haala man
Luke24:37 Pukara'en keewi kultoreeŋgol
Luke24:38 Ammaa o wi'i ɓe: “Ngam ɗume on ɗon cakli? Ngam ɗume sekuye heewi ɓerɗe mooɗon?
Luke24:39 Ndaare juuɗe am e kosɗe am
Luke24:40 Nde o wi'i ɓe ɗum
Luke24:41 Nder seyo e hayɗinaare maɓɓe
Luke24:42 Ɓe ngaddani mo taƴre liiŋgu ca'aaŋgu.
Luke24:43 O hoo'i ɗum
Luke24:44 Nden o wi'i: “Ɗum ko mbi'no mi on yaake mi ɗonno bee mooɗon tawon: Doole ko winnda dow am nder tawreeta Muusa e defte annabi'en e Jabuura fuu hebbitine.”
Luke24:45 Nden o maɓɓitani ɓe faamu haa ɓe paama defte
Luke24:46 o wi'i ɓe: “Bana nii ɗum winnda: Almasiihu torroto
Luke24:47 bee innde maako ɓe ngaazinan yimɓe ummaatooje fuu haa ɓe tuuba e ɓe keɓa yaafuye hakkeeji
Luke24:48 Onon ngoni seedooɓe kuuje ɗe'e.
Luke24:49 Ndaa
Luke24:50 Yeesu yahri ɓe yaasi berniwol
Luke24:51 Yaake o ɗon barkiɗina ɓe
Luke24:52 Kamɓe boo
Luke24:53 Ɓe tokki yahugo haykaliiru tum
John1:1 Haa fuɗɗam
John1:2 Nde ɗonno haa kommbi Allah diga fuɗɗam.
John1:3 Allah tagri koo ɗume fuu bee maare
John1:4 Ngeendam iwi haa maare
John1:5 Annoora ɗon yayna nder nyiɓre
John1:6 Allah neli goɗɗo mo innde muuɗum Yuhanna.
John1:7 O wari ngam seedanaago annoora go
John1:8 O laataaki annoora kaŋko bee hoore maako
John1:9 Wolde go woni annoora ngooŋɗuka
John1:10 Wolde man ɗonno nder duniyaaru
John1:11 Nde wari haa yimɓe maare
John1:12 Ammaa haa jaɓɓe nde
John1:13 Ɓe ndanyaaka fodde ɗabiya yimɓe malla muuyo yimɓe
John1:14 Wolde go laati neɗɗo marɗo ɓanndu
John1:15 Yuhanna seedani mo
John1:16 En fuu en keɓi geɗal meeɗen haa jeynitaaje maako
John1:17 Tawreeta hokkaama bee juŋngo Muusa
John1:18 Walaa mo meeɗi yi'ugo Allah. Ammaa Ɓiɗɗo bajjo
John1:19 Ndaa seedamku Yuhanna nde Yahuudu'en Urusaliima neli liman'en e Lewi'en haa maako ngam ƴamugo mo: “An a moye?”
John1:20 O salaaki jaabaago
John1:21 Ɓe ƴami mo: “A moy kadi? A Eliya na?” O jaabi: “Aa'a
John1:22 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “E a moy kadi? Haa min keɓa lornango nelɓe min jaawaabu. Ɗume a wi'anta hoore ma
John1:23 O jaabi: “Min woni mo annabi Esaaya wolwi dow muuɗum
John1:24 Nelaaɓe warɓe haa Yuhanna go
John1:25 Ɓe ƴami mo: “To a laataaki Almasiihu malla Eliya malla boo annabiijo go
John1:26 Yuhanna jaabi ɓe: “Min mi ɗon waɗa baptisma nder ndiyam
John1:27 O waran ɓaawo am
John1:28 Fuu ɗum waɗi haa wuro Baytaniya
John1:29 Jaŋngo man Yuhanna yi'i Yeesu ɗon wara haa maako
John1:30 Kaŋko woni mo mi wolwani on haala mum
John1:31 Mi anndaano mo
John1:32 Yuhanna waɗi seedamku
John1:33 Min mi anndaano mo
John1:34 Min mi yi'i ɗum
John1:35 Jaŋngo man Yuhanna ɗonno dari fahin haa nokkuure go tawon bee pukara'en muuɗum ɗiɗo.
John1:36 Nde o yi'i Yeesu ɗon saalo
John1:37 Pukara'en ɗiɗo go nani ko o wi'i
John1:38 Yeesu yeesiti
John1:39 O wi'i ɓe: “Ngare
John1:40 Andire deerɗiraawo Simon Piyer
John1:41 Andire tawi deerɗum Simon aran
John1:42 O yahri mo haa Yeesu. Yeesu laari mo
John1:43 Jaŋngo man
John1:44 Filip iwi wuro Baytisayda
John1:45 Filip boo tawi Natanayel
John1:46 Natanayel wi'i mo: “Huunde woonde iwan diga Nasaratu na?” Filip wi'i: “War
John1:47 Nde Yeesu yi'i Natanayel ɗon wara haa maako
John1:48 Natanayel ƴami mo: “Noy anndirɗa mi?” Yeesu jaabi mo: “Mi yi'i ma nde a ɗonno les ibbi
John1:49 Nden Natanayel wi'i mo: “Moodibbo
John1:50 Yeesu jaabi mo: “A nuɗɗini ngam mi wi'i mi yi'i ma les ibbi na? A yi'an kuuje ɓuranɗe kuuje ɗe'e mawnugo.”
John1:51 O wi'i mo fahin: “Gooŋga mi wi'ete
John2:1 Nyalɗe ɗiɗi ɓaawo maajum
John2:2 Yeesu e pukara'en muuɗum boo ewnaama haa ɓaŋgal man.
John2:3 Nde inaboojam timmi haa maɓɓe
John2:4 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Debbo
John2:5 Nden daada maako wi'i suka'en: “Mbaɗe ko o wi'ata on fuu.”
John2:6 Haa ton
John2:7 Yeesu wi'i suka'en: “Kebbine looɗe ɗe'e bee ndiyam.” Ɓe kebbini ɗe.
John2:8 Nden o wi'i ɓe: “Jonta
John2:9 Kaliifaajo ɓaŋgal metti ɗam
John2:10 o wi'i mo: “Koo moy ɗon aarta hokkugo ewnaaɓe mum inaboojam mbooɗɗam. To yimɓe nguyki
John2:11 Kanjum woni kaayeefiwol ngol Yeesu aarti waɗugo. O waɗi ngol haa Kana nder lesdi Galiili. O waŋgini tedduŋgal maako. Pukara'en maako nuɗɗini mo.
John2:12 Ɓaawo man
John2:13 Nde juulde Paska Yahuudu'en ɓadake
John2:14 O tawi soorrooɓe na'i e baali e pooli nder haykaliiru
John2:15 O hawti ɓoggi
John2:16 O wi'i soorrooɓe pooli boo: “Cottine ɗi
John2:17 Pukara'en maako ciftori ko winnda nder Deftere: “Yiide nde marmi ngam suudu ma
John2:18 Ammaa Yahuudu'en ƴami mo: “Kaayeefiwol ngole a waɗata ngam hollugo min a woodi baawɗe waɗugo bana nii?”
John2:19 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Ngibbine haykaliiru ndu'u
John2:20 Nden Yahuudu'en mbi'i mo: “Ɓe mahi haykaliiru ndu nder duuɓi cappanɗe nayi e joweego. An a mahitan ndu nder nyalɗe tati?”
John2:21 Ammaa kaŋko o wolwani ɓe dow ɓanndu maako laatiindu haykaliiru.
John2:22 Nde Yeesu ummiti diga maayde
John2:23 Yaake Yeesu ɗonno haa Urusaliima nder nyalɗe juulde Paska
John2:24 Ammaa Yeesu hoolaaki ɓe ngam o anndi yimɓe fuu.
John2:25 O walaa haaje goɗɗo anndina mo haala yimɓe
John3:1 Woodino goɗɗo nder Farisa'en
John3:2 O wari haa Yeesu bee jemma
John3:3 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Gooŋga mi wi'ata ma: To neɗɗo danyaaka ɗiɗawre
John3:4 Nikodemus ƴami mo: “To neɗɗo ndottidi
John3:5 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Gooŋga mi wi'ata ma: To neɗɗo danyaaka fahin bee ndiyam e bee Ruuhu
John3:6 Ko danya e yimɓe
John3:7 Taa hayɗin ngam mi wi'i ma: Haani on ndanye ɗiɗawre.
John3:8 Henndu ɗon wifa haa ndu muuyi fuu
John3:9 Nikodemus ƴami mo: “Noy ɗum waaroto?”
John3:10 Yeesu jaabi mo: “An a moodibbo Isra'iila'en
John3:11 Gooŋga mi wi'ata ma: Minin min ɗon mbolwa ko min anndi
John3:12 To on nuɗɗinaay yam nde mi wolwani on haala kuuje duniyaaru
John3:13 Walaa mo meeɗi yahugo haa asama
John3:14 Bana no Muusa ɓiliri mboodi njamndi mboɗeeri dow leggal nder ladde
John3:15 ngam haa koo moy nuɗɗini mo heɓa ngeendam nduumiiɗam.
John3:16 Allah yiɗi duniyaaru masin. Ngam maajum o hokki Ɓiɗɗo maako bajjo. Koo moy nuɗɗini Ɓiɗɗo oo
John3:17 Allah nelaay Ɓiɗɗo mum nder duniyaaru ngam hiitaago ndu
John3:18 Koo moy nuɗɗini Ɓiɗɗo oo
John3:19 Ndaa no kiita man wa'i: Annoora wari nder duniyaaru
John3:20 Ngam koo moy to ɗon waɗa halleende
John3:21 Ammaa mo ɗon waɗa gooŋga
John3:22 Ɓaawo man Yeesu yahdi bee pukara'en muuɗum haa lesdi Yahudiya. O faɓɓidi bee maɓɓe ton seɗɗa
John3:23 Yuhanna boo waɗani yimɓe baptisma haa Aynon
John3:24 Saa'i man ɓe nastinaayno Yuhanna haa fursina tawon.
John3:25 Ton
John3:26 Ɓe njehi haa Yuhanna
John3:27 Yuhanna jaabi ɓe: “Walaa mo heɓata koo ɗume sonaa to Allah hokki mo ɗum.
John3:28 Onon bee ko'e mon on mbaawan seedaago no mi bi'ɗo: Naa min woni Almasiihu
John3:29 Ɓaŋɗo
John3:30 Sey maŋngu maako ɓesdo
John3:31 Iwɗo diga dow
John3:32 O ɗon seedo ko o yi'i e ko o nani
John3:33 Mo jaɓi seedamku maako
John3:34 Ngam mo Allah neli ɗon wolwa haala Allah
John3:35 Baabiraawo yiɗi Ɓiɗɗo
John3:36 Mo nuɗɗini Ɓiɗɗo
John4:1 Farisa'en nani Yeesu ɗon waɗana yimɓe baptisma
John4:2 Gooŋga man kam
John4:3 Nde Yeesu nani haala ka'a
John4:4 Ngam yahugo ton sey o saalo nder lesdi Samariya.
John4:5 O yotti berniwol bi'eteeŋgol Sikar nder lesdi Samariya
John4:6 Ɓulndu Yaakubu ɗon ton. Yeesu somi bee jahaaŋgal
John4:7 Debbo Samariyaajo wari nyeɗugo ndiyam. Yeesu wi'i mo: “Hokkam ndiyam mi yara.”
John4:8 Yaake man pukara'en maako njehino haa berniwol ngam soodoygo nyaamdu.
John4:9 Debbo Samariyaajo go wi'i Yeesu: “An a Yahuuduujo
John4:10 Yeesu jaabi mo: “To a anndino dokkal Allah
John4:11 Debbo wi'i mo: “Moodibbo
John4:12 Kadi a ɓuri kaaka amin Yaakubu dokkuɗo min ɓulndu ndu'u
John4:13 Yeesu jaabi mo: “Koo moy yari ndiyam ɗa'am
John4:14 Ammaa jaranɗo ndiyam ɗam mi hokkata mo
John4:15 Debbo go wi'i mo: “Moodibbo
John4:16 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Yah ewnoya gorko ma
John4:17 Debbo jaabi mo: “Mi walaa gorko.” Yeesu wi'i mo: “A wolwi gooŋga nde a wi'i a walaa gorko.
John4:18 Ngam a woodino worɓe njowo
John4:19 Nden debbo go wi'i mo: “Moodibbo
John4:20 Kaakiraaɓe amin cujidani Allah dow hooseere nde'e
John4:21 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Debbo
John4:22 Onon Samariya'en on anndaa mo on cujidanta
John4:23 Ammaa saa'i waran
John4:24 Allah o Ruuhu
John4:25 Debbo wi'i mo: “Mi anndi Almasiihu
John4:26 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Min bolwananɗo ma woni kaŋko.”
John4:27 Saa'i man pukara'en maako lortoyi. Ɓe kayɗini nde ɓe ngi'i o ɗon wolida bee debbo. Ammaa walaa koo gooto maɓɓe wi'i: “Ko ɗaɓɓata?” Malla: “Ngam ɗume mbolididta bee debbo oo?”
John4:28 Debbo acci mbulku muuɗum
John4:29 “Ngare
John4:30 Yimɓe ngurti berniwol
John4:31 Saa'i man pukara'en ɗonno toro Yeesu ngam o nyaama
John4:32 Ammaa o wi'i ɓe: “Mi woodi nyaamdu ndu on anndaa.”
John4:33 Pukara'en ƴamƴamtiri: “Woodi mo waddani mo nyaamdu na?”
John4:34 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Nyaamdu am woni waɗugo muuyo nelɗo yam e hiɓɓingo kuugal ngal o umri yam.
John4:35 Naa on ɗon mbi'a lutti lebbi nayi haa wakkati codol waɗa? Ammaa mi ɗon wi'a on
John4:36 Diga jonta wakkati waɗi
John4:37 Oo saakan
John4:38 Mi neli on sodugo haa on kuuwaay sam
John4:39 Samariya'en ɗuuɗɓe nder berniwol man nuɗɗini Yeesu ngam seedamku ngu debbo seeduno: “O yecci yam ko mi waɗi fuu.”
John4:40 Ngam maajum
John4:41 Ɗuuɗɓe nuɗɗini Yeesu ngam daliila bolle maako.
John4:42 Ɓe ɗonno mbi'a debbo: “Naa ngam daliila bolle ma fahin min nuɗɗini jonta
John4:43 Ɓaawo paɓɓuki Yeesu ton nyalɗe ɗiɗi
John4:44 Ngam Yeesu bee hoore muuɗum wi'no: “Annabiijo heɓataa tedduŋgal nder lesdi muuɗum.”
John4:45 Ammaa nde o yotti lesdi Galiili
John4:46 Nden Yeesu lori haa wuro Kana nder lesdi Galiili
John4:47 Nde o nani Yeesu wari diga lesdi Yahudiya
John4:48 Yeesu wi'i mo: “To on ngi'aay alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji
John4:49 Wakiiliijo go wi'i mo: “Moodibbo
John4:50 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Hootu
John4:51 Diga o ɗon dow laawol tawon
John4:52 O ƴami ɓe: “Wakkatiire ndeye ngel heɓi daama?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Keenya deydey zuura yontere acci ngel.”
John4:53 Baaba maagel siftori ɗum waɗi deydey saa'iire nde Yeesu wi'no mo: “Ɓiŋngel maaɗa yeeɗiti.” Nden kaŋko e yimɓe saare maako fuu ɓe nuɗɗini Yeesu.
John4:54 Kanjum woni kaayeefiwol ɗiɗaɓol ngol Yeesu waɗi ɓaawo o wurti Yahudiya
John5:1 Ɓaawo man
John5:2 Haa Urusaliima ton
John5:3 Les daŋɗe ɗe'e
John5:4 ngam saa'i feere malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo ɗon jippo nder weendu man
John5:5 Woodino ton nyawɗo mo waɗi baakin duuɓi cappanɗe tati e joweetati.
John5:6 Nde Yeesu yi'i mo o ɗon waali
John5:7 Nyawɗo jaabi mo: “Moodibbo
John5:8 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Umma
John5:9 Law goɗɗo oo yamɗiti
John5:10 Ngam maajum Yahuudu'en mbi'i jamɗitinaaɗo man: “Hannde ɗum nyannde siwtorde
John5:11 O jaabi ɓe: “Mo yamɗitini yam
John5:12 Nden ɓe ƴami mo: “Ɗum moyjo wi'i ma hoocu be'itte ma
John5:13 Ammaa o anndaa moy yamɗitini mo
John5:14 Ɓaawoɗon Yeesu tawi mo nder haykaliiru
John5:15 Goɗɗo oo yehi
John5:16 Ngam man Yahuudu'en puɗɗi toonyaago Yeesu
John5:17 Ammaa Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Baabiraawo am ɗon huuwa foroy
John5:18 Ngam daliila bolle ɗe'e Yahuudu'en ɓurti waɗugo anniya mbarugo mo
John5:19 Ngam man Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Gooŋga mi wi'ata on
John5:20 Ngam Baabiraawo yiɗi Ɓiɗɗo
John5:21 Bana Baabiraawo ɗon ummitina maayɓe
John5:22 Baabiraawo hiitataako koo moy
John5:23 ngam haa yimɓe fuu teddina Ɓiɗɗo bana ɓe teddinirta Baabiraawo nelɗo mo. Koo moy sali teddingo Ɓiɗɗo
John5:24 Gooŋga mi wi'ata on: Mo ɗon nana bolle am
John5:25 Gooŋga mi wi'ata on: Saa'i waran
John5:26 Bana Baabiraawo woni seeɓoore ngeendam
John5:27 O hokki Ɓiɗɗo baawɗe hiitaago ngam o Ɓii-neɗɗo.
John5:28 Taa ɗum hayɗina on
John5:29 ngurto ɗe. Waɗooɓe booɗɗum ummititto ngam heɓugo ngeendam
John5:30 “Min mi waawataa waɗugo koo ɗume bee hoore am. Mi ɗon hiito fodde ko Allah wi'i yam. Kiita ka mi hiitoto
John5:31 To mi seedanake hoore am
John5:32 Ammaa woodi ceedoowo yam feere
John5:33 On neli nelaaɓe haa Yuhanna
John5:34 Min naa diga neɗɗo mi heɓata seedamku
John5:35 Yuhanna laatino bana pittirla kuɓɓaaŋga
John5:36 Ammaa min mi woodi seedamku ɓurŋgu ngu Yuhanna: Ngam kuuɗe ɗe Baabiraawo hokki yam ngam mi hebbitina ɗe
John5:37 Baabiraawo nelɗo yam boo o seedanake yam. On meeɗaay nanugo sawtu maako
John5:38 On njogaaki wolde maako nder ɓerɗe mooɗon
John5:39 On ɗon njaŋnga Defte Ceniiɗe
John5:40 Ammaa on ngiɗaa wargo haa am ngam on keɓa ngeendam.
John5:41 Mi ɗaɓɓataa tedduŋgal haa yimɓe.
John5:42 Ammaa mi anndi on
John5:43 Mi wari bee innde Baabiraawo am
John5:44 Bana noy on mbaawrata nuɗɗingo
John5:45 Taa nume min mi wulloto on yeeso Baabiraawo. Muusa mo on ɗon tammoro
John5:46 Ngam to on nuɗɗinno Muusa
John5:47 Ammaa to on nuɗɗinaay ko o winndi
John6:1 Ɓaawo man
John6:2 Mooɓre ɗuuɗnde ɗonno tokki mo
John6:3 Yeesu wa'i dow hooseere
John6:4 Wakkati Paska
John6:5 Yeesu ɓaŋgti gite
John6:6 O wi'i ɗum ngam foondugo Filip
John6:7 Filip jaabi mo: “Koo tamseeje ceede cardi teemeɗɗe ɗiɗi boo ke'ataa haa koo moy maɓɓe heɓa nyaamdu seɗɗa!”
John6:8 Andire
John6:9 “Ndaa
John6:10 Yeesu wi'i: “Ngecce yimɓe ɓe'e fuu ɓe njooɗo.” Huɗo ɗuuɗko ɗonno haa nokkuure man. Nden ɓe njooɗi
John6:11 Yeesu hoo'i tamseeje go
John6:12 Nde ɓe kaari
John6:13 Nden ɓe mooɓti luttuɗum tamseeje jowi ɗe yimɓe nyaamino
John6:14 Nde yimɓe ɓe'e ngi'i kaayeefiwol ngol Yeesu waɗi
John6:15 Yeesu anndi ɓe tammi wargo ngam ɓe naŋnga mo bee semmbe
John6:16 Nde hiiri
John6:17 Ɓe nasti koommbowal ngam yahugo Kafarnahum. Jemma jeŋngi
John6:18 Ndiyam dimmbi masin
John6:19 Nde ɓe laanyi koommbowal baakin kilomeetir jowi malla joweego
John6:20 Ammaa Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Taa kultore
John6:21 Ɓe ngiɗino hoosugo mo nder koommbowal
John6:22 Jaŋngo man
John6:23 Ammaa koommbooje goɗɗe iwi haa Tiberiyas
John6:24 Nde yimɓe mooɓre ngi'i Yeesu walaa ton
John6:25 Ɓe tawi Yeesu gaɗa mbeela
John6:26 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Gooŋga mi wi'ata on: On ɗon tefammi naa ngam on ngi'i kaayeefiiji ɗi mbaɗmi
John6:27 Taa kuuwe ngam nyaamdu wonnotoondu
John6:28 Nden ɓe ƴami mo: “Noy min mbaɗata haa min kuuwa kuuɗe ɗe Allah yiɗi?”
John6:29 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Kuugal ngal Allah yiɗi woni: On nuɗɗina mo o neli.”
John6:30 Ɓe ƴami mo: “Kaayeefiwol ngole a waɗata ngam haa min nuɗɗine? Kuugal ngale a huuwata?
John6:31 Kaakiraaɓe amin nyaami mannu nder ladde
John6:32 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Gooŋga mi wi'ata on
John6:33 Ngam nyaamdu ndu Allah hokkata
John6:34 Nden ɓe mbi'i mo: “Jawmiraawo
John6:35 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Min woni nyaamdu ndu hokkata ngeendam. Koo moy wari haa am
John6:36 Ammaa mi bi'ɗo on ɗum: On ngi'i yam
John6:37 Mo Baabiraawo hokki yam fuu
John6:38 Ngam mi jippaaki diga asama ngam waɗugo ko mi yiɗi
John6:39 Ndaa ko nelɗo yam yiɗi: Taa mi majjina koo gooto nder yimɓe ɓe o hokki yam
John6:40 Ndaa ko Baabiraawo am yiɗi: Koo moy yi'i Ɓiɗɗo
John6:41 Yahuudu'en ngurŋgurti dow Yeesu
John6:42 Ɓe ɗonno mbi'a: “Naa kaŋko woni Yeesu
John6:43 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Taa ngurŋgurte hakkunde mooɗon.
John6:44 Walaa mo heɓata wargo haa am
John6:45 Annabi'en mbinndi: Ɓe fuu ɓe laatoto ekkitinaaɓe Allah. Koo moy heɗiti Baabiraawo
John6:46 Ɗum yiɗaa wi'go
John6:47 Gooŋga mi wi'ata on: Koo moy nuɗɗini
John6:48 Min
John6:49 Kaakiraaɓe mooɗon nyaami mannu nder ladde
John6:50 Ammaa koo moy nyaami nyaamdu iwndu haa asama
John6:51 Min
John6:52 Bolle ɗe'e ummini gaabotiral hakkunde Yahuudu'en. Ɓe ƴamƴamtiri: “Noy o waawrata hokkugo en ɓanndu maako ngam en nyaama?”
John6:53 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Gooŋga mi wi'ata on: To on nyaamaay ɓanndu Ɓii-neɗɗo
John6:54 Mo nyaami ɓanndu am
John6:55 Ngam gooŋga
John6:56 Koo moy nyaami ɓanndu am
John6:57 Baabiraawo nelɗo yam
John6:58 Kanjum woni nyaamdu jippiindu diga asama. Ndu nanndaay bee ndu kaakiraaɓe mooɗon nyaamno. Ɓe nyaami ɗum
John6:59 Yeesu wolwi bolle ɗe'e saa'i o ɗon ekkitina nder suudu dewal Yahuudu'en haa Kafarnahum.
John6:60 Ɗuuɗɓe nder pukara'en Yeesu
John6:61 Yeesu anndi pukara'en maako ɗon ngurŋgurta dow maajum
John6:62 Kadi noy to on ngi'i Ɓii-neɗɗo ɗon eeŋga haa o wonno aran?
John6:63 Ruuhu Allah hokkata ngeendam
John6:64 Ammaa woodi woɗɓe caka mooɗon nuɗɗinaay.” Ngam diga fuɗɗam Yeesu anndi ɓeye ngoni ɓe nuɗɗintaa mo
John6:65 O ɓesdi wi'ugo: “Ngam man mbi'mi on
John6:66 Diga saa'i man ɗuuɗɓe caka pukara'en maako acci yahdugo bee maako.
John6:67 Nden Yeesu ƴami pukara'en sappo e ɗiɗo: “Noy onon boo
John6:68 Simon Piyer jaabi mo: “Jawmiraawo
John6:69 Minin
John6:70 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Naa min suɓi on sappo e ɗiɗo fuu na? Ammaa gooto mooɗon o Iblisa.”
John6:71 O wolwi ɗum dow Yahuuda ɓii Simon Iskariyot. Ngam ɗum kaŋko
John7:1 Ɓaawo man
John7:2 Wakkati man
John7:3 deerɗiraaɓe maako mbi'i mo: “Dillu diga nokkuure nde'e
John7:4 Walaa mo suuɗataa hoore muuɗum to o yiɗi yimɓe ngi'a mo. Nde nii a ɗon huuwa kuuɗe ɗe'e
John7:5 Koo deerɗiraaɓe maako maa
John7:6 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Wakkati am waɗaay tawon. Ammaa ngam mooɗon
John7:7 Duniyaaru waawataa wanyugo on
John7:8 Njehe haa juulde onon kam
John7:9 Ɓaawo o wi'i ɓe ɗum
John7:10 Nde deerɗiraaɓe Yeesu njehi haa juulde
John7:11 Yahuudu'en ɗonno tefa mo nder mooɓre juulde
John7:12 Yimɓe nder mooɓre mbolwi dow maako ɗuuɗɗum bee sofndaago. Woɗɓe ɗonno mbi'a: “O goɗɗo giɗɗo mbooɗeeŋga.” Ammaa woɗɓe boo ɗonno mbi'a: “Naa non sam
John7:13 Ammaa walaa mo wolwi dow maako bee baŋguɗum
John7:14 Nde reeta nyalɗe juulde caali
John7:15 Yahuudu'en kayɗini
John7:16 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Ko mi ekkitinta iwaay haa am
John7:17 To goɗɗo yiɗi waɗugo muuyo Allah
John7:18 Koo moy wolwi ngiɗa mum
John7:19 Naa Muusa hokki on tawreeta na? Ammaa walaa koo gooto mooɗon ɗowtanto ka. Koni on ɗaɓɓata mbarugo yam?”
John7:20 Mooɓre jaabi mo: “A ginnaaɗo! Moy ɗaɓɓi mbarugo ma?”
John7:21 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Mi huuwi kuugal gootal tan
John7:22 Muusa umri on juulnol – ammaa umroore nde iwaay diga Muusa
John7:23 To on ɗon njuulna goɗɗo nyalaade siwtorde
John7:24 Taa kiite fodde ko gite ngi'ata
John7:25 Woɗɓe nder yimɓe Urusaliima mbi'i: “Naa kaŋko woni mo ɓe ɗaɓɓata ngam mbarugo?
John7:26 Ndaa o ɗon wolwa bee baŋguɗum
John7:27 To Almasiihu wari
John7:28 Nden Yeesu ɗon ekkitina yimɓe nder haykaliiru bee sawtu
John7:29 Min
John7:30 Nden ɓe ɗaɓɓi naŋngugo mo
John7:31 Ɗuuɗɓe nder mooɓre nuɗɗini mo
John7:32 Farisa'en nani ngurŋgurtol mooɓre dow Yeesu
John7:33 Yeesu wi'i: “Mi ɗon wondi bee mooɗon wakkati seɗɗa tawon
John7:34 On tefatam
John7:35 Yahuudu'en ƴamƴamtiri: Toy o tammi yahugo haa en mbaawataa tawugo mo? O tammi dillugo haa lesɗe ɗe Yahuudu'en saŋkitiiɓe caka Yunaniŋke'en ngoni ngam o ekkitina Yunaniŋke'en na?
John7:36 O wi'i: “On tefatam
John7:37 Nyalaade timminirde juulde
John7:38 koo moy nuɗɗini yam
John7:39 Yeesu waɗi balndol ngol dow Ruuhu mo nuɗɗinɓe mo tammi heɓugo. Saa'i man ɓe keɓaayno Ruuhu tawon
John7:40 Nde yimɓe nder mooɓre nani bolle ɗe'e

John7:42 Naa Deftere wi'i Almasiihu iwan diga danygol Daawuda
John7:43 Nden luural waɗi hakkunde yimɓe daliila Yeesu.
John7:44 Woɗɓe caka maɓɓe ngiɗi naŋngugo mo
John7:45 Aynooɓe haykaliiru go lori haa mawɓe liman'en e Farisa'en
John7:46 Aynooɓe njaabi: “Walaa mo meeɗi wolwugo bana gorko oo sam.”

John7:53 Nden koo moy hooti saare muuɗum.
John8:1 Yeesu yehi Hooseere Jaytunje.
John8:2 Ammaa fajiri cub o lorti haa haykaliiru
John8:3 Nden moodiɓɓe tawreeta e Farisa'en ngaddani mo debbo mo ɓe naŋngi nder njeenu. Ɓe ndarni mo yeeso yimɓe fuu
John8:4 ɓe mbi'i Yeesu: “Moodibbo
John8:5 Muusa umri min nder tawreeta min piɗa irin debbo oo bee kaa'e haa o maaya. E an

John8:7 Nde ɓe tokki ƴamugo mo
John8:8 Nden o turi fahin
John8:9 Nde ɓe nani bolle ɗe'e
John8:10 Nden Yeesu dari
John8:11 Debbo jaabi: “Walaa koo gooto

John8:18 Min

John8:21 Fahin Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Mi dillan. On tefatam

John8:23 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Onon on iwi haa les
John8:24 Ngam maajum mi wi'i on: On maayan nder hakkeeji mooɗon. Ngam to on nuɗɗinaay min woni mo ngonmi
John8:25 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “An

John8:27 Ɓe paamaay o ɗon wolwana ɓe dow Baabiraawo.

John8:36 To Ɓiɗɗo rimɗini on

John8:44 Iblisa woni baaba mooɗon
John8:45 Ammaa min

John11:1 Woodino goɗɗo mo innde muuɗum Laazarus
John11:2 Mariyama o debbo mo rufino uurdi dow kosɗe Jawmiraawo
John11:3 Deerɗiraaɓe rewɓe ɗiɗo ɓe'e neli goɗɗo haa Yeesu
John11:4 Nde Yeesu nani ɗum
John11:5 Yeesu yiɗi Marta e Mariyama e Laazarus.
John11:6 Nde o nani Laazarus nyawɗo
John11:7 Nden o wi'i pukara'en: “En lorto haa lesdi Yahudiya.”
John11:8 Pukara'en mbi'i mo: “Moodibbo
John11:9 Yeesu jaabi: “Naa woodi saa'iiji sappo e ɗiɗi nder nyalawmaare? To goɗɗo ɗon yaha bee nyalawma
John11:10 Ammaa to goɗɗo ɗon yaha bee jemma
John11:11 Ɓaawo wolwango ɓe bolle ɗe'e
John11:12 Pukara'en njaabi mo: “Jawmiraawo
John11:13 Yeesu ɗonno wolwa dow haala maayde Laazarus
John11:14 Nden Yeesu wi'i ɓe bee laaɓɗum: “Laazarus maayi.
John11:15 Ammaa ngam daliila mooɗon mi ɗon seyo ngam mi walaa ton

John11:17 Nde Yeesu yotti Baytaniya
John11:18 Baytaniya ɓadi bee Urusaliima
John11:19 Yahuudu'en ɗuuɗɓe ngari haa Marta e Mariyama
John11:20 Nde Marta nani Yeesu wari
John11:21 Marta wi'i Yeesu: “Jawmiraawo
John11:22 Ammaa mi anndi
John11:23 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Deerɗa ummititto.”
John11:24 Marta jaabi mo: “Mi anndi o ummititto saa'i ummitineeki maayɓe
John11:25 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Min woni ummitinoowo e geeɗitinoowo. Koo moy nuɗɗini yam yeeɗan
John11:26 Koo moy geeto
John11:27 Marta jaabi mo: “Ooho
John11:28 Ɓaawo bolle ɗe'e
John11:29 Nde Mariyama nani ɗum
John11:30 Yeesu nastaayno wuro tawon
John11:31 Yahuudu'en wondunooɓe bee Mariyama nder suudu ngam de'itingo mo ngi'i o ummi law
John11:32 Nde Mariyama wari haa nokkuure nde Yeesu woni
John11:33 Nde Yeesu yi'i o ɗon woya
John11:34 O wi'i: “Haa toy on uwi mo?” Ɓe njaabi mo: “Jawmiraawo
John11:35 Yeesu ilni gonɗi.
John11:36 Yahuudu'en mbi'i: “Kay
John11:37 Ammaa woɗɓe caka maɓɓe mbi'i: “Kaŋko mo wumtini wumɓe
John11:38 Ɓernde Yeesu ummi fahin
John11:39 Yeesu wi'i: “Cottine hayre.” Marta

John11:41 Ɓe cottini hayre go. Yeesu tijji asama
John11:42 Min kam
John11:43 Nde o wolwi bolle ɗe'e
John11:44 Maayɗo wurti
John11:45 Yahuudu'en ɗuuɗɓe warɓe haa Mariyama ngi'i ko Yeesu waɗi
John11:46 Ammaa woɗɓe caka maɓɓe njehi haa Farisa'en
John11:47 Farisa'en e mawɓe liman'en ndawridi
John11:48 To en acci mo o ɗon waɗa bana nii
John11:49 Gooto caka maɓɓe
John11:50 On paamataa to goɗɗo gooto maayi ngam jama'aare fuu
John11:51 O wolwaay bolle ɗe'e bee ngiɗa maako. Ammaa nde o hooreejo liman'en hitaande man
John11:52 naa ngam ummaatoore maajum tan
John11:53 Diga nyannde man

John19:18 Haa ton sooje'en ɓili Yeesu haa leggal gaafaaŋgal. Ɓe ɓildi worɓe ɗiɗo bee Yeesu
John19:19 Pilaatu winndi dow alluha
John19:20 Yahuudu'en ɗuuɗɓe njaŋngi ɗum
John19:21 Ammaa mawɓe liman'en Yahuudu'en mbi'i Pilaatu: “Taa winndu: Laamiiɗo Yahuudu'en
John19:22 Pilaatu jaabi ɓe: “Ko mi winndi
John19:23 Nde sooje'en timmini ɓilugo Yeesu haa leggal gaafaaŋgal
John19:24 Sooje'en mbi'i hakkunde muuɗum'en: “Taa en ceeka toggoore nde
John19:25 Daada Yeesu e deerɗum debbo e Mariyama debbo Kolopas e Mariyama mo Magdala
John19:26 Yeesu yi'i daada muuɗum e pukaraajo mo o yiɗi ɗum
John19:27 Nden o wi'i pukaraajo man: “Ndaa daada ma.” Diga saa'i man pukaraajo man hooci Mariyama haa saare muuɗum.
John19:28 Ɓaawo maajum
John19:29 Woodi mbulku ton
John19:30 Nde Yeesu metti lammuɗam
John19:31 Ɗum nyannde taaskara nyalaade siwtorde. Yahuudu'en ngiɗaa ɓalli lutta dow leɗɗe gaafaaɗe nyannde siwtorde ngam nyalaade siwtorde man laati nyalaade mawnde haa maɓɓe. Ngam maajum ɓe tori Pilaatu o umra ɓe ngewa kosɗe ɓilaaɓe
John19:32 Nden sooje'en ngari
John19:33 Nde ɓe njotti haa Yeesu
John19:34 Ammaa gooto nder sooje'en yuwi mo wuttudu bee labbo
John19:35 Gi'ɗo seedi ɗum
John19:36 Ɗum laati non ngam hebbitingo ko Deftere wi'i: “Ɓe ngewataa i'e maako koo gootal.”
John19:37 Aayaare feere boo wi'i: “Ɓe ndaaran mo ɓe njuwi.”
John19:38 Ɓaawo maajum
John19:39 Nikodemus mo yehino haa Yeesu jemmaare woɗnde
John19:40 Kamɓe ɗiɗo ɓe kooci ɓanndu Yeesu
John19:41 Haa kommbi nokkuure ɓe ɓilno Yeesu
John19:42 Haa ton ɓe mballini ɓanndu Yeesu
John20:1 Nyalaade aranndeere
John20:2 O doggi
John20:3 Piyer e pukaraajo oya go ngurti
John20:4 Ɓe ndoggi ɓe ɗiɗo fuu
John20:5 O yurni nder yenaande
John20:6 Nden Piyer mo tokkino mo go boo yotti
John20:7 Leppol ngol ɓe caawino hoore Yeesu bee maajum wondaay bee leppi goɗɗi go
John20:8 Nden pukaraajo aartuɗo yottaago haa yenaande go boo nasti. O yi'i
John20:9 Haa wargo wakkati man fuu ɓe paamaayno ko Deftere wi'i tawon. Ngam nde wi'i Yeesu ummititto caka maayɓe.
John20:10 Nden pukara'en ɗiɗo go kooti.
John20:11 Mariyama ɗonno dari haa yaasi
John20:12 o yi'i malaa'ika'en ɗiɗo
John20:13 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Debbo
John20:14 Nde o wolwi bolle ɗe'e
John20:15 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Debbo
John20:16 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Mariyama!” Mariyama wayliti haa maako
John20:17 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Taa meemam
John20:18 Nden Mariyama mo Magdala dilli
John20:19 Nyannde Alat man
John20:20 Nde o wolwani ɓe bolle ɗe'e
John20:21 Yeesu wi'i ɓe fahin: “Salaaman wonda bee mooɗon. Bana no Baabiraawo neli yam
John20:22 Nde o wolwani ɓe bolle ɗe'e
John20:23 Ɓe on njaafani hakke muuɗum'en
John20:24 Nde Yeesu warino haa pukara'en
John20:25 Pukara'en woɗɓe mbi'i mo: “Min ngi'i Jawmiraawo.” Ammaa Tomas wi'i ɓe: “To mi yi'aay ɓattajje suufuuje nder juuɗe maako
John20:26 Asaweere woore ɓaawoɗon
John20:27 Nden o wi'i Tomas: “Waddu hoondu ma haa ɗo
John20:28 Tomas jaabi mo: “Jawmiraawo am
John20:29 Yeesu wi'i mo: “Jonta nde a yi'i yam a nuɗɗini na? Barka laatanto ɓe ngi'aay yam
John20:30 Yeesu waɗi kaayeefiiji goɗɗi ɗuuɗɗi yeeso pukara'en muuɗum
John20:31 Ammaa ko winnda nder maare
John21:1 Ɓaawo maajum fahin Yeesu waŋgani pukara'en muuɗum haa kommbi weendu Tiberiyas. Ndaa no o waŋgirani ɓe:
John21:2 Simon Piyer e Tomas bi'eteeɗo Ciwto e Natanayel mo wuro Kana nder lesdi Galiili e ɓiɓɓe Zebede e pukara'en Yeesu woɗɓe ɗiɗo
John21:3 Simon Piyer wi'i ɓe: “Mi dillan waawoygo liɗɗi.” Ɓe mbi'i mo: “Minin boo min njahdan bee maaɗa.” Ɓe ndilli
John21:4 Nde fuɗɗi weetugo
John21:5 Nden Yeesu ƴami ɓe: “Ɓikkoy
John21:6 O wi'i ɓe: “Cakkine zubaawol haa wuttudu koommbowal nyaamru
John21:7 Nden pukaraajo mo Yeesu yiɗi ɗum wi'i Simon Piyer: “Ɗum Jawmiraawo!” Nde Simon Piyer nani ɗum
John21:8 Pukara'en woɗɓe ngari bee koommbowal
John21:9 Nde ɓe ngurti
John21:10 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ngadde liɗɗi seɗɗa nder ko on naŋngi jonta.”
John21:11 Simon Piyer nasti koommbowal
John21:12 Yeesu wi'i ɓe: “Ngare
John21:13 Yeesu ɓaditi ɓe
John21:14 Kanjum woni waŋgannde tataɓre nde Yeesu waŋgani pukara'en muuɗum
John21:15 Ɓaawo ɓe nyaami
John21:16 Nden o wolwani mo ɗiɗawre
John21:17 O wolwani mo tataɓre: “Simon ɓii Yuhanna
John21:18 Gooŋga mi ɗon wi'e: Yaake a derkeejono
John21:19 Bee bolle ɗe'e Yeesu yiɗi tinndingo irin maayde nde Piyer tammi maayugo ngam teddingo Allah. Nden Yeesu wi'i mo: “Tokkam.”
John21:20 Piyer yeesiti
John21:21 Nde Piyer yi'i mo
John21:22 Yeesu jaabi mo: “To mi yiɗi o yeeɗa haa to mi lori
John21:23 Haala man saŋkiti caka nuɗɗinɓe
John21:24 Pukaraajo oo
John21:25 Yeesu huuwi kuuɗe goɗɗe ɗuuɗɗe. To ɗe mbinndano gootal gootal fuu
Acts1:1 Yaa Teyofilus
Acts1:2 haa nyannde o eeŋga haa asama. Diga o siwaa eeŋgineego
Acts1:3 Ɓaawo boneeji ɗi o yari
Acts1:4 Yaake o ɗon bee maɓɓe
Acts1:5 Ngam Yuhanna waɗani yimɓe baptisma bee ndiyam
Acts1:6 Nden mooɓtiiɓe ton ƴami mo
Acts1:7 Yeesu jaabi ɓe: “Baabiraawo am bee baawɗe mum ta'i wakkatiiji e saa'iiji man
Acts1:8 ammaa to Ruuhu Ceniiɗo jippake dow mooɗon
Acts1:9 Nde o timmini wolwugo bolle ɗe'e
Acts1:10 Nde pukara'en ɗon tijjo heedi asama haa Yeesu ɗon eeŋgo
Acts1:11 mbi'i ɓe: “Onon Galiili'en
Acts1:12 Nden nelaaɓe njippi hooseere wi'eteende Hooseere Jaytunje
Acts1:13 Nde ɓe nasti Urusaliima
Acts1:14 Nder anniya ngoota
Acts1:15 Nyannde feere
Acts1:16 “Deerɗiraaɓe am
Acts1:17 ngam Yahuuda laatino mo amin
Acts1:18 Yahuuda soodi ngesa bee ngeenaari ndi o heɓri bee kuugal maako kalluŋgal. Ton o do'ori hoore hoore
Acts1:19 Yimɓe Urusaliima fuu nani haala ka'a. Kanjum waɗi ɓe inndi ngesa ka'a Hakeldama bee wolde maɓɓe
Acts1:20 Ngam ɗum winndaama haa deftere Jabuura: Saare maako laato winnde
Acts1:21 Ngam maajum
Acts1:22 diga nyannde nde Yuhanna waɗani mo baptisma haa nyannde nde o eeŋga haa asama
Acts1:23 Nden ɓe mbaŋgini inɗe yimɓe ɗiɗo: Yusufu bi'eteeɗo Barsabas
Acts1:24 Nden ɓe tori Allah
Acts1:25 ngam haa o hoosa kuugal nelal ngal Yahuuda acci haa o dilli haa pellel maako.”
Acts1:26 Ɓaawoɗon ɓe mbaɗi kur'u ngam suɓugo caka inɗe ɗe'e. Kur'u man waŋgini Mattiyas
Acts2:1 Nde nyannde juulde Pantekosta yottake
Acts2:2 Law ɓe nani iidoore iwnde haa asama bana iidoore henndu semmbiɗndu

Acts2:5 Woodino Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe haa Urusaliima

Acts2:10 haa Firigiya e Pamfiliya
Acts2:11 woɗɓe boo ngari diga Kereta e Arabiya. Woodi boo Yahuudu'en e jananɓe tokkiiɓe diina Yahuudu'en. Ammaa en ɗon nana ɓe ɗon mbolwa bee bolle meeɗen haala kuuɗe mawɗe ɗe Allah waɗi.”
Acts2:12 Ɓe fuu ɓe kayɗini
Acts2:13 Ammaa woɗɓe njanci nuɗɗinɓe

Acts2:15 Yimɓe ɓe'e
Acts2:16 ammaa ɗum kebbitinki ko annabi Yo'el wolwuno:
Acts2:17 Allah wi'i: Nder balɗe ragareeje: Mi waanjan Ruuhu am dow yimɓe fuu: Ɓiɓɓe mon worɓe e rewɓe mbaɗan annabaaku
Acts2:18 Koo dow maccuɓe am e horɓe am fuu boo
Acts2:19 Mi waɗan kaayeefiiji haa asama e dow lesdi boo alaamaaji
Acts2:20 Naaŋge nyiɓɓan
Acts2:21 Koo moy ewnotooɗo innde Jawmiraawo
Acts2:22 Onon Isra'iila'en
Acts2:23 Diga ɓooyma Allah muuyi
Acts2:24 Ammaa Allah ummitini mo
Acts2:25 Ndaa ko Daawuda wi'no dow maako: Mi ɗon yi'a Jawmiraawo yeeso am tum
Acts2:26 Ngam maajum ɓernde am ɗon seyo
Acts2:27 Ngam an
Acts2:28 A holli yam laawol jahranŋgol haa ngeendam
Acts2:29 Deerɗiraaɓe am
Acts2:30 O annabiijo
Acts2:31 Daawuda faami ummitineeki Almasiihu diga wakkati man siwaa. Ngam maajum o wi'i: Allah accaay mo nder joonde maayɓe
Acts2:32 Yeesu oo
Acts2:33 Allah ɓaŋgti mo
Acts2:34 Ngam Daawuda eeŋgaay haa asama
Acts2:35 haa to mi laatini konne'en ma jaaɓruɗum kosɗe ma.
Acts2:36 Ngam maajum sey Isra'iila'en fuu paama fakat
Acts2:37 Nde yimɓe nani ɗum
Acts2:38 Piyer jaabi: “Tuube
Acts2:39 Iinawol ngo'ol ɗon ngam mooɗon
Acts2:40 Piyer ɓesdi wolwango ɓe bolle ɗuuɗɗe ngam wasugo ɓe
Acts2:41 Jaɓɓe bolle ɗe Piyer wolwi njaɓi baptisma. Nyannde man yimɓe baakin ujine tato ɓesdaama dow nuɗɗinɓe.
Acts2:42 Ɓe tiiɗi nanugo ekkitinol nelaaɓe
Acts2:43 Nelaaɓe ngaɗi kaayeefiiji e alaamaaji ɗuuɗɗi
Acts2:44 Nuɗɗinɓe fuu kawti
Acts2:45 Ɓe coorri kuuje e mardi maɓɓe
Acts2:46 Nyalaade fuu ɓe ɗon kawta nder haykaliiru bee ɓernde woore
Acts2:47 ɓe ɗon ngetta Allah. Yimɓe fuu ngerdi ɓe. Nyalaade fuu Jawmiraawo ɗon ɓesdana jama'aare maɓɓe hisnaaɓe.
Acts3:1 Nyannde feere Piyer bee Yuhanna njehi haykaliiru ngam waɗugo do'a asiri.

Acts3:3 Nde o laari Piyer e Yuhanna ɗon nasta
Acts3:4 Ɓe cuti mo

Acts4:1 Yaake Piyer e Yuhanna ɗon mbolwana yimɓe

Acts4:3 Ɓe naŋngi ɓe
Acts4:4 Ammaa ɗuuɗɓe haa nanɓe bolle nelaaɓe ɓe'e nuɗɗini
Acts4:5 Jaŋngo man mawɓe Yahuudu'en e ndotti'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta kawti haa Urusaliima.
Acts4:6 Ɓe kawti bee Annas hooreejo liman'en e Kayafas e Yuhanna e Aleksandire e yimɓe saare hooreejo liman'en woɗɓe fuu.
Acts4:7 Ɓe ndarni nelaaɓe yeeso maɓɓe
Acts4:8 Nden Piyer
Acts4:9 min ngullaama yeeso mon hannde ngam daliila kuugal booɗŋgal ngal min mbaɗani boosɗo e noy o yamɗitiri.
Acts4:10 Onon bee Isra'iila'en fuu
Acts4:11 Kaŋko woni: Hayre nde onon mahooɓe
Acts4:12 Haa maako tan keɓeten kisndam
Acts4:13 Dawrooɓe Yahuudu'en go kayɗini ngam ɓe ngi'i Piyer e Yuhanna kulaay sam
Acts4:14 Ammaa walaa ko ɓe mbaawi wi'ugo ngam ɓe ngi'i goɗɗo boosɗo go ɗon dari bee Piyer e Yuhanna
Acts4:15 Ngam maajum ɓe ngurtini Piyer e Yuhanna diga suudu dawriinde
Acts4:16 ɓe mbi'i: “Ko mbaɗeten yimɓe ɓe'e? Caka yimɓe Urusaliima fuu walaa mo anndaa alaama kayɗiniika ka ɓe mbaɗi. En mbaawataa yeddugo ɗum.
Acts4:17 Ammaa ngam taa haala ka'a ɓesda saŋkitaago caka ummaatoore
Acts4:18 Nden ɓe ewni ɓe fahin. Ɓe kaɗi ɓe

Acts4:22 Duuɓi goɗɗo mo ɓe njamɗitini ɗum bee kaayeefi
Acts4:23 Nde ɓe njoofi Piyer e Yuhanna
Acts4:24 Nde yimɓe maɓɓe nani ɗum
Acts4:25 An waɗi kaaka amin Daawuda
Acts4:26 Laamiiɓe duniyaaru ɗon taaski waɗugo fitina
Acts4:27 Ngam bana non Hirudus e Pontiyus Pilaatu e ummaatooje e Isra'iila'en ɓe fuu ɓe kawti nder berniwol ngo'ol dow Yeesu
Acts4:28 Ɓe mbaɗi ko a taaskitini bee baawɗe ma e muuyo ma diga ɓooyma.

Acts4:30 Waŋgin baawɗe maaɗa haa nyawɓe njamɗita
Acts4:31 Nde ɓe timmini waɗgo do'a

Acts5:5 Nde Ananiyas nani bolle ɗe'e

Acts5:9 Nden Piyer wi'i mo: “Koni on narri
Acts5:10 Ɗon nii
Acts5:11 Kulol maŋngol naŋngi jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe e nanɓe haala ka'a fuu.

Acts5:13 Yimɓe wuro fuu kuli hawtango ɓe koo nde ummaatoore ɗonno maŋgta ɓe.
Acts5:14 Tum worɓe e rewɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɗon ɓesdano nuɗɗinɓe Jawmiraawo.

Acts5:41 Nelaaɓe ummi caka dawrooɓe

Acts6:1 Nyalɗe man nuɗɗinɓe tokki ɓesdaago. Nden wolwooɓe Yunaniŋkeere ngurŋgurti dow wolwooɓe Ibraniŋkeere ngam rewɓe yurumɓe wonɓe caka maɓɓe keɓataa geɗal haa cennduki nyaamdu nyalaade fuu.
Acts6:2 Nelaaɓe sappo e ɗiɗo mooɓti nuɗɗinɓe fuu
Acts6:3 Ngam maajum
Acts6:4 Minin kam
Acts6:5 Haala ka'a fottani nuɗɗinɓe fuu
Acts6:6 Ɓe njahri ɓe haa nelaaɓe. Nelaaɓe mbaɗi do'a
Acts6:7 Wolde Allah tokki saŋkitaago. Limgal nuɗɗinɓe tokki ɓesdaago masin nder Urusaliima
Acts6:8 Etiyen
Acts6:9 Ammaa woɗɓe nder suudu dewal Yahuudu'en wi'eteendu Suudu Rimɗinaaɓe
Acts6:10 Etiyen wolwi bee hikma e bee baawɗe Ruuhu haa ɓe mbaawaay dartanaago mo.
Acts6:11 Ngam man ɓe njoɓi woɗɓe nder sirri haa ɓe mbi'a: “Min nani o wolwi kalluka dow Muusa e dow Allah boo.”
Acts6:12 Bana nii ɓe umminiri ɓerɗe ummaatoore e ndotti'en e moodiɓɓe tawreeta. Ɓe kippi Etiyen
Acts6:13 Nden ɓe ngaddi seedooɓe haa pewana mo
Acts6:14 Ngam min nani o wi'i: Yeesu mo Nasaratu oo
Acts6:15 Dawrooɓe tawaaɓe ton fuu ɗon cuti Etiyen
Acts7:1 Hooreejo liman'en ƴami Etiyen: “Gooŋga ɓe mbi'i na?”
Acts7:2 Etiyen jaabi: “Deerɗiraaɓe e baabiraaɓe
Acts7:3 Allah wi'i mo: Wurta lesdi ma
Acts7:4 Nden o acci lesdi Kaldiya
Acts7:5 Yaake man Allah marnaay Ibrahiima koo yaaɓannde kosŋgal nder lesdi ndi'i. Ammaa o iini marnugo mo ndi
Acts7:6 Allah wi'i mo: Danygol ma njooɗoto haa lesdi njananndi
Acts7:7 Ammaa mi hiitoto ummaatoore nastinnde ɓe nder maccuŋgaaku. Ɓaawoɗon
Acts7:8 Nden Allah waɗani Ibrahiima alkawal
Acts7:9 Kaakiraaɓe ɓe'e kaaji Yusufu
Acts7:10 wurtini mo diga nder torraaji maako
Acts7:11 Yaake man weelo waɗi haa Misra bee Kanaana fuu. Ngo torri yimɓe masin
Acts7:12 Ngam maajum
Acts7:13 Haa jahaaŋgal ɗiɗaɓal Yusufu annditini hoore muuɗum haa deerɗiraaɓe mum. Bana non Firawna anndiri yimɓe saare baaba Yusufu.
Acts7:14 Nden Yusufu neli
Acts7:15 Nden Yaakubu yehi
Acts7:16 Ɓe njahri ɓe haa Sikem. Ton ɓe uwi ɓe nder yenaande nde Ibrahiima sooduno haa ɓiɓɓe Hamor.
Acts7:17 Nde saa'i iinawol ngol Allah hunani Ibrahiima ɓadake yottaago
Acts7:18 haa wakkati laamiiɗo goɗɗo mo anndaa Yusufu laamani Misra.
Acts7:19 O ƴoyri yimɓe meeɗen
Acts7:20 Yaake man nden ɓe ndanyi Muusa
Acts7:21 nden ɓe ngurtini mo. Ammaa ɓiɗɗo Firawna debbo hoosi mo
Acts7:22 Muusa ekkiti anndal Misra'en fuu
Acts7:23 Nde Muusa yotti duuɓi cappanɗe nayi
Acts7:24 Nde o yi'i Misraajo ɗon torra Isra'iilaajo
Acts7:25 O tammino yimɓe maako paaman Allah neli mo haa o hisna ɓe
Acts7:26 Jaŋngo man boo o tawi Isra'iila'en ɗiɗo ɗon kaɓa. O tefi senndugo ɓe
Acts7:27 Ammaa torranɗo deerɗum jaabi Muusa
Acts7:28 A yiɗi mbarugo yam bana mbarɗa Misraajo keenya na?
Acts7:29 Nde Muusa nani ɗum
Acts7:30 Ɓaawo duuɓi cappanɗe nayi
Acts7:31 Ko o yi'i hayɗini mo
Acts7:32 Min woni Allah kaakiraaɓe ma
Acts7:33 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: Faɗɗita ngam nokkuure haa a ɗon dari
Acts7:34 Mi yi'i bone yimɓe am nder Misra. Mi nani uumaali maɓɓe
Acts7:35 Kaŋko woni Muusa mo Isra'iila'en njaɓaayno
Acts7:36 Muusa wurtini ɓe bee waɗugo kaayeefiiji e alaamaaji nder lesdi Misra
Acts7:37 Muusa wi'i Isra'iila'en: Allah umminanan on annabiijo bana am caka deerɗiraaɓe mooɗon.
Acts7:38 Yaake jama'aare ɗonno nder ladde
Acts7:39 Ammaa kaakiraaɓe meeɗen cali ɗowtanaago Muusa. Ɓe ɗoyli mo
Acts7:40 Ngam man ɓe mbi'i Haruna: Waɗan min ɗowanteeɓe ardotooɓe min
Acts7:41 Ɓe mbaɗi lawru nanndundu bee gaggel
Acts7:42 Ammaa Allah ɗoyli ɓe
Acts7:43 On ndoondi laymaaru lawru mon Molok
Acts7:44 Laymaaru Allah ɗonno caka kaakiraaɓe meeɗen nder ladde. Ɓe nyooti ndu bana no Allah waŋginani Muusa
Acts7:45 Ɓaawoɗon kaakiraaɓe meeɗen ndoni ndu haa baabiraaɓe muuɗum'en. Ɓe ndoondi ndu haa jahaaŋgal maɓɓe dow ardaaŋgal Yosuwa. Allah riiwi ummaatooje goɗɗe yeeso maɓɓe. Laymaaru ndu jooɗi ton haa yotti zamanu Daawuda.
Acts7:46 Daawuda heɓi mo'ere Allah
Acts7:47 Ammaa ɗum Suleymaanu nyiɓani mo nde.
Acts7:48 Ammaa Allah Ɓaŋiiɗo jooɗataako nder cuuɗi ɗi yimɓe mahata
Acts7:49 Jawmiraawo wi'i: Asama woni leeso laamu am
Acts7:50 Naa min waɗi kuuje ɗe'e fuu na?
Acts7:51 Onon saata-ko'e'en
Acts7:52 Woodi annabiijo koo gooto mo kaakiraaɓe mooɗon toonyaaki na? Ɓe mbari nelaaɓe Allah
Acts7:53 On njaɓi tawreeta Allah ka malaa'ika'en anndini on
Acts7:54 Nde dawrooɓe Yahuudu'en nani bolle ɗe'e
Acts7:55 Ammaa Etiyen
Acts7:56 O wi'i: “Ndaa
Acts7:57 Ɓe ngooki bee sawtu
Acts7:58 Ɓe ngurtini mo haa yaasi berniwol
Acts7:59 Saa'i ɓe ɗon piɗa Etiyen
Acts7:60 O tuggi koppi maako
Acts8:1 Sol boo yerdi mbareeki Etiyen. Nyannde man fitina caatuka ukkani jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Urusaliima. Ɓe fuu ɓe caŋkiti haa kawye Yahudiya e Samariya
Acts8:2 Yimɓe hulɓe Allah uwi Etiyen
Acts8:3 Ammaa Sol ɗaɓɓi nattingo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe. O yehi haa ci'e
Acts8:4 Nuɗɗinɓe saŋkitiiɓe go ngaazi Linjiila
Acts8:5 Filip yehi haa berniwol Samariya
Acts8:6 Mooɓe yimɓe kawti
Acts8:7 Ngam ruuhuuji coɓɗi ngurti diga yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe bee gookaali. Jiijiiɓe e woosɓe ɗuuɗɓe boo njamɗiti.
Acts8:8 Yimɓe Samariya ceyi masin.
Acts8:9 Woodino goɗɗo bi'eteeɗo Simon nder berniwol ngo'ol. O ɗonno hayɗina yimɓe Samariya bee hiilaaji maako. O wi'i o mawɗo.
Acts8:10 Ngam maajum yimɓe nder berniwol fuu
Acts8:11 Neeɓi o ɗonno hayɗina ɓe bee hiilaaji maako
Acts8:12 Nde Filip waazi ɓe Linjiila dow laamu Allah e dow innde Yeesu Almasiihu
Acts8:13 Simon boo nuɗɗini. Nde o jaɓi baptisma
Acts8:14 Nde nelaaɓe haa Urusaliima nani yimɓe Samariya njaɓi wolde Allah
Acts8:15 Nde Piyer e Yuhanna njotti ton
Acts8:16 Ngam yimɓe Samariya jaɓino baptisma bee innde Jawmiraawo Yeesu
Acts8:17 Nden Piyer e Yuhanna mballini juuɗe dow maɓɓe
Acts8:18 Nde Simon yi'i yimɓe keɓi Ruuhu ngam nelaaɓe mballini juuɗe dow maɓɓe
Acts8:19 o wi'i ɓe: “Ndokkeeɗam min boo baawɗe ɗe'e
Acts8:20 Ammaa Piyer jaabi mo: “Allah halkide bee ceede maaɗa fuu
Acts8:21 A walaa geɗal nder haala ka'a sam
Acts8:22 Tuubu dow halleende ma! Tora Allah! Teema o yaafante anniya ɓernde ma kalluka ka'a
Acts8:23 ngam mi yi'i ɓernde ma ɗon heewi kaajal
Acts8:24 Nden Simon tori Piyer e Yuhanna: “Useni
Acts8:25 Piyer e Yuhanna mbaɗi seedamku
Acts8:26 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wi'i Filip: “Umma
Acts8:27 Filip ummi
Acts8:28 O ɗonno jooɗi nder moota pucci maako
Acts8:29 Ruuhu Ceniiɗo wi'i Filip: “Ɓadita moota pucci nga'a.”
Acts8:30 Filip doggi
Acts8:31 Etiyopiyaajo wi'i: “Noy paamranmi nde mi walaa paamtinoowo?” O tori Filip o wa'o moota pucci
Acts8:32 Ndaa ko o jaŋngi nder deftere man: “O ɗon bana jawgel ngel ɓe njahrata hirseego. Bana mbaalu muukaaŋgu yeeso meksooɓe gaasa muuɗum
Acts8:33 Ɓe leestini mo
Acts8:34 Etiyopiyaajo wi'i Filip: “Useni
Acts8:35 Filip fuɗɗi wolwugo dow aayaaje go
Acts8:36 Nde ɓe ɗon tokkitina jahaaŋgal maɓɓe
Acts8:37 Filip wi'i mo: “Ɗum waɗoto to a nuɗɗini bee ɓernde woore.” O jaabi: “Mi nuɗɗini Yeesu Almasiihu woni Ɓiɗɗo Allah.” ]
Acts8:38 Nden o umri ɓe ndarna moota pucci maako. Ɓe njippodi ɓe ɗiɗo fuu nder ndiyam. Filip waɗani mo baptisma.
Acts8:39 Nde ɓe ngurti ndiyam
Acts8:40 Filip tawaama haa Asdod. O tokki waazaago Linjiila haa gure haa o saali fuu
Acts9:1 Ammaa Sol tokki furkitaago nuɗɗinɓe Jawmiraawo
Acts9:2 o ƴami mo o winndana mo bataakeeji ngam cuuɗi dewal Yahuudu'en haa wuro Damas. Ngam to o tawi tokkiiɓe Laawol Jawmiraawo ton
Acts9:3 Nde o ɗon haa laawol
Acts9:4 O do'i haa lesdi
Acts9:5 O ƴami: “An a moy
Acts9:6 Ammaa umma
Acts9:7 Yimɓe yahdanɓe bee maako ndari
Acts9:8 Sol ummi
Acts9:9 Balɗe tati o waawaay yi'ugo
Acts9:10 Woodi nuɗɗinɗo haa Damas
Acts9:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Umma
Acts9:12 Nder wahayu o yi'i goɗɗo bi'eteeɗo Ananiyas nasti
Acts9:13 Ananiyas jaabi: “Jawmiraawo
Acts9:14 Ndaa o wari haa ɗo bee duŋayeere mawɓe liman'en haa o naŋnga ewnotooɓe innde ma fuu.”
Acts9:15 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: “Yah
Acts9:16 Min bee hoore am mi hollan mo no o tammi torreego daliila innde am.”
Acts9:17 Nden Ananiyas dilli
Acts9:18 Ɗon nii goɗɗum bana koɓe yani diga gite maako
Acts9:19 Nden o nyaami
Acts9:20 Ɓaawoɗon o yehi haa cuuɗi dewal Yahuudu'en
Acts9:21 Nanɓe mo fuu kayɗini
Acts9:22 Ammaa Sol ɓesdi waazugo bee dartaare. Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe haa Damas mbaawaay waabaago mo ngam o tinndini ɓe bee laaɓɗum Yeesu woni Almasiihu.
Acts9:23 Ɓaawo balɗe ɗuuɗɗe
Acts9:24 ammaa o nani ko haɓɓa dow maako
Acts9:25 Ammaa jemmaare feere tokkiiɓe Sol koosi mo
Acts9:26 Sol lori haa Urusaliima
Acts9:27 Nden Barnabas hoo'i mo
Acts9:28 Nden Sol jooɗodi bee maɓɓe
Acts9:29 O ɗon yeewtida
Acts9:30 Nde deerɗiraaɓe nani ɗum
Acts9:31 Nden jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe gonɗe haa lesɗe Yahudiya e Galiili e Samariya fuu njooɗi jam
Acts9:32 Piyer ɗon yaha koo toy
Acts9:33 Ton o tawi goɗɗo bi'eteeɗo Ayne'as. O jiijiiɗo
Acts9:34 Piyer wi'i mo: “Ayne'as
Acts9:35 Nde yimɓe Lidda e Saroon fuu ngi'i mo
Acts9:36 Nder wuro Joppe woodi debbo nuɗɗinɗo
Acts9:37 Wakkati man o nyawi
Acts9:38 Lidda daayaaki bee Joppe. Nde nuɗɗinɓe haa Joppe nani Piyer ɗon ton
Acts9:39 Piyer dillidi bee maɓɓe. Nde o yotti
Acts9:40 Piyer wurtini ɓe fuu
Acts9:41 Piyer naŋngi mo juŋngo
Acts9:42 Habaru man saŋkiti haa yimɓe Joppe fuu
Acts9:43 Ɓaawo man Piyer faɓɓi haa Joppe haa saare koppoowo lare bi'eteeɗo Simon.
Acts10:1 Woodi goɗɗo haa Kaysariya
Acts10:2 O kulɗo Allah
Acts10:3 Nyannde feere deydey njamndi tati
Acts10:4 O suti malaa'ikaajo man
Acts10:5 Jonta nel nelaaɓe haa Joppe haa ɓe ewnoya Simon coometeeɗo Piyer.
Acts10:6 O ɗon weeri haa Simon
Acts10:7 Nde malaa'ikaajo go dilli
Acts10:8 Korneliyus limtani ɓe haala ka'a fuu
Acts10:9 Jaŋngo man
Acts10:10 O maati dolo
Acts10:11 o yi'i asama maɓɓiti
Acts10:12 Nder maare woodi dabbaaji marɗi kosɗe nayi e ladooji e colli.
Acts10:13 O nani sawtu
Acts10:14 Ammaa Piyer wi'i: “Aa'a
Acts10:15 O nani sawtu go fahin
Acts10:16 Ɗum waɗi nde tati
Acts10:17 Piyer sakli
Acts10:18 Ɓe towni sawtu
Acts10:19 Piyer ɗonno numa dow wahayu go. Ɗon nii Ruuhu Allah wi'i mo: “Ndaa
Acts10:20 Umma
Acts10:21 Nden Piyer jippi
Acts10:22 Ɓe njaabi: “Korneliyus
Acts10:23 Piyer jaɓɓi ɓe
Acts10:24 Ɓe njotti Kaysariya faɓɓijaŋngo. Korneliyus ɗonno reena ɓe
Acts10:25 Nde Piyer yiɗi nastugo saare
Acts10:26 Ammaa Piyer ummini mo
Acts10:27 Piyer yeewtidi bee Korneliyus
Acts10:28 O wi'i ɓe: “Onon boo on anndi fakat
Acts10:29 Ngam maajum
Acts10:30 Korneliyus jaabi: “Waɗi balɗe tati
Acts10:31 O wi'i: Korneliyus
Acts10:32 Nel goɗɗo haa Joppe ngam ewnoygo Simon coometeeɗo Piyer. O ɗon weeri haa saare Simon
Acts10:33 Ngam maajum mi neli goɗɗo haa ma law
Acts10:34 Piyer fuɗɗi wolwugo
Acts10:35 Kulɗo mo
Acts10:36 Allah neldi Isra'iila'en wolde mum
Acts10:37 Onon on anndi ko saali haa Yahudiya fuu
Acts10:38 On anndi habaru Yeesu mo Nasaratu
Acts10:39 Minin min seedooɓe ko o waɗi nder lesdi Yahuudu'en e nder Urusaliima. Ɓe mbari mo bee ɓilugo mo dow leggal.
Acts10:40 Ammaa Allah ummitini mo diga maayde nyalaade tataɓre
Acts10:41 O waŋganaay yimɓe fuu
Acts10:42 O umri min min ngaazina ummaatoore
Acts10:43 Annabi'en fuu ceedi haala ka'a
Acts10:44 Yaake Piyer ɗon wolwa bolle ɗe'e tawon
Acts10:45 Yahuudu'en nuɗɗinɓe warduɓe bee Piyer kayɗini ngam koo yimɓe ummaatooje boo
Acts10:46 Ngam ɓe nani ɓe ɗon mbolwa bee ɗemɗe goɗɗe
Acts10:47 “Yimɓe ɓe'e boo keɓi Ruuhu Ceniiɗo bana no en keɓri ɗum. Moy haɗata ɓe jaɓugo baptisma bee ndiyam?”
Acts10:48 Nden o umri ɓe mbaɗana ɓe baptisma bee innde Yeesu Almasiihu. Ɓe tori mo o faɓɓa bee maɓɓe balɗe seɗɗa.
Acts11:1 Nelaaɓe e nuɗɗinɓe haa lesdi Yahudiya nani yimɓe ummaatooje goɗɗe boo njaɓi wolde Allah.
Acts11:2 Nde Piyer lori Urusaliima
Acts11:3 mbi'i: “A nasti ci'e yimɓe ɓe njuulnaaki e a nyaamdi boo bee maɓɓe!”
Acts11:4 Ammaa Piyer yecci ɓe bee tokkindirki ko laati fuu
Acts11:5 “Mi ɗonno haa Joppe
Acts11:6 Mi suti nde booɗɗum
Acts11:7 Nden nanmi sawtu wi'i yam: Piyer! Umma
Acts11:8 Ammaa mbi'mi: Aa'a
Acts11:9 Fahin sawtu man wi'i: Ko Allah laɓɓini
Acts11:10 Ɗum waɗi nde tati
Acts11:11 Wakkati man nden
Acts11:12 Ruuhu wi'i yam mi yahda bee maɓɓe law
Acts11:13 Korneliyus yecci min no o yi'ri malaa'ikaajo ɗon dari nder saare maako
Acts11:14 O wi'ete bolle ɗe kisnete
Acts11:15 Nde mi fuɗɗi wolwugo
Acts11:16 Nden ciftormi ko Jawmiraawo wi'no yam: Yuhanna waɗi baptisma bee ndiyam
Acts11:17 Nde nii Allah hokki ɓe Ruuhu Ceniiɗo bana o hokkirno en ɗum
Acts11:18 Nde ɓe nani bolle ɗe'e
Acts11:19 Nuɗɗinɓe caŋkitiiɓe daliila fitina ka waɗi yaake mbareeki Etiyen
Acts11:20 Ammaa nuɗɗinɓe woɗɓe iwɓe haa Kiprus e Sirene ndilli Antakiya
Acts11:21 Jawmiraawo wondi bee maɓɓe
Acts11:22 Nde habaru man yotti jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Urusaliima
Acts11:23 Nde o yotti
Acts11:24 ngam Barnabas o goɗɗo booɗɗo
Acts11:25 Nden Barnabas yehi wuro Tarsus tefoygo Sol.
Acts11:26 Nde o tawi mo
Acts11:27 Yaake man annabi'en woɗɓe ummi Urusaliima
Acts11:28 Gooto maɓɓe
Acts11:29 Pukara'en mbaɗi anniya
Acts11:30 Ɓe mbaɗi non. Ɓe neldi Barnabas e Sol bee dokke man
Acts12:1 Yaake man laamiiɗo Hirudus fuɗɗi torrugo yimɓe woɗɓe nder jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe.
Acts12:2 O mbari Yaakuba
Acts12:3 Nde o yi'i ɗum fottani Yahuudu'en
Acts12:4 Nde o naŋngi mo
Acts12:5 Nii non ɓe ayniri Piyer nder fursina
Acts12:6 Hirudus annini hiitaago mo jaŋngo. Jemmaare man Piyer ɗon ɗaani caka sooje'en ɗiɗo. Ɓe kaɓɓi mo bee callalluuji ɗiɗi
Acts12:7 Ndaa
Acts12:8 Nden malaa'ikaajo wi'i: “Taada
Acts12:9 Piyer tokki mo haa ɓe ngurti saare fursina. Ammaa o numaay nii ko malaa'ikaajo ɗonno waɗa ɗon laato bee gooŋga
Acts12:10 Ɓe caali yeɓre sooje'en aynooɓe arannde
Acts12:11 Nde Piyer heɓti hakkiilo muuɗum
Acts12:12 Nde o faami ko waɗi
Acts12:13 Piyer tappi parewal haa yolnde. Derkeejo debbo bi'eteeɗo Rode yehi laarugo ɗum moy.
Acts12:14 Nde o annditi daande Piyer
Acts12:15 Ɓe mbi'i mo: “A ginnaaɗo na?” Ammaa o tokki wi'ugo ɓe: “Gooŋga
Acts12:16 Piyer tokki tappugo parewal. Nde ɓe maɓɓiti
Acts12:17 O ɓaŋgtani ɓe juŋngo ngam haa ɓe njeeɗo
Acts12:18 Nde weeti
Acts12:19 Hirudus ɗaɓɓiti mo
Acts12:20 Hirudus tikkani yimɓe Tirus e yimɓe Sidon masin. Ɓe mooɓti
Acts12:21 Nde nyalaade Hirudus ta'ino waɗi
Acts12:22 Yimɓe kooli
Acts12:23 Ɗon nii malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo fiyi mo ngam o teddinaay Allah. Gilɗi nyaami mo
Acts12:24 Ammaa wolde Allah tokki yahugo yeeso yeeso.
Acts12:25 Nde Barnabas e Sol timmini kuugal maɓɓe haa Urusaliima
Acts13:1 Nder jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe Antakiya woodi annabi'en bee ekkitinooɓe. Ndaa inɗe maɓɓe: Barnabas
Acts13:2 Nyannde feere nde ɓe ɗon cujidana Allah
Acts13:3 Nden ɓe cuumi
Acts13:4 Bana nii Ruuhu Ceniiɗo neliri Barnabas e Sol. Ɓe njehi Selewkiya
Acts13:5 Nde ɓe njotti Salamis
Acts13:6 Ɓe eeri gaɗa duunde
Acts13:7 O soobaajo Sergiyus Pol
Acts13:8 Ammaa Elimas - mo maana innde mum hiilaajo - dartani ɓe. O tefi haɗugo lawan nuɗɗingo.
Acts13:9 Ammaa Sol bi'eteeɗo Pol boo
Acts13:10 wi'i: “Ɓii-Iblisa! A kebbinaaɗo faasikaare e halleende
Acts13:11 Jonta Jawmiraawo fiyete: A wuman
Acts13:12 Nde lawan man laari ko waɗi
Acts13:13 Pol e wondiɗɗiraaɓe mum nasti koommbowal haa Pafos
Acts13:14 Kamɓe boo ɓe ummi Perge
Acts13:15 Ɓaawo jaŋnguki tawreeta Muusa e defte annabi'en
Acts13:16 Nden Pol ummi
Acts13:17 Allah mo yimɓe Isra'iila
Acts13:18 Duuɓi cappanɗe nayi o munyani ɓe nder ladde.
Acts13:19 O halki laamuuji joweeɗiɗi haa lesdi Kanaana
Acts13:20 Ɗum fuu ɗum waɗi baakin duuɓi teemeɗɗe nayi e cappanɗe jowi. Ɓaawoɗon o hokki ɓe alkaali'en haa yotti zamanu annabi Samuyila.
Acts13:21 Nden ɓe tori mo laamiiɗo
Acts13:22 Nde Allah ɓorti Sol laamu
Acts13:23 Haa danygol Daawuda oo
Acts13:24 Diga Yeesu siwaa wargo
Acts13:25 Nde Yuhanna ɓadake timmingo kuugal mum
Acts13:26 Yaa deerɗiraaɓe am
Acts13:27 Ammaa yimɓe Urusaliima bee mawɓe muuɗum'en paamaay kaŋko woni kisnoowo
Acts13:28 Koo nde ɓe tawaay daliila hiitaago mo kiita mbareego
Acts13:29 Nde ɓe timmini waɗugo mo ko defte Allah mbi'no dow maako fuu
Acts13:30 Ammaa Allah ummitini mo diga maayde.
Acts13:31 Balɗe ɗuuɗɗe o waŋgani yahdunooɓe bee maako diga Galiili haa Urusaliima. Jonta kamɓe ngoni seedooɓe maako haa Isra'iila'en.
Acts13:32 Minin min ɗon ngaazina on Linjiila: Ko Allah iinanino kaakiraaɓe meeɗen
Acts13:33 o hebbitinani en ɗum fuu
Acts13:34 Allah ummitini mo diga maayde
Acts13:35 Fahin bana o wi'i nder aayaaje goɗɗe: A accataa Ceniiɗo ma nyola.
Acts13:36 Nde Daawuda huuwi nder zamanu muuɗum bana Jawmiraawo umrino
Acts13:37 Ammaa mo Allah ummitini diga maayde
Acts13:38 Sey anndon deerɗiraaɓe
Acts13:39 kaŋko o adilinan koo moy nuɗɗini mo.
Acts13:40 Kadi
Acts13:41 Ndaare
Acts13:42 Nde Pol bee Barnabas ɗon ngurto suudu dewal Yahuudu'en
Acts13:43 Nde yimɓe caŋkiti
Acts13:44 Nde nyannde siwtorde waɗi fahin
Acts13:45 Nde Yahuudu'en ngi'i yimɓe ɗuuɗi
Acts13:46 Ammaa Pol e Barnabas mbolwi bee dartaare
Acts13:47 Ngam kanjum woni umroore nde Jawmiraawo umri min
Acts13:48 Nde yimɓe ummaatooje nani ɗum
Acts13:49 Wolde Allah saŋkiti koo toy haa lesdi man.
Acts13:50 Ammaa Yahuudu'en ummini ɓerɗe mawɓe wuro e tedda-asli'en
Acts13:51 Ɓe piɗɗi collaaje kosɗe maɓɓe dow yimɓe ɓe'e. Nden ɓe ndilli Ikoniya.
Acts13:52 Ammaa pukara'en keewi seyo e Ruuhu Ceniiɗo.
Acts14:1 Ɓaawo maajum Pol e Barnabas njehi Ikoniya
Acts14:2 Ammaa Yahuudu'en saliiɓe nuɗɗingo
Acts14:3 Nelaaɓe ɓe'e paɓɓi ton. Ɓe mbolwi haala Jawmiraawo bee dartaare. Jawmiraawo boo gooŋgɗini waazu mo'ere muuɗum bee hokkugo ɓe baawɗe waɗugo alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji.
Acts14:4 Yimɓe wuro cenndi geɓe ɗiɗi dow haala ka'a
Acts14:5 Yimɓe ummaatooje goɗɗe bee Yahuudu'en e mawɓe muuɗum'en fuu mbaɗi anniya torrugo nelaaɓe bee fiɗugo ɓe bee kaa'e.
Acts14:6 Nde nelaaɓe nani ɗum
Acts14:7 Ton boo ɓe ngaazi Linjiila.

Acts15:1 Yimɓe woɗɓe ummi Yahudiya njehi Antakiya
Acts15:2 Pol e Barnabas kujjotiri bee maɓɓe masin dow haala ka'a. Ngam maajum ɓe ndawri
Acts15:3 Nden jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe hokki ɓe ko ɓe mari haaje ngam jahaaŋgal nga'al. Nde ɓe ɗon caalo nder Finikiya e Samariya
Acts15:4 Nde ɓe njotti Urusaliima

Acts15:8 Allah

Acts15:10 Ngam man

Acts16:1 Pol yotti Derbe e Listira. Ton woodi pukaraajo bi'eteeɗo Timote. Daada maako
Acts16:2 Deerɗiraaɓe haa Listira bee Ikoniya fuu mani Timote.
Acts16:3 Pol yiɗi Timote yahda bee maako. Nde o hoosi mo
Acts16:4 Haa wuro ɓe ngari fuu
Acts16:5 Jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe cemmbiɗi nder nuɗɗinki
Acts16:6 Ɓe caali lesdi Firigiya e Galaatiya ngam Ruuhu Ceniiɗo haɗi ɓe waazaago haa Asiya.
Acts16:7 Nde ɓe njotti keerol lesdi Misiya

Acts16:9 Bee jemma Pol yi'i wahayu
Acts16:10 Ɓaawo wahayu man
Acts16:11 Min nasti koommbowal haa Torowas
Acts16:12 Min ummi ton
Acts16:13 Nyannde siwtorde min ngurti wuro
Acts16:14 Gooto maɓɓe
Acts16:15 Kaŋko e yimɓe saare maako fuu
Acts16:16 Nyannde feere nde min ɗon ndilla pellel do'a
Acts16:17 O ɗon tokko min
Acts16:18 O waɗi ɗum balɗe ɗuuɗɗe. Ɗum ɓilli Pol
Acts16:19 Nde jaagorɓe korɗo go ngi'i seeɓoore keɓal maɓɓe ɗon majja
Acts16:20 Ɓe njahri ɓe haa mawɓe Roma'en
Acts16:21 Ɓe ɗon anndina al'aadaaji kaɗaaɗi ɗi en mbaawataa jaɓugo e tokkaago
Acts16:22 Mooɓre tuurti dow maɓɓe. Mawɓe Roma'en ɓorti Pol e Silas
Acts16:23 Nde ɓe piyi ɓe piyɗe ɗuuɗɗe
Acts16:24 Nde o nani umroore nde'e
Acts16:25 Caka jemma Pol e Silas ɗon mbaɗa do'a
Acts16:26 Ɗon nii dimmbannde lesdi mawnde waɗi haa caɓɓaaje suudu fursina ndimmbi. Dammuɗe fuu maɓɓiti
Acts16:27 Aynoowo fursina fini. Nde o yi'i dammuɗe ɗon maɓɓiti
Acts16:28 Ammaa Pol towni sawtu
Acts16:29 Aynoowo fursina tefi yiite
Acts16:30 Nden o wurtini ɓe yaasi
Acts16:31 Ɓe mbi'i: “Nuɗɗin Jawmiraawo Yeesu
Acts16:32 Nden ɓe ngaazini mo wolde Jawmiraawo
Acts16:33 Nder saa'iire man aynoowo fursina hoo'i ɓe

Acts16:35 Nde weeti

Acts16:37 Ammaa Pol wi'i doogari'en go: “Ɓe piyi min yeeso yimɓe fuu bilaa hiitaago min. Minin boo min Roma'en! Nden ɓe maɓɓi min haa fursina. Jonta nii ɓe ngiɗi wurtingo min bee sirri? Waɗataako! Sey mawɓe Roma'en bee ko'e maɓɓe ngara
Acts16:38 Doogari'en lornani mawɓe Roma'en ko Pol e Silas mbi'i. Nde ɓe nani Pol e Silas ɓe Roma'en

Acts16:40 Nde Pol e Silas ngurti fursina
Acts17:1 Nde ɓe caali Amfipolis e Apolloniya
Acts17:2 Pol yehi haa suudu man bana ko woowa. Nyalɗe ciwtorɗe tati o ɗon hujjotira bee Yahuudu'en dow Deftere Allah.
Acts17:3 O ɗon faamtina
Acts17:4 Woɗɓe maɓɓe njaɓi bolle ɗe'e
Acts17:5 Ammaa Yahuudu'en kaaji ɓe
Acts17:6 Ammaa nde ɓe tawaay ɓe
Acts17:7 Yason boo weerni ɓe haa saare mum. Ɓe ngewi umrooje laamiiɗo Roma bee wi'go woodi laamiiɗo goɗɗo
Acts17:8 Ɓe cakli ɓerɗe yimɓe e ɓerɗe mawɓe wuro nanɓe haala ka'a.
Acts17:9 Yason e woɗɓe ndokki ceede
Acts17:10 Nde jemma waɗi
Acts17:11 Yimɓe Bereya laataaki bana yimɓe Tessaloniiki. Kamɓe ɓe njaɓi wolde Allah law. Balɗe fuu ɓe ɗon linya defte Allah
Acts17:12 Ɗuuɗɓe maɓɓe nuɗɗini. Rewɓe Yunaniŋke'en tedda-asli'en e Yunaniŋke'en worɓe ɗuuɗɓe nuɗɗini.
Acts17:13 Ammaa nde Yahuudu'en iwɓe Tessaloniiki nani Pol waazi wolde Allah haa Bereya boo
Acts17:14 Law deerɗiraaɓe boo ɗofti Pol haa fomoonde weendu
Acts17:15 Ɗoftuɓe Pol njahdi bee maako haa yotti Ateena
Acts17:16 Yaake Pol ɗonno reena Silas e Timote haa Ateena
Acts17:17 Ngam maajum o hujjotiri bee Yahuudu'en e Yunaniŋke'en hulɓe Allah nder suudu dewal Yahuudu'en. Nyalaade fuu o ɗon hujjotira bee yimɓe ɓe o tawi haa luumo boo.
Acts17:18 Marɓe annde wi'eteeɓe Epikuri'en e Sitoyki'en woɗɓe boo kujjotiri bee maako. Woɗɓe mbi'i: “Ɗume ɗuuɗa-haalaajo oo yiɗi wi'go?” Woɗɓe boo mbi'i: “Teema o ɗon wolwa haala ɗowanteeɓe jananɓe.” Ɓe mbi'i ɗum ngam Pol ɗon waazina Linjiila Yeesu e ummitineeki maayɓe.
Acts17:19 Ngam maajum ɓe naŋngi mo
Acts17:20 A ɗon waŋgina haala kesa ka min meeɗaay nanugo ɗum
Acts17:21 Yimɓe Ateena e jananɓe jooɗiiɓe caka maɓɓe ɗonno cukli limtugo e nanugo haalaaji kesi.
Acts17:22 Pol dari yeeso jama'aare haa Areyopagus
Acts17:23 Ngam nde mi ɗon waanca nder wuro mon
Acts17:24 Allah tagɗo duniyaaru e ko woni nder maaru fuu
Acts17:25 O maraay haaje yimɓe mbaɗana mo koo ɗume
Acts17:26 Diga goɗɗo gooto o tagri asli yimɓe fuu haa ɓe njooɗo haa duniyaaru ndu'u fuu. O darni wakkatiiji e keeri joonde maɓɓe boo.
Acts17:27 O waɗi ɗum haa ɓe ɗaɓɓita mo
Acts17:28 ngam ɗum wi'a: Yeeɗugo meeɗen
Acts17:29 Nde nii en danygol maako
Acts17:30 Ɓooyma Allah munyani yimɓe nde ɓe anndaano haala muuɗum
Acts17:31 Ngam o darni nyannde nde o hiitorto duniyaaru fuu bee adilaaku
Acts17:32 Nde ɓe nani Pol ɗon wolwa haala ummitineeki diga maayde
Acts17:33 Nden Pol wurti caka maɓɓe.
Acts17:34 Worɓe woɗɓe boo nuɗɗini

Acts19:1 Yaake Apollos ɗonno haa Korintu
Acts19:2 o ƴami ɓe: “On keɓi Ruuhu Ceniiɗo nyalde on nuɗɗini na?” Ɓe njaabi: “Min meeɗaay nanugo haala Ruuhu Ceniiɗo.”

Acts19:4 Pol wi'i: “Yuhanna waɗani yimɓe baptisma ngam ɓe ngaylito
Acts19:5 Nde ɓe nani ɗum

Acts19:8 Lebbi tati Pol ɗon tokki yahugo suudu dewal Yahuudu'en
Acts19:9 Ammaa woɗɓe maɓɓe caatini ko'e muuɗum'en
Acts19:10 O waɗi ɗum duuɓi ɗiɗi
Acts19:11 Allah waɗi kaayeefiiji kayɗiniiɗi bee juŋngo Pol.
Acts19:12 Ɓe njahrani nyawɓe leppi e limce meemɗe ɓanndu Pol

Acts19:16 Mo ruuhuwol kalluŋgol ɗon nder muuɗum go hippi ɓe

Acts19:18 Ɗuuɗɓe caka nuɗɗinɓe ngari
Acts19:19 Waɗooɓe hiila ɗuuɗɓe ngaddi defte maɓɓe
Acts19:20 Bana nii wolde Jawmiraawo tokki saŋkitaago
Acts19:21 Ɓaawo haala ka'a
Acts19:22 O neli wallooɓe maako ɗiɗo Timote e Erastus haa Makedoniya
Acts19:23 Yaake man fitina makka ummi haa Efesus dow Laawol Jawmiraawo.
Acts19:24 Demetiriyus
Acts19:25 O ewni ɓe fuu
Acts19:26 Onon bee ko'e mon on ɗon ngi'a
Acts19:27 To ɗum tokki bana nii
Acts19:28 Nde yimɓe nani bolle ɗe'e
Acts19:29 Haala ka'a nastini berniwol nder jiiɓotiral maŋngal. Ɓe naŋngi wondiɗɗiraaɓe Pol ɗiɗo
Acts19:30 Pol boo yiɗino yahugo haa mooɓre man
Acts19:31 Mawɓe lesdi Asiya
Acts19:32 Jiiɓotiral ummi caka mooɓtorde. Koo moy ɗon wooka
Acts19:33 Yahuudu'en njahri Aleksandire yeeso. Woɗɓe maɓɓe maatini mo. Nden o ɓaŋgti juŋngo ngam waŋgingo hujja maako yeeso mooɓre.
Acts19:34 Ammaa nde ɓe annditi o Yahuuduujo
Acts19:35 Bee daker binndoowo mawɗo mo berniwol de'itini mooɓre
Acts19:36 Walaa baawanɗo yeddugo ɗum. Ngam maajum sey on nde'ita
Acts19:37 Yimɓe ɓe on ngaddi haa ɗo ngujjaay kuuje suudu seniindu
Acts19:38 To Demetiriyus e waɗooɓe sanaa'a wonduɓe bee muuɗum ngoodi wullaandu dow goɗɗo
Acts19:39 Ammaa to woodi ko on tefata feere
Acts19:40 ngam ɓe poti aybingo en dow ko waɗi hannde bee wi'go en mbaɗi tuurtol
Acts20:1 Nde fitina man de'iti
Acts20:2 O yiili lesdi man
Acts20:3 o jooɗi ton lebbi tati. Yaake o ɗonno taasko nastugo koommbowal yahugo Siriya
Acts20:4 Sopater ɓii Pirrus mo Bereya
Acts20:5 Ɓe ardi min
Acts20:6 Min nasti koommbowal haa Filippi ɓaawo juulde tamseeje ɗe ufnaaka. Ɓaawo balɗe jowi min njokki ɓe haa Torowas. Min mbaɗi asaweere haa ton.
Acts20:7 Nyannde Alat min kawti ngam nyaamugo kiirtaari Jawmiraawo. Pol ɗon wolwana yimɓe
Acts20:8 Woodino pittirlaaji ɗuuɗɗi haa suudu dowru haa min mooɓti.
Acts20:9 Derkeejo bi'eteeɗo Ewtikus ɗonno jooɗi haa wurdere suudu
Acts20:10 Nde Pol jippi
Acts20:11 Nden o lori haa suudu dowru
Acts20:12 Ɓe kootidi bee derkeejo go
Acts20:13 Min aarti Pol nastugo koommbowal
Acts20:14 Nde o jokki min haa Assos
Acts20:15 Min ummi ton bee koommbowal
Acts20:16 Pol waɗi anniya saalaago Efesus bilaa jippaago
Acts20:17 Diga Miletus Pol neli haa ndotti'en jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe Efesus ngam haa ɓe ngara haa maako.
Acts20:18 Nde ɓe njotti
Acts20:19 Mi huuwani Jawmiraawo bee yaŋkinaare timmunde
Acts20:20 On anndi
Acts20:21 Foroy mi wolwani Yahuudu'en e yimɓe ummaatooje goɗɗe fuu haa ɓe tuuba
Acts20:22 Kadi jonta mi ɗon dilla Urusaliima ngam Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ɗon yerɓammi
Acts20:23 Huunde woore anndumi: Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ɗon hollammi haa gure ɗe mi yaalata fuu callalluuji e boneeji ɗon ndeenammi.
Acts20:24 Ammaa mi laaraay yoŋki am bana huunde marnde saman
Acts20:25 Mi yiili caka mooɗon fuu
Acts20:26 Ngam maajum
Acts20:27 ngam mi waazi on muuyo Allah fuu
Acts20:28 Ayne ko'e mooɗon! Ayne tokkere nde Ruuhu Ceniiɗo halfini on! Bana waynaaɓe
Acts20:29 Ngam mi anndi to mi dilli
Acts20:30 Woɗɓe caka mooɗon boo ummoto
Acts20:31 Ngam maajum ayne! Ciftore no duuɓi tati
Acts20:32 Jonta mi halfini on haa juŋngo Allah e haa habaru mo'ere maako. O waawan mawningo on nder nuɗɗinki e tabitingo ndonŋgu mooɗon
Acts20:33 Mi suunaay cardi malla kaŋŋeeri malla limce goɗɗo.
Acts20:34 Onon bee ko'e mooɗon on anndi juuɗe am ɗe'e kumti haaje am e haaje wondiɗɗiraaɓe am.
Acts20:35 Nder ko mbaɗmi fuu mi holli on sey en kuuwa
Acts20:36 Nde Pol timmini wolwugo
Acts20:37 Ɓe fuu ɓe mboyi
Acts20:38 Ɓe cuni masin sakkomaa nde ɓe nani o wi'i ɓe meetataa yi'ugo mo fahin. Nden ɓe ɗofti mo haa koommbowal.
Acts21:1 Nde min njaɓɓiti ɓe
Acts21:2 Ton min tawi koommbowal yahugo Finikiya. Min nasti
Acts21:3 Min mbakki Kiprus
Acts21:4 Min tawi nuɗɗinɓe ton
Acts21:5 Ammaa nde asaweere man timmi
Acts21:6 Nden min njaɓɓotiri
Acts21:7 Nde min ummi Tirus
Acts21:8 Jaŋngo man min ndilli
Acts21:9 O woodi ɓiɓɓe rewɓe nayo ɓe te'aaka
Acts21:10 Nde min paɓɓi haa ton balɗe seɗɗa
Acts21:11 wari haa amin. O hoo'i taadorgol Pol
Acts21:12 Nde min nani ɗum
Acts21:13 Ammaa Pol jaabi: “Koni on mboyata? On ngiɗi sunugo yam na? Min kam
Acts21:14 Min mbaawaay faasitingo anniya maako. Nden min acci mo
Acts21:15 Ɓaawo man
Acts21:16 Nuɗɗinɓe Kaysariya woɗɓe njahdi bee amin. Ɓe njahri min haa min mbeerata haa saare Manason iwɗo Kiprus
Acts21:17 Nde min njotti Urusaliima
Acts21:18 Jaŋngo man Pol yahdi bee amin haa Yaakuba. Ndotti'en jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe fuu boo ngari ton.
Acts21:19 Pol hoofni ɓe
Acts21:20 Nde ɓe nani ɗum
Acts21:21 Ɓe nani a ɗon ekkitina Yahuudu'en jooɗiiɓe lesɗe ummaatooje goɗɗe fuu ɓe acca tawreeta Muusa
Acts21:22 Noy mbaɗeten? Ngam fakat ɓe nanan a wari.
Acts21:23 Ngam maajum waɗ ko min mbi'ete. Woodi yimɓe nayo haa ɗo
Acts21:24 Yahdu bee maɓɓe
Acts21:25 Ammaa min neldi bataakewol haa yimɓe ummaatooje laatiiɓe nuɗɗinɓe
Acts21:26 Ngam maajum Pol yahdi bee yimɓe nayo go. Jaŋngo man o hawti bee maɓɓe waɗugo al'aada cenki. Nden o nasti haykaliiru
Acts21:27 Nde balɗe joweeɗiɗi ɓadake timmugo
Acts21:28 Ɓe kooli
Acts21:29 Ɓe mbi'i ɗum ngam ɓe ngi'i Torofimus mo Efesus
Acts21:30 Haala ka'a saŋkiti nder berniwol fuu haa yimɓe maagol fuu mooɓti. Ɓe naŋngi Pol
Acts21:31 Mooɓre yiɗi mbarugo Pol
Acts21:32 Law o hoo'i sooje'en bee ardiiɓe dow sooje'en teemerre
Acts21:33 Nden ardiiɗo dow sooje'en ujineere go ɓaditi Pol
Acts21:34 Koo moy ɗon wolwa ko o yiɗi bee sawtu. Daliila haraka
Acts21:35 Nde ɓe njotti haa ba'orɗe
Acts21:36 ngam yimɓe fuu ɗon tokki mo
Acts21:37 Nde sooje'en ɓadi nastingo mo nder saŋngeere muuɗum'en
Acts21:38 Asee! Naa an woni Misraajo tuurtuɗo
Acts21:39 Pol jaabi: “Min mi Yahuuduujo
Acts21:40 O duŋani mo. Nden Pol wa'i ba'orɗe

Acts22:5 Hooreejo liman'en e dawrooɓe Yahuudu'en ngoni seedooɓe yam. Ɓe mbinndani yam bataakeeji ngam haa mi yahra ɗi haa deerɗiraaɓe haa Damas. Mi ɗonno yaha ton haa mi naŋngoya yimɓe

Acts22:12 Ton woodi goɗɗo bi'eteeɗo Ananiyas

Acts23:4 Wonɓe kommbi maako mbi'i mo: “A ɗon huɗa hooreejo liman'en mo Allah darni!”
Acts23:5 Pol jaabi: “Deerɗiraaɓe am

Acts23:15 Jonta

Acts23:17 Nden Pol ewni goɗɗo caka ardiiɓe dow sooje'en teemerre
Acts23:18 O yahri mo haa mawɗo maɓɓe man
Acts23:19 Mawɗo man naŋngi mo juŋngo

Acts23:21 Ammaa taa jaɓan ɓe

Acts23:23 Nden o ewni yimɓe ɗiɗo nder ardiiɓe dow sooje'en teemerre

Acts23:25 Nden o winndi bataakewol ngo'ol:
Acts23:26 “Kalawdiyus Lisiyas haa Felikus
Acts23:27 Gorko oo
Acts23:28 Mi yiɗi anndugo ngam ɗume ɓe ngulli mo

Acts23:33 Ɓe njahri mo Kaysariya

Acts24:1 Ɓaawo balɗe jowi

Acts24:7 ammaa Lisiyas

Acts24:12 Walaa mo meeɗi tawugo yam mi ɗon waɗa ngaaba bee goɗɗo nder haykaliiru malla mi ɗon ummina haala koo nder cuuɗi dewal maɓɓe malla nder berniwol.
Acts24:13 Ɓe mbaawataa gooŋɗingo wullaandu ndu'u caka maɓɓe.
Acts24:14 Ammaa ndaa ko mi waŋginante: Mi ɗon jaggano Allah kaakiraaɓe amin bee tokkaago laawol ngol ɓe ndaari bana biɗu'aaku. Ammaa min boo mi ɗon nuɗɗini ko winnda nder tawreeta Muusa e defte annabi'en fuu.
Acts24:15 Min ɗon bee tammunde no Allah ummitinan adili'en e halluɓe fuu diga maayde bana kamɓe boo ɓe ɗon tammoro ɗum.

Acts25:1 Balɗe tati ɓaawo yottaago Festus haa lesdi man

Acts25:3 to o yerdake
Acts25:4 Festus jaabi: “Ɓe ɗon njogi Pol haa Kaysariya
Acts25:5 Sey mawɓe mooɗon njahda bee am haa Kaysariya
Acts25:6 Festus faɓɓidi bee maɓɓe haa Urusaliima ton balɗe joweetati malla sappo
Acts25:7 Nde Pol yotti
Acts25:8 Ammaa Pol wolwi hujja muuɗum
Acts25:9 Nde Festus yiɗi fottango Yahuudu'en

Acts25:12 Festus dawri bee yimɓe faada maako
Acts25:13 Ɓaawo balɗe seɗɗa

Acts25:16 Ammaa mi yecci ɓe

Acts25:20 Min boo
Acts25:21 Ammaa nde Pol yeli hiiteego haa laamiiɗo Roma
Acts25:22 Agarippa wi'i Festus: “Min boo mi yiɗi nanugo haala gorko man.” Festus jaabi: “A nanan mo jaŋngo.”
Acts25:23 Jaŋngo man yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɗofti Agarippa e Bernike. Ɓe nasti nokkuure kiita bee ardiiɓe dow sooje'en ujineere e mawɓe wuro. Nden Festus umri ɓe ngadda Pol. Ɓe ngaddi mo.
Acts25:24 Festus wi'i: “Laamiiɗo Agarippa e yimɓe tawaaɓe haa ɗo fuu: Ndaa gorko mo Yahuudu'en fuu ngulli yeeso am haa Urusaliima e haa ɗo boo. Ɓe fuu ɓe ɗon ngooka
Acts25:25 Ammaa mi tawaay ko he'i do'ugo mo kiita maayde sam. Nde kaŋko bee hoore maako o yeli hiiteego haa laamiiɗo Roma
Acts25:26 Mi anndaa boo ko mi winndanta laamiiɗo Roma dow haala maako. Ngam maajum mi waddi mo haa mooɗon e ko ɓuri haa maaɗa
Acts25:27 Ngam ɗum haandaay nelugo kaɓɓaaɗo haa kiita bilaa laɓɓingo daliila wullaandu ngonka dow maako.”
Acts26:1 Agarippa wi'i Pol: “Mi duŋanake ma waŋgingo hujja ma jonta.” Pol ɓaŋgti juŋngo mum

Acts26:5 Mi tokki laawol Farisa'en
Acts26:6 Jonta mi ɗon yeeso kiita ngam mi ɗon tammoro iinawol ngol Allah waɗani kaakiraaɓe amin.

Acts27:2 Min nasti koommbowal Adaramittenus
