Acts27:4 Diga ɗon min ummi
Acts27:5 Min ta'i mbeela kommbi Silikiya bee Pamfiliya
Acts27:6 Ton ardiiɗo dow sooje'en go tawi koommbowal iwŋgal Aleksandiriya
Acts27:7 Baakin balɗe ɗuuɗɗe
Acts27:8 Min mbakki fomoonde
Acts27:9 Min paɓɓi ton
Acts27:10 wi'i: “Hey yimɓe
Acts27:11 Ammaa ardiiɗo sooje'en yerdi ko laanyoowo e jawmu koommbowal mbi'i
Acts27:12 Ɗum naawɗum jooɗaago haa jipporde man dabbunde. Ngam maajum ɓurna yimɓe man fuu ngiɗi dillugo. Ɓe ngiɗi yottaago Fenikis haa ɓe caalina dabbunde ton
Acts27:13 Nde henndu fombina fuɗɗi waɗugo
Acts27:14 Nii seɗɗa
Acts27:15 Ndu haɗi koommbowal. Nde ngal waawaay tiitaago ndu
Acts27:16 Nde min caali wakeere duungel bi'eteeŋgel Kawda nde walaa henndu ton
Acts27:17 Ɓe ɓaŋgti koommbowal pamaral go. Nden ɓe kaɓɓi koommbowal maɓɓe bee ɓoggi. Ɓe kuli ɗaggugo haa Sirtis. Ngam maajum ɓe njippini leggal maŋngal darnanŋgal koommbowal
Acts27:18 Nde henndu man ɗon tokki waɗugo bee semmbe
Acts27:19 Faɓɓijaŋngo man ɓe ngudini ɓoggi e ko wonno nder koommbowal bee juuɗe maɓɓe.
Acts27:20 Balɗe ɗuuɗɗe min ngi'aay koode e naaŋge
Acts27:21 Faɓɓi wonɓe nder koommbowal man nyaamaay koo ɗume. Nden Pol dari caka maɓɓe
Acts27:22 Ammaa jonta mi ɗon toro on
Acts27:23 Ngam haŋki malaa'ikaajo Allah mo mi jagganto waŋgani yam
Acts27:24 wi'i: Pol
Acts27:25 Ngam maajum taa kultore
Acts27:26 Ammaa henndu yahran en haa duunde feere
Acts27:27 Nder jemmaare sappo e nayaɓre
Acts27:28 Nden ɓe njippini ɓoggol bee njamndi kaɓɓaandi haa maagol
Acts27:29 Ɓe kuli taa henndu yahra koommbowal haa tapaaje
Acts27:30 Laanyooɓe ngiɗno wurtaago koommbowal
Acts27:31 Ammaa Pol wi'i sooje'en e ardiiɗo maɓɓe: “To laanyooɓe njooɗaaki haa koommbowal
Acts27:32 Nden sooje'en ta'i ɓoggi naŋnguɗi koommbowal pamaral
Acts27:33 Nde ɓadi weetugo
Acts27:34 Ngam maajum mi tori on on nyaama to on ngiɗi hisugo. Ammaa koo gaasaawol hoore mon gootol majjataa.”
Acts27:35 Nde o wi'i ɗum
Acts27:36 Nden hakkiilooji maɓɓe nde'iti
Acts27:37 Limgal yimɓe haa koommbowal waɗi teemeɗɗe ɗiɗo e cappanɗe njoweeɗiɗo e njoweego (276).
Acts27:38 Nde ɓe kaari
Acts27:39 Nde weeti
Acts27:40 Ngam maajum ɓe ta'i ɓoggi jamɗe tiggirɗe
Acts27:41 Ammaa koommbowal tawi pellel haa ndiyam luggaay
Acts27:42 Sooje'en nufi mbarugo naŋngaaɓe
Acts27:43 Ammaa ardiiɗo sooje'en
Acts27:44 Luttuɓe boo naŋnga kaataakooje malla leɗɗe koommbowal gewɗe. Bana nii ɓe fuu ɓe njottori lesdi jam.
Acts28:1 Nde min njotti duunde jam
Acts28:2 Wonɓe haa ton kolli min mbooɗeeŋga pantuŋga. Ɓe njaɓɓi min
Acts28:3 Pol ɓofti leɗɗe
Acts28:4 Nde yimɓe duunde man ngi'i mboodi ɗon ɓili haa juŋngo maako
Acts28:5 Ammaa Pol fiɗɗi mboodi
Acts28:6 Ɓe tammi juŋngo maako ɓuutan malla o maayan law. Ammaa nde haa neeɓi ɓe ngi'i walaa ko waɗi mo sam
Acts28:7 Pubiliyus
Acts28:8 Baaba Pubiliyus ɗon waali nyawɗo yontere e eemoral. Pol yehi haa maako

Acts28:10 Ɓe teddini min bee kuuje ɗuuɗɗe. Saa'i min ɗon ndilla boo
Acts28:11 Ɓaawo lebbi tati min ndilli bee koommbowal iwŋgal Aleksandiriya
Acts28:12 Min njotti wuro Sirakus
Acts28:13 Min ummi ton
Acts28:14 Min tawi nuɗɗinɓe ton. Ɓe tori min min paɓɓa haa maɓɓe asaweere. Bana nii min njottori Roma.

Acts28:16 Nde min njotti Roma

Acts28:18 Nde ɓe linyi haala man
Acts28:19 Ammaa nde Yahuudu'en njaɓaay mi yoofe

Acts28:25 Nden ɓe ɗon ngaabotira

Romans1:10 Koo ndey mi toroto mo fuu
Romans1:11 Mi yenwi on masin

Romans1:17 Bee Linjiila ka'a

Romans1:19 Ko goɗɗo waawi anndugo dow Allah
Romans1:20 Ngam koo nde neɗɗo waawataa yi'ugo Allah

Romans1:26 Ngam maajum Allah yoofi ɓe haa suunooji cemtiniiɗi. Rewɓe maɓɓe cannji baaldal fodde ɗabiya
Romans1:27 Bana non worɓe boo acci waaldugo bee rewɓe
Romans1:28 Nde ɓe cali anndititgo Allah

Romans2:1 Ngam maajum
Romans2:2 En anndi Allah ɗon hiito waɗanɓe kuuɗe man kiita ngooŋɗuka.
Romans2:3 Kadi
Romans2:4 Malla a ɗon yawo jeynitaaje mbooɗeeŋga maako ɗuuɗŋga e munyal maako? A anndaa no mbooɗeeŋga Allah ɗon ɗowe haa tuubu na?
Romans2:5 Ammaa hoore ma saati
Romans2:6 O warjoto koo moy deydey kuuɗe mum.
Romans2:7 Tiiɗɓe waɗgo ko fotti
Romans2:8 Ammaa tuurtuɓe dow maako
Romans2:9 Ɓillaare e bone ukkanto waɗanɓe halleende
Romans2:10 Ammaa koo moy waɗi ko fotti
Romans2:11 Ngam Allah senndindirtaa yimɓe.

Romans2:13 Goɗɗo laatataako adiliijo yeeso Allah bee nanugo tawreeta tan
Romans2:14 Yimɓe ummaatooje ngalaa tawreeta. Ammaa to ɓe mbaɗi bee muuyo maɓɓe ko tawreeta umrata
Romans2:15 Umrooje tawreeta mbinndaama nder ɓerɗe maɓɓe
Romans2:16 Nyalaade nde Allah hiitoto numooji yimɓe cuuɗiiɗi bee Yeesu Almasiihu fodde Linjiila ka ngaazanmi
Romans2:17 Kadi noy an Yahuuduujo jonta? A ɗon seyoro ewneego Yahuuduujo
Romans2:18 A anndi muuyo Allah
Romans2:19 A numi fakat a waawan ɗowugo wumɓe e yaynango wonɓe nder nyiɓre
Romans2:20 e eltugo faataaɓe e jaŋngingo derke'en e a heɓi anndal e gooŋga fuu bee tawreeta boo.
Romans2:21 A ɗon jaŋngina woɗɓe
Romans2:22 A ɗon wi'a: “Taa waɗ njeenu”
Romans2:23 A ɗon juro ngam Allah hokki ma tawreeta
Romans2:24 Bana ko winnda: “Ngam daliila mooɗon

Romans2:26 Kadi to goɗɗo mo juulnaaki ɗowtanake umrooje tawreeta
Romans2:27 Ngam maajum goɗɗo mo juulnaaki
Romans2:28 Naa ko gite ngi'ata wartirta goɗɗo Yahuuduujo gooŋgaajo. Juulnol gooŋgawol boo naa ɗum juulnol fodde ɓanndu malla ko gite ngi'ata.
Romans2:29 Ammaa juulnol ngol yi'ataake

Romans4:6 Non boo

Romans4:9 Seyo maajum laatanto juulnotooɓe tan na? Aa'a

Romans4:19 Saa'i maajum duuɓi Ibrahiima ndillani teemerre. O anndi o waawataa danyugo ɓikkoy. Debbo maako Saraatu boo naywi masin
Romans4:20 Bee non fuu

Romans8:1 Ngam maajum walaa kiita dow nuɗɗinɓe Yeesu Almasiihu jonta.
Romans8:2 Ngam baawɗe Ruuhu ndokki yam ngeendam nder kawtal bee Yeesu Almasiihu. Ruuhu man rimɗini yam diga baawɗe hakke e maayde.
Romans8:3 Allah bee hoore mum huuwi ko tawreeta waawaay huuwugo ngam en tampuɓe. O neli Ɓiɗɗo maako marɗo ɓanndu bana ndu neɗɗo
Romans8:4 ngam haa en mbaawa huuwugo kuuɗe adiliije fodde tawreeta
Romans8:5 To goɗɗo ɗon tokko suunooji mum
Romans8:6 Tokkaago suunooji mum yahran haa maayde
Romans8:7 Tokkiiɗo suunooji mum o konneejo Allah
Romans8:8 Geeɗanɗo nder suunooji mum waawataa fottango Allah.
Romans8:9 Ammaa onon kam
Romans8:10 Ammaa to Almasiihu ɗon nder mooɗon
Romans8:11 To Ruuhu maako ɗon jooɗi nder mooɗon
Romans8:12 Ngam maajum deerɗiraaɓe am
Romans8:13 Ngam to on tokkake suunooji mon
Romans8:14 ngam ɗowaaɓe Ruuhu Allah fuu ngoni ɓiɓɓe Allah.
Romans8:15 Ngam Ruuhu Ceniiɗo mo on keɓi nastinaay on nder maccuŋgaaku haa on kula fahin. Aa'a! Ruuhu man laatini en ɓiɓɓe Allah
Romans8:16 Ruuhu Allah bee hoore mum ɗon seedano ruuhuuji men: En ɓiɓɓe Allah fakat.
Romans8:17 To nii en ɓiɓɓe maako
Romans8:18 Mi numi haala torraaji men nder zamanuuru jontaaru. Fakat
Romans8:19 Tagefo fuu ɗon yenwa masin haa Allah waŋgina ɓiɓɓe mum bee tedduŋgal.
Romans8:20 Ngam tagefo fuu nastinaama les baawɗe majjere
Romans8:21 rimɗugo e njeyaaŋgu halkere
Romans8:22 En anndi haa jonta duniyaaru fuu ɗon uuma
Romans8:23 Naa duniyaaru tan
Romans8:24 Kisndam men ɗon tabiti dow tammunde nde'e. Ammaa to en ɗon ngi'a ko tammotooɗen heɓugo

Romans9:7 Naa iwɓe haa Ibrahiima fuu laati ɓiɓɓe Ibrahiima bee gooŋga. Allah wi'i Ibrahiima: “Nder Isiyaaku danygol ma ewna.”

Romans16:1 Mi ɗon nelda on Febe mo ngerdiimi. O deerɗiraawo men debbo

Romans16:3 Koofne Piriska e Akilas
Romans16:4 foondiraaɓe maayugo ngam hisnugo yoŋki am. Naa min feere am yettata ɓe
Romans16:5 Koofne nuɗɗinɓe mooɓtotooɓe haa saare maɓɓe boo. Koofne Epaynetus giɗaaɗo am
Romans16:6 Koofne Mariyama mo huuwani on bee tiinaare ɗuuɗnde.
Romans16:7 Koofne boo Andronikus e Yuniyas
Romans16:8 Koofne Ampiliyatus giɗaaɗo am nder Jawmiraawo.
Romans16:9 Koofne Urbanus
Romans16:10 Koofne Apelles baŋginɗo nuɗɗinki laaɓki nder Almasiihu. Koofne yimɓe saare Aristobul.
Romans16:11 Koofne Herodiyon mo lenyol am. Non boo yimɓe Jawmiraawo nder saare Narsis.
Romans16:12 Koofne Tirifena e Tirifosa
Romans16:13 Koofne Rufus cuɓaaɗo Jawmiraawo. Non boo daada maako laatiiɗo bana daada am boo.

Romans16:24 Mo'ere Jawmiraawo men Yeesu Almasiihu wonda bee mooɗon fuu. Aamiina!]
Romans16:25 Tedduŋgal laatano Allah! Kaŋko o woodi baawɗe semmbiɗingo on fodde Linjiila ka ngaazinanmi. Linjiila ɗon anndina haala Yeesu Almasiihu
Romans16:26 ammaa jonta ka waŋginaama. Defte annabi'en boo ɗon ceedo ka. Fodde umroore Allah duumiiɗo ka anndinaama yimɓe nder ummaatooje fuu
Romans16:27 Allah feere muuɗum mari hikma. Tedduŋgal laatano mo bee Yeesu Almasiihu haa foroy! Aamiina!
1Corinthians1:1 Min Pol mo Allah ewni fodde muuyo mum ngam laataago nelaaɗo Almasiihu Yeesu
1Corinthians1:2 mi ɗon winndana on
1Corinthians1:3 Allah Baabiraawo meeɗen e Yeesu Almasiihu Jawmiraawo meeɗen ndokka on mo'ere e salaaman.
1Corinthians1:4 Mi ɗon yetta Allah am foroy ngam daliila mo'ere nde o hokki on barka Almasiihu Yeesu.
1Corinthians1:5 Nder kawtal bee Almasiihu
1Corinthians1:6 Bana nii Allah gooŋɗini ko min ceedani Yeesu Almasiihu caka mooɗon.
1Corinthians1:7 Nden kam walaa dokkal Allah koo gootal ŋakkani on
1Corinthians1:8 Kaŋko o tabitinan on haa yotto timmoode
1Corinthians1:9 Allah o koolniiɗo
1Corinthians1:10 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians1:11 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians1:12 Ndaa ko ngiɗmi wi'go: Caka mooɗon koo moy ɗon wi'a: “Min mo Pol.” Oya ɗon wi'a: “Min mo Apollos.” Goɗɗo ɗon wi'a: “Min mo Piyer.” Goɗɗo feere boo ɗon wi'a: “Min mo Almasiihu.”
1Corinthians1:13 Kadi Almasiihu o cenndaaɗo na? Ɗum Pol ɓe ngaafi dow leggal gaafaaŋgal ngam mooɗon na? Malla bee innde Pol keɓɗon baptisma?
1Corinthians1:14 Mi ɗon yetta Allah ngam mi yiiwaay koo gooto mooɗon baptisma
1Corinthians1:15 Bana non kadi walaa bi'anɗo on keɓi baptisma bee innde am.
1Corinthians1:16 Asee! Mi waɗani boo yimɓe saare Estefanas baptisma. Mi anndaa to woodi goɗɗo feere mo mi waɗani ɗum baptisma.
1Corinthians1:17 Ngam Almasiihu nelaay yam waɗugo baptisma
1Corinthians1:18 Halkanɓe ɗon ndaara kubar maayde Almasiihu dow leggal gaafaaŋgal bana faataare. Ammaa ngam meeɗen enen hisanɓe kam
1Corinthians1:19 Ngam man Deftere wi'i: “Mi halkan hikma hikma'en
1Corinthians1:20 Kadi moy woni hikmaajo? Moy woni moodibbo? Moy woni kujjotiroowo zamanuuru ndu'u? Allah wartiraay hikma duniyaaru ndu'u faataare na?
1Corinthians1:21 Ngam nde nii duniyaaru bee hikma mum anndaa Allah ngam ndu annditaay hikma maako
1Corinthians1:22 Yahuudu'en ɗon ɗaɓɓa kaayeefiiji
1Corinthians1:23 Ammaa enen en ɗon ngeyna kubar Almasiihu ɓilaaɗo haa leggal gaafaaŋgal. Haa Yahuudu'en ɗum laatake daliila fergere maɓɓe
1Corinthians1:24 Ammaa ngam ewnaaɓe Allah kam
1Corinthians1:25 Ko Allah huuwata
1Corinthians1:26 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians1:27 Ammaa ko laati humakiijum nder duniyaaru
1Corinthians1:28 O suɓi leesɓe e yawniiɓe e meere'en nder duniyaaru
1Corinthians1:29 Bana nii walaa koo moye mantoto yeeso Allah.
1Corinthians1:30 Daliila maako
1Corinthians1:31 Allah muuyi ɗum laato bana ko winnda: “To goɗɗo yiɗi mantaago
1Corinthians2:1 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians2:2 Mi tefaay anndugo koo ɗume caka mooɗon
1Corinthians2:3 Mi wari haa mooɗon nder tampere
1Corinthians2:4 Wolde am e waazu am laataaki bee baawal bolle fodde hikma yimɓe
1Corinthians2:5 ngam taa nuɗɗinki mooɗon daro dow hikma yimɓe
1Corinthians2:6 Bee non fuu min ɗon ngaazina hikma haa nuɗɗinɓe timmuɓe. Hikma ka'a laataaki ka zamanuuru ndu'u malla ka mawɓe zamanuuru ndu'u
1Corinthians2:7 Min ɗon ngaazina hikma Allah sirriiha
1Corinthians2:8 Walaa koo gooto nder mawɓe duniyaaru ndu'u annduno ngal. To naa non
1Corinthians2:9 Ammaa bana ko winnda: “Ko goɗɗo meeɗaay yi'ugo malla nanugo
1Corinthians2:10 Haa meeɗen kam
1Corinthians2:11 Moy anndi ko woni nder goɗɗo? Sey ruuhu goɗɗo man. Bana non boo walaa annduɗo numooji Allah
1Corinthians2:12 Ngam enen kam
1Corinthians2:13 Min mbolwiraay haala man bee bolle iwɗe haa hikma yimɓe
1Corinthians2:14 Koo moy tokki hakkiilo mum jaɓataa ko iwi haa Ruuhu Allah
1Corinthians2:15 Keɓɗo Ruuhu Allah ɗon faama koo ɗume fuu
1Corinthians2:16 Ngam deftere ɗon wi'a: “Moy anndi numo Jawmiraawo? Moy waawata hokkugo mo sawari?” Ammaa enen en ngoodi numo Almasiihu.
1Corinthians3:1 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians3:2 Ngam ɗum kosam ndokkumi on
1Corinthians3:3 ngam on ɗon tokko ɗabiya yimɓe duniyaaru. Ngam to on ɗon kaajindira
1Corinthians3:4 To goɗɗo wi'i: “Min mo Pol”
1Corinthians3:5 Kadi moy woni Apollos? Moy woni Pol? Minin min huuwanooɓe Allah
1Corinthians3:6 Min mi jubi
1Corinthians3:7 Bana non kadi
1Corinthians3:8 Mo jubi bee mo yarni poti kal-kal. Ammaa koo moy heɓan mbarjaari mum fodde kuugal mum.
1Corinthians3:9 Minin min huuwdiɗɗiraaɓe nder kuugal Allah
1Corinthians3:10 Fodde mo'ere nde Allah mo'ani yam
1Corinthians3:11 Yeesu Almasiihu woni caɓɓawal. Walaa ballinanɗo goɗŋgal.
1Corinthians3:12 To goɗɗo mahi dow maagal bee kaŋŋeeri malla cardi malla kaa'e marɗe saman
1Corinthians3:13 kuugal koo moy fuu waŋgoyan. Nyalaade kiita waŋginan ɗum. Ɗum waŋgoyan nder yiite e yiite waŋginan no kuugal koo moy wa'i.
1Corinthians3:14 To yiite nyaamaay ko goɗɗo mahi
1Corinthians3:15 To yiite nyaami ko goɗɗo mahi
1Corinthians3:16 On anndaa onon ngoni haykaliiru Allah e Ruuhu Allah ɗon jooɗi nder mooɗon na?
1Corinthians3:17 To goɗɗo wili haykaliiru Allah
1Corinthians3:18 Taa goɗɗo esta hoore muuɗum. To goɗɗo mooɗon numi o hikmaajo fodde no zamanuuru ndu'u wa'i
1Corinthians3:19 Ngam hikma duniyaaru ndu'u
1Corinthians3:20 Nde wi'i fahin boo: “Jawmiraawo anndi numooji hikma'en
1Corinthians3:21 Ngam man taa goɗɗo tabitina teddinki mum dow manoore yimɓe. Ngam koo ɗume fuu onon mari.
1Corinthians3:22 Koo Pol
1Corinthians3:23 Ammaa onon kam
1Corinthians4:1 Non kadi anndite minin ngoni huuwanooɓe Almasiihu
1Corinthians4:2 Ko ɓe ƴamata haa kaliifa'en kam
1Corinthians4:3 Ngam am kam
1Corinthians4:4 Ɓernde am felaay yam dow koo ɗume
1Corinthians4:5 Ngam maajum taa kiite koo ɗume diga saa'i man siwaa. Munye haa Jawmiraawo wara
1Corinthians4:6 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians4:7 Moy ɓurnu ma dow woɗɓe? Naa Allah hokki ma ko marɗa fuu na? To ɗum dokkal keɓɗa kam
1Corinthians4:8 Asee! Jonta on keɓi ko ngiɗɗon fuu! On ndiski timmi! On ngarti laamiiɓe
1Corinthians4:9 Ammaa mi tammi minin nelaaɓe
1Corinthians4:10 Ngam daliila Almasiihu
1Corinthians4:11 Haa wargo saa'iire nde'e min ɗon maata dolo
1Corinthians4:12 min ɗon coma ngam min ɗon kuuwa bee juuɗe amin. To ɓe kuɗi min
1Corinthians4:13 To ɓe nyo'i min
1Corinthians4:14 Mi winndani on ɗum naa ngam haa mi semtina on
1Corinthians4:15 Ngam koo to on ngoodi eltooɓe ujine sappo nder Almasiihu
1Corinthians4:16 Ngam man mi ɗon toro on: Tokke misaalu am.
1Corinthians4:17 Ngam daliila ka'a mi neli Timote
1Corinthians4:18 Woɗɓe mooɗon mawniti ngam ɓe tammi mi lorataako haa mooɗon.
1Corinthians4:19 Ammaa to Jawmiraawo munyi
1Corinthians4:20 Ngam laamu Allah daraaki dow bolle
1Corinthians4:21 Ɗume ngiɗɗon? Mi warda bee ɓoccol haa mooɗon na malla bee yiide e ɓernde ɗelemnde?
1Corinthians5:1 Ɗum ɗon nane koo toy woodi haala daakaareeku caka mooɗon. Irin daakaareeku maajum tawataake koo haa heefeerɓe maa. Ngam gooto mooɗon ɗon wonda bee debbo baaba muuɗum.
1Corinthians5:2 Bee man fuu on ɗon mawnito! Haani no on cuno
1Corinthians5:3 Ngam am kam
1Corinthians5:4 Ngam to on ɗon mooɓi nder innde Jawmiraawo meeɗen Yeesu
1Corinthians5:5 ndokke goɗɗo oo haa juŋngo Sayɗaanu! Ngam haa ɓanndu maako halka
1Corinthians5:6 Juro mooɗon yahaay sam! On anndaa ufnirɗum seɗɗa ufnan kullu fuu na?
1Corinthians5:7 Laɓɓine ko'e mooɗon diga ufnirɗum kiiɗɗum ɗu'um
1Corinthians5:8 Non kadi ngaɗen juulde
1Corinthians5:9 Mi binndanɗo on nder bataakewol am aartuŋgol taa on kawta bee daakaare'en.
1Corinthians5:10 Mi wolwaay dow daakaare'en caka yimɓe duniyaaru ndu'u malla suunaaɓe malla wuyɓe malla rewooɓe labbi. To non ɗum laatino kam
1Corinthians5:11 Ndaa ko mi winndani on jonta: Taa kawte bee goɗɗo bi'anɗo o Masiihiŋkeejo
1Corinthians5:12 Ko yaali yam bee hiitaago yimɓe yaasi? Naa on yowanaaɓe hiitaago wonɓe nder mooɓtorde mooɗon?
1Corinthians5:13 Allah bee hoore mum hiitoto yimɓe yaasi. Ammaa bana ko winnda: “Ngurtine kalluɗo caka mooɗon.”
1Corinthians6:1 To goɗɗo mooɗon woodi wullaandu dow deerɗiraawo feere
1Corinthians6:2 On anndaa senaaɓe kiitoto duniyaaru na? To onon kiitoto duniyaaru kam
1Corinthians6:3 On anndaa enen kiitoto malaa'ika'en na? To non kam
1Corinthians6:4 To on ngoodi luural dow kuuje duniyaaru
1Corinthians6:5 Mi ɗon wi'a ɗum haa cemton. Kadi
1Corinthians6:6 Koni deerɗiraawo yahrata wullaandu dow deerɗum yeeso hiitooɓe
1Corinthians6:7 On ɗon ngullotira
1Corinthians6:8 Ammaa ɗum onon ngaɗata sooynde-adilaaku man
1Corinthians6:9 On anndaa sooya-adilaaku'en kam ndonataa laamu Allah na? Taa este ko'e mooɗon! Daakaare'en e rewooɓe labbi e jeenooɓe e luuɗu'en
1Corinthians6:10 non boo wuyɓe e suunaaɓe riba e wuykooɓe e waɗooɓe tufle e jaɓtooɓe
1Corinthians6:11 Bana non woɗɓe mooɗon laatino naane. Ammaa jonta hakkeeji mooɗon lootaama
1Corinthians6:12 Teema goɗɗo wi'an: “Koo ɗume fuu daganake yam.” Ooho
1Corinthians6:13 Woɗɓe ɗon mbi'a: “Nyaamdu ɗon ngam reedu
1Corinthians6:14 Allah mo ummitini Jawmiraawo meeɗen diga maayde
1Corinthians6:15 On anndaa ɓalli mooɗon ngoni terɗe haa ɓanndu Almasiihu na? Kadi mi hoo'a terɗe Almasiihu ngam waɗugo ɗe terɗe daakaareejo na? Waɗataako sam!
1Corinthians6:16 On anndaa ɗakkotirɗo bee daakaareejo laatake ɓanndu wooru bee maako na? Deftere wi'i: “Ɗiɗo ɓe'e laatoto ɓanndu wooru.”
1Corinthians6:17 Ammaa ɗakkotirɗo bee Jawmiraawo
1Corinthians6:18 Ndaaye haala daakaareeku. Hakkewol goɗŋgol koo ngole ko neɗɗo waɗata
1Corinthians6:19 Malla on anndaa ɓanndu koo moy mooɗon woni haykaliiru Ruuhu Ceniiɗo
1Corinthians6:20 On coottaama bee saman. Ngam maajum teddine Allah bee ɓalli mooɗon.
1Corinthians7:1 Jonta kam haa mi jaabo ƴamɗe ɗe mbinnduɗon nder bataakewol mooɗon. Ɗum booɗɗum to gorko ɓaŋgaay sam.
1Corinthians7:2 Ammaa ngam taa on laato daakaare'en
1Corinthians7:3 Gorko waɗana debbo muuɗum ko haani waɗeego
1Corinthians7:4 Debbo maraay baawɗe dow ɓanndu mum
1Corinthians7:5 Taa calotire baaldal
1Corinthians7:6 Ko mbi'mi ɗo laataaki bana umroore
1Corinthians7:7 Min kam mi ɓuri yiɗugo yimɓe fuu ngona bana am. Ammaa Allah hokki koo moy dokkal mum
1Corinthians7:8 Mi ɗon wi'a ɓen ɓaŋgaay e rewɓe yurumɓe: Ɗum pottoɗum ɓe njooɗo bana am.
1Corinthians7:9 Ammaa to ɓe mbaawataa naŋgtaago
1Corinthians7:10 Ngam ɓaŋgɓe e ɓaŋgaaɓe
1Corinthians7:11 To o senndiri bee goriiko
1Corinthians7:12 Haa woɗɓe boo
1Corinthians7:13 Nonnon boo deerɗiraawo debbo mo gorum nuɗɗinaay. To gorko oo yerdi jooɗodaago bee maako
1Corinthians7:14 Ngam gorko mo nuɗɗinaay heɓi yerduye Allah daliila debbo mum Masiihiŋkeejo. Non boo debbo mo nuɗɗinaay heɓi yerduye Allah daliila gorum Masiihiŋkeejo. To naa non
1Corinthians7:15 Ammaa to mo nuɗɗinaay yiɗi senndirgo bee nuɗɗinɗo
1Corinthians7:16 An debbo
1Corinthians7:17 Sey koo moy tokko jooɗaago bana no Allah heerorani mo. O jooɗo bana no o wa'no yaake Allah ewni mo. Kanjum umranmi nder jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe fuu.
1Corinthians7:18 To goɗɗo laatakeno juulniiɗo saa'i Allah ewni mo
1Corinthians7:19 Ngam juulnol e sooynde juulnol fuu nafataa koo ɗume
1Corinthians7:20 Sey koo moy jooɗo bana o wa'no yaake Allah ewno mo.
1Corinthians7:21 To a maccuɗono yaake Allah ewno ma
1Corinthians7:22 Laatinooɗo maccuɗo mo Jawmiraawo ewni ɗum
1Corinthians7:23 Jawmiraawo sootti on bee saman. Ngam maajum taa ngartire ko'e mooɗon maccuɓe yimɓe.
1Corinthians7:24 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians7:25 Ngam ɓen ɓaŋgaakaa
1Corinthians7:26 Ngam daliila ɓillaaje jontaaje ɗe'e
1Corinthians7:27 To a woodi debbo
1Corinthians7:28 To nii a ɓaŋgi
1Corinthians7:29 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians7:30 Woyanɓe laato bana ɓe ngonaayno nder mettamɓeram. Seyotooɓe laato bana ɓe ngonaayno nder seyo. Soodanɓe kuuje boo ndaara bana walaa ko ɓe marno.
1Corinthians7:31 Naftortooɓe duniyaaru boo
1Corinthians7:32 Mi yiɗi on laato rimɓe e saklere fuu. Mo ɓaŋgaay ɗon suklano kuugal Jawmiraawo
1Corinthians7:33 Ammaa ɓaŋɗo ɗon suklano kuuje duniyaaru
1Corinthians7:34 Bana nii ɓernde maako senndake ɗiɗi. Non boo debbo mo walaa gorko e paanyo. Ɓe ɗon cuklano kuugal Jawmiraawo
1Corinthians7:35 Mi ɗon wi'a ɗum ngam wallugo on. Mi doolaay on
1Corinthians7:36 Teema goɗɗo narran bee muuyaaɗo mum taa ɓe ɓaŋgra. Ammaa to muuyaaɗo oo heewti e to suuno boo ɓuri gorko oo
1Corinthians7:37 Ammaa mo waɗi anniya nder ɓernde mum
1Corinthians7:38 Ɓaŋɗo muuyaaɗo mum waɗi booɗɗum
1Corinthians7:39 Debbo ɓaŋaaɗo laati kaɓɓaaɗo haa gorum yaake gorko man ɗon bee yoŋki. To gorko maayi
1Corinthians7:40 Mi ɗon numa o ɓuran seyaago masin to o jooɗake bilaa gorko. Anndite
1Corinthians8:1 Dow ko laarani kusel dabbaaji kirsanaaɗi labbi
1Corinthians8:2 To goɗɗo tammake o mari anndal
1Corinthians8:3 Ammaa mo yiɗi Allah
1Corinthians8:4 Goɗɗo nyaaman kusel ndabbaawa kirsanaaŋga labbi na? En anndi lawru naa ɗum huunde gooŋga nder duniyaaru ndu'u e walaa ɗowanteeɗo feere boo
1Corinthians8:5 Fakat woodi ko yimɓe mbi'ata ɗowanteeɓe haa asama e dow lesdi. Ngam maɓɓe kam
1Corinthians8:6 Bee non fuu
1Corinthians8:7 Ammaa naa yimɓe fuu mari anndal nga'al. Woɗɓe nde mboowino bee haala labbi go
1Corinthians8:8 Fakat
1Corinthians8:9 Ammaa kakkile
1Corinthians8:10 To goɗɗo tampuɗo nder numo ɓernde mum yi'i an annduɗo gooŋga
1Corinthians8:11 Bana non anndal maaɗa laatoto daliila do'ere deerɗiraawo maaɗa mo Almasiihu maayi ngam muuɗum.
1Corinthians8:12 To on mbaɗi hakke bana non
1Corinthians8:13 Ngam maajum
1Corinthians9:1 Mi laataaki dimo na? Mi laataaki nelaaɗo na? Mi yi'aay Yeesu
1Corinthians9:2 Koo to woɗɓe njaɓaay yam bana nelaaɗo
1Corinthians9:3 Ndaa ko njaabotoomi yiɗɓe hiitaago yam:
1Corinthians9:4 Min nduŋanaaka jaɓugo nyaamdu e njaram ngam kuugal amin na?
1Corinthians9:5 To min ngoodino minin boo rewɓe Masiihiŋke'en
1Corinthians9:6 Malla sey min e Barnabas tan kuuwata ngam wuurnugo ko'e amin na?
1Corinthians9:7 Soojeejo moye nyaamnata hoore mum? Moy juboto inabooje
1Corinthians9:8 Ko mbi'mi ɗo laataaki ɗabiya yimɓe tan
1Corinthians9:9 Ndaa ko winnda nder tawreeta Muusa: “Taa mbaɗane ngaari corɓoori sabakaare.” Kadi
1Corinthians9:10 O wi'aay ɗum ngam amin na? Fakat ɗum winndaama ngam amin. Sey demoowo rema bee tammoraago geɗal muuɗum
1Corinthians9:11 Min aawi barkaaji Ruuhu nder mooɗon. Ɗum huunde mawnde to min codi geɗal seɗɗa haa nder kuuje mooɗon ɗe duniyaaru na?
1Corinthians9:12 To woɗɓe mari duŋayeere jaɓugo geɗal nga'al haa mooɗon
1Corinthians9:13 On anndi booɗɗum no huuwooɓe nder haykaliiru ɗon keɓa nguure muuɗum'en nder haykaliiru
1Corinthians9:14 Bana non boo Jawmiraawo umri haa waazooɓe Linjiila nguurda bee kuugal waazu maɓɓe.
1Corinthians9:15 Ammaa min mi meeɗaay naftoraago ɗum fuu. Mi winndaay ɗum boo ngam haa mi heɓa ɗum jonta. Ndikkanammi maayugo! Walaa mo ittata daliila ka jurortoomi.
1Corinthians9:16 Mi mantortaako waazu Linjiila. Doole mi waazina ka. Bone laatano yam to mi waazinaay Linjiila.
1Corinthians9:17 To min suɓanino hoore am kuugal nga'al
1Corinthians9:18 Kadi
1Corinthians9:19 Mi dimo
1Corinthians9:20 To mi ɗon caka Yahuudu'en
1Corinthians9:21 Bana non boo to mi ɗon wondi bee yimɓe ɓe anndaa tawreeta
1Corinthians9:22 To mi ɗon wondi bee tampuɓe nder nuɗɗinki
1Corinthians9:23 Ɗum fuu mi ɗon waɗa ɗum ngam Linjiila
1Corinthians9:24 On anndi haa daldal ɗuuɗɓe ndoggan nder daɗa-daɗa
1Corinthians9:25 Giɗɗo daɗugo fuu eltan hoore mum bee caatal. O ɗon waɗa ɗum ngam haa o heɓa meetaleewol haakooji ɗaylanɗi. Ammaa enen en ɗon ngaɗa ɗum haa keɓen meetaleewol ngol jinnataa.
1Corinthians9:26 Ngam maajum mi ɗon dogga
1Corinthians9:27 Mi ɗon elta ɓanndu am bee caatal haa ndu ɗowtano yam. Ngam taa min gaazinɗo woɗɓe mi wurtine bana mo he'aay.
1Corinthians10:1 Deerɗiraaɓe am
1Corinthians10:2 Nder kawtal maɓɓe bee Muusa
1Corinthians10:3 Ɓe fuu ɓe nyaami nyaamdu wooru iwndu haa Allah.
1Corinthians10:4 Ɓe fuu ɓe njari njaram ngootam iwɗam haa Allah. Ɓe njari haa tapaare iwnde haa Allah
1Corinthians10:5 Bee non fuu
1Corinthians10:6 Kuuje ɗe'e ɗon kolla en misaalu
1Corinthians10:7 Taa ndewe labbi bana woɗɓe maɓɓe. Deftere wi'i: “Yimɓe njooɗi ngam nyaamugo e yarugo. Nden ɓe ummi haa ɓe pija.”
1Corinthians10:8 Taa mbaɗen daakaareeku bana woɗɓe maɓɓe mbaɗno
1Corinthians10:9 Taa poonden Almasiihu bana woɗɓe maɓɓe
1Corinthians10:10 Taa ngurŋgurte bana woɗɓe maɓɓe
1Corinthians10:11 Masiibooji ɗi'i fuu ngarani ɓe ngam faamtingo woɗɓe. Ɗi mbinndaama ngam reentingo en enen yeeɗanɓe haa timmoode zamanuuji.
1Corinthians10:12 Ngam maajum
1Corinthians10:13 Jarribooje keɓɗe on fuu
1Corinthians10:14 Ngam maajum
1Corinthians10:15 Mi ɗon wolwana on bana marɓe hakkiilo
1Corinthians10:16 Ciftore jardugel kiirtaari ngel ngetteten Allah ngam muuɗum. Naa ngel ɗon hawta en bee ƴiiƴam Almasiihu yaake njareten na? Ciftore tamseere nde cenndeten boo. Naa nde ɗon hawta en bee ɓanndu Almasiihu yaake nyaameten na?
1Corinthians10:17 Woodi tamseere woore tan. Ngam maajum
1Corinthians10:18 Ndaare Isra'iila'en: Nyaamanɓe kusel dabbaaji kirsaaɗi dow hirsirde ngoodi kawtal bee Allah.
1Corinthians10:19 Mi yiɗi wi'go kusel ndabbaawa kirsanaaŋga lawru woodi saman na? Malla lawru woodi saman? Naa non sam!
1Corinthians10:20 Ammaa mi yiɗi wi'go ko rewooɓe labbi kirsata
1Corinthians10:21 On mbaawataa yarugo nder jardugel Jawmiraawo e nder jardugel ginnaaji boo. On mbaawataa nyaamugo haa kiirtaari Jawmiraawo

1Corinthians10:25 Ko soorrete haa luumo fuu

1Corinthians10:29 Mi wi'aay dow numooji ɓerɗe mooɗon

2Corinthians2:2 Ngam to mi mettini on ɓerɗe
2Corinthians2:3 Kanjum mi winndani on ɗum. To mi wari haa mooɗon
2Corinthians2:4 Nder cakle ɗuuɗɗe e metteeŋga
2Corinthians2:5 To goɗɗo nder mooɗon laatake daliila metteeŋga
2Corinthians2:6 Ɓurna mooɗon peli goɗɗo oo
2Corinthians2:7 Ngam man sey on njaafo mo
2Corinthians2:8 Nden kam mi ɗon toro on: Kolle mo on ngiɗi mo.
2Corinthians2:9 Mi winndani on ngam haa mi foonda on
2Corinthians2:10 To on njaafanake goɗɗo
2Corinthians2:11 Bana non Sayɗaanu jaalataako en. Ngam en anndi dabareeji maako bee laaɓɗum.
2Corinthians2:12 Nde mi yotti Torowas haa mi waazina Linjiila Almasiihu
2Corinthians2:13 Ammaa mi walaano de'ere
2Corinthians2:14 Yettoore laatano Allah
2Corinthians2:15 Min laatake bana uurdi marndi uureeŋgol belŋgol
2Corinthians2:16 Haa majjanɓe
2Corinthians2:17 Minin min laataaki bana ɗuuɗɓe waazotooɓe wolde Allah ngam heɓugo riba. Min ɗon mbolwa gooŋga yeeso Allah
2Corinthians3:1 Asee! Min ɗon puɗɗita manugo ko'e amin na? Malla min ngoodi haaje bana yimɓe woɗɓe haa min njahrana on bataakeeji anndinanɗi min na malla min njaɓa irin maaji haa mooɗon na?
2Corinthians3:2 Onon ngoni bataakewol amin
2Corinthians3:3 Fakat
2Corinthians3:4 Min mbi'i non ngam min ɗon kooli Allah daliila Almasiihu.
2Corinthians3:5 Minin bee ko'e amin min ke'aay huuwgo kuugal nga'al bee semmbe amin. Baawal amin iwi haa Allah.
2Corinthians3:6 Kaŋko waawni min laataago jagganiiɓe alkawal kesal
2Corinthians3:7 Umrooje man mbinndaama bee karfeeje dow alluhaaje kaa'e. Saa'i man tedduŋgal Allah waŋgi. Yeeso Muusa yayni daliila maagal
2Corinthians3:8 nden kam tedduŋgal kuugal Ruuhu jahranŋgal haa ngeendam ɓurata mawnugo piw na?
2Corinthians3:9 Kuugal gaddananŋgal yimɓe do'eeki kiita mari tedduŋgal
2Corinthians3:10 Fakat

2Corinthians3:14 Ammaa hakkiilooji maɓɓe mbaawataa faamugo
2Corinthians3:15 Koo jonta boo

2Corinthians4:2 Min cali kuuɗe cuuɗiiɗe

2Corinthians5:1 Min anndi
2Corinthians5:2 Jonta min ɗon uuma
2Corinthians5:3 To en ɓornake ɓalli kesi ɗi'i
2Corinthians5:4 Yaake en ɗon ngeeɗa nder ɓalli lesdiiji ɗi'i
2Corinthians5:5 Ɗum Allah bee hoore muuɗum tabitini en ngam ngeendam ɗa'am. O hokki en Ruuhu maako bana jeŋngina hayruuji ɗi o resani en.
2Corinthians5:6 Ngam maajum min ɗon tiɗɗina ɓerɗe amin foroy. Min anndi
2Corinthians5:7 yahdu amin ɗon tabiti dow nuɗɗinki
2Corinthians5:8 min keewi tiinaare. Min ɓuri yiɗugo accugo ɓalli ɗi'i ngam jooɗodaago bee Jawmiraawo.
2Corinthians5:9 Ammaa ko min ɓuri yiɗugo kam
2Corinthians5:10 Ngam fakat en fuu en ndaroyan yeeso leeso kiita Almasiihu. Nden koo moy meeɗen heɓan mbarjaari deydey kuuɗe mum: Koo booɗɗe koo kalluɗe ɗe o huuwi wakkati o ɗon nder ɓanndu ndu'u.
2Corinthians5:11 Min anndi ɗume woni kulol Allah. Ngam maajum min ɗon ngaso yimɓe. Allah anndi min laaɓɗum tal. Mi ɗon tammo boo on anndi min nder numooji ɓerɗe mooɗon.
2Corinthians5:12 Min ngiɗaa min anndina ko'e amin fahin haa mooɗon. Ammaa min ngiɗi on keɓa daliila seyoraago min
2Corinthians5:13 To on ndaari min saa'i feere bana min ellitiiɓe
2Corinthians5:14 Ngam yiide Almasiihu ɗon laamano en. Ngam en anndi fakat to gooto maayi mbattudi yimɓe fuu
2Corinthians5:15 O maayi ngam yimɓe fuu

2Corinthians5:17 Ngam maajum to goɗɗo hawti bee Almasiihu
2Corinthians5:18 Ɗum fuu
2Corinthians5:19 Ɗum Allah bee hoore muuɗum sulhindiri yimɓe nder duniyaaru bee maako daliila Almasiihu bilaa limango ɓe aybeeji maɓɓe. O halfinani min yeeynugo kubar sulhu man!
2Corinthians5:20 Ngam maajum min wakiili'en Almasiihu. Allah bee hoore mum ɗon wolwana on bee kunnduɗe amin. Ngam daliila Almasiihu min ɗon toro on: Culhotire bee Allah.
2Corinthians5:21 Almasiihu waɗaay hakke sam. Ammaa Allah yowi hakkeeji meeɗen fuu dow maako

2Corinthians8:4 Ɓe tori min ɗuuɗɗum haa ɓe keɓa duŋayeere hawtango woɗɓe nder walliinde ngam senaaɓe.

2Corinthians8:6 Ngam maajum min tiɗɗini Titus haa o suklano kuugal caahiiŋgal nga'al caka mooɗon
2Corinthians8:7 On cooyaay koo ɗume. On ngoodi nuɗɗinki e baawal wolde e anndal e tiinaare e yiide heedi amin. Min ngiɗi on mbaŋgina caahaaki mooɗon nder kuugal nga'al boo.
2Corinthians8:8 Mi wi'aay doole on mbaɗa non. Ammaa bee kubar tiinaare woɗɓe ngiɗmi foondirgo laaɓeeŋga yiide mooɗon.
2Corinthians8:9 On anndi no mo'ere Jawmiraawo meeɗen Yeesu Almasiihu wa'i. Koo nde o diskuɗo
2Corinthians8:10 Mi wi'i on ko mi numata. Mi tammi ɗum nafan on to on tokkitini tiinaare mooɗon. Onon aarti waɗugo anniya ka'a diga rowani
2Corinthians8:11 Jonta kam
2Corinthians8:12 To on mari anniya mbooɗka ngam hokkugo
2Corinthians8:13 Naa ngam haa on talkiɗa nden woɗɓe poofta. Ammaa mi yiɗi fotnugo on bee maɓɓe.
2Corinthians8:14 Jonta on ɗon nder jeynitaare

2Corinthians8:17 Titus jaɓi tornde amin. Naa kanjum tan
2Corinthians8:18 Min neli mo bee deerɗiraawo mo jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe fuu manata waazu Linjiila mum.
2Corinthians8:19 Jama'aaje haa ɗo cuɓi mo ngam haa o ɗofta min saa'i min njahrata dokkal go haa Urusaliima. Min ɗon mbaɗa ɗum ngam tedduŋgal Jawmiraawo bee hoore mum. Bana non boo min ɗon mbaŋgina anniya amin mbooɗka.
2Corinthians8:20 Min ɗon kakkila no min njogorto dokkal maŋngal nga'al
2Corinthians8:21 Min ngiɗi waɗugo ko fotti

2Corinthians8:23 Titus kam

2Corinthians9:2 Mi anndi anniya mooɗon mbooɗka. Mi mantori on haa Makedoniya'en boo. Mi wi'i: “Deerɗiraaɓe nder Akaya ɗon taaski diga rowani ngam hokkugo.” Tiinaare mooɗon findini ɗuuɗɓe maɓɓe.
2Corinthians9:3 Jonta nelanmi deerɗiraaɓe go ngam taa manoore nde min maniri on laato meere. Mi yiɗi taaskooɗon fakat bana mbi'mi.
2Corinthians9:4 Ngam to Makedoniya'en ngardi bee am

2Corinthians11:2 Mi yiɗi on bee yiide haajunde
2Corinthians11:3 Ammaa ciftore no mboodi estiri Hawwa bee ƴoyre mum. Nden mi ɗon hula ngam taa hakkiilooji mooɗon mbonno bana non
2Corinthians11:4 Ngam to goɗɗo wari waazini on Yeesu feere mo min ngaazinaay malla haa njaɓon ruuhu ngu laataaki Ruuhu Ceniiɗo mo on njaɓi malla kubaruwol ngol laataaki Linjiila ka on njaɓi
2Corinthians11:5 Mi anndi mi famɗanaay nelaaɓe wi'eteeɓe mawɓe ɓe'e.
2Corinthians11:6 Teema mi laataaki wela-ɗemŋgaljo
2Corinthians11:7 Nde ngaazumi on Linjiila Allah
2Corinthians11:8 Mi ɓilli jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe goɗɗe bee jaɓugo ngeenaari haa maaje ngam haa mi huuwana on.
2Corinthians11:9 Yaake mi ɗonno wondi bee mooɗon
2Corinthians11:10 Bee gooŋga Almasiihu ngonka nder ɓernde am mbi'anmi on: Walaa koo gooto nder lesɗe Akaya haɗatammi juro am ngo'o.
2Corinthians11:11 Ngam ɗume mbi'mi ɗum? Ngam mi yiɗaa on na? Aa'a
2Corinthians11:12 Mi tokkoto huuwugo bana no kuuwranmi jonta. Kanjum ngam taa mawnitittooɓe ɓe'e
2Corinthians11:13 Kamɓe ɓe laataaki nelaaɓe bee gooŋga
2Corinthians11:14 Walaa kaayeefiijum haa ton! Ngam Sayɗaanu boo ɗon waɗa hoore mum bana o malaa'ikaajo annoora.
2Corinthians11:15 Ngam maajum saɗanaaki jagganiiɓe Sayɗaanu haa mbaɗa ko'e muuɗum'en bana ɓe huuwanooɓe adilaaku. Ammaa timmoode maɓɓe laatanto ɓe fodde kuuɗe maɓɓe.
2Corinthians11:16 Sey mi wi'ta ɗum fahin: Taa goɗɗo laarammi bana mi paataaɗo. Malla njaɓeeɗam bana mi paataaɗo ngam haa min boo mi heɓa mi juro seɗɗa.
2Corinthians11:17 Ko mbolwanmi jonta
2Corinthians11:18 Ngam ɗuuɗɓe ɗon njuro fodde ɗabiya yimɓe duniyaaru. Ngam maajum min boo mi fuɗɗan juraago.
2Corinthians11:19 Fakat onon laatiiɓe hakkilɓe
2Corinthians11:20 On ɗon munyana koo ɓeye wartiranɓe on maccuɓe
2Corinthians11:21 Mi ɗon semta wi'go ɗum: Nder kuuɗe bana ɗe'e
2Corinthians11:22 Ɓe Ibraniŋke'en na? Min boo mi Ibraniŋkeejo. Ɓe Isra'iila'en na? Min boo mi Isra'iilaajo. Ɓe danygol Ibrahiima na? Min boo mi danygol Ibrahiima.
2Corinthians11:23 Ɓe huuwanooɓe Almasiihu na? Sey mi wolwa bana mi ginnaaɗo: Mi ɓuri ɓe. Mi ɓuri ɓe huuwugo piw: Mi ɓuri ɓe nastineego nder cuuɗi fursina. Mi ɓuri ɓe ɓocceego. Mi ɓuri ɓe nastugo joote maayde.
2Corinthians11:24 Nde jowi Yahuudu'en ɓocci yam ɓocci cappanɗe tati e joweenayi.
2Corinthians11:25 Nde tati Roma'en paɗɗi yam bee cabbi. Nde woore yimɓe piɗi yam bee kaa'e. Nde tati koommbowal yooli bee am
2Corinthians11:26 Nder jahaale am ɗuuɗɗe bee kosɗe
2Corinthians11:27 Mi maati comri e torra. Ndego mi heɓataa ɗaanaago
2Corinthians11:28 Taa mi limta luttuɗum fuu. Ammaa woodi ko ɓuri ɓillugo yam nyalɗe fuu: Ɗum suklanaago jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe fuu.

2Corinthians11:30 To haani mi juro
2Corinthians11:31 Allah

2Corinthians12:1 Haani mi juro na? Ɗum nafataa boo. Ammaa mi wolwan haala wahayuuji e kaayeefiiji ɗi Jawmiraawo yi'ni yam.
2Corinthians12:2 Mi anndi Masiihiŋkeejo goɗɗo
2Corinthians12:3 Mi anndi goɗɗo oo – o ɗonno nder ɓanndu na malla yaasi ɓanndu? Mi anndaa. Sey Allah tan anndi.
2Corinthians12:4 O eeŋginaama haa aljanna. Ton o nani bolle sirriije ɗe neɗɗo fotaay wolwugo.
2Corinthians12:5 Mi jurorto goɗɗo oo. Ammaa min bee hoore am
2Corinthians12:6 Koo to mi yiɗi juraago
2Corinthians12:7 Ngam taa mi mawnito daliila wahayuuji kaayeefiiji ɗi ngi'mi
2Corinthians12:8 Nde tati toriimi Jawmiraawo haa o ittanammi ɗum.
2Corinthians12:9 Ammaa o jaabi yam: “Mo'ere am he'i ma. Ngam baawɗe am ɓuran huuwugo nder maaɗa yaake a tampuɗo.” Ngam maajum mi jurorto tampe am bee seyo
2Corinthians12:10 Ngam maajum mi ɗon seyoro tampe am
2Corinthians12:11 On ndooli yam
2Corinthians12:12 Alaamaaji ɗi kollata mi laati nelaaɗo mbaŋgi caka mooɗon: Mi holli on munyal timmuŋgal
2Corinthians12:13 Woodi ko mi waɗani jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe goɗɗe
2Corinthians12:14 Ndaa

2Corinthians13:1 Mi ɗon yaha haa mooɗon nde tataɓre. Deftere wi'i: “Sey wullaandu fuu daro dow seedamku seedooɓe ɗiɗo malla tato.”
2Corinthians13:2 Mi ɗon reentina waɗɓe hakke caka mooɗon e woɗɓe fuu
2Corinthians13:3 ngam on ngiɗi tabitingo to Almasiihu ɗon wolwa bee hunnduko am malla naa non. O laataaki tampuɗo heedi mooɗon
2Corinthians13:4 Fakat saa'i o ɓila haa leggal gaafaaŋgal
2Corinthians13:5 Linye ko'e mooɗon kadi. Annde to on ɗon tabiti nder nuɗɗinki. Sey on keɓta ɗum bee ko'e mooɗon. On anndi fakat Yeesu Almasiihu ɗon wondi bee mooɗon na? To naa non
2Corinthians13:6 Ammaa mi ɗon tammo on annditan no minin min ndo'aaki.
2Corinthians13:7 Min ɗon toro Allah ngam taa on mbaɗa halleende koo ndeyeere. Min ɗaɓɓataa tabitingo gooŋga amin
2Corinthians13:8 Ngam min mbaawataa honugo gooŋga
2Corinthians13:9 Min ɗon ceyo to minin min laatake tampuɓe
2Corinthians13:10 Nde mi daayiiɗo tawon
2Corinthians13:11 Deerɗiraaɓe
2Corinthians13:12 Koofnindire
2Corinthians13:13 Mo'ere Jawmiraawo meeɗen Yeesu Almasiihu e yiide Allah e kawtal Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ngondu bee mooɗon fuu!

Galatians3:17 Ndaa ko ngiɗmi wi'go: Alkawal ngal Allah waɗani Ibrahiima ɗon tabiti diga ɓooyma. Tawreeta waŋgi duuɓi teemeɗɗe nayi e cappanɗe tati (430) ɓaawo maajum. Ka waawataa wilugo iinawol ngo'ol.

Ephesians1:5 Diga ɓooyma o aarti o suɓi en haa en laato ɓiɓɓe maako daliila Almasiihu. O muuyi ɗum ngam ɗum fottani mo.
Ephesians1:6 Maŋgtoore laatano tedduŋgal maako ngam daliila mo'ere nde o mo'ani en bee Ɓiɗɗo maako giɗaaɗo.
Ephesians1:7 Ngam daliila ƴiiƴam Almasiihu ndufaaɗam keɓɗen coottaari e yaafuye hakkeeji men fodde mo'ere Allah ɗuuɗnde.
Ephesians1:8 Allah ɗuuɗɗinani en nde
Ephesians1:9 O anndini en sirri muuyo maako
Ephesians1:10 haa o hiɓɓina ɗum nder saa'iire fottannde
Ephesians1:11 Barka Almasiihu enen boo en keɓi geɗal kisndam meeɗen. Allah
Ephesians1:12 O waɗi ɗum ngam haa min maŋgta tedduŋgal maako
Ephesians1:13 Non boo on nani wolde gooŋga
Ephesians1:14 Ruuhu man woni jeŋngina ndonŋgu meeɗen
Ephesians1:15 Ngam maajum

Ephesians1:17 mi ɗon toro Allah
Ephesians1:18 Allah yaynana hakkilooji mon bee jayŋgol mum
Ephesians1:19 On paama boo baawɗe maako ɓurɗe mawnugo ɗe o huuwrata heedi meeɗen
Ephesians1:20 Baawɗe ɗe'e
Ephesians1:21 Haa ton Almasiihu ɗon laamo dow mawɓe asama e marɓe laamu e marɓe baawɗe e jawmiraaɓe e inɗe tedduɗe ewneteeɗe koo ɗeye
Ephesians1:22 Allah wallini koo ɗume les kosɗe maako

Ephesians2:1 Naane kam on maayɓeno ngam daliila aybeeji e hakkeeji mon.
Ephesians2:2 On ngeeɗino nder maaji fodde jahargal duniyaaru ndu'u e fodde ardiiɗo laamu ngonŋgu nder hawa. Koo jonta boo o ɗon huuwa nder tuurtuɓe dow umrooje Allah.
Ephesians2:3 En fuu en laatino bana maɓɓe
Ephesians2:4 Ammaa Allah o ɗuuɗa-hinnuyeejo. Daliila yiide maako mawnde nde o yiɗiri en
Ephesians2:5 koo nde en maayɓeno daliila aybeeji meeɗen
Ephesians2:6 Allah ummitini en hawtaade bee Almasiihu
Ephesians2:7 ngam hollango zamanuuji garanɗi mo'ere maako ɗuuɗnde
Ephesians2:8 Ngam bee mo'ere maako keɓruɗon kisndam ngam on nuɗɗini. Ɗum iwaay haa mooɗon
Ephesians2:9 Ɗum iwaay boo haa kuuɗe mon
Ephesians2:10 Ngam Allah bee hoore mum tagi en. O tagi en nder Yeesu Almasiihu haa en kuuwa kuuɗe booɗɗe. Kanje boo
Ephesians2:11 Ciftore ɗu'um: Naane on yimɓe ummaatooje goɗɗeno fodde ɗabiya neɗɗo. Yahuudu'en
Ephesians2:12 Saa'i man on ngonaayno nder Almasiihu
Ephesians2:13 ammaa jonta nder kawtal bee Yeesu Almasiihu
Ephesians2:14 Ngam kaŋko woni salaaman meeɗen
Ephesians2:15 O wili tawreeta bee umrooje mum e farillaaji mum
Ephesians2:16 o sulhindira asliiji ɗiɗi ɗi'i bee Allah
Ephesians2:17 O wari waazingo kubaruwol belŋgol
Ephesians2:18 Ngam daliila maako en fuu en keɓi laawol yottaago Baabiraawo nder Ruuhu gooto.
Ephesians2:19 Ngam maajum jonta kam
Ephesians2:20 On njo'inaama dow caɓɓaaje nelaaɓe e annabi'en. Yeesu Almasiihu bee hoore mum woni hayre talkumoore.
Ephesians2:21 Nder maako geɓe nyiɓaalo man fuu ɗon pottotira
Ephesians2:22 Nder kawtal bee maako onon boo on ɗon mahe hawtaade bee maɓɓe ngam haa nyiɓaalo ngo'o laato jooɗorde nde Ruuhu Allah jooɗoto haa muuɗum.

Ephesians3:6 Ndaa sirri oo: Daliila Linjiila

Ephesians3:17 haa Almasiihu jooɗo nder ɓerɗe mon daliila nuɗɗinki mon
Ephesians3:18 ngam haa on keɓa faamugo
Ephesians3:19 haa anndon yiide Almasiihu boo
Ephesians3:20 Allah waawan waɗugo ko ɓuri do'aaje men e numooji men piw fodde semmbe huuwaande nder meeɗen.

Ephesians4:10 Jippiiɗo oo

Ephesians4:22 O ekkitini on ngam haa on ceeda bee neɗɗo mon ɓooymaajo e bee gikku mum ɓooymaawu
Ephesians4:23 non boo on acca Ruuhu Allah hesɗitina hakkiilooji mon
Ephesians4:24 on ɓorno neɗɗo keso mo Allah tagi nder adilaaku e senaare gooŋga muuɗum.

Ephesians4:32 Mboonindire
Ephesians5:1 Ngam maajum mbaɗe ko Allah waɗata nde nii on ɓiɓɓe maako yiɗaaɓe.

Ephesians5:4 Non boo bolle cemtiniiɗe e meereeje e tunwuɗe. Ndikka on mbolwa bolle gettooje.
Ephesians5:5 On anndi
Ephesians5:6 Taa acce goɗɗo esta on bee haalaaji meereeji. Ngam daliila kuuje ɗe'e tikkere Allah ɗon ukkano tuurtanɓe dow maako.

Ephesians5:8 Ɓooyma on ɗonno nder nyiɓre

Philippians1:1 Min Pol e Timote
Philippians1:2 Allah
Philippians1:3 Koo ndeye mi siftori on

Philippians1:6 Mi anndi fakat
Philippians1:7 Ɗum pottuɗum mi ɗon numana on bana nii
Philippians1:8 Allah woni ceedoowo yam

Philippians1:10 nden kam on paaman ko ɓuri fottugo
Philippians1:11 on heewɓe nafuuda kuuɗe adiliije barka Almasiihu ngam teddinki Allah e maŋgtoore mum.
Philippians1:12 Onon deerɗiraaɓe

Philippians1:14 Kaɓɓorli am cemmbiɗini ɓerɗe deerɗiraaɓe ɗuuɗɓe nder kawtal muuɗum'en bee Jawmiraawo

Philippians1:19 ngam mi anndi timmoode ɓillaaje man ɗum kisndam am
Philippians1:20 Ndaa ko ngenwanmi e ko tammiimi: Walaa ko semtintammi

Philippians1:29 Allah mo'ani on ngam daliila Almasiihu
Philippians1:30 On ɗon kawti bee am nder haɓre woore. Naane on ngi'no haɓre am nde'e. On nani koo jonta boo mi ɗon nder maare.
Philippians2:1 Almasiihu semmbiɗini on na? Yiide maako suusɗini on na? Ruuhu maako hawti on na? On ɗon ngiɗindira na? On ɗon enɗindira na?
Philippians2:2 To nonnon
Philippians2:3 Taa ngaɗe koo ɗume bee numooji kaajuɗi malla ngam mantoraago ko'e mon. Ammaa nder yaŋkinaare
Philippians2:4 Taa goɗɗo hakkilana ko nafata hoore mum
Philippians2:5 Numo mooɗon laato bana ngo Yeesu Almasiihu:
Philippians2:6 Kaŋko o Allah
Philippians2:7 o acci ko o marno fuu
Philippians2:8 O leestini hoore maako
Philippians2:9 Ngam man Allah ɓaŋgti mo dow koo ɗume
Philippians2:10 Nden kam bee innde Yeesu koo moy nder asama e dow lesdi e les lesdi koofo yeeso maako
Philippians2:11 e koo moy seeda: “Yeesu Almasiihu woni Jawmiraawo” ngam tedduŋgal Allah Baabiraawo.
Philippians2:12 Yiɗaaɓe am
Philippians2:13 ngam Allah bee hoore mum ɗon huuwa nder muuyo mon e nder kuuɗe mon fodde anniya mum mbooɗka.
Philippians2:14 Nder kuuɗe mon fuu taa ngurŋgurte
Philippians2:15 ngam haa on laato laaɓɓe ɓe ngalaa aybe
Philippians2:16 Anndine ɓe wolde ngeendam
Philippians2:17 Koo to ƴiiƴam am laatoto bana dokkal dufeteeŋgal dow kirsaaɗum e dewal mon nder nuɗɗinki mon
Philippians2:18 Bana non ceyore ɗum onon boo
Philippians2:19 To Jawmiraawo Yeesu muuyi
Philippians2:20 Mi walaa goɗɗo bana maako mo hakkiilo mum yahdi bee ngo am
Philippians2:21 Luttuɓe fuu ɗon cuklani ko nafata ko'e muuɗum'en
Philippians2:22 Onon on anndi no hoolaare maako waŋgiri. Bana ɓiɗɗo kommbi baaba mum
Philippians2:23 Ngam man
Philippians2:24 Mi ɗon hooli Jawmiraawo boo
Philippians2:25 Mi laari ɗum kaanduɗum mi lornana on deerɗiraawo am Epafrodit
Philippians2:26 Ammaa o ɗon yenwa on masin
Philippians2:27 Fakat o nyawino haa o ɓadake maayugo. Ammaa Allah enɗi mo

Philippians2:29 Njaɓɓe mo bee seyo maŋngo nder Jawmiraawo kadi. Teddine irin yimɓe ɓe'e

Colossians3:25 Baɗɗo halleende heɓan ngeenaari halleende muuɗum boo

Colossians4:2 Tiine waɗugo do'a
Colossians4:3 Toraneeɗam min boo
Colossians4:4 Tore Allah o wallammi waazugo bee laaɓɗum
Colossians4:5 Ngeeɗe nder hikma caka yimɓe ɓe nuɗɗinaay. Naftore wakkati.
Colossians4:6 Sey bolle mon laato belɗe
Colossians4:7 Tikikus yeccan on kubar am fuu. O kuuwdiɗɗiraawo am nder Jawmiraawo
Colossians4:8 Mi ɗon nela mo haa mooɗon bee anniya ngam haa o anndina on joonde amin
Colossians4:9 O yahdan bee Onesimus
Colossians4:10 Aristarkus
Colossians4:11 Yeesu coometeeɗo Yustus hoofni on. Nder Yahuudu'en
Colossians4:12 Epafras hoofni on. Kaŋko boo mo mooɗon
Colossians4:13 Min bee hoore am mi ɗon seedo o ɗon torro ngam mon e ngam yimɓe Lawdikiya e yimɓe Hiyerapolis boo.
Colossians4:14 Luka
Colossians4:15 Koofne deerɗiraaɓe wonɓe haa Lawdikiya. Koofne Nimfa e jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe mooɓtotooɓe haa saare maako.
Colossians4:16 To on timmini jaŋngugo bataakewol ngo'ol
Colossians4:17 Ngecce Arkippus o tiino huuwugo kuugal Jawmiraawo ngal o halfina haa o hiɓɓina ngal booɗɗum.
Colossians4:18 Koofŋgol ngo'ol min Pol winndi ngol bee juŋngo am. Taa ngejjite mi kaɓɓaaɗo bee callallu! Mo'ere Allah wonda bee mooɗon.

1Timothy1:2 mi ɗon winndane Timote
1Timothy1:3 Saa'i mi ɗonno dilla Makedoniya
1Timothy1:4 Sey ɓe acca suklanaago kiccaaji e defte asli ɗe timmataa sam. Ngam ɗum umminan gaabotiral meere
1Timothy1:5 Tiitorde umroore nde'e
1Timothy1:6 Woɗɓe celi laawol darnuŋgol ngo'ol

1Timothy1:9 en anndi umrooje tawreeta mbaɗaaka ngam adili'en

1Timothy5:2 rewɓe nayeeɓe bana daadiraaɓe

1Timothy5:16 To debbo nuɗɗinɗo woodi rewɓe yurumɓe

1Timothy6:1 Laatiiɗo jeyaaɗo goɗɗo fuu
1Timothy6:2 Jeyaaɗo goɗɗo Masiihiŋkeejo boo
1Timothy6:3 To goɗɗo waddi ekkitinol goɗŋgol
1Timothy6:4 nden kam o mawnitiiɗo mo anndaa koo ɗume. O ginnaaɗo
1Timothy6:5 e haɓre nde walaa keerol hakkunde yimɓe halla-hakkiilo'en e sooya-gooŋga'en. Ɓe ɗon ndaara nuɗɗinki bana laawol heɓugo riba.
1Timothy6:6 Fakat
1Timothy6:7 ngam walaa ko ngadduɗen haa duniyaaru e walaa boo ko mbaaweten wurtodaago.
1Timothy6:8 Ngam maajum
1Timothy6:9 Ammaa yiɗɓe riskugo ndo'oto nder estooji. Ɓe nastan tuuforgol e suunooji paataaɗi
1Timothy6:10 Ngam suuno ceede woni ɗaɗol halleende fuu. Woɗɓe cuunaama ɗe
1Timothy6:11 Ammaa an
1Timothy6:12 Sey a haɓa haɓre nuɗɗinki woonde haa keɓa ngeendam nduumiiɗam. Allah ewni ma haa ngeendam man saa'i mbaɗɗa seedamku nuɗɗinki ma mbooɗŋgu yeeso seedooɓe ɗuuɗɓe.
1Timothy6:13 Yeeso Allah
1Timothy6:14 Ɗowtan umroore nde'e bee laaɓɗum
1Timothy6:15 Baŋguki man laatoto nder saa'iire nde Allah ta'ino ɗum. O Allah ke'iiɗo maŋgteego
1Timothy6:16 Kaŋko feere maako mari duumaare
1Timothy6:17 Umru riskuɓe nder duniyaaru ndu'u
1Timothy6:18 Umru ɓe ɓe kuuwa mbooɗeeŋga
1Timothy6:19 Bana nii ɓe cigoranto ko'e maɓɓe ndesaari mboondi
1Timothy6:20 An Timote
1Timothy6:21 Woɗɓe ɗon mbi'a ɓe ngoodi anndal nga'al
2Timothy1:1 Min Pol nelaaɗo Yeesu Almasiihu fodde muuyo Allah
2Timothy1:2 Mi ɗon winndane Timote
2Timothy1:3 Mi ɗon yetta Allah mo njaggantoomi bee numo ɓernde laaɓŋgo
2Timothy1:4 Mi siftori gonɗi ma
2Timothy1:5 Mi siftori nuɗɗinki ma ki walaa naafikaare. Aran
2Timothy1:6 Ngam daliila man mi ɗon siftinore: Ɓesdu hakkilango dokkal Allah ngal keɓɗa nde mballinmi juuɗe dow maaɗa.
2Timothy1:7 Ngam naa ruuhu kulol Allah hokki en
2Timothy1:8 Ngam maajum
2Timothy1:9 Kaŋko hisni en
2Timothy1:10 Jonta mo'ere man waŋgi bee garki Yeesu Almasiihu
2Timothy1:11 Ngam daliila Linjiila ka'a
2Timothy1:12 Ngam daliila man
2Timothy1:13 Joga bolle gooŋgaaje ɗe nanɗa haa am
2Timothy1:14 Ekkitinol booɗŋgol ngol kalfinaaɗa
2Timothy1:15 A anndi
2Timothy1:16 Jawmiraawo hinno saare Onesiforus
2Timothy1:17 Nde o yotti Roma
2Timothy1:18 Jawmiraawo hokka mo hinnuye mum nder nyalaade kiita. Haa Efesus o huuwani yam kuuɗe ɗuuɗɗe
2Timothy2:1 An kam
2Timothy2:2 E ko nanɗa haa am yeeso seedooɓe ɗuuɗɓe
2Timothy2:3 Munyan bone bana am
2Timothy2:4 Walaa soojeejo suklanto kuuje goɗɗe
2Timothy2:5 Non boo baɗoowo gala. To o ɗowtanaaki umrooje gala
2Timothy2:6 Haandi demoowo torriiɗo ɗuuɗɗum aarta yimɓe nyaamugo ƴaamle ngesa muuɗum.
2Timothy2:7 Numtu ko mbi'mi
2Timothy2:8 Siftor Yeesu Almasiihu
2Timothy2:9 Ngam daliila Linjiila ka'a mi ɗon munyana bone
2Timothy2:10 Ngam man mi ɗon munyana koo ɗume fuu daliila suɓaaɓe Allah
2Timothy2:11 Ndaa wolde hoolniinde: To en maaydi bee maako
2Timothy2:12 To en ɗon munyana bone
2Timothy2:13 To en laataaki hoolaaɓe
2Timothy2:14 Ndaa ko a siftinorta nuɗɗinɓe bee hunnugo ɓe yeeso Allah: Taa ɓe njokkira dow bolle. Jokkirli man nafataa koo ɗume
2Timothy2:15 Tiina haa a waŋga yeeso Allah a gerdaaɗo
2Timothy2:16 Seedu bee haalaaji baaɗɗi geddooji
2Timothy2:17 Ekkitinol maɓɓe nanndi bee huuduure layannde. Himeneyus e Filetus ɗon nder maɓɓe.
2Timothy2:18 Kamɓe ɓe celi laawol gooŋga
2Timothy2:19 Ammaa caɓɓawal cemmbiɗŋgal ngal Allah wallini
2Timothy2:20 Nder saare mawnde
2Timothy2:21 To goɗɗo laɓɓini hoore mum diga kuuje kalluɗe ɗe mbi'mi
2Timothy2:22 An
2Timothy2:23 Ammaa sala gaabi paataaɗi
2Timothy2:24 Ammaa maccuɗo Jawmiraawo
2Timothy2:25 sey o elta dartanooɓe gooŋga bee yaŋkinaare. Teema Allah hokkan ɓe laawol haa ɓe tuuba
2Timothy2:26 ɓe keɓta hakkiilooji maɓɓe

2Timothy3:3 ɓe marataa yiide
2Timothy3:4 ɓe zammbotooɓe
2Timothy3:5 Gite yimɓe

2Timothy3:7 ɓe ɗon ekkito tum
2Timothy3:8 Bana no Yannes e Yamberes ndartani Muusa
2Timothy3:9 Ammaa ɓe keɓataa yahugo yeeso
2Timothy3:10 Ammaa an
2Timothy3:11 e toonyaaŋgeeji e boneeji ɗi njarmi haa Antakiya e Ikoniya e Listira. Toonyaaŋgeeji ɗiye mi munyanaay ɗum? Ammaa nder maaji fuu Jawmiraawo hisni yam.
2Timothy3:12 Yiɗɓe yeeɗugo bee kulol Allah nder kawtal bee Almasiihu Yeesu fuu
2Timothy3:13 Ammaa foroy halluɓe e hiilooɓe ɓesdan yahugo yeeso nder halleende
2Timothy3:14 Ammaa an kam
2Timothy3:15 A anndi defte ceniiɗe diga a ɓiŋngel. Kanje ɗe mbaawan hokkugo ma hikma haa a heɓa kisndam bee nuɗɗinki nder Yeesu Almasiihu.
2Timothy3:16 Ko winnda nder Deftere Allah fuu iwi haa Ruuhu Allah. Ɗum nafan ngam ekkitingo gooŋga
2Timothy3:17 ngam haa goɗɗo Allah laato taaskiiɗo timmuɗo ngam kuuɗe booɗɗe koo ɗeye.
2Timothy4:1 Mi ɗon hunne yeeso Allah e Yeesu Almasiihu mo hiitoto maayɓe e yeeɗɓe fuu
2Timothy4:2 Waazin yimɓe wolde Allah bee dartaare koo ndey fuu
2Timothy4:3 Ngam wakkati waran
2Timothy4:4 Heedi gooŋga kam
2Timothy4:5 Ammaa an
2Timothy4:6 Ngam min kam
2Timothy4:7 Mi haɓi haɓre woonde
2Timothy4:8 Jonta keɓal daɗki ɗon reenammi. Jawmiraawo
2Timothy4:9 Haɓdu wargo haa am
2Timothy4:10 Ngam Demas wudini yam
2Timothy4:11 Luka feere mum ɗon wondi bee am. Hoo'u Markus
2Timothy4:12 Mi neli Tikikus haa Efesus.
2Timothy4:13 To a ɗon wara
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandire kilaajo waɗi yam halleende ɗuuɗnde. Jawmiraawo hiitoto mo deydey kuuɗe maako.
2Timothy4:15 Reenta e maako an boo
2Timothy4:16 Nyalaade arannde nde ndariimi yeeso kiita ngam haa mi jaabano hoore am
2Timothy4:17 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wondi bee am
2Timothy4:18 Jawmiraawo hisnatam halleende fuu
2Timothy4:19 Hoofnu Piriska e Akilas
2Timothy4:20 Erastus lutti haa Korintu. Torofimus
2Timothy4:21 Haɓdu wargo hiddeko duumol waɗa. Ewbulus e Pudes e Linus e Kalawdiya e deerɗiraaɓe fuu koofni ma.
2Timothy4:22 Jawmiraawo wonda bee ma. Mo'ere Allah wonda bee mooɗon fuu.

Philemon1:2 e haa Afiya

Philemon1:5 ngam mi ɗon nana no a yiɗiri senaaɓe Allah fuu
Philemon1:6 Mi ɗon toro Allah
Philemon1:7 Yiide ma seyni yam e suusɗini yam masin
Philemon1:8 Ngam maajum
Philemon1:9 ammaa ngam daliila yiide mi ɗon toro ma
Philemon1:10 Mi ɗon toro ma ngam Onesimus
Philemon1:11 Naane o nafaayno ma
Philemon1:12 Jonta mi ɗon lorna mo haa maaɗa. Kaŋko
Philemon1:13 Mi ɓuranno yiɗugo o jooɗodo bee am mbattudi ma haa o wallammi jonta nder fursina ka ngonmi ngam daliila Linjiila.
Philemon1:14 Ammaa mi yiɗaa waɗugo ɗum bilaa yerduye ma
Philemon1:15 Teema Onesimus seedi bee ma ngam wakkati seɗɗa ngam haa keɓta mo ngam foroy
Philemon1:16 taa o laato maccuɗo ma tan fahin
Philemon1:17 Ngam maajum
Philemon1:18 To o waɗino ma kalluɗum
Philemon1:19 Ndaa
Philemon1:20 Useni
Philemon1:21 Mi ɗon winndane ngam mi anndi fakat a ɗowtanto yam. Mi anndi a waɗan ko ɓura.
Philemon1:22 Jonta boo
Philemon1:23 Epafras gonduɗo bee am nder fursina ngam daliila Yeesu Almasiihu hoofni ma.
Philemon1:24 Markus e Aristarkus e Demas e Luka huuwdiɗɗiraaɓe am boo koofni ma.
Philemon1:25 Mo'ere Jawmiraawo meeɗen Yeesu Almasiihu wonda bee mooɗon fuu.

Hebrews2:4 Allah boo semmbiɗini seedamku maɓɓe bee alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji feere feere e bee senndango yimɓe maako dokke Ruuhu Ceniiɗo fodde muuyo maako.

Hebrews2:7 A leesni mo les malaa'ika'en wakkati seɗɗa

Hebrews7:1 Malkisadaka oo

Hebrews7:7 Walaa seko
Hebrews7:8 Nder limanku Lewi'en

Hebrews7:18 Umroore ɓooymaare wudinaama
Hebrews7:19 Ngam tawreeta Muusa waawaay timmidingo koo ɗume. Jonta en keɓi tammunde ɓurnde mawnugo
Hebrews7:20 Ɗum waɗi bee hunayeere. Liman'en naane ndarnaama bilaa hunayeere bana nde'e.

Hebrews7:26 Yeesu woni hooreejo liman'en mo haandani en. O ceniiɗo

Hebrews8:1 Ndaa haala ɓurka mawnugo nder ko min mbi'ata: En ngoodi hooreejo liman'en

Hebrews8:3 Hooreejo liman'en fuu darnaama ngam lii'anaago Allah dokke e kirseteeɗi. Ngam maajum sey o wadda kaŋko boo ko o lii'oto.

Hebrews9:1 Alkawal aranal
Hebrews9:2 Suudu laymaaru ndu deeɗi ɗiɗi waɗaama
Hebrews9:3 Ɓaawo wiirndallo ɗiɗaɓo
Hebrews9:4 Nder maaru woodi gulduɗum uurle cuddaaɗum fuu bee kaŋŋeeri e sundukru alkawal suddaandu bee kaŋŋeeri. Nder sundukru man woodi taasawo kaŋŋeeri bee mannu nder maago e sawru Haruna finniindu e alluhaaje kaa'e ɗiɗi bee bolle alkawal binndaaɗe dow maaje.
Hebrews9:5 Dow sundukru man woodi suuraaji keruba'en laatiiɓe misaalu tedduŋgal Allah. Ɓe mbeeɗi bileeji maɓɓe dow jooɗorde ngam kefergal. Ammaa walaa haaje min tinndina kuuje ɗe'e fuu.
Hebrews9:6 Nde kuuje fuu ndarnaama bana nii

Hebrews9:9 Ɗum misaalu ngam wakkatiire jonta. Ɗum yiɗi wi'go: Dokke e kirsaaɗi lii'anaaɗi Allah mbaawataa laɓɓingo numo ɓernde dewanɗo mo.
Hebrews9:10 Umrooje ɗe'e ndaarani ɓanndu neɗɗo
Hebrews9:11 Ammaa jonta Almasiihu wari. Kaŋko woni hooreejo liman'en dow kuuje booɗɗe ɗe ngarani en jonta. O saali gal laymaaru ɓurndu ndu naane mawnugo e wooɗugo. Juuɗe yimɓe mbaɗaay ndu
Hebrews9:12 Almasiihu nasti nde woore nder laymaaru
Hebrews9:13 Ƴiiƴam jawɗi be'i e ga'i e ndoondi wiige mbiccaama dow yimɓe soɓɓe
Hebrews9:14 nde non kam
Hebrews9:15 Ngam maajum Almasiihu woni hakkunndeejo Allah bee yimɓe nder alkawal kesal. O maayi ngam soottugo yimɓe diga aybeeji ɗi ɓe mbaɗno yaake ɓe ɗonno nder alkawal aranal
Hebrews9:16 Ngam haa ɗereewol alkawal ndonŋgu huuwtinire
Hebrews9:17 Ngam ɗereewol alkawal ndonŋgu nafataa
Hebrews9:18 Kanjum waɗi
Hebrews9:19 Nde Muusa waŋginani ummaatoore fuu umrooje nder tawreeta
Hebrews9:20 O wi'i: “Ƴiiƴam ɗa'am ɗon tabitina alkawal ngal Allah umri on ɗowtanaago.”
Hebrews9:21 Bana non boo

Hebrews12:1 Enen boo
Hebrews12:2 Taa en acca sutugo Yeesu ngam nuɗɗinki meeɗen ɗon dari dow maako diga fuɗɗoode haa timmoode. Nde ɓe mbari mo haa leggal gaafaaŋgal
Hebrews12:3 Nume dow goɗɗo mo munyani tuurtol hakke'en! Kanjum ɗum wallan on ngam taa on tampa.
Hebrews12:4 Ngam nder haɓre mooɗon bee hakke on kaɓaay haa yotti maayde tawon.
Hebrews12:5 On ngejjiti bolle cemmbiɗinooje ɗe Allah wolwani on
Hebrews12:6 Ngam Jawmiraawo ɗon elta yiɗaaɓe muuɗum
Hebrews12:7 Munyane torra ngam daliila elto Allah. Allah ɗon elta on bana baaba eltirta ɓiyum. Woodi ɓiŋngel ngel baaba muuɗum eltataa na?
Hebrews12:8 To Allah eltaay on bana goɗɗo eltirta ɓiɓɓe muuɗum fuu

Hebrews12:10 Baabiraaɓe meeɗen haa duniyaaru elti en wakkati seɗɗa
Hebrews12:11 Yaake o ɗon elta en
Hebrews12:12 Ngam maajum ndartine juuɗe mooɗon comɗe e koppi mooɗon tampuɗi!
Hebrews12:13 Tokke laabi darnuɗi
Hebrews12:14 Tiine jooɗaago nder salaaman bee yimɓe fuu. Ngeeɗe nder senaare

Hebrews12:16 Kakkile ngam taa koo moy mooɗon laato daakaareejo malla lasbinoowo bana Isuwa mo soorri daraja afaaku mum ngam o heɓa o nyaama nde woore tan.

Hebrews12:18 Onon on ɓaditaaki bana no Isra'iila'en ɓaditino

Hebrews13:1 Tokke yiɗindirgo ngam on deerɗiraaɓe.
Hebrews13:2 Taa ngejjite weernugo hoɗɓe. Woɗɓe mbaɗi ɗum
Hebrews13:3 Ciftore haɓɓaaɓe nder fursina bana to on kaɓɓaaɓe hawtaade bee maɓɓe. Ciftore toonyaaɓe
Hebrews13:4 Sey yimɓe fuu camɗina teegal
Hebrews13:5 Taa cuune ceede
Hebrews13:6 Ngam maajum en mbaawan wolwugo bee dartaare: “Jawmiraawo woni balloowo yam
Hebrews13:7 Ciftore ardiiɓe on
Hebrews13:8 Yeesu Almasiihu
Hebrews13:9 Taa acce ekkitinolji hayamji koo ɗiye celna on diga laawol gooŋga. Ngam booɗɗum ɓerɗe meeɗen cemmbiɗa bee mo'ere Allah
Hebrews13:10 En ngoodi hirsirde nde liman'en huuwooɓe nder laymaaru Yahuudu'en keɓataa nyaamugo kirseteeɗi haa maare.
Hebrews13:11 Ngam hooreejo liman'en ɗon wadda ƴiiƴam dabbaaji nder nokkuure ɓurnde senaago haa o lii'o ɗam ngam ittuki hakkeeji
Hebrews13:12 Ngam maajum Yeesu boo maayi yaasi dammugal berniwol
Hebrews13:13 Sey en ngurto
Hebrews13:14 Ngam en ngalaa joonde tabitnde haa duniyaaru ndu'u
Hebrews13:15 Barka Yeesu
Hebrews13:16 Taa ngejjite waɗugo mbooɗeeŋga. Mballindire ngam kanjum woni kirseteeɗum ɗum Allah yerdoto.
Hebrews13:17 Ɗowtane ardiiɓe on
Hebrews13:18 Tore Allah ngam amin. Ngam min anndi fakat ɓerɗe amin laaɓi
Hebrews13:19 Mi ɗon ɓesda toraago on
Hebrews13:20 Allah jawmu salaaman ummitini Jawmiraawo meeɗen Yeesu diga maayde – kaŋko o laati gaynaako baali mawɗo
Hebrews13:21 Allah waawna on waɗugo ko wooɗi fuu ngam haa on mbaɗa muuyo maako. O waɗa nder meeɗen ko fottanta mo
Hebrews13:22 Onon deerɗiraaɓe
Hebrews13:23 Mi yiɗi anndingo on
Hebrews13:24 Koofne ardiiɓe on fuu
Hebrews13:25 Mo'ere Allah laatano on fuu.
James1:1 Min
James1:2 Deerɗiraaɓe am
James1:3 Ngam on anndi poonduki nuɗɗinki mooɗon waddan munyal.
James1:4 Ammaa sey munyal mooɗon waŋga laaɓɗum
James1:5 To hikma ŋakkani gooto caka mooɗon
James1:6 Ammaa sey o toro bee nuɗɗinki
James1:7 Taa irin goɗɗo oo tammo heɓugo koo ɗume haa Jawmiraawo
James1:8 ngam tum o cakliiɗo
James1:9 Sey deerɗiraawo leesɗo seyo to Allah ɓaŋgti mo
James1:10 deerɗiraawo diskuɗo boo seyo to Allah leesni mo. Ngam o saaloto bana pinndi huɗo.
James1:11 To naaŋge ɓaŋgti
James1:12 Barka laatanto goɗɗo mo munyani jarribeeki
James1:13 To goɗɗo jarribaama
James1:14 Ammaa jarraba ɗon naŋnga goɗɗo to suuno mum esti ɗum
James1:15 Ɓaawoɗon
James1:16 Deerɗiraaɓe am yiɗaaɓe
James1:17 Caahu mbooɗŋgu e dokkal timmuŋgal fuu iwi diga dow
James1:18 Nder muuyo maako o hokki en ngeendam bee wolde maako gooŋgaare
James1:19 Deerɗiraaɓe am yiɗaaɓe
James1:20 Ngam tikkere neɗɗo hiɓɓintaa adilaaku Allah.
James1:21 Ngam maajum
James1:22 Taa zammbe ko'e mooɗon bee wi'go: Nanugo wolde Allah tan he'i. Ammaa mbaɗe ko nde wi'i on.
James1:23 Ngam koo moy nani wolde Allah
James1:24 o yi'i no o wa'i
James1:25 Ammaa to goɗɗo ɗon lincita tawreeta Allah timmuka
James1:26 To goɗɗo ɗon numa o goɗɗo diina
James1:27 Ndaa ko hollata diina gooŋgaaha e ceniika yeeso Allah Baabiraawo: Hakkilango atiime'en e rewɓe yurumɓe nder ɓillaare maɓɓe e aynugo hoore muuɗum ngam taa duniyaaru soɓna ɗum.
James2:1 Deerɗiraaɓe am
James2:2 To diskuɗo ɓorniiɗo limce booɗɗe e halagaare kaŋŋeeri haa hoondu maako
James2:3 on teddini ɓorniiɗo booɗɗe
James2:4 To on mbaɗi non
James2:5 Deerɗiraaɓe am yiɗaaɓe
James2:6 Ammaa onon on ɗon njawo laafuɓe. Naa ɗum riskuɓe toskinta on e njahrata on yeeso hiitooɓe na?
James2:7 Naa kamɓe kallinta innde woonde nde ɓe ewni dow mooɗon?
James2:8 Fakat
James2:9 Ammaa to on ɗon cenndindira yimɓe
James2:10 Ngam koo to goɗɗo ɗowtanake umrooje tawreeta fuu
James2:11 Ngam mo wi'i: “Taa waɗ njeenu” wi'i boo: “Taa mbar-hoore.” Koo to a waɗaay njeenu
James2:12 Ngam maajum
James2:13 Ngam to goɗɗo walaa enɗam
James2:14 Deerɗiraaɓe am! Ɗume ɗum nafata to goɗɗo wi'i: “Mi woodi nuɗɗinki”
James2:15 To woodi deerɗiraaɓe worɓe malla rewɓe
James2:16 goɗɗo caka mooɗon boo wi'i ɓe: “Allah hokku on saa'a! Kolte
James2:17 Non nuɗɗinki boo wa'i
James2:18 Ammaa to goɗɗo wi'i: “An a woodi nuɗɗinki
James2:19 A nuɗɗini Allah o gooto na? Booɗɗum! Ginnaaji boo nuɗɗini ɗum
James2:20 Paataaɗo! A yiɗi holleego nuɗɗinki bilaa kuuɗe nafataa sam na?
James2:21 Noy Allah adiliniri kaakiraawo meeɗen Ibrahiima? Bee kuuɗe maako o heɓi ɗum
James2:22 A laari no nuɗɗinki maako yahdiri bee kuuɗe maako. Kuuɗe maako kebbitini nuɗɗinki maako.
James2:23 Bana non ko Deftere Allah wi'no hiɓɓiri: “Ibrahiima nuɗɗini Allah
James2:24 Kadi na on ndaari
James2:25 Non boo Rahab
James2:26 Bana no goɗɗo bilaa yoŋki laatake maayɗo
James3:1 Deerɗiraaɓe am! Taa ɗuuɗɓe mooɗon laato ekkitinooɓe
James3:2 En fuu en ɗon mbaɗa aybe bee laabi feere feere. Mo waɗataa aybe nder bolle muuɗum o timmuɗo
James3:3 En ɗon nastina labaŋge haa kunnduɗe pucci ngam haa ɗi ɗowtano en
James3:4 Nume boo haala koommbooje. No ɗe mawniri fuu
James3:5 Non boo ɗemŋgal. Ngal tergal pamaral
James3:6 Ɗemŋgal neɗɗo boo ɗon bana yiite. Ngal laati mooɓgal halleende fuu caka terɗe meeɗen. Ngal ɗon soɓna ɓanndu fuu. Ngal ɗon jamna balɗe ngeendam meeɗen fuu. Kaŋgal boo yiite jahannama jamni ngal.
James3:7 Tum
James3:8 Ammaa ɗemŋgal
James3:9 Bee maagal en ɗon ngetta Jawmiraawo e Baabiraawo
James3:10 Diga hunnduko wooto
James3:11 Walaa seeɓoore ɓulata ndiyam mbelɗam e ndiyam kaaɗɗam haa ɓuldude woore.
James3:12 Deerɗiraaɓe am
James3:13 Woodi hikmaajo
James3:14 Ammaa to on ngoodi kaajal caatuŋgal e jokkirgol nder ɓerɗe mooɗon
James3:15 Irin hikma ka'a iwaay haa dow
James3:16 Ngam haa kaajal e jokkirgol ngoni
James3:17 Ammaa hikma iwka diga dow
James3:18 Kuuɗe adiliije iwi haa sulhindiranɓe yimɓe
James4:1 Haa toy kaɓe e jokkirli caka mooɗon iwata? Naa ɗum ɗon iwa haa suunooji mooɗon kaɓanɗi foroy nder terɗe mooɗon?
James4:2 On ɗon cuuna kuuje goɗɗe
James4:3 Koo to on ɗon toro mo
James4:4 Onon yewɓe umrooje Allah! On anndaa soobrugo bee duniyaaru ɗum honugo Allah na? To on coobiri bee duniyaaru
James4:5 Taa nume ko Deftere Seniinde wolwi ɗum meere
James4:6 Ammaa mo'ere nde Allah mo'ani en ɓuri ɗum. Ngam man Deftere Seniinde wi'i: “Allah ɗon dartano mawnitiiɓe
James4:7 Ngam man leestine ko'e mon yeeso Allah. Ndartane Sayɗaanu
James4:8 Ɓadite Allah
James4:9 Cune
James4:10 Njaŋkine ko'e mooɗon yeeso Jawmiraawo
James4:11 Deerɗiraaɓe am
James4:12 Allah feere muuɗum woni kiitoowo
James4:13 Jonta
James4:14 Onon wolwanɓe bana nii
James4:15 Haani on mbi'a: “To Jawmiraawo muuyi
James4:16 Ammaa jonta on ɗon mawnito
James4:17 Annduɗo waɗugo mbooɗeeŋga to waɗaay ɗum

James5:2 Jawdi mooɗon nyoli

James5:4 On njoɓaay ngeenaari sodooɓe gese mooɗon. Nane bojji maɓɓe! Bojji sodooɓe ƴaamle mooɗon njottake haa Jawmiraawo honooɓe asama.

James5:12 Ammaa ko ɓuri ɗum fuu
James5:13 Woodi mo ɗon yara bone caka mooɗon na? O waɗa do'a. Woodi mo ɗon seyi na? O yima gime gettooje.
James5:14 Woodi nyawɗo caka mooɗon na? O ewno ndotti'en jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe. Ɓe ngara ɓe toro Allah ngam maako
James5:15 Tornde bee nuɗɗinki hisnan nyawɗo oo. Jawmiraawo yamɗitinan mo
James5:16 Ngam maajum mbaŋgine hakkeeji mooɗon hakkunde mooɗon
James5:17 Eliya o goɗɗo bana meeɗen. O tori Allah bee tiinaare ngam taa iyeende toɓa. Duuɓi tati bee reeta nde toɓaay.
James5:18 O tori mo fahin
James5:19 Deerɗiraaɓe am! To gooto mooɗon seli laawol gooŋga
James5:20 Anndite ɗu'um: To goɗɗo lorni hakkeejo diga laawol majjere
1Peter1:1 Min Simon Piyer
1Peter1:2 On laati suɓaaɓe ngam Allah Baabiraawo muuyi ɗum diga ɓooyma. Ruuhu maako seni on
1Peter1:3 Ngetten Allah
1Peter1:4 En ɗon tammo heɓugo ndonŋgu ngu o sigani yimɓe maako haa asama. Ngu nyolataa
1Peter1:5 On ɗon nuɗɗini mo. Ngam maajum o ɗon ayna on bee baawɗe maako. Nder balɗe ragareeje
1Peter1:6 Ceye masin
1Peter1:7 Boneeji ɗi'i poondan nuɗɗinki mooɗon to ki gooŋgahi. Koo kaŋŋeeri wonnotoondi maa ɓe ɗon poonda ndi nder yiite
1Peter1:8 Koo nde on ngi'aay mo
1Peter1:9 ngam on keɓan ko on tammoto nder nuɗɗinki mooɗon
1Peter1:10 Annabi'en mbaɗi annabaaku dow mo'ere nde Allah taaskitinani on diga fuɗɗam
1Peter1:11 
1Peter1:12 Allah waŋginani ɓe kubaruwol ngol o halfinani ɓe
1Peter1:13 Ngam maajum
1Peter1:14 Bana ɓikkoy ɗowtiikoy
1Peter1:15 Ammaa bana Allah ewniiɗo on o Ceniiɗo
1Peter1:16 Ngam Deftere wi'i: “Laate on senaaɓe ngam min mi Ceniiɗo.”
1Peter1:17 To on ɗon mbaɗa do'a
1Peter1:18 On coottaama diga yahdu hallundu ndu on ndoni haa kaakiraaɓe mooɗon. On anndi on coottiraaka bee kuuje ɗe saman maaje ustoto bana kaŋŋeeri malla cardi
1Peter1:19 ammaa on coottiraama bee ƴiiƴam caɗɗam ɗam Almasiihu
1Peter1:20 Allah suɓi mo diga duniyaaru tagaaka tawon
1Peter1:21 Ngam barka maako on nuɗɗini Allah mo ummitini mo diga maayde
1Peter1:22 Jonta nde on ceni ko'e mooɗon bee ɗowtanaago gooŋga
1Peter1:23 On laati danyaaɓe hesɓe bee wolde Allah. Wolde nde'e laataaki bana aawdi nyolanndi
1Peter1:24 Bana ko winnda: “Yimɓe fuu ɗon bana fuɗŋgooji
1Peter1:25 Ammaa wolde Jawmiraawo duumoto.” Wolde nde'e woni kubaruwol ceynoowol ngol anndinaaɗon.

1Peter2:2 Bana no ɓikkoy keccoy ngiɗiri kosam tum

1Peter2:4 Ɓadite mo. O laati hayre yeere nde yimɓe meeriɗini
1Peter2:5 Onon boo bana kaa'e geete
1Peter2:6 Ngam Deftere wi'i: “Mi jo'ini haa Siyona hayre talkumoore suɓaande
1Peter2:7 Hayre nde'e laatanake nuɗɗinɓe mo saman ɗuuɗɗo. Ammaa haa sooyɓe nuɗɗinki: “Hayre nde mahooɓe ngudini
1Peter2:8 Fahin Deftere wi'i: “Nde laatanake yimɓe hayre fergoore
1Peter2:9 Ammaa onon ngoni asŋgol cuɓaaŋgol
1Peter2:10 Naane on laataaki yimɓe ummaatoore Allah
1Peter2:11 Soobiraaɓe am
1Peter2:12 Sey joonde mooɗon caka heefeerɓe wooɗa ngam koo to ɓe ngulli on bee wi'go on halluɓe
1Peter2:13 Ngam daliila Jawmiraawo
1Peter2:14 Ɗowtane ngomna'en
1Peter2:15 Ngam ndaa ko woni muuyo Allah: Bee kuuɗe booɗɗe ɗe on kuuwata
1Peter2:16 Jonta on rimɓe
1Peter2:17 Teddine yimɓe fuu
1Peter2:18 Onon huuwanooɓe yimɓe
1Peter2:19 Ɗum booɗɗum to on munyi naawɗum bone ko ɓe ukkanto on meere ngam daliila Allah.
1Peter2:20 Ɗume munyal mooɗon nafata to on munyi piyɗe ɗe ɓe piyi on daliila aybeeji mooɗon? Ammaa to on munyi boneeji ɗi on njari ngam on mbaɗi ko wooɗi
1Peter2:21 Ngam irin man Allah ewni on. Ngam Almasiihu bee hoore mum yari bone ngam mooɗon
1Peter2:22 O meeɗaay waɗugo hakke
1Peter2:23 Nde ɓe kuɗi mo o huɗtaaki
1Peter2:24 Almasiihu bee hoore muuɗum roondi hakkeeji meeɗen haa ɓanndu muuɗum dow leggal

1Peter3:8 Dow ko mi wolwi fuu

2Peter1:1 Min Simon Piyer
2Peter1:2 Mo'ere e salaaman ɗuuɗana on ngam on anndi Allah e Yeesu
2Peter1:3 Allah hokkiri en koo ɗume bee baawɗe mum haa en ngeeɗa nder ngeendam e kulol maako. O hokki en ɗum ngam en anndi ewniiɗo en nder tedduŋgal mum e nder mbooɗeeŋga mum.
2Peter1:4 Bana nii o waɗani en iinaaji ɓurɗi mawnugo e ɓurɗi saman haa on laato bana Allah wa'i nde nii on daɗi suunooji kalkooji gonɗi nder duniyaaru.
2Peter1:5 Ngam maajum
2Peter1:6 naŋgtaare e tiinaare e kulol Allah
2Peter1:7 yiide deerɗiraagu e yiide.
2Peter1:8 To kuuje ɗe'e ɗon nder mooɗon
2Peter1:9 Ngam mo walaa ɗe
2Peter1:10 Ngam maajum deerɗam'en
2Peter1:11 Bana non on keɓan nastugo laamu nduumiiŋgu ngu Jawmiraawo e Kisnoowo meeɗen Yeesu Almasiihu bee feecaare.
2Peter1:12 Ngam maajum
2Peter1:13 ammaa mi numi ɗum kaanduɗum mi findina on bee ciftinorki ki'i nde mi ɗon bee yoŋki tawon.
2Peter1:14 Ngam mi anndi mi ɓadake accugo ɓanndu ndu'u
2Peter1:15 Ngam maajum mi haɓdan waɗugo ko mi waawi fuu ngam on ciftora haala ka'a ɓaawo dilluki am.
2Peter1:16 Naa bee kiccaaji ƴaggiiɗi min anndiniri on baawɗe e garki Jawmiraawo men Yeesu Almasiihu. Ammaa ngam bee gite amin min ngi'i maŋngu maako!

2Peter3:1 Yiɗaaɓe am
2Peter3:2 Mi yiɗi on ciftora bolle ɗe annabi'en senaaɓe aarti mbolwi e umroore Jawmiraawo e Kisnoowo
2Peter3:3 Aran
2Peter3:4 ɓe mbi'an: “O wi'no o waran
2Peter3:5 Ɓe ngooyti bee anniya no diga ɓooyma asama ɗon
2Peter3:6 kadiboo o halkiri duniyaaru naane bee ndiyam
2Peter3:7 Bee wolde man nden asama e lesdi jonta ndesaama ngam yiite
2Peter3:8 Yiɗaaɓe am
2Peter3:9 Woɗɓe ɗon numa Jawmiraawo ɗon neeɓa waɗugo ko o iinino. Ammaa o ɗon munyana on ngam o yiɗaa koo moy halka
2Peter3:10 Koo non fuu
2Peter3:11 Nde nii kuuje ɗe'e fuu kalkan bana non
2Peter3:12 haa nyalaade Allah nde ndeenoton wara law. Nyannde man asamanji ngulete
2Peter3:13 Ammaa Allah iini o hokkan en asamanji kesi e lesdi kesri haa adilaaku wonata. Kanjum en ndeenata.
2Peter3:14 Ngam man yiɗaaɓe am
2Peter3:15 Paame no munyal Jawmiraawo meeɗen heɓani on laawol hisugo. Pol
2Peter3:16 O winndi ɗum nder bataakeeji maako fuu haa o wolwi dow haala ka'a. Woodi haalaaji caɗɗi nder maaji. Sooya-faamu'en e tampuɓe ɗon ngaylita maana maaji
2Peter3:17 Ammaa onon yiɗaaɓe
2Peter3:18 Ammaa mawne nder mo'ere e anndal Jawmiraawo e Kisnoowo meeɗen Yeesu Almasiihu. Tedduŋgal laatano mo diga jonta haa foroy. Aamiina!
1John1:1 Min ɗon mbinndana on dow Wolde hokkannde ngeendam
1John1:2 Ngam ngeendam man waŋgi
1John1:3 Ko min ngi'i e ko min nani
1John1:4 Kanjum min ɗon mbinndana on ɗum ngam haa seyo meeɗen heewa.
1John1:5 Ndaa kubaruwol ngol min nani haa Yeesu Almasiihu

1John1:8 To en mbi'i en ngalaa hakke
