1John1:10 To en mbi'i en mbaɗaay hakke
1John2:1 Ɓikkoy am
1John2:2 Ngam Almasiihu bee hoore mum hokki yoŋki muuɗum ngam yaafuye hakkeeji meeɗen
1John2:3 To en ɗowtanake umrooje Allah
1John2:4 To goɗɗo wi'i: Mi anndi Allah
1John2:5 Ammaa ɗowtantooɗo wolde Allah
1John2:6 Bi'ɗo o ɗon nder kawtal bee Allah
1John2:7 Yiɗaaɓe am
1John2:8 Koo non boo
1John2:9 To goɗɗo wi'i o ɗon nder annoora
1John2:10 Giɗɗo deerɗum ɗon jooɗi nder annoora
1John2:11 Ammaa ganyɗo deerɗum
1John2:12 Mi ɗon winndana on
1John2:13 Mi ɗon winndana on
1John2:14 Mi winndani on
1John2:15 Taa ngiɗe duniyaaru ndu'u e kuuje maaru fuu. To goɗɗo yiɗi duniyaaru
1John2:16 Ngam ko woni nder duniyaaru fuu
1John2:17 Duniyaaru bee ko suunete nder maaru fuu caaloto. Ammaa ɗowtantooɗo muuyo Allah yeeɗan haa foroy.
1John2:18 Ɓikkoy am
1John2:19 Caka meeɗen yimɓe ɓe'e ngurti
1John2:20 Ammaa onon
1John2:21 Mi winndani on
1John2:22 Moy woni pewoowo
1John2:23 Koo moy yeddi Ɓiɗɗo
1John2:24 Ngam man
1John2:25 Ndaa iinawol ngol o iinani en: Ɗum ngeendam nduumiiɗam.
1John2:26 Mi winndani on ɗu'um dow ɗaɓɓanɓe selnugo on.
1John2:27 Ammaa onon
1John2:28 Jonta
1John2:29 Nde on anndi Almasiihu o adiliijo
1John3:1 Ndaare no Baabiraawo yiɗiri en
1John3:2 Yiɗaaɓe am
1John3:3 Koo moy tammake ɗum
1John3:4 Baɗɗo hakke fuu tuurtani umroore Allah
1John3:5 Ammaa on anndi Almasiihu wari ngam ittugo hakkeeji. Kaŋko
1John3:6 Mo ɗon tabiti nder kawtal bee Almasiihu fuu waɗataa hakke
1John3:7 Ɓikkoy am
1John3:8 Baɗoowo hakke fuu laatake mo Iblisa
1John3:9 Laatiiɗo ɓiŋngel Allah fuu waɗataa hakke
1John3:10 Ammaa mo huuwataa kuuɗe adiliije
1John3:11 Ndaa kubaruwol ngol on nani diga fuɗɗam: “Ngiɗindiren!”
1John3:12 Taa en mbaɗa bana Kayinu mo mbari deerɗum ngam o laati mo Kalluɗo. Koni o mbari mo? Ngam kuuɗe maako ɗe kalluɗe
1John3:13 Deerɗam'en
1John3:14 En anndi en ngurtake diga maayde
1John3:15 Ganyɗo deerɗum fuu o mbaroowo ko'e. On anndi ngeendam nduumiiɗam wonataa nder mbaroowo ko'e.
1John3:16 Almasiihu hokki yoŋki muuɗum ngam meeɗen. Bee maajum en paami ko woni yiide. Enen boo
1John3:17 To marɗo yi'i haaje deerɗum
1John3:18 Ɓikkoy am
1John3:19 Bee maajum anndirten en ɗon tokki gooŋga. Kanjum waɗi ɓerɗe meeɗen nde'ititto yeeso Allah.
1John3:20 Ngam to ɓerɗe meeɗen aybini en
1John3:21 Yiɗaaɓe am
1John3:22 en keɓan haa maako ko en toroto mo fuu
1John3:23 Ndaa ko o umri: En nuɗɗina innde Yeesu Almasiihu
1John3:24 Ɗowtaniiɗo umrooje ɗe'e ɗon tabiti nder kawtal bee Allah
1John4:1 Yiɗaaɓe am
1John4:2 Ndaa bana nii anndirton Ruuhu Allah: To goɗɗo seedake Yeesu Almasiihu wari bee ɓanndu neɗɗo fuu
1John4:3 Ammaa to o yeddi Yeesu
1John4:4 Ammaa onon ɓikkoy am
1John4:5 Kamɓe
1John4:6 Ammaa enen en yimɓe Allah. Annduɗo Allah nanan en. Mo laataaki mo Allah
1John4:7 Yiɗaaɓe am
1John4:8 Mo walaa yiide
1John4:9 Ndaa no yiide Allah waŋgirani en: Allah neli Ɓiɗɗo muuɗum bajjo nder duniyaaru ngam haa en keɓra ngeendam bee maako.
1John4:10 Ndaa ko woni yiide: Naa enen ngiɗi Allah
1John4:11 Yiɗaaɓe am
1John4:12 Walaa mo meeɗi yi'ugo Allah. To en ngiɗindira
1John4:13 Allah hokki en Ruuhu muuɗum
1John4:14 Minin
1John4:15 Mo seedi Yeesu woni Ɓiɗɗo Allah fuu
1John4:16 Enen kam en anndi yiide Allah ngam meeɗen
1John4:17 To en ɗon bee yiide timmunde
1John4:18 Marɗo yiide hulataa
1John4:19 Enen en ɗon ngiɗindira
1John4:20 To goɗɗo wi'i: Mi yiɗi Allah
1John4:21 Ndaa umroore nde Almasiihu umri en: Mo yiɗi Allah
1John5:1 Koo moy nuɗɗini Yeesu woni Almasiihu
1John5:2 Bana nii anndirten en ngiɗi ɓikkoy Allah: To en ngiɗi Allah e to en ɗowtanake umrooje maako boo.
1John5:3 Ngam yiɗugo Allah
1John5:4 ngam ɓiŋngel Allah fuu jaalake duniyaaru. Bee nuɗɗinki meeɗen njaalortooɗen duniyaaru.
1John5:5 Moy woni jaaliiɗo duniyaaru? Sey nuɗɗinɗo Yeesu woni Ɓiɗɗo Allah.
1John5:6 Yeesu Almasiihu wari bee ndiyam baptisma muuɗum e bee ƴiiƴam maayde muuɗum boo. O waraay bee ndiyam tan
1John5:7 Ngam woodi seedamkuuji tati:
1John5:8 Seedamku Ruuhu e ngu ndiyam e ngu ƴiiƴam. Seedamkuuji man tati fuu njahdi.
1John5:9 En ɗon njaɓa seedamku yimɓe
1John5:10 Koo moy nuɗɗini Ɓiɗɗo Allah
1John5:11 Ndaa seedamku ngu'u: Allah hokki en ngeendam nduumiiɗam
1John5:12 Koo moy jaɓi Ɓiɗɗo Allah woodi ngeendam
1John5:13 Onon nuɗɗinɓe innde Ɓiɗɗo Allah
1John5:14 En ɗon bee hoolɗinaare haa yeeso Allah
1John5:15 To nii en anndi o ɗon nana en to en torake mo koo ɗume fuu
1John5:16 To goɗɗo yi'i deerɗum ɗon waɗa hakkewol ngol yahrataa mo haa maayde
1John5:17 Kala sooynde adilaaku fuu ɗum hakke
1John5:18 En anndi ɓiŋngel Allah fuu waɗataa hakke
1John5:19 En anndi en laati yimɓe Allah
1John5:20 En anndi boo Ɓiɗɗo Allah wari
1John5:21 Ɓikkoy am
2John1:1 Min ndottiijo
2John1:2 ngam gooŋga ɗon nder meeɗen e ka wondan bee meeɗen haa foroy.
2John1:3 Mo'ere e hinnuye e salaaman Allah Baabiraawo e Yeesu Almasiihu Ɓiɗɗo muuɗum ngondan bee meeɗen nder gooŋga e yiide.
2John1:4 Mi seyi masin nde mi tawi ɓikkoy ma ngoɗkoy ɗon tokki gooŋga fodde umroore nde en keɓi diga Baabiraawo.
2John1:5 Jonta mi ɗon toro ma
2John1:6 Yeeɗugo fodde umrooje Allah
2John1:7 Ngam fewooɓe ɗuuɗɓe ɗon caŋkiti nder duniyaaru. Ɓe njaɓataa wi'go Yeesu Almasiihu laati neɗɗo fakat. Irin yimɓe ɓe'e
2John1:8 Kakkilane ko'e mooɗon
2John1:9 Mo jogaaki ekkitinol Almasiihu
2John1:10 To goɗɗo wari haa mooɗon e o waddanaay on ekkitinol Almasiihu
2John1:11 Ngam to goɗɗo hoofni mo
2John1:12 Woodi kuuje ɗuuɗɗe ɗe ngiɗmi winndango on
2John1:13 Ɓikkoy deerɗiraawo ma cuɓaaɗo koofni ma.
3John1:1 Min ndottiijo
3John1:2 Soobaajo am giɗaaɗo
3John1:3 Mi seyi masin nde deerɗiraaɓe ngari
3John1:4 Walaa ko ɓuri seynugo yam bana nanugo ɓikkoy am ɗon ngeeɗa nder gooŋga.
3John1:5 Soobaajo am giɗaaɗo
3John1:6 Kamɓe ceedi haala yiide maaɗa yeeso jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe. Ɗum wooɗan to a walli ɓe dow haaje jahaaŋgal maɓɓe bana ko fottanta Allah.
3John1:7 Ngam ɓe ɗon mbaɗa jahaaŋgal nga'al ngam Almasiihu
3John1:8 Enen boo
3John1:9 Woodi ko mi winndani jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe
3John1:10 Ngam man
3John1:11 Soobaajo am giɗaaɗo
3John1:12 Yimɓe fuu ngerdi Demetiriyus. Koo fodde gooŋgaaku boo o booɗɗo. Nden minin boo min ɗon ceedo ɗum. A anndi seedamku amin
3John1:13 Woodi kuuje ɗuuɗɗe ɗe mi yiɗi winndango ma
3John1:14 Mi tammi en ngiidan nii seɗɗa. En ngeewtidan hunnduko bee hunnduko.
3John1:15 Salaaman laatano ma! Soobiraaɓe ma koofni ma. An boo hoofnu soobiraaɓe meeɗen haa ton gooto gooto.
Jude1:1 Min Yahuuda
Jude1:2 Hinnuye e salaaman e yiide ɗuuɗana on.
Jude1:3 Soobiraaɓe am yiɗaaɓe
Jude1:4 Ngam halluɓe corkake caka mooɗon. Kiita dow maɓɓe winndaama diga ɓooyma. Ɓe ngayli habaru mo'ere Allah ngam ɓe keɓa hujja waɗugo daakaareeku
Jude1:5 Koo nde on anndi kuuje ɗe'e fuu
Jude1:6 Ciftore haala malaa'ika'en ƴaɓɓuɓe keerol baawɗe ɗe Allah hokkuno ɓe
Jude1:7 Bana non boo Sodoma e Gomorra bee berniiji piltuɗi. Yimɓe maaji mbaɗi bana malaa'ika'en go mbaɗi
Jude1:8 Bana nii boo
Jude1:9 Koo Mika'iilu
Jude1:10 Ammaa yimɓe ɓe'e ɓe ɗon mbolwa kalluka dow ko ɓe paamaay. Ɓe ngalaa hakkiilo bana dabbaaji
Jude1:11 Kayto! Bone laatanto ɓe ngam ɓe tokkake laawol Kayinu. Kadiboo ɓe njoofi ko'e maɓɓe nder majjere ngam heɓugo ceede bana ko Balaama waɗno. Ɓe tuurti bana Koora tuurtirno
Jude1:12 Saa'i on ɗon nyaamda
Jude1:13 Ɓe nanndi bee ƴuuge caatuɗe haa maayo
Jude1:14 Anuhu mo yeeɗi nder yidere joweeɗiɗawre haa danygol Aadamu
Jude1:15 ngam o hiito yimɓe fuu. O hiitoto hakke'en
Jude1:16 Yimɓe ɓe'e ɗon ngurŋgurto
Jude1:17 Ammaa onon
Jude1:18 Ngam ɓe ɗonno mbi'a on: “Haa balɗe ragareeje
Jude1:19 Yimɓe ɓe'e mbaɗan cennduki caka yimɓe. Sey ɗabiya maɓɓe tan ɓe tokkoto
Jude1:20 Ammaa onon
Jude1:21 tabite nder yiide Allah
Jude1:22 Njurmine sekanɓe.
Jude1:23 Woɗɓe
Jude1:24 Tedduŋgal e maŋngu e laamu e baawɗe laatano Allah gooto
Jude1:25 
Revelation1:1 Ndaa wahayu mo Allah hokki Yeesu Almasiihu ngam anndingo jaggiiɓe mum ko ɓadi wargo bee doole. Ngam maajum Almasiihu neli malaa'ikaajo muuɗum ngam anndingo ɗum jaggiiɗo muuɗum Yuhanna.
Revelation1:2 Yuhanna seedi ko o yi'i fuu
Revelation1:3 Barka laatanto jaŋnganɗo deftere nde'e e nananɓe bolle annabaaku ngu'u
Revelation1:4 Min Yuhanna
Revelation1:5 e diga Yeesu Almasiihu
Revelation1:6 o laatini en ummaatoore laamu maako e liman'en Allah
Revelation1:7 Ndaa
Revelation1:8 Jawmiraawo Allah wi'i: “Min woni Alfa e Omega
Revelation1:9 Min Yuhanna
Revelation1:10 Nyalaade Jawmiraawo
Revelation1:11 ɗon wi'a: “Ko ngi'ata
Revelation1:12 Mi wayliti haa mi laara mo ɗon wolwanammi. Nden mi yi'i jo'inirɗe pittirlaaji joweeɗiɗi ɗe kaŋŋeeri.
Revelation1:13 Caka jo'inirɗe ɗe'e
Revelation1:14 Hoore e gaasa hoore maako ɗon ndanwi tal bana hottollo raneeho e bana mallimallooje. Gite maako njayni bana ɗemŋgal yiite
Revelation1:15 kosɗe maako ɗelki bana njamndi mboɗeeri ɓolinaandi nder yiite. Sawtu maako nanndi bee hoolo ndiyamji diirtotooɗi haa maayo bee semmbe.
Revelation1:16 O ɗon jogi koode joweeɗiɗi haa juŋngo maako nyaamo
Revelation1:17 Nde mi yi'i mo
Revelation1:18 Mi geeto! Mi maayino
Revelation1:19 Ngam maajum winndu ko ngi'ɗa: Kuuje jontaaje e tammiiɗe wargo ɓaawoɗon.
Revelation1:20 Ndaa sirri koode joweeɗiɗi ɗe ngi'ɗa haa juŋngo am nyaamo e sirri jo'inirɗe pittirlaaji joweeɗiɗi ɗe kaŋŋeeri: Koode joweeɗiɗi ngoni malaa'ika'en jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe joweeɗiɗi. Jo'inirɗe pittirlaaji joweeɗiɗi boo ngoni jama'aaje nuɗɗinɓe joweeɗiɗi.”
Revelation2:1 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Efesus ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa jogiiɗo koode joweeɗiɗi haa juŋngo muuɗum nyaamo
Revelation2:2 Mi anndi kuuɗe maaɗa e torra maaɗa e tiiɗal maaɗa. A munyantaa halluɓe. A foondi yimɓe wi'anɓe ɓe nelaaɓe
Revelation2:3 A ɗon tiiɗi
Revelation2:4 Ammaa woodi ko mi felirte: A wudini yiide nde a marno haa fuɗɗam.
Revelation2:5 Siftor diga toy a do'i. Nden tuubu
Revelation2:6 Ammaa ndaa ko mi yerdi haa maaɗa: A wanyi kuuɗe Nikolay'en
Revelation2:7 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation2:8 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Simirna ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa bi'eteeɗo arano e ragareejo
Revelation2:9 Mi anndi torraaji e talakaaku maaɗa
Revelation2:10 Taa hul torraaji ɗi a tammi torreego! Ndaa
Revelation2:11 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation2:12 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Pergame ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa marɗo kaafahi ceeɓki marki mbeldiiji ɗiɗi:
Revelation2:13 Mi anndi haa njooɗiiɗa
Revelation2:14 Ammaa woodi ko mi felirte seɗɗa: Woodi tokkiiɓe ekkitinol Balaama caka mooɗon. Kaŋko o ekkitini Balak no o nastinirta Isra'iila'en nder tuuforgol haa ɓe nyaama kusel kirsaaŋgel ngam labbi
Revelation2:15 Bana non
Revelation2:16 Tuube kadi! To naa non
Revelation2:17 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation2:18 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Tiyatira ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa Ɓiɗɗo Allah
Revelation2:19 Mi anndi kuuɗe ma e yiide ma e nuɗɗinki ma e njaggu ma e tiiɗal ma. Ko a huuwata jonta ɓuri ko a huuwino haa fuɗɗam.
Revelation2:20 Ammaa woodi ko mi felirte: A ɗon acca debbo bi'eteeɗo Izabel
Revelation2:21 Mi hokki mo wakkati haa o tuuba
Revelation2:22 Ngam maajum mi sakkinan mo haa be'itte torra. Ton o torroto masin
Revelation2:23 Ɓikkoy maako boo
Revelation2:24 Ammaa onon nuɗɗinɓe luttuɓe haa Tiyatira
Revelation2:25 Ammaa sey on njogito ko marɗon bee semmbe haa to mi wari.
Revelation2:26 Jaaliiɗo
Revelation2:27 o duran ɗe bee sawru njamndi
Revelation2:28 bana min boo mi heɓi baawɗe haa Baabiraawo am. Mi hokkan jaaliiɗo oo horre baɓɓol.
Revelation2:29 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation3:1 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Sardis ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa marɗo ruuhuuji Allah joweeɗiɗi e koode joweeɗiɗi: Mi anndi kuuɗe ɗe kuuwata. Yimɓe ɗon mbi'a a geeto
Revelation3:2 Hakkil
Revelation3:3 Ngam man
Revelation3:4 Ammaa a woodi yimɓe seɗɗa haa Sardis ɓe tunwinaay limce muuɗum'en. Ɓe njahdan bee am ɓe ɓorniiɓe limce daneeje
Revelation3:5 Bana nii
Revelation3:6 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation3:7 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Filadelfiya ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa Ceniiɗo
Revelation3:8 Mi anndi kuuɗe ma. Ndaa mi maɓɓiti dammugal yeeso ma
Revelation3:9 Ndaa! Mi hokkete rewooɓe Sayɗaanu. Ɓe ɗon mbi'a ɓe Yahuudu'en
Revelation3:10 Mi aynete jam nder wakkatiire torra ngaranka dow duniyaaru fuu ngam jarribaago jooɗiiɓe nder maaru
Revelation3:11 Mi ɓadake wargo. Joga ko marɗa
Revelation3:12 Mi laatinan jaaliiɗo fuu daŋraŋgal nder haykaliiru Allah am
Revelation3:13 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation3:14 “Winndan malaa'ikaajo jama'aare nuɗɗinɓe haa Lawdikiya ni'i: Ndaa koŋngol iwŋgol haa bi'eteeɗo Aamiina
Revelation3:15 Mi anndi kuuɗe ma
Revelation3:16 Ngam a ɗon caka cak
Revelation3:17 Ngam a ɗon wi'a: Mi riski
Revelation3:18 Ngam maajum mi ɗon waso ma: Soodu haa am kaŋŋeeri laɓɓinaandi bee yiite ngam haa a riska. Soodu limce daneeje boo ngam haa a ɓorno
Revelation3:19 Yimɓe ɓe ngiɗmi
Revelation3:20 Ndaa
Revelation3:21 Mi hokkan jaaliiɗo laawol jooɗodaago bee am dow leeso laamu am
Revelation3:22 Mo woodi noppi
Revelation4:1 Ɓaawo man mi yi'i dammugal maɓɓitaaŋgal haa asama. Sawtu bana luwal ngal mi aarti nanugo wi'i yam: “Wa'a haa ɗo
Revelation4:2 Saa'i man nden Ruuhu naŋngi yam. Mi yi'i leeso laamu jo'inaama nder asama
Revelation4:3 Jooɗiiɗo oo ɗon jalbita bana hayre yaspa bee hayre sardis. Timotimooŋgal bee noonde hayre imiradi taari leeso laamu man.
Revelation4:4 Leese laamu noogas e nayi goɗɗe taari leeso go. Ndotti'en noogas e nayo
Revelation4:5 Ma'e e hoolooji e pelmaali iwi haa leeso laamu go. Yeeso maago pittirlaaji joweeɗiɗi ɗon kuɓɓi
Revelation4:6 Ko nanndi bee mbeela laaɓŋga
Revelation4:7 Huunde arannde nanndi bee mbarooga
Revelation4:8 Kuuje nayi ɗe'e
Revelation4:9 Nde kuuje geete nayi go ɗon maŋgta
Revelation4:10 nden ndotti'en noogas e nayo go ɗon tugga koppi yeeso jooɗiiɗo dow leeso laamu
Revelation4:11 “Yaa Jawmiraawo Allah amin
Revelation5:1 Mi yi'i deftere taggaande haa juŋngo nyaamo jooɗiiɗo dow leeso laamu go. Binndi keewi bakeeje maare ɗiɗi fuu
Revelation5:2 Mi yi'i boo malaa'ikaajo baawɗo
Revelation5:3 Ammaa koo haa asama
Revelation5:4 Mi woyi masin ngam walaa koo gooto he'i maɓɓititgo deftere malla laarugo ko woni nder maare.
Revelation5:5 Nden gooto caka ndotti'en go wi'i yam: “Taa woy. Ndaa mbarooga nder lenyol Yahuuda
Revelation5:6 Nden mi yi'i caka leeso laamu e kuuje geete nayi e caka ndotti'en go
Revelation5:7 Jawgel go yehi
Revelation5:8 Nde ngel hoo'i deftere go
Revelation5:9 Ɓe ngimi yimre hesre bana ni'i: “An a he'i hoo'ugo deftere nde'e
Revelation5:10 A waɗi ɓe yimɓe laamu e liman'en ngam Allah meeɗen
Revelation5:11 Nden mi yi'i
Revelation5:12 Ɓe ɗon mbolwa bee sawtu
Revelation5:13 Mi nani boo tagefooji gonɗi haa asama e haa lesdi e haa les lesdi e nder mbeela fuu
Revelation5:14 Kuuje geete nayi go njaabi: “Aamiina.” Ndotti'en tuggi koppi
Revelation6:1 Nden mi yi'i jawgel go takkiti takkannde arannde haa takkanɗe joweeɗiɗi go. Mi nani woore nder kuuje geete nayi wi'i bee sawtu bana felmaaŋgo: “War!”
Revelation6:2 Mi yi'i puccu ndaneewu. Ba'iiɗo ngu ɗon jogi lagaawal
Revelation6:3 Nde jawgel takkiti takkannde ɗiɗawre
Revelation6:4 Puccu feere wurti
Revelation6:5 Nde jawgel takkiti takkannde tataɓre

Revelation6:8 Mi yi'i

Revelation6:10 Ɓe ɗon ngooka bee sawtu

Revelation19:1 Ɓaawoɗon mi nani ko nanndi bee sawtu diga mooɓre ɗuuɗnde haa asama

Revelation19:3 Ɓe mbi'i fahin: “ Halleluya! Cuurɗe guleeki berniwol ngol ɗon ummo dow haa abada abadin!”
Revelation19:4 Ndotti'en noogas e nayo e kuuje geete nayi go cujidani Allah jooɗiiɗo dow leeso laamu

Revelation19:7 En ceya
Revelation19:8 Ɓe ɓorni mo limce daneeje ɗigguɗe
Revelation19:9 Nden malaa'ikaajo wi'i yam: “Winndu: Barka laatanto ewnaaɓe haa nyaamduuji ɓaŋgal jawgel.” Fahin o wi'i yam: “Kanje ngoni bolle gooŋgaaje iwɗe haa Allah.”
Revelation19:10 Mi hofi yeeso maako haa mi sujidana mo

Revelation19:14 Honooɓe asama mba'i pucci daneeji

Revelation19:19 Nden mi yi'i ndabbaawa go e laamiiɓe duniyaaru bee mooɓe konu muuɗum'en kawti waɗugo konu bee ba'iiɗo puccu go e bee mooɓre konu muuɗum.

Revelation19:21 Luttuɓe mbaraama bee kaafahi ki wurtino hunnduko ba'iiɗo puccu go. Colli fuu nyaami kusel maɓɓe haa ɗi cafti.
Revelation20:1 Nden mi yi'i malaa'ikaajo ɗon jippo diga asama

Revelation20:3 O sakkini nga nder ngaska lugguka
Revelation20:4 Nden mi yi'i leese laamu. Jooɗiiɓe dow maaje keɓi baawɗe hiitaago. Mi yi'i yoŋkiiji ta'aaɓe ko'e daliila seedamku Yeesu e ngam wolde Allah. Mi yi'i boo yimɓe ɓe cujidanaayno ndabbaawa malla suura maaga

Revelation20:6 Barka e senaare laatanto ummitittooɓe nder ummitineeki arani ki'i! Maayde ɗiɗawre walaa baawɗe dow maɓɓe. Ɓe laatoto liman'en Allah e Almasiihu
Revelation20:7 To duuɓi ujineere timmi
